name: Lite White Russian
directions: Fill glass with ice.  Add vanilla vodka, kaluha, and fat free half and half.  Shake well.

name: Raspberry Cordial
directions: In saucepan add sugar to frozen raspberries and cook for 20-25 minutes, until sugar has dissolved. Then mash the mixture thoroughly.
Pour the mixture through a strainer and discard pulp.
Add the strained juice of two lemons, stir.
Add the 4 cups of boiling water. Let cool, then refrigerate.

similar.name: Anne of Green Gables Raspberry Cordial

name: Evertini
directions: Place ingredients in cocktail shaker with ice. Shake and pour in a martini glass.

name: Lemonade Syrup
directions: Combine syrup and juice of the lemons.
Grate zest of lemon (yellow only).
Add to syrup mixture.
Mix well.
Mix 3 Tblsp. syrup mixture with ice and water for each glass.
Add halved strawberries, whole respberries or pitted cherries to each glass if desired.
Store in refrigerator covered for several days.

name: Yummy Cider Mix In
directions: Combine all ingredients together and store in an airtight container.
Store in the refrigerator.
To serve, stir one heaping tablespoons mix into one cup of hot apple juice or cider.

name: Raspberry Cider
directions: Bring cider to a boil in a 3 quart saucepan -- add remaining ingredients.
Stir until jelly dissolves.
Remove from heat.
Pour into serving mugs.
While still warm.garnish with lemon slices.

name: Hot Molasses Cider
directions: Insert cloves into lemon slices.
In a medium pan, bring lemon slices, apple cider, molasses and cinnamon stick to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
Discard cinnamon stick --
Stir in lemon juice.
Serve immediately.

name: Cherry Tea
directions: Blend all ingredients together well.and store in an airtight container.
Makes 5 cups of dry mix.for tea.
Stir in 1-2 tbls of tea mix and 1 cup hot or cold water.

name: Mulled Cider
directions: Pour ingredients into a slow cooker.heat on low setting till warmed through.4-6 hours.
Strain before serving.and discard solids.

name: Cinnamon Mocha Mix
directions: Combine all ingredients in a bowl -- Seal and shake till combined really well.
Store in a sealed container.
To use:.
combine 3 tbls mix with 2/3 cup boiling water or low fat milk to make a really delicious drink.

name: Substitute for Buttermilk
directions: Combine ingredients and let stand 5 minutes.
After 5 minutes, mix together well and use as buttermilk in any recipe!

name: Party on Bloody Mary
directions: Combine ingredients in a pitcher; stir.
Serve over ice.
Garnish, if desired.
Yields 7 cups.

name: Happy World
directions: Pour the brandy and Cointreau into a shaker filled with ice.
Then add the orange juice and creme de banane.
Shake vigorously; strain into an old-fashioned glass.
Garnish with a slice of orange and maraschino cherry.

name: Pink Forest
directions: Add all ingredients to a shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously.
Strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Switchel
directions: Just mix it all up in a two quart container and refridgerate.

name: Sekanjabin
directions: Dissolve sugar in water in a medium pot.
When it reaches the simmer, add the vinegar and mint. Simmer slowly for 30 minutes.
Strain into a storage bottle. Can be kept at room temperature indefinitely if sealed.
To drink, mix 2 tablespoons of syrup with 1 cup of cold or hot water.
Sugar-free variation: Increase water to 3 cups. Simmer water, mint and vinegar for 30 minutes. When cool, add 80-90 1-gram packets (to taste) of aspartame-based sweetner (Equal or similar brand).

name: Carrot Cake Shot
directions: Put in drink shaker, may add some ice if you wish for it to be cold. Shake up and pour into shot glass, or glasses if too much for one shot.
If you have no shaker put in glass one at a time starting with order listed.
Slam back and enjoy!

name: Sidecar
directions: Add all ingredients to an ice-filled shaker.
Cover and shake vigorously.
Strain into an ice-cold cocktail glass (martini).
Garnish with a maraschino cherry.

name: Terrific Iced Tea
directions: Steep tea and mint leaves in boiled spring water for 10 minutes.  Strain.
Zest orange and lemon rinds, avoiding the white pith.
Squeeze the juice of the orange and lemon into a large jug, add the strained tea, fruit zest and sugar.  Stir well to make sure sugar is dissolved.
Chill and serve over ice.
Hint:  freeze some of this mixture into ice cubes!

name: Yellow Cake Shot
directions: Put in drink shaker, may add some ice if you wish for it to be cold. Shake up and pour into shot glass.
If you have no shaker put in glass one at a time starting with order listed, but a shaker really is best for this shot.
Slam back and enjoy!

name: The Original Painkiller
directions: Combine the first four ingredients.
Pour over crushed ice.
Sprinkle with nutmeg.

name: Rusty Nail
directions: Pour the Scotch and Drambuie into an old-fashioned glass almost filled with ice cubes. Stir well.
Garnish with the lemon twist.

name: Awesome Blue Margarita
directions: Add to shaker in order.
Shake 30 seconds.
Pour in salt-rimmed margarita glasses.
Add more ice is needed.
Garnish with lime slices.
Enjoy!

name: Cosmopolitian
directions: Mix all together in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Pour into a Martini glass and serve.
I personally add some ice chips to it because I like ice in my drinks.

name: Simple Iced Tea
directions: I use a little tea kettle for this.  I put water in the kettle, and then add the tea bags and get the water to boiling.  Take the kettle off the heat, and add the baking soda (it will foam over so make sure it's not over the burner or too full).  Let it set and cool off.

I put mine in a pitcher in the fridge (some times with ice; some times just as is).  It's almost black in color, and very strong.  You need maybe 1 tbs. in a glass of water/ice, depending on how strong you want your tea.  It keeps, without having that nasty taste, for well over a week (i've actually kept it almost 2 weeks and it's still delicious).   Just remember it's VERY strong, and you need very, very little added to your water.

name: Frozen Blueberry Margaritas
directions: dip rims of margarita glasses in orange or lime juice and dip in sugar crystals to coat if desired.
process ice and next 5 ingredients in a blender till smooth --
serve in prepared glasses --
makes about 5 1/2 cups.

name: Blue Monday
directions: Add the gin and Cointreau to a highball glass filled with ice.
Top up wich club soda; stir.
Add a few drops of blue curacao and stir quickly.
This gives the drink its delicate shade of blue.

name: El Diablo
directions: Pour the lime juice into a highball half filled with crushed ice.
Add in the tequila and creme de cassis.
Top up with ginger ale and stir.
Garnish with a wedge of lime dropped in the drink.
Best served with a straw.

name: Fresh Cherryade
directions: Place the cherries, sugar and tarragon in a small pan with 450ml of water.  Gently bring to the boil, stirring until the sugar dissolves, then simmer for 10 minutes until the cherries are very soft.
Remove from the heat, then pass through a sieve to remove the stones and tarragon and puree the cherries.  Stir in the lime juice, then chill until ready to serve.
Transfer to a jug and top up with soda water.  Pour into ice filled glasses and served garnished with lime twists and fresh cherries.

similar.name: Fresh Cherries Ginger Infused Green Tea

name: Mint Julep - the Real Thing
directions: Mix the sugar & water in a saucepan. Boil, while stirring, for 5 minutes.  Remove from heat & let cool for 15 minutes.
Bruise 6 mint leaves to release the oil.  Place them in a glass pitcher or jar.
Pour cooled syrup over mint, cap tightly & store in the refrigerator overnight.
When ready to partake, strain syrup to remove leaves.
Into your cocktail shaker add bourbon, mint syrup & 1/2 cup ice.
Shake, shake, shake your julep.
Pour mixture into a small glass or julep cup.
Top with a fresh mint leaf.
Serve with a short straw.

name: White Nights
directions: Place cream in a large stainless steel bowl.
Add sugar and whisk for 1 minute, until sugar is dissolved.
Add corn syrup and whiskey. Stir well.
Dissolve coffee granules into hot water.
Stir coffee granules into hot water.
Stir coffee mixture into cream mixture.
Add chocolate syrup and whisk mixture until smooth.
Store in refrigerator until ready to serve.

similar.name: Hot Buttered Rum W/ Brandy, Batter

name: Cinnamon Coffee
directions: Mix all together.
For 1 cup coffee put 2 rounded teaspoons in cup and fill with hot water.

similar.name: Cinnamon Coffee Cocoa Mix in a Jar

name: Hot Cocoa Mix
directions: Mix all ingredients, I used my food processor to mix.
Store in covered container.
To make cocoa use about 1/3 cup to a mug of boiling water.

name: Billie Jean Moore's Homemade Kahlua
directions: Boil water and sugar to a simple syrup, not over cooking, or it will be too syrupy.
Add coffee and brandy.
Pour into dark bottles, and add 1 vanilla bean per bottle.
Shake once every day for 7 days.
Remove and keep vanilla beans (they can be reused).
Store in a cool, dark place.

name: Mocha Frappe
directions: Place coffee, cocoa and sweetener in blender container; cover. Blend on medium speed 30 seconds or until well blended.
Add milk and ice; cover. Blend on high speed until smooth.

similar.name: Mr Coffee Chocolate Chip Mocha Frappe

name: Creamsicle Margaritas
directions: Blend all ingredients until slushy. Serve in margarita glass.

similar.name: Double Berry Margaritas in the Ice Cream Maker

name: Cafe Diavolo
directions: Soften gelatin in 1/2 Cup of the water and set aside.
Combine remaining water and the next 5 ingredients in saucepan, bring to a boil and simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove the spices and add the gelatin, stir until dissolved.
Stir in rum and amaretto.
Pour into individual serving glasses.
Chill until firm.
Serve with a puff of whipped cream.

name: Mocha Alexander
directions: Chill a very strong coffee well after brewing.
Mix all liquids.
Chill for a minimum of 4 hours.
Sprinkle with cocoa powder.

similar.name: French Silk Mocha - Coffee & Chocolate Dry Mix in Bulk

name: Orange Alexander
directions: Grate orange zest first.
Add all fluids.
Chill for a minimum of 4 hours.
Serve with a spiral of orange, if you wish.

name: Mint Alexander
directions: Mix all fluids.
Chill for 4 hours or more.
Serve with a mint leave per serving.

similar.name: Fabulous Hot Cocoa for a Group

name: Hot Bailey's Irish Cream Chocolate Drink
directions: Add chopped chocolate to boiling water in a pot or microwave proof jug.
Remove from heat and stir until chocolate is melted.
Add, cream, milk, vanilla and Bailey's Irish Cream.
Heat but do not boil.
Pour into mugs and top with whipped cream and sprinkle with cinnamon.

name: Mocha Cinnamon Warmer
directions: Heat milk and cinnamon sticks in pot or a microwave proof jug, until beginning to bubble around the edges.
Blend cocoa, sugar, coffee and vanilla with about 2 tablespoons of the hot milk.
Stir this back into the remaining hot milk, and remove cinnamon sticks.
Beat with a hand beater until frothy.
Pour into mugs and top with whipped cream and sprinkle with cinnamon.

name: Southern Long Island Iced Tea
directions: Combine all ingredients in a pitcher.
Serve over additional crushed ice.

name: Harvest Drink (Molasses Shrub)
directions: Mix all ingredients together in the order given.
Serve chilled.

name: North Carolina Syllabub
directions: Chill all the ingredients well.
Beat the first four ingredients together.
Beat cream until stiff.
Fold cream into the first mixture and beat again.
Serve with a sprinkling of nutmet on the top.

name: Red Devil Drink
directions: Mix all and top with cherry.

name: Queen Soda
directions: Combine cream soda with butterscotch schnapps in a glass; add ice cubes.

name: Ww Rum Milk
directions: Place all ingredients in blender and process at high speed until smooth.
Serve in tall glass.

name: Lutheran Church Basement Egg Coffee
directions: Use a graniteware (enamel) coffee pot.

Wash egg; break it into a small bowl, reserving shell, and beat slightly. Add 1/2 cup cold water, the 1 cup ground coffee and the reserved egg shell, crushed. Mix thoroughly. Turn into coffee pot; pour on boiling water, and stir. (I remember the ladies adding the coffee/egg mixture directly to the boiling water.)  Optional: The spout of the pot can be stuffed with soft paper towel to prevent escape of the fragrant aroma. Place on front of range and boil 3 minutes. If not boiled, coffee is cloudy. If boiled too long, too much tannic acid is developed. Add remaining 1/2 cup cold water; which perfects clearing. Cold water, which is heavier than hot, sinks to the bottom and carries the grounds with it. After coffee has settled, serve at once.

name: Caramel Appletini
directions: Chill Martini glass with ice and soda water.
Meanwhile mix Vodka, Apple Puckers and Sour Mix in an Iced Shaker, Shake.
Dump out the Ice/Soda water mixture and drizzle caramel in pretty swirls inside of the martini glass.
Strain the Vodka Mixture into the martini glass, drop a cherry into the drink and let it sink.
Drink UP!

name: Bloody Mary --  for a  Crowd
directions: Mix all above ingredients. Serve over ice with celery stick or green onion as stirrer.

name: Tamarinda
directions: Remove tamarind pulp, discarding outer pods.
Soak the pulp in 2 cups of hot water until soft, from 10 to 15 minutes.
Rub the pulp until the seeds are free of pulp. Remove the seeds and strings from the pulp. Rub the pulp until it is dissolved.
Pour tamarind pulp and water into a pitcher for sun tea.
Add the rest of the water.
Put pitcher in the sun for a whole day.
Add the tequila.
Add ice if you have some.
Serve in cups.

name: El Nino Margarita
directions: Rim a LARGE Margarita glass with coarse salt and Fill with ice.
Flash blend all ingredients except for orange slice and cherry.
Pour into Ice Margarita glass and garnish with the orange and cherry.
WOW!

name: Calypso Cooler
directions: Fill a glass with ice and set aside.
In a separate glass or shaker, ad the rum, Schnapps and orange juice, shake or stir mixture.
Pour the rum mixture into the prepared glass filled with ice.
Float a splash of grenadine over the top.
Garnish with orange and cherry.
Sit back and sip up!

name: Mango Lassi
directions: Blitz all the ingredients together in a blender.  Pour into four ice filled glasses and serve.

name: Ginger Margaritas on the Rocks
directions: In a cocktail shaker, combine the margarita mix, ginger ale, tequila, ginger and ice and stir well.
Pour into margarita glasses rimmed with sugar.

name: Grasshopper
directions: Add all ingredients  to an ice-filled cocktail shaker.
Shake vigorously.
Strain into a cocktail glass.

similar.name: Standard Cream With White Creme De Cacao & Godiva

name: Saucy Shirley  (The Good Sip Soda Pop)
directions: Wet rim of drinking glasses and press into superfine sugar or powdered sugar.
Fill glasses with ice. Pour 7-Up into the glasses until 3/4 full. Pour 1 tablespoon of the grenadine syrup and 1 ounce of the liquor into each glass.
Add the grenadine syrup and the gin or vodka and stir.
Garnish rim of glass with lemon slices.

name: Spanish Coffee from Walt Disney World
directions: Mix brandy, Kahlua and coffee and pour into an Irish  coffee mug.
Top with whipped cream and a cherry. Enjoy!

name: Walt's Favorite Chocolate Soda
directions: Pour chocolate syrup in the bottom of an 8-ounce milk shake glass.
Smoosh in one scoop of ice cream.
Slowly pour in soda water almost to top of glass.
Perch another scoop of ice cream on top. Add a cherry and a colorful straw or two.

name: Tequila Martinis
directions: In a pitcher or a cocktail shaker, combine the tequila and the ice cubes and stir or shake 20 times.
Place the Triple Sec in a chilled cocktail glass, swirl it around to coat the inside of the glass, and discard it.
Strain the tequila into the glass.
Thread the twist of lime and the strip of chile onto the cocktail skewer, perch it on the rim of the glass, and serve at once.
This recipe yields 1 martini.

name: Vampiro
directions: Add all ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously to release the flavor of the chili.
Strain into a highball glass filled with ice.
Garnish with a wedge of lime on the rim of the glass and a chili (green or red).

name: The Margarita Recipe Everyone Asks Me For!
directions: Combine all and chill.
You can add a little more water to suit your taste if you find it necessary.

name: Mantini
directions: Add all ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously.
Strain into a highball glass filled with ice.

name: Woo Woo
directions: Pour all the ingredients into a highball glass almost filled with ice cubes.
Stir well.

name: Purple Haze
directions: Pour sake and chambord into a shaker filled with ice.
Shake and then strain into serving glass.
Don't drink too many or --
Get a designated driver.

name: Oatmeal Cookie (The Kind You Drink)
directions: Pour ingredients into shaker filled with ice.
Strain into serving glass.

name: Mind Eraser
directions: Place three to four ice cubes in a small rocks glass.
Carefully layer the kahlua, Baileys,  vodka and finally the soda. Soda should be about half of the shot.
Serve unstirred with a wide straw.
To Drink:.
Just suck the whole thing down as quickly as you can --  the last thing you taste is the cream and the soda.

name: Canadian Killer Kool-Aid Recipe
directions: Pour amaretto, melon liqueur and vodka into a highball glass almost filled with ice cubes. Stir well. Add cranberry juice to taste, and stir again. Top with Sprite, to taste, and serve.

name: Gin and Tonic
directions: Pour the gin in a highball glass filled with ice.
Add the tonic water; stir.
Garnish with a slice of lemon in the drink.
**The correct proportion is one measure of gin and two of tonic.
Use fresh tonic water from a small bottle or can.
Do not drown the gin.

name: Black Forest 'shooter'
directions: Put crème de cacao in shot glass.

Hold a regular teaspoon (not a measuring spoon) upside down over liqueur (spoon should be at a diagonal, with only the tip touching the liqueur), then gently pour cherry juice over curved part of spoon to float it on top of crème de cacao.
Using a clean, dry teaspoon, gently pour cream into glass in same manner, creating a third layer.
Shave some chocolate over cream using a vegetable peeler.

name: Hemingway Special
directions: Squeeze lime juice into a shaker, add remaining ingredients and shake briefly with a glassful of crushed ice. Serve in a frosted cocktail glass.

name: Nuts and Berries
directions: Combine all ingredients and serve on ice.

name: Sweet & Sour Lemon Drop
directions: Shake in shaker until nice and cold, serve plain or with the ice.

name: Diabetic Frozen Strawberry Daiquiris
directions: In blender  whirl all ingredients until smooth.
Serve in wine or champagne glasses.

similar.name: Strawberry (Or Banana or Peach  or Pineapple) Frozen Daiquiris

name: The Best Strawberry Lemonade Ever!!!!!
directions: Cut the LEMONS in half.  Spoon out PULP over pitcher. Add Pulp.
Slice STRAWBERRIES in half. Add to pitcher as well.
Stir in cold WATER and SUGAR.
FREEZE for 45 minutes or until slushy or add ice and blend or keep cubes whole.
ENJOY!

name: The Dingo
directions: Combine all the ingredients minus the grenadine in a shaker filled with ice, and shake.
Pour the contents into a highball glass and add a splash of grenadine.
Optional-Decorate with orange slice.

name: The Govenor's Hot Buttered Coffee
directions: Cream butter and sugar; blend in spices.
Refrigerate mixture until ready to use.
Add a scant tablespoon of butter/spice mixture in a 10-ounce mug.
Add rum and heavy cream.
Fill mug with coffee.
Garnish with whipped cream.
Butter/spice mixture is enough for about 20 servings.

name: Wolfensburger Pass Hot Chocolate
directions: Combine sweetened condensed milk and chocolate in a saucepan.
Cook over low heat, stirring constantly until chocolate is melted.
Cool the chocolate mixture until it reaches room temperature.
Fold in whipped cream.
To make a cup of hot chocolate mix 1/4 cup of chocolate mixture with 3/4 cup warm milk.
Can be kept in the refrigerator for up to one week in a covered container.

similar.name: Black Cocoa Whey Protein Drink Mix

name: Rachael Ray's Ice Cream Latte
directions: Pour coffee over ice cream in a mug.

name: Limbo
directions: Add ingredients to a highball glass filled with ice; stir.
Garnish with a wedge of pineapple and a maraschino cherry.

name: The Easiest, Tastiest, yet  Healthiest, Chocolate Milk
directions: Pour the milk into a glass.
Mix the chocolate syrup with the milk until the color of the milk becomes brown.
Serve and sip.

name: Turkish Coffee
directions: Measure water and sugar in small saucepan. Dissolve the sugar in the water by bringing the mixture to a boil stirring constantly. Remove from heat and stir in coffee. Return to heat and bring slowly back to a boil.

When the coffee begins to rise up remove from heat. When foaming recedes return to heat and bring back to a boil. Repeat this procedure three times . The goal is to get maximum coffee flavor without over boiling. There should be a thick sediment on the bottom and a brown froth on the top.
Best way to Drink: Serve the coffee by pouring gradually into each cup to evenly distribute the sediment.

name: Ginger-Mint Cooler
directions: Combine water, sugar substitute, and mint in a saucepan.  Bring to a boil.  Strain and cool.
At serving time, add lemon and orange juices and ginger ale.  Pour over finely crushed ice in tall glasses.

name: Dark and Stormy Spice
directions: In a pitcher, stir together gingerale, rum and lime juice.  Top with ice.
Garnish serving glasses with lime slices.

name: Candy Corn Martini
directions: Into a martini glass, pour liqueurs in listed order over the backside of a spoon.
Serves one.

name: Peachy Martini
directions: chill glass in freezer.
Add vodka, peach schnapps, ice and diced peaches to shaker.
Shake for about 15 seconds.
Coat rim of chilled glass with sugar.
Pour contents into glass and enjoy!
Garnish with peach slices.

name: Bloomer Droppers
directions: If using canned peaches, drain and save the juice.
Place the ice in blender and crush slightly.
Place the remaining ingredients in the blender and blend till the you have the texture you desire.
Use the reserved peach juice if you would like it to be more "liquidy".
Hold on to your "Bloomers"!

name: James 's Blackberry Cowboy
directions: Fill a tall glass 1/2 full of ice.
Add Pepsi, grenadine and blackberry brandy.

name: Roy Rodgers
directions: Mix all ingredients together in a tall glass 1/2 filled with ice.

name: Detox Jogging In A Jug
directions: mix together and take 4 tbls a day or 2 oz.
Use unsweetened juice.

name: Lover's Delight
directions: Add the ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously.
Strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Kahwah - Indian Green Tea
directions: Put water, saffron and cardamom pods into a small sauce pan and bring to a boil over medium high heat.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer uncovered for about 2 minutes.
Add the tea and reduce the heat to low.
Simmer gently for an additional 2 minutes.
Strain the tea into small tea cups and serve warm.

similar.name: Green Tea With Indian Chai Spices

name: Healing Ginger Detox Tea With Turmeric
directions: Bring water to a boil, then add powdered herbs. Simmer for 10 minutes.
Strain tea into a mug, add maple syrup and lemon, stirring to combine. Drink warm.

name: Hot Mocha Liqueur
directions: Add equal amounts of chopped chocolate to the mugs of hot coffee and stir to melt.
Stir in 2 Tbsp Liqueur to each mug.
Top with whipped cream and serve with a sugar stirrer or spoon with each mug.
NOTE:  Cooking time is for making the coffee!

name: Bombay Crushed
directions: Take a highball glass and fill it half-way with crushed ice.
Add halved kumquats and stir.
Add gin, lime juice and syrup, stir to combine.
Fill the glass with ice.

name: Iced Green Tea With Ginger
directions: Measure water into a saucepan, add ginger and bring to boil.
Add tea leaves; brew 1-3 minutes (or longer, depending on how strong you like your tea).
Add sugar and lemon juice, strain tea.
Allow to cool and add ice. Garnish with lemon balm leaves.

similar.name: Lemon Grass and Ginger Iced Tea

name: Nola Blue Glacier Martini
directions: Chill the martini glasses in the freezer for one hour.
In a shaker, add the vodka, Blue Curacao and ice.  Using a long bar spoon, stir the mixture 40 times.
Hint: Use just enough Blue Curacao to give the vodka a subtle icy blue tint.
Strain the liquid into each glass.
Garnish each martini with both an orange and a lemon twist.

name: Blue Mystique
directions: Fill 2 large glasses with crushed ice.
Combine all ingredients in pitcher.
Stir to blend.
Pour into glasses.
Garnish with fresh orchids.

name: Tokyo Bloody Mary
directions: Add all ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously; strain into a highball filled with ice.
Garnish with a stick of celery.

name: Dreamy Creamy Hot Chocolate (Paula Deen)
directions: In a large saucepan, combine sweetened condensed milk, cocoa, vanilla, and salt; mix well.
Over medium heat, slowly stir in water; heat through, stirring occasionally.  DO NOT BOIL!
Top with marshmallows if desired.
Can be store in refrigerator up to 5 days.  Mix well and reheat before serving.

name: Rosehip Syrup
directions: Remove stalks and chop rosehips.
While you're doing this, bring 2 litres of water to the boil and add the rosehips.  Bring back to the boil, remove from the heat and leave to infuse for 15 minutes.
Ladle rosehips and liquid into a scalded jelly bag and allow the bulk of the juice to drip through.
Return the pulp to the saucepan and add the remaining litre of of water.  Re-boil, infuse again for 10 minutes and strain as before.
Pour the juice into a clean saucepan and simmer until it measures about 1 litre.
Add the sugar and stir to dissolve, then boil for 5 minutes.   Pour the syrup, while still hot, into warm clean bottles within 25 cm of the tops.
Push in new corks (previously boiled for 15 minutes) not too tightly and tie with string.

Place the bottles in the deepest saucepan you have, either on a false bottom or on corrugated paper or newspaper and fill with cold water to the level of the syrup.  Bring slowly to the boil.  Simmer for 5 minutes to sterilize, then remove from the pan.
Remove the string and press the corks firmly inches  Dry the bottles and when corks are dry, dip in melted paraffin wax to keep them air tight.

name: Nutcracker Martini
directions: Pour ingredients into a stainless steel shaker over ice.
Shake until completely cold
Strain into high ball glass.

name: Hot Cider
directions: Put apple juice and red cinnamon candies in a large saucepan.
Cook over medium heat stirring frequently until candies are melted, about 30 minutes.
Keep warm on low on the stove top or put in a crock pot on low for serving.

name: Chocolate Martini
directions: Add ice to your shaker.  Add all four ingredients to the shaker and shake for about 30 seconds.  Strain into martini glass and enjoy!
I store my vodka in the freezer to keep it icy cold.

I like to crush my ice before I add it to my shaker.   When I am shaking it some of the crushed ice melts and also a few tiny pieces get through my strainer into my glass which I like.     If you don't want tiny ice particles in your drink than use regular ice instead of crushed.
I have used a pitcher with a tight fitting lid to make several at once and they turn out great.

name: Hot Chocolate - Large Batch
directions: Mix sugar, cocoa, salt and water in large saucepan.
Bring to a boil and boil for 2 minutes.
Reduce temperature and add milk stirring until well mixed.
Stir constantly until right temperature is reach.
Remove from heat and add vanilla.

name: Hot Chocolate -  Small Batch
directions: Mix sugar, cocoa, salt and water in a 2-qiart saucepan.
Bring to a boil and boil for 2 minutes.
Reduce temperature and add milk stirring until well mixed.
Stir constantly until right temperature is reach.
Remove from heat and add vanilla.

name: Mandarin Blush
directions: In a shaker, shake together mandarin vodka, cranberry juice and Sprite.
Pour into a separate glass filled with Ice.
Garnish with orange and cherry.

name: Orange Hot Chocolate
directions: Place the milk powder, grated chocolate, orange zest and cinnamon in a large mixing bowl and combine thoroughly.
Spoon the mixture into tins or jars. Label with instructions to use 1/2 cup of chocolate mixture with 1 cup of hot milk or water.
To make hot chocolate: Pour milk into a saucepan and heat until hot but not boiling. Stir in the hot chocolate mixture and bring to a boil.
You can also use a cinnamon stick to stir the hot chocolate. In that case, do not add the ground cinnamon in the recipe.
Top with whip cream and enjoy!

name: Green Eyes
directions: Add all ingredients to a shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously.
Strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Lone Star Jalapeno Virgin Mary
directions: Rim around the rim of the glass first to moisten it
Rim the glass with celery salt (rub a slice of lime allow the celery salt to stick).
Fill the glass with ice and Bloody Mary Mix.
Add the ingredients as listed.

name: Tennessee Tea [mocktail]
directions: Shake sweet and sour mix in a cocktail shaker until slightly foamy.
Pour over ice into glass.
Top with Cola.
Garnish with Lemon Squeeze & Mint Sprig.

name: Kiss Me Quick 4 Teetotalers
directions: Chill a collins glass.
Get some cracked ice.
Stir ingredients with cracked ice in a chilled Collins glass.
Garnish with an orange wheel.

name: Friar Tuck
directions: Chill a Collins glass.
Get some cracked ice.
Stir ingredients with cracked ice in a chilled Collins glass.
Garnish with a lemon wheel.

name: Rhubarb Wine
directions: In a 10 gallon crock, put in rhubarb and cover with boiling water.
Let set 12 hours with cover over crock.
Remove rhubarb from juice.
To juice add sugar, oranges, and yeast.
Let set 21 days, stirring each day.
If juice is not clear after 21 days, continue to stir each day till clear and no bubbles come to top.
Strain through 4 layers of cheesecloth and bottle with caps not completely tightened.
For Strawberry Rhubarb Wine: Use above method but use only 1/4 bushel rhubarb and 10 quarts strawberries. Add 2 large jars of maraschino cherries for added color and taste.
Dandelion Wine: Use above method but use 1/2 bushel dandelion flowers (not greens). But use 6 oranges and 6 lemons, sliced, 1 lb raisins, 1 yeast cake and 25 lbs sugar.

name: What Me Worry?
directions: Combine in Mug,
Garnish with a Lime wedge.
The computer threw a fit on the 1 glass of beer.
Ok  make it 8 ounces and just choose the standard bottle for your area [that does NOT mean the liter ok?].

name: Queen Charlie
directions: Over ice cubes, pour a measure of grenadine, and top up with soda water.
Garnish with a slice of lemon and a cherry on a stick, and serve with straws.
Note a couple drops of Angostura can be included.
Then I suppose we have "Queen Charlie in Trinidad".

name: Lime Green Tea
directions: Bring hot water to a boil in your kettle.
Place tea bags into a 1 gallon pitcher and add hot water.
Steep about 10 minutes and discard the tea bags.
Add the Limeade concentrate to the hot water to melt.
When the Limeade is melted add remaining water to fill the pitcher.
Let cool and serve.  Enjoy!

name: Bitters Lime and Tonic
directions: Half fill tall glasses with ice.
Top each with 5 drops of bitters and a good squeeze of lime juice.
Slice remaining lime.
Fill each with tonic water and top with lime slice and fresh mint leaves.

name: Chocolate Turtle Martini
directions: Sweeten the cocoa powder to your liking by mixing the cocoa and powdered sugar.
Take a large martini glass and very carefully coat the rim in caramel sauce from the squeeze bottle, being careful not to let it drip too far down the sides.
Then, dip the entire rim of the glass into the sweetened cocoa powder, being sure to coat all of the caramel.
The desired effect is a chocolate dusted caramel rim.
You can also put just a drop of chocolate syrup at the bottom of the glass for color.
Shake the vodka, creme de cacao and praline liqueur in a martini shaker with ice to chill.
Fill the martini glass nearly full with crushed or shaved ice, being careful not to touch the rim.
Strain the drink into the martini glass.
Garnish atop the floating ice with a roasted pecan half and a small piece of chopped chocolate.
Or you can garnish it with a half of a Turtle candy by making an incision and hanging it on the rim of the glass.
Also, if you prefer your martini to LOOK dark like chocolate, I would use the dark creme de cacao, however, the garnish will stand out more when the drink is more translucent.

name: Groundhog Special
directions: Shake vermouth, brandy and limejuice together.
Pour into glasses filled with cracked ice.
Let stand 5-10 minutes before serving.
Serve.

name: Homemade Butterscotch Schnapps
directions: Boil sugar and water together, cool.
Pour into 1-qt container and add brandy, vodka, flavoring and food-coloring.
Cover and shake vigorously to blend.
Let stand in a cool, dark place for 1 month before serving.

name: Crock Pot Hot Buttered Rum
directions: Put all ingredients in a crock pot. Stir well. Cover and cook on high 2 hours, then turn on low for 3 hours.
Serve from crock pot in warm mugs.

similar.name: Awesome and Economical Hot Buttered Rum Mix
Hot Buttered Rum W/ Brandy, Batter

name: Chocolate-Cherry Coffee Mix
directions: Combine the first six ingredients.
Place 1 cup mix in a 12-in. disposable decorating bag.
Fold corners of bag into the center and roll bag down; secure with transparent tape.
Place bag in a second disposable decorating bag.
Top with 1 cup of marshmallows and 1 teaspoon of sprinkles.
Gather and twist the top of the bag.
Tie with ribbon.
Repeat to make five more gift bags.
Store in a cool dry place for up to 2 months.
To prepare coffee: In a mug, dissolve 2 heaping tablespoons mix in hot milk; stir well.  Top with marshmallows and sprinkles.  Yield: 1 serving.

NOTE: Servings are based on the entire yield of recipe before dividing mix into bags; this is for the sake of accurate information when calculating the nutrition facts.  The number of servings per bag is 8.  Also: cherry soft drink mix should be the size of a standard packet of Kool-Aid; 0.23 ounces was the average size of the ones I found in my cupboard; however, there were other sizes as well.

name: Darlene's Unamed Drink
directions: Pour over ice in an 8oz. glass and stir.
Top with a cherry if you like and enjoy!

name: Kir Vodka Martini
directions: Fill cocktail shaker with ice.
Add vodka; shake to thoroughly chill.
Strain and pour the vodka between 2 martini glasses (evenly divided).
Carefully drop 1 teaspoons creme de cassis into each glass (liqueur will sink to bottom).
Garnish each Martini with 1 lemon twist.

name: The Mud Slide
directions: Shake all ingredients in a shaker.
Strain into a glass over ice or freeze in a red wine goblet (could it crack?).

name: Mango Lassi
directions: Chill a steamed glass.
Combine the ice, vodka, amaretto, and mango juice in a mixing glass.
Shake and strain into the stemmed glass.
Garnish with the mango and cherry.

name: Berry Mojito
directions: In a tall glass, crush the mint with a fork.
Add sugar and lime juice and stir.
Add 2 oz. Bacardi Razz, Chambord, and blue curacao and mix.
Top with club soda and garnish as desired.

name: The French Cosmo
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled stem glass.
Garnish with slice or float a pineapple leaf in the drink.

name: Frozen Pink Lemonade
directions: Blend all ingredients with ice, then garnish with a lemon slice.

name: Strawberry Basil Margarita
directions: Blend all ingredients with ice.
Garnish with strawberry slice, lime wedge, and basil leaf.

name: Frozen Bellini
directions: Blend all ingredients with ice.
Garnish with a peach wedge.

name: The Alma Colada
directions: Blend juice, cream, and Bacardi Rum with ice.
Top with the Myers rum and garnish with shaved coconut.

name: Polar Razz
directions: Blend all ingredients in a blender with ice.
Garnish with raspberries.

name: Kir Royale
directions: Pour 1 ounce of creme de cassis into the bottom of the 8 flute glass.
Top each with champagne and garnish with a twist of lemon.

name: S'more Shooters
directions: Toast marshmallows over stove top until golden. Let cool.
In a small pot, bring half-and-half to a boil, then pour it over chocolate in a bowl and stir until chocolate has melted.
Return chocolate mixture to the pot and whisk in the milk.
Over medium heat, bring to a simmer and stir in 1/2 cup amaretto.
Pour remaining amaretto into a small bowl; place graham-cracker crumbs on a saucer.
To assemble:
Dip the rims of the shot glasses in amaretto, then in the graham-cracker crumbs. Fill glasses with hot chocolate and top each with a toasted marshmallow.

name: Black Jack Cocktails or Black Jacks
directions: Shake in a shaker with shaved ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass, and enjoy.

name: Cranberry-Orange Spritzers
directions: For ice-cubes:.
Pour orange juice into an ice-cube tray.
Pour cranberry juice into a second ice-cube tray.
Freeze until solid.
For spritzers:.
Pour 1/2 cup orange juice into each of eight 12-ounce glasses.
Add 1/2 cup cranberry juice to each glass.
Add 1/4 cup sparkling water to each glass.
Add cranberry and orange ice cubes to each; add garnish, and serve immediately.

name: Black Forest Coffee
directions: In a glass pitcher (or something to withhold heat) combine hot coffee,chocolate syrup and maraschino cherry juice, stir to mix.
Pour into 4 individual coffee cups and top with whipped cream,chocolate shavings and a cherry on top.
Enjoy!

name: 5-Ingredient Homemade Kahlua
directions: Bring water and sugar to a boil.
Add to coffee crystals just enough water to dissolve them.
Add coffee to water and sugar and boil for 5 minutes, being careful not to let it boil over.
Cool completely, then add vanilla and vodka.
Mix well.

name: Simple Toffee Flavored Creamer in a Jar
directions: Place ingredients in a bowl and whisk together or place in a food/blender processor and whirl until blended well.
Store in a air tight container
Note: Can add more brown sugar to your taste,if needed.
To add to tag for serving (or use for personal taste)
Add 1-2 Tbs.(or more to your taste) of mix to 1 cup of hot coffee and stir.

name: Artlantic
directions: Add all ingredients to an ice-filled shaker.
Shake vigorously.
Strain into a highball filled with ice.
Garnish with a slice of orange and sprig of mint.

name: The Frostini
directions: Shake and strain into martini glass.
Garnish with sprig of mint.

name: Orange Lemon Liqueur
directions: In a big bottle or container that has a tight lid, mix the sugar, the alcohol and the rosé wine. Shake it a couple of times during the day to dissolve the sugar.
The next day, wash and brush the fruits.  Cut them in small pieces (with the skin) and add them to the alcohol with the cinnamon stick.  Close tightly your bottle or container.
Leave this bottle in a cool place for 6 weeks, shaking it from time to time.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth-lined sieve or coffee filter.  Carefully pour in a nice bottle.
Serve this over ice.

name: Peppermint Patty Martini
directions: I prefer Absolute Vodka (actually I prefer Grey Goose or Level, but I can afford Absolute). 1 1/2 ounces equals 1 jigger.
Combine all ingredients in shaker.
Strain and serve in chilled martini glass (easy way to chill a martini glass is to let it sit a couple of minutes with ice water in it).
You will not get closer to a peppermint patty flavor than this.
Enjoy.

name: Dark Chocolate Martini
directions: I prefer Absolute Vodka (actually I prefer Grey Goose or Level, but I can afford Absolute).
Combine all ingredients in shaker.
Strain and serve in chilled martini glass (easy way to chill a martini glass is to let it sit a couple of minutes with ice water in it).
Enjoy.

name: Chocolate Raspberry Martini
directions: I prefer Absolute Vodka (actually I prefer Grey Goose or Level, but I can afford Absolute).
Combine all ingredients in shaker.
Strain and serve in chilled martini glass (easy way to chill a martini glass is to let it sit a couple of minutes with ice water in it).
Drop a couple of fresh raspberries in glass.
Enjoy.

name: Appleberry Martini
directions: I prefer Absolute Vodka (actually I prefer Grey Goose or Level, but I can afford Absolute).
Combine all ingredients in shaker.
Strain and serve in chilled martini glass (easy way to chill a martini glass is to let it sit a couple of minutes with ice water in it).
Drop cherry in glass.
Enjoy.

name: Blue Margarita
directions: Rub rim of cocktail glass with lime juice.
Dip rim in coarse salt.
Shake tequila, Blue Curacao, and lime juice with ice.
Strain into the glass and serve.

name: Cosmopolitan Martini
directions: Pour all ingredients in mixing glass filled with ice.
Shake.
Strain into chilled martini glass.

name: Baha Margarita
directions: Combine ingredients in blender and mix.
Add ice to thicken.

name: Bloody Mary's
directions: Mix well and add some chopped celery for added flavor.  Chill 1 hour or longer if you can stand to wait.  Strain and serve over ice, garnished with celery stick.

name: Nutcracker Slippery Martini
directions: Pour ingredients into a stainless steel shaker over ice.
shake until completely cold
strain into a chilled stemmed glass or Rocks glass filled with ice.

name: Oprah's Pomegranate Martini
directions: Shake ingredients in a shaker and put in chilled martini glasses. Put pomegranate fruit into glass as garnish.

name: Starbucks Mocha Frappuccino
directions: Make coffee, follow directions for your favorite brand of espresso roast coffee.
Mix coffee, still hot, and sugar in your mixer until sugar is dissolved.
Add milk and chocolate syrup and continue mixing, about one minute.
Pour mix into a sealable container for easy storage.
Store in fridge until ready to use (Note: Do not store any longer than you would milk).
To make drink, combine equal parts mix and ice in a blender and blend on high until smooth.
Pour into glasses.
Top each glass with whipped cream and drizzle with chocolate syrup.
Serve.

name: Blackberry Champagne Cocktail
directions: Pour the Chambord into a Champagne flute and top with Champagne. Add the sorbet and serve at once.

name: Amaretto Mimosa
directions: In a pitcher stir together orange juice and liqueur.
Fill each of 6 champagne flutes halfway with some juice mixture and top off with sparkling wine.

name: Lime Water
directions: Mix ingredients.
Tip: microwave your lime for ten seconds then roll on the counter before juicing. You will get much more juice with much less effort.

name: Strawberry Margaritas
directions: Combine all ingredients except lime wedges in a blender, and process until smooth.
Pour evenly into each of 4 large glasses.
Garnish with lime wedges, if desired.
Serve immediately.

name: Peach Mimosa
directions: Combine nectar and orange juice in a pitcher.
Spoon 1 tablespoon grenadine syrup into each of 10 champagne glasses.
Add 1/3 cup orange juice mixture to each glass.
Top with champagne.
Serve immediately.

name: Raspuccino
directions: Put the coffee, ice cream, chocolate syrup, 11 raspberries, milk, and ice in a blender.
Frappe it for 1-1 1/2  minute(s).
Chill it for 15-20 minutes in the freezer.
While the coffee is cooling, shave the chocolate bar.
Top with a dollop of whip cream and garnish with 3-4 raspberries and sprinkle with chocolate shavings. Mmm -- delicious!

similar.name: Mr Coffee Chocolate Chip Mocha Frappe

name: Citrus Spritzers
directions: Combine all ingredients; stir well to mix.
Serve immediately.

name: Adult Hot Chocolate
directions: Pour schnapps into warm mug.
Add hot chocolate.
Top with whipped cream if desired.

name: Hot Mint Chocolate
directions: Add the chocolate powder and mint chocolate into two mugs.
Heat up the milk while stirring vigorously until it almost boils.
Add the milk in the mugs and serve with a teaspoon and some whipped cream!

name: Agar Agar Drink With Lime
directions: For Agar Agar:.
Put Agar Agar, water and sugar in a pot. Mix well and bring to a boil.
Once it reaches boiling point, lower heat and simmer for about 15 minutes till the mixture is somewhat clear.
Add colouring and stir well. Put into a moil and set in the fridge. When it is set, grate it finely.
For Syrup:.
Put sugar, pandan leaves or pandan essence and water into a pot. Bring to a boil and lower heat.
Simmer for another 15 minutes until sugar has melted and the syrup has thickened slightly.
Put into a tall glass some grated Agar Agar, Syrup, lime juice and top up with ice cubes and ice water.

name: Moscow Mule
directions: Fill highball glass or large old-fashion glass with ice.
Add vodka and lime juice.
Top with  ginger beer, stir to just blend.
Garnish with lime wheel.

name: Cinnamon Martini
directions: Fill cocktail shaker with ice; shake to blend and chill.
Strain into martini glass; let drink clear before serving.

name: Bourbon Sidecar
directions: Fill cocktail shaker with ice.
Add bourbon, orange liqueur and lemon juice; shake to blend and chill.
Strain into stemless martini glass or old-fashion glass.
Garnish with orange twist.

name: Coffee Fizz
directions: Fill brandy sniffer or highball glass with ice.
Squeeze one of the orange wedges over ice, twisting rind to release oil; discard rind.
Add coffee liqueur and vodka; stir in ginger ale.
Garnish with remaining orange wedges.

name: Suburban Cocktail
directions: Add a splash of orange-flavoured liqueur. Fill cocktail shaker with ice.
Add gin, cranberry juice and orange liqueur; shake well to blend and chill.
Strain into martini glass.
Garnish with an orange twist.

name: Yellow Bellied Sap Sucker

Shake the juice and the bitters.
Pour over ice.
Add the tonic.
Serve.
Note this recipes is for an 8 ounce water glass.  If using another glass keep the portions the same. 6-1.
The original sapsucker called for half and half portions.

name: Sparkling Cranberry Punch
directions: Place a sugar cube in the bottom of each 8 to 10 chilled champagne flutes.
Pour 2 tablespoons cranberry juice into each glass.
Fill each glass with white grape juice.
Thread several cranberries onto skewer or toothpick and garnish each glass.

name: Hot & Sweet Vanilla
directions: Place 2 cups of milk into a microwavable cup, and heat it on high for 1 1/2 minutes.
Add vanilla extract, and sugar, and stir in .
If you are a coffee lover then you can put in 1/2 cups of black coffee to make a nice latte with a creamy milk top.
Set to cool for 1-2 minutes if you don't like it really hot.

name: Ruby Red Cocktail
directions: Stir together all the ingredients well chilled.

name: Hot White Chocolate
directions: In a saucepan, combine the half-and-half, white chocolate, and salt.
Cook over medium-low heat, stirring constantly, until mixture is smooth.
Remove from heat and add in vanilla; whisk until frothy.
Pour into warmed mugs.
Garnish with whipped cream.

name: Ruby Red Jack
directions: pour all contents into a drink shaker full of ice. Shake then strain into shot glasses.

name: Citrus Cream Drink
directions: blend all ingredients until smooth.

name: Martinelli's Mimosa
directions: sugar the rim of a champagne glass, pour ingredients in and garnish with a twist of lemon.

name: Black Cherry Cocoa
directions: Make up a mug of your favorite hot cocoa.
Add the brandy, stir, and enjoy!

name: Bacardi Classic
directions: Pour the ingredients into a cocktail shaker with ice.
Shake vigorously.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Garnish with a cherry on a cocktail stick across the glass.

name: Sugar-Free Friendship Tea
directions: Mix all ingredients well in a large bowl.
Pour contents into a clean, dry glass jars.

For one Serving, mix 1 teaspoon into 1 Cup of boiling water.  Enjoy!

name: Cooler Than Cool
directions: Pour all ingrdients into a martini shaker.
Shake well.

name: Banana Nana
directions: Add all ingredients into a blender and blend until smooth.
Pour into frosted glasses.

name: Barracuda
directions: Add all ingredients to a cocktail shaker with ice.

Strain into a highball filled with ice.

name: Rude Cosmopolitan
directions: Add all the ingredients to a cocktail shaker with ice.
Shake vigorously.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Garnish with a twist of orange.

name: Suffering Bastard
directions: Pour over ice into a hurricane glass.

Garnish with an orange wheel.

name: Jungle Colada from Elephant Bar

Swirl raspberry puree in line in glass.
Pour in drink.

name: Lover's Kiss
directions: Pour the first 3 ingredients into a cocktail shaker with ice.

name: Nectar Mimosa

name: Corona Margaritas in 5 Minutes
directions: Empty limeade concentrate into pitcher.
Use limeade can to measure tequila; fill can with tequila and add to pitcher.
Fill limeade can with white wine; add to pitcher.
Gently pour in 1 bottle of Corona.

name: Singapore Sling
directions: Fill a shaker with ice.

name: Painkillers
directions: Mix.
Pour over crushed ice.
Top with nutmeg.

name: Irish Cream
directions: Place each ingredient in a blender and mix briefly after each one.
After adding the whiskey , blend for about 3 minutes
Shake well before serving.

name: Luxury Boston Cream Martini
directions: Shake over ice and serve with a dollop of whipped cream on top.
Or, rim the glass with cocoa, or chocolate syrup.

name: Chocolate Chip Cookie Martini
directions: Mix all into a shaker on ice.
After shaken, pour all into a frozen martini glass that has been drizzled with chocolate syrup.

name: Vodka Collins
directions: Mix Collins mix, club soda, vodka and ice in a two quart pitcher.
Add a few orange or lime slices and some fresh cherries and stir.
Enjoy!

name: Homemade Root Beer Soda
directions: Slice the ginger into thin sections and add them to two cups of boiling water.
Simmer this on very low heat for 20 minutes.
While this is simmering, boil the gallon of water and two cups of sugar for one minute and set aside.
Pour the ginger and liquid into a blender and blend on high for about one minute.
Pour this blend into the sugar water, through a strainer.
With a soup ladle, pour a few cups of the hot brew through the remaining pulp to extract a bit more of the ginger flavor.
Cool to room temperature. When cool, add vanilla, yeast and stir until dissolved.
Let sit for about 30 minutes.
Then bottle and age.
The simplest, safest and least expensive method of bottling is to use one-liter plastic soft drink bottles with screw caps.
These can be sterilized by rinsing in a mixture of household bleach and water and then rinsed with clean water.
After filling, the bottles should be set aside at room temperature for about 48 hours, or until hard (check by squeezing).
Then refrigerate to finish the aging process.
Leaving the bottles at room temperature too long will cause over carbonation.
Using glass rather than plastic bottles can cause shattered bottles.
Another nice feature of the plastic bottles is that they can be re-carbonated if only partially consumed.
Just let it sit out over night with the cap on and refrigerate it when hard.

name: Cocoa Cottage Hot Chocolate
directions: Heat milk, cream and cinnamon to a boil.  Add chocolate, instant coffee until chocolate is melted and well blended.
Add vanilla!
Top with whipped cream!

name: TGIFriday's Ultimate Frozen Cosmopolitan (Copycat)
directions: Mix together and serve.
To make it "frozen," you could partially freeze the cranberry and lime juices.

name: Lush
directions: Pour the vodka and chambord into a chilled champagne flute; stir gently.

name: Chilled Hot Chocolate
directions: In a blender, combine water and cocoa mix; cover and process until dissolved.
Add ice cream and cream; cover and process for 30 seconds or until smooth.

name: Hpnotiq Tea
directions: Fill 12 oz. glass with ice.

name: Kir Royale
directions: Pour the cassis into a chilled champagne flute.

name: Russian Coffee Recipe
directions: Add coffee, vodka and kahlua to irish coffee cup and sweeten to taste.
Gently float cream on top, add amaretto, and garnish with a cherry.

name: Millionaire's Coffee Recipe
directions: Pour Bailey's Irish Cream, Frangelico and Kahlua into an Irish coffee cup and add coffee.
Top with whipped cream and, optionally, allspice (cinnamon and nutmeg).

name: Kir Imperial
directions: Pour the framboise into a chilled champagne flute.

directions: Add all ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.

name: Chocolate Mud Milk

Stir remaining syrup into milk; pour over cookie mixture.
Just before serving, divide seltzer among glasses.
If desired, garnish with cookies and gummi worms.

name: Warm Whatcha' Macallit
directions: Mix all ingredients in large saucepan and stir over medium heat until warm (approx 7-10 minutes). Serve warm with cinnamon stick.

name: Banana Baileys Shake

put all ingredients into a blender and blend until smooth.
pour into a chilled glass and serve.

name: Imitation Bailey's Irish Creme

name: Godiva Chocolate Raspberry Latte

Add espresso shot.
Immediately add at least a tablespoon of steamed milk.
Whisk in dark chocolate cocoa mix until dissolved.
Mix in the remaining steamed milk.
Garnish with whipped cream and dust with cocoa, if desired.

Blend the drink until ice is crushed and drink is smooth.

name: Easy Frozen Sangria

Process for 30 seconds.
Gradually add enough ice to bring the mixture to 4 cups.
Blend until smooth.

name: French Vanilla Mocha Coffee Mix
directions: Mix all ingredients together whisking until smooth.  Transfer the mixture to a pretty jar, resealable container, or a zip lock bag. Store on the pantry shelf. This makes a good gift.
To serve, spoon 2-3 heaping tablespoons into a coffee mug, add fresh brewed coffee and stir to blend.
If you wish, you may add 1/3 cup instant coffee granules to the mixture and then just mix with very hot water.

directions: Place all ingedients in shaker.

directions: Place ingedients in shaker.

directions: Soak the sugar lump in the syrup
or in the grenadine.

Shake the cocktail.
And strain into glass.

name: Savoy Loud Speaker Cocktail
directions: Get a shaker.
Add ingredients.
shake well.
strain into cocktail glass.

top with coke.

should read:

directions: NOTE:
Make that:
Equal parts orange juice and pineapple juice.
shake to mix in an ice filled 12oz cup.

directions: Toss it in a blender.
add enough ice to make it slushy.

directions: Mix or shake until thouroughly mixed.

directions: Mix all ingredients in a shaker
Enjoy.

name: Seven Dials Cocktail
directions: Pour into shaker.
Shake well.
strain into an old-fashioned glass half-filled with broken ice
and serve.

name: Broth Pick-Up
directions: .In saucepan, combine all ingredients.

Stir occasionally.

directions: boil water,sugar,coffee,chocolate syrup,boil for a bout 1 hour.stir quite often let cool then add vanilla,and alcahol mix well and bottle.

directions: Combine ingredients in a 12 oz cup.

name: Ww Core Mocha Coffee

directions: Combine ingredients in a 12 oz cup.
Mix well.

name: Fabulous Mint Tea
directions: In large heatproof jar or pitcher, pour 2 cups boiling water over mint and tea bags. Steep 30 minutes.

Stir, strain into serving picture with  enough room to add cold water and ice before serving. Garnish with additional mint.

name: Louisiana Swamp Julep
directions: Mix ingredients, shake well, and pour over tall glass of crushed ice. drink slowly through a straw if you have one. If not, sip as usual.

name: Praline Supreme Latte

name: Sazerac (The Big Easy's First Cocktail)
directions: Cook 1 cup sugar and 1 cup water in a small saucepan over medium-high heat 5 minutes, stirring until sugar dissolves. Remove from heat, and cool.
Pack a 3 1/2-ounce cocktail glass with ice cubes, and set glass aside.
Combine whiskey, bitters, sugar syrup, and a few ice cubes in a cocktail shaker; stir to chill.

Discard ice cubes in cocktail glass. Coat inside of glass with liqueur, shaking out excess liqueur. (For stronger licorice flavor, leave excess liqueur in glass.) Rub lemon rind over rim of glass, and discard rind.
Strain whiskey mixture into prepared glass. Serve drink immediately.

name: Adult Beverage
directions: Layer in order.
Shoot!

similar.name: Hot Bailey's Irish Cream Chocolate Drink

name: Brave Bull  (Adult Beverage)
directions: Layer in order.
Shoot.
I like to keep bottles of liquer in the freezer remove just before company arrives.

name: Right on (Adult Beverage)
directions: Layer Creme de Cafe (Kahlua) first, then add Banana Liqueur and float the cream.

name: Dark Sunset (Adult Beverage)
directions: Layer in order.

name: Inkahluarable (Adult Beverage)
directions: Use a Cordial glass and layer in order.

name: Strawberry Blonde (Adult Beverage)
directions: Mix creme de cacao and cola in tall glass, place ice in glass (helps support the cream).
Float cream on top of cola mixture.
Add a splash of grenadine.

name: Oyster Shooter (Adult Beverage)
directions: Pour tomato juice onto the vodka, float the cocktail sauce.
Dash sauces to taste.
Drop in Oyster!

name: Black Cocoa Whey Protein Drink Mix
directions: Put dry pudding, confectionery sugar, creamer, and cocoas together in food processor or other enclosed blending container.
Mix whey powder and dry milk in big bowl or large covered container.
Add first contents to second and mix with large spoon or shake tightly covered container.

name: Extreme Cream Liqueur
directions: Combine first 5 ingredients in blender; blend until coffee crystals dissolve, about one minute.
Add whipping cream & cream of coconut to mixture and blend 10 seconds.
Transfer to pitcher, cover & refrigerate until cold, about 2 hours.
Serve over ice, add to coffee or serve over chocolate or coffee ice cream.
Can be made up to 2 weeks ahead; keep refrigerated.

name: Monkey Call
directions: Combine liquid ingredients in a shaker with ice and mix vigorously. Stop when the
shaker is too cold to hold. Strain into a fountain glass, add ice and garnish with a scoop of ice cream, a cherry and a drizzle of Kahlua.

name: Fresh Squeezed Lemonade
directions: squeeze out 1.25 cups freah lemon juice.
squeeze out 1.0 cup fresh oranges.
combine with 2 cups sugar and 12 cups water.
makes 1 gallon.

name: Lemon Cordial
directions: Bring sugar, water and lemon rind to the boil.
Remove from the heat and add the other ingredients immediately, stirring wello until the acids and epsom salts are dissolved.
Allow to cool a little, then strain into clean bottles.
Seal immediately with corks or screw tops and store in a cool place.
After opening, keep bottles in the fridge.

name: Rose Tea
directions: Mix all the ingredients together and serve immediately.
Now sit back and relax! That's an order!

name: Iced Hazelnut Coffee Coolers
directions: Mix coffee, creamer, water and 1/4 teaspoon cinnamon in medium bowl, stirring until coffee is dissolved.
Pour into 2 ice-cube trays.  Freeze at least 3 hours or until hardened.  Transfer cubes to a plastic storage container or bag.
For each serving, place 2 coffee cubes, 2/3 cup milk and 4 water ice cubes in blender.  Cover and blend on high speed about 20 seconds or until blended and slightly slushy.
Pour into glass.  Top with dollop of whipped cream and sprinkle with cinnamon.

name: Burnt Almond Cocktail
directions: Shake.
Pour over ice and serve.

name: Burnt Almond Coffee
directions: Pour all ingredients into a mug.
Top with whipped cream and chocolate shavings if desired.

name: Iced Coffee
directions: Pour Chocolate milk into 2 Ice trays and freeze.
When Chocolate Ice cubes are frozen, Combined cooled Coffee, milk and condensed milk.
(& liquior if you choose).
Pour over Chocolate Ice cubes and add Whipped cream.
Optional - Place all ingredients into a Blender and Blend for a Frozen drink.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Hot Bailey's Irish Cream Chocolate Drink

name: Perfect Margarita
directions: Add ice and first four ingredients into a shaker and shake until it is very cold.
Pour into a salt-rimmed margarita glass, garnish with a lime and/or olive (Try to avoid pouring in the foamy part of the drink that will probably be at the bottom of the shaker).
Enjoy!

name: Cardamom Green Tea
directions: Bring all to a boil.
Strain.
Serve.

name: Old-Fashioned Chocolate Soda
directions: For each serving, place 3 tablespoons chocolate syrup in a 16-oz. glass. Stir in 1 tablespoon of whipped cream and 1-1/4 cups water until foamy. Add two scoops of ice cream. Top with additional whipped cream if desired.

name: Russian Refresher Mix
directions: combine all ingredients in a medium bowl.  Mix well.  Put into an airtight container.
Label and store in a cool, dry place.
Add 2-3 tsps of Russian Refresher Mix to 1 cup of hot water.  Stir to dissolve.

name: Mocha Java
directions: Pour coffee into 3-quart saucepan. Stir in cocoa mix and sugar until dissolved; add half & half. Cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until heated through (3 to 4 minutes).
Garnish each serving with whipped cream; sprinkle with chocolate shavings, if desired.

name: Almond Joy Latte
directions: Combine all ingredients in a 12 oz mug.
Mix thoroughly.

name: Lori's Sangria
directions: Stir all until sugar is dissolved.
Chill 1-6 hours.
Serve over ice.

name: Sunset Passion Colada
directions: Place rum and pina colada mix in blender with ice.  Blend until smooth.
Pour into a tall glass and top with the strawberry daquiri mix.  The daquiri mix sits on top for a pretty presentation.
Serve with straws.

name: Sunny Citrus Cooler
directions: In a 1 gallon pitcher, combine the first three ingredients.
Add ginger ale and mix well.
Serve over ice.
Garnish with orange slices if desired.
Refrigerate leftovers.

name: Frozen Mudslide
directions: Crush the ice cubes in a blender.
Add ice cream, vodka, Baileys, Kahlua and chocolate syrup. (2 scoops for a thinner drink, 3 scoops for a thicker one). Blend until smooth.
Pour into chilled glasses. Freeze for 5-10 minutes to thicken, if desired.
Garnish with whipped cream and chocolate jimmies.

name: Hot Cocoa Mix  (Oamc)
directions: Cut vanilla bean crosswise in half, then cut each half lengthwise in half.
In food processor with knife blade attached, process cocoa, sugar, espresso coffee powder, and chocolate until almost smooth.
Stir vanilla bean pieces into chocolate mixture. Store mix at room temperature in tightly covered container up to 6 months.
To PREPARE HOT MOCHA:.
For each serving, in microwave safe mug, mix 3 tablespoons Hot Mocha Mix (do not include vanilla bean pieces) with 1 cup milk.
Heat in microwave oven on high 1 1/2 minutes, stirring once halfway through heating, until blended and hot.
For GIFT GIVING:.
Make sure to include a copy of the preparation instructions.

name: Ginger Ale Ice Cubes
directions: Bring water and sugar to a boil and add rest of ingredients.
Freeze in ice trays.
Serve with ginger ale.

name: Roasted Rice With Green Tea
directions: Heat skillet till it's hot.
Wash the rice grains (doesn't matter if they're short, medium or long grains) and pat dry.
Pan fry the rice in the hot skillet till golden brown. No need water or oil.
In a teapot, put in roasted rice, green tea and boiling water.
Let it sit for a couple of minutes before serving.
You can change the amount of the ingredients according to your taste.

similar.name: Green Tea With Indian Chai Spices

name: Whiskey Peach Smash
directions: Muddle all ingredients except whiskey in a bar glass.
Add whiskey and shake with ice.
Strain into an ice-filled rocks glass and garnish with a sprig of mint and a peach slice.

name: Cinnamon Mocha Coffee
directions: In a small bowl, combine coffee grounds, cinnamon and nutmeg; pour into a coffee filter of a drip coffeemaker. Add the water; brew according to the manufacturer's directions.

In a large saucepan, combine the milk, chocolate syrup and brown sugar. Cook over low heat until sugar is dissolved, stirring occasionally. Stir in the vanilla and brewed coffee. Ladle into mugs; garnish with whipped cream if desired.

name: Texas Roadhouse Cowboy Quencher
directions: Pour rum and schnapps into margarita glass.
Pour equal amounts of orange juice and pineapple juice.
Finish with a splash of grenadine.

name: Iced Tea With Lemon
directions: Boil water and remove from heat.
Place tea bags in water for one hour.
Remove tea bags.
Add sugar and lemon juice to tea.
Chill.

name: Strawberry Yogurt Shakes
directions: In two batches, process all ingredients in a blender until smooth. Pour into chilled glasses; serve immediately.

name: Mint Chai
directions: Brew mint tea:  Pour 2 cups boiling water over the 2 mint tea bags and steep for 4 minutes.
Combine brewed mint tea, cardamom, cloves, ginger, peppercorns, lemon grass, vanilla.
Fill 2 glasses to the top with ice.  Strain tea into the glasses.
Garnish with mint, if desired.

similar.name: Chai  ( from Moosewood Restaurant New Classics)

name: Martini
directions: Add ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice; shake vigorously.
Strain into a chilled glass.
Garnish with olive.
**Cajun Martini: substitute jalapeno-infused vodka or gin for regular gin; garnish with a pickled tomato or okra, or a tiny whole red or green chile.
**Dirty Martini: add 1 to 2 teaspoons olive brine.
**Fino Martini: substitute 2 teaspoons fino sherry for the vermouth.
**Gibson: garnish with a cocktail onion.
**Paisley Martini: reduce vermouth to 1 1/2 teaspoon; add 1 teaspoon Scotch; garnish with lemon twist.
**Perfect Martini: use half sweet vermouth and half dry vermouth; garnish with orange slice.
**Rumtini: substitute light rum for gin; garnish with lime twist.
**Saketini: substitute sake for the vermouth; garnish with lemon twist or olive.
**Scotini: substitute Scotch for the vermouth; garnish with lemon twist.
**Sweet Martini: substitute sweet vermouth for the dry vermouth; garnish with orange slice.
Tequini: substitute tequila for gin.

name: Bloody Brew
directions: Combine the first 4 ingredients in a chilled glass filled with ice cubes.
Stir well; garnish with pickle.

name: French Fling Martini
directions: Blend ingredients together with ice.
Shake and strain into martini glass garnished with lime.

name: Alizé Golden Delicious
directions: Shake Alizé and apple liqueur together.
Serve over ice in a martini glass garnished with a lime wedge.

name: Wild Passion and 'pagne
directions: Mix Alizé and champagne together.
Serve in a champagne flute, garnished with lime or lemon wedge, or fruit of choice.

name: Amaretto Stinger
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker half full of ice cubes.
Pour all ingredients into shaker and shake well.
Strain drink into a martini glass and garnish with whole almonds.
Cook's Tip:
Place a folded paper towel on a dessert plate and add 2 Tbsp of Amaretto.
On another dessert plate, put 1 Tbsp crushed almonds.
Rim the top of the martini glass with the Amaretto and crushed almonds, then pour the drink into the glass and serve.

name: Caramel Coffee Indulgence
directions: Combine coffee, butterscotch topping and International Delight Hersheys Coffee Creamer in a mug and stir to blend. Top with whipped cream and sprinkle with toffee bits and mini chocolate chips. Serve immediately.

name: Fruit Tea
directions: Boil water, pour over tea bags, and steep for 5 minutes.
Add other ingredients plus enough water to make 1 gallon.
Stir and serve.

name: Passion Perfect
directions: Pour the first 3 ingredients into a chilled glass filled with ice; stir.
Top with ginger ale; stir gently.
Garnish with lime slice.

name: Iced Chocolate Coffee
directions: In pitcher, stir together cooled coffee, whipping cream, and chocolate syrup. Cover and chill for 2 to 12 hours.
Stir before serving. Serve in ice filled glasses.

similar.name: Make Iced Coffee in Five Minutes

name: Mexicana
directions: Add ingredients to an cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously.
Strain into a chilled glass over ice cubes.

name: Banana Cream Pie Martini
directions: Add vodka to  a shaker half filled with crushed ice and shake a few times.
Add remaining alcohol and swirl.
Strain into cold/frozen martini glasses.

name: Vanilla Cosmo -Tini
directions: Add vodka to a cocktail strainer half filled with ice and shake about 10 times.
Add cointreau and juices and swirl to mix.
Strain into cold martini glass that have been rimmed with sugar or vanilla sugar if desired.

name: Toffee-Flavored Coffee
directions: In a small mixing bowl, beat cream until it begins to thicken.  Add confectioners sugar; beat until stiff peaks form.  Stir toffee bits into coffee; let stand for 30 seconds.
Strain and discard any undissolved toffee bits.
Pour coffee into mugs; top with whipped cream and drizzle with butterscotch topping.

similar.name: Spiced Coffee With Brandied Whipped Cream

name: Hot Caramel Chocolate
directions: In a large saucepan combine sugar, cocoa powder, and water. Cook and stir over medium heat until sugar is dissolved. Add candies; cook and stir until melted. Stir in milk. Heat through. Pour into mugs; top with whipped cream, if desired.

name: Blue Bombsickle
directions: Place vodka, lemonade and a splash of tonic  in a martini shaker over ice.

name: Planter's Punch
directions: Add the first 6 ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously.
Strain into a chilled glass over ice cubes.
Garnish with orange slice and cherry; serve with a straw.

name: Lychee Saketini Blush
directions: Chill 2 martini glasses.
Fill a martini shaker with ice and add vodka, sake, lychee syrup, and grenadine.
Shake to combine.
Strain into the chilled glasses and garnish with a lychee nut dropped in each glass.
Serve immediately.

name: Macaroon Martini
directions: Combine liquid ingredients in a cocktail shaker with cracked ice and shake well.
Strain into a chilled martini glass and garnish with orange twist.

name: Margarita Party
directions: In punch bowl add a lot of ice.
Mix concentrates and tequila.
Add to punch bowl with ice and stir.
Slowly add DIET SPRITE and stir again until mixed.
Serve!

name: Hot Chocolate Mayan Style
directions: Chop the chocolate and heat it in the water until melted.
Add honey, salt, and beat the hot chocolate water with a balloon wire whip as you add th warmed milk.
To make it more frothy and give more food value, you can beat up an egg or two, add hot chocolate to it, then pour it into the chocolate cooking pot and continue to whip, (but this isn't authentic).
Serve the hot chocolate in mugs with cinnamon-bark stick stirrers in each.

name: American Flyer
directions: Add the first 3 ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously.
Strain into a chilled glass.
Top with champagne.

name: Sugar Free Peach Bellini's
directions: In saucepan, over medium heat, combine the peaches, splendra, and water.  Bring the liquid to a boil.  Reduce the heat to medium low and simmer for 5 minutes.  Remove from the heat.  In a blender, puree the mixture until smooth.  Add schnapps and more water if needed to thin the puree out into a peach juice.  Refrigerate until chilled.  Fill each flute glass 2/3 of the way with Champagne.  Add the peach juice and serve -- Yummy.

name: Horchata (Ground Rice Drink)
directions: need also Large Capacity Blender (7-8 Cups).
Place rice in a bowl with enough hot water to cover.
Let sit overnight on counter.
Next day, remove the water.
Place rice, 1/2 cup fresh water and 2 cups milk in a blender until rice is all ground up.
Add sugar, vanilla, and cinnamon. Blend.
Add the remaining two cups milk, and 1/2 cup water.
Blend.
Strain through thickly layered cheesecloth (more than once may be necessary; do NOT squeeze the cloth).
Chill and serve. Makes approximately 6 cups.

Note: This is a favorite for youngsters of all ages. Also, the rice starch in this drink is an excellent way to "put out the fire" on your tongue while eating hot/spicy meals. In summertime, add crushed ice to drink to make a slushy.

similar.name: Russian Tea Mix from Rick's Mom

name: Wild Peppermint Tea
directions: Boil about 3 or 4 cups of water.
Add the peppermint leaves and shut the heat off.
Let the tea steep for about 5 minutes.
Pour through a tea strainer.
Add the honey and pour into cups.
The tea can be made from fresh leaves or dryed leaves.
note:you can find the leaves along any creek, river, or lake.

name: Altered State Shooter / Shot
directions: Pour each one into your shot glass (or over ice in a spirit glass)
Taste the goodness.
mmmmmmmmmm.

name: Tgi Friday's Sex on the Beach
directions: Pour over ice.
Serve.

name: Tgi Friday's B-52 Shooters
directions: Layer each ingredient into a shooter glass in the order that they appear.

name: Blue Moon
directions: Add the first two ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously; strain into a chilled glass. Drop in a lemon twist.

name: Lemon Drop Liqueur
directions: Combine sugar and water in a medium saucepan; cook over medium heat 5 minutes or until sugar dissolves, stirring constantly.  Remove from heat; stir in rind.  Cool completely.  Stir in vodka and lemon juice.
Divide vodka mixture between 2 wide-mouthed, 1-quart jars.  Cover each jar with metal lid, screw on band.  Store in a cool, dark place for 3 weeks, shaking jars every other day.

Line a fine-mesh sieve with a double layer of cheesecloth, strain mixture through cheesecloth into a bowl.  Discard solids.  Return liqueur to jars or clean decanter; store chilled in refrigerator or freezer.
Note: Mixture will keep in the freezer for up to a year.

name: Blizzard
directions: Add all ingredients to a blender.
Cover and process at medium speed until smooth.
Pour into a chilled glass.

name: Hairball
directions: Fill 1/3 of a collins glass with cider, then float the guinness on top, to bring the volume to 2/3 full.
Pour Bushmill's Irish whiskey in a separate shot glass.
Drop the shot glass into the collins glass and slam it!

name: Razmopolitan
directions: Put all ingredients into a shaker and add as much ice as you can and give it a good shake.
Pour straight into martini glass.
Garnish with frozen berries (used instead of ice).

name: Mocha Mambo
directions: Place the crushed ice in a cocktail shaker.
Add all ingredients and shake well.
Strain the drink into a glass.
Enjoy!

name: Blue Shark
directions: Add ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously; strain into a chilled cocktail glass or over ice in an old-fashioned glass.

name: Margarita - on the Rocks
directions: Shake above on ice and strain over tumbler filled with fresh ice.
If you want salted rims: rub the rim of the glass with Triple Sec or the cut lemon and dip into Margarita salt (or kosher salt).
If I am making more than two in the shaker, I reduce the lemon juice slightly.

name: Simple Peach Tea
directions: Just make Iced tea the way you normally make it and then stir in the peach gelatin.

name: Bocci Ball
directions: Add orange juice and amaretto to a chilled glass filled with ice.
Add a splash of club soda, stirring gently.

name: Mango-Avocado Margarita
directions: Combine first 8 ingredients in blender and process until smooth.
In shallow dish, combine salt and chili powder.
Coat rim of 4 glasses with lime juice (easier from a wedge of lime) and dip in salt and chili powder mixture.
Divide liquid mixture between 4 glasses.
Serve drinks with lime wedges, if desired.

name: Deluxe Caesar
directions: Rim a tall glass with lime juice and Clamato Rimmer seasoning salt, or celery salt.
Fill glass with ice and add above ingredients, stir to mix.
Garnish with a lime wedge and a cooked jumbo shrimp or celery stalk.

name: Barcardi Limon Lemonade
directions: Fill 10-ounce glass with ice.
Add the limon.
Add the lemonade.
Add the concentrate.
Garnish with the fruit slices.

similar.name: Lemonade With Bacardi Limon for Adults

name: Irish Surprise
directions: Mix alcohol and cherry juice in a glass.
Add ice.
Garnish with cherry.

name: The Regal Gentleman
directions: Stir all ingredients.
Add ice.
Cigar is optional!

name: Ultimate Chocolate Martini
directions: Add all ingredients to a shaker half full of ice.
Shake, pour into a martini glass, enjoy!

name: Michelle's Margaritas
directions: In a large pitcher, stir all ingredients together, or mix first four in a blender, then pour in a pitcher, and stir in ginger ale and water.
Serve over lots of ice.

name: Mint Julep Martini
directions: Combine ingredients in a Martini shaker; cover, shake thoroughly until chilled.
Strain into two chilled martini glasses and serve immediately.

name: Oprah's Lemon Drop Martini
directions: Shake the martini.
Rub the lemon over the rim of the glass.
Pour the martini into the glass, add another mint leaf if desired.

name: Cactus Margarita
directions: Mix together on the rocks or blend well in blender.

name: Sangria Spritzer Cocktail
directions: Add sugar, 2 orange slices and a good shot of brandy to a cocktail shaker.
Muddle together until the sugar is dissolved.
Add ice cubes to the shaker along with the Rioja wine.
Shake and strain into a martini glass and top with a splash of lemon-lime club soda.
Garnish with an orange slice.

name: Cranberry Margaritas (Alcoholic)
directions: In the morning, freeze 2 ice cube trays filled with about 1/2 the juice. When it's time to serve the drinks, work in two batches.  Combine 1 frozen mix with 8 shots of tequila, 1 tray cran-ice cubes and 2 cups juice. Mix in blender. Pour 4 margaritas and repeat. Makes 8 drinks.

name: Godiva Raspberry Martini
directions: Shake or stir all ingredients.
Pour into a chilled martini glass.
Sit back and enjoy.

name: Casa Blanca
directions: Mix ingredients in a shaker with cracked ice and shake well.
Strain into chilled cocktail glass.

name: Frosty Fruit Float
directions: MIX drink mix and club soda in tall glass.
ADD ice cream.
TOP with whipped topping and cherry.

name: Pink Lemonade
directions: Add the first 4 ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously; strain into chilled glass over ice cubes.
Top with 7-Up, stirring gently.
Garnish with lemon wedge.

name: Velvet Hammer
directions: In a cocktail shaker add three cubes of ice.
Add remaining ingredients.
Shake well, strain into a chilled champagne saucer.
Can also be served on the rocks.

similar.name: Standard Cream With White Creme De Cacao & Godiva

name: Iced Coffee
directions: Combined coffee and milks (& liquor if you choose).
Pour over ice cubes and add whipped cream.
Optional - Place all ingredients into a blender and blend for a frozen drink.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Hot Bailey's Irish Cream Chocolate Drink

name: Frozen Margarita
directions: Fill blender 3/4 full with crushed ice.
Pour in limeade concentrate, tequila and triple sec.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into glasses and serve.
If you prefer your glass rimmed with salt, rub a lime wedge around the edge of margarita glass and dip the rim into course salt.

name: Tequila Rose - Creamy Alcohol Liqueur
directions: Measure all ingredients into a blender.
Blend until mixed and smooth.  Store in refrigerator until serving time.

I think, like the homemade Bailey's recipes, likely keeping chilled a week will allow the flavors to blend.  All measurements are a starting point.  If it needs more or less of something then adjust as needed.

name: Adult Root Beer Floats
directions: Fill glass with ice.
Pour in root beer.
Add vanilla ice cream.
Top with bourbon.
Stir and enjoy!

name: Glogg
directions: Combine all ingredients except almonds in a non reactive pot.
simmer for 20 minutes.
serve warm and topped with almonds.

name: Mexicola
directions: Add tequila and lime juice to a chilled glass filled with ice.
