Top with cola; stir gently.
Garnish with lime wedge.

name: Vanilla White Russian
directions: Pour all over ice and enjoy!

name: Virgin Mojito
directions: In a glass, muddle/crush the mint, sugar, lime juice and Simple Syrup.
Add ice.
Top with the ginger ale/club soda/sparkling water.
For the sugar concious, you can exchange the sugar for Splenda (2tsp granulated Splenda) and omit the simple syrup.
Enjoy!

name: Pineapple Tequila
directions: Cut the top off the pineapple and then cut off the skin, being careful to get rid of all the scales.
Remove the core and dicard.
Cut fruit into chunks small enough to fit in the bottle.
Put pineapple in the bottle.
Combine sugar and tequila, stirring to dissolve sugar.
Pour into bottle.
Split vanilla bean and add it to the bottle.
Let the tequila stand for at least 1 week, shaking gently everyday to mix ingredients.

name: Raspberry Royale
directions: Pour 1 teaspoon of raspberry liqueur into each champagne glass and add 2 or 3 raspberries.
Fill each glass with champagne.
Enjoy!

name: Boston Cooler
directions: Add rum, lemon juice, and sugar to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously; strain into a chilled glass over ice cubes.
Top with club soda, stirring gently; drop in a lemon twist.

name: Flirtini
directions: Mix 1 part X-Rated Fusion Liqueur with 1 part X-Rated Vodka in a shaker with ice  (one is pink and one is a vodka -- both have a big "X" on the bottle. go to drinkpinkvodka.com to see where to buy).
Pour into a martini glass and add a twist of lemon or raspberry (if you're really prepared -- an orchid adds great personality) for something extra.
The fusion has the Provence blood oranges, mango and passion fruit
--  it's also really good with champagne --  next I'm going to try to make a salad dressing or desert with X-Rated Fusion.  If you have any ideas, please share with me!

name: South Sea Tea Blend
directions: Combine the ingredients in a food processor; blend well.
Place in an airtight container; attach instructions.
Instructions: add 2 tablespoons tea mixture to ¾ cup boiling water; stir well.
Serve warm or cold.

similar.name: The Dove's Nest Orange Spiced Iced Tea

name: Peaches and Cream
directions: Add ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice; shake vigorously.
Strain into a chilled glass over ice.

name: Tequila Mojitos
directions: Bring sugar and water to a boil in med saucepan. Boil, stirring often, till sugar dissolves. Remove from heat; add mint and let stand 2 hours or till cool.
Pour mixture through a wire mesh strainer into a pitcher, discarding mint. Stir in soda, juice, and tequila.  Serve over ice.

name: Tropical Daiquiri Slushy
directions: In a blender container combine rum, limeade, banana, pineapple and ice. Blend until slushy.
Sweeten to taste. Garnish with a lime.
Makes 2 to 3 servings.

name: Strawberry Lemonade Slush
directions: In a blender, combine the strawberries, lemonade concentrate, water and ice cubes.
Cover and process until smooth.
Pour into a freezer container.
Cover and freeze at least up to 12 hours or up to 3 months.
Let stand at room tempature 1 hour before serving.
Stir in club soda.

name: Springtime Lime Slushie
directions: In a freezer container, dissolve gelatin in boiling water.
Stir in the cold water and sherbert until combined.
Freeze for 4 hours or until set.
Remove from the freezer 45 minutes before serving.
For each serving, place 1 cup of slush mixture in a glass; add about 1/3 cup ginger ale.

name: Creamy Mocha Drink
directions: In a small bowl, combine the sugar substitute, cocoa and coffee. Add boiling water; stir until coffee and cocoa are dissolved. Stir in milk and vanilla. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
Place the coffee mixture in a blender; add ice cream. Cover and process until smooth. Pour into mugs or glasses; garnish with whipped topping and cinnamon.

name: Berry Cooler
directions: PLACE drink mix, 1 cup of the water and strawberries in blender container; cover. Blend on high speed until smooth. Pour into large plastic or glass pitcher.
ADD remaining 3 cups water and lime juice; mix well. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
STIR in club soda. Serve over ice cubes in tall glasses.

name: Lemon Vanilla Mint Martini
directions: combind lemon, two tbs sugar, vodka, and juice of 1/2 lemon in a shaker.
Shake 30 seconds until very cold to touch.
rim martini glass with remaining lemon and dip in sugar to rim glass.
pour beverage into martini glass and serve with a sprig of mint leaves.

name: Beer Mojito
directions: Cut peppermint leaves into smaller pieces and put into a mortar. Add sugar and lemon juice.
Grind to crush the the peppermint leaves and the sugar is dissolved.
Strain through a sieve into a small glass or bowl.
VARIATION I: put 2 teaspoons of Mojito mixture into a glass and cold add beer. Be careful, because the beer has the tendency to produce a lot of foam.
VARIATION II: put 2 teaspoons of Mojito mixture into a glass and add ice cold water and then cold beer.
Garnish with peppermint sprigs and lemon wedges.
NOTE: should make 3 (or 4) glasses.

NOTE: I used a German beer with an alcohol content of 4.8%. It is not too bitter and has some sweet notes. It is light in colour. Drinking temperature: German beer is often served with a temperature of 7 C (45 F).

name: Pineapple Mint Iced Tea
directions: Put water,  tea bags and mint in a large pot and bring to a boil.
Turn heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Strain and dicard tea bags and mint.  Reserve liquid.
Comine pineapple juice, sugar or honey, vanilla and reserved tea liquid.
Serve over ice.

name: Lemon and Red Zinger Iced Tea
directions: Steep the 4 tea bags of lemon zinger and red zinger together in 4 cups of hot water. Allow them to steep for awhile.
Remove tea bags and add 4 cups of apple juice to the tea.
Chill and serve with ice if desired. Garnish with lemon slices for an extra touch.

name: Ultimate Margaritas
directions: Combine lime juice, sugar, Cointreau, Triple Sec, tequila, and a big handful of ice in a cocktail shaker. Shake 30 seconds, add the beer, but do not shake. Strain into salt rimmed glasses (optional, I don't like it) filled with ice.  Garnish with a lime slice.

name: Sparkling Sangria
directions: In a large pitcher, combine the brandy and orange liquor.
Pour in the sugar, stir or shake the pitcher thoroughly to mix until the sugar dissolves.
Add all the fruit at once.
Add the cava and serve as is or on ice.

name: Ginger Lassi
directions: Put yogurt in a bowl.  Beat lightly with a whisk until light and creamy.
Hold the ginger over the yogurt and squeeze out all of its liquid.
Discard the ginger pulp in your hands.
Add the salt and cumin seeds to the yogurt and mix well.
Slowly pour in about 1/2 cup of water, mixing as you go.
Add ice and mix again.
Taste for balance of flavor.
Pour into serving glass.

similar.name: Mango-Mint Lassi With Indian Sweet Spices

name: Honey Basil Tea (Shahad Aur Tulsi Ke Chai)
directions: Combine the basil leaves and water in a saucepan. Bring to a boil and simmer very gently for 5 minutes.
Add the tea, ginger, honey, and peppercorns and bring back to a boil.
Remove from the heat and steep, covered, for 5 more minutes.
Just before serving, return to a boil and strain into tea cups.

name: Narangi Ki Chai (Tangerine Tea)
directions: Combine the water, sliced citrus peel, ginger, half lemon, and cloves in a medium saucepan. Bring to a boil, cover, and simmer very gently for 3 minutes.
Add the tea and honey and return to a boil.
Remove from the heat abd let steep, covered, for 5 more minutes.
Strain into cups and serve hot.

similar.name: Honey Basil Tea (Shahad Aur Tulsi Ke Chai)

name: Strawberry Kir
directions: put all ingredients in a wine glass.

name: Electric Lemonade
directions: Fill a glass with ice.
Add vodka, blue curacao, and sweet and sour mix.
Fill glass with 7up or Sprite.
Mix gently.

name: Sweet and Sour Mix
directions: Dissolve sugar into lemon juice.

name: Spiced Peach Mojito
directions: Tear mint leaves into a glass, add wedge of lime and soak in simple syrup.
Muddle with barspoon.
Half fill a rocks glass with crushed ice and add rest of ingredients to glass, stir before serving.
Top off with club soda or Sprite.
Garnish with a mint sprig and a lick of peach.
Note: Variation of a white peach Mojito but using Morgans Spiced instead of golden rum.

name: Fuzzy Shark
directions: Add Peach schnapps, orange juice, and 1 cup of crushed ice into blender. Blend until smooth.
Pour into glass top with blue curacao.
Do not stir.

name: A & W Cream Soda
directions: Dissolve the sugar and Kool-Aid drink mix in hot water in small pitcher.
Add corn syrup and vanilla extract. Stir well.
Cover and chill syrup until cold.
When the syrup is cold, pour 1/4 cup syrup into 1 cup cold soda water.  Stir gently.
Add the syrup and soda water mixture to the pitcher of sweetened Kool-aid.  Stir gently.
Add remaining syrup and soda to the pitcher.
Stir gently, add ice and serve.

name: Pomegranate Spritzer
directions: Put the pomegranate molasses in a tall 12-ounce glass; add in a few ounces of the club soda; stir.
Add in the ice cubes, and fill the glass with club soda.
Stir and serve with a straw.

name: Real Bellini's
directions: .Put rum, champagne, peach schnapps, and peach juice in blender with ice and blend.
Pour sangria in bottom of a stemmed glass.
Pour blended drink over Sangria.
Enjoy!

name: Icy Sherried Lemonade
directions: Mix together the lemonade concentrate and sherry.
Pour ½ cup over a tall glass of crushed ice; stir well and serve garnished with a mint spring.
Serve with a straw.

name: Angelica Liqueur
directions: In a glass jar, place the angelica root and add 2 oz vodka, seal tightly and let sit 2 weeks.

Using a mortar and a pestle, grind up the cardamom and apricot seeds.  Put this, along with the marjoram, allspice, star anise, cinnamon, and coriander in a glass jar.  Add 2 oz vodka, seal tightly, and let sit for a week.
Make sugar syrup by combining sugar, water, and citric acid.  Heat and stir till all of the sugar is dissolved, about 15 minutes.
Take your cardamom vodka and strain with a coffee filter. Combine with another cup of vodka and the sugar syrup. Add the angelica root vodka in small portions until you like the flavor.
Let sit for 2 months and then test the flavor again.  Add more syrup, vodka or angelica vodka if need be.

name: Crème De Menthe
directions: Wash leaves in cold water several times.
Shake or pat gently dry.
Snip each leaf into halves or thirds. Discard stems. .
Combine leaves and vodka and steep for 2 weeks shaking  occasionally.
Strain out leaves.
Boil sugar and water together, cool and add to vodka mixture
Add optional ingredients if you want.
Age 1 to 3 months.

name: Red Robin Copycat Recipe: " Sand in Your Shorts"
directions: ** Recipe for approx 21 oz. glass.
Mound glass with ice.
Add vodka, triple sec, Midori, and peach Schnapps.
Add OJ.
Add cranberry juice.
"Float" 1/2 oz. Chambord on top.

name: Sbiten (Spiced Honey Drink)
directions: Combine all ingredients with 1 quart water in a saucepan with a lid over medium heat; bring almost to a boil.
Cover and turn off heat; steep for 15 to 20 minutes.
Strain, then reheat and serve, or refrigerate, covered, and serve cold.

name: Ramos Fizz
directions: Fill blender with crushed ice.
Add lemonade, gin, half and half and orange juice.
Blend 1 minute.
Add whole egg.
Blend another minute.

name: Almond Cow
directions: Shake ingredients together in a cocktail shaker and pour.

name: Ginger Beer
directions: Bruise the ginger and slice the lemons.
Mix the boiling water, cream of tartar and nearly all of the caster sugar with the ginger and lemons.
When the mixture has cooled to be luke-warm, add the beaten egg white, then the yeast mixed with the reserved sugar, and stir well.

Let it stand for 24 hours, then bottle.  CAUTION - Although I haven't made this myself, I suspect that the fermentation will continue in the bottle.  This means that gas and pressure will build up.  Use bottles with corks instead of a fixed top.  That way, if pressure builds up, the cork will shoot out (releasing the gas and some of the ginger beer) and (hopefully) the bottle will not explode.  I have been caught out by exploding bottles of elderflower champage before, and it isn't an experience I would recommend to others!  UPDATE - A correspondent has confirmed that you should put the ginger beer into bottles with corks, release the pressure a few times, and store them in a cool dark place with doors so that if a bottle explodes the resultant chaos will be confined.

name: Lychee Lemon Drop
directions: To make fresh lemonade, squeeze juice of entire lemon into glass. Stir in sugar until dissolved. Muddle remaining lemon rinds into the mixture and remove.  Transfer to mixer.  Add Vodka, Lichido, Curaçao.  Mix vigorously with ice.  Pour into chilled martini glass and garnish with pitted lychee.
Enjoy!

name: Buffett Blueberry Blaster Margarita
directions: Frozen: Blend all ingredients to serve frozen.
On the Rocks:  Blend blueberries first if you plan on serving this on the rocks.  Mix ingredients and pour over ice.

name: Better Than Champagne
directions: Stir the club soda and grape juice concentrate together.
Pour into 2 soda bottles or other container with a lid; cap tightly and chill.
Serve in champagne glasses.

name: Calgary Stampede Beergarita
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large pitcher.
Stir.
Enjoy.

name: Haleakala Martini
directions: Pour the Absolut vodka, Chambord raspberry liqueur and pineapple juice into a cocktail shaker half-filled with ice cubes. Shake well, strain into a chilled glass, and serve.
Serve in a martini glass.

name: California Cosmo
directions: Chill martini glasses.
Fill cocktail shaker with ice.
Add all ingredients.  Shake well.
Pour into glasses.
Thread grapes on to tooth picks.  Freeze.
Add to glass for garnish.

name: Raspberry Kiss
directions: Pour ingredients into a stainless steel shaker over ice, shake until completely cold then strain into a chilled stemmed glass or rocks glass filled with ice.

name: Sparkling Raspberry Lemonade
directions: Squeeze the lemons and remove the seeds from the juice. Put 1 cup of juice in a large pitcher.
Liquify raspberries in a blender or processer. If you don't like the seeds you can strain the liquid. Place 1/3 cup of raspberry juice in the pitcher.
Stir the sugar in with the fruit mixture. Refridgerate until ready to serve.
Pour the 2 bottles of 7-up into the pitcher immediatly before serving.

name: Banana Foster Martini
directions: Combine all ingredients (except powdered cocoa) in a blender. Blend until smooth and pour into a cocktail glass. Garnish with a dusting of powdered cocoa, and serve.

name: Chocolate Heaven Martini for 2
directions: Pour all ingredients into an ice-filled cocktail shaker.
Shake and pour into 2 chilled cocktail glasses, and serve.

name: Sunrise Cocktail
directions: slice up pinapple and lime into wedges and set aside.
place sugar and lime juice into seperate bowls.
dunk the rim of a cocktail glass in the lime juice to moisted, then quickly place rim into the bowl with sugar, to form a sugar crusted rim.
carefully place ice cubes into glass.
pour the fruit juice and a dash of the remaining lime juice over the cubes(do not stir). slowly pour in the rasperry syrup(do not stir, syrup will sink to bottom of glass).
garnish with fresh pinaple and lime.
serve immediately.

name: Woodstock (Cocktail)
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into chilled martini glass.

name: Windex Martini
directions: Mix everthing together in a shaker.
Serve in a martini glass.

name: Valentine Drink
directions: Shake banana liqueur, vodka, and cranberry juice with ice cubes.
Strain into a red wine glass.

name: Fresh Whiskey Sours
directions: Note: to make sugar syrup, bring 1 cup water and 1 cup sugar to a boil, simmer until the sugar is completely dissolved; chill before using.
Combine the whiskey, lemon juice, lime juice, and sugar syrup.
Fill a cocktail shaker halfway with ice; pour in the drink mix 2/3 full.
Shake vigorously for 15 seconds and strain into glasses.
Add a maraschino cherry and serve ice cold.

name: Citrus Sports Drink
directions: In a glass pitcher or jug combine sugar and salt.  Pour in boiling water;stir to dissolve sugar and salt.
Add orange juice,lemon juice,and cold water;stir to mix.  Cover and refrigerate up to 1 week.  Stir before serving.
Makes 8 (one-cup) servings.
For a lime version,omit orange juice,increase lemon juice by 2 tablespoons,and add 3 tablespoons fresh lime juice.

name: Cucumber Gimlets
directions: Slice four slices from one cucumber.  Set aside.
Peel and coarsely chop remaining cucmbers , transfer to food processor and puree until smooth.
Pour through fine strainer set over a large bowl, pressing on solids in strainer.   Discard solids.
Mix 1 cup of cucumber juice, gin, lime juice and sugar in pitcher; stir until sugar dissolves.
Add ice, mix well.
Immediately strain mixture into 4 small martini glasses.
Garnish with lime and cucmber slices.

name: Anti-Cocktail
directions: Mix together well.
Garnish with fruit slices and serve over ice.

name: Pelican Breeze
directions: Mix all ingredients. Place into a blender, add ice and blend.
Enjoy.

name: Purple Gecko
directions: Shake with ice and pour into a salt-rimmed cocktail or margarita glass. Garnish with a lime wedge.
Serve in:.
Margarita Glass.

name: Smith and Wesson
directions: Pour vodka, kahlua, and cream into glass filled with ice, then top off with Pepsi.
Serve in:  Highball Glass.

name: The West Coast
directions: In a cocktail shaker combine both ingredients and shake well.
Pour mixture into a chilled stemmed cocktail glass filled with ice.

name: Raspberry Iced Tea
directions: Brew tea and let steep a full 5 minutes; cool.
Mix in raspberry syrup.
Pour over ice.
Garnish.
**For a chai flavour, use tazo chai tea**.

name: Peanut Butter Coffee
directions: Put the peanut butter and a cup or two of the coffee in a blender.
Whomp until it's well-blended, then stir back into the rest of the coffee.

similar.name: Chocolate Cappuccino Coffee Mix (In a Jar)

name: Cherry Breeze
directions: Mix all ingredients together.
Serve on the rocks.

name: White Chocolate Brandy Alexander
directions: Combine the milk, vanilla extract and salt in a medium saucepan.
Cook over medium heat until thoroughly heat through DO NOT BOIL.
Remove from heat and gradually stir 1/4 of the hot milk mixture into the chocolate, stirring with a whisk until chocolate melts.
Add the remaining hot milk mixture to the melted chocolate, stirring constantly.
Stir in brandy and creme de cacao.
Pour into glasses and top with whipped cream and chocolate shavings.
Serve immediately.

name: Ww 1 Point Cocoa Coffee Malt
directions: Put all dry ingredients in a 16 oz. glass.
Dissolve in 2 oz. hot water.
Add 5 oz. of cold water and a lot of crushed ice (or cubes).
Top off with soy milk and coffee-mate.

name: Pomegranate Cocktail
directions: Combine vodka, seltzer, triple sec, pomegranate juice and lemon juice into a cocktail shaker  oover ice; shake.
Pour into 4 chilled cocktail glasses; garnish with pomegranate seeds , if using.

name: Pomegranate Mojito
directions: Combine the sugar, lime juice and mint leaves in a tall glass; mash with the back of a spoon.
Mix in the rum and pomegrante juice.
Fill glass with ice.
Top with a splash of soda water.

name: Wet Panther
directions: Place Cranberry Juice in a glass.
Add a few ice cubes.
Add Sprite.
Add a single raspberry to the glass to garnish if you wish.
Enjoy!

name: Apricot Colada-Alcohol Optional
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender.
Whirl until smooth and blended.

name: Chocolate Raspberry Martini
directions: Mix all liquids and chill for at least 1 hour.
Chill martini glasses.
Dip rim in syrup and cocoa.
Fill with chocolate martini mixture.

name: Basil-Lemon Gimlets
directions: In a cocktail shaker, muddle 8 of the basil leaves with 2 tbls of the simple syrup (simple syrup is equal parts of water and sugar, heated until sugar disolves then chilled).
Add 5 oz of the vodka, half of the lemon juice and 4 ice cubes and shake well.
Strain into 2 martini glasses and repeat with the remaining ingredients.

name: Berry and Banana Daiquiris
directions: In a blender container combine concentrate and rum.
Add raspberries and banana.
Cover and blend until smooth.
With blender running, add ice cubes, one at a time through opening in lid.  Blend until slushy.

similar.name: Strawberry (Or Banana or Peach  or Pineapple) Frozen Daiquiris

name: Blue Lagoon
directions: In a long-stemmed glass filled with ice cubes, stir together vodka, curacao, and lemonade.

name: Boys are Stupid
directions: Pour all ingredients in equal parts into a margarita glass. Serve unstirred.
Serve in a Margarita Glass.

name: Martini
directions: Skake liquid ingredients like Hell in a Shaker with Ice.
Place Lime Wedge on the Rim of a Martini Glass. Pour mix into Glass. ENJOY.

name: Tequila Refresca
directions: Fill a goblet or rocks glass with ice cubes.
Add the tequila and a dash of Campari to give the drink a slight blush and balance the sweetness of the soda.
Top off with the grapefruit soda.
Skewer the fruit and stir into the cocktail.
Drink.
Serve with a plate of wedged pineapple, a small bowl of your favorite chili powder, and coarse salt, for dipping.

name: Deja Blue
directions: Combine the first 7 ingredients in a large pitcher that holds at least 95 ounces; stir well.
Can serve immediately or covered and refrigerated until ready to serve.
Fill 12-ounce tall glasses or wine glasses two-thirds full with ice cubes.
Add drink mixture; garnish each serving with an orange slice and cherry skewered on a cocktail pick.

name: Amaretto Almond Liqueur (Homemade)
directions: In a small sauce pan over medium heat bring 1 cup of sugar and 1/2 cup water to boil.
Let boil for 2 minutes to make a syrup.
Set aside to cool slightly.
When cooled mix 3 cups vodka, almond extract and 1 cup of the syrup mixture.
It's ready to bottle.

name: Incredible Hulk
directions: Shake with ice inches.
Strain
Pour into tall glass.
Fill glass with mountain dew.

name: Mmmmm Mango Margarita
directions: Blend first 6 ingredients in blender.
Rim margarita glass with lime and salt.
Then just enjoy.

name: Cranberry Liqueur (Light)
directions: Combine sugar and water in a medium saucepan; cook over medium heat 5 minutes or until sugar dissolves, stirring constantly. Remove from heat, and cool completely.
Place cranberries in a food processor; process 2 minutes or until finely chopped. Combine sugar mixture and cranberries in a large bowl; stir in vodka.
Pour the vodka mixture into clean jars; secure with lids. Let stand 3 weeks in a cool, dark place, shaking every other day.
Strain the cranberry mixture through a cheesecloth-lined sieve into a bowl, and discard solids. Carefully pour liqueur into clean bottles or jars.
Note: Liqueur can be stored refrigerated or at room temperature for up to a year.

name: Boston Creme Pie Martini
directions: Pour each ingredient into a shaker with ice.
Shake.
Serve in a martini glass.

name: Cafe Brulot
directions: Combine orange rind, 3 sticks of cinnamon, and sugar in a silver bowl. Heat brandy in a small saucepan with a long handle, just long enough to produce fumes (do not boil).
Remove mixture from heat, ignite, and pour over ingredients in bowl.
Ladle brandy over ingredients until sugar dissolves.
Add coffee. Ladle into demitasse cups. Serve with cinnamon stick stirrers.

name: Copycat Constant Comment Tea
directions: Combine all ingredients well and store in an airtight container.

name: Peachy Freeze
directions: Place frozen items in a blender followed by liquid items.
Pulse on "ice crush" setting until ice and frozen peaches are broken up enough to blend.
Blend on the "liquify" setting one minute or until smooth.
This fills a little more than two large bar style frozen drink glasses, like those found on cruise ships, or 4 smaller glasses.

name: Tea Syrup
directions: Pour 1 quart boiling water over 1 1/2 oz. tea and let stand 3 hours.
Strain.
Bring to boil 1 pint water and 1 lb. sugar; boil 2 minutes.
Add to tea.
Bottle your syrup and keep in fridge.
When ready for a glass of iced tea, fix a glass of ice water and add tea syrup to desired strength.
bottle.

name: Fresh Peach Bellini
directions: Puree the peaches in a blender until smooth.

If the peaches are really ripe this should happen without a problem; but if they are not that ripe peel and slice them, place them in a bowl and sprinkle them with a Tbs or so of sugar. Let it sit for 10 min or so to draw some of the juices from the peaches and add a little sweetness.
Pour puree into a bowl and chill until ready to use.
Mix 2 oz of peach puree with 4 oz of Champagne, stir to combine and serve in chilled flutes.
You can also combine the two in a pitcher, mix and serve (we found this a little easier for our large group).

name: Ritz Bar Fizz
directions: Pour the grenadine, pineapple juice, and grapefruit juice into a chille champagne glass.
Top with the champagne.
Garnish with a sprig of mint and a cherry is desired.

name: Top Shelf Wine Margaritas
directions: Place the wine, Cointreau and lime juice in a blender.
Fill until almost full with crushed ice. Leave about an inch or so at the top.
Blend until very slushy.
Salt the rims of the margarita/martini glass if desired.
Pour margarita into the glass.
Garnish with a lime wedge is desired and enjoy.

name: Garrett's Uptown Cocktail
directions: In an ice filled cocktail glass, add ingredients.
Stir and serve.

name: Butterbeer
directions: In single cup or on stovetop:.
Melt butter and honey together.
Add milk, sugar, vanilla, and butterscotch.
Heat until it reaches desired temperature (hot drink).
Mix in hot chocolate powder and cinnamon (the cinnamon is very strong, 1 tsp tends to be too much, so I recommend just a little pinch for extra flavor).

name: Meloncello
directions: Rim a rocks glass with the sugar, if desired, and put in the freezer. Puree the watermelon cubes in a blender until juicy.
Fill the prepped glass with ice. Add the watermelon juice, limoncello and rum. Top off with enough club soda to give the drink a light bubble. Garnish with the lemon wedge. Drink.

name: Homemade Grenadine
directions: Bring pomegranate juice and sugar to a boil over moderate heat, stirring until sugar is dissolved.
Simmer until reduced to about 1/2 cup, about 10 minutes.
Remove from heat and stir in lemon juice.
Cool to room temperature.

name: Kauai Nightcap
directions: Pour liqueurs into a cup.
Fill the rest of the cup with coffee.
Top with whipped cream if desired.

name: Iced Vanilla Tea
directions: Boil  tea bags with 4c. water in microwave for 7min.  Cover and let steep for 30-45min.  Add sugar to hot tea mixture, stir.  Pour tea into 2 quart pitcher, fill with water, stir.  Pour over a glass of ice and enjoy!

name: Frozen Lime Daiquiri
directions: Add the first 6 ingredients to a blender; blend the mixture until it is smooth.
Pour mixture into a hurricane glass and garnish with lime wedge.

name: Ginny - Bloody Mary
directions: Combine all ingredients - one part vodka to two or three parts V8, salt/pepper to taste.
Important: refrigerate overnight - they will become much spicier.

name: Rum Runner
directions: Fill a hurricane glass with ice cubes.
Add the first 6 ingredients to a shaker; shake vigorously for 5-10 seconds.
Pour into the glass and garnish with  a pineapple wedge.

name: Beer Margaritas
directions: Fill blender with ice almost to the top.
Add ingredients.
Blend well.

name: Homemade Ginger Ale
directions: Combine sugar, water and gingerroot in a medium saucepan; bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until mixture has reduced slightly.
Strain gingerroot from syrup.
To make ginger ale, combine 2 tablespoons syrup with club soda. Pour over ice and serve with a squeeze of lime wedge. Store syrup in the refrigerator for several weeks.

similar.name: Ginger Ale Ginger Soda Ginger Pop

name: Eraser
directions: Stir ingredients together with a couple of ice cubes in a collins glass, and serve.

name: Strap-O-Nilla Juice
directions: Pour all ingredients into a mixing glass, and shake well.
Pour into a highball glass filled with ice, and serve.

name: Absolut Mandarin Mirage
directions: Pour the lime juice and Midori in a longdrink glass.
Fill with crushed ice.
Add the ginger beer.
Stir the vodka and crème with ice in a separate mixing glass and gently float it on top of the ginger mixture.

name: Zakuski Martini
directions: Muddle cucumber, add the rest.
Shake with ice and strain to a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Absolut Rudy Red
directions: Stir all ingredients with ice and strain into a well-chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with a zest of ruby red grapefruit.

name: Bacon Cheese Pie
directions: 1 heat in skillet.
2 bake for 30 minutes.

name: Daylon's Bedtime
directions: Pour vanilla vodka into a ice filled glass.
Add the triple sec.
Add soda to taste and mix and serve.

name: Dark N' Stormy
directions: Simply add the rum to the chilled ginger beer according to your taste and tolerance.
Serve on the rocks!

name: Rum Swizzle
directions: Fill a pitcher a third full with ice cubes.
All all of the ingredients besides garnish and churn vigorously with a swizzle stick until a bit of 'sea foam' appears on the top.
Strain into sour glasses, garnish with a cherry toothpicked to a slice of orange.

name: Gallstone Shooter
directions: Gently layer into a shot glass.

name: Bellini-Tini
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker halfway with ice cubes.
Add in the vodka, peach schnapps, and cranberry juice.
Shake vigoruously for 5-10 seconds.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass; garnish with a peach slice or a maraschino cherry.

name: Bikini Martini
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker halfway with ice cubes.
Add in the gin, blue curacao, and peach schnapps.
Squeeze the juice from the lemon in to the shaker.
Shake vigorously for 5-10 seconds; strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with an orange twist.

name: Iced Ginger Green Tea
directions: Boil water.
Remove from heat, add minced ginger and tea bags.  Steep tea for ~3 minutes.
Remove tea bags and strain tea into a pitcher.  Refrigerate until cold & serve w/ sweetener if desired.

similar.name: Lemon Grass and Ginger Iced Tea

name: Zaza
directions: Stir and strain to a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Amarula Delight
directions: Mix the Amarula, milk, and coke in glass of choice then add the ice cream(allow room for it to fizz up some.

name: Cat's Eye
directions: Stir and strain to a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with olive.

name: New York, New York
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker halfway with ice cubes.
Add in the bourbon and grenadine; squeeze the juice from the lemon into the shaker.
Shake mixture vigorously for 5 -10 seconds.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass; garnish with an orange twist.

name: Star Spangled Banner
directions: Use a  to pour each layer into the serving glass, exactly in the order listed.
One layer should float upon another.

name: Sex With an Alligator
directions: Pour melon liqueur and sweet & sour mix into a shot or pousse-cafe glass.
Sink raspberry liqueur onto the side of the glass, and top with Jagermeister.
Properly made, this shot will consist of 3 layers.

name: Tequila Shot for the Tequila Enthusiast
directions: Mix together sugar and cinnamon on plate.
Pour tequila into shot glasses.
Enjoy tequila followed by orange slices dredged/dipped in sugar mixture.

name: Hot Buttered Rum Base
directions: Mix all ingredients well and refrigerate any unused portion.  This does keep well.
For each drink, add the following to a coffee mug:.
1 Tbls. of base mix.
1 1/2 oz. dark rum.
1/2 cup boiling water.
Stir well.  This makes approximately 15 drinks.

name: Brandy Elite
directions: Build the ingredients in the order above and serve.

name: Traffic Light
directions: Layer the ingredients into a shot glass in the following order pouring them carefully over the back of a spoon and serve: Midori melon liqueur, Disaronno Amaretto, De Kuyper Cranberry.

name: Metropolitan
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker halfway with ice.
Add in vodka, triple sec, and cranberry juice.
Squeeze the juice from the lime into the shaker; shake vigorously for 5-10 seconds.
Strain the mixture into a chilled cocktail glass; garnish with an orange spiral.

name: Patriot Missle II
directions: In a shaker mix vodka and a splash of sprite shaken in ice.
Pour into Lowball Glass.
Sink Grenadine, then sink Blue Curacao.
This is a layered shot red, blue.

name: Nutty African (Coffee Drink)
directions: Pour Amarula and Frangelico into coffee glass or clear mug.
Fill glass or mug with hot coffee.
Top with whipped cream and sprinkle with nuts if desired.

name: Zebratini
directions: Stripe a martini glass with chocolate syrup.
Combine first 4 ingredients in a cocktail shaker filled with ice and shake vigorously.
Strain into striped martini glass.
Shake espresso shot in shaker with ice and strain into center of martini.
Top with a layer of whipped cream if desired. I used heavy whipping cream and layered it on the surface.

name: Uncle Wayne's Bloody Mary
directions: Mix and pour over ice!  Uncle Wayne sometimes substitutes a dill pickle spear for the usual celery stick on the side.

name: Cheesecake
directions: mix all ingrediants together and serve.

name: Alpine Coffee
directions: Add Kalhua, grand mariner,glava to a very large coffee cup or mug.
Pour enough coffee to just about fill the cup.
Add whipped cream.
Float cherry brandy on top of the whipped cream.
Garnish with cherry.

name: Mint Julep
directions: Place the mint in the bottom of a mortar/pestle, and top with the sugar.
Muddle these together until the leaves start to break down and dissolve the sugar. Transfer to a cocktail glass.
Add a splash of seltzer water.
Fill the glass 3/4 with ice, and add the bourbon.
Top with more seltzer; stir and garnish with a sprig of mint.

name: Chocolate Covered African Cherry Martini
directions: Rim martini glass with chocolate shavings or syrup.
Measure ingredients into a cocktail shaker filled with ice and shake vigorously.
Pour into rimmed martini glasses and garnish with cherry.

name: Spice Tea
directions: Put the water and spices in a small saucepan, bring to the boil then simmer for five minutes (or a bit longer if you want a stronger drink).
Pop the almond into the bottom of your mug.
Strain the tea into the mug on top of the almond, and sweeten to taste.

name: Very Cranberry Margarita
directions: Place half of the ingredients in a blender and fill with ice.
Blend until smooth.  Pour into pitcher.
Repeat.
Pour into margarita glasses with salt or sugar around rims.
Makes 2 pitchers.

name: Macon Hot Vanilla
directions: Heat the milk until very hot but not boiling.
Pour into a mug.
Add the rest  or the ingredients then mix well.
Serve immediately.

name: Hot Chocolate Stinger
directions: Add the brandy and creme de menthe to a warmed coffee glass.
Slowly add in the hot chocolate.
Top with whipped cream, a sprinkle of cocoa powder and stir the drink.

name: Georgia Peach
directions: Put all ingredients in a shaker with crushed ice and shake.
Serve!

name: Hot Buttered Whiskey (Or Rum) Batter
directions: Melt butter and sugar until you have a syrup-like consistency.
Stir in softened ice cream.
Stir until creamy and smooth.
Freeze.
To serve, put 1 oz. of whiskey in cup, add 2 heaping tablespoons of batter, top off with boiling water, and stir to combine.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Hot Buttered Rum W/ Brandy, Batter

name: Raspberry Mochatini
directions: Fill a shaker halfway with ice cubes; add in the vodka, creme de cacao, Chambord, and espresso.
Shake vigorously for 5-10 seconds.
Strain mixture into a chilled cocktail glass; garnish with skewered raspberries.

name: Snickerdoodle Coffee Creamer
directions: Place ingredients in a small bowl.
Using a whisk, blend until evenly colored.
Store in an airtight container.
To use, put 1-2 tsp creamer in hot beverage of choice. I actually prefer more in my coffees.

name: Hot Chocolate Espresso
directions: In 2 large cups or glass mugs, mix the coffee (or espresso) and sugar.
In a small saucepan over low heat, warm the cream.
Add the cocoa and mix well.
Add the cream mixture to the coffee and top with a dollop of whipped cream and the grated chocolate.
Serve with a cinnamon stick.

name: Ww Ginger "tea"
directions: Place grated ginger into a 2-cup glass measuring cup.
Fill to the 1-1/2 cup line with boiling water.
Set timer for 10 minutes.
When timer goes off, strain into a large mug and stir in sugar (you may need more or less, depending on how sweet you want your tea).
Taste; if it's too strong (too gingery) for you, add a little more boiling water to your mug.
Sip, sip, sip.

name: Ww Pina Colada
directions: Put the pineapple in the blender.
Pour the milk on top and the extract.
Whirl away. If not sweet enough, add Splenda.

similar.name: World's Easiest Pina Colada Rum Martini

name: Bhupek's Lemonade
directions: mix all ingredients and put in fridge for a day before serving vey cold.

name: Chocolate Creme De Menthe Flavored Coffee
directions: Add syrup to a freshly brewed cup of coffee.
Mix well.

name: Emergency Chocolate Milk
directions: Put sugar, cocoa, and water in microwavable 12 oz glass.
Microwave for 30 seconds or until sugar and cocoa dissolve.
Add cold milk and stir.

name: Fresh Vegetable Juice - V8 Double
directions: Place the tomatoes, cucumber, celery, and carrots in your juice extractor.
Stuff the ginger in the broccoli and place in the juice machine.
For zest, squeeze the juice from a 1/2 lime or lemon into the juice.
Add Sea Salt to taste if desired.

name: Fresh Fruit Juice - Pear De Licious
directions: Wash your fruit and veggie thoroughly.
Process your fruit and veggie through the juice machine.
Strain to remove excess pulp and froth.
Add distilled water if desired.
Each machine will yield different amounts of juice depending on the quality of your machine.  My machine is a Breville and I get approximately 18 oz. of this recipe (before I dilute it).

name: Cinnamon Roll Latte
directions: Combine ingredients in a 12 oz cup.
Mix well.

name: Milky Way Latte
directions: Combine ingredients in a 12 oz cup.
Mix well.
Garnish with whipped cream and chocolate shavings.

name: Marzipan Orange Latte
directions: Combine ingredients in a 12 oz cup.
Mix well.

similar.name: Matcha Oat Milk Latte (Hot or Iced)

name: Raspberry Amaretto Latte
directions: Combine ingredients in a 12 oz cup.
Mix well.

name: Creme Caramel Latte
directions: Combine ingredients in a 12 oz cup.
Mix well.

name: Linda's Blueberry-Pomegranate Martini
directions: Fill a shaker half-way with ice.
Shake ingredients in a shaker and put in chilled martini glasses.

name: Dirty Shirley
directions: Pour all ingredients over ice in a tall drinking glass.
Stir, drink and enjoy!

name: Mocha Latte Syrup
directions: Mix all ingredients in a saucepan and whisk in 1/2 cup water and bring to a boil over medium heat.  Boil 1 minute, stirring often.
Remove from heat and stir in 2 tablespoons vanilla extract.  Refrigerate up to 2 weeks.
Mocha Latte Beverage:  Spoon 1 tablespoon Mocha Latte Syrup into a coffee cup; stir in 3/4 cup hot milk.  Makes 1 serving.

name: Coffee for the Damned
directions: Put the measured ingredients into a coffee mug, except lemon.
Fill mug with coffee.
Stir and float lemon pulp.

name: Low-Fat Homemade Lemonade
directions: In pitcher squeeze lemons.
Add 2 cups ice.
Add 1 quart of water.
Top it off with 1 cup sugar.

name: Cocoa-Tini
directions: put some ice into a cocktail shaker (or pitcher if you prefer your drinks stirred).
pour in remaining ingredients.
shake (or stir) until well mixed.
strain into martini glasses.

name: Mint Cream Coffee
directions: Make a pot of coffee as usual, except in the filter add about a pinch of crushed mint.
Warm 1/2 a cup of milk on the stove or in the microwave till WARM.
Mix 1 cup mint coffee with milk.
Add sugar to taste.

name: Godiva Tuxedo
directions: Combine over ice in a rocks glass.

name: Godiva White Russian
directions: Pour in a rocks glass over ice and stir.

name: Espresso Zabaglione
directions: Whisk the yolks and sugar in a large glass bowl to blend. Set the bowl over a saucepan of simmering water (do not allow the bottom of the bowl to touch the water).
Whisk until the yolk mixture is very thick and fluffy, about 3 minutes. Whisk in the hot espresso. Pour the espresso mixture into mugs and serve immediately.

name: Ginger Infused Vodka
directions: Combine the vodka and ginger root in a clean container. (Reserve the vodka bottle for storing the infused vodka later.)

Seal the container and store in a cool, dark place for 3 days, shaking occasionally. After 3 days, pour the vodka through a strainer and discard the ginger solids. Return the strained, infused vodka to its original bottle.
Store infused vodka in the refrigerator or freezer for up to 1 month.

name: Ginger Pear Martini
directions: Chill four martini glasses.
Peel, core and slice the pear.
Combine the vodka, syrup, liquer, ice and lime juice in a cocktail shaker and shake vigorously.
Dip the rims of the chilled glasses in the sugar.
Pour the cocktails and garnish the glasses with pear slices.

name: Purple Crayon
directions: Pour Chambord and vodka over ice in a highball glass.
Fill with pineapple juice.
Garnish with a purple grape and a pineapple slice if desired.

name: Toblerone (Drink for Adults)
directions: Put all the ingredients into a shake with ice and shake shake shake!
Strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with a crumbled chocolate candy bar, if desired.

name: Espressotini
directions: Put all ingredients into a shaker with ice.
Shake well.
Strain into a chilled martini glass.
Float 3 coffee beans on top, if desired.

name: Absolutely Fabulous
directions: Place vodka, chambord, and cranberry juice into a shaker with ice and shake shake shake -- shake shake shake.
Strain into a champagne glass and top with champagne.
Garnish with a srawberry on the rim.

name: Spiced Green Tea
directions: In a Dutch oven or large kettle, bring the water to a boil.
Remove from heat; add the tea bags.
Cover and steep for 8 minutes.  Discard the tea bags.
Add sugar, lemon juice and pumpkin pie spice to tea; stir until sugar is dissolved.
Stir in apple juice and cranberry juice.
Serve warm or cold.

name: Homemade Ginger Ale Recipe
directions: Bring 2 cups of water to a boil in a saucepan.
Add ginger.
Reduce heat to medium low and let ginger sit in the simmering water for 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and let sit for 20 minutes.
Strain liquid through a fine mesh strainer.
Discard ginger pieces.
In a separate saucepan, make the Simple Syrup by dissolving 1 cup granulated sugar into 1 cup of boiling water. Set aside.
Make individual (tall) glasses of ginger ale by mixing 1/2 cup of ginger water with 1/3 cup of Simple Syrup and 1/2 cup of club soda.
Add a few drops of fresh lime juice and a lime wedge to each glass.

name: Chai
directions: In a small saucepan, combine water, tea bags, cinnamon stick, cardamom, clove and ginger.
Bring to a boil. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 5 minutes.
Stir in milk; return to a boil for 1 minute. Strain; discard tea bags and spices.
Stir in sugar until dissolved. Ladle into mugs.
Garnish with whipped cream and cinnamon.

name: Coca Cola Blak(Coffee Cola)
directions: mix cola and cream soda.
mix in coffee and sugar.
enjoy.

similar.name: Coffee Coke (Low Calorie) Copycat - Coca Cola Blak

name: Arctic Java
directions: Combine water and coffee granules in tall glass; stir until coffee is dissolved.
Add milk, sugar and pectin; stir until sugar is dissolved. Add ice before serving.

similar.name: Cafe Mocha Java from the Plaza Hotel

name: Black Forest Hot Chocolate
directions: Add the Chambord and creme de cacao to a warmed coffee glass.
Slowly add the hot chocolate to the glass.
Top with whipped cream and a sprinkle of cocoa powder.
Garnish with a maraschino cherry and stir the drink.

name: Orange Soda
directions: Stir together orange juice concentrate and lemon-lime soft drink just before serving.
Serve over ice in individual glasses with an orange slice.

name: Scooby Snacks
directions: Pour rum, creme de banane, melon liqueur and pineapple juice into a shaker over ice. Add whipped cream, and shake.
Strain into an old-fashioned glass and shoot.

similar.name: Milk-Chocolate and Peanut Butter Hot Cocoa

name: Chocolate De Mexicanos
directions: Place all ingredients in a large saucepan and bring to a boil.
With a hand-held mixer, beat the mixture until it stops boiling and becomes slightly frothy.
Stir in tequila.
Serve immediately in mugs garnished with cinnamon sticks.

name: Hot Mulled Cider
directions: Combine all ingredients in saucepan.
Bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
Reduce heat; simmer 10 minutes.
Remove cinnamon sticks and cloves.
Serve at once, garnishing with cinnamon sticks, if desired.

name: Mabon Moon Cider
directions: In a 4-quart saucepan, heat cider and grape juice.
Add cinnamon, allspice, and cloves.
Bring just to boiling.
Lower heat and simmer for 5 minutes.

name: Copycat French Vanilla Liquid Coffee Creamer
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend well (or in a mason jar and stir up sweetened condensed milk as it will settle at the bottom, and then put lid on it and shake like crazy!).  Store in the fridge.  Will keep for approximately two weeks.
Variations:
a) Add 1 Tbsp cocoa and 1 tsp almond extract for a chocolate almond flavor.
b) Add 1 tsp almond extract and 1/2 tsp orange extract for cappuccino.
c) Add 1/2 tsp cinnamon and 1 tsp almond extract for amaretto.
d) Add specialty flavor syrups (from specialty coffee shops and the like) as needed for additional flavors.
Please note that so far I've only tried the vanilla - and it's wonderful!
Enjoy!

name: Homemade Grand Marnier
directions: Place zest and sugar in a small bowl. Mash together with the back of a wooden spoon or a muddle. Continue until sugar is absorbed into zest.
Place in a container with a tight seal, preferably glass. Add cognac, stir and seal.
Allow to age in a cool, dark place 2 to 3 months. Shake monthly.
After initial aging, strain and filter. Stir with a wooden spoon to combine. Cap and age 3 months more before serving.
Note: Seville oranges produce the authentic taste but any type of orange peel/zest may be used with good results.

name: Irish Cream Liqueur
directions: Beat or blend all ingredients together.  Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to one month.
This tastes better after it sits for a day, but I can never wait!

name: Spicy Hot Cocoa Mix
directions: Mix well in a large bowl, or run it through the blender or food processor (recommended).
Test it by mixing a small amount with hot water, then adjust the cocoa, sugar, chili powder, or whatever to taste.

If you can't find powdered vanilla, you could use vanilla milk mix (like chocolate milk mix), or even vanilla pudding.  Just taste-test first, because the vanilla flavor won't be as concentrated in either of those as the actual powdered vanilla.
Other than making hot cocoa, you can also add this to a cup of coffee for a spicy latte-type drink.

name: Blueberry Tea
directions: Brew tea in tea cup.
Add liquers.
Enjoy.

name: Amaretto and Cinnamon  Creamer
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender, blend thoroughly. Store in an airtight container.

similar.name: Cinnamon Coffee Cocoa Mix in a Jar

name: Low Cal Orange Julius
directions: Place ingredients into a blender until ice is finely crushed.

name: Chocolate Mint Martini
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker halfway with ice.
Add vodka, creme de cacao, and creme de menthe.
Cover and shake vigorously for 5-10 seconds.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass; garnish with a cherry and sprig of mint.

name: Pineapple Martini
directions: Combine in a mixing glass with ice.
Stir and serve straight up in a martini glass and garnish with a pineapple wedge.

name: A Real Creamsicle Cocktail
directions: Using chilled ingredients, pour into a glass in the order stated.
Mix very well.
Add Ice.

name: Tom Collins
directions: Mix the first 3 ingredients in a chilled glass; stir.
Add 3-4 ice cubes; top with club soda, stirring gently.
Garnish with lemon slice and cherry.

name: Boilermaker
directions: Pour whiskey into a shot glass.
Serve beer in a frosted mug or glass as a chaser; or drop whiskey-filled shot glass into beer-filled mug.

name: Gorilla Fart
directions: In a shot glass pour the 1/2 oz 101 bourbon , then pouring over the back of a spoon not allowing the spoon to touch the bourbon, but getting it as close it as possible pour the 151 rum.
Light the rum and serve.
Blow out the flame and shoot this, but like I said above be careful cuz these are lethal.

name: Purple Hooter
directions: In a Highball glass, add 1/2 glass full of ice.
Add above ingredients, garnish with a small piece of watermelon or cherry and lemon slice.  Enjoy!
Remember -  Save a life, Don't drink and drive.

name: Best Bartenders Root Beer
directions: Mix all ingredients over ice in a hi ball glass.  Enjoy.

name: Rum Beachcomber
directions: Using a slice of lime or lemon rim cocktail glass with the juice then dip into sugar.
Combine ingredients into a shaker half full with ice.  Shake, then strain into cocktail glass.
Garnish with a lime slice or wedge.
Remember Save a Life - If you drink - don't drive.

name: Lolo's Whiskey Sour the Best!
directions: Combine lemon juice and sugar.
Add water and stir until sugar is dissolved.
Add 4 teaspoons cherry juice from the jar.
Pour one jigger, (1 1/2 ounce) whiskey to each of two ice filled glasses.
Fill both glasses with the sour mixture. Stir.
Top with cherries.

name: Toasted Almond Martini
directions: Fill shaker half full with ice; add amaretto, Kahlua, and cream.
Shake vigorously for 5-10 seconds.
Strain drink into a chilled cocktail glass; garnish with a cherry.

name: Tennessee Moonshine
directions: To boiled cornmeal add yeast and lots of sugar.
Let the mash ferment.
once fermented cook the mash.

name: Ciclon Mary
directions: Fill glass with Bloody Mary Mix over ice.

name: Surge(Urge)
directions: mix ingredients in order listed.
stir slowly.

name: Bloody Mary Cocktail
directions: Serve in a martini glass with a peppered rim.

name: The Margaréeta
directions: Combine in a glass.
Add ice if you wish.
Enjoy!

name: Dicks' Velvet Hammer
directions: Put all ingredients in blender.
Blend until smooth and creamy.
Enjoy.

name: Simple Brandy
directions: Enough fruit to somewhat fill a gallon jar, (cherries, apricots, crabapples, etc.).
Place fruit, any kind, into glass jar -- pits and all, just cut off the yucky parts.
Add sugar and vodka.
Set on your kitchen counter and flip it every day for three months. (If you put it away you'll forget about it!)

The first few days I place the jar into a bucket in case my lid leaks, that way I can pour it back in and go hunt for a new lid. I put a sticker on it indicating the date it will be ready and "Up on even" if I happen to start it on an even day, you wouldn't believe how many times I've thought to myself "did I turn the brandy today?")
In three months strain it through cheesecloth or a clean dishcloth or what have you, if you want it even clearer then strain it again through a paper coffee filter.
Bottle it and wowee it's delicious! I do up a nice label on my computer and bottle it into smaller than micky bottles to tuck into my Christmas baskets.

name: Ruby Slippers (From Cuisine at Home)
directions: Pulse cranberries and juice in a food processor until berries are coarsely chopped.
Simmer in a saucepan over medium heat with sugar, orange rind, and juice until syrupy, about 10 minutes.
Strain; cool syrup to room temperature.
Pour 1-2 T. syrup into glasses (or flutes),
Top with sparkling wine.
Garnish cocktails with whole cranberries.
If desired, rub the rims of champagne flutes with an orange wedge and dip in red sugar.

name: Brandy Alexander
directions: Fill a shaker halfway with ice.
Add in brandy, creme de cacao, and half-and-half.
Shake vigorously 5-10 seconds.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass; sprinkle with nutmeg.

name: Cafe Reggae
directions: Add rum, Tia Maria, and creme de cacao to a preheated coffee glass.
Slowly add coffee to the glass.
Top with whipped cream and stir the drink.

name: Spiked Sweet Iced Tea
directions: Combine sugar and 3 cups water in a non-reactive saucepan.
Slowly heat until sugar melts.
Remove from heat and cool.
Infuse the black tea in 1 quart of just boiled water for 2 minutes.
Strain tea into a pitcher and then add 1 quart of room temperature water.
Combine the tea and the cooled simple syrup, mixing well.
Refrigerate until cool.
To serve, fill a 12-ounce glass with ice cubes, a pinch of zest, and a sprig of mint.
Add 2 ounces whiskey or bourbon and fill to the top with the sweetened tea.
Stir and serve.
Repeat as needed.

name: Kerasi
directions: Shake all ingredients but Cava over ice.
Strain into a flute.
Top off with Cava.
Garnish with a cherry.

name: Special Hot Chocolate Mix
directions: Mix all the above ingredients until well blended.
Place in a canning jar with a tight fitting lid.
Measure a generous 1/4 cup mix in mug.
Pour boiling water over mixture and stir until dissolved.

name: Kahlua
directions: Boil the first 3 ingredients for 15 minutes.
Let cool.
Add vodka.
Place in a plastic sealed container.
Shake/stir every few days for 4 weeks.
Pour into decorator bottles.  Makes a great addition to gift baskets.

name: White Chocolate Coffee
directions: In a medium saucepan, combine the chocolate and the 1/2 and 1/2 and heat over very low heat, stir constantly, until smooth and chocolate is melted.
Remove from heat and add hot coffee to chocolate mixture and stir.
Pour into mugs, top with whipped cream and enjoy.
**** You may also Microwave the cream and chocolate Mixture on High for approximately Two minutes but watch closely and stir often.

name: Kahlua
directions: Bring the sugar and water to a boil.
Mix the instant coffee and 1/4 cup boiling water together; add to the above mixture.
Stir in 1/2 tablespoon vanilla; mix well.
Allow to cool.
Add the vodka and rye; stir well.
Bottle; can be used immediately.
Makes approximately two 26 ounce bottles and 6 to 8 ounces for the cook. This recipe can be cut in half for 1 full 26 ounce bottle.

name: Slush
directions: Dissolve sugar in warm water.
Add all ingredients and stir.
Then freeze (a gallon plastic ice cream pail is ideal).
Serve: Use 3 tablespoons in glass, fill with 7-Up and garnish with a cherry or a drop of cherry juice.

name: Ice Tea
directions: Boil water in a large saucepan over high heat.
When water comes to a rapid boil, turn off heat, put the tea bags into water and cover.
After the tea has steeped about 1 hour, pour the sugar into a 2-quart pitcher, then add tea.
The tea should still be warm so the sugar will dissolve easily.
Add lemon juice.
Chill.
Makes 2 quarts.

name: Pink Dandelion Wine
directions: Take the blossoms, remove stem and leaves, and boil in water.
Remove from heat and let stand overnight, then strain.
Then add lemon, raspberries, cinnamon and sugar (so its overly sweet to the taste).
Warm mixture over low flame until the sugar is dissolved (honey many be substituted in equal proportions).
Next, when the mixture is lukewarm, add active yeast which as been suspended in warm water.
Cover the pan with a towel and let it set for three days undisturbed.
As you check it, visualize the energy in your wine increasing even as the bubbles are forming (a sign of fermentation starting).
Finally, strain the mixture again and bottle in loosely corked bottles.
Once the corks no longer pop out, tasted to see if the wine needs any additional  sugar.
If so, return it to the stove and sweeten to taste, but bring it to a boil so as to kill the yeast.
Cork tightly and let age for one year in a cool, dark area for best results.
Enjoy this liquid of the Earth and Sky or if you wish, you can use this as a offering for spells or spirits of your garden!

name: Sit-On-The-Roof Rum Slush
directions: Mix all ingredients in bowl and put in feezer overnight. (It will never freeze solid.)
Dish up into champagne glasses, or even dixie cups!

name: Decked-Out Water
directions: Cut two thin lengthwise slices from cucumber, reserve remaining for another use.
Stir together cucumber slices, 12 cups water and next 5 ingredients in a pitcher, cover and chill for 1 hour.
Pour over ice in  glasses before serving.
Individual glasses can be garnished with sprigs of parsley or cilantro.

name: Gin Buck
directions: Squeeze lemon juice into chilled glass filled with ice cubes; drop in lemon shell.
Add in gin; top with ginger ale, stirring gently.
Garnish with lemon slice.
*Apple Buck: substitute apple brandy for the gin; add a slice or spear of candied ginger.
*Brandy Buck: substitute brandy for the gin; add 1 ½ teaspoon white creme de menthe; garnish with 3 seedless grapes.
*Greek Buck: substitute Mextaca for the gin; add 1 teaspoon ouzo; garnish with lemon slice.
*New Orleans Buck: substitute 2 tablespoons orange juice plus 1 tablespoon lime juice for the lemon juice; substitiute rum for the gin; garnish with lime slice.
*Orange Buck: substitute 2 tablespoons orange juice plus 1 tablespoon fresh lime juice for the lemon juice; garnish with orange slice.
*Peach Buck: substitute vodka for the gin and add 1 ½ tablespoon peach brandy; garnish with peach slice.

name: Pumpkin Martini Recipe
directions: Fill your martini shaker with crushed ice and use a chilled martini glass.
Put all ingredients in shaker and shake for a minute or so.
Pour into glass. Grind a little nutmeg on top.
You can also rim the glass with cinnamon sugar and put in a cinnamon stick.
Enjoy!

name: Pirate's Pantry Ramos Gin Fizz
directions: Place ice in shaker.
Plaece ingredients in shaker.
Shake.
Note: use blender if desired.

name: So-Co Martini
directions: Add Southern Comfort, sweet vermouth, and dry vermouth to a shaker filled half-way with ice.
Shake vigorously; strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with a maraschino cherry.

name: Ciclon Heat Storm
directions: Pour Ciclon into a shot glass.
Add hot sauce.
Enjoy!

name: Ciclon Tropical Storm
directions: Pour all into a tall iced filled glass.
Enjoy!

name: Ciclon Margarita
directions: Pour all ingredients into a chilled margarita glass.
Enjoy!

name: Dirty Vodka Martini W/Blue Cheese Olives
directions: Remove pimentos from olives. Stuff the olives with the blue cheese. Soak the olives in some vermouth with a splash of the olive juice while you prepare the drink.
Pour ice into shaker.
Pour a dash ofthe vermouth over the ice.
Briskly shake in shaker for about 10 seconds then discard vermouth.
Pour the vodka into the shaker with about a spoonful of olive juice (more/less to taste).
With brisk, firm shakes, shake the shaker for about 15 outward shakes.
Pour into chilled martini glasses, add olives, and Enjoy!
*Martini will have a cloudy appearance due to olive juice and being cold.

name: Lime Luscious Beverage
directions: In bowl of electric mixer or blender or food processor.
Combine 1/4 cup of the milk with the sugar.
Blend in remaining milk.add 1/2 of small 3 oz box of pudding and beat till smooth.
Blend in lime juice.
Pour into glasses --
Float a scoop of lime sherbert on top.

name: Ozark Mountain Mulled Cider
directions: In large pan, combine apple juice or cider, orange juice, sugar.
Wrap whole spices in 100% cheesecloth, add to saucepan.bring to boiling --
Reduce heat, cover and simmer about 30 minutes.
Discard spice bag, serve cider in mugs with grated nutmeg, if desired.

name: White Hot Chocolate
directions: In a saucepan, combine 1/4 cup of the half and half, vanilla chips, stick cinnamon and nutmeg.
Whisk over low heat till vanilla chips are metled.
Remove cinnamon stick, add remaining half and half, whisk till heated through.
Remove from heat and add vanilla and almond extract.

name: Homemade Irish Cream
directions: Mix all ingredients except whiskey in blender until smooth.
Add whiskey and mix.  Pour into jar with tight-fitting lid and store in the fridge for up to 3 weeks.

name: Mock Champagne Concentrate
directions: Bring apple juice and sugar to a boil in a small saucepan.  Boil, uncovered, for 10 minutes.
Add lemon juice and grape juice concentrate.  Stir well.
Fill jars or bottles.
To use:  Mix 1 cup of concentrate with 2 cups of ginger ale or club soda.  Yield is 3 cups -- enough for 4 servings.

name: Butterscotch Flavored Coffee
directions: Brew a cup of coffee.
Add milk or creamer.
Add the butterscotch chips.
Stir until melted.
Add sugar if needed.

name: Santa's Sleigh Cocktail
directions: Dampen the rims of 4 martini glasses and then line the rims with sugar crystals.
Combine eggnog, brandy, amaretto, nutmeg, and ice cream in a blender; process until smooth.
Pour mixture into martini glasses and garnish each glass with a whole cinnamon stick.

name: Iced Creamy Chai
directions: Steep both tea bags in boiling water for about 4 minutes to brew 1 cup double-strength tea.  Remove tea bags; refrigerate tea to cool.
To serve, pour 1/2 the chilled tea over ice in each of 2 tall glasses.
Add 1/4 cup cream, 1 cup cool water, and sugar to taste in each glass; stir to combine.
Sprinkle with cinnamon and/or nutmeg before serving, if desired.

similar.name: Chai Tea Mix in a Jar

name: Almond Coffee Creamer Mix
directions: In a bowl, combine all ingredients; mix well.
Store in an airtight container.
To use:  In your coffee, use this instead of non-dairy creamer and sugar.

similar.name: Spiced Coffee With Brandied Whipped Cream

name: Nog De Cacao
directions: Stir ingredients together with cracked ice in an old-fashioned glass.
Sprinkle with cocoa and serve.

name: Trogg's Nog
directions: Pour liquor over ice.
Fill with eggnog and stir.
Serve in a highball glass.

name: Frosty Noggin
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender. Blend until smooth.
Pour into a parfait glass and top with whipped cream, if desired.
This can also be garnished with a few drops of green creme de menthe and a rolled cookie.

name: Egg Crusher
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice cubes in a cocktail shaker.
Strain into a large brandy snifter.
Dust with nutmeg and serve.

name: Hot Lemonade
directions: Juice the lemon into your mug.
Add Splenda.
Top with boiling water, stir and serve.

name: Floridita or the Pappa Hemingway
directions: Make that several splashes of cherry juice.
put all ingredients in container.
Blend.
Serve over ice.

name: Homemade Irish Cream Liqueur
directions: Beat the Egg--"Whip it Good"!
Add other ingredients and shake well.
Chill in fridge.
Enjoy and drink responsibly!

name: San Diego Style Champagne Margarita
directions: Combine together lime juice, tequila, triple sec and champagne in a festive glass.
Garnish with citrus (lemon, lime, orange).
Serve with fiesta dip, chips and salsa.
Enjoy!  ;).

name: Homemade Buttermilk
directions: Bring milk to almost scalding, then LET COOL to body temperature [Milk is scalded by heating it to 180-185°F (82°C).].
Add buttermilk.
Mix well.  Transfer to a sterile container, like glass or a thermos.
Cover and keep warm overnight. The inside of a foam cooler is ideal.
The starter has inoculated the milk, and this will incubate the culture, thickening into real buttermilk.
Recipe may be doubled for quarts or gallons with a 1 to 4 ratio of buttermilk to milk.

If the buttermilk is very old, however, the lactic acid bacteria may have lost their ability to produce acid rapidly.  About once a week, a fresh batch of buttermilk may be made from an older batch. Take great care to prevent contamination during the reinoculation process. Cultures may be carried successfully through many inoculations if care is taken. However, it is best to start with new buttermilk from the store after five or six inoculations.

name: Cranberry Martinis
directions: Put 4 martini glasses in the freezer to chill.
Just before serving, fill a cocktail shaker half full with ice.
Pour in the vodka, vermouth and cranberry juice.
Cover with the lid and shake vigorously up and down for about 10 seconds.
Strain into the chilled glasses, dividing evenly.
Garnish each glass with 2 or 3 frozen cranberries and a lemon twist.
Serve immediately.

name: Hard Rock Purple Haze
directions: Shake with ice and Strain in a Chilled Martini.
Top with 7-up or Ginger Ale.
Garnish : Pineapple Wedge.

name: Hurricane
directions: Put ice in a Hurricane glass or a really tall glass.
Then add the white rum, dark rum and gin.

Add an equal quantity of pineapple juice, orange juice and grapefruit juice.  (what I do is that I use equal quantity of orange and grapefruit juice, and a little bit of pineapple juice, all unsweetened).
Then you can put the amaretto on top.
Add grenadine.  (I don't).
Garnish with a slice of orange.

name: Quick Screw
directions: Layer each alcohol over each other and serve in a shot or cocktail glass.

name: Olé
directions: Put ice in a shaker until half the shaker.
Add the tequila and banana liqueur and shake vigorously.
Filter in a little iced cocktail glass.
End with a splash of blue curacao.

name: Jalousie
directions: Put ice until half of the shaker.
Add the rum, amaretto, curacao, lime juice and pineapple juice.
Shake vigorously and filter in a highball glass in which you already put a few ice cubes.
Garnish with a pineapple chunk.

name: Pineapple-Mint Bahama Mama
directions: Put ice until half of the shaker.
Add Malibu, Kahlua, and the 2 rums.
Shake vigorously and filter in a highball glass half filled with ice.
Complete with pineapple juice and garnish with a slice of pineapple and mint.

name: Illusion
directions: Put ice in the shaker.
Add melon liqueur, cointreau, vodka, lemon juice and pineapple juice.
Shake vigorously and filter in a cold cocktail glass.
Garnish with a pineapple leaf.

name: Choco Fa- La- La- Latte  Yum!
directions: In a large mug, Put two heaping tablespoons of Tom and Jerry mix in the mug.
Add 1 cup of hot coffee and stir to blend.
Add Creme De Cocoa and Kahlua and stir.
Top off mug with whipped cream and a sprinkle of Cocoa Powder or Nutmeg. (Chocolate Shavings are good too!).

name: Raspberry Rambler
directions: At least 3 hours ahead, make the ice forms, consisting of slices of lemon and raspberries.

To make the Raspberry Puree, process 4 cups of fresh or frozen raspberries to a smooth puree in a blender. Strain the puree into a bowl through a fine-mesh sieve to remove the seeds, pushing on the mixture with the back of a wooden spoon to extract all the juice.

Combine the puree, pineapple juice, vodka and lime juice in the punch bowl and mix well. Just before serving, slowly pour in the sparkling water. Place the ice form in the punch. Garnish with the lime slices and raspberries, if desired.
Note: For a nonalcoholic Raspberry Rambler, substitute 2 cups pineapple juice for the vodka.

name: Japanese Slipper
directions: Half-fill a cocktail shaker with ice.
Add the melon liqueur, Cointreau and lemon juice.
Shake well and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with a maraschino cherry.

name: Banaquiri
directions: Blend the rum, banana, lime juice, syrup, maraschino liqueur and ice in an electric blender until smooth, about 15 seconds.
Pour into the glass and garnish with the mint sprigs and skewered banana slice.

name: Pink Lady
directions: Pour the ingredients into a mixing glass filled with cracked ice.
Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with a cherry and serve.

name: Manhattan
directions: Stir in a mixing glass filled with ice.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass (martini glass).
Add the twist of lemon.

name: Wassail
directions: Put all the ingredients (adjust number of lemon slice to taste) in a suitably sized saucepan and simmer for 10 minutes. Tastes best hot.

name: Reindeer Martini
directions: Shake over ice and strain to serve straight up in a martini glass
Garnish with cherry and two cinnamon sticks for antlers.
Enjoy!

name: Mistletoe Martini
directions: Mix the vodka and melon liqueur in a shaker with ice.
Strain into a martini glass.
Add grenadine.
Enjoy!

name: Frosty's Frostini
directions: Shake all ingredients over ice.
Strain into a chilled martini glass rimmed with sugar.
Garnish with a Hershey's Hug and enjoy!

name: Irish Cream Coffee
directions: Add the Bailey’s and whiskey to a preheated coffee glass.
Slowly add in the coffee; give a little stir.
Top with whipped cream; garnish with a cherry.

name: Dreamsicle Cocktail
directions: Place in a Blender.
Mix well.
Enjoy!

name: Root Beer Float Cocktail
directions: Mix in blender.
enjoy!

name: The Very Best Hot Chocolate
directions: In a saucepan, heat 2 1/2 cups milk and 3/4 cup of the whipping cream over medium heat, stirring often until steaming.
Meanwhile, in a bowl, whisk together sugar, cocoa and salt.
Whisk in remaining cold milk and vanilla to make a smooth paste.
Reduce heat to medium low and gradually whisk cocoa mixture into hot milk mixture until blended.  Heat for about two minutes or until steaming hot.
In a small chilled bowl, using electric mixrer or whisk, whip remaining whipping cream until thick.
Ladle hot chocolate into four warmed mugs and evenly dollop whipped cream evenly into each mug.  Stir toswirl lightly.
Serve immediately.
Note: if desired add 1 teaspoon coffee or chocolate flavoured liquer and 1/2 cup strong coffee to each mug of hot chocolate before adding the whipped cream. This is purely optional.

name: Gorilla Milk - Adult Beverage
directions: Shake with ice and pour over ice into hurricane or parfait glass.  Garnish with a banana slice.
Remember save a life -- If you drink, don't drive.

name: Bailey's Irish Cream
directions: Melt chocolate.
Slowly add to condensed milk.
Then add rest of ingredients.
Bottle and store in refrigerator.
Enjoy!

name: Peppermint Patty
directions: Combine ingredients in a shaker with ice.
Stir gently and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Servings: One cocktail.

name: Gingerbread Martini
directions: Directions for Ginger Syrup:
Simmer water, sugar, ginger, cloves and cinnamon stirring occasionally, until reduced to about 3/4 cup, about 15 minutes.
Pour hot syrup through a fine sieve and chill.
Let stand 20 minutes until using, so all sediment has settled to the bottom.
Servings: Approximately 3/4 cup.
Directions for Martini:
Fill a cocktail shaker with ice.
Add the vodka and gingerbread syrup.
Cover and shake vigorously until combined and chilled, about 30 seconds.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Crème Brûlée Martini
directions: Combine ingredients in a shaker with ice.
Stir gently and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Kahlua
directions: Combine everything except the vodka in a saucepan.
Bring to boil and boil for 1 minute.
Remove from heat and cool.
When cool, add vodka.
Bottle and store in dark cupboard.

name: Cranberry-Orange Vodka
directions: Place cranberries, sugar and vanilla in a medium saucepan. Place pan over medium heat and stir. Simmer cranberry mixture until the berries burst, about 5 to 6 minutes.
Place orange peels in a large glass container with an airtight lid, or large mason jars with lids. Pour vodka over the orange peels.

Allow the cranberry mixture to cool. Pour the cooled mixture into the glass container(s). Cover tightly and set aside for 1 week. After 1 week, strain out the cranberries sand orange peels and pour mixture into a clean bottle, using a funnel. Store vodka in the refrigerator.
To serve: Pour 2 ounces of vodka mixture over ice in a tall glass and top with tonic water. Garnish with a slice of lime.

name: Dirty Drawers Party Punch
directions: Mix all five ingredients.
Pour into a plastic tub.  We recommend a miniature bathtub.  Float lemon and lime pieces on top.
Surround the tub with clothespins and attach thong panties to each.
Pop in a plastic ladle and you have a party.

name: Poinsettia Martini
directions: Add all ingredients to a shaker filled with ice; shake vigorously.
Strain into a chilled martini glass.

name: Hot Buttered Rum
directions: Cream ice cream, butter, and sugar.
Add nutmeg and cinnamon.
Spoon 1/4 cup batter into 8 oz. mug.
Add 1 shot rum.
Fill with boiling water and stir.
Freeze leftover batter up to 1 month.

similar.name: Awesome and Economical Hot Buttered Rum Mix

name: Bloody Maria
directions: Slowly pour beer into a large glass (20 oz) so it doesn't get too big of a head.
Shake up the can of Snap-E-Tom.
Slowly pour the can of Snap-E-Tom into the glass
Add Tabasco sauce to taste
Stab the olives with a toothpick and use it to create a gentle whirlpool in the glass to mix ingredients.
Slide the two olives away from each other and hang on the side of the glass with one olive in the beer and one on the edge of the glass.
Enjoy.

name: Hot Cranberry Cider
directions: Put the sugar, cinnamon sticks, and cloves in the basket of a coffee percolator(I mixed mine in a big pot and put the spices in a spice bag, worked great).
Put the juices in the bottom of the percolator.
Let the mixture perk as if making coffee.
Serve with cinnamon stick stirrers, if desired, and with a little rum, brandy, or bourbon as well.

name: Creme Brulee Martini
directions: Add ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice; shake vigorously.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass; garnish with a light sprinkle of sweetened cocoa powder.

name: Autumn Leaves Cocktail
directions: Pour equal parts of each ingredient in snifter.  Stir and enjoy!
I'm not too savvy when it come to alcoholic drinks but this might also be good on the rocks.

name: Hot Chocolate Marshmallow Coffee
directions: Stir together the coffee and hot chocolate; mix until blended.
Top with the marshmallow whip. Add a dash of cinnamon if desired.
Serve hot.

name: Polar Bear Coffee
directions: Add the schnapps and creme de cacao to a heated coffee glass.
Slowly add coffee to the glass; give a little stir.
Top with whipped cream and a light sprinkle of cocoa powder.

name: The Nagroni
directions: Fill a highball glass with ice cubes.
Add equal parts of gin, sweet vermouth and campari.
Garnish the glass with an orange slice.
Enjoy!  ;).

name: Gin Alexander
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker halfway with ice cubes; add in gin, creme de cacao, and half-and-half.
Shake vigorously for 5-10 seconds; strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Sprinkle with a little nutmeg.

name: Brandied Champagne Cocktail
directions: In a champagne glass, combine the vermouth, cognac and cassis. Top with champagne and garnish with cherries.

similar.name: La Vie En Rose Champagne Cocktail

name: Vanilla Milk Tea
directions: Pour the milk into a saucepan, add the vanilla, and bring to a simmer, stirring often.
Remove the pan from the heat and let it stand until the milk is cool.
Place the tea leaves in the teapot and add the boiling water.
Cover with a towel and steep 5 minutes.
Pour about 1/4 cup of the cooled milk into the teacups. Stir and strain the tea into the cups.

name: El Dorado Hot Chocolate
directions: Stir the sugar and 2 tablespoons of the water together in a heavy-bottomed saucepan. Cover and bring to a boil over medium heat. Uncover and continue to cook, swirling the pan but not stirring, until the sugar is a dark golden caramel, 7 to 10 minutes. (It should smell slightly burnt.).

Pull pan from the heat and carefully pour the 1/4 cup water into the caramel. Take care; it may spatter a lot. Whisk until smooth and allow to cool. (The burnt caramel can be held for up to 2 weeks at room temperature.)

When ready to serve: Put 3 tablespoons of the burnt caramel into 4 mugs or cups and top evenly with the chopped chocolate. Bring the milk to a simmer in a medium pan over medium heat. Pull pan from the heat and add the Goldschlager and rum; pour over the chocolate. Serve El Dorado Hot Chocolates with a spoon to stir the layers together.
Cook's Note: Goldschlager is a cinnamon flavored liqueur with small flecks of edible gold.

name: Old Time Lemonade
directions: Combine sugar, 1 cup water, and lemon juice.
Stir till sugar is dissolved.
Add remaining water.
Serve over ice with lemon slices.

name: Beer Margarita
directions: Fill a large pitcher 1/2 way full of ice.
Add the limeade, water and tequila together until blended.
Add corona beer.
Rub lime on rim of glass, and dip into salt.
Serve in salt rimmed glass with lime wedge.

name: White Russian
directions: Pour vanilla vodka and kalhua over ice.
Top off with cream and enjoy.

name: Lazy Iced Tea
directions: Stew the tea bags in the boiling water. I only stew them for a minute or so as I don't like my tea too strong, but you can stew them to taste.
Leave to cool.
Add the orange juice.
Add the bitter lemon (it will fizz up a lot initially and this pretty much knocks all the fizz out of it leaving you with a fizz-free iced tea).
Add the mint sprigs (if you can be bothered) and lots of ice.
Serve!

similar.name: Lemon and Red Zinger Iced Tea

name: Barefoot Contessa's Fresh Lemonade
directions: Place all the ingredients in a blender and process until completely smooth.
Serve over ice.

name: Ice Cream Coffee
directions: Put first three ingredients (four if using the chocolate syrup) in a blender and blend on medium to dissolve sugar.
Add ice cream and crushed ice. Blend until smooth and creamy.

name: Thick Hot Chocolate
directions: In a small bowl, combine 2 tablespoons of the half-and-half with the arrowroot, whisking until smooth.

Place the remaining 1/2 cup of half-and-half in a small saucepan over medium heat. Bring to a simmer. When the half-and-half begins to bubble around the edges, whisk in the sugar. Whisk in the arrowroot mixture until the half-and-half thickens slightly, usually less than a minute.
Remove from the heat and quickly whisk in the chocolate until smooth.
Pour into cups, top both with a pinch of orange zest, and serve immediately.

name: Kahlua
directions: Bring water, sugar and coffee to a boil in a saucepan.
Simmer VERY slowly for 3 hours.
Mixture will be very dark and syrupy.
Cool syrup for 15 minutes, then add vodka and vanilla and stir well.
Pour into jars and seal.

name: Apple Juice Herbal Tea
directions: Steep the 8 tea bags in 4 cups of boiling water for about 10 minutes.
Discard the tea bags.
Combine the tea with the apple juice and refrigerate until cold.
Serve over ice.
***Prep time does not include refrigeration time.

name: Orange Nut Latte
directions: Add Grand Marnier and amaretto to a preheated coffee glass.
Slowly add steamed milk and then the espresso to the glass.
Top with milk foam and nutmeg.

name: Chocolate Gianduia Martini
directions: Fill cocktail shaker with ice.
Pour ingredients into the cocktail shaker and shake it up.
Strain mix into cold martini glasses.

name: Cran-Tinis
directions: Fill martini shaker or 3 cup covered container half full with ice.
Add all ingredients except cranberries and lime slices.
Cover and shake.
Pour into glasses, straining ice.
Garnish with cranberries and lime.

name: Frozen Belini's
directions: Mix peach nectar, lemon juice, peach schnapps and 1/2 cup Champagne in a blender until smooth.
Pour into Champagne flutes.
Top each glass with 1/2 of remaining 1/4 cup of champagne.

name: Grandma Bea's Vodka Slush
directions: Pour 2 cups boiling water over 4 green tea bags.
Pour 7 cups of boiling water over 2 cups of sugar.
Pour both mixtures together and let cool.
Add orange juice, lemonade and 1 cup vodka.
Freeze and stir every 3 hours.
Next day add 1 cup vodka and stir.
