directions: Combine ingredients in blender and process until smooth. Top with a dollop Cool Whip.
You can omit rum for virgin, child-friendly drinks!

name: Cinnamon Snap
directions: Heat all ingredients in a small saucepan. Serve in a mug.
Makes 1 serving.

name: Perfect Frappuccino
directions: Combine everything but ice in a blender and blend until all sugar has dissolved.
Add ice and blend until smooth.
Makes about 2 servings.

name: Absinthe Suissesse
directions: Blend Pernod, creams,egg whites and sugar in a pitcher;refrigerate until ready to use.
Pour half of mixture into blender.
Add 1 1/2 cups crushed ice and blend at highest speed until frothy and smooth, about 30 seconds.
Pour into chilled goblets.
Repeat with remaining mixture and ice.
Sprinkle each serving with nutmeg and serve.

name: Pumpkin Pie Cocktail
directions: Shake all in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Strain into a Martini glass.
Garnish with sprinkled nutmeg and a cherry.

name: Pineapple-Tomato Drink
directions: Combine juices, salt and pepper.
Chill.
To serve, pour over ice cubes and garnish with chopped mint.

name: Tomato -Cucumber Salad Drink
directions: combine all ingredients in a blender, adding one ice cube at a time.
Blend until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Grapefruit Quencher
directions: Place the orange slices and honey in a bowl.
Pour boiling water over honey and orange slices and let stand till cool.
In a pitcher combine honey mixture with grapefruit juice.
Chill.
To serve, pour over crushed ice.

name: Minted Appleade
directions: Combine all ingerdients in a large pitcher.
Chill
To serve, pour over ice cubes.

name: Merry Berry Base
directions: Combine all ingredients in a sauce pan and bring to a boil.
Stir until sugar is dissolved.
Remove from heat, pour into jars and store in the refrigerator.

name: Peachy Buttermilk
directions: Combine peaches, cinnamon, and sugar in a blender.
Add buttermilk and blend till smooth.

name: Berry Buttermilk
directions: Puree berries in a blender.
Add honey.
Gradually add in buttermilk.
Blend till smooth.

name: Pineapple Foam
directions: Beat egg white until stiff.
Add juice and ginger ale
Beat until foamy.
Pout into glass, over crushed ice and serve immediately.

name: Orange Drink Concentrate
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Stir till dissolved.
To make Orange Drink use 1 – 2 ounces base per 6 ounces water.

name: Lemonade Concentrate
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Stir till dissolved.
To make lemonade use 1 – 2 ounces base per 6 ounces water.

name: Grape Slush
directions: Combine in a blender and blend till slushy.
Scoop into cups and serve with a spoon.

name: Strawberry Drink Concentrate
directions: Combine all ingredients in a sauce pan and bring to a boil.
Strain into jars.
Store in the refrigerator.
To make Strawberry Drink use 1 – 2 ounces base per 6 ounces water.

similar.name: Strawberry or Cherry Tea Mix in a Pint Jar

name: Long Lime Drink
directions: Place ice cubes in a tall tumbler.
Add lime cordial and ginger ale.
top with lemonade and garnish with lemon slice and mint leaves.

name: Sparkling Berry Drink
directions: Combine both ingredients in a tall glass.
Serve immediately.
Notes: I use Merry Berry Base (recipe 92049).

name: Miami Beach Iced Tea
directions: Fill a highball glass with ice cubes.
To a cocktail shaker (no ice), add the vodka, rum, gin, tequila, blue curacao, lemon juice, and simple syrup.
Shake vigorously for 5-10 seconds; pour into the glass.
Add in the Sprite to the glass; stir; garnish with a lemon wedge.

name: Island Affair Cocktail
directions: Pour ingredients one after the other, into a glass filled with ice.
Blend if desired.

name: Citrus Sherbet
directions: In a medium saucepan, combine sugar and unflavored gelatin. Stir in 2 cups of the orange juice. Cook and stir until sugar and gelatin dissolve. Remove from heat. Stir in remaining 2 cups orange juice, the buttermilk, lime peel, and lime juice. (Mixture may appear curdled.) If desired, add food coloring to tint desired color.

Transfer mixture to a 3-quart rectangular baking dish or freezer container. Cover; freeze for 4 to 5 hours or until almost firm. Break mixture into small chunks; transfer to a large chilled bowl. Beat with an electric mixer on medium speed about 2 minutes or until smooth but not melted. Return to dish or container. Cover and freeze about 4 hours more or until firm. (Or, transfer mixture to a 4- to 5-quart ice cream freezer; freeze according to manufacturer’s directions. If desired, ripen [see tip, page ?].).

name: Mojito
directions: Add mint leaves, the juice of half a lime, and simple syrup to a highball glass.
Muddle the ingredients in the glass.
Fill the glass halfway with ice cubes; add in rum and stir the mixture vigorously.
Fill the rest of the glass with ice cubes; top the drink with club soda; stir.
Garnish with a sprig of mint.

name: Fresh Strawberry Bellini  Mocktail
directions: Place 8 Champagne flutes in the freezer for 20 minutes.
Open the sparkling cider and let it stand in an ice bucket for 5 minutes(or place in freezer for about 15-20 minutes).
Into a pitcher, pour the 2 cups pureed strawberries. Gently pour in the bottle of sparkling cider, stir gently to combine.
Divide among Champagne flutes and serve. Enjoy!

name: Stars and Bars Cocktail
directions: In a tall shot glass, pour the grenadine in first.
Slowly pour the blue curacao over the back of a spoon so it is layered over the top of the grenadine.
Slowly pour the Goldschlager over the blue curacao.
Drink the whole thing all at once to get the full flavor of a red hot Southern drink!

name: Midnight Snowstorm
directions: Add creme de menthe to a coffee glass.
Top up with hot chocolate; float the whipped cream over the top.

name: Mindy's Sangria
directions: Mix all ingrediants except club soda and add orange and lemon slices.
Refrigerate hours or overnight.
Just before serving add club soda and frozen berries.

name: Hot Whiskey Toddy
directions: Put honey or sugar into a mug. Fill 2/3 full with boiling water.
Add Scotch whisky and stir.
Garnish with a slice of lemon, dust with nutmeg, and serve.
Use honey or sugar.  You can add a few cloves or some cinnamon.

name: Citrus-Ade
directions: Combine sugar and water in a saucepan; cook and stir just until sugar dissolves. Stir in grapefruit peel and juices.
Cool and store in a covered container in refrigerator.
For 1 serving of Citrus-Ade, combine 1/2 cup of concentrated base and 3/4 cup cold water; stir well. Add citrus cubes or ice; serve very cold.

name: Mocha Polka
directions: Combine ice cream, coffee, rum in a blender container; blend until smooth.
Pour into glasses and top with whipped cream. Sprinkle with nutmeg and serve immediately.

name: Ocean Sunset
directions: Mix 3 tablespoons tequila, 1 1/2 teaspoons lime juice, and a generous dash of bitters in each glass.
Add ice and pour carbonated water to taste for each serving.
Stir, garnish with a lime slice and serve immediately.

name: Mississippi Gambler
directions: Squeeze lemons, reserving rinds.
Measure 1 1/2 cups juice into a large freezer-proof jar.
Add bourbon,water and sugar and stir until sugar dissolves completely.
Add lemon rinds.
Cover and let stand at room temperature for 24 hours.
Squeeze rinds into bourbon mixture, then discard rinds.
Strain bourbon mixture and return to jar.
Cover jar and freeze for 24 hours.
Scoop slush into tall glasses.
Garnish with a mint sprig and lemon slice and serve immediately.

name: Barbarella
directions: Shake with cracked ice and strain into a chilled old-fashioned glass.
Serve In: Collins Glass.

name: Pineapple Upside Down Cake Cocktail
directions: Chill glasses in freezer for at least 10 minutes prior to serving.
Place pineapple juice, grenadine and vanilla vodka in a cocktail shaker with 4-5 ice cubes and shake vigorously for 30 seconds.
You may wet the rim and dunk in brown sugar if desired.
Pour into chilled glasses and serve.

name: Ginger Limeade
directions: Combine 1/4 cup water, sugar, ginger, rind, and mint leaves in a blender, and process until well blended.
Cover; chill for 2 hours.
Add remaining 5 3/4 cups water and juice; stir to combine. Garnish with lime wedges, if desired.

name: Cottontail Punch
directions: Stir together all ingredients in a large container.
Serve over ice.

name: Buttered-Rum Spiced Cider
directions: Heat cider, cloves, nutmeg and cinnamon to boiling in a 3-quart saucepan over medium-high heat; reduce heat to low and simmer uncovered for 10 minutes.
Strain cider mixture to remove cloves and cinnamon, if desired.
For each serving, place 1 tablespoons butter, 1 tablespoons brown sugar and 2 tablespoons rum in a mug; fill with hot cider.

similar.name: Spiced Apple Cider With Rum Whipped Cream

name: Hurricane
directions: combine all ingredients in large bowl (or pot or whatever).
stir to mix.
serve over ice in tall glass.

name: Chocolate Espresso Pudding
directions: Whisk milk, sugar, cornstarch, cocoa and salt in a medium saucepan to blend. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Stir often with a whisk, going into corners of saucepan.
Boil 1 minute, whisking, until thickened. Remove from heat; stir in chocolate and vanilla until chocolate melts and mixture is blended.
Scrape into a bowl. Cover surface directly with plastic wrap. Chill at least 2 hours or until cold. Spoon into small cups or bowls; garnish.

similar.name: No Guilt Hot Chocolate Mix in a Jar

name: Hot Rum Toddy
directions: Put honey in mug and dissolve with 1 teaspoon of boiling water.
Add rum, lemon, and cloves.
Fill mug with boiling water.
Add cinnamon stick.

name: Hot Buttered Rum
directions: Dissolve sugar in a mug with some boiling water.
Add rum, cinnamon stick, and nutmeg.
Fill mug with boiling water.
Top with a pat of butter.

name: Kimmy's Crack Coffee
directions: After brewing the coffe, add a shot of vodka and a shot of Kahlua.
Stir in the milk and sugar.

name: Ginger Lime Cosmopolitan
directions: Run 1 lime quarter around rims of 2 Martini glasses.  Place 3 T sugar on small plate.  Dip rims into sugar.  Place all lime quarters, 1 T sugar, vodka, lime juice, and ginger in a cocktail shaker.  Mash with muddler or end of a wooden spoon until lime wedges are crushed.  Add ice; shake well.
Strain mixture between prepared glasses.  Garnish with sliced lime.

name: Beefeaters Tea ( Spirits )
directions: Heat the water to boiling.
Pour over teabags and steep for 5 minutes.
Place mint, and sugar in a very tall pilsner style glass and muddle ( crush and mix ).
Add slice of lime.
Add gin.
Add ice.
Pour warm tea over all.
Finish with tonic water.
Serve.

name: Creamy Iced Vanilla Caramel Coffee
directions: Combine the coffee, vanilla shake powder and vanilla flavored syrup.
Garnish with cinnamon, if using.

name: Vanilla Dreamsicle
directions: Pour all ingredients over ice in a shaker and shake away.
Serve over ice in chilled glass.

name: Nescafe
directions: Put the Nescafe granules in a coffee mug.  How much you use will depend on how strong you like your coffee.
Add the light brown sugar.
Add just enough boiling water to cover the granules and sugar, but not too much more than that.

With an electric (or battery powered) hand-held frother, whip the sugar and Nescafe together until it gets to the consistency of cream.  (This took a little practice for me to get it to foam.  Just continue frothing; it will ultimately cream-up.  I found that using the frother in an up & down manner to add a little air, worked best for me).
Once you get the creamy consistency, add more boiling water to fill the mug.
The creamy part will rise to the top of the mug.  Do not stir.  Add just a shot of milk on the top of the cream.
Enjoy!

name: Ww 2 Point Southern Hurricane
directions: Pour Southern Comfort & grenadine over ice.
Fill rest of glass with diet Sprite.

name: Bobby Flay's Pear Martini
directions: Combine 1st 5 ingredients in shaker with ice.
Strain into martini glass whose rim has been coated in sugar.
Float a slice of pear on top.
Enjoy!

name: Chilled Gold
directions: Put ice in a cocktail shaker and add Irish cream, Goldschlager, and coffee.
Shake well then strain into a martini glass.
top with dallop of whipped cream, and shaved chocolate.

name: Sage Margarita
directions: Fill a shaker with ice and add all ingredients.
Rim a cocktail glass with fresh lime and sea salt.
Shake and strain into glass.

name: Raspberry Sour
directions: Fill a shaker with ice and add all ingredients.
Shake and strain into a rocks glass filled with ice.

name: Cinnamon Cappuccino - Weight Watchers
directions: In a medium nonstick pan, bring the milk, vanilla and cinnamon just to a boil.
Remove from the heat and whisk until frothy, about 1 minute.
In a large mug, combine the coffee and the milk mixture.
Sprinkle with the cocoa and garnish with the cinnamon stick; serve.
2 pts. Each.

similar.name: Chocolate Cappuccino Coffee Mix (In a Jar)

name: Silk Martini
directions: Pour Limoncello into chilled mixing glass (9 oz.)  Swirl liqueur coating the inside of the glass. Discard the contents of the glass and add approximately 6 oz. of ice. Pour in Silk Vodka; stir ingredients and strain into chilled martini glass. Garnish with a lemon twist spiral.

name: Big Sur Cooler
directions: Fill a highball glass with ice cubes.  Pour amaretto and blue Curacao over ice, top with chilled white cranberry juice and stir.
Serve garnished with a sprig of mint.

Sandra increased the ratio and made a tall pitcher full.  You'll have a pretty icy blue summer drink that calls out for a paper umbrella, if you ask me!  Add a strawberry garnish, and you're set for the 4th of July!

name: Dr. Pat's Hot Toddy Cold Remedy
directions: Place the whisky - Honey - Tea bag(s):
in a large microwave safe mug with 1 cup of Very Hot water.
NOTE: microwave if it's not hot enough, place in the microwave for 1 minute or until it is piping hot, but not boiling.
Add the honey.
Pour the hot water into the mug over the spoon you used for the honey to get off the last little drops.
Add the lemon juice and stir well.
Add the lemon slice and serve.

similar.name: Dr. Joey's Hot Toddy's Cold Remedy

name: Bartender's Root Beer
directions: Fill a tall glass with ice and mix these ingredients in it.

name: Nancy Drew Pine Hill Punch
directions: Put cider and cinnamon in pot and bring to a boil.
Lower heat, cover, and simmer 5 minute.
Stir in nutmeg, honey, lemon juice, zest, and pineapple juice and simmer 5 minute more.
Serve hot or cold.

name: Nancy Drew Lemonade Disguise
directions: Mix cranberry juice, water,cloves, and cinnamon and heat over med. to a roiling boil.
Remove from heat and let stand 5 minute.
Strain over pitcher.
Mix in sugar and lemonade, reheat as desired.

similar.name: Nancy Drew Scarlet Slipper Raspberry Punch

name: Nancy Drew Scarlet Slipper Raspberry Punch
directions: Mix jell-o as directed on box in 1 gallon pitcher.  Add drink powder.
Stir in rest on ingredients and chill.

name: Best Ever Bloody Mary
directions: Mix first 7 ingredients well, add salt to taste and squeeze a lime wedge on top.
Garnish with hot pickled okra.

name: Xocoatl Con Lavande De Provençe
directions: Place all the ingredients except for the cane sugar in a small saucepan and heat through until very hot. To avoid the milk curdling, be careful not to boil!
Once the mixture is hot, reduce heat to low, cover and simmer 5 minutes to infuse the ingredients.
Pour the mixture through a strainer and sweeten to taste with the cane sugar.
All ingredient amounts are estimated. Adjust to your liking.

name: Hot Hot Hot Chocolate (Spicy / Chili)
directions: Put the hot chocolate powder into a mug and add a little cold milk. mix to a paste.
Add the cayenne (you can use more or less to taste).
Add enough boiling water to fill the mug, mixing well as you pour.
Serve immediately (with or without cream!).

name: Babylon Spice
directions: Soak the ginger in the rum for 24 hours.
Place ice in a cocktail shaker. Add the ginger-rum mixture, coconut milk, and mango juice to the shaker.
Shake well and strain into a large cocktail glass.
Serve with a topping of the grated coconut, a cherry, and an orange slice on the lip of the glass. Serve immediately.

name: Guidelines for Brewing the Perfect Pot of Tea and How to Serve
directions: For Black Tea:  Your tea will only be as good as your water. It is best to use filtered or spring water only. If you must use tap water, take water during the day time from a tap and leave it out overnight. Once the water as come to the boil, take off the lid of the pot, turn fire down to low and continue to heat for 5 minutes; This gets rid of any unpleasant smells the water may have.
Wait until the water is near boiling, then pour a little into the teapot and swirl it around. This warms the pot so that it is at an optimum temperature for holding the tea. Empty the pot.
To the warmed teapot add one slightly rounded teaspoon of a tea per cup plus one teaspoon for the pot. Or use one tea bag in the pot for each cup.
When the water in the kettle has reached a rolling boil, pour it in the pot and allow the tea to steep for three to five minutes.

Green and Oolong Teas:  When making green tea or oolong teas, water should not be allowed to boil. When water temperature reaches 185-degrees, tea leaves should be infused. Failing to do this will make green, white and oolong teas bitter.

Serving Tea:  Milk is served with tea, not cream. Cream is too heavy and masks the taste of the tea. Although some pour their milk in the cup first, it is probably better to pour the milk in the tea after it is in the cup in order to get the correct amount.

When serving lemon with tea, use lemon slices, not wedges. Either provide a small fork or lemon fork for your guests, or have the tea server can neatly place a slice in the tea  cup after the tea has been poured. Be sure never to add lemon with milk since the lemon's citric acid will cause the proteins in the milk to curdle.

name: Beer Jello Shots
directions: Mix the jello mix with two cups (16 ounces) of boiling water until the powder is fully dissolved and add the malt liquor. The cold water called for by the recipe on the box is replaced by the malt liquor.
Pour the mixture into either shot glasses or paper cups. Shot glasses are more attractive, but the paper cups are easier to eat from.

name: Splenda Lemonade for One
directions: Mash lemon slices, lemon juice and contents of Splenda packets for a fork in a tall glass.
Add club soda and ice cubes.
Garnish with mint leaves, if desired.

name: Summerberry Cooler
directions: In a blender, combine strawberries, raspberries, and apple juice concentrate. Cover and blend until smooth. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve; discard pulp.
Pour strained mixture into a small pitcher; slowly stir in carbonated beverage. Serve over ice cubes in chilled glasses.

name: Chili Infused Vodka
directions: Quarter all the fresh peppers and the horseradish. If you want to reduce the heat, seed and stem the peppers. You can really use any combination and quantity of peppers. I used the 4 of each and it produced a brilliant heat level with an amazing taste.
Take your lime and make about twenty slits in the peel all over the lime.
Put all the ingredients into a clean, sterilized wide mouthed jar. Using a wide mouthed jar (like a mason jar) just makes it easier to get everything in and out.
Put the vodka in a cool, dark place. Cover with a dish cloth if you like.
Every day, shake it.

Let the vodka sit at least one week then strain the vodka through cheesecloth and enjoy. I use 1 ½ oz of the vodka, about a tbsp of Worcestershire, a tsp of celery seeds, a little salt and top it off with Clamato (or tomato juice) for a nice fiery beverage.

name: Bubble Gum Drink
directions: Layer in order into a shot glass.

name: Strawberry Liqueur
directions: In a quart jar, add strawberries, 1 cup sugar, and vodka. (I use frozen berries as the freezing process breaks down the cell walls, allowing you to get more juice).
Seal jar tightly, and place in a dry, dark place for about 2 weeks.
After two weeks, strain the liquid using a double layer of cheese cloth.  Gently squeeze the berries, getting as much juice from the berries as possible.
In a fresh quart jar, add the second cup of sugar, glycerin, water to top and the strained liquid.  Seal and store again in a dark place until sugar is dissolved.
Once the sugar has all dissolved, bottle the resulting liqueur in a fresh bottle and let age for roughly 3 months.

name: Peach Liqueur
directions: In a quart jar, add peaches, 1 cup sugar, and vodka. (I use frozen peaches as the freezing process breaks down the cell walls, allowing you to get more juice)
Seal jar tightly, and place in a dry, dark place for about 2 weeks.
After two weeks, strain the liquid using a double layer of cheese cloth.  Gently squeeze the peaches, getting as much juice from the peaches as possible.
In a fresh quart jar, add the second cup of sugar, water to top and the strained liquid.  Seal and store again in a dark place until sugar is dissolved.
Once the sugar has all dissolved, bottle the resulting liqueur in a fresh bottle and let age for roughly 3 months.

name: Raspberry Liqueur
directions: In a quart jar, raspberries, 1 cup sugar, and vodka. (I use frozen raspberries as the freezing process breaks down the cell walls, allowing you to get more juice).
Seal jar tightly, and place in a dry, dark place for about 2 weeks.
After two weeks, strain the liquid using a double layer of cheese cloth.  Gently squeeze the raspberries, getting as much juice from the raspberries as possible.
In a fresh quart jar, add the second cup of sugar, glycerin, water to top and the strained liquid.  Seal and store again in a dark place until sugar is dissolved.
Once the sugar has all dissolved, bottle the resulting liqueur in a fresh bottle and let age for roughly 3 months.

name: Blueberry Liqueur
directions: In a quart jar, blueberries, 1 cup sugar, and vodka. (I use frozen blueberries as the freezing process breaks down the cell walls, allowing you to get more juice).
Seal jar tightly, and place in a dry, dark place for about 2 weeks.
After two weeks, strain the liquid using a double layer of cheese cloth.  Gently squeeze the blueberries, getting as much juice from them as possible.
In a fresh quart jar, add the second cup of sugar, water to top and the strained liquid.  Seal and store again in a dark place until sugar is dissolved.
Once the sugar has all dissolved, bottle the resulting liqueur in a fresh bottle and let age for roughly 3 months.

name: Apple Cinnamon Liqueur
directions: In a quart jar, add apple, cinnamon sticks, 1 cup sugar, and vodka.
Seal jar tightly, and place in a dry, dark place for about 2 weeks.
After two weeks, strain the liquid using a double layer of cheese cloth. Gently squeeze the apples, getting as much juice from them as possible.
In a fresh quart jar, add the second cup of sugar, the glycerin, water to top and the strained liquid. Seal and store again in a dark place until sugar is dissolved.
Once the sugar has all dissolved, bottle the resulting liqueur in a fresh bottle and let age for roughly 3 months.

name: Mojito Cocktail
directions: Mix all ingredients together and garnish with a lime.

name: Orange Mojito
directions: Mix all ingredients together over ice.  Strain and garnish with a lime wedge.

name: Frozen Peach Champagne Cocktail  (Rachael Ray)
directions: Place a shallow bowl of water along side a shallow bowl with 1/4 cup sugar in it. Dip 4 cocktail glasses in water, then sugar to rim glass.
Place 4 scoops peach sorbet in blender.
Add 2 shots orange liqueur.
Fill blender with Champagne to maximum fill line or up to 1-inch from top of blending pitcher. Place cover on blender tightly.
Blend until smooth and pour into cocktail glasses, keeping an eye out not to wreck the pretty sugar rims.
Garnish with a few raspberries and a sprig of mint and serve.

similar.name: La Vie En Rose Champagne Cocktail

name: Alabama Fizz
directions: Mix first three ingredients into a 14 oz glass.
Then fill with club soda.

name: Cranberry Tea
directions: brew tea in hot water for 5-6 minuts n strain.
wen cool blend with cranberry juice , sugar and lemon juice.
top it with ice n serve chilled garnished with mint leaves.

name: Juice for Dehydrated Children
directions: Mix all ingredients.
Keep in fridge and serve as needed.

name: Bourbon Old-Fashioned
directions: Mix sugar and angostura bitters in an old-fashioned glass. Mix the two, then add a splash of water.  Drop in a cherry and an orange wedge, and muddle into a paste using a muddler (or the back end of a spoon.) Pour in bourbon, fill with ice cubes, and stir.

name: Geranium Cooler
directions: Pour 1 cup boiling water over all the ingredients, cover for five minutes.
Sweeten to taste.
Strain, cool and chill, and serve over crushed ice.
Garnish with leaf in each glass.

name: Rose Royale
directions: Place candied rose petals in a Champagne flute. Add rose vodka and Champagne.

name: Talea Espresso Martini
directions: Put the Talea and coffee in a shaker with ice crushed.
Shake well and strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with cacao and serve.

name: Rosemary Pineapple Punch
directions: Heat water & rosemary to a boil.
Remove from heat and steep for 30min.
Strain. And add to pineapple juice, 7-up and ginger ale.

similar.name: Jackie's Marvelous and Easy Pineapple Punch

name: Texas Tea
directions: Tie the mint leaves together and place them in the bottom of the jug.
Tie the tea bags together and place them on top of the mint bunch.
Fill jar with cold water.
Place you jar in a sunny spot for one or two days.
Remove the tea bags and mint, squeezing excess liquid back into the jar.
Add sugar or Splenda and frozen concentrate, stirring well to dissolve.
Chill thoroughly and enjoy!
Cooking time is brewing time.

name: Hibiscus Mint Tea
directions: Place teabags or loose tea and mint in the water in a sun tea jar.  Let steep in the sun (or refrigerator) for several hours until the tea is a clear ruby color.
If you have used the hibiscus buds and fresh mint, strain before storage and serving.
Serve over ice with a sprig of fresh mint.  May add sugar and lemon, if desired.

name: Strawberry Tea
directions: Cut strawberry into 4 pieces.
mix with cane sugar and boil until sugar melted.
put 2bags tea into hot water.
put both ingredients into refrigerator let it cool.
after that mix it and wait for an hour -- .

similar.name: Strawberry or Cherry Tea Mix in a Pint Jar

name: Ginger-Mint Mojitos
directions: Juice the limes.  You should wind up with about 1/4 cup of juice.  Reserve the juiced halves.
In a bowl, mash the lime halves, juice, rum, mint, sugar, and ginger with a spoon or masher of choice.
Allow it to sit for about 20 minutes, and then strain into a bowl.  Discard the solids.
Fill 4 glasses with ice, 1/2 cup rum mixture and 1/2 cup club soda.
Garnish with mint sprigs.

name: Pina Coladas
directions: Freeze pineapple juice in ice cube trays for 4 hours, or until solid.
In a blender, add the frozen pineapple juice, 1 cup ice cubes, coconut sorbet, run and lime juice.
Blend until smooth.
Enjoy!

name: Chai  ( from Moosewood Restaurant New Classics)
directions: In a medium saucepan,boil the water and spices until the liquid has reduced to 2 cups,10-15 minutes. Remove from the heat, add the tea-and steep for 4 to 5 minutes. Strain the tea and discard the leaves and spices,and return the tea to the saucepan. Add the milk and heat to boiling. Add sweetener to taste and serve.
(total time 20 minutes).

name: April's Violet
directions: Pour the gin, blue Curacao and grenadine into a mixing glass with ice cubes.
Stir well.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass, and serve.

name: Blackberry Violet Champagne Cocktail
directions: Fill glass with champagne.
Slowly stir syrup into glass.
Garnish with a violet petal.

name: Passion Tea Lemonade
directions: Remove tag and string from tea bags and place in a 2 qt pitcher.  Pour in the boiling water and allow tea to steep for 10 to 15 minutes.
Add lemonade concentrate and orange extract, then top up pitcher with cold water.
Chill for 3 to 4 hours and serve over ice.

name: Old Fashion Lemonade
directions: Using potato masher, mash lemon slices and sugar in deep bowl until slices release their juice and sugar begins to dissolve. Stir in water and lemon juice until sugar completely dissolves. Strain out lemon slices and chill or pour over ice before serving.

name: Espresso Icee With Anise Cream
directions: Combine water, sugar, and espresso in an 8 inch baking dish, stirring until sugar and espresso dissolve.
Cover and freeze for 45 minutes.
Stir espresso mixture with a fork.  Continue to freeze mixture, stirring every 45 minutes, until completely frozen   (about 4 hours).
Combine ice cream, whipped topping and liqueur.
Remove espresso mixture from freezer, "fluff" with fork.
Serve in a glass and top with whipped topping mixture.

name: Sugar-Free Sweet and Sour Mix
directions: Combine it all together. Store covered in the refrigerator.

name: Electric Lemontini
directions: Pour all ingredients into a shaker with ice.
Shake and strain into a sugar rimmed martini glass.

name: An Old Fashioned
directions: Mix all the ingredients with ice in an Old-fashioned (Rocks) glass.
If making large quantities use a  shaker
Add cherry
Garnish.
Drink.

name: Vodka Highball
directions: Build over ice in a highball glass
Stir.
Garnish with a long thin slice of cucumber with the skin.
Drink up.

name: Long White Cloud
directions: In a shaker, lightly bruise cilantro with ice.
Add all other ingredients.
Shake and double strain into an ice filled Collins glass.
Garnish with a feijoa wheel and a sprig of cilantro.

name: Buttery Finger
directions: Combine in a shot glass or serve over ice in a highball.

name: Acapulco I
directions: Place all ingredients into a shaker and shake well.
Strain over ice in a hi-ball glass and garnish if desired with an orange slice.

name: After Eight
directions: Layer all ingredients in a corfdial or shooter glass.

name: Amaretto Sour
directions: Juice lemon and pour the juice into a shaker.
Add ice and Amaretto.
Shake well then pour into a cocktail glass and top with soda water.
Garnish with a lime if desired.

name: Angel's Kiss
directions: In a blender blend all incredients then pour into a glass.

name: Romulan Ale Martini
directions: Chill your glasses.
Place in drink ingredients in shaker container with ice.
Shake
Pour into a chilled martini glass.

name: Bumble Bee
directions: This is a layered shot.
First pour the Bailey's into the shot glass.
Then take an upside down spoon and touch it to the inside wall of the glass.
Carefully add the Kahlua.
Repeat this process for the Sambuca.
If done properly, the alcohol will stay separated and resemble a bumble bee.

name: Affinity
directions: Half fill a mixing glass with cracked ice.
Add liquid and stir.
Strain into a champagne glass and garnish with a lemon twist.

name: Whiskey Peach Tea
directions: Bring water to a boil in a small saucepan; remove from the heat, add tea bags, and let steep 5 minutes. Remove tea bags and stir in sugar until dissolved. Transfer to a pitcher, add peach nectar, and stir to combine. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour.
Fill tall glasses with ice and then pour peach tea over, leaving some room at the top for the whiskey. Stir in 1 shot of whiskey to each glass and garnish with a peach slice and fresh mint sprig.

name: Agua
directions: Roughly pour the ingredients together in similar proportions into a shot glass, making sure you finish with the Bailey's - which should sink to the bottom then swirl through the blue.

name: Bubblegum
directions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker half-filled with ice cubes.
Shake well, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

name: Green Vodka Cooler
directions: Combine lime juice and sugar in a bowl, and whisk to dissolve the sugar. Pour half of this mixture into a blender.
Add 1 cup vodka and 4 cups ice, and blend until smooth. Repeat with remaining ingredients.
Serve immediately, garnished with lime slices.

name: Amazingly Good Eggnog
directions: Combine milk, cloves, 1/2 teaspoon vanilla, and cinnamon in a saucepan, and heat over lowest setting for 5 minutes. Slowly bring milk mixture to a boil.

In a large bowl, combine egg yolks and sugar. Whisk together until fluffy. Whisk hot milk mixture slowly into the eggs. Pour mixture into saucepan. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly for 3 minutes, or until thick. Do not allow mixture to boil. Strain to remove cloves, and let cool for about an hour.
Stir in rum, cream, 2 teaspoon vanilla, and nutmeg. Refrigerate overnight before serving.

name: Rosy Peach & Ripe Melon Sangria
directions: Place all the fruit in a large pitcher.  Pour in wine, juice and Cointreau.  Let rest at room temperature for 1 to 2 hours to blend flavours.
Before serving add the sparkling water.  Serve in wine glasses over ice and garnish with mint.

name: Martini Dominikanis
directions: Shake ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled martini or cocktail glass.
Garnish with a lemon, and serve.

name: Tijuana Hooker
directions: You'll need two shot glasses for this drink.  Put Shot of tequila in one shot glass, put the dill pickle juice in the other. Take the shot of tequila followed directly by the shot of dill pickle juice. Reapeat as necessary.

name: Cucumber Basil Martini
directions: In a small bowl, dissolve the sugar in the hot water.
Press the grated ginger through a fine strainer set over the bowl, releasing the juice.
In a cocktail shaker, muddle the diced cucumber with the 2 torn basil leaves.
Add the ginger syrup, gin, lime juice and a handful of ice.
Shake well, then strain into a martini glass.
Garnish the martini with a cucumber slice and the remaining whole basil leaf and serve.

name: Beer Margaritas
directions: In a large pitcher, combine the beer, tequila and limeade.
Rub a lime wedge around the rim of each of glass and dip it in the salt.
Pour the margaritas into the glasses and garnish with a lime wedge.

name: Spanish Kalimotxo
directions: Fill half a glass with red wine and top with chilled cola.

name: Iced Tea
directions: Steep teabags in boiling water for 20 minutes (add splenda to tea during steeping, if you want it sweeter.).
Remove teabags, and put tea in refridgerator to cool completely.
Pour Orange juice and lime juice into pitcher of ice.  Add tea, mint, lemon and orange slices.  Stir well.
Pour into glasses half filled with ice, and enjoy.
For a quicker assembly, steep tea and set in fridge the night before.

name: Candy Apple Martini
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker halfway with ice.
Add in vodka, sour apple liqueur, butterscotch schnapps, and apple juice.
Shake vigorously for 5-10 seconds.
Strain drink into a chilled cocktail glass; garnish with an apple slice.

name: House Darts
directions: In a shaker filled with ice, combine all of the ingredients.
Chill and serve in shot glasses.

name: Goombay Smash
directions: Mix all ingredients in a shaker with ice.
Pour in a highball glass.  You can add ice if you want.  But we didn't cause the glass was full.
Garnish with an orange slice and cherry.

name: Easy Peach Lemonade
directions: Remove 1 tub of lemonade from container, reserving remaining tubs for other uses.
Combine lemonade mix, water, and peach nectar in a pitcher. Cover and chill at least 1 hour.
Serve over ice.

name: Cool Cucumber and Mint Water
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large pitcher and keep cool!

name: Orange Soymilk Frappe
directions: In a blender, combine all ingredients; cover and process for 30-45 seconds or until smooth.
Pour into chilled glasses; serve immediately.

name: Glacier Martini
directions: Shake with cracked ice in a shaker and pour into a chilled martini glass.  Put in olives.

name: Cucumber Gin and Tonic
directions: Add the ice to a cocktail glass.
Add cucumber slices.
Add gin.
Fill glass with tonic water.

name: Mexican Fizz
directions: Pour tequila and creme de cassis into an ice-filled highball.
Slowly add in champagne, stirring gently.

name: Jamaican 10-Speed
directions: Pour the Malibu rum, melon liqueur and creme de bananes into a highball glass filled with ice cubes.
Add pineapple juice and 1 ounce of milk (or if you really like it sweet, only a splash of milk).
Stir well, and serve.

name: Apricot Brandy Sour
directions: In a shaker, pour apricot brandy, lemon juice and Triple Sec.
Fill in with orange juice (until half the shaker or the quantity you want) and add ice cubes. Shake.
Pour in a highball glass.
Optional: Add 1 teaspoon grenadine.

name: Cantaloupe Margarita
directions: Add the first 6 ingredients to a blender with ¾ cup ice; blend until smooth.
Pour into a chilled margarita glass; garnish with a speared ball of cantaloupe.

name: Blue Freeze
directions: Place Ice in a hi-ball glass and add Alize.
Top with sprite.

name: Mint Liqueur
directions: In a quart jar combine leaves, vodka and 1 cup sugar.
Seal jar tightly, and place in a dry, dark place for about 2 weeks.
After two weeks, strain the liquid using a double layer of cheese cloth. Gently squeeze the mint leaves, getting as much juice as possible.
In a fresh quart jar, add the second cup of sugar, glycerin, water to top and the strained liquid. Seal and store again in a dark place until sugar is dissolved.
Once the sugar has all dissolved, bottle the resulting liqueur in a fresh bottle and let age for roughly 3 months.

name: Cinnamon Spice Liqueur
directions: In a quart jar, add spices, 1 cup sugar, and vodka.
Seal jar tightly, and place in a dry, dark place for about 2 weeks.
After two weeks, strain the liquid using a double layer of cheese cloth.
In a fresh quart jar, add the second cup of sugar, glycerin, water to top and the strained liquid. Seal and store again in a dark place until sugar is dissolved.
Once the sugar has all dissolved, bottle the resulting liqueur in a fresh bottle and let age for roughly 3 months.

name: Banana Liqueur
directions: In a quart jar, add banana, 1 cup sugar, and vodka.
Seal jar tightly, and place in a dry, dark place for about 2 weeks.
After two weeks, strain the liquid using a double layer of cheese cloth. Gently squeeze the banana, getting as much juice as possible.
In a fresh quart jar, add the second cup of sugar, glycerin, water to top and the strained liquid. Seal and store again in a dark place until sugar is dissolved.
Once the sugar has all dissolved, bottle the resulting liqueur in a fresh bottle and let age for roughly 3 months.

name: Rose Liqueur
directions: In a quart jar, add petals, 1 cup sugar, and vodka.
Seal jar tightly, and place in a dry, dark place for about 2 weeks.
After two weeks, strain the liquid using a double layer of cheese cloth. Gently squeeze the petals, getting as much juice as possible.
In a fresh quart jar, add the second cup of sugar, glycerin, coloring, water to top and the strained liquid. Seal and store again in a dark place until sugar is dissolved.
Once the sugar has all dissolved, bottle the resulting liqueur in a fresh bottle and let age for roughly 3 months.

name: Tropical Fruit Liqueur
directions: In a quart jar, add fruit, 1 cup sugar, and vodka. (I use frozen berries as the freezing process breaks down the cell walls, allowing you to get more juice).
Seal jar tightly, and place in a dry, dark place for about 2 weeks.
After two weeks, strain the liquid using a double layer of cheese cloth. Gently squeeze the fruit, getting as much juice as possible.
In a fresh quart jar, add the second cup of sugar, glycerin, water to top and the strained liquid. Seal and store again in a dark place until sugar is dissolved.
Once the sugar has all dissolved, bottle the resulting liqueur in a fresh bottle and let age for roughly 3 months.

name: African Red Bush (Rooibos) Sun Tea
directions: Fill a 4 quart jar with filtered water.
Remove the string from each tea bag and put it into the jug of water.
Set the jug with the tea bags and water in the direct sun and leave all day. The hotter the sun the better.
Once finished set the jar with the tea bags in it into the fridge and let it chill over night or longer.
Enjoy!

name: Vodka Tonic
directions: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour vodka in glass (I like Skyy or Grey Goose). Top with tonic water (I use diet tonic water at home).
Squeeze lime wedge(s) over the drink, drop wedge(s) into drink, and lightly stir.
Enjoy!

name: Pink Lemonade (Alcoholic)
directions: Mix thawed lemonade with 54 oz cold water.
Add vodka and Chambord.
Serve over ice.

name: Kahlua Affogato
directions: Pour in the hot espresso first, then the Kahlua and then your ice cream.
Drink and enjoy.
Variation:.
You can also add a shot of greeen creme de minthe liqueur to the mix and pour over pistachio ice cream instead of vanilla.

name: Fireside Coffee
directions: Mix and store in tightly covered container.
One-fourth cup of mix to 8 ounces hot water makes 1 serving.

name: Kahlua Exotic Bliss
directions: Blend the Kahlua, Razeberry Vodka, ice cream and ice cubes in a blender until smooth.
Pour into your favorite glass.
Top with the grenadine.
Garnish with any type of tropical fruit.
Note: The ladies love these ice cream drinks.
Variation:
Eliminate the ice cream and add 1 shot of milk or cream.
Blend in the blender for a few seconds.
Pour into your favorite cocktail glass.
Top with the grenadine and your favorite fruit.

name: Especial Kahlua Martini
directions: Mix all ingredients together and pour into a very chilled Martini glass.
Garnish with an olive.
Enjoy.

name: Afterburner #3
directions: Pour over ice in a cocktail glass.  Stir.
Fill with cranberry juice.

name: Black Cherry Tea Mix
directions: Combine iced tea mix, Equal� and black cherry drink mix in an airtight container. Store tightly covered in a cool, dry place.
To serve, stir 1 heaping tablespoon mix or (2 teaspoons if using Equal packets) into 8 ounces cold or boiling water.
Serve over ice.

similar.name: Red Hot Sipper Mix in a Jar

name: Kahlua Hazelnut Tiramisu Drink
directions: Blend all ingredients together and pour into your favorite cocktail glass.
Top with an orange slice & cherry.
Drink and enjoy.

name: Blue Violet Martini
directions: In a shaker, combine Hypnotiq, Chambord, vodka and juice.
Shake vigorously and strain into a chilled Martini glass.
Garnish with skewered blackberries.

name: Strawberry Caipirinha
directions: Add the strawberries, 3 lime wedges, and simple syrup to a rocks glass.
Muddle the ingredients in the glass.
Fill the glass halfway with crushed ice; add the cachaca and stir the mixture vigorously.
Fill the rest of the glass with crushed ice; garnish with remaining lime wedge.

name: Tidal Wave
directions: Add the rum and next 5 ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously; strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with the lime slice and orchid.

name: Pineapple Margarita
directions: Place first 5 ingredients in a cocktail shaker.
Add ice; shake vigorously until blended.  Strain into margarita glasses.

name: White Grape Margarita
directions: Add the first 5 ingredients to a blender with ¾ cup ice; blend until smooth.
Pour into a chilled cocktail glass; garnish with speared frozen grapes.

name: Long Island Iced Tea
directions: Mix all ingredients into a pitcher.
Serve over ice. Enjoy.

name: Slushy Mojito
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Enjoy!

name: Roasted Chestnut Coffee
directions: In an Irish coffee mug, pour a 4 shots of the liquor.
Top with fresh brewed coffee.
Top of with whipped creme (optional).

name: Creamy, Thick Hot Chocolate
directions: Chop chocolate and melt over hot water.

In another pan bring cream and all but 1/4 cup of milk to scalding point. Stir half scalded mixture into melted chocolate and mix well, then pour back into the saucepan and set over low heat. Mix in the reserved 1/4 cup milk with the cocoa, sugar and cornflour to make a smooth paste. Stir into the chocolate mixture and whisk or stir constantly until it comes to the boil and thickens slightly.
Add vanilla, if desired and beat briskly with wire beater or hand rotary beater until mixture is foamy.
Pour into cups and serve immediately topped with whipped cream.

name: Low Sugar (Or Sugar Free) Southern Sweet Tea
directions: Boil 4 cups hot water.  Place tea bags in heat-proof glass container. Pour boiling water over tea bags and steep 15-20 minutes.  Remove tea bags.  Stir in sugar until completely disolved.

Add 4 cups ice water to tea, then stir in Stevia packets.  Refrigerate overnight.  (The stevia after-taste is too strong on the first day)  Serve over ice, and use within 4 days (the tea will start to get a bitter taste after a few days).
NOTE: This makes a strong tea.  I like to pour mine over a glass of ice and let it sit for a while before I drink it, so I make it strong enough that it taste right when watered down by melted ice.

name: Orange Sour Puss
directions: In a shaker with ice, shake the Sour Puss with the Orange juice.
Serve in a highball with ice and garnish with an orange slice.

name: Peach Lemonade
directions: Remove 1 lemonade tub from container (reserving remaining tubs for another use).
Combine lemonade mix, water and peach nectar in a pitcher.
Cover and chill for at least one hour and serve over ice.

name: Shakerato
directions: Combine espresso and sugar in blender.
Add the ice and blend for about 15 seconds.
Serve in martini glasses garnished with lemon peel.

name: Sunny Lemonade
directions: Pour whiskey and lemonade concentrate into a high ball glass.  Stir.  Add ice cubes and fill glass with soda.

name: Hot Apple Toddies
directions: In a medium saucepan over medium heat or in a 4 quart slow cooker, combine all ingredients and heat through.  Do not boil.  Mull for 45-60 minutes.  Serve warm in footed glasses with cinnamon sticks as garnish.

name: Cactus Cooler With Midori
directions: Fill cocktail shaker with ice.  Add ingredients and shake well.  Pour into 2 shot glasses and serve.

name: Cosmorita
directions: Fill cocktail shaker with ice.  Add tequila, lime juice and cranberry juice.  Shake several times.  Strain into martini glass, garnish and serve.

name: Acapulco
directions: Using a shaker filled with ice, combine all ingredients.
Shake well.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Tear mint leaves and add to drink.

name: Watermelon Fizz
directions: Combine all ingredients, except strawberries in blender.  Blend until smooth, about 40 seconds.  Pour into glasses and garnish.

name: Burgundy Bubbler
directions: Pour 1/4 cup orange juice and 1/2 cup red wine into each highball glass.  Top each off with 1/2 cup sparkling cider.
Serve chilled.

name: Pink Russian
directions: Pour liquor into a highball glass with ice. (I did it in a shaker).
Fill with milk or cream, and shake.

name: Cranberry Margarita
directions: Combine all ingredient, except for garnishes, in a blender.  Blend on high until smooth.  Serve in a margarita glass and garnish.

name: Astoria
directions: In a shaker, put all the ingredients with ice.
Shake and pour in a glass.
Garnish with an orange slice.
You may add more grapefruit juice if you find it too strong.  That's what I did.

name: Framboise Colatia
directions: In a blender, mix the Tia Maria, vanilla ice cream and 6 raspberries for 15 to 20 seconds.
Pour directly in a martini glass and garnish with the 2 raspberries, coffee beans and mint leaf.

similar.name: Mr Coffee Raspberry Truffle Cappuccino Frappe

name: Ginger Vodka
directions: Divide the lime wedges between 2 old fashioned glasses.
Smash the lime wedges to release the juices. Fill the glasses with ice cubes.
Pour the vodka then the ginger ale over the ice in the glasses, dividing equally.
Stir to blend and serve.

name: Easy Latte Soda
directions: Pour the espresso into a tall glass and add the cream or half and half, to taste.
Fill with ice cubes.
And top with the soda and Enjoy.

name: Creamsicle Soda on the Rocks
directions: Fill 16 oz glass with ice.
Add rum, orange soda and top with a splash of Irish cream.

name: Spicy Bloody Mary Mix
directions: Combine all together in a non-metal pitcher. Allow to sit for several hours before adding your favorite spirit -- or not, even good plain.
Note: If you don't like dillweed, use 1 T. dill pickle juice.

name: Tipper
directions: In a tall glass combine the rum, vodka, and Creme de Cacao.
Add some ice.
Squeeze a quarte lime over all.
Fill with Coke.
Stir.

name: Slushes
directions: Brine tea bags and 2 cups water and then comine all ingredients and freeze. Once frozen fill a cup 3/4 full with slush and then finish glass with 7-up.

name: Brain Eraser (Alcoholic Drink)
directions: Put ice into a rocks glass.
Pour vodka, Kahlua and Amaretto into the glass.
Top with club soda.
Drink in one shot through a straw.

name: '57 Chevy (Alcoholic Drink)
directions: Combine over ice in rocks glass.
Listen to Bruce Springsteen.

name: Hawaiian Cherry Poppers
directions: Pour in glass over ice and mix well.
Garnish with cherry or fresh slice of pineapple.

name: Tennessee Martini
directions: Fill an appropriate glass with crushed ice.
Add the cherry and a tad of syrup.
Toss on the two shots --  be honest and actually measure like dad did.
Fill with club soda to the top.
Stir.

name: Ila's Iced Tequila
directions: In a small saucepan, combine the sugar and water. Bring to a simmer over moderately high heat, stirring to dissolve the sugar. Remove the heat and let cool to room temperature Stir in lemon juice.
In a large pitcher, combine the lemon syrup with the guava nectar, tea and tequila. Pour the tequila into tall glasses over ice and garnish each with a lemon twist.

name: Ila's Blueberry Mojito
directions: In a cocktail shaker, lightly muddle 1/2 cup blueberries with the sugar, lime wedges, mint and a small splash of club soda. Add the ice and rum and shake.
Spoon the remaining 2 tbsp of blueberries into a tall glass and pour in the mojito. Top with a small splash of club soda and serve.

name: Splice
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend well.
Garnish with a pineapple wedge and a melon ball.  Serve with a straw.

name: Japanese Slipper
directions: Half-fill a shaker with ice.  Pour in Cointreau, Midori and lemon juice.
Shake well and strain into a chilled glass.
Garnish with a lemon twist.

name: Absolute Heaven
directions: Add ingredients and shake over ice.
*The taste is very tropical tasting. Be careful you do not taste the alcohol but it's definately there!
When it says filled with, I always put juice until 3/4 of the shaker.  Or until half the shaker if the glace is not there yet.
GourmetMomma did it in a Highball glass.  She used 1/2 cup pineapple juice and 1 ounce of cranberry juice.

name: Lemony Syrup Base
directions: In covered jar, combine lemon peel, sugar and boiling water.  Cover and shake until sugar dissolves.  Add lemon juice.
Store tightly covered in refrigerator until ready to use.  Makes 2 2/3 cups of syrup base.
For lemonade by the glass:.
Pour 1/2 cup syrup base into tall glass and add 3/4 cup cold water and ice cubes.  Stir briskly.
For lemonade by the pitcher:.
Combine full recipe of syrup base with about 5 cups of cold water and ice cubes in large pitcher.

name: Easiest Peppermint Iced Tea
directions: In a 2 quart heatproof pitcher, pour two cups of boiling water over the tea bags.
Steep them for 6 minutes and then remove the tea bags.
Stir the honey and lemon juice into the hot tea and then add 2 cups cold water.
Chill and serve over ice with or without a lemon slice garnish.
Chill out and enjoy !

similar.name: Lemon and Red Zinger Iced Tea

name: Blueberry-Banana Batido
directions: Blend all ingredients till smooth.

name: Rose Geranium Tea
directions: Cover with boiling water and steep at least ten minutes.

name: Coffee Nudge
directions: Pour the creme de cacao, coffee liqueur and brandy into an Irish coffee cup.
Add coffee.
Top with whipped cream.
Enjoy!

name: Violet Tea
directions: Pour boiling water over violet leaves.
Steep 5 minutes.

name: Lemongrass Iced Tea
directions: Coarsely chop the bottom 4 inches of the lemongrass stalks.
Trim the tops, remove the outside leaves, and save for garnish.
In a small saucepan, bring to water to a boil.
Add in tea bags and chopped lemongrass; remove from heat and let steep for 10 minutes.
Strain; sweeten to taste with sugar, refrigerate until ready to serve.
Fill tall chilled glasses with ice; pour the tea over the ice.
Garnish each glass with a lemongrass top and a lemon wedge.

similar.name: Lemon Grass and Ginger Iced Tea

name: Mocha Coffee Cooler
directions: Blend all ingredients in a blender until  incorporated.
Pour into a tall, clear glass.
In a minute or two, the liquid will separate into three distinct layers - a light coffee "fizz" on top, the coffee layer next, and a dark chocolate layer on the bottom.
Beautiful, delicious, creamy and fat-free!

name: Passion Fruit Caipiroska
directions: Put all the ingredients into a shaker and shake together. Strain into a large glass an garnish with something fun, it says flower I woul go with pineapple slices.

name: Cherry Wine
directions: Macerate the cherries with the alcohol and sugar for three days.
Filter and place in bottles.

name: Asian Ginger Mango Soda
directions: Pour over ice and stir well.

name: Fruta Del Bosque
directions: Layer in the order listed, over a barspoon or speared cherry: first the Triple Sec, then the Cassis and finally a decent reposado tequila on top.

name: Bacoffee Cups Low Gi
directions: Mix the coffee and sugar with one tablespoon boiling water to dissolve.
Allow to cool then stir in the mashed banana and then fold in the fromage frais, keeping a slight ripple effect.
Transfer to four small glasses and chill.
Garnish with chocolate and almonds before serving.

name: Prickly Pear Margaritas
directions: Mix the ingredients and pour over ice  and ENJOY!

name: French Vanilla Frozen Coffee (Drink)
directions: Mix coffee, sugar and creamer.
Pour into blender and add ice cubes. Blend until smooth.
Top with chocolate syrup and cool whip if you want.
Note: You may need to crush your ice first, depending on power of your blender.

similar.name: Mr Coffee Slim Fast Vanilla Chip Frappe

name: Church Lady Martini
directions: Pour ingredients into cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously for 20 seconds or until outside of shaker is frosty.
Strain into a chilled martini glass.

name: Cinnamon Apple Martini
directions: Pour ingredients into a cocktail shaker.
Add crushed ice and let stand for five seconds.
Shake vigorously for five seconds. Strain into martini glass.

name: Pineapple Cocktail
directions: Chill a martini glass in the freezer. Fill a cocktail shaker with ice. Add the pineapple juice, vodka, orange liqueur, and lime juice. Cover and shake vigorously, until combined and chilled, about 30 seconds. (In general, by the time the shaker mists up the drink is ready.).

Scatter some turbinado sugar onto a small plate, wet the rim of the glass and dip into sugar. Strain the drink into the chilled glass. Skewer the pineapple and cherry and drop into the cocktail. Cheers.

name: Blackberry Lemonade
directions: In a food processor or blender, pulse the blackberries and sugar until smooth.
Strain the puree into a 1 ½ quart pitcher, pressing on the solids to get all the juice.
Stir in the lemon juice and water until blended.
Chill until cold; serve in ice-filled glasses.

name: Spirited Cherries
directions: Prepare canner, jars and lids.

In a saucepan over medium-high heat, combine sugar and water. Bring to a boil, stirring to dissolve sugar. Add Cherries, stirring constantly, and return to a boil. Reduce heat and boil gently for 5 minutes.
Using a slotted spoon pack fruit in hot jars withing 1/2 in headspace add rum or spirit. Ladle hot syrup into jar to cover fruit. Wipe rum and place lids and bands on jars.
Place jars in canner and process 10 minutes.

name: Ancient Aztec Cacahuatl
directions: In a saucepan over medium heat, combine half-and-half and vanilla bean; heat until mixture comes to a simmer.
Decrease heat to low; add in chocolate and cocoa powder; whisk to combine.
Simmer 5-10 minutes, or until mixture coats the back of a spoon (watch closely so that is does no boil over).
Add in the chile powder, a little at a time, to taste; stir in the honey and blend; discard the vanilla bean.
Pour hot chocolate into 8 small cups; top with the whipped cream and slivered almonds.

similar.name: Maize Meal Porridge Spiced With Coconut Milk

name: Blood Cherry Martini
directions: In a cocktail shaker, mash the cherries together with the Grand Marnier.
Add in the vodka and blood orange juice; fill with ice.
Cover and shake vigorously; set aside.
Splash a small amount of the maraschino liqueur into a martini glass; swirl a few times to completely coat the inside of the glass and discard the rest.
Strain the drink into the coated martini glass.
Drop a bing cherry into the glass for garnish.

name: Ginger Mojito
directions: Muddle ginger in base of shaker.
Add mint and lightly muddle (just to bruise mint and release their essential oils).
Add the next three ingredients and shake with ice and fine-strain into a glass filled with crushed ice.
Top with ginger ale.
Garnish with a sprig of mint.

name: Peachumba
directions: First the Schnapps, then at least 1 oz. of Vodka. Fill up with Chocolate milk.
I put ice in a glass, then the vodka, peach schnapps and the quantity of the chocolate milk mentionned.  I didn't fill more.

name: Banana Mocha
directions: Combine espresso, liqueur and sauce in a 12 oz. cup and stir.
Fill with steamed milk.
Garnish with whipped cream, chocolate drizzle and banana chips if desired.

name: Berry Lemonade
directions: Combine and serve cold.
Garnish with lemon slices.

name: Citrus Cooler
directions: combine sugar and water in medium  saucepan;.
bring to a boil, stirring until sugar dissolves.
Pour sugar mixture into a 4 1/2 quart freezer container.  Stir in fruit juices; freeze until firm.
Remove from freezer several hours before serving (mixture should be slushy).  Stir in ginger ale.

name: Vanilla Hot Chocolate
directions: Add milk, vanilla syrup, and salt to a saucepan; place over medium heat; cook/stir until mixture is hot (do not let boil).
Split vanilla bean lengthwise with a small sharp knife and scrape the seeds into the saucepan.
Stir in the white chocolate until it has melted and the mixture is smooth (don’t rush this step by turning up the heat; white chocolate has a tendency to seize when heated at too high a temperature).
Ladle the hot chocolate into 4 mugs; top with marshmallow and a sprinkling of grated chocolate.

name: Tailgate Spiced Cranberry Lemonade
directions: In a saucepan, combine the cloves, cinnamon, 2 cups water, cranberry juice, and sugar.
Bring to a boil, stirring until sugar dissolves; remove from heat.
Strain mixture through a fine-mesh strainer into a 2-quart pitcher.
Add in lemonade concentrate and remaining 2 cups water; stir to blend.
Chill until cold; serve in ice-filled glasses.

name: Key Lime Pie Martini
directions: To coat the rim of the martini glass, pour a small amount of key lime juice and simple syrup in a small plate.
In another small plate, pour about 5 tablespoons graham cracker crumbs.
Wet the martini glass rim with the lime juice/simple syrup; dip into the graham cracker crumbs several times to ensure coverage; set aside.
To a cocktail shaker filled with ice, add the Licor 43, key lime juice, vanilla vodka, and Midori; shake vigorously.
Strain into rimmed martini glass; garnish with lime wedge.

similar.name: Truly the Best Key Lime Pie Martini

name: Mock-A-Rita
directions: Prepare in blender on high for 10 seconds until light and frothy.
Salt rim of margarita glass and fill.

name: American Dream
directions: Chill with ice.
Strain into shot glass.

name: Creamy Sex on the Beach
directions: Pour the vodka, Malibu rum, peach schnapps, pineapple juice and grenadine into a cocktail shaker half-filled with ice cubes.
Add the heavy cream, and shake vigorously until frothy.
Pour into a small highball glass or equivalent, and serve.

name: Cafe Roma Martini
directions: Add all ingredients (except garnish) to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake well and strain into martini glass.
Garnish with 3 coffee beans. Enjoy!

name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Pie Latte
directions: Combine espresso, peanut butter and syrup in cup.
Fill with steamed milk.
Top with chocolate whipped cream.
Garnish with chopped peanuts.

name: Caffee American
directions: In a coffee mug, combine godive, Navan and Grand Marnier.
Fill with hot coffee.
Top with freshly whipped cream.
Top with gold sprinkles and insert a Pirouline wafer cookie.

name: Red Devil
directions: Mix alcohols into an ice-filled cocktail shaker.
Add the juice and grenadine, and shake.
Serve in a 10-12 oz. glass.

name: Gilligan's Island Steamer
directions: Combine ingredients in pitcher and steam until hot.
Top with whipped cream and caramel sauce.

name: Kiss on the Lips
directions: The mango mix should be blended with crushed ice firstly with the schnapps. Pour the schnapps and mango mix into a cocktail glass with the grenadine already placed at the bottom.

name: Blueberry Mocha
directions: Combine all ingredients and mix well.

name: Bitter Queen
directions: Add vodka, Campari and limoncello to a shaker filled with ice and vigorously shake.
Strain into a chilled martini glass and top with orange juice.
Garnish with the lime slice.

name: Jade Martini
directions: Add ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Vigorously shake and strain into a martini glass.
Slice the bottom of cherry and to the rim of glass.

name: Allspice Wassail Bowl
directions: In a large kettle combine the cider, brown sugar, undiluted lemon and orange juices.
Tie cloves and allspice in a spice bag or cheesecloth and add it to the cider along with the nutmeg.
Cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
Remove and discard the bag.
Serve hot in mugs with a cinnamon stick in each mug.

name: Energizing Green Tea for Females
directions: mix ingredients.
seep for 5 minutes.
strain.

name: Blue Passion Cocktail
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice and fine-strain into a chilled Cocktail (Martini) glass.
Garnish with a twist of lemon peel.

name: Pomegranate Margaritas
directions: Stir together sugar and hot water until sugar is dissolved.  Stir in 1 1/2 cups pomegranate juice and next 3 ingredients.

Pour desired about of pomegranate juice mixture into a shaker filled with ice cubes.  Cover with lid, and shake 30 seconds or until thoroughly chilled.  Remove lid, and strain into chilled cocktail glasses.  Repeat procedure with remaining pomegranate mixture.  Garnish with orange and lime slices if desired.  Serve immediately.

name: Smile when You’re Blue
directions: Add light rum, blue curacao, cream, vanilla ice cream, crushed ice, and blueberries in a blender.
Blend until the mixture is smooth.
Pour mixture into a chilled hurricane glass; drink with a straw.

name: Creamsicle Lemonade
directions: Mix with ice and garnish with and orange and lemon slices.

name: Frosted Spice Latte
directions: Add espresso to cup.
Stir in syrups and extract.
Fill with steamed milk and stir.
Top with whipped cream and dust with cinnamon.

name: Geranium Iced Tea
directions: Place the tea, geranium leaves and cloves in a warmed teapot.
Fill with 2 ½ cups boiling water, leave to infuse for 5 minutes, then strain, cool and chill.
Fill tumblers with crushed ice, then pour over the tea, and decorate each glass with a lemon slice. Sweeten, if desired.

name: Frozen Guava Lemonade
directions: Blend until smooth.
Garnish with a lemon wedge and a cherry.

similar.name: Honey Lemonade With Frozen Fruit Cubes

name: Green Oreo Mint Delight
directions: Pour liqueur, chocolate syrup, cream and ice into blender.
Blend until smooth.
Add crumbled Oreo’s and blend for 5 seconds.
Garnish with whipped cream.
Sprinkle with crumbled Oreo’s.

name: Margaritaville's Incommunicado
directions: Drop a handful of ice into a shaker and add all ingredients.
Shake well and pour into a 16 ounce glass.
Add lime wedge for garnish.

name: Margaritaville's Havanas and Bananas
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender and blend until smooth and slushy.
Pour into 16 ounce glass and garnish with an orange wedge.

name: Herbed Strawberry Wine
directions: Remove tops from strawberries, wash and slice.
Chop the herbs finely.
Mix all ingredients and seal in a glass container with a tight-fitting lid.
Shake well.
Refrigerate for two days, shaking occasionally.
Strain through a cloth towel, and serve chilled.

name: Gingerbread Cookie Latte
directions: Add espresso to cup.
Stir syrups.
Fill with steamed milk.
Top with whipped cream and garnish with crumbled graham crackers or gingerbread cookies.

name: Garden Sangria
directions: Place oranges, wine, orange liqueur, brandy, and fresh herb sprigs in a large glass container; cover and refrigerate overnight or for several days.
Four to six hours before serving, add the chopped firmer fruits, and the sliced lemons and limes.
Pour sangria into a glass pitcher, adding freshly sliced seasonal fruit; replace the herb sprigs with fresh ones, since they will have discolored.
Add frozen fruit just prior to a serving, as it will keep it chilled.
Pour sangria into long-stemmed glasses with a splash of club soda or champagne and add a fresh herb sprig.

name: Ginger Mint Lemonade
directions: Fill glass with ice.
Add lemonade and stir in syrups.
Garnish with mint leaves and a lemon wheel.

name: Iced Chamomile Tea
directions: In a 4-quart saucepan bring all ingredients to a boil and simmer, covered, 15 minutes.
Remove pan from heat and cool mixture. Steep mixture, covered and chilled, at least 8 hours and up to 24.
Pour mixture through a fine sieve into a pitcher.
This tea keeps, covered and chilled, 1 week.
Serve in ice-filled tall glasses.

name: Gingerbread Steamer
directions: Steam syrups and cold milk together.
Top with whipped cream, cinnamon powder and gingerbread cookie crumbs.

name: Golden Lemon Balm Tea
directions: In a teapot, place lemon balm leaves, lemon zest and honey.
Pour boiling water over all.
Let it infuse for 15 minutes.

name: Iced Violet Tea
directions: Combine in frosted glass.
Garnish with violet or mint sprig.

name: Spicy Night Cap
directions: Put Milk in a coffee mug and heat for 1 or 2 minutes in the microwave.
Add Rum to the hot Milk.
Add Sugar to taste.
Shake on the Cinnamon.
Sip and relax.

name: Gingersnap White Mocha
directions: Add espresso to cup.
Stir in Gingerbread syrup and white chocolate sauce.
Fill with steamed milk and stir.
Top with whipped cream and dust with crumbled gingersnap cookies and cinnamon.

name: Iced Caramel Latte
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Top with whipped cream and caramel drizzle.

name: Beer- Michelada Recipe
directions: Cut lime into quarters.
With one fourth of lime, rub around rim of glass and press into salt to create a limey-salty rim.
Fill glass with ice.
Add Worshtershire, soy, Tabasco, black pepper and juice of 1/2 lime. Add the juiced limes into the mix.
Pour cold beer over ice and spices.
Enjoy!

name: Tropical Cream Martini
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker halfway with ice; add all the ingredients to the shaker.
Shake vigorously for 5-10 seconds.
Strain mixture into a chilled martini glass; may garnish with a kiwi slice, if desired.

name: Lavender Iced Tea
directions: Combine in glass.
Garnish with a lemon wheel.

name: Blue Champagne
directions: Add the first 4 ingredients into a chilled champagne flute.
Slowly top with champagne.

name: Vertonic (Vermouth and Tonic)
directions: Fill a highball glass 2/3 full of ice (crushed, shaved, or cubed).
Add vermouth.
Add tonic.
Stir, garnish and serve.

name: Applemint Ale
directions: Boil sugar and water till sugar is dissolved.
Remove from heat and add 10 sprigs apple mint. Chill.
Add the juice of 4 lemons and strain.
After filling mint julep glasses with crushed ice, add ½ cup apple mint mixture and top with gingerale.
Add sprig of applemint and serve.

name: Melon Margarita
directions: Put all ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice.  Shake to mix well and then serve on the rocks with a salted rim.

name: Mint Tea Punch
directions: Bring water just to a boil.
Remove from heat.
Add tea bags and fresh peppermint leaves.
Allow to steep for five minutes.
Remove tea bags and mint leaves using a strainer.
Stir in sugar, nutmeg, and cinnamon.
Add this mixture to the orange juice and cranberry juice.
Refrigerate until well-chilled (1-2 hours).
Serve in a tall glass with ice and a sprig of mint.

name: Tokyo Tea
directions: Add to a pitcher ice, lemon/lime soda, limes, melon liqueur, vodka, rum, gin and Triple Sec. Stir to combine. Pour drink over ice into chilled soda glasses and garnish with a slice of lime.

name: Raspberry Orange Sunrises
directions: Place orange juice and raspberries in a blender; process until smooth.  Pour juice mixture into a pitcher; stir in wine.  Serve over ice.  Garnish with orange slices if desired.

name: Blue Moon Cocktail
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender.  Process until smooth.  Pour into 4 martini glasses and garnish the rim of each glass with a slice of orange.

name: Grapefruit Coolers
directions: Fill 4 (12 ounce) glasses halfway with ice.  Add 1/2 cup grapefruit juice, 2 tablespoons Grand Marnier and a pinch of salt to each glass and stir.  Top off each drink with 1/3 cup sparkling water and stir.

name: Lemon Drop Cocktail
directions: Push lemon wedge onto rim of 1 martini glass; rotate glass to coat with lemon juice.  Repeat with second lemon wedge and martini glass.  Discard lemon wedges.
Place sugar in a shallow bowl or small plate.  Dip rim of each martini glass in sugar to coat the rim.
Fill cocktail shaker with ice cubes.  Add remaining ingredients to cocktail shaker and shake vigorously.  Strain into martini glasses.

name: Barefoot Contessa's Pineapple Margarita
directions: Combine the lime juice, tequila, Triple Sec, and pineapple juice.
Fill a cocktail shaker 1/2-way with ice and fill 2/3 full with the margarita mixture.
Shake for 30 seconds and pour into glasses.
Decorate with fresh pineapple slices and serve ice cold.

name: Chic Peach Margarita
directions: Shake well and serve in a margarita glass over ice.  You can garnish with lime and rim the glass with sugar instead of salt.

name: Homemade Creme De Menthe
directions: Boil sugar and water together.
Let cool.
Combine all other ingredients in a large pitcher.
Add sugar syrup, stirring to combine, and pour into clean sterilized bottles for storage.
Age for a month.

similar.name: Chocolate Creme De Menthe Flavored Coffee

name: Mango Massala Tea
directions: Combine water and tea bag.  Let steep 5 minutes, then remove bag and let cool.
Mix all ingredients with ice and serve with a cinnamon stick.

name: Lavender Lemonade
directions: In a small saucepan on the stove, bring 1 cup water to a rolling boil.
Remove from heat and add lavender flowers.
Cover and steep for 10 minutes.
Sieve through a fine-meshed sieve, discard the blossoms, and set lavender tea aside. Meanwhile, in a quart jug, mix lemon juice with 4 cups water and sugar to taste.
Add prepared lavender tea.
Refrigerate until chilled.
Serve in tall glasses over ice cubes and decorate with mint leaves.

name: Iced English Rose Tea
directions: Combine in frosted glass.
Garnish with rose petals or mint sprig.

name: Lavender Berry Spritzer
directions: Mix with ice.
Serve with a lemon twist.

name: Mulled Tea
directions: In a large saucepan, bring water, cloves, allspice and cinnamon stick to boil over high heat.
Add tea leaves to hop spice mixture.
Cover and steep for 5 minutes.
Pour tea through strainer into mugs.
Stir 1-1/2 teaspoon of honey into each mug.

name: Wild Mint Tea Mix
directions: Mix the herbs.
For each cup of tea, steep 1 tablespoon of herbal tea mix in 1 cup boiling water.

name: Maple Latte
directions: Add espresso to cup.
Stir in syrups.
Fill with steamed milk and stir.
Top with whipped cream and sprinkle with brown sugar.

name: Maple Caramel Latte
directions: Add espresso to cup.
Stir in syrup and caramel sauce.
Fill with steamed milk and stir.
Top with whipped cream and drizzle with caramel sauce.

name: Strawberry Margarita
directions: Process first 6 ingredients in a blender until smooth.
Dip margarita glass rims in lime juice; dip rims in red sugar crystals, coating well.  Pour margarita mixture into glasses.  Serve immediately.  Garnish if desired.

name: Lemonade and Rose Water Coolers
directions: Combine all in a tall glass.
Garnish with lemon slice and rose petals.

name: Spiked Blended Lemonade
directions: Combine 1 1/2 cups vodka, 1 cup lemonade concentrate, and 4 cups ice cubes in blender.  Blend to just smooth but still slushy consistency.  Pour into large pitcher.  Repeat with remaining vodka, lemonade and ice.  Add to same pitcher.  (Can be made 5 hours ahead.  Cover and freeze.).
Whisk lemonade gently (do not blend again).  Pour into 8 tall glasses; garnish with mint and serve.

name: Lemon Balm Mojitos
directions: Put the lemon balm and the sugar in a short glass, and muddle until well mushed together (don't go crazy, or you will have bits of lemon balm in your teeth).
Add the shot of rum, a squeeze of lime, and fill the glass with tonic water. Add ice and stir gently. Garnish with a lime or lemon balm sprig. Cheers!

similar.name: Lemongrass, Kaffir Lime and Ginger Mojito

name: Mountain Melon Tea
directions: Mix well and serve over ice.
Garnish with a watermelon wedge.

name: Astronaut (Alcoholic Drink)
directions: Pour the vodka, light rum and dark rum into a cocktail shaker half-filled with ice cubes.
Shake well, and strain into a highball glass filled with ice cubes.
Add Sprite and a splash of pineapple juice.
Add a twist of lime (or lemon), and serve.

name: Bacon and Tomato Sandwich (Alcoholic Drink)
directions: Fill an old-fashioned glass three-quarters filled with broken ice.
Pour ingredients into glass.
Stir gently and serve.

name: Frosty Lay
directions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker half-filled with ice cubes.
Shake well, and strain into a large cocktail glass.
Garnish with 2 cranberries and a slice of lime, and serve.

name: Courage Cocktail
directions: Pour the amaretto, Southern Comfort, Malibu rum and blue curacao into a cocktail shaker 3/4 filled with ice cubes.
Add juices.
Shake well.
Strain into a highball glass, and serve.

name: Wakey Wakey
directions: Use a 50ml sherry glass.
Sambuca first, then layer with espresso and finish off with a top layer of cream.

name: Orange Sherbet Float
directions: Pour the pop in a glass, and add a scoop of orange sherbet.  Enjoy just like you would root beer float!

similar.name: Orange Cream Float(Hungry Girl) 1 Ww Point

name: Scrappy Snack
directions: Shake up with ice, pour into shot glass.

name: Grapeschlager
directions: Combine ingredients & serve over ice.

name: La Floridita Cocktail
directions: Add all ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously; strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Orange Spice Margarita
directions: Place hot water in a bowl and add tea bag, let steep 5 minute.
Add juice and tequila.
Strain into a warm martini glass.
Garnish with a cinnamon stick, and an orange slice.

name: Peppermint Patty
directions: Add espresso to cup.
Stir in extract and dark chocolate sauce.
Fill with steamed milk and stir.
Top with whipped cream and garnish with a peppermint stick and chocolate curls or shavings.

name: Puerto Rumba Steamer
directions: Steam extract with milk.
Add Rum.
Serve in a warm mug.
Top with whipped cream and slivered almonds.

name: Iced Coffee Mocha
directions: Fill tall glass with ice.
Mix coffee with syrup, creamer and sugar.
Pour over ice.
ENJOY!

name: Peppermint White Mocha
directions: Add espresso to cup.
Stir in extract and white chocolate sauce.
Fill with steamed milk and stir.
Garnish with whipped cream and a peppermint stick.

name: Pink Lavender Lemonade
directions: In saucepan, combine 2 1/2 cups water with sugar and hibiscus flowers.
Bring to a boil, stirring to dissolve sugar.
Simmer for a few minutes, then remove from the heat, stir in the lavender leaves, cover, and let mixture cool.
Strain liquid into a large pitcher or jar, add the remaining water and lemon juice.
Stir.

name: Pear Soda
directions: Fill glass with ice.
Add club soda and stir.
Garnish with a slice of pear and a cinnamon stick.

name: Pumpkin Spice Latte
directions: Add espresso to cup.
Stir in syrup.
Fill with steamed milk and stir.
Top with whipped cream and dust with pumpkin pie spice.

name: Pumpkin Spice Steamer
directions: Steam syrups and cold milk together.
Top with whipped cream and dust with pumpkin pie spice or nutmeg.

name: Pomegranate-Apple Cocktail
directions: Pour ingredients into mixing glass filled with ice.
Shake until cold and pour into chilled glass.
Garnish with a lemon slice.

name: Spice Berry Cocoa
directions: Mix together in warm mug.
Top with whipped cream.
Sprinkle with orange zest.

name: Coconut Martini
directions: Place all ingredients into a cocktail shaker. Strain into a martini glass and serve with the vanilla bean folded into it. (so both ends peek out).

name: Velvet Martini
directions: Add the vodka, chocolate and coffee liqueurs to a shaker with lots of ice.  Shake until very chilled strain and serve.

name: Almond Bar Mocha
directions: Pour ingredients into blender as listed.
Blend for 30 seconds.
Pour into Mont Blanc Kahlua swirled cup.
Top with whipped cream.
Drizzle Mont Blanc Kahlua syrup.
Sprinkle with toasted almonds.

name: Almond Mocha
directions: Pour coffee into mug.
Add syrups and cream and stir.
Top with whipped cream.
Garnish with slivered almonds.

name: Alabama Slammer
directions: Shake & pour over rocks.
Garnish: orange wedge.

name: Almond Mocha Freeze
directions: Blend until smooth and creamy.
Top whipped cream and drizzle with chocolate syrup, sprinkle with toasted almond pieces.

name: Frozen Lemon-Berry Margaritas
directions: Using lime wedges, moisten the rims of six glasses.  Set limes aside for garnish.  Sprinkle coarse sugar on a plate.  Hold each glass upside down and dip rim into sugar.  Set aside.  Discard remaining sugar on plate.

In a blender, combine lemonade concentrate and raspberries; cover and process until smooth.  Press mixture through a fine sieve; discard seeds.  Return raspberry mixture to blender; add ice, strawberries, blueberries, 1 tablespoon sugar and tequila.  Cover and process until smooth.
Pour into prepared glasses.  Garnish with reserved limes.

name: Apple Martinis
directions: Combine water and sugar in a glass measuring cup.  Microwave at HIGH for 2 minutes or until sugar dissolves, stirring once; cool.  Combine sugar mixture, vodka, juice and liqueur ina pitcher; stir to combine.

Place crushed ice in a martini shaker.  Add vodka mixture to the shaker in batches; shake well to chill.  Strain about 1/2 cup vodka mxture in shaker into each of 10 galsses; repeat procedure with remaining vodka mixture, refilling ice as necessary.  Serve immediately.
Yield: 10 martinis of 1/2 cup each.

name: The Hot Dominican
directions: Scald milk and add to chocolate until melted.
Steam Rum or Coffee Liquer and add to hot milk.
Whip heavy cream and pour on top.

name: 7th Heaven
directions: Combine in warm mug.
Top with whipped cream and drizzle with caramel.

name: Kids Orange Julius
directions: In a blender add the ingredients but the last cup of ice and blend for 30 seconds.
