Add the ice and blend on high for another 30 seconds. Then, give it three blasts, just to make sure the ice has really disappeared.
Drink with a straw, preferably the kind that kinks.

name: Stoli Doli
directions: Slice the pineapple into chunks and place into a large container, preferably one with a spigot, such as an ice tea jug.
You may not need all the pineapple, just enough to fill the jug.
Pour the vodka over the pineapple using more if needed to cover pineapple.
Cover, and allow to sit for 3 to 4 days, or longer, to infuse the Vodka with the pineapple juice.
To serve, pour into a shaker filled with crushed ice.
Shake well to chill and pour into martini glasses.

name: Champagne Peach Punch
directions: Chill all ingredients.
In a large punch bowl combine peach nectar, concentrated orange juice, lemon juice, brandy and grenadine.
Mix well and pour in the carbonated water and champagne.

name: Pierced Fuzzy Navel
directions: Pour the peach schnapps, vodka, orange juice into a shaker with ice.
Shake, then strain into a glass.
Top with a splash of grenadine if you like.

name: Mai Tai
directions: Fill a 12 ounce glass with ice cubes.
Pour in rum and amaretto.
Fill remainder of glass with half orange juice and half pineapple juice.
Add a splash of grenadine for color.

name: Casa Marina
directions: In a cocktail shaker full of ice, combine melon liqueur, peach schnapps, coconut rum, white rum, orange juice and cranberry juice.
Shake vigorously for about 60 seconds.
Strain into 2 tall glasses and serve with a twist of lime zest.

name: Almond Joy Cream Soda
directions: Pour syrups and soda into glass.
Add cream and stir.
Top with whipped cream and almonds.

name: Chocolate Covered Almond Mocha
directions: Mix sauce and syrup with hot coffee.
Add milk or cream and stir.
Top with whipped cream and toasted almonds.
Drizzle with chocolate syrup.

name: Apricot Cider
directions: Mix syrup with hot apple cider and stir.
Garnish with a cinnamon stick.

name: Jamaican Coconut Water & White Rum Cocktail
directions: Chill coconut water.
Fill 2 glasses halfway with coconut water.
Top off with rum.

name: Traffic Jam
directions: Muddle the raspberries and the mint. Add Bacardi Silver, Triple Sec and lemon sour.
Shake and strain into a martini shell with a citrus-sugar rim.

name: Pumpkin Spice White Mocha
directions: Add espresso to cup.
Stir in syrup and white chocolate sauce.
Fill with steamed milk and stir.
Top with whipped cream and dust with pumpkin pie spice or nutmeg.

name: Almond Mocha Mudslide
directions: Blend ingredients until smooth.
Drizzle chocolate sauce down the inside rim of the glass in a spiral design.
Fill glass with frozen drink.
Top with fresh whipped cream and chocolate drizzle.

name: Burdick's Famous Hot Cocoa
directions: Heat milk to just below boiling.
Whisk in cocoa powder and ground chocolate, and spices.

name: Ginger Mint Lemonade
directions: Fill glass with ice.
Add lemonade and stir in Flavors.
Garnish with mint leaves and a lemon wheel.

name: Autumn Harvest Coffee
directions: Add syrup and half and half to hot coffee and stir.
Top with whipped cream.
Drizzle caramel syrup on top.

name: Gingered Vegetable Juice
directions: Juice all ingredients in an electric juicer.
Can be diluted with water if desired.

name: Ginger Ale
directions: Bring the ginger and plain water to a boil; then reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and cover.
Let steep an additional 10 minutes.
Strain and add carbonated water and lemon juice just before serving as well as cayenne powder if using.

similar.name: Ginger Ale Ginger Soda Ginger Pop

name: Aspen Steamer
directions: Pour syrup and extract into a preheated mug.
Fill with hot cocoa and stir.
Top with whipped cream.
Garnish with chocolate shavings.

name: Italian Slider
directions: Pour Bailey's into a shot glass.  (I would consider using a cognac glass cause it's hard to fit ice in a shot glass).
Carefully fill with grappa.  (since grappa is 40 % of alcool, I think 1 ounce is enough).
Add some crushed ice.

name: Botanic Beer
directions: Boil the meadowsweet, betony, agrimony and raspberry leaves in the water for 15 minutes.
Strain and add sugar.
When nearly cool, bottle.

name: Cafe Milano
directions: Pour syrups into a preheated mug.
Fill mug with hot coffee.
Top with whipped cream.
Garnish with slivered almonds.

name: Admiralty Cocktail
directions: Shake and strain into an Old Fashioned glass filled with ice.

name: Fuzzy Pirate
directions: Shake over ice, strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Frozen Strawberry Margarita
directions: Fill a blender with ice and crush.
Pour in the tequila and triple sec.
Add the strawberries and limeade.
Blend for 30 seconds or until smooth.
Serve in margarita glasses with the rims dipped in powdered sugar.

similar.name: Strawberry Margarita Using Frozen Strawberries in Syrup

name: Fresh Ginger Tea
directions: Bring 6 cups of water to boil.
Add sliced ginger root, remove from heat, and cover.
Let stand for half an hour, then add a sliced-up lemon and 1 cup sugar.
Stir to dissolve sugar.
Add 2-3 more cups water then pour into ice-filled glasses.

name: Autumn Punch
directions: Combine first 6 ingredients in a saucepan; bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer 10 minutes.
Strain and discard spices.
Chill.
Combine chilled mixture with remaining juices and ginger ale.
Serve over crushed ice.

name: Cider Heaven  (Cider and Rum over Ice)
directions: Fill glass with ice, old fashioned or the sort in my pic; add the cider and then the rum.  Stir, don't shake, sit back and enjoy.
This is GOOD.

name: Appletini
directions: Fill a martini glass with ice and top with water.  This will get the glass chilled before pouring your tini.
Add ice to your shaker.  The more you add, the better chilled the tini will be.
Add the vodka, schnapps and sweet-and-sour.  Cover and shake vigorously for about ten seconds.
Dump the ice and water from the martini glass.  Strain the contents of the shaker into the glass.
Garnish with a cherry, or sliver of granny apple, or lemon twist.

name: Bahama Mama a La Carolina
directions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker filled half-way with cracked ice.
Shake vigorously.
Pour into glass and garnish with citrus slice and a maraschino cherry, if desired.

name: Snake Bite
directions: Pour Hard Cider into frosted glass.
Add Guiness Stout second.
Delicious!

name: German Sunshine
directions: Mix all ingredients and enjoy.

name: Jojo
directions: Pour ingredients over ice in a highball glass.
Stir and serve.

name: Chocolate Egg Cream
directions: Pour milk into a tall glass and stir in syrup.
Add seltzer and enjoy.

name: Full House
directions: Pour the apricot brandy, DeKuyper Peachtree schnapps, Kahlua coffee liqueur and sour mix into a cocktail shaker half-filled with ice cubes.
Shake well, and strain into a 10-12 oz highball glass.
Fill with 7-up. Stir, and serve.

name: Banana Split Cocktail
directions: Add the banana liqueur, Kahlua and half-and-half to a small shaker.
Fill with pineapple juice.
Shake and pour over ice in a cocktail glass.
Garnish with cherries.

name: Monk's Butt
directions: Pour frangelico, butterscotch schnapps, and creme de cacao over ice.
Add milk (or cream) if desired, and stir.
Serve in a collins glass.

name: Vanilla Coke (Alcoholic)
directions: Pour vodka into a cocktail glass.
Top with vanilla coke, diet coke, or Dr. Pepper.
alternate:
mix 1 oz vodka, 8-12 oz coke, Vanilla flavorina to taste.
Add ice cubes and serve.

name: Dunkin Donuts Coffee Coolatta
directions: Brew strong coffee by brewing twice the amount required by your coffee maker - Chill.
Combine all ingredients except ice in blender and blend for 2 minutes on low to blend sugar.
Add ice, blend on high until ice is dissolved and drink is smooth.

name: Coco-Amaretto Juice
directions: Mix all the ingredients in a shaker with ice.
Pour in a highball filled with ice.

name: Vanilla Passion Fruit Mojito
directions: Mash mint sprigs, vanilla and sugar together.
Place in cocktail shaker half filled with ice.
Add rum and passion fruit and lime juice and shake 10 times.
Strain into glass filled with ice.
Garnish with mint.
Serve.

name: Chocolate Martinis
directions: Stir vodka, liquers, and half and half in a large pitcher. Chill at least one hour.
Fill martini glasses with ice.
Let stand 5 minutes; discard ice.
Dip rims of chilled glasses in chocolate liquer; dip in cocoa, coating rims.
Pour vodka mixture into glasses. serve immediately. Cooking time is chilling time.
Individual Chocolate Martini.

Combine 1/4 cup vodka, 2 tablespoons chocolate liquer, 1 1/2 teaspoons raspberry liquer, 6 ice cubes and a dash of 1/2 and 1/2 in a martini shaker. Cover with lid and shake until thoroughly chilled. Remove lid and strain  into chilled martini glass. Serve immediately. Makes 1 serving.

name: Creamsicle Martini
directions: Place first 3 ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice. Cover with lid and shake well till chilled. Dip rim of 1 martini glass in orange liqueur; dip in sugar to coat. Strain the vodka mixture into prepared glass. Serve.
**This recipe was tested with Absolute Vanilla Vodka.

name: Teresa's Dream Shake
directions: In shaker mix Kahlua, Tequila Rose, ice and milk.
Shake and pour into frosted beer mug or maybe in a highball glass with some ice.

name: Pete's V-8 Vegetable Juice
directions: Mash your tomatoes a bit with a potato masher or even just squeeze to make some juice to cook inches.
Simmer all vegetables for 30 minutes or until veggies are soft enough to grind.  (This is why your carrots, peppers, and celery need chopped small - I use the food processor).
Once soft, run though a fine sieve, juicer, or food mill.
Ladle into 1 quart jars leaving 3/4 inch of headspace and add to each quart:
1/2 teaspoon salt.  (optional).
1/2 teaspoon allspice.
1 teaspoon worcestershire (we use 1 tablespoon, but like it salty and bitey).
dash of pepper (optional).
Wipe rims clean, and place lids and rings onto jars.  Process for 30 minutes.

name: Carrie's Pink Blossom
directions: Fill glass with ice.
Mix tequila rose, amaretto and milk.
Can also add a splash of soda to make fizzy.

name: Emerald Jewel Funtini Cocktail
directions: Pour ingredients into a stainless steel shaker over ice,shake until completely cold then pour into a chilled stemmed glass.
Top up with soda water or lemonade if desired.

name: Swedish Tea
directions: In a large saucepan add 1 tablespoon Lipton orange pekoe loose tea to 2 cups of water.
Bring mixture to a low boil,.
Add 1 cup of sugar and the juice of 1 lemon.
Slice lemon pieces and add to mixture.
Stir to help sugar dissolve, then turn the heat to low.
Cover saucepan with a lid and simmer for 20 to 25 minutes. Do not boil.
Strain tea mixture well and add enough water to make 1/2 gallon of tea.
Note:
I usually triple this recipe. I divide the concentrate and refrigerate or freeze two 1/3 portions for later use. I just add water as directed above.

name: Ginger Vanilla Vodka-Tini
directions: In a small saucepan, combine the water, sugar and fresh ginger and bring to a boil.
Cook over moderate heat, stirring just until the sugar is dissolved. Cover and let sit off the heat until cool.
Strain pressing hard on the ginger.  Fill a cocktail shaker with ice and add 2 tablespoons of the syrup and 1/4 cup of the vodka.
Shake vigorously until quite cold and strain into a martini glass. Repeat with the remaining syrup and vodka to make 7 more drinks.

name: Fish in the Blue
directions: Pour absolut ruby red, blue curacao and lemon-lime soda into a chilled highball glass.
Stir to mix.
Garnish with a lime wedge and a whole raspberry.

name: Sweet Ruby Red
directions: Pour vodka, grapefruit juice and grenadine into a shaker with ice.
Shake and strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with a cherry.

name: Lux Cocktail Team
directions: Pour vodka, champagne and syrup into a chilled champagne flute.
Stir to mix and garnish with one whole brown sugar cube and a strawberry.

name: Afternoon Pick Me Up
directions: Mix all ingredients in a portable jug. Keep in cooler or fridge. Shake or stir before serving.

name: Citrus Coolers
directions: In a saucepan, combine 4 cups of the water with the sugar, star anise, ginger and mint.
Bring to a boil. Remove from the heat and let stand for 30 minutes. Strain the syrup and refrigerate.
In a very large pitcher or bowl, stir together the grapefruit, orange and lime juices. Stir in the syrup and the remaining 4 cups of water. Serve over ice.

name: Ruby Red Zinger
directions: Add vodka and cranberry juice to a glass filled with ice.  Top with club soda or sparkling water.  Stir.  Garnish with a slice of grapefruit or lime.

name: Absolut Ruby Red
directions: Put all ingredients into a shaker with ice.
Shake and strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with a grapefruit slice.

name: Hot Buttered Bourbon
directions: Make the nutmeg butter: add all the butter ingredients into a small bowl; stir with a rubber spatula to combine.
Place butter mixture on a sheet of wax paper or plastic wrap; roll it into a log shape about the size of the original stick of butter, twisting the paper together at the ends to smooth out the log.
Chill in the freezer for about 30 minutes, until firm but not frozen hard (slice into ¼-inch rounds to use in buttered drinks).
Make the hot drink: in a small saucepan, combine the cider, cinnamon, allspice, cloves, and ginger; put over low heat.
Cook at a simmer for 5 minutes.
Stir in the bourbon and bring back to a simmer, immediately remove from heat.
Pour into 2 warmed mugs; top each with a slice of nutmeg butter.

name: Blood Orange Margarita
directions: Add the first 5 ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice; shake vigorously.
Strain into a chilled margarita glass filled with ice cubes.
To serve a frozen version—combine the first 5 ingredients with ¾ cup crushed ice in a blender; blend until smooth; pour into a margarita glass.
Garnish with a blood orange wedge.

name: Amalfi Dream
directions: Combine all ingredients in a cocktail shaker with the ice, shake, strain into a martini glass, garnish with mint and lemon.

name: Limoncello Collins
directions: Press 3 lemon slices each to the insides of 8 collins or pilsner glasses.
Fill a pitcher two-thirds with ice. Add the limincello, gin and lemon juice and stir well.
Add the club soda and stir again. Carefully pour into the prepared classes and garnish each with a mint sprig.

name: James Bond Cocktail
directions: Saturate a sugar cube or teaspoon of sugar in a champagne flute with angostura bitters.
Add vodka, fill with champagne, and serve.

name: James Bond Martini
directions: Pour the gin, vodka and Lillet blanc into a cocktail shaker half-filled with cracked ice.
Shake well, and strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with a twist of lemon, and serve.

name: 007 Cocktail
directions: Mix in tall glass preferrably, over ice. Wince, shudder, repeat. Enjoy. CHEERS!

name: Goldfinger Martini
directions: Mix together with crushed ice in a glass and garnish with mint leaves.

name: Octapussy Cocktail
directions: Mix together with crushed ice in a glass and garnish with mint leaves.

name: Mango Cosmopolitan
directions: Mix all ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Strain into a chilled martini glass and garnish with lemon peel.

name: Long Lady Tea
directions: Fill a highball glass with crushed ice.
Pour all ingredients into a mixing glass with ice and stir.
Strain into highball glass.

name: Midori Margarita
directions: Add all the ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ¾ cup ice; shake vigorously.
Pour into a chilled glass.
For a frozen version: add ingredients to a blender with ¾ Celsius ice; blend until smooth; pour into a chilled glass.

name: Midnight Potion (Aka Pure H. E . Double Hocky Sticks)
directions: Fill a pint glass half full of ice (I usually use a plastic Mardi Gras cup).
Add your everclear or 100 proof vodka, the blavod vodka and the grape juice.
Stir with cocktail spoon and lightly shake in a shaker and serve.

name: New England Polar Bear
directions: Place brown sugar, butter, cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves in food processor. Scrape in seeds from vanilla bean. Process until blended. DO AHEAD Butter mixture can be made 1 week ahead. Wrap in plastic and chill.
Bring 4 cups water to boil in large saucepan. Add rum, brandy, and butter mixture; stir until butter melts. Ladle into mugs and garnish with cinnamon sticks.

name: Meukow Vanilla Venus
directions: In a shaker with ice, add Meukow VS Vanilla (Cognac), pineapple juice or puree, grenadine.  Shake until it's very cold.
Strain into a long drink glass.
Garnish with fruit.

name: Blueberry Iced Tea
directions: Blend all ingredients in blender until combined.
Serve over ice in tall glasses with a lemon slice garnish.

name: Rhino
directions: Layer ingredients, in order, into a shot glass.
Ignite, burn for a few seconds, and extinguish.
Serve.

name: Arkansas Avalanche
directions: Pour Goldschlager, Sprite and grenadine into a cocktail shaker half-filled with ice cubes. Shake well, strain into a highball glass, and serve.

name: Sake and Pear Oolong Tea
directions: In a small saucepan, combine the juice and tea leaves.
Put over low heat and bring to a boil.
Remove from heat; cover pan and let steep for 3 minutes.
Add in the sake and bring to just below a simmer—do not boil.
Strain into 2 warmed teacups; serve immediately.

name: Peach Margarita
directions: **Coat the rim of the cocktail glass with coarse sugar, if desired.
Add the remaining ingredients to a blender with ¾ cup ice.
Blend until smooth; pour into rimmed glass.

name: Mel's Ice Tea
directions: Bring 7 cups of water up to boil.
Place tea bags in the hot water.
Let steep til warm to touch or cool.
Mix sugar with the cool/warm tea.
Mix in the other 7 cups of water.
Enjoy.

Note:  DO NOT MIX THE COLD WATER WITH THE HOT WATER, IT WILL SHOCK THE TEA AND MAKE IT CLOUDY. If you need to cool it down quickly, put the hot pan in some cool water about half way up and check in about 5 minutes.  If still too hot, repeat.

name: Bossanova
directions: Pour all the ingredients in a shaker with ice.
Shake and strain in a highball filled with ice.
Garnish with quarters of lime, sliced and serve with long straws.

name: Cranberry Mojitos
directions: Using a wooden spoon, mash mint with sugar in bottom of large pitcher.
Add rum and lime juice; stir to dissolve sugar.
Mix in thawed cranberry juice concentrate and water.
Mix in 6 cups ice.

name: Triple Berry Margaritas
directions: Puree blackberries, raspberries, and lime juice in blender until smooth.
Strain through fine mesh strainer into large measuring cup.
Add sugar; stir until dissolved.
Refrigerate berry puree at least 1 hour and up to 1 day.
Mix tequila and Grand Marnier into berry puree.
Transfer half of mixture to blender; add half of frozen strawberries and 2 1/2 cups ice.
Blend until smooth.
Transfer to pitcher.
Repeat with remaining berry puree, frozen strawberries, and ice.
Pour into sugar-rimmed Margarita glasses and serve.
**Prep time does not include refrigerating the berry puree at least an hour and up to one day.

name: Caribbean Margarita
directions: Add the first 4 ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ¾ cup ice; shake vigorously.
Pour into a chilled cocktail glass.
For frozen version: add first 4 ingredients to a blender with ¾ cup ice; blend until smooth; pour into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with a lime wedge and cherry.

name: Sour Sprite
directions: Mix the Sprite and lemon juice together.
Enjoy this sour beverage.

name: Boys are Stupid
directions: Layer all ingredients in martini glass.
stir.

name: Blood of Christ Shot / Shooter
directions: Shake with ice.
Strain into shot glass.

name: The Gardener
directions: Rinse the glass with dry vermouth, discarding the leftover vermouth.
Fill a cocktail shaker ¾ full with ice.
Add in vodka, rosemary, lemon peel, and lemonade; shake vigorously to infuse and chill.
Strain into a chilled glass; garnish with lemon peel or sprig of rosemary.

name: Margarita Con Cerveza
directions: Mix all except the salt in a pitcher.  Make sure the concentrate is mixed in completely.
Slide a lime around your margarita glass and dip in the coarse salt.
Fill glass to below salt line.
Hide the car keys and enjoy!

name: Pineapple Agua Fresca
directions: Place pineapple, lime juice, mint, and sugar in blender.  Blend on HIGH until mixture is frothy, about 30sec. to 1min.
Pour into a tall pitcher.  Add club soda and stir once or twice to mix.  Immediately pour into sugar-dipped, ice-filled glasses.  Garnish each serving with a mint sprig.

name: Kahluaccino
directions: Combine milk and coffee in a blender. Add Kahlua (or Frangelico), ice and sugar. Puree until frothy. Divide among 4 glasses and garnish with shaved chocolate.
Non-alcoholic variation: Omit the alcohol and add 1/4 teaspoon almond extract.

name: Xanthia
directions: Chill a glass with ice or in the freezer.
Mix all ingredients in a shaker with ice.
Strain the drink into the glass and serve!

name: X-Ray
directions: Chill a shot glass with ice or in the freezer.
Empty the shot glass from ice and water.
Pour absolut kurant and passionfruit juice into the shot glass.
Garnish with a whole black currant.

name: X-Rated
directions: Fill a cocktail glass to the rim with crushed ice.
Pour absolut vodka, grapefruit juice and white cacao liqueur into a shaker.
Fill the shaker with ice cubes and shake it until the shaker is very cold.
Strain the drink into two cocktail glasses.

similar.name: Under the Table and Dreaming --- Alcoholic

name: Garlic Basil Vodka
directions: Separate the garlic into cloves and remove the skins.
Rinse the basil to remove any unwanted chemicals.
There is no need to chop or remove the stems.
Place the garlic & basil into clean quart-sized jar.
Fill with vodka. Secure the lid and shake well.
Store jar in a cool dark place for at least 4 days.
Strain through a coffee filter into a separate container.
Store as you would any other vodka.

name: Black Lady
directions: Shake ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Simple Strawberry Swirl
directions: Place milk, frozen strawberries and strawberry instant breakfast in blender.
Cover and blend until smooth.

similar.name: Strawberry Margarita Using Frozen Strawberries in Syrup

name: Katie's Sweet Tea
directions: Place tea bags and 5 cups of cold water in a saucepan.Turn burner on high.When tea comes to a boil let boil one minute.
Turn off burner and let saucepan sit (or steep) for 20 minutes.
Place one cup of sugar in a gallon tea pitcher.
Add the tea/water and stir with a long wooden spoon.
Continue filling pitcher with fresh cold water from the tap or spring, until you have one gallon.
Place in the refrigerator until chilled. Pour a big glass of tea, and add a lemon slice,if desired.Enjoy!

similar.name: Perfect Sweet Tea (Secret of the South)

name: Orange Basil Mojito
directions: In a pint shaker, muddle the basil leaves, simple syrup, and lime juice.
Add in the rum and orange juice; stir to blend.
Pour into a glass filled with ice; stir.
Top off with soda water; garnish with basil leaf.

name: Classic Tom Collins
directions: Fill a shaker half way with ice cubes.
Add gin, lemon juice and sugar, shake well.
Strain mix into a collins glass that is almost filled to the top with ice cubes and add the club soda. Stir well and garnish with the cherry and orange slice.

name: Limon Delight
directions: Using a whiskey sour glass, fill with ice.
Add one shot of the Bacardi Limon than fill the glass with Sunny Delight and serve.

name: Just Like Cream Soda
directions: Fill glass with ice.
Add Bacardi Silver.
Fill with Dr.Pepper.
Mix, and enjoy!

name: Patriot Shooter
directions: Pour grenadine into a shot glass.
Slowly pour in blue Curacao to create a blue layer.
Then slowly add vodka to create clear top layer.
Serve.

name: Cafe Savoy
directions: Pour coffee into large mug.
Add milk then Grand Marnier and then brandy.
Stir.

name: Monte Cristo (Cocktail)
directions: Pour coffee into large mug.
Add alcohols.
Stir.
Top with whipped cream.

name: Hot Raspberry Rum Toddy
directions: Boil water.
While water is boiling put cloves, cinnamon stick, tea bag, rum, sugar, and lemon juice in your favorite mug.
Fill mug with boiling water, serve and Enjoy!

name: Sweating Colombian
directions: Shake vodka, Kahlua and Goldschlager with ice in a cocktail shaker.
Strain into a highball glass, fill with light cream, and serve.

name: Ww 1.5 Points - Skinny B*tch
directions: Mix liquor and diet coke.
Squeeze lime juice in to drink.
Mix well and enjoy.

similar.name: Sneak up on You Planter's Punch

name: Vanilla Coffee Drink (Vegan)
directions: Boil some filtered water and add to an 8 oz. mug.  Add 1 teaspoons of the Cafix instant beverage crystals and 1/4 teaspoons vanilla extract.
Mix in some creamer and agave nectar to taste and enjoy.
Bon Appetit!

name: Melontini
directions: In a blender puree the honeydew melon.
Pour into ice cube trays and freeze, about 3 hours.
In a pitcher combine lemon soda, club soda, and melon liqueur.
Drop a frozen melon cube into a martini glass and top with 2 tablespoons (1-ounce) vodka per drink.
Garnish with skewered melon balls.

name: Academy Cocktail
directions: Combine vodka, orange liqueur, cranberry juice, and lime juice in a pitcher.
Stir well and pour into 2 merlot glasses filled with ice.
Score an orange from top to bottom in 1/4-inch slices.
Peel off and twist to make a garnish.
Garnish drink with orange twist and serve.

name: Berry Breeze
directions: Combine all ingredients and serve on ice.

name: Adios Amigos
directions: Shake all ingredients together with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Strawberry Lemonade
directions: Puree strawberries.
Combine sugar and water.
Heat until sugar dissolves.
Mix with puree and lemon juice.
Serve chilled.

name: El Dorado
directions: Shake all ingredients together with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Garnish with grated chocolate.

name: Mint Julep Hot Chocolate
directions: Heat half-and-half in a medium saucepan over medium heat until you begin to see bubbles around the edges.
Decrease heat; add in the peppermint patties, and whisk until melted and smooth.
Whisk in the arrowroot and let mixture cook and thicken for a few minutes.
Remove pan from heat; stir in the bourbon.
Pour mixture into mugs; garnish with mint sprigs; serve immediately.

name: Strawberry Lemonade II
directions: Process the strawberries and sugar in a food processor until smooth.
I a large pitcher, combine the strawberry puree, water, and lemon juice; stir to blend.
Chill until very cold; then serve over ice.

name: Apple and Spice Tea Mix
directions: Combine all ingredients in a small jar.
Seal Jar.
To make Tea: add two teaspoons of tea mix to a cup of boiling water.
Let steep for 5 minutes, strain and sweeten to taste.

name: Pacific Blue
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass with a sugared rim.
Garnish with a cherry.

name: Traffic Light Cooler
directions: Fill a pilsner glass with ice cubes.
First pour the midori, then the tequila to create a green layer.
Add sour mix.
Slowly pour orange juice against the side of the glass to create a yellow layer.
Carefully float the sloe gin on top for the red layer.
Garnish with a cherry and lemon and lime wheels.

name: La Bomba
directions: Shake all ingredients except grenadine with ice three times only (to keep pineapple juice from frothing).
Strain into a sugar rimmed cocktail glass.
Add grenadine and garnish with a lime wheel.

name: Big Red Hooter
directions: Fill a Collins glass with ice.
Pour in tequila and amaretto.
Fill with pineapple juice, and top with grenadine.
Garnish with a cherry.

name: Purple Pancho
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a salt rimmed margarita glass.
Garnish with a lime wedge.

name: Caramel Apple Martini
directions: If making several of these martinis, melt 10-15 caramels in a double boiler over low heat; stirring constantly; once melted, turn off the heat and set aside.
To a cocktail shaker filled with ice, add the apple juice, vodka, apple liqueur, and butterscotch schnapps; shake vigorously.
Strain into a chilled martini glass.
Dip one end of an apple slice in melted caramel and use it to garnish the edge of the glass.

name: Sangritini
directions: Mash together the fruit slices with the vodka and cointreau in a cocktail shaker.
Add in the merlot, pineapple juice, and ice; shake vigorously.
Strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with a cherry and an orange wheel.

name: P. F. Chang's Poolside
directions: Pou ingredients over ice and stir.  Add garnish.

name: Easy Strawberry Limeaide
directions: In blender mix limeaide and strawberries till smooth.
Pour into 2 QT pitcher and fill with water.
May also try gingerale or soda water.

name: Honeymoon Suitetini
directions: Pour all the liquid ingredients into a shaker tin of ice.
Shake, and strain into a martini glass.
Unwrap the two chocolate kisses and drop into the martini.

name: Upside-Down Pineapple Martini
directions: Pour the first four ingredients into a shaker of ice.
Shake then strain into a martini glass.
Drop in a cherry, and you've made an Upside-Down Pineapple Martini without even turning on the oven!

name: Tootsie Rolltini
directions: Pour all the ingredients into a shaker tin of ice.
Shake, then strain into a martini glass.

name: Snowball Fight
directions: Fill a tall glass with crushed ice.
Add the vanilla vodka, vanilla, sugar or Splenda, and fill with half and half or milk.
Add more sugar to taste, then garnish with cinnamon.

name: Buttermilk Substitution
directions: Add cream of tartar or lemon juice to the milk.
Stir and allow it to stand at room temperature for about 15 minutes.
When milk starts to curdle, stir well.
Buttermilk is ready to serve.

name: Rum Punch
directions: Combine rums, peach schnapps, triple sec and Rose's lime juice in a pitcher. Pour pineapple juice in a separate pitcher.
To serve, stir the pineapple juice into the rum mixture until combined.
Fill cocktail shaker with ice, add approximately 1 cup of the rum mixture and shake vigorously.
Pour into an ice-filled glass. Garnish with cherry and pineapple wedge.

name: Cranberry Limeade
directions: Heat 1 cup of sugar and 1 cup of water in a small saucepan; bring to a boil so that the sugar is completely dissolved, and remove from heat.
If you want an added zing to your limeade, zest a couple of the limes before juicing and add the zest to the sugar water while it's heating.
Once the syrup has cooled, strain out the zest with a fine mesh strainer before using.
While your simple syrup is cooling, juice the limes.
Add lime juice, cranberry juice, 1 1/2 cups of cold water, the simple syrup, and a few ice cubes to a serving pitcher.
Depending on when and how the limeade is to be served, and how strong you want it, you can add more ice and water.
For example, if you want to serve it right away, and it is still a bit warm from the hot simple syrup, add lots of ice.
If it has had a chance to cool down and chill in the refrigerator, but is still too strong, add a bit more water until the strength is to your preference.
If the cranberry limeade is too sweet for your taste, add some more lime juice and water until you reach your desired level of sweetness, and use less sugar the next time you make it.

name: Frappuccino
directions: Boil the above ingredients until sugar is dissolved.  You may use microwave.
Pour into 1/2 gallon of cold whole milk.  Refrigerate.  Shake before you pour into your cup.
Add 1 T. of chocolate or 1 T. of vanilla ice cream to your cup.  You may add 1 T. of each flavor ice cream if you like.

name: Celtic Six
directions: Mix all ingredients except lemonade in a shaker with ice.
Mix well and pour in a sling glass filled with ice.
Add lemonade and garnish with melon slices, lime slices and a cherry.

name: Happy Hawai'ian
directions: Pour the Kahlua coffee liqueur and Bailey's irish cream into a glass.
Fill with pineapple juice, or add to taste, and serve.

name: Pomegranate Chipotle Margarita
directions: Blend pomegranate juice, tequila, triple sec, lime juice, and chipotle paste or adobo sauce with ice to desired consistency, or serve on the rocks.

name: Hotel Principe Di Savoia Martini
directions: Shake in a Martini shaker.
Pour into a cocktail glass and garnish with a twist of orange.

similar.name: Bombay Blue Sapphire  Martini- Sunday Mart Marts

name: Ginger Lemonade
directions: Lightly crush 3 slices of ginger, then add Ketel One Vodka, lemon juice, sugar syrup and shake with ice.
Strain into a long glass and top with soda, garnishing with a lemon wedge and a ginger slice.

name: Basil Berry Martini
directions: Muddle 2 fresh strawberries, 3 basil leaves, Fraise liquor and vodka.
Shake with ice and strain into a martini glass, garnishing with a fresh basil leaf.

name: Pear and Lime Martini
directions: Add all ingredients to a shaker with ice.
Shake and strain into a martini glass.

name: Lime and Elderflower Martini
directions: Add all ingredients to a shaker with ice.
Shake and strain into a martini glass.

name: A Berry Lime Martini
directions: Add all ingredients to a shaker with ice.
Shake and strain into a martini glass.

name: Apple & Cinnamon Martini
directions: Pour all the ingredients into a cocktail shaker.
Mix and serve in a Martini glass.
If you want to be really fancy, garnish with an apple fan and cinnamon bark.

name: Minted Mai Tai
directions: Stir lime juice, syrup and chopped mint leaves in heavy small saucepan over medium heat just until the mixture simmers.  Cool.
Strain syrup into pitcher.
Add pineapple juice, orange juice and rum; stir to blend.
Fill 6 tall glasses with ice.
Pour mixture over.
Garnish mai tais with fresh mint sprigs.

name: Chambord Walk
directions: Shake first two ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled rocks.
glass.
Top with a splash of soda and garnish with a lemon wedge.

name: Victory's Kicked up Tomato Juice Cocktail
directions: add all ingredients in a pitcher stir very well then chill it enjoy.

name: Tropical Rum Punch
directions: In a shaker, combine all liquids with some ice.  Shake until the shaker is cold to the touch.
Fill two tall glasses with ice and pour the mixture, evenly, into the glasses.
Garnish with popsicles and enjoy!

name: Rubytini
directions: Combine ingredients, except garnish, in a cocktail shaker with ice. Strain into a sugar-rimmed martini glass. Garnish with a slice of grapefruit garnish dipped in sugar.

name: The Good, the Bad, the Ugly, Cocktail
directions: Pour the kahlua and bailey's irish cream into a glass. Fill most of the glass with milk, leaving enough room for the goldschlager.
Float the goldschlager using the back of a spoon.

name: Midnight Manx (Nightcap)
directions: Fill a mixer with ice and add baileys, kahlua, goldshlager, and cream.
Shake for 5 seconds and strain into an ice-filled double rocks glass.
Add chilled coffee, stir and serve.

name: Green Dragon Cocktail
directions: Mix and pour into champagne flute.
Serve with a green maraschino cherry as a garnish.

similar.name: Brian's Green Apple Sweet Tart Cocktail

name: French Green Dragon
directions: Pour over ice.
Shake well.
Strain and Serve.

name: Bronze Dragon
directions: Shake with ice.
Strain into glass.

name: White Dragon
directions: Pour liquors over ice.
Shake, strain and pour into glass.
Top with half and half serve.

name: Flaming Green Dragon
directions: Mix.
Light, letting flames warm drink (about 20 seconds).
Blow out flames.
Swallow quickly - take care not to burn yourself.

name: Golden Dragon
directions: Pour liquors into highball glass.
Add cider, stir, and serve.

name: Black Dragon
directions: Layer drinks in glass in order listed.

name: Pimm's No. 1 Cup Cocktail
directions: Fill four 8- to 10-ounce highball glasses with ice cubes.
Divide the fruit slices among the glasses.
Pour 1/2 cup of lemonade and 3 tablespoons of Pimm's into each glass.
Garnish with the mint and serve.

name: Hot Chai Tea With Almonds on the Side
directions: Heat 4 fluid ounces (1/2 cup) of water to boiling in a saucepan on the stove top.
Add tea bag; reduce heat and simmer for 2 minutes. Remove tea bag.
Stir milk, honey and spices into tea. Heat to boiling again.
Stir with wire whisk to foam the milk.
Pour into cups and serve immediately with almonds.

name: Silver Dragon
directions: Pour liquors over ice.
Shake, strain and serve.

name: Fifth Avenue
directions: Pour the creme de cacao into a liqueur glass.
Float the apricot brandy over a barspoon on top.
Finally, float the cream over the drink.

name: French Chartreuse Dragon
directions: Pour over ice.
Shake well.
Strain and Serve.

name: Flaming Angry Dragon
directions: Mix together the vodka and Hqnotiq liqueur in a double-shot glass.
Layer grenadine over the mixture and the Bailey's over that.
Add a splash of Everclear over that and light the shot on fire.
Extinguish, and serve.

name: Serious Hot Chocolate
directions: Place a double boiler over medium heat (simmering water in the bottom part; what you are going to melt goes in the top part).
To the top pan, add the 2 cocoa powders and sugar; whisk until the sugar is melted and combined with the cocoa; beat in the butter, creaming with the sugar.
Add a little of the milk; then add in the 3 chopped chocolates, whisking as they melt.
Slowly adding the remaining milk; whisk until the mixture is smooth, creamy, and hot.
Pour into 2-3 mugs; serve topped with whipped cream and grated chocolate.

name: White Peach Martini
directions: To make peach puree, add peaches and simple syrup to a blender; blend together until smooth (taste and add more simple syrup if not sweet enough).
To a cocktail shaker filled with ice, add 2 ounces peach puree, vodka, peach schnapps, and lemon juice.
Shake moderately; strain into a chilled martini glass.

name: Caribbean Martini
directions: To a cocktail shaker filled with ice, add pineapple juice, coconut rum, vanilla vodka, and grenadine; shake vigorously.
Strain into a chilled martini glass; garnish with an orange wedge.

name: Fuzzy Peach Lemonade
directions: Add peaches and sugar to a food processor; pulse until well blended, then process until smooth.
Add in water; pulse to combine.
Strain the peach mixture through a fine-mesh strainer into a 1 ½ quart container, pressing on the solids to extract as much juice as possible.
Add the lemon juice and stir to combine.
Add in the peach schnapps; stir again.
Chill until very cold; serve over ice; garnish with peach slices.

name: Homemade Balloon Wine
directions: Combine the yeast, sugar and juice concentrate in a sterile gallon jug.  Fill the jug the rest of the way with cold water.  Shake jug to mix ingredients.
Rinse out a balloon, and fit it over the opening of the jug.  Poke one small needle hole in balloon.  Secure the balloon with a rubber band.

Place jug in a cool dark place.  Within a day you will notice the balloon starting to expand.  As the sugar turns to alcohol, the gasses released will fill up the balloon.  When the balloon is deflated back to size; the wine is ready to drink. It takes about 6 weeks.
Be sure to siphon off the top and/or strain through a coffee filter.  You DO NOT want to drink the residue in the bottom of the gallon jug.
This wine is great for cooking as well as drinking.  We tried grape juice concentrate, but the original recipe preferred the red.

name: Out of This World - Mai Tai (Pineapple Version)
directions: Pour all the ingredients except the dark rum into a shaker with ice cubes.
Shake well.
Strain into an old-fashioned glass half filled with ice.
Top with the dark rum.
Garnish with the cherry.

similar.name: Out of This World - Mai Tai

name: Out of This World - Mai Tai
directions: Pour all the ingredients except the dark rum into a shaker with ice cubes.
Shake well.
Strain into an old-fashioned glass half filled with ice.
Top with the dark rum.
Garnish with the cherry.

similar.name: Out of This World - Mai Tai (Pineapple Version)

name: Baileys Mocha
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large mug.
Add a splash of milk for extra creaminess.
Sip and enjoy in front of a fireplace!

similar.name: Hot Bailey's Irish Cream Chocolate Drink

name: Beverly Hills Iced Tea
directions: Fill a highball glass with ice cubes.
To a cocktail shaker, add vodka, rum, gin, tequila, triple sec, lemon juice, and simple syrup; shake mixture vigorously for 5-10 seconds.
Pour mixture into the glass.
Add sparkling white wine to the glass; garnish with a lemon wedge; stir and enjoy.

name: Tainted Heart Shot
directions: Fill shot glasses half full with Aftershock. Tip glass to the side and slowly pour chocolate liqueur down the side. This is a layered shot.

name: Nagle Shot
directions: Pour Southern Comfort and Goldshlager in equal parts into a shot glass. Add a splash of lime juice, and serve.

name: Just Like Starbucks Caramel Macchiato Copycat
directions: Steam the milk (or heat it up in the microwave without scalding and don't care about foam). Prepare espresso. Add about 2 ounces of vanilla syrup to a cup, add hot milk, add espresso, top with milk foam if you have it, and top with caramel*.
Enjoy!
*The kind in the squeeze bottle that is also used to top ice cream works well.

name: Lemon Top
directions: Slowly pour the ale into a chilled beer mug.
Top up with the soda.

name: Spiced Buttermilk (Chaas)
directions: Place all ingredients except curd into a blender. Blend well.
Add the curds to the mixture and blend enough for it to get well mixed, but not so much as to make the mixture very frothy (unles you want it to!).
Serve chilled in glasses or over rice (though you might want to make it thicker to use with rice).

name: Amaretto Cocktails
directions: In a pitcher, combine amaretto and rum; add club soda to taste.
Serve over ice garnished with a cherry.

name: Iced Pumpkin Latte
directions: Mix all ingredients until sugar is disolved.
Pour over ice cubes and enjoy.

name: Coppertone (Rum & Coke  . . . Sort Of)
directions: Pour 1 part rum into glass with ice.
Add 3 parts Cherry Coke.
Squeeze the Lime and drop into as garnish.

similar.name: Cuba Libre (Better Known As Rum & Coke)

name: Cuba Libre (Better Known As Rum & Coke)
directions: Pour 1 part rum into glass with ice.
Add 3 parts Coke.
Squeeze the Lime and drop into as garnish.

name: Campechana (Rum)
directions: Pour rum into glass with ice.
Add club soda and Coke.
Squeeze the Lime and drop into glass as garnish.

similar.name: Cuba Libre (Better Known As Rum & Coke)

name: Cranberry Margaritas for a Crowd
directions: Make the Margarita Base:  Combine all ingredients (except ice) and blend in blender until smooth.  Transfer to a large glass measuring cup.  Can be made ahead.  Store in refrigerator.

To mix the final drink:  Pour half of the margarita base into blender.  Add 3 1/2 cups ice cubes.  Blend until mixture is slushy; pour into salt-rimmer margarita glasses.  Garnish with cranberries.  Repeat with remaining margarita base and remaining ice.

name: Zombie
directions: Fill a highball or hurricane glass with ice cubes.
Add the rums, Grand Marnier, orange juice, pineapple juice, and grenadine to a cocktail shaker.
Shake vigorously for 5-10 seconds.
Pour the mixture into the glass; garnish with a pineapple flag.

name: Woman Warrior Martini
directions: Add ice to cocktail shaker.
Pour in vodka, Blue Curaco and lime juice.
Shake.
Strain into chilled martini glass.
Garnish and serve.

name: Hypnotiq Chill
directions: Serve in a cordial glass (rocks glass) with lots of ice.

name: Chocolate Hurricane Cocktail
directions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker half-filled with ice cubes. Shake well, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

name: Jaffa Schnapps
directions: Line the rim of a cocktail glass with sugar syrup and shaved chocolate.
Pour the ingredients into a cocktail shaker half-filled with ice cubes.
Shake and strain into the rimmed glass. Garnish with orange sprinkles and serve.

name: Butterfinger
directions: Add the first 3 ingredients to a cocktail shaker full of ice; shake vigorously.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Float the chocolate syrup on top.

name: Strawberry Martini
directions: muddle strawberries to a pulp in cocktail shaker.
add vodka.
add syrup.
fill shaker with ice.
shake ten times.
pour through wire strainer into prepared cocktail glass.

name: Butter Cream
directions: In a cocktail glass, combine buttershots with irish cream.
Add milk.
Add crushed ice.

name: Frothy Orange Soda
directions: Place orange juice and ice cream in a blender.
Cover and process until smooth.
Stir in soda.
Pour into glasses.

name: Fuzzy Melon Cocktail
directions: Shake and strain into a highball glass.

name: Blushing Lady
directions: Rub the lemon wedge around the rim of a martini glass.  Dip the glass in a coarse sugar to rim.
Pour the remaining ingredients into a cocktail shaker with ice.
Shake and strain into glass.

name: Pomegranate Margarita
directions: Shake all ingredients.
Pour into an ice filled margarita glass.
Garnish with a lime wheel.

name: Disaronna Amaretto
directions: Combine very hot water with sugars in a medium glass pitcher or bowl.
Stir until the sugars are dissolved.
Add corn syrup and stir well.
Add vodka and flavorings and stir.
Store in airtight containers.

name: Honey-Rum Coffee
directions: In a Dutch oven, combine evaporated milk and honey.
Stirring occasionally, cook over med-high heat until milk is warm but not boiling.
Add coffee; stir until well blended.
Remove from heat.
Stir in rum.
Serve hot.

name: Cinnamon Caramel Apple for Adults
directions: Pour the shot of Goldschlager in a cocktail glass, fill with 1/2 glass of the chilled apple cider,  add 1 shot of caramel liqueur. Stir to mix.

name: Coco Blossom
directions: Shake all ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Strain into a parfait glass.
You can also add ice or a splash of soda to make fizzy.

name: Lemon Froth
directions: Combine all ingredients except lemon twist in a cocktail shaker and shake vigorously until well blended.
Pour into chilled martini glasses and garnish with lemon twists.

name: Alabama Slammer
directions: Pour all ingredients into a shaker filled with ice.
Cover, shake, and strain into a 8 oz. rocks glass.

name: Caramel Bud
directions: Add butterscotch schnapps, chocolate liqueur, creme de cacao, cream to a shaker half filled with ice.
Shake vigorously and strain in an iced cocktail glass.
Garnish with grated chocolate.

name: Stinger
directions: In a shot glass, pour the cognac and then the white creme de menthe.
If you prefer, you can shake it in a shaker with ice to have it colder.  Then you pour in a shot glass.

name: Mind Erasers
directions: In a juice glass add Kahlua to the bottom, fill glass with ice to the top, very carefully add vodka next, do not mix. Finally top with a splash of 7-up.
Slide straw along side of glass, and drink quickly. Do not mix, this is to be a shot, not a mixed drink. It resembles a glass of watered down Coke or Pepsi.

name: Nectar Chocolate-Orange
directions: Put chocolate liqueur, kahlua, Grand Marnier, cream in a shaker half filled with ice.
Shake vigorously and strain in an iced cocktail glass.
When ready to serve, sprinkle with grated chocolate.

name: Maharaja Exotic Drink
directions: Crush the cardamom pods and mash them with sugar syrup in a shaker.
Add ice, vodka and creme de cacao.
Shake vigorously and strain in an iced cocktail glass.  Garnish with mint.

name: Pretty in Pink
directions: Pour all ingredients into a shaker with ice. Shake.
Strain into a pretty glass and enjoy!

name: Smoky Martini
directions: Combine the gin, vermouth, and liquid smoke in a shaker with the ice and stir (do not shake) to mix.
Strain the drink into a martini glass.
Twist the lemon, shiny side down, over the martini, then drop it into the drink.
Serve immediately.

name: Cinnamon Cream Cocktail
directions: Combine ingredients in a glass.

name: Cafe Bahia
directions: In a small saucepan, heat coffee, chocolate syrup, brandy and coffee liqueur and nutmeg.
While coffee mixture is heating, whip cream until stiff. Fold in orange liqueur.
Pour hot coffee mixture into 4 mugs or heatproof glasses.
Top with whipped cream and grated chocolate.

name: Hot Cranberry Toddy
directions: Combine cranberry juice, sugar, lemon juice, and water in a 4-quart saucepan or Dutch oven.

For spice bag, tie lemon peel, cinnamon, and cloves in a 6-inch square of 100 percent cotton cheesecloth. Add spice bag to saucepan. Bring just to boiling; reduce heat. Simmer, covered, for 10 minutes. Discard spice bag. Add bourbon, rum, or orange juice.
Transfer to a heatproof serving carafe or pot. Serve with a lemon peel strip in each cup, if desired. Makes about 12 (6-ounce) servings.

name: Minty Orange Shooter
directions: Pour peppermint, triple sec, and oj in a shooter glass, finish with Kalhua for a neat layering effect. Enjoy!

name: The Aloha --- Alcoholic
directions: In a tall glass pour vodka and juice over crushed ice. Top with ginger ale (about 3 tablespoons per drink).
*If you cannot find peach vodka, sub 1 1/2 oz vodka and 1/2 oz peach schnapps.
Garnish with pineapple wedge.

name: Under the Table and Dreaming --- Alcoholic
directions: Pour liquor over ice and top with grapefruit juice. Stir well.

name: X-Rated Sunrise
directions: Shake.
Serve in highball with lots of ice and garnished with orange slice.

name: X Boyfriend
directions: Shake with lost of ice.  Serve in highball glass.

name: X-Rated Flirtini
directions: Shake, serve in martini glass.

name: Shot-O-Happiness
directions: Combine Goldschlager, raspberry liqueur splash of pineapple juice, splash of sweet-n-sour with ice in a shaker tin.
Shake and strain into a shot glass. Add a splash of lemonade.

name: Pumpkin Pie Martini
directions: Fill cocktail shakes 1/2 way with ice cubes.
Add the vodka, creme de cacao, heavy cream and pumpkin pie spice, and shake well.
Dip the rims of martini glasses into a bowl of whipped cream.  Strain the cocktail into glasses.

name: South Beach Chilly Chocolate
directions: In a medium bowl, stir together cocoa powder, sugar substitute, and salt.
Slowly pour in 1 cup of the milk and whisk until smooth. Whisk in remaining 2 cups milk and vanilla.
Fill 4 (8-ounce) glasses with ice. Pour Chilly Chocolate over ice and serve.

name: Bottlecap Cocktail
directions: Combine ingredients & serve on the rocks.

name: Dog Biscuit Cocktail
directions: Pour all ingredients on the rocks. Stir.

name: Full Moon
directions: Add rum, kahlua, sugar in a highball glass half filled with ice.  Stir.
When sugar is dissolve, add spices and complete with cold espresso.
Slowly pour the heavy cream on the back of a spoon.

name: Chinese Dragon
directions: Shake Midori and Curacao in a shaker with ice.
Pour grenadine into the bottom of a rocks glass.
Very carefully add a dash of club soda, being careful to not upset the grenadine.
Carefully add the Midori and Curacao, again, making sure not to upset the grenadine.

name: Cranberry Hugs
directions: Shake with ice and strain into a martini glass.

name: Honey Hot Chocolate
directions: In a sauce pan, stir together and heat over medium heat first three ingredients until smooth.
Slowly whisk in milk and then honey (taste and add extra honey if desired)
Stir and heat to desired warmth. DO NOT BOIL.
Pur into mugs.
optional: sprinkle with a touch of cinnamon and nutmeg.

name: The Old Cuban
directions: Muddle lime juice, simple syrup, and mint.
Add rum and bitters and shake with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass and fill with champagne.
Garnish with a sugar-dried vanilla bean and mint.

name: New Orleans Buck
directions: Shake all ingredients except ginger ale with ice.
Strain into an ice-filled collins glass.
Fill with ginger ale and stir.

name: Bordello
directions: In a chilled tumbler add the juice of half a lemon and 1/4 tsp cinnamon.
Mix well.
Add the Campari, Tequila & Passion Fruit juice.
Shake well.
Strain into a 8 oz.collins glass.  Spritz the top with soda.

name: Caribbean Cassis
directions: Shake all the ingredients with ice.
Strain into a highball glass with ice.
Garnish with lemon.

name: Twentieth Century
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a martini glass.

name: Exotic
directions: Mix the ingredients together in a rocks glass with ice.
Drink with a stirrer.

name: Chamcham
directions: Pour Chambord into champagne flute.
Top with sparkling wine.

name: Bundled Heart
directions: Pour grenadine into champagne flute.
Top with sparkling wine.

name: Triple Tequila Passion
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a chilled martini glass and garnish with lemon.

name: Non-Alcoholic Sangria
directions: In a large pitcher, combine cranberry-grape juice, orange juice, fresh lemon juice, diced pear, and diced apple.
Refrigerate for a least 2 hours.
Just before serving, stir in the lemon-lime soda and some ice.

name: Iced Chai/Espresso Latte
directions: Cut open the tea bags and place in the bottom of the filter cup for your espresso machine.
Place the coffee on top of the tea leaves (straining the espresso over the chai gives it the strongest flavor).
Brew the espresso and mix in the sugar while it is still hot.
Pour into a 12 ounce glass and quickly stir in 4-5 ice cubes until the side of the glass feels chilled.
Fill to the top with milk.

name: Happily Ever After Cocktail
directions: Pour all ingredients into an old-fashioned glass, stir and serve.

name: Blended Toasted Almond
directions: Blend with crushed ice until smooth.

name: Deep Blue Sea
directions: Build over ice.

name: Gentle Kiss
directions: Blend milks and ice till smooth.
Drizzle strawberry liqueur along the insides of the glass.
Pour frozen milk mixture into glass.  Do not stir.
Garnish with a strawberry on the rim and serve with a swizzle stick.

similar.name: Buttery Nipple With a Cherry Kiss

name: Butterscotch Slide
directions: Mix ingredients in a blender with ice cubes until smooth.
Drizzle caramel inside a chilled tall glass.
Pour the mixture and serve with a straw.

name: Autumn Spiced Gingerbread Martini
directions: Shake with ice until very cold.
Strain into a chilled, brown sugar rimmed martini glass.

name: Absolut Abbelini
directions: Roll the sugar lump in grenadine and place it in the bottom of a champagne flute.
Fill up with Absolut Apeach, peach puree and top with champagne.

name: 69er
directions: Carefully layer in a shot glass.

name: Bustier
directions: Shake spirits and juice with crushed ice.
Strain into tall glass filled with ice.
Top with sprite and top with a dash of grenadine.
Garnish with a cherry.

name: Evergreen
directions: Shake first 3 ingredients well together, and pour into a highball glass.
Top up with lemonade.

name: Exotic Orgasm Benedictus
directions: Shake in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Serve with a few ice cubes in a rocks glass.
Decorate with an orange peel.
Layer in a shot glass.

name: Absolut Rickey
directions: Build over ice in a highball glass.
Decorate with lemon wedges.

name: Absolut Trouble
directions: Shake with ice in a cocktail shaker.
Strain into a rocks glass.

name: Adios
directions: Pour spirits in glass full of ice.
Add a splash of soda and stir gently.

name: Absolut Frozen Bridge
directions: Blend in a mixer for about 20 seconds.
Pour into a champagne flute and add a few drops of grenadine on top of it all.
Decorate with a maraschino cherry and serve with a straw.

name: Cranberry Kisses
directions: Shake with ice and strain into a martini glass.

name: Absolut Reddy
directions: Fill a rocks glass with crushed ice.
Pour Absolut Mandarin over the ice.
Dip sugar cube in grenadine and place it on top of the crushed ice.

name: Absolut Passion
directions: Build in a highball glass.
Fill up with Sprite and top with a dash of lime.
Decorate with a slice of lime.

name: Acapulko No1
directions: Build with crushed ice in a cocktail glass.
Top with soda water.

name: Soothing Ginger Tea
directions: Toast cardomom and fennel in a saucepan over medium-high heat for 1 minute.
Add water and ginger.
Reduce heat and simmer until it reaches the desired strength, 10 to 15 minutes.
Remove from heat and stir in honey and mint leaves.
Let stand for 5 minutes.
Strain into mugs and garnish with mint.

name: Chocolate Kiss
directions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker half-filled with ice cubes. Shake and strain into a martini glass, and serve.

name: Absolut Banini
directions: Shake with ice in a cocktail shaker.
Strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Absolut Pitstop
directions: Beat the cream with Absolut Mandarin and sugar.
Build first 2 ingredients over 2 ice cubes in a rocks glass.
Add the whipped Absolut Mandarin cream as a lid on top.
Sprinkle a little instant coffee powder on top as decoration.

name: Black Stockings
directions: Stir and strain.
Garnish with a lemon twist.

name: Year of the Dog
directions: Carefully layers in a shot glass.
Top with whipped cream.

name: Absolut Trappy Tea
directions: Build in a rocks glass with crushed ice.
Decorate with an orange twist and a maraschino cherry.

name: Absolut Victory
directions: Squeeze the juice from half a lime into a highball glass.
Add Absolut Vodka and, if you like, sugar.
Fill the glass with crushed ice and lime wedges.
Top up with Tonic Water.

name: Sulfuric Acid Swig
directions: in a large pitcher mix the lemonade concentrate,  lemon juice and grapefruit juice.
add to this the required amount of water stated on the lemonade container.
Pour the liquid into tall glasses filling them halfway.

Add a scoop of lemon sherbet to each. Fill the glasses with club soda and serve immediately. Just before serving, sprinkle the top of each glass with a pinch of lemon or lime flavored powered drink mix.

name: I'm Hooked Cocktail
directions: Pour first three ingredients in a highball glass filled with ice. Fill with orange juice stir well, and serve.

name: Absolut Vince Vega
directions: Build over ice in a highball glass.
Decorate with a slice of apple on the rim.

name: After 8 Shooter
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into glass.

name: Cupid's Cocktail
directions: Shake ingredients and strain into a chilled highball glass. Garnish with a slice of orange and a cherry.

name: Real Irish Cream Liqueur
directions: Combine all ingrediants in a blender, and blend until smooth.
keep in a tightly sealed container.
Refrigerate for 24 hours before consuming.

name: Yummy Fuzzy Navel Jello Shots
directions: Mix the jello and boiling water until jello dissolves.
Add cold water and peach schnapps and mix again.
Pour into shot cups.

name: Master Cleanse
directions: Shake and drink all day 6-12 glasses recommended.

name: Caramel Macchiato Martini
directions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker with ice.  Shake. Pour into a martini glass.
Enjoy.

name: 'nilla Wafer Martini
directions: Pour ingredients into cocktail shaker with ice.  Shake and pour into martini glass.
Enjoy.

name: Apple Pie Liquor
directions: In 2-quart pan, put apple juice and warm (do not boil).
Add apple pie spice, and honey, mix well.
Add everclear and divide into bottles, cap and let age 1 month.
Serve cold or hot.

name: Butter Ball
directions: Add the liqueurs and fill with cream.
Serve in short rocks glass.

name: Simply Exquisite Cocktail
directions: Pour ingredients into a stainless shaker over ice, shake until completely cold then strain into a chilled stemmed glass.

name: Pink Fetish
directions: Add the first 4 ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice; shake vigorously.
Strain into an ice-filled old fashioned glass.
Squeeze the lime wedge over the drink and drop it inches.

name: Limoncello (With Grain Alcohol)
directions: Wash lemons with new scrub pad and baking soda to remove wax and outside elements.
Dry lemons.
Peel off lemon rind in thin strips.  There should be no white pith attached to the strips.  Vegetable peeler works best.
In a GLASS 1 gallon container add alcohol and lemon strips.
Let steep in refrigerator for 7 days.
Bring 5 cups water to a boil in a large saucepan.  Add sugar and mix well to make a simple syrup.  Let cool.
Blend syrup and alcohol/lemon mixture together.  Strain the peels and pour liquid into glass bottle(s).
Store in freezer.  It would be best to cure for at least 2 more weeks or more for a smoother flavor.
Serve icy cold (frozen shot glass) direclty from freezer.
This makes about 2 quarts.

name: Amaretto Coffee
directions: Build in a coffee glass.
Top with lightly shaken or whipped cream.

name: Aloe Vera
directions: Pour everything except the sprite into a cocktail shaker with ice cubes.
Shake and strain into a highball glass.
Top with Sprite.

name: Alabama Slammer
directions: Pour Amaretto into highball glass half filled with crushed ice.
Top up with cranberry juice.
Add a splash of soda and a squeeze of fresh lime juice.
Garnish with a wedge of lime.

name: After Twelve
directions: Serve in a shot glass.

similar.name: Standard Cream With White Creme De Cacao & Godiva

name: After Eight Coffee
directions: Stir the cocoa with the mint liqueur and the whisky.
Put a spoon in the glass and add espresso and warm milk.
Add sugar if desired.

similar.name: Chocolate Creme De Menthe Flavored Coffee

name: '61 Imperial
directions: In a hurricane glass filled with cubed ice, add the first 4 ingredients.
Add the pineapple juice, stir well
Float the blue Curacao on top.
Garnish with a pineapple slice and a maraschino cherry.

name: After Eight Martini
directions: Stir with cubed ice
Strain into a martini glass.

name: 1:00 Sunrise
directions: Shake in mixing cup until slightly foamy.
Serve with crushed ice.
Garnish with slice of orange and pineapple.

name: 17 Twist
directions: Mix lightly and enjoy.

similar.name: Take Me Back to the Islands

name: Almond Latté
directions: Shake with cubed ice and strain.

name: After Ski Relaxer
directions: Build in a wine glass.
Fill with hot cocoa and top with lightly whipped cream.

name: 2000 Flushes
directions: Combine the spiced rum and mango rum in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Add the blue Curacao, shake well and strain into a cocktail glass.
Add Sprite and lemonade.

name: 187 Cocktail
directions: Come all ingredients in a blender; add ice.
Take out the middle of the blenders lid, and while still blending add whipped cream. Serve with whipped cream on top and a maraschino cherry.

name: Mint Milano Remix
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker halfway with ice cubes.
Add the crème de menthe, crème de cacao and heavy cream and shake well.
Strain into 2 wine glasses or goblets.
Balance a cookie on top or place one inside each glass.
Add mint sprigs, if desired.

name: Oatmeal Cookie Crushes
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker halfway with ice cubes.
Add the butterscotch schnapps, Baileys, rum and Goldschläger and shake well.
Strain into 2 rocks glasses.
Sprinkle with crushed cookies, optional.

name: 5-0 Cosmo
directions: Shake all ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Strain the mixture into chilled martini glass.
Garnish with lime twist.

name: Liquid Oreos
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker halfway with ice cubes.
Add the vodka, Kahlúa, crème de cacao and Baileys and shake well.
Strain into 2 martini glasses.
Slip an Oreo onto the side of each glass.

name: Cranberry Kiss
directions: Add Captain Morgan Original Spiced Rum, collins mix, and cranberry juice in ice-filled highball glass and stir.
Garnish with lemon.
Enjoy!

name: Oatmeal Cookie Shooters
directions: Mix the Grand Marnier, Butterscotch Schnapps and the Bailey Irish Cream in a Martini Shaker filled with ice. Shake well.
Pour into shooter glasses.
Enjoy!

name: Silky Kiss
directions: Combine the rum, orange-flavored liqueur and eggnog in a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Strain into a champagne flute and add the champagne.
Garnish with a cinnamon stick.

name: Grinch Martini
directions: Pour the ingredients into a martini shaker with ice.
Shake well.
Strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with a Maraschino cherry.

name: Official Blue Thong Martini
directions: Rub rim of martini glass with lime and dip rim in sugar to coat;chill glass.
Fill cocktail shaker with  vodka, rum, Cointreau, Blue Curacao, sweet & sour and pineapple together with ice.
Shake and strain into chilled martini glass.
Garnish with orange slice.
Should be sweet to taste with a deep turquoise color.

name: Blue Margarita
directions: Rub rim of a margarita or martini glass with lime wedge. Dip rim into a shallow dish of coarse salt or sugar; shake off excess and set aside.
Fill a cocktail shaker with ice cubes; add tequila, blue curacao, lime juice and the 1/2 tsp sugar. Cover and shake vigorously. Strain into the prepared glass. Garnish with a citrus twist.

name: Cranberry Cosmopolitan
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker with ice cubes; add vodka, orange liqueur, cranberry juice concentrate and lime juice. Cover and shake vigorously.
Strain into a martini glass.
If desired, garnish with an orange peel twist and a fresh cranberry.

name: Caribe Cosmopolitan
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled martini glass. Garnish with flamed orange peel, and serve.

name: Skip and Go Barefoot
directions: Mix grenadine, lemon juice, and vodka.  Pour into a tall glass.  Add ice and fill with beer.

similar.name: Skip and Go Naked....not Your Grandma's Lemonade!

name: Tiramisu Martini
directions: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker.
Add crushed ice and allow to sit for 5 seconds.
Shake vigorously for 5 seconds.
Strain into martini glass.
Garnish with Hershey's Almond Chocolate Kiss.

name: Cough Medicine
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Dose:  1 teaspoon every 4 hours.

similar.name: Dr. Joey's Hot Toddy's Cold Remedy
Dr. Pat's Hot Toddy Cold Remedy

name: Pink Lemonade Shooter
directions: Fill shaker with ice. Add vodka, cranberry juice, and sour mix.
Shake well.
Strain into glass shot and SHOOT!

name: Melon-Coly
directions: Put ingredients in a blender and blend with crushed ice.
Pour over ice in a tall glass.

name: Sweet Tea Mocktail
directions: Place the tea bags in a small teapot.
Fill it 3/4 full with boiling water.
Submerge the mint and orange rind and add the lemonade and cranberry juice.
Cover the teapot and allow to steep two to four minutes.
Pour the tea to a clear glass mug to serve.  Garnish with the orange spiral and cherry or cranberries (also fresh mint if desired).
Note:  To make a quick freshly squeezed lemonade, juice one large lemon into a cocktail shaker half-filled with ice.  Add 1 T sugar and 4 oz water.  Shake well and strain.

name: Ice Pick
directions: Mix vodka, sugar, and lemon juice in a tall glass.
Add ice cubes, fill glass with iced tea, and stir.

name: Tropical Breeze
directions: Place the pineapple juice, malibu, bacardi, ice and rockmelon in the jug of a blender and blend until smooth.
Divide the mixture among serving glasses.  Place a melon wedge on the edge of each glass to serve.
enjoy.

name: Apple Core
directions: Put ingredients in a blender and blend with crushed ice.
Serve in a cocktail glass garnished with a red cherry.

name: Fruit Fantasy
directions: In a highball glass filled with ice, add soho lychee liqueur, pineapple juice and cranberry juice.  Stir and serve.

name: Cinnamon Mocha
directions: Place all the ingredients in a medium saucepan and stir over a low heat, whisking often for 10 to 15 minutes or until mixture is hot.
Using a sieve (conical recommended), strain the mixture into a heatproof jug.
Serve into 4 heatproof serving glasses or cups and serve.

TIPS - (1) Got a coffee machine, to add a little froth to your mocha, transfer 1/3 of the mixture into a small jug and using the milk attachment, froth and fill the top 1/3 of each glass with the froth.  (2) For extra kick whisk 15ml of Baileys or a chocolate liqueur at the end of step 1.

name: Tie Me to the Bedpost
directions: Mix together and pour over ice.
Enjoy.

name: White Hot Chocolate
directions: In a medium saucepan over medium heat, combine white chocolate chips and heavy cream.
Stir continuously until white chocolate chips have completely melted.
Stir in the half-and-half, vanilla extract and peppermint extract.
Stir occasionally until heated through.
Pour into mugs and top with a dollop of vanilla whipped topping and a candy cane.
Add desired amounts of peppermint and white chocolate liqueurs.

name: Time Capsule
directions: Pour Vanilla Vodka and Orange Juice into a tall glass filled with ice.
Slowly pour Cola to top off glass.
Garnish with an orange rind.

name: Cranberry Margarita
directions: Mix all the ingredients, except for the ice.
Pour half of the mixture in the blender and fill the rest of the blender with ice.
Blend.
Repeat with second half of mixture.

name: Apple Pie Punch  (Adult Drink)
directions: Combine apple juice, rum, and Schnapps in a punch bowl or pitcher.
Serve punch over ice and garnish with red apple slices.

name: Calvados Sidecars
directions: Run lemon wedge around rims of 2 small Martini glasses to moisten.
Spread sugar on a small plate and dip rims in sugar to coat.
Fill shaker with ice and add Calvados, Cointreau and lemon juice.
Shake vigorously 10 seconds, then strain into glasses.

name: Pamplemousse Cocktail
directions: Bring first 4 ingredients to boil in small saucepan, stirring to dissolve sugar.  Cool.
Muddle mint leaves with syrup in martini shaker.  Add vodka, grapefruit juice and lime juice.  Shake and pour into martini glass.
Garnish with fresh mint leaves if desired.

name: Cranberry, Gingerly
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice in a cocktail shaker.  Strain into a Martini glass.
Garnish with a slice of crystallized ginger.

name: Rose Flower Hot White Chocolate
directions: Finely chop white chocolate and place it in the top of a double boiler set over a pan of simmering water.
When the white chocolate is almost melted, remove it form the heat and set aside.
Ina 2-quart nonstick saucepan, heat the milk and cream over med-low heat until steaming but not boiling; add in the melted chocolate and whisk  to combine.
Cook, whisking constantly, until the mixture is foamy and almost boiling, about 3 minutes.
Whisk in the rose flower water; pour into teacups; sprinkle each serving with a few rose petals and serve immediately.

name: Berrymint Kiss
directions: Muddle a few raspberries and mint leaves in a cocktail shaker.
Fill the cocktail shaker halfway with ice.
Add the creme de cacao, and vodka.
Shake well and strain into a martini glass.
Garnish with a raspberry or two and a mint leaf.

name: French Vanilla Cappuccino
directions: Using a saucepan, add 1 cup of milk and 1/2 tea spoons of vanilla.
On a medium heat warm the milk until it starts bubbling (stirring to prevent burning).
Remove the milk from heat and stir sugar in to taste (suggestion 1/2 tea spoons).
Using a hand Frother or Blender whisk milk until frothy (suggestion 60 seconds).
Half fill a cup with fresh hot coffee.
Add the hot milk to almost fill cup (spooning milk froth to top).
Dust the top of cup with cinnamon.

similar.name: Chocolate Cappuccino Coffee Mix (In a Jar)

name: Almond Chocolate Coffee
directions: Pour ingredients into coffee cup in order.
Top with whipped creme and chocolate shavings.

name: Grand Gold Margarita
directions: Combine the first 5 ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice; shake vigorously.
Strain into a glass.
**To serve frozen, add first 5 ingredients to a blender with 3/4 cup crushed ice and blend until smooth.
Pour into a chilled margarita glass; garnish with lime wedge.

name: Teddy Roosevelt's Eggnog
directions: Beat the 12 egg whites until stiff. Be sure to have removed the little white hard parts.
Beat in 1/2 cup sugar into the egg whites and set aside.
In a separate bowl, beat until very light the 12 egg yolks (also free of any of the white hard part) with 1 cup sugar and 1/4 tsp of salt.
Combine the egg mixtures and stir until thoroughly blended.
To this, add 1 quart of the heavy cream which has been beaten, the 1 quart of milk and the 1 quart of the bourbon.
After beating this well, add 1 cup rum and the 1 TBS of vanilla.
Pour the eggnog into a gallon jug (putting the extra into a quart jar).
Store in the refrigerator for at least a week before serving so that the flavor will mellow.
Shake or stir thoroughly before serving.
Ladle from a chilled punch bowl into small cups and sprinkle with nutmeg.

name: Slippery Slide Cocktail
directions: Pour ingredients into a stainless steel shaker over ice,shake until completely cold then strain into a chilled stemmed glass or Rocks glass filled with ice.

name: Italian Stallion Cocktail
directions: Combine all ingredients in a cocktail shaker and serve.

name: Cranberry  and Lime Bellini
directions: Mix cranberry juice and Prosecco into a pitcher.
Add the juice of 1 lime into the pitcher.
DRINK!

name: Bubblegum Sundae Cocktail
directions: Pour creme de bananes, peach schnapps and orange juice into a cocktail shaker with 6 oz of crushed ice. Shake vigorously until slushy. Pour all contents into a highball glass. Add the grenadine so that it sinks down the side of the glass, and serve.

name: 4 A.m. in Madrid
directions: In a nonstick saucepan, whisk the cocoa powder, cornstarch, sugar, and ½ cup water together until smooth.
Whisk in the milk and place over med-low heat; bring just to a slow simmer; simmer for about  2 minutes, whisking often, until the chocolate is thick, glossy, and smooth, like a runny pudding.
Add in the vanilla; whisk again, then remove from the heat and pour into small cups.
Serve immediately with churros for dipping.

name: Pomegranate Margarita
directions: Add all ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with 3/4 cup ice.
Shake vigorously; pour into a chilled margarita glass.

name: Dr. Joey's Hot Toddy's Cold Remedy
directions: Put 6 oz. water and tea bag in a microwave safe cup in microwave until hot and let it steep for a few minutes.
Remove tea bag. Pour in honey, wiskey and lemon juice.
Stir and add sugar if needed.
Sip away and feel better!

similar.name: Dr. Pat's Hot Toddy Cold Remedy

name: Cinnamon Snaps (Cocktail)
directions: 1.  Fill a cocktail shaker halfway with ice cubes.  Add vodka, schnapps and cider; shake well.
2.  In a shallow bowl, mix the sugar & cinnamon.  Moisten the rims of two champagne flutes and coat with the cinnamon sugar.  Strain the cocktail into the flutes.

name: Gingerbread Martini
directions: In the bottom of a cocktail shaker, place the ginger, molasses, simple syrup and spices. Muddle well.
Add ice and the rest of the ingredients.
Shake vigorously until the outside of the shaker is frosted and beaded with sweat. Strain into a prepared martini glass.
Garnish with crystallized ginger.

name: T-Bird
directions: Pour all ingredients into a shaker filled with ice. Shake.
Strain into an ice-filled highball glass.
Garnish with an orange slice and a maraschino cherry if desired.
Serve with a straw.

name: Coffee-Cola Cooler (Non-Alcoholic)
directions: Combine coffee and maple syrup.
Slowly stir in cola.
Serve in ice-filled collins glasses.
Garnish with lemon slices if desired.

name: Coffee Almond Float
directions: Dissolve coffee in water in a pitcher.
Add milk, brown sugar, and almond extract.
Stir well and pour over ice cubes into parfait glasses.
Top each glass with a scoop of ice cream.

name: Pomegranate Smack
directions: Optional: use your finger to smear a thin coating of the pomegranate molasses on the rim of the glass; press the rim into a saucer of sugar.
Fill a cocktail shaker ¾ full with ice.
Add the vodka, pomegranate molasses, lemon juice, and simple syrup; shake vigorously to chill.
Strain into the chilled prepared glass.

name: Strawberry Bomb (Cocktail Drink)
directions: Shake ingredients with ice and strain into three seperate shot glasses.
Savor the scent for a moment and shoot.

name: Irish Rose (Cocktail Drink)
directions: Pour ingredients into a stainless steel shaker over ice.
Shake until completely cold then strain into a chilled stemmed glass or rocks glass filled with ice.

name: End of My Rope Cocktail
directions: Pour the Frangelico hazelnut liqueur, creme de bananes, pineapple juice and bitters into a cocktail shaker half-filled with ice cubes, and shake well. Strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

name: Smooth Operator Cocktail
directions: Blend ingredients in a blender with a scoop of crushed ice. Strain into cocktail glass(es).

name: Lights out Shot
directions: Mix together in a shaker with ice.
Serve as a shot.

name: Almond Stinger
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker half full of ice cubes.
Pour all ingredients into shaker and shake well.
Dip rim of martini glass into amaretto and then almonds.
Strain drink into a martini glass.

name: Russian Qualude
directions: Shake or stir ingredients.
Pour over ice.
Enjoy!

name: Mike's Strawberry Cheesecake Martini
directions: Add ice, strawberry vodka, vanilla vodka, and cranberry juice to a cocktail shaker.
Shake well for 4 seconds and strain into a martini glass.
Garnish with a strawberry slice cut to fit on the rim of the glass.

name: Champagne Mojitos
directions: In a small saucepan, combine the sugar and water and cook over high heat just until the sugar has dissolved. Let cool to room temperature.
In a large pitcher, combine the sugar syrup with the mint leaves and lime wedges and muddle well with a wooden spoon. Add the rum and stir well. Strain the drink into another pitcher.
Fill tall glasses with cracked ice and pour in the drink, filling them about two-thirds full. Top with Champagne, garnish with the mint sprigs and serve.
MAKE AHEAD The mojitos can be prepared through Step 2. Refrigerate the mojitos in the pitcher overnight.

name: Mike's Chocolate Martini
directions: Add vanilla vodka, Godiva Chocolate liqueur, and ice cubes to a coctail shaker.
Shake well for 4 seconds and strain into a martini glass.
Garnish (sprinkle) the chocolate shavings into the drink.

name: Applebee's Red Apple Sangria
directions: Cut lime into wedges, cut orange into slices, form the apple into balls -the more fruit the better it tastes.
Mix all the ingredients together, squeeze juice of fruit and let chill at least two hours or for a better blend of flavors chill overnight.

name: Mike's Raspberry Martini
directions: Add vodka, DeKuyper Razzmatazz, Sprite, and ice cubes to a shaker.
Shake well for 4 - 5 seconds.  Caution: firmly hold onto the cap of the shaker, because the Sprite will create pressure in the sealed shaker.
Open shaker cautiously over a sink, and then strain the mixture into martini glass.

name: Mike's Strawberry Cosmopolitan Martini
directions: Add strawberry vodka, orange vodka, Sprite, cranberry juice, lemon juice, and ice cubes to a cocktail shaker.
Shake well for 4 seconds.  Caution: The Sprite is carbonated and will create pressure in the shaker, so please hold cap firmly.
Open shaker over a sink (due to the pressure) and then pour into a martini glass.

name: Mike's Black Cherry Chocolate Martini
directions: Add Godiva chocolate liqueur, black cherry vodka, coconut rum, and ice cubes into a coctail shaker.
Shake well for 4 seconds and strain into a martini glass.
Garnish (sprinkle) chocolate shavings into the drink.

name: Nitro
directions: Pour Mt. Dew into 8oz glass.
Pour Everclear in.
Mix and serve.

name: Cran-Orange Lemonade
directions: Mix the cranberry juice, lemon juice, and orange juice in a 1 ½ quart container; stir in the sugar until dissolved; chill.
When ready to serve, fill tall glasses with ice, then add 1/3 to ½ cup of the cranberry mixture.
