Top off with about the same amount of sparkling water; garnish with a lemon slice.

similar.name: Simple Syrup - Cranberry Orange for Champagne Cocktail

name: Pumpkin Martini
directions: To a cocktail shaker filled with ice, add the pumpkin liqueur, light cream, spiced rum, and amaretto.
Shake moderately; strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with toasted pumpkin seeds and a dash of nutmeg.

name: Stout  Float
directions: In a large glass add one scoop of ice cream.
Add the beer slowly allowing room for the "head".
Put in a spoon for stirring.
ENJOY!

name: The Manhattan
directions: Fill a pint glass with ice.
Add the whiskey, vermouth, and bitters.
Stir briskly for 30 seconds.
Strain into a chilled glass, and garnish with a lemon or orange twist.

name: Pink Apple Lemonade
directions: Mix the cranberry juice cocktail, apple juice, and lemonade concentrate in a 3-quart container; stir to blend.
Add in water and lime juice; stir.
Chill until very cold; serve over cracked ice.

name: Umbrian Fantasy Hot Chocolate
directions: Heat the half-and-half in a saucepan over medium heat until you begin to see bubbles along the side.
Add in the Nutella; whisking until smooth.
Whisk in the arrowroot; let the mixture come to a boil; remove from the heat.
Dollop a small amount of additional Nutella into 6 demitasse cups.
Pour the hot mixture into the cups; serve with demitasse spoons for scooping out the Nutella in the bottom of each cup.

name: Mike's Butterscotch Martini
directions: Add ice, vanilla vodka, and butterscotch schnapps to a cocktail shaker.
Shake well for 4 seconds.
Strain and pour into a martini glass.

name: Pomegranate Martini
directions: In a cocktail shaker filled with ice, add vodka, pomegranate juice, grapefruit juice, lemon juice, simple syrup, and Cointreau.
Shake vigorously; strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with a lime twist.

name: Mike's Apple Martini
directions: Add ice, almond liqueur, DeKuyper Sour Apple Pucker schnapps, vanilla vodka, lemon juice, and cranberry juice coctail shaker.
Shake well for 4 seconds.
Pour into a martini glass.

name: Sue's Apple Martini
directions: Add ice, apple infused vodka, DeKuyper Sour Apple Pucker schnapps, vanilla vodka, lemon juice, and cranberry juice coctail shaker.
Shake well for 4 seconds.
Pour into a martini glass.

name: Mike's Candy Apple Martini
directions: Add ice, vodka, butterscotch schnapps, DeKuyper Sour Apple Pucker schnapps, and cranberry juice to a cocktail shaker.
Shake well for 4 seconds.
Pour into a martini glass.

name: Mike's Peach Puff Martini
directions: Add ice cubes, peach schnapps, raspberry vodka, and Sprite to a cocktail shaker.
Shake well for 4 seconds.
Strain into a martini glass.

name: Pink Slush
directions: Mix all ingredients except 7Up.
Mix well, put into an ice cream bucket and freeze - stirring a few times during the freezing process. Freeze at least overnight if not longer.
When ready to use, fill a glass with slush, pour 7up over and stir.

name: Matcha Green Tea Latte
directions: Combine the green tea powder and cane juice in an espresso shot glass, pour the hot water halfway up the shot glass and mix well so there are no lumps(this combines both ingredients and makes sure there are no green tea bits in the drink).
Steam you milk with your espresso machine.
Pour you green tea mixture in you mug first,then your steamed milk(hold back enough foam for a few spoonfulls to finish the drink).
Finish your drink by spooning or pouring foam right in the center of your drink(it should be a rich green marked by white foam).

similar.name: Matcha Oat Milk Latte (Hot or Iced)

name: White Chocolate Martini
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker halfway with ice.
Add in vodka, creme de cacao, and Baileys.
Shake vigorously for 5-10 seconds.
Strain into a chilled martini glass; garnish with a maraschino cherry.

name: Light Cafe Mocha
directions: Heat 1 cup of milk on stovetop. You can eliminate the skin that forms on the bottom of the pot or pan by wetting it before heating.  You can prevent the skin that forms at the surface by either foaming the milk (whip it) before heating or covering the pot or both.
Recommend pre-heating the cup by putting water in it and microwaving it for 2 minutes.
When milk is hot (I use a digital probe thermometer and wait for it to get to about 170), discard water from cup and add dry ingredients to bottom of cup.
Add milk slowly, stirring.
Enjoy!

name: Aqua-Marine
directions: Shake well in a shaker with ice.
Strain in a martini glass.
Garnish with a pineapple slice.

name: Golden Goddess
directions: Shake liqueur and vodka over ice and serve in chilled martini glass.
Drop in a chocolate kiss and serve.

name: Mike's Peach Martini
directions: Add ice, Absolut peach vodka, and triple sec to cocktail shaker.
Shake well for 4 seconds.
Strain into a martini glass.

name: Merry Berry Cosmo
directions: Add first four ingredients into shaker with ice.
Shake.
Pour into a chilled martini glass.
Top with champagne.
Float a blueberry on top.

name: Jolly Rancher Martini
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker halfway with ice; add in vodka, liqueurs, and cranberry juice.
Shake vigorously for 5-10 seconds.
Strain into a chilled martini glass; garnish with a lemon wheel.

name: Orange Cream Floats
directions: In large bowl, mix ice cream, orange juice concentrate, water, vanilla and food color until almost smooth.
For each serving, scoop heaping 1/2 c ice cream mixture into 16 oz glass.  Pour about 1 c ginger ale over top of each.

name: Old Bay Bloody Mary
directions: Mix all ingredients in glass.
To serve, add ice & enjoy.

name: Irish Whiskey & Honey Remedy
directions: Prepare the tea.
Note about tea: Use what you like and experiment.  I use regular tea, but my grandmother always used Irish tea.
Add the whiskey to the mug, then the honey, then the lemon.
Stir thoroughly, add the cinnamon stick (let sit a few minutes - about 2 minutes - stir again), then drink.
Hot drinks are great for a dry cough.

name: Sparkling Cranberry Cocktail
directions: In a small pitcher or large measuring cup, stir the cranberry juice with the vodka and orange-flavoured liqueur.
Slice 12 cranberries in half.
Spoon 2 tbsp crushed ice into martini glasses or champagne flutes.  Place a few cranberries on top.
Pour in juice mixture.
Slice 1/2 lime into 4 wedges. First squeeze juice from each wedge into the cocktail. Then drop in lime for garnish.

name: Orange Sake Mimosa
directions: Add the first 4 ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice; shake vigorously.
Strain into a chilled champagne flute.
Top with champagne; garnish with orance slice.

name: Hazelnut Dessert Coffee
directions: Brew coffee and stir in Frangelico.
Add whipped topping and garnish with cinnamon stick if desired.

name: Mint Candy Infused Vodka
directions: Infused Vodka: Add candy and vodka to an infusion jar and infuse for 1 to 3 hours.
Hot Chocolate: Make hot chocolate according to package and add 1oz infused vodka. Top with whipping cream, stir with candy cane.

name: Uncle Bill's Hot Rum Toddy
directions: To a large heavy duty cup or glass, add rum, honey, lemon juice, 1/2 lemon rind, and nutmeg.  Stand cinnamon stick in the cup.
Pour the boiling water and stir well to blend.
Adjust honey to suit your sweetness and adjust lemon juice to suit your taste.
Sip slowly and enjoy.

name: Cherry Spiced Cider
directions: Put apple cider, orange juice, maraschino cherry juice, cinnamon sticks, orange peel, cloves and allspice in a large saucepan; bring to a boil.  Reduce heat; simmer 15 minutes.  Strain out cinnamon sticks, orange peel. cloves and allspice. (Can be prepared in advance and reheated in crock pot).
Place 2 maraschino cherries and 1 orange slice half in each of six mugs.  Pour about 2/3 cup spiced cider over cherries.  Serve warm.

name: Vicious Kiss
directions: Mix in martini shaker with ice.
Pour into martini glass.
You can garnish this with a stemmed marachino cherry.

name: Cranberry-Apple Spritzer
directions: In large pitcher, mix wine, juice drink and sparkling water.
Serve over ice. Garnish with apple slices and mint.

name: Frozen Lemonade With Blackberry Puree
directions: In a small bowl, stir together the 1 1/4 cups lemon juice, the orange juice and the 3/4 cup simple syrup. Set aside.
In another small bowl, stir together the blackberry juice, the 1 teaspoons lemon juice and the 2 Tbs. simple syrup. Set aside.
Put the ice cubes in a blender and add the lemon juice mixture. Using the ice crush feature of the blender or high speed, blend until smooth.
Put 1 Tbs. of the blackberry puree into each of 4 glasses. Pour in the frozen lemonade, dividing evenly. Garnish each with a mint sprig and a few blackberries. Serve immediately. Serves 4.

name: Apple Pie Tea
directions: Prepare tea the usual way (with the teabag and hot/boiling water).  Stir in the Coffee-mate and Splenda.  Top with whipped cream.

similar.name: Perfect Sweet Tea (Secret of the South)

name: Delmonico Number 1
directions: Add the gin, brandy, vermouths, and bitters to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously; strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with orange or lemon twist.

name: Awesome Chai Tea
directions: Place the cinnamon stick, cardamom, cloves, ginger, peppercorns and water in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, then cover and reduce the heat to simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and allow the mixture to steep for 10 minutes. Return to a boil.
Remove from heat, add the tea bags and let steep for 3 to 5 minutes.
Strain the tea and return to the saucepan.
Add brown sugar and milk while stirring over low heat for one minute.
Serve immediately.

name: Some Homemade Hot Chocolate Mixes
directions: Mix 1: Mix all ingredients together and store in an airtight container. To make hot cocoa, stir one cup boiling water into 1/4 cup mix.
Mix #2: Mix all ingredients together and store in an airtight container. To make hot cocoa, stir one cup boiling water into 1/4 cup mix.
Mix #3: Mix all ingredients together and store in an airtight container. To make hot cocoa, stir one cup boiling water into 1/4 cups mix.
Mix #4: Fill one mug with the Traditional Hot Cocoa Mix. Add 1 cup boiling water and the mint tea bag. Steep for 1 to 3 minutes.
Mix #5: Fill one mug with the Traditional Hot Cocoa Mix. Add 1 cup boiling water and the almond tea bag. Steep for 1 to 3 minutes.

name: Hot Chocolate + Pb Cups = Ooh La La!  (Kid-Friendly)
directions: Place the chocolate chips, half and half and peanut butter in a microwave-safe container.
Heat on high for 30 seconds.
Stir and repeat until the mixture is smooth.  Set aside.
In a separate microwave-safe container, heat milk on high 1 minute.  Repeat, if necessary.  Milk should be warm, NOT boiling.
Pour chocolate mixture into milk and stir vigorously with a whisk until smooth.  You may use an immersion blender or frother, if you'd like.
Strain, if needed, serve & enjoy.
May choose to top with whipped cream or marshmellows.

similar.name: Milk-Chocolate and Peanut Butter Hot Cocoa

name: Chambord Spritzer
directions: In a tall glass combine the Chambord, the wine, the lemon juice, and 4 ice cubes.
Fill the glass with the seltzer and stir the drink.
Garnish it with the lemon peel.

name: Tiger Woods Cocktail
directions: Fill a highball glass with ice, add the vodka, lemon juice and cranberry juice.
Garnish with a lemon wedge and serve.

name: Tootsie Roll Float Cocktail
directions: Pour all over ice, mix and strain off ice.

name: Bomb Pop Cocktail
directions: Combine ingredients over ice in a small old-fashioned glass.
Serve.

name: Burberry Bulldog
directions: Fill a collins glass with ice cubes.
Pour in the vodka, Chambord raspberry liqueur, Kahlua coffee liqueur and Irish cream.
Stir, then fill up the glass with equal portions of milk and Dr. Pepper soda.
Stir again and serve.

name: Pineapple Upside Down Cake Shot
directions: Pour vanilla vodka and pineapple juice into a shot glass.
Add a drop of grenadine, and serve.

name: Yellow Cake Shot
directions: Shake with ice and strain into a shot glass.

name: Thanksgiving's a Breeze Seabreezes
directions: Mix all in a chilled pitcher filled with ice.
Pour into chilled glasses and garnish with mint.
If desired, place a dollop of leftover cranberry sauce in the bottom of each glass before filling with Seabreeze mixture.

name: Ramos Gin Fizz
directions: Reserve a 1/4-inch-by-2-inch strip of lemon zest for garnish.
Squeeze 1 tablespoon lemon juice into a shaker.

Add the egg white, orange flower water, cream, sugar, gin, and crushed ice.  Shake the mixture until foamy and smooth, about five minutes. Alternatively, mix in a blender set on high speed for 1-1/2 minutes.
Strain into an 8-ounce highball glass.
Add club soda, garnish with a lemon twist, and serve immediately.

name: Scarlett Kiss
directions: Mix Drambuie with cranberry juice and serve over ice in a tall glass.

name: Bacardi Root Beer Float
directions: Combine and mix together the rum and root beer in a beer mug.
Add ice if desired and serve.

name: Russian Tea
directions: Mix together. Add one Tablespoon to a mug of boiling water.

similar.name: Russian Tea Mix from Rick's Mom

name: Bayou Self Cocktail
directions: Pour Captain Morgan spiced rum, butterscotch schnapps and pineapple juice into a cocktail shaker half-filled with ice cubes.
Shake well, and strain into a highball glass 3/4 filled with ice.
Top with grenadine, and garnish with a maraschino cherry and a slice of pineapple.

name: Frozen Mudslide
directions: Blend alcohol with ice-cream.
Serve in a frosted Hurricane glass.

name: Kapalua Butterfly
directions: Combine first 6 ingredients in blender.
Chill in freezer 30 minutes.
Add ice to pitcher; blend until ice is finely crushed.
Pour into brandy glasses.

name: A Tropical Dream (Alcoholic)
directions: Combine all ingredients (except grenadine) together over ice in a cocktail shaker.
Shake and strain into a hurricane glass filled with ice.
Float grenadine on top, and serve.

similar.name: Under the Table and Dreaming --- Alcoholic

name: Almost Heaven
directions: Build in a collins glass over ice.

name: Apples and Oranges Martini
directions: Mix all ingredients together in a large pitcher with ice.
Stir 50 times to properly dilute the drink and remove ice.
Cover and refrigerate until ready to use.
Pour into chilled martini glasses.
Garnish each with a twist of orange peel and an apple slice, and serve.

name: Cherry Cheesecake Shot
directions: Combine Stoli vodka and grenadine in a shaker with ice.
Add a splash of pineapple juice.
Shake, strain into a shot glass, and serve.

name: Orange Surfboard
directions: Combine liquors in a tall glass with ice cubes.
Fill with orange juice and add a splash of cranberry juice.
Shake to mix and serve.

name: Razberri Kazi
directions: Mix ingredients in a shaker with ice.
Pour into a chilled cocktail glass, and serve.

name: Tropicolada  (Non-Alcoholic)
directions: Place all ingredients in blender.
Mix on high speed until ice is crushed and drink is frothy.
Pour into a tall glass and enjoy.
Amounts can be varied to taste.

name: Starbucks Pumpkin Spice Latte (Copycat)
directions: In a small saucepan, stir pumpkin puree into milk.
Add vanilla syrup and pumpkin pie spice.
Heat gently, continuing to stirring occasionally just until steaming and foam begins to appear.
Pour pumpkin flavored milk into a tall mug and pour espresso over.
Top with whip cream and a dash of pumpkin pie spice.
Note: If you like it slightly sweeter; add a bit of vanilla flavored coffee cream.

name: Sayonara Baby!
directions: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Add Sake, Plum Wine and lime juice.
Stir until blended.
Garnish with a lime wedge enjoy!

name: Kahlua Gingerbread Woman Cocktail
directions: Blend all ingredients except nutmeg for approx 30 seconds.
Pour into a glass & dust with nutmeg to serve.

name: Hot Buttered Rum W/ Brandy, Batter
directions: Mix all ingredients in a  large pot, except liquors.
Heat very slowly, stirring until mixture.
is like thin cake batter.
Remove from heat; cool.
Cover and freeze.
When.
ready to serve, put 2 well rounded tablespoons of the frozen mixture in a mug.
Add rum and brandy.
Fill remainder of cup with hot water and stir to melt frozen mixture.
Serve with a dollop of whipped cream and sprinkle with nutmeg.

similar.name: Awesome and Economical Hot Buttered Rum Mix

name: Chocolate Rose
directions: Pour 1 ounce tequilla rose and 1 ounce of creme de casao in a glass with ice.
Mix with milk.

name: Neopilitian
directions: Fill a chilled beer mug with ice and layer shots in the above order.
Top with milk.
Garnish with a strawberry or banana.

name: Amaretto Heston
directions: Fill glass with ice and add amaretto.
Fill with Sprite and stir.

name: Cherry Popper  Shot
directions: Pour irish cream and tequila rose into a shot glass in equal parts and serve.

name: Banana Nut Martini
directions: Pour the vodka, banana liqueur and a splash of Frangelico into cocktail shaker.
Tumble in a handful of ice and shake vigorously.
Strain into a chilled martini glass and float a banana slice on top.
Enjoy.

name: Easy Spiced Apple Cider
directions: Add all to pot & simmer on low 1 hour.

name: Limoncello
directions: In a glass container, NOT PLASTIC OR METAL,pour contents of the bottle of alcohol. Be sure to save empty bottle.
Peel lemons,zest only, no white part at all.
Put lemon peels into the alcohol and let it sit for about 10 days.
After 10 days put 1 bottle (that you saved)of water into a pan with 3 cups of sugar and boil. Stirrig real good.  Let cool.
With a strainer pour the alcohol mixture into the pan and stir.
Pour into bottles.
Buy some nice bottles and give as gifts or have fun drinking. Pretty Potent!
I usually double the recipe 1.75ltr, approx 15 to 16 lemons and 6 cups of sugar.
Remember to double the water!

name: Hot Chocolate Martini
directions: Combine the chocolate, dark creme de cacao, Bailey's and vanilla vodka in a cocktail shaker filled with ice and shake.  Strain into a chilled martini glass.
Drop 3 to 4 miniature marshmallows in the glass and roast with a creme brulee torch if you have one!

name: Peppermint Patty Coffee (Non-Alcoholic)
directions: Put all dry ingredients in bottom of mug and pour in hot coffee.
Stir to dissolve sugar and cocoa mix.
Add in extract and milk and stir again.

name: Blueberry Muffin Drink
directions: Shake ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Strain into glass.
Enjoy!

name: Pink Sauterne Cocktail
directions: Add frozen lemonade and wine to a blender.
Add crushed ice as needed, blending at high speed until the mixture has the texture of a slush.
Serve in a champagne glass.

name: Hazelnut Iced Coffee
directions: Put ice in glass.
Pour in cold coffee.
Pour in Hazelnut liquid Coffee-Mate.
Stir.
Add whipped cream if desired.
Enjoy.

name: Not Your Average Cup of Jo
directions: make coffee to taste (strong alleviates the whiskey vapors).
add JD, cinnamon, creamer and sugar (if you like).
stir and dollop with whipped cream.
enjoy and sit a spell.
*** prep time does not include brew time.
off to try another concoction.

name: Frozen Banana and Apple Fruit Tango
directions: Mix with ice in a electric blender until smooth.  Pour, unstrained into a cocktail glass.
enjoy.

name: Isle of Coconut
directions: Mix all the ingredients in a blender with ice until smooth.
Pour into glass.
Add slices of fresh coconut shavings if desired.

name: Watermelon Cooler
directions: Mix all ingredients in a blender with crushed ice until smooth.
Pour into collins glass.
Garnish with lime slice.

name: Frozen Bellinis
directions: Place all ingredients including juice from canned peaches in a blender.
Puree until smooth.

name: Orange Cooler in Shell
directions: Slice off the top 1/3 of the orange and cut out the fruit.  Leave 45ml juice remaining in the orange.  Shake all ingredients including the orange juice weill with some craked ice.
Strain in to the orange shell and serve with a straw.

name: Go-Go Juice
directions: Shake all ingredients well, except lemonade, with cracked ice.
Strain into a collins glass filled with ice.
Top with lemonade.
Garnish with lemon slice.

name: (Hard) Tropical Slushies
directions: Mix vodka, brandy, orange and lemon juice concentrate, grenadine and grapefruit soda together in a large plastic mixing bowl. Cover the mixture with a tight fitting lid. Freeze the mixture for one or two days.
When you are ready to serve the drink, use an ice cream scoop and place one or two scoops of the mixture into glasses.
Fill the rest of the glass with lemon/lime flavored soda pop.
Stir and serve.
***Cook time is freeze time***.

name: Red Apple
directions: Shake well with cracked ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Disacolada
directions: Combine ingredients in a shaker with ice.
Shake, strain and serve in a martini glass.
Note : in the original recipe it says to use equal parts of amaretto and bacardi coco.  You can increase the amount if you want.

name: Hpnotiq Caramel Appletini
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a martini glass.

name: Vanilla Coffee
directions: Mix all ingredients together and place in cellaphane bags.
When ready to use, put 2-4 T. in a mug of boiling water and enjoy.

name: Cosmopolitan Champagne
directions: Place cranberry juice in a medium saucepan and bring to the boil over high heat. Cook, uncovered, for 10 minutes or until reduced by two-thirds. Remove from heat and set aside for 30 minutes to cool.

Combine the cranberry juice, Cointreau and lime juice in a small jug. Place a sugar cube in each serving glass. Pour the cranberry mixture over the sugar. Top with Champagne or sparkling wine and serve immediately.

name: Peach Splash Cocktail
directions: These drinks are prepared in two stages: first you make the alcoholic marinade, which also doubles as a fruit garnish, and then you add soda water.

Pour all the ingredients for the marinade into a portable flask, bottle or jar (preferably the night before the picnic). Secure the lid, give it a quick shake and refrigerate. To serve, fill a tall glass with ice, half fill with the marinade, then top up with soda.
Notes & tips.
Tip: the longer you leave the marinade to infuse, the better the flavour.

name: Coffee Liqueur With Vanilla & Cinnamon Cream
directions: Use an electric beater to beat the cream in a medium bowl until soft peaks form. Use a large metal spoon to fold in the icing sugar mixture and vanilla bean paste.
Pour the coffee liqueur evenly among serving glasses. Add the coffee and top with the cream mixture. Sprinkle with cinnamon and serve immediately.
Notes & tips.
The Spanish love their coffee sweet and strong - make yours special with a splash of Kahlua.
Prepare this recipe to the end of step 1 up to 1 day ahead. Cover and store in the fridge. Continue from step 2 just before serving.

name: Tea Essence
directions: Heat contained by rinsing out with boiling water.
Put tea in pot.  Pour 4 c of freshly boiling water over the tea leaves.
Steep for 6 minutes.
Strain and refridgerate.
To use, put 1/2 to 3/4 cup of tea essence in an 8 cup teapot and fill the pot with fresh boiling water.  Vary the anount of essence to get desired strength.

If using tea bags, rip open the bags and use the contents.  Squeezing 16 tea bags into a 4 cup volume does not give enough circulation space to properly steep the tea.  As tea bag contents are usually pretty fine, you should strain this through a coffee filter.

name: Campari With Orange
directions: Fill 6 serving glasses with ice cubes. Pour campari and orange juice among glasses. Top with soda water and orange. Serve.

name: Chamomile, Carrot & Orange Drink
directions: Place the teabags in a heatproof jug and add the boiling water. Set aside for 15 minutes to infuse and cool slightly.
Process the carrots and the oranges in a juice extractor and pour the juice into a medium jug. Add the chamomile tea and mix well. Add the ice cubes, if using.
Pour into serving glasses and serve the drink immediately.

name: Pretty Pink Drink
directions: Pour the pineapple juice among 2 ice-cube trays and place in the freezer for 4 hours or until set.
Combine lemonade and grapefruit juice in a large serving jug. Add the ice cubes and serve immediately.
Notes & tips.
You can make the ice cubes (step 1) and chill the lemonade and grapefruit juice up to 1 day ahead. Carry out step 2 just before serving.

name: Red Ice Drinks
directions: Combine the cordial or Ribena and water in a jug. Pour the mixture into 3 ice cube trays and freeze overnight.
Place about 3 iceblocks in each glass and top with lemonade.

similar.name: Lemon and Red Zinger Iced Tea

name: Real Peppermint Patty Hot Chocolate
directions: Chop the peppermint patties into small pieces and combine all ingredients in a pan.
Heat over medium heat until all ingredients are incorporated and milk is hot.
Can be served with whipped cream and some grated chocolate.

name: T.g.i. Friday’s Cranberry Creamsicle
directions: Glass: Tall Specialty.
Garnish: Aerosol whip and chopped pecans.
Add ingredients into blender and blend until smooth. Garnish.

similar.name: T.g.i. Friday's One Hour in the Candy Store
T.g.i. Friday's Chocolate Monkey (Banana Split Drink)

name: T.g.i. Friday's Frozen Key Lime
directions: Garnish: aerosol whipping creamand lime wheel.
Combine ingredients in blender, blend until smooth. Serve in a tall specialty glass.
Servings: 1.

name: Mediterranean Jewel Cocktail
directions: Combine all liquid ingredients into a shaker with ice.
Shake to cool, then strain into a martini glass.
Garnish with cherry.

name: Orange Bourbon Sours
directions: Combine juices, sugar, borbon and stir or shake until sugar is completely dissolved.
Pour drink over chipped ice and garnish with orange slices.
NOTE: This drink can be made in a blender with a couple of ice cubes.

name: Starbucks Peppermint Mocha (Copycat)
directions: Pour syrup into a twelve-ounce mug, add a shot of espresso, and Peppermint syrup.
Fill the remainder of the cup with steamed or heated milk. Garnish with whipped cream and red sugar sprinkles.
Top with Whipped cream.
Red sugar sprinkles.

name: Starbucks Eggnog Latte
directions: To make the Eggnog Latte:.
Combine cold eggnog with cold whole milk. Cold non-fat milk can be substituted for the whole milk.
Using the steaming w and on your espresso machine, steamthe eggnog/milk mixture until the.
temperature reaches 145°F.
Set aside.
*Eggnog heats and scalds more quickly than milk, so watch your thermometer.
Tamp ground espresso into the filter. Pull a shot of espresso and pour in serving mug.
Fill mug w ith steamed eggnog/milk mixture. Top w ith 1/4 inch foamed eggnog/milk mixture to.
the rim of the mug.
Garnish with a sprinkle of ground nutmeg.

name: Pink Nipple
directions: Slowly swirl cream and Raspberry liqueur in a shaker with ice (you do not want foam, you just want to chill it).
Strain into glass.
Circle of grenadine on top.
add cherry.

name: T.g.i. Friday's Frozen Kahlua Mudslide
directions: Pour all ingredients into a Blender. Blend well at High speed.
Pour drink into a Collins glass and.
garnishw ith a Maraschino Cherry.

name: T.g.i. Friday's Orange Cream
directions: Pour all ingredients into a Blender. Blend well at High speed.
Pour drink into a Collins glass and.
garnish with a Pineapple Slice and a Maraschino Cherry.

name: T.g.i. Friday's One Hour in the Candy Store
directions: Blend until smooth.
Serve in a tall glass.

similar.name: T.g.i. Friday's Chocolate Monkey (Banana Split Drink)

name: T.g.i. Friday's Chocolate Monkey (Banana Split Drink)
directions: Blend until thick & creamy. Top with Whipped Cream.
Garnish with Banana slices & Cherry.
Serve with large soda straws in tall wine glass.

name: Hpno-Tini
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a martini glass.
Garnish with a lemon slice.

name: T.g.i. Friday's Mudslide (Mud Boy Recipe)
directions: Pour ingredients into a blender filled with ice.
Blend on high until smooth.
Serve in a tall glass. Enjoy!

name: Butter Mint Coffee Blend
directions: Combine the first 4 ingredients together in medium mixing bowl.
Divide equally and pour into jars.
Divide and layer instant coffee on top of each.
Secure lid and attach instructions.
Instructions:
Place mixture in a bowl and toss lightly.
Spoon back into jar.
Combine 1/4 cup mix with 2/3 cups boiling water.
Stir until mixture dissolves.

name: White Chocolate Boysenberry Cappuccino
directions: Steam milk to 160 degrees making froth on top. If you don't have an espresso machine, you can just heat the milk in a saucepan on the stove. Set aside.
In small 8 oz. cup, add white chocolate sauce and boysenberry syrup.
Add hot espresso and stir well.
Add steamed milk to within a 1/2" from top of cup. Stir.
Add 2-3 Tbl. milk froth and fold in to make it extra creamy.
Top with whipped cream, white chocolate shavings and even a light drizzling of more boysenberry syrup if desired.
Enjoy! :).
*Note: This drink does not require any additional sugar added, the sauce and syrup are very, very sweet.

name: Sweet Release
directions: Macerate strawberries and raspberries with rum and sugar.
Slightly whip cream.
Swirl together 1 part rum-berry puree to 2 parts slightly whipped cream in a champagne flute.
Garnish with fresh berries.

name: Hot Totty!
directions: Coat the bottom of a mug with honey.
Add the brandy and the lemon juice.
On the side, boil your water and use the tea bag to make hot tea.
Pour the tea into your honey/lemon/brandy goodness.
And waaala --  home.

name: Cherry Bomb
directions: Using a squeeze bottle, pour chocolate liquor into a martini glass in a circular motion.  Pour cherry liquor into the center of the glass and put in the freezer.  Mix and shake the vodkas and pour into the frozen glass.
Garnish with a maraschino cherry soaked in Godiva liquor.

name: T.g.i. Friday's B-1b (Drink)
directions: Fill a shaker half full with ice cubes.
Pour all ingredients into shaker and shake well. Fill a Highball glass almost full with ice cubes and strain drink into Highball glass.
Garnish with a Maraschino Cherry.

name: Margaritas
directions: Prepare base and keep refrigerated.  Use six ounces of base to mix with alcohols.  Float with extra Grand Manier.

name: Ice Palace
directions: Shake all ingredients (except orange slice) with ice and strain into a collins glass over ice cubes.
Garnish with the slice of orange and a cherry (if desired) and serve.

name: Lambswool
directions: Preheat oven to 180°C: 350°F: Gas 4.
Core the apples and bake  in 350 degree oven for about 40 minutes until very soft.
Squeeze all of the pulp from the apples and discard the skins then fluff the puree with a fork.
Heat the ale and cider with the cinnamon stick and cloves.
Add the apple puree and sugar to taste.
Serve immediately.

name: Mexican Coffee
directions: Place coffee and cinnamon in the filter basket of coffee maker.
Add water to coffee maker and brew as directed.
In a saucepan, blend milk, chocolate syrup and sugar.
Stir over low heat until sugar dissolves.
Combine milk mixture and brewed coffee.
Stir in vanilla.

name: Spiced Orange Cider
directions: Place water in microwaveable cup and microwave for 1 min on high.
Stir in cider mix till disolved.
Add orange juice to cup and microwave another 30 sec to 1 min or till hot as you desire.

name: The 69
directions: fill glass with ice.
2oz of frangelico and fill w/ pineapple juice.
make in rock glass.

name: Hurricane
directions: Shake all the ingredients well with ice, and strain into a highball glass.
Decorate with slices of pineapple and orange and a cherry.

name: Pomegranate-Key Lime Vodka Cocktails
directions: Combine sugar and 1/4 cup water in a small saucepan; bring to a boil.  Reduce heat, and simmer 2 minutes or just until sugar dissolves.  Remove from heat; cool.

Combine sugar syrup, club soda, pomegranate juice, vodka and lime juice.  Place crushed ice in a martini shaker; add about 3/4 cup pomegranate mixture.  Cover and shake.  Strain into a glass.  Garnish with lime slice, if desired.  Repeat procedure with remaining pomegranate mixture.

name: Hot Penny Rum
directions: Add the rum, bourbon, and creme de cacao to a warmed 6-8 oz Irish coffee glass.
Fill almost to the top with coffee.
Top with whipped cream and serve immediately.

name: Cranberry Margarita
directions: Note: if you cannot find presweetened cranberries at your grocery, then combine ¼ cup whole cranberries with 3 tablespoons simple syrup in a pan over low heat; cook, stirring often, until berries become soft.
Combine the first 4 ingredients in a blender with ¾ cup ice; blend until smooth; may add a bit of white cranberry juice, if desired, for a smoother consistency.
There should be a lot of little red cranberry flecks throughout this drink.

name: Orange Syllabub
directions: Shake the wine, orange juice, sugar and cream together in a bottle and pour into a wine glass.
Whisk until frothy.
Top with rediwhip and garnish with an orange slice or you could use some thawed cool whip.

name: Red Lobster - Cranberry-Apple Sangria
directions: Orange wedges and green apple chunks for garnish
Place the canned cranberries in a blender and puree for approximately 4-5 seconds. The mixture should not be totally smooth. Measure out 4 ounces.
In a two-quart container or pitcher, combine all the ingredients.
Stir well and store in refrigerator until ready to serve.
Serve approximately 6 ounces of the beverage over ice in a tall glass. Garnish with a fresh skewer of fruit using the orange wedges and green apple chunks.
Chef's Tips:

It's best to make sangria a day in advance, because the longer the flavors can blend together, the better. Don’t put the fruit into the sangria at the last minute. Allow it to soak up the flavor of the liquids. Use a quality wine in your sangria, and make sure to put it in the glass or pitcher before you start mixing in the other ingredients. Since fruit is a great expression of the seasons, use those types that are fresh and in season. For example, during the summer, mix a white wine with peaches, nectarines and blueberries. In the winter, use citrus fruits like oranges and tangerines. In the fall, choose apples and berries. Be sure you use fruit juices that are consistent with the fruits in your sangria. In the summer, use peach nectar. If you’re using citrus fruits, use orange juice. If you're using berries, use cranberry juice.

name: Happy Marriage and Hot Chocolate
directions: FOR THE HAPPY MARRIAGE:  Combine the chocolate and coffee in a mixing bowl, then sweeten to taste.  Whip vigorously with a wire whisk until frothy.  Stir in the brandy, then pour into 2 tall glasses.  Spoon whipped cream on top and serve long spoons for stirring. This may be served hot in mugs, if desired.  This makes 3 servings.
HOT CHOCOLATE:  Scald the milk with the vanilla pod, then remove the vanilla pod.

Place the chocolate chips in the top of a double boiler and melt. Since chocolate scorches easily, it is best to melt it in a double boiler, which takes only ten to twelve minutes.  Stir in the sugar and salt and place the top of the double boiler over hot, not boiling, water.  Add 1 1/2 cups boiling water slowly, stirring constantly, then stir until blended.  Add the milk gradually, stirring constantly, then leave over the hot water for 1 minute.  Remove the top of the double boiler from the hot water.  Beat the Hot Chocolate with a large wire whisk until frothy.  Pour into cups and garnish with dollops of whipped cream.  This makes about fourteen 1/2 cup servings.
The Creative Cooking Course.

similar.name: Fabulous Hot Cocoa for a Group

name: Pb&j Martini
directions: Fill cocktail shaker with ice cubes.
Add all ingredients and shake vigorously.  Strain into chilled martini glass.

name: Wisconsin Brandy or Whiskey Old-Fashioned
directions: Place the sugar cube and bitters into an old fashioned glass (8-12 oz. tumbler style glass) and muddle together with a spoon or muddler.  (We prefer to use the super-fine sugar because you can stir it all together without muddling.).
Add some ice, to your liking.
Add the brandy or whiskey.
Top off the glass with either 50/50 soda or 7-up (sour or sweet!).
Garnish as described above.

name: Fireside Martini
directions: In a cocktail shaker filled with ice, add vodka, Irish Cream and crème de cacao.
Shake until frothy and strain into a Martini glass rimmed with crushed.
chocolate.

name: Tennessee Tea
directions: Add all ingredients to a highball glass filled with ice.
Stir and garnish with a lemon slice.

name: Liquor-Free  Eggnog
directions: Combine eggs, CONDENSED milk, vanilla, & salt until thoroughly blended.
Gradually beat in milk & eggnog.
Gently fold in whipping cream.
Sprinkle with nutmeg.
Keep chilled.

name: Strong Hot Chocolate
directions: Off the heat, in a 1-quart saucepan, combine the milk and cream. Split the vanilla bean lengthwise and use the tip of your knife to scrape the seeds into the saucepan, then add the scraped pod.
Whisk the cocoa powder and brown sugar into the milk, then place the saucepan over medium heat and whisk for 5 to 7 minutes, or until frothy and simmering.
Place the chocolate in a heatproof bowl. Remove and discard the vanilla pod from the milk mixture, then pour the mixture over the chocolate. Add the salt and whisk until the chocolate is smooth.
Divide the hot chocolate among cups and top each with 2 marshmallows or a dollop of whipped cream. Can be cooled, tightly covered and refrigerated up to 3 days.

name: Black Jack Martini
directions: Shake whiskey and Chambord with ice.
Strain into a martini glass.
Add a splash of Sprite.
Garnish with lemon.

name: Vodkatini
directions: Half fill a mixing glass with ice.
Add the dry vermouth,stir to coat the ice.
Add vodka,then stir and strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with a twist of lemon.

name: Key Lime Martini
directions: Add all ingredients into a martini shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously and strain into a martini glass.
Enjoy!

name: Spicy Mocha
directions: Combine the milk, chilies and cinnamon sticks in a heavy large saucepan.
Bring to a simmer over high heat.  Remove from heat, cover and steep for 15 minutes.
Whisk in the espresso, sugar and 1 cup of the cocoa powder.
Bring the hot chocolate to a simmer, whisking often.
Discard the chilies and cinnamon sticks.
Meanwhile, whisk the powdered sugar and remaining 1/4 cup cocoa powder in a large bowl to blend.
Add the cream and whisk until the mixture is thick.
Ladle the hot chocolate into 8 mugs.  Spoon the whipped cream on top and serve immediately.

name: A Peach Infused Vodka
directions: Add the ingredients in a bottle.
Seal the lid tightly and store in a dark,cool place for 3 to 5 days.
Gently shake the mixture now and then and check how the flavor is developing.
The longer you leave it the stronger it will get.
When you are done,strain the liquid.
into the original bottle and store in the freezer.
Ready to drink.

name: Sleep Tight
directions: Warm a coffee cup with hot water and empty.
Steam milk and honey using the wand of an espresso machine until hot and slightly frothed.  Pour cognac into warmed coffee mug and top with steamed milk and a dollop of foam.

name: Cantaloupe Agua Fresca
directions: Peel, seed, and coarsely chop melon.
Place 2 cups melon in a blender, add enough water to cover melon, and blend well. Strain, reserving liquid.
Place liquid in a 2-qt pitcher and discard solids.
Repeat procedure with remaining cantaloupe.
Add lime juice and sugar to pitcher and stir well. Serve over ice.

name: Chambord Margarita
directions: Add the tequila, Chambord, simple syrup, lemon juice, and lime juice to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously; strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
If serving frozen, combine liquid ingredients in a blender with ¾ cup ice; blend until smooth; pour into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with lime wedge.

name: White Lady (No Egg)
directions: Put ice into glass.
Pour in other ingredients.
Stir.
Enjoy.

name: Basic Chai Tea
directions: With the side of a cleaver or chef’s knife, gently crush the whole spices, then add them to a small saucepan, along with ginger, cloves, tea leaves, and sugar.
Add in 1 cup water and bring to a boil over medium heat.
Cover pan and remove from heat; steep for 3 minutes.
Return pan to low heat and add in milk.
Bring to just a simmer, then pour through a fine-mesh sieve into 2 warmed teacups or small mugs.
Serve immediately.

name: Champagne Love Shots
directions: Spoon the puree into a champagne flute and pour champagne on top.  How easy is that!

name: Girl Scout Cookie Shot
directions: Add ingredients to a shaker and shake (either on ice or not).
Pour into shot glass. Enjoy!

name: Ww Margarita
directions: Mix together in shaker or in blender.

similar.name: Hungry Girl's  Magical Low Calorie Margarita

name: Glögg
directions: In a saucepan, combine the wine, port, cognac, orange zest, and spices along with 2 cups water; bring to a boil.
Decrease heat and simmer for about 5 minutes.
Cool, cover, and refrigerate overnight, at least 12 hours.
Strain the mixture, then reheat it (do not boil) and add sugar, to taste.
Add the raisins and almonds (you may just put a teaspoonful in each glass if you are using these) and serve hot.

name: Etude in Green
directions: Muddle cucumber slices with mint.  Add vodka, green tea, lime juice and simple syrup.
Shake with ice and strain into chilled martini glass.  Garnish with slice of cucumber and mint.

name: Chopin's Player's Cup
directions: Combine all ingredients and add ice.  Shake briefly and top with ginger ale and Angostura.
To your health!

name: Pear & Ginger Mule
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice.  Strain into a rocks glass and top of with non-alcoholic ginger beer.  Garnish with a wedge of pear.

name: Bohemian Luxury
directions: Shake vodka, juice and liqueur with ice.  Pour into you best champagne flute, top with Moët & Chandon Nectar Impérial Rosé and top off with an orchid.
Now if doesn't impress, I don't know what will!

name: So. Co. Slush
directions: Thoroughly combine all ingredients. Pour into freezer containers and freeze until firm. Remove from freezer about 10 minutes before serving. Makes 2 quarts.

name: Mississippi Mud (Alcoholic)
directions: Place ice cream, Southern Comfort and liqueur in blender. Blend just until thick. Spoon into cocktail or parfait glasses and garnish with shaved chocolate.

name: Sassy Wine Spritzer for the Holidays
directions: in blender, chop up ice (if you already have crushed ice you can skip this step).
put into pitcher.
add in wine, soda, and 3-4 cherries and 2 tsp juice.
stir gently.
pour into your favorite wine or beverage glass (martini or marguerita glasses look great with this).
dress with a wedge of lime or lemon and a cherry.
CHEERS.

name: Hamners Hammer
directions: Mix in a pitcher and serve.

name: Rhubarb Soda
directions: In a small pan, bring the rhubarb, sugar, and water to a boil.
Lower heat and stir occasionally until the sugar has dissolved and the mixture has reduced into a light syrup, about 10 minutes.
Strain through a mesh strainer and press the rhubarb bits with the back of the spoon to release all of the juices into a bowl.
Add about a tablespoon of the syrup to the bottom of each cup and top with club soda. Serve immediately.

name: Cleansing Cocktail
directions: Combine cranberry juice with water.  Bring to a light boil.
Place cinnamon, ginger and nutmeg in a tea ball and steep in the liquid for 15 minutes.
Allow to cool, then stir in oj, lemon juice and steviaplus natural sweetener to taste.
The above make one day's worth.
The Plan:

Upon waking, stir 2 tbs ground flaxseed into 1 cup of the cleansing cocktail and drink.  One hour later, drink 8 oz water.  Every hour for the next 12 hours, alternate drinking a glass of juice (no flax) with a glass of water.  Before bed, mix another 2 tbs ground flax in the final cup of juice and enjoy.

name: Espresso Martini With a Twist
directions: Fill cocktail shaker with ice.
Add half the vodka, Kahlua, creme de cacao, and espresso.
Shake vigorously—the mixture will become foamy.
Pour the mixture into 2 chilled martini glasses and drop in 3 coffee beans per glass; garnish with lemon peel.
Repeat for two more cocktails.

name: Butterbeer (Alcoholic)
directions: Add ice cubes to tall glass.
Add vodka.
Add schnapps.
Add soda.
Enjoy and drink responsibly.

I used ounce measurement because this site doesn't accept "parts" as a valid measure. But basically, it's equal parts vodka and schnapps to half as much soda. You can adjust the soda for a less strong version.

name: Anniversary Cappuccino
directions: In a 12-ounce cup, combine syrups and espresso.
Fill cup with steamed half-and-half and top with foamed half-and-half.
Top with whipped cream and sprinkle with cocoa.

name: Baklava Latte
directions: In a 10-ounce cup, combine syrups, honey and espresso.
Fill cup with steamed milk, top with a small dollop of foamed milk, sprinkle generously with cinnamon and garnish with a cinnamon stick.
Serve immediately.

name: Bailey's Comet
directions: Shake and Strain the Butterscotch, Bailey's, and Goldschlager into a cocktail glass.
Float the Sambuca, then sprinkle Cinnamon or Nutmeg into drink. (Before you flame the drink).
Just before presentation, flame the drink.
As the Sambuca burns, the cinnamon will sparkle.

name: Acapulco Mocha Iced Latte
directions: Fill a 12-ounce glass with ice, add espresso and syrups and fill with cold milk.
Stir to combine flavors and serve immediately.

name: Apple Pie Latte
directions: In an 8-ounce cup, combine syrups and espresso.
Fill cup with steamed milk, top with a small dollop of foamed milk and sprinkle with cinnamon.
Serve immediately.

name: Hot Caramel Apple Cider  (Starbucks Copycat)
directions: Heat apple cider.  (either microwave for 1, stove top for a couple or  when I did them for a crowd I kept it hot in a crockpot).
Drizzle caramel syrup in cup; stir to combine.
Top with whipped cream.

name: Chocolate Covered Cherry Jello Shots
directions: Bring water to a boil.
Combine hot water and cherry jello, stir until dissolved.
Add creme de cacao.
Dispense into 1-ounce plastic cups.
Chill.

similar.name: Wild Women's Chocolate Covered Cherry Jello Shots

name: Blood Orange Sangria
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large pitcher and stir until sugar dissolves.  Cover and chill 8 hours or overnight.  Discard cloves and cinnamon sticks.  Pour sangria into individual glasses, including the fruit.

name: Frozen Cranberry Margaritas
directions: Combine the first 5 ingredients in a blender.  Fill blender with ice to 5 cups level and process until smooth.  Serve immediately.

name: Irish Cream
directions: Mix in blender.
Store in fridge.
Makes an excellent after dinner drink!

name: Cancun Coffee
directions: Moisten rim of coffee mug with lime and dip rim in sugar. Pour liqueurs into mug and fill with coffee. Top with whipped cream.

name: Red Rooster
directions: Build the drink in a collins glass.

name: La Vie En Rose Champagne Cocktail
directions: Mix lime juice, Cointreau, and cranberry juice in a pitcher; chill, covered, for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Moisten rim of champagne flutes with water and dip it into a saucer of superfine sugar to coat.
Divide juice mixture among flutes and add ½ cup champagne to each; stir once gently.
Garnish with fresh orange wheel or a fresh cherry.

name: Black Widow
directions: Build over ice in an old-fashioned glass.

name: Margarita Sunrise
directions: Add lime juice, orange liqueur, tequila, powdered sugar, and orange juice to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Cover w/ lid and shake vigorously until thoroughly chilled.
Strain into chilled cocktail glass; add club soda or Sprite for a little fizz, if desired.
Top with grenadine; serve immediately.

name: Absolut Ruby Gem
directions: Shake first three ingredients with ice and strain into a cocktail glass.
Top with the splash of ginger ale.

name: Easy and Delicious Real Hot Chocolate
directions: Combine milk and half-and-half, heat on medium until just below simmering.
Remove pan from heat and add all chocolate. When melted, add sugar, vanilla extract and vanilla bean seeds. Whisk together until well combined.
Return pan to stove on low, reheating gently. Serve immediately in mugs, using vanilla bean to garnish.
Note: Use any type of chocolate you like.  White chocolate is wonderful, and so is Mexican chocolate. Blending chocolate types is also fun and delicious.
Note: Cinnamon sticks are a nice garnish, as well.
Note: Add about three or four tablespoons of dark rum if you want to make this a delicious adult beverage.

name: Michael’s Hard Lemonade
directions: Fill a large pitcher with ice.  Pour in vodka, sugar, lemon zest and juice. Stir well to dissolve the sugar.  Fill the pitcher with water and stir again.

name: Apple and Cinnamon Joy
directions: Pour Sour Apple Puckers into shot glass, almost to the top.
Add a dash of Goldschlager to fill shot glass.
SHOOT!

name: Holyfield's Ear
directions: Fill a standard shot glass 1/2 full of Creme de Noyaux and then layer Kahlua on top; black and red -- just like Hollyfields' ear.

name: Low Sugar Lynchburg Lemonade
directions: Fill a tall collins glass with ice.
Pour all ingredients except soda into glass. Stir.
Add soda and stir lightly.
garnish edge with lemon slice.

name: Quarterback Sneak-Y Martini (Beer 'n Tomato Juice Cocktail)
directions: In small pitcher or martini shaker, slowly pour in beer.
Slowly/gently stir in tomato juice.
Stir in 1 drop Worcestershire only if you really, really like it, and a dash of hot sauce if you like it extra hot!
Add a few ice cubes, and swirl, don't shake!, til chilled.
Strain and slowly pour into 2 chilled martini glasses. Try not to let it foam.
Srinkle tops of each with a little celery salt and pepper.
Place a celery stick and green onion into each glass for "stirrers".
Enjoy!
*Note: I use the V-8 Spicy Hot Tomato/Vegetable juice for this.

similar.name: Victory's Kicked up Tomato Juice Cocktail

name: Mr. Funk's Punch
directions: Mix and serve over ice.

name: Blood Regenerator (Juicer)
directions: Place in juicer 1-2 carrots at a time. Then spinach and lettuce leaves. Then juice 1/2 beet and parsley together.
Stir and serve.

name: Alexander Espresso
directions: Break out your espresso machine for this one or just make really strong coffee with.
a small amount of water.
Break cinnamon stick into small pieces and add to hot espresso.
Allow to cool for 1 minute.
Add creme de cacao and brandy, and stir.
gently.
Pour into cute demitasse cups.
Float some cream on top of each cup.
For looks, garnish with grated chocolate or fancy chocolate curls.

name: Good-For-You Healthy Cappuccino
directions: Place yogurt, milk and ice cream in a blender and blend until smooth.  Pour into 4 chilled glasses.
Sprinkle with cocoa and/or cinnamon.

name: Coffee & Milk Tea Mix (Hk Style)
directions: Put the teabag into the cup along with the regular (adults) or the Naturally Decaffeinated (children).
Then fill the cup up to a little more than a 3/4 of boiling water. (Hold the teabag string so it won't fall in); stir.
Then add sugar and milk while stirring.
Throw the teabag away after.

similar.name: Perfect Sweet Tea (Secret of the South)

name: Midori Cosmopolitan
directions: Shake with ice and pour into martini glass.
Garnish with raspberries.

name: Octopussy
directions: In a large mouth mason jar, add first 4 ingredients. Fill glass with ice.
Top off with half sweet and sour, half orange juice.
Garnish with orange slice if desired.

name: Tropical Tea
directions: In a saucepan, bring the orange juice to a boil. Remove from heat and add all other ingredients except for lemon slices.
Cover and let steep for 5 minutes or until desired strength. Remove tea bags allow to cool then chill.
Strain and serve in glasses garnished with lemon.

name: Homemade Kahlua
directions: Mix sugar,water and coffee togetherand bring to a slow boil.Turn heat down and simmer for 1 hour.Remove from heat ,cover with plastic wrap.Let sit for 12 hours,then remove wrap(it might pick up film from the top)Add vodka and the vanilla stir well.Bottle in dark bottles.

name: Taste of Honey
directions: Blend all ingredients in a blender with crushed ice.
Pour in a cocktail glass to serve.

name: Orange Brandy Cooler
directions: Combine brandy, cherry brandy, curacao, and orange juice in a tall glass with cubed ice.
Fill glass with soda.
Garnish with an orange wedge.

name: Hypnotiq Blue Breeze
directions: Pour ingredients over ice in a high ball glass, stir.
Garnish with a lemon or orange twist.

name: Berry Hpnotiq
directions: Serve over ice in a rocks glass.
Slowly add Chambord.

name: Bouboni-Q
directions: Layer over ice in a rocks glass.

name: French Blue Hpnotiq
directions: Shake all ingredients (except soda water) with ice, pour into highball glass.
Add soda water to fill.

name: Hpno-Blue Dreamsicle
directions: Pour over ice and serve in a rocks glass.
Garnish with a cherry.

name: Hpno-Blue Lounge Lizard
directions: Combine all ingredients, + ice in a highball glass.
Garnish with lemon wheel.

name: Hpnotiq Blue Dragonfly
directions: Serve over ice in a rocks glass.
Granish with lemon wedge.

name: Hpnotiq Blue Ibiza
directions: Bleand with ice, serve in a hurricane glass.
Garnish with a pineapple wedge and a cherry.

similar.name: Double Berry Margaritas in the Ice Cream Maker

name: Hpnotiq Lei
directions: Shake with ice, pour into a highball glass.
Garnish with a pineapple slice.

name: Hpnotiq Metro
directions: Serve over ice in a rocks glass.
Garnish with lemon wedge.

name: Hpnotiq Mojito (Hpno-Hito)
directions: Muddle mint leaves in bottom of glass.
Add Hpnotiq, rum, crushed ice and stir.
Top with club soda.

name: Hypnotiq Peach Spray
directions: Pour over ice in a rocks glass.
Garnish with a lemon wedge.

name: Strawberry Sucker (Alcohol)
directions: Fill a tall highball glass with ice cubes. Add the vodka and schnapps and top with club soda. Garnish with the strawberry.

name: Espresso Martini
directions: Have on hand: shaker, strainer, & cocktail glass
Fill a shaker with ice and combine 1-1/2 oz. vanilla vodka, 1-1/2 oz. Kahlúa, 1 oz. crème de cacao and a shot of espresso.
Shake well and strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Parisian Blonde
directions: Shake all the ingredients well with ice and strain into a cocktail glass.
Decorate with orange slice.

name: Black Death
directions: In a layering glass, layer the ingredients in the following order: Kahlua, Romana Sambuca, Bailey's, and half and half.

name: Alien Orgasm
directions: Fill shaker with ice. Add the Amaretto, melon liquer, and peach schnapps. Shake well.
Fill glass with ice. Strain liquid in shaker into glass.
Fill the rest of the the glass with equal amounts of orange and pineapple juice. Enjoy!

name: Hot Mountain Cider
directions: Combine apple cider and lemon juice in a dutch oven. Cook over medium heat until mixture simmers.
Add tequila and orange liqueur. Cook until heated. To serve, pour into individual mugs and garnish with lemon slices.

name: Pallini Fresco
directions: Chill all ingredients overnight before making this (limoncello is best stored in freezer).
Add all ingredients to small glass and garnish with a lemon or lime slice.

name: Hot Chocolate for a Restful Afternoon (Adult)
directions: Put hot chocolate mix in mug, add hot water to desired consistency, stir in Frangelico and Amaretto.
Top with your desired toppings.

name: Green Haze
directions: Fill your cocktail shaker with ice and add the De Kuyper Crème de Menthe- Green and gin. Shake well and strain into a martini glass. Top up carefully with pineapple juice.

name: Fireside Coffee
directions: Mix all ingredients.
Place 3 heaping teaspoons in one cup of HOT water.

name: Creamy Vodkanilla
directions: Pour all ingredients into a highball glass filled with ice cubes.
Stir well, and serve.

name: Cosmalize
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass, and serve.

name: Licorice Stick (Shot)
directions: Shake ingredients with ice in a cocktail shaker.
Strain into a shot glass, and serve.

name: Coffee Keokee
directions: Mix and serve in an Irish coffee cup.

name: Coffee Alla Chocolata
directions: Add chocolate mint liqueur to the cup of freshly brewed coffee. Top off with whipped cream and shaved chocolate.

name: Strawbreeze
directions: Build over ice in a highball glass.
Fill with pineapple juice.

name: Frozen Rose
directions: Mix all ingredients with crushed ice in a blender.
Pour into a chilled cocktail glass and decorate with a strawberry and a lime wedge.

name: Apple Cake Shooter
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice in a cocktail shaker.
Strain into a shot glass.

name: Raspberry and Spearmint Iced Tea
directions: Place raspberries and sugar in a large heatproof jug and stand for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until sugar has dissolved.

Meanwhile, place teabags in a separate heatproof jug, add 1L boiling water and steep for 5 minutes. Add peppermint tea to raspberry mixture and gently stir. Strain, reserving a few raspberries and set aside to cool to room temperature.
Add spearmint leaves and chill. Serve cold with reserved raspberries and crushed ice.

name: The Perfect Gin and Tonic
directions: Chill the glass. You may want to fill it with ice, then empty it and refill, as some bartenders do with a martini glass.
Fill the glass with whole ice cubes. If you wish, take a wedge of lime and moisten the rim the glass with it.
Pour the gin over the ice, which should be cold enough that it crackles when the liquor hits it.
Fill glass almost to the top with tonic.

Squeeze one wedge of lime into the glass.  Drop the squeezed lime into the drink as a garnish if you like; it’s not necessary, but can add a bit of extra flavor. (If you do, notes Dale DeGroff, make sure the peel has been washed.) Serve.

name: Rolls Royce Cocktail
directions: Put the ice in a cocktail glass, and put the orange bitters over the ice.
Mix the dry vermouth, gin and whiskey, stir.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Italian Sodas
directions: Fill a 16 ounce glass half full with crushed ice.  Add your flavor choice of Torani syrup and the sparkling water or club soda.  Stir.
To make it an Italian cream soda, float the half-and-half on top of the drink.  Stir in just prior to drinking.
Use a single flavor or syrup, or try one of these combinations.
1 ounce lemon syrup with 1/2 ounce strawberry syrup.
1 ounce pink grapefruit syrup with 1/2 ounce mandarin orange syrup.
3/4 ounce cranberry syrup with 1/4 ounce lime syrup.
1/2 ounce cherry syrup with 1/2 ounce vanilla syrup.

name: Adam's Apple Cocktail
directions: Put the ice in a mixing glass. Dash the Chartreuse over the ice. Pour in the brandy, gin and vermouth.
Stir well to mix then strain into a chilled glass.

name: Non-Alcoholic Mango Margaritas
directions: In a large pitcher, combine mango nector, club soda, and lime juice.
Stir well and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
Serve over ice in a salt-rimmed glass.

name: Squashed Frog Cocktail
directions: Pour Midori then Advocaat in glass. Add a few dashes of grenadine and then float Bailey's on top.

name: Blood Orange Margaritas
directions: Moisten rim of 2 margarita glasses and dip in kosher salt.
Fill a cocktail shaker with crushed ice.
Add orange juice, tequila, and triple sec.
Shake well and strain into glasses.
Garnish with orange wedges, if desired.

name: Urban Jungle
directions: Put all ingredients in a tall glass.
Blend briefly with a tablespoon of crushed ice in a champagne saucer, and serve.

name: Uncle Sam
directions: Pour three liquors in a shot glass.
Better if chilled, prettier if layered.

name: Chilly Willy Cocktail
directions: Pour into shaker. Fill with orange and pineapple juice. Shake well.

name: Chef Joey's Cinnamon Mocha Coco
directions: Add the almond milk to a large saucepan and heat it slightly, then add the rest of the ingredients.
Using a whisk, whip everything together and serve in a nice cup.
This tastes better if you  heat it up slowly, but don't boil it.
The heating times may vary depending on your stove.
Bon Appetit!

name: Baileys Mint Chocolate Martini
directions: Shake with ice and strain.
Garnish with fresh mint and chocolate stick.

name: Kahlua  Hot  Chocolate -- Heaven Sent
directions: Boil water in microwave or on stove top.
While stirring, mix cocoa packet with water.
Add kahlua and stir well.
Add toppings, if desired.

name: Bit-O-Honey Cocktail
directions: Mix equal parts of Baily's and Schnapps.
Either pour over ice or drink as a shooter.

name: Lavender Lemonade
directions: In a glass or stainless steel pot, bring 8 cups water to a boil; turn off heat.
Add dry herbs and cover tightly.
Let stand 8 hours or overnight; refrigerate when cool.
Remove zest of the 3 lemons with paring knife, chop coarsely and combine with 2 1/2 cups water in saucepan.
Cover and simmer 2-3 minutes. Remove from heat and allow to cool until lukewarm.
Rmove zest and add syrup and honey to the sweet water and lemon juice to make a double strength lemonade base.
To serve combine equal parts lemonade base, herbal tea and water adjusting taste as desired.
Chill and serve in glasses or a punch bowl garnished with edible flowers, fresh herbs, or lemon slices.
Lemonade base and herb te can be stored in covered glass jars for 3-4 days in the refrigerator.
Serves 15-20.

name: '57 Chevy
directions: Shake the bourbon, Grand Marnier and Vodka. Pour into a cocktail glass and add pineapple juice to fill.

name: The Hummer
directions: Blend all ingredients together and serve in a hurricane glass.

name: Booda's Black Brew
directions: Fill a Hurricane Glass with Ice .  Top off with rum, blue curoaca, and raspberry liqueur.  Top off with cranberry juice and grenadine.

name: Hpnotiq Blue Breeze
directions: Pour ingredients over ice in a high ball glass; stir.
Garnish with a lemon or orange twist.

name: Forbidden Fruit Martini
directions: Combine all three ingredients in a martini shaker, and gently shake.
Pour into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish by dropping a single cherry into the glass (for a nice contrast of color), or even a butterscotch candy inside.
Enjoy!

name: Flori's Hot Tub Heaven
directions: Please add in order from light to heavy finishing with coffee.
No mixing required.

name: Sam's Potato Vodka Cocktail
directions: Put the mint and lime pieces into the bottom of a short glass and muddle (squish down with a muddler until the mint and limes are kind of mashed up).
Fill glass with ice and pour in the vodka and ginger beer.
Stir and enjoy.

name: The Plum
directions: Combine all ingredients and mix well.
Serve straight up or over ice.
I have been known to add ice to make it slushy.

name: Almond and Lime Lemonade
directions: In a 2-quart pitcher, combine water, lemonade, and orange juice concentrates, pineapple juice, lime juice, vanilla, and almond extract until well blended.
Chill until cold; serve over ice.

name: Candy Cane Martini
directions: For the glass rim: place candy cane or peppermint candies  in a blender; blend to crush; pieces should only be a tad larger than coarse sand.
Dip rim of a martini glass in simple syrup and then into the peppermint mixture.
Drink: add vodka, creme de cacao, and pepeprmint schnapps to a cocktail shaker filled with ice; shake vigorously.
Strain into rimmed martini glass; drop in a peppermint candy for garnish.

name: Lemon Coconut Colada
directions: In a shaker filled with ice; combine all ingredients; shake to blend.
Strain into  ice filled hurricane glasses.
Garnish with lemon zest.

name: Jamaican Crawler Cocktail
directions: Combine rum, melon liqueur and pineapple juice with ice; stir well.
Pour into Collins glass; float splash of grenadine on top.

similar.name: Jamaican Coconut Water & White Rum Cocktail

name: Strawberry Orange Relaxer
directions: Put all ingredients in blender and blend till smooth and desired thickness. Enjoy.

name: "in the Pink" Lemonade
directions: Mix all ingredients together well (except fruit) in a 2 quart pitcher. Chill until ready to serve.

name: Almond Joy
directions: Blend all ingredients with crushed ice.
Pour into a wine glass to serve.

name: Ice Blue Hpnotiq
directions: Shake with ice, then strain into a martini glass.  Garnish with a thin, floating lime wheel.

name: Hpnotiq Beach
directions: Layer in order over ice in a rocks glass.
Garnish with a cherry.

name: Lemon-Tiq
directions: Layer over ice in a rocks glass.
Garnish with a lemon twist.

name: Ginger Blues
directions: Shake together the Blue Curaçao, De Kirsch and lemon juice in a cocktail shaker. Pour into a highball glass half filled with cubed ice. Top up with ginger ale.

name: Tipsy Coke Float
directions: In an 8 ounce glass, mix the Ameretto, Kahlua, Bailey's Irish Cream, and Vodka.
Pour above mixture into Coke.
Add ice if desired.

name: Bird of Paradise
directions: Blend all ingredients with crushed ice.
Serve in a sour glass or fluted wine glass.

name: Manhandler
directions: Combine all 4 ounces of liquor and mix well.
Pour into glass and serve.
You can put this over ice if desired.

name: Cream Puff Cocktail
directions: In shaker fill with ice, blend rum, cream and sugar; shake to blend.
Strain into highball glass with two ice cubes.
Fill glass with Club Soda; stir.

name: Blue Chimney Smoke
directions: Place ice in a large wineglass. Add the tequila and orange juice and stir. Float the syrup on top.

name: Low-Fat, Sugar-Free Mock Latte
directions: Heat milk in microwave (or stovetop) until simmering.
Pour into a mug.
Add coffee powder and sweetner.
Whisk with a skinny whisk.

name: Pousse Café
directions: Just show off your layering abilities!

name: Adult Root Beer Float
directions: Pour vanilla flavored run a a tall glass filled with ice, add root beer and enjoy!

name: Grasshopper Hot Chocolate
directions: In a heavy saucepan, combine the cocoa powder,  sugar, water, vanilla, and a pinch of salt: heat the mixture over low heat, whisking, until the cocoa powder is dissolved and the mixture is a smooth paste.
Gradually add the half-and-half and the milk, (both scalded), and simmer hot chocolate, whisking, for 2 minutes.
Stir in the crème de menthe and the crème de cacao.
Note: (For a frothy result, in a blender blend the hot chocolate in batches.)
Divide the chocolate among mugs and top it with the whipped cream and the chocolate.

name: Red Fred (Alcoholic)
directions: Fill a cocktail glass with ice.
Add vodka.
Fill glass almost to the top with club soda.
Add a splash of cranberry juice and the juice from 1/4 lime.
Stir.
Garnish glass with a slice of lime.
Cheers!

name: Oatmeal Cookie Martini
directions: Rim: wet the rim of a martini glass with simple syrup and dip into cinnamon sugar several times to ensure coverage; set glass aside.
Drink: add Irish cream, Goldschlager, schnapps, Jagermeister, and light cream to a cocktail shaker filled with ice; shake moderately.
Strain into prepared glass.
Garnish with 3-5 skewered raisins.

name: Fresca Refresher
directions: Fill 8 tall glasses with cracked ice; add about ½ cup lemonade to each glass.
Top each glass with Fresca.
Garnish each glass with a slice of lime; serve.

name: Turkish-Style Mocha
directions: Combine the coffee and cardamom in a coffee filter; brew coffee in a coffemaker with the water.
Meanwhile, heat milk, sugar, and syrup in a saucepan over medium heat; stir in the brewed coffee.
Pour into 4 cups and serve.

name: Apple Pie Martini
directions: Fill cocktail shaker halfway with ice.
Add in vodka, Goldschlager, apple juice, and cranberry juice.
Shake vigorously for 5-10 seconds.
Strain drink into a chilled cocktail glass; garnish with apple slice.

name: Valentine’s Day Latte
directions: Add the creme de cacao, creme de menthe and amaretto to a preheated coffee glass.
Slowly add the steamed milk and then the espresso to the glass.
Top the drink with milk foam and a sprinkle of cinnamon.

name: Vegan Orange Dream
directions: In a blender, combine everything except the orange segments. Blend until smooth and frothy, about 30 seconds.
Pour into tall, chilled glasses and garnish with orange segments.

name: Love Triangle
directions: gently stir Amaretto Di amore with Litani Mawarad Rosewater two capfulls is 1/2 oz.
pour over ice filled low tumbler.
garnish with a couple clean rose petals.
slowly savor and enjoy this ultra sweet love triangle.

name: Raspberry-Orange-Mint Cooler
directions: In a blender, process mint leaves, honey, and lemon juice until mint leaves are finely chopped (about 30 seconds); pour mixture into pitcher.
Add 2 cups orange juice and 1 ½ cup raspberries to blender; process until smooth, stopping to scrape down sides as needed.
Pour raspberry mixture through a wire-mesh strainer into pitcher, discarding seeds.
Stir in remaining 4 cups orange juice; stir to combine.
Serve over ice.

name: White Kiwi Sangria
directions: A small saucepan, heat the water, add the sugar and stir to dissolve to make a simple syrup.
In a large pitcher, combine the white wine, the Triple Sec the lemon juice, the kiwis, the apples and the grapes.
Add the simple syrup, the soda water and the ice.
Stir and serve in sangria glasses decorated with a kiwi slice.
*Cook's Note: We suggest using Cointreau as your orange liqueur for the best tasting White Kiwi Sangria.

name: Big Game Punch
directions: In a saucepan, bring the cranberry juice, clementines, cloves, and cinnamon sticks up to a boil. Remove the pan from the heat and set aside. This will infuse the tangerines and spices into the juice. Chill the infused juice completely.
In a punch bowl, whisk the chilled juice, soda, and rum together. Chill the punch completely before serving. Serve the punch in a pretty punch bowl and ladle into glasses filled with ice.
Cooking time is actually chilling time.

name: Orange Blossom
directions: Mix ingredients together.
Serve in a martini glass, or highball glass over ice.

name: Mardi Gras Hurricane
directions: In a shaker, combine ice, light rum, passion fruit syrup, lemon-lime flavored carbonated beverage and lime juice.
Shake well and pour mixture into a Hurricane or other large specialty glass.
Float the 151 proof rum on top of the drink.

name: Bacardi Peach Red Mojito
directions: Muddle mint leaves with simple syrup in cocktail shaker.
Add peach rum, lime juice and sour mix.
Add ice cubes and shake until blended.
Serve in martini glass and garnish with slice of fresh peach.

name: Georgia Peach Tea
directions: Add boiling water and allow tea to steep for 8 minutes for 2 1/2 quarts .
Add syrup and serve.

similar.name: Perfect Sweet Tea (Secret of the South)
Peach and Mint Iced Tea ( Adult)

name: Sugar-Free Peanut Butter Cup Mocha
directions: Make expresso and steam milk with an espresso machine.
Combine ingredients in a 12 oz. cup.
Mix well.

name: Celebration Lemonade
directions: In a small saucepan, combine ¾ cup sugar, water, and mint; bring to a boil over medium heat, stir to dissolve the sugar.
Remove from heat and let set for 15-20 minutes, letting the mint infuse the sugar syrup.
Strain syrup through a fine-mesh strainer and let cool for 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, in a blender or food processor, process the strawberries and remaining 2 tablespoons sugar until smooth.
In a 1 ½ quart container, combine strawberry puree and lemon juice; add in mint syrup; stir; chill until very cold.
When ready to serve, divide the strawberry-lemon base equally among 8-10 champagne flutes; top with sparkling wine and serve.

name: Banana Cream Pie Martini
directions: Optional: may rim the cocktail glass with graham cracker crumbs.
Fill cocktail shaker halfway with ice.
Add in banana liqueur, amaretto, Baileys, and half-and-half.
Shake vigorously 5-10 seconds.
Strain into chilled cocktail glass; garnish with banana slice.

name: Berry Sweetheart
directions: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Add juices and honey to a mixing glass.
Stir the ingredients with a barspoon.
Pour the contents of the mixing glass into the highball glass.
Garnish with cherry.

name: Sam Choy's Li Hing Mui Margarita
directions: Blend liquors and ice (shake, or place in blender for a frozen margarita).
Moisten the rim of the glass and dip in li hing mui powder.
Pour blended margarita into glass and sprinkle with 1/2 teaspoon li hing mui powder.
Garnish with a slice of lime.
Serves 1.
For a virgin margarita: Leave out tequila and double the amounts of sweet-and-sour mix and simple syrup.

name: Javatini
directions: Pull all ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice.  Shake.
Strain into a martini glass rimmed with cocoa or sugar.
Garnish with chocolate shavings if you like.

name: Lemon Meringue Martini
directions: Place the rim of a martini glass in whipped cream, covering the rim about 1/8 inch. Then dip the rim into finely-crushed graham crackers, to create an evenly-coated “crust.”.
Mix the Limoncello, lemon juice and simple syrup with ice in a cocktail shaker for 5 seconds and strain into the glass to about ½ inch from the rim.
Mix the Licor 43 and heavy cream in a shaker. Using the back of a tablespoon placed against the side of the glass, slowly pour to layer on top. It will look just like a lemon meringue pie in a glass.

name: Sugar Free Kahlua Cooler
directions: Add all ingredients into blender.
Blend for 30 seconds.

name: Mango Lassi
directions: Add all the ingredients to a blender and whirl until incorporated.
Serve immediately.

name: Blue Star
directions: In a cocktail shaker filled with ice, add all ingredients except for the orange slice.
Shake well.
Strain into a cocktail glass full of finely crushed ice.
Garnish with the orange slice.

name: Parisian
directions: Add all liquid ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake well.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Add three or four blackcurrants to the glass to add touches of sharpness to the drink.

name: Light Mounds Latte
directions: Heat milk to hot.   Froth, if you like it that way.
Dissolve hot chocolate mix in the coffee.
Add the syrup and milk.
Enjoy.

name: White Hot Chocolate
directions: In a pot over medium heat, combine white chocolate chips and heavy cream.  Stir continuously until chips are melted.  Stir in half and half and vanilla.  Stir occasionally until hot.
Pour into mugs and top with whipped cream.
Take some Bakers Unsweetened chocolate and grate over the top and enjoy!  Serves 3-4 people (6 Cups).

name: Bombpop
directions: First pour grenadine in bottom of martini or margarita glass.
Layer lemonade over the grenadine, pouring slowly or using spoon so that the liquids do not mix.
In mixing tin, add ice, blue caracao and vodka.  Give it a few shakes, and slowly layer over lemonade.

name: Love Potion
directions: Mix all ingredients in mixing tin to make it frothy.
Pour into glass and add ice.

name: Margaritas Ole
directions: Pour in a cocktail shaker and shake with ice.
Strain into a large margarita glass and enjoy!

name: Comfy Cream Soda Cocktail
directions: Pour the Southern Comfort into a highball glass filled with ice cubes. Add cream soda, stir well, and serve.

name: La Danita
directions: In 16 oz. glass, add ice, vodka, and sprite.
Add a splash of grenadine, and fill with lemonade.
Garnish with cherry and/or lemon slice.

name: Sara's Koolade
directions: In a tall glass filled with ice, add all ingredients.
Garnish with a cherry.

name: Pineapple-Ginger-Limeade Cooler
directions: Bring the first 5 ingredients to a boil, stirring until sugar dissolves.
Decrease heat, and simmer 8 minutes.
Remove from heat; let stand 1 hour.
Pour pineapple mixture through a wire-mesh strainer into a big pitcher, discarding ginger.
Stir in lime rind and rum.
Serve over crushed ice.

name: New Orleans Hurricane
directions: In a shaker, combine ice, light rum, passion fruit syrup, lemon-lime flavored carbonated beverage and lime juice.
Shake well and pour mixture into a Hurricane or other large specialty glass.
Float the 151 proof rum on top of the drink.

name: Sugar-Free Caramel Butterscotch Cooler
directions: Fill a 16 oz. glass with ice and add milk to 3/4 full.
In a separate cup add syrups, and pour espresso shot into cup, swirling to combine.
Pour over ice and milk.
Stir before serving or as is for a more dramatic presentation.

name: Juicer for Adults Only
directions: In juicer, juice all veggies and fruit as directed.
Pour champagne into 2 flutes, add juice mix to champagne.
Serve with chocolate covered strawberries.

name: Burger King Style Iced Mocha Coffee Drink
directions: In a pitcher mix together the coffee, half-and-half, and the chocolate syrup.  Chill in the fridge if you have time.  Serve with ice.
I don't remember where this recipe came from, perhaps Todd Wilbert and his Top Secret Recipes.

similar.name: Make Iced Coffee in Five Minutes

name: Noni's Favorite Chocolate Martini
directions: Combine all ingredients in a cocktail shaker filled with ice and shake.
Strain into a chilled martini glass.
NOTE: Can also be blended with a small amount of ice, if you prefer.  I like it either way!

name: Frozen Marg-Beer-Ritas
directions: Add all liquid ingredients to a blender.
Fill blender with ice
Blend until smooth.
Serve in a margarita glass or any tall glass and garnish with a slice of lime.

name: Spanish Sangria
directions: Prepare fruits as suggested.
Add all fruits, liquor and sugar to a tall pitcher. Mix until sugar has dissolved.
Fill glass 1/3 full with ice, add sangria and splash of soda.
For a less alcoholic version, use more soda and less sangria per glass.

name: Butter Beer (Harry Potter)
directions: Measure butterscotch and butter into a 2 cup (16 oz) glass. Microwave on high for 1 to 1.5 minutes, or until syrup is bubbly and butter is completely incorporated.
Stir and cool for 30 seconds, then slowly mix in club soda. Mixture will fizz quite a bit.
Serve in two coffee mugs or small glasses; a perfectly warm Hogwarts treat for two!
Review this recipe!

name: Are You Crazy?  (Alcoholic Drink)
directions: pour cola into tall glass (heavy bottomed).
fill shotglass with Jaegermeister.
drop shot in glass of cola and drink.
Honest they did that and LOL watching.  I ran when asked if I wanted one stating, "are you crazy?"  thus the name.
Enjoy!
ps- took a sip and not bad at all!

name: Boston Creme Pie Martini
directions: Drizzle Hersey's syrup inside a large, cold martini glass.
Pour the rest of the ingredients into a shaker half-filled with ice. Shake and strain into glass.
Enjoy!

name: Cafe Theatre
directions: Add Irish cream and white creme de cacao to a coffee mug.
Fill with coffee, but leave room for a dash of dark creme de cacao and a dash of Frangelico.
After adding these, top with whipped cream and add a stick of cinnamon for garnish.

name: Violet Champagne D’amour
directions: Add Parfait Amour, lemon juice, and cointreau to a chilled champagne flute.
Slowly top with champagne.
Float the violets on top of the drink.

similar.name: La Vie En Rose Champagne Cocktail

name: Jen's Creamy Sighs
directions: In 2 Irish coffee cups, combine half the Amaretto and Bailey's in each cup.
Fill with coffee.
Top with whipped cream.
Float Grand Marnier over the whipped cream.

name: Cranberry and Vodka Sparkle
directions: Fill a mixing container half with ice.
Pour cranberry juice, lime juice and vodka.
Stir,then pour into a highball glass.

name: Citrus Blush Drink
directions: Half fill a tall glass with crushed ice.
Add lime juice, limoncello and gin.
Stir well to combine.
Top up with grapefruit juice and garnish.

name: White Lady
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker half with ice.Add the gin, cointreau, lemon juice.
Shake well, then strain in a cocktail glass.

name: Ginger and Cranberry Mule
