directions: Fill 3/4 full 2 highball glasses with crushed ice.
Divide the vodka and cranberries between the glasses.
In a mixing glass, mix together the ginger beer and cranberry juice and pour over the vodka.

name: Butter Chocolate Bliss Martini
directions: Add all ingredients to a martini shaker.  Fill with ice.  Shake.
Serve in cocktail glass.

name: Caffeini Martini
directions: Shake all ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Strain into glass.

name: El Ritual
directions: Put 1 ounce of the rum in a shot glass.
Dip one side of the lime in brown sugar.  Dip the other side in ground coffee.
Bite the lime, then sipe Especial rum neat.

name: Jamaican Haze
directions: Blend rum, apricot brandy, and sour mix with crushed ice.
Pour into a sour glass.  Garnish with a cherry.

name: Hot Buttered Cranberry Cider
directions: In stainless steel or enameled saucepan, combine juice, cider & cinnamon.
Bring to boil, then simmer 10 minutes.
Remove from heat & stir in rum, honey & butter, until butter is melted.
Ladle into heated mugs & serve.

name: Saketini
directions: Half fill a mixing glass with ice.
Add sake,vodke,vermouth.
Stir,then strain in a chilled martini glass and garnish with a thin slice of cucumber.

name: Vellini
directions: Pour the vodka and strawberry liqueur into a chilled champagne flute.
Slowly top up with champagne or sparkling wine.

name: Bit of Russian Honey
directions: Add all ingredients (cream as desired), shake and pour over ice in a hurricane glass.
Enjoy.

name: Seasonal Hot Buttered Rum Batter
directions: mix ingredients together well and store in an airtight container.
When ready to serve add 1 heaping teaspoon of butter to enough hot water to dissolve.  Add 1 oz rum & 1/2 oz of brandy and fill the cup to the top with hot water.

name: The Bloody Halfback
directions: Combine ingredients in a tall glass and garnish with a lime wedge.

name: Apricot Lemon Warmer
directions: In medium saucepan, combine all ingredients.
Bring to boil, then reduce heat, cover & simmer 20 minutes before serving.

name: Ladybug
directions: Blend ingredients with crushed ice.
Serve in a wine glass.

name: Garibaldi
directions: Build the campari into a highball glass over ice, then top up with orange juice.
Garnish with half slice of orange.

name: Cherry Cheese Cake Martini
directions: Mix together with ice in martini shaker.
Strain into shot glass.
Enjoy.

name: Red Zone
directions: Combine ingredients and garnish with a lime wedge.

name: Champagne Pomegranate Cocktail
directions: Combine all ingredients in a pitcher.
Pour about 1 cup of the mixture into each glass.
Garnish with pomegranate seeds if you like.

name: Blueberry Tea
directions: Combine all ingrediates in a coffee mug.
Sweeten and add milk if desired.

name: Baby Blue Martini
directions: Shake all the ingredients together with ice in a cocktail shaker.
Strain into a chilled Martini glass.

name: Citrus Twist
directions: Stir all the ingredients together in a cocktail shaker and pour into the cocktail glass. Garnish with a twist of lemon or orange peel.

name: Acardia
directions: Shake all the ingredients in a shaker with ice and strain into a cocktail glass.
Garnish with nutmeg.

name: Ace of Spades
directions: Combine Crown Royal and amaretto in a tall glass with ice.
Top with coke.
Garnish with a sprig of mint and a stirring spoon.

name: 57 T-Bird With Hawaiian Plates
directions: Shake with ice, strain into chilled shot glasses.

name: 38 Eiffel
directions: Mix Cognac, orange juice, and cointreau in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Strain into a tall glass.
Top with Champagne.
Garnish with orange slice and mint leaves.

name: Ad's Drops
directions: Peel an orange, cut half of it into pieces.
Split a whole vanilla bean into two halves.
Muddle one half of the vanilla bean together with the orange pieces in a highball glass.
Build the drink by adding ice cubes, rum and vanilla liqueur.
Top up with grapefruit juice.
Decorate with a slice of orange and a couple of Lemon balm leaves.

name: African Violet Tea
directions: Combine in frosted glass.
Garnish with violet or mint sprig.

name: Alcudia
directions: Shake with ice in a cocktail shaker.
Strain into a cocktail glass.

name: All Night Long
directions: Shake all ingredients together with ice in a cocktail shaker.
Strain into a highball glass half filled with cubed ice.
Garnish with a wedge of orange.

name: Alexander's Sister
directions: Shake with ice in a cocktail shaker.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Decorate with a red cherry.

name: Afterburner
directions: Shake the ingredients together in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Add slice of strawberry to side of cocktail glass if desired.

name: Alfie
directions: Shake with ice in a cocktail shaker.
Strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Amaro Dolce
directions: Shake all the ingredients together in a cocktail shaker with ice and fine strain into a Martini glass.

name: Apple Sparkler
directions: Rim each glass in the colored sugar.
Divide raspberry juice blend among prepared wine glasses.
Add apple cider.
Place 2 orange wedges and a lime wedge on a 6 inch wooden skewer.
Garnish glass with fruit skewer.

name: Almen Almen
directions: Build in a highball glass packed with ice.
Fill up with Sprite.

name: 5th Avenue
directions: Pour ingredients over ice into an old fashioned glass.

name: Almond Kiss
directions: Combine in stemmed mug with whipped cream.

name: Love Potion #9
directions: Combine all ingredients in a cocktail shaker filled with ice cubes.
Shake vigorously and strain into rocks glass with ice. Slice half way up middle center of strawberry and slide onto glass edge to garnish.

name: Tweety Bird
directions: Serve in unusually shaped glasses. Give your glasses a frosted edge by dipping the rim into Lemon juice and then dipping it into sugar. Simple but effective!  Add colorful decorations - drink umbrellas, swizzle sticks , paper flowers, straws and even sparklers! These decorations are all cheap and easy to obtain from your local grocery store.  Add some straws - colored straws are great - just cut them up for small glasses or use cocktail sticks or toothpicks to twist or skewer fruits.
In other words, have fun, make the Tweety Bird your own!

name: Amarula Frappé
directions: Shake all ingredients together with ice in a cocktail shaker and then pour directly into serving glass.

name: Cranberry, Apple and Cinnamon Vodka
directions: Layer cranberries, apples and cinnamon sticks in 2 quart glass jar.
Add vodka and seal jar.
Let set 1-2 weeks to develop the red coloring and cranberry flavor, shake jar daily.
Strain and pour into sterilized bottle.
Stir in sugar syrup.

name: Cupid Cocktail
directions: Shake well and strain into medium-size glass, or crystal goblet.

name: Absolut Mandgrape
directions: Build over ice in a highball glass.
Decorate with a slice of lemon.

name: Absolut Prosperity
directions: Muddle the mint with vodka, lime and the liqueurs in a highball glass.
Fill up the glass with crushed ice and top with Russian tonic.
Decorate with mint leaves.

name: Cold Comfort Coffee
directions: First, take a pretty glass and fill it with crushed ice.
Next, pour all the ingredients into a covered container and shake, shake, shake.
Then strain the mixture into your prepared glass and sweeten it to your liking.

similar.name: Sugar Free Dark Chocolate Mocha Dream Coffee

name: Amarula Coffee
directions: Pour hot coffee into a cup and top up with Amarula Cream.

name: Amarula Latté
directions: Add the Amarula Cream to the freshly made hot coffee and top up the mug with hot steamed milk.
Stir gently.

name: Mexican Hot Chocolate for Diabetics
directions: In a small heavy saucepan, add the chocolate and coffee and heat until the chocolate melts and the mixture is smooth, about 2 minutes.
Add the cinnamon and allspice.
Slowly add the milk, stirring with a wooden spoon.
When the mixture is hot, mix in the vanilla. Pour into 2 mugs.
Add Splenda to taste, to sweeten.
Top with a dollop of whipped topping and serve.

name: Floating on a Cloud
directions: Pour the first 7 ingredients into a blender and mix until the ice is pureed, add more ice if you prefer a thicker consistency.
Grab a tall glass and rim it with the lemon and sugar.
Pour the cold coffee mixture into the prepared glass and add whipped cream to the coffee.
Next sprinkle on the ground hazelnuts and any sugar left over from rimming the glass and top it all off with a marshino cherry.

name: Coffee Vanilla Soy Milk
directions: Place milk and syrup in a glass and stir well.
I like the milk to be very cold and will sometimes add an ice cube or two.

name: A Nudge, a Coffee Nudge
directions: Put the scoope of ice cream in the bottom of a tall mug.
Pour the Creme de Cacao, Kahlua, Brandy and Frangelica over the ice cream.
Slowly pour in the coffee, add the whipped cream and sprinkle the ground coffee beans on top.
Sit back, relax and enjoy.

name: Tea & Glayva Toddy
directions: Put the scotch liqueur, creme de cacao, honey, butter and tea bag in a mug.
Pour the boiling hot water to fill mug and steep for two minutes.
Take out the tea bag and enjoy your toddy.

name: My Plantation Coffee
directions: To the bottom of your glass add the rum, grand marnier, creme de cacao, butter, sugar, cream and hot coffee.
Stir 1 minute to ensure that everything is well blended.
Next add the whipped cream, sprinkle with orange rind, ground almonds and cinnamon.
Sit in a comfy chair, put on some music, close your eyes and enjoy.

name: Wet Kiss
directions: Mix all ingredients in mixing tin with ice, and pour into shot glass.

name: World's Best Beer Margarita's
directions: Mix all ingredients except ice and limes.
Stir until limeade melts.
You may add more water if need to.

name: Be Mine Latte
directions: Mix syrup, espresso, and milk together in a warmed coffee glass or mug.
Top with whipped cream and a cherry.

name: "comfort"able Kamikaze
directions: Shake for 15 seconds
Serve straight up or on the rocks, whichever you prefer.

name: Koala Float   (With Alcohol)
directions: Blend first 4 ingredients in blender until smooth. Pour into 2 tall glasses.
Sprinkle with chocolate shavings and serve.

name: Cibola
directions: Mix all ingredients together
Pour over ice.
Stir.
Enjoy.

name: Chocolate Martini
directions: Fill a small squeeze bottle with your favorite chocolate sauce. Create a spiral pattern of chocolate in the martini glasses, turning each glass gently as you squeeze out the sauce.
Squeeze a generous amount of chocolate sauce onto 4 cherries, and place in the bottom of each glass.

Fill a metal cocktail shaker with cracked ice; place the top on the shaker, and shake for about 10 to 15 seconds. Add the vodkas, chocolate liqueurs, Kahlua and half-and-half, and shake until frothy, about another 15 seconds.
Strain the liquid into the prepared glasses, and serve immediately.

name: Pomegranate - Prosecco Cocktail
directions: Cut pomegranate in half and scoop out seeds. Place seeds in a bowl.
Place several pomegranate seeds in the bottom of a champagne flute, add a splash of juice and fill with champagne.

name: Orchid
directions: Rub the rim of a chilled cocktail glass with the lemon wedge and rim with sugar.
Add remaining ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice; shake vigorously.
Strain into prepared glass.

name: Hot Chocolate Mix
directions: Mix well and store in an air tight container (a 3 pound coffee can works great)!
To use:  Add 1/3 cup of mix to boiling water in a coffee cup and enjoy!

name: Cinnabon Roll Cappuccino
directions: Steam and froth milk to 160 degrees. Set aside.
In small 8 oz. cup, add sauces, syrup and espresso. Stir to mix.
Add steamed milk. Stir to mix.
Fold in some froth to make it extra creamy.
Top with whipped cream and white chocolate curls. Sprinkle lightly with cinnamon.
ENJOY!

name: Homemade Buttermilk
directions: Mix the two ingredients in a CLEAN container.
Let stand in a warm, dark place for 16-24 hours.
Once curdly stir and refrigerate for up to 3 weeks. Use as needed.
NOTE: Use fresh buttermilk; the older the buttermilk the more likely that the culture won't grow.
Bacteria is temperature sensitive, so adjust the time accordingly.

name: French Kiss Caffè Latte
directions: Pour the syrups into two stemmed warmed glass mugs.
Add the steamed milk, but do not stir.
Add the espresso to the milk mixture.
Top with a dollop of whipped cream.
Serve with a kiss.

name: Cosmo Slush
directions: In blender, place limeade concentrate and powdered sugar.  Cover; blend on high speed until well mixed.  Add vodka and orange liqueur (or orange juices).  Cover; blend until well mixed.
Cover; freeze at least 8 hours until slushy.  Stir before serving and pour into glasses.  Serve immediately.
(This looks nice poured into a martini glass with a strip of orange peel in the bottom of each glass.).

name: Liquid Cocaine
directions: mix together in a shaker, strain into shot glasses!

name: TerÈs
directions: Pour rum over lots of ice in a highball glass.
Fill up with Vanilla Coke and decorate with a lemon wedge.

name: Chocolate Blueberry Martini
directions: In a shaker over ice, combine the liquors.  Shake to mix and chill.
Pour into a chilled martini glass.
Drop a couple of blueberries into the glass and serve!

name: Butter Baby
directions: Combine ingredients in a beer mug.
Stir and serve.

name: Bumble Bee
directions: Build over ice in a hightball glass.
Top up with coke.

name: Brothel
directions: Build in a highball glass packed with ice.
Fill up with ice cold, fresh milk.

name: Breckenridge Mud Slide
directions: Combine in a blender.
Serve in tall glass topped with crushed Oreo cookie bits.

name: Blackberry Soft Drink
directions: Mix the berries with sugar and lemon juice in small sauce pan.
Strain into a highball or wine glass.
Fill up with soda.
Garnish with a slice of lemon and blackberry.
Serve with a straw.

name: Barracuda Bite
directions: Gently mix ingredients in a shaker with ice.
Strain into tall glass filled with crushed ice.

name: Bananas and Cream
directions: Mix all the ingredients together in a blender with crushed ice.

name: Amarula Mint Cream
directions: Mix all the ingredients together in a blender with crushed ice.

name: Angels Hip Shot
directions: Layer carefully in shot glass.

name: Non-Fat Eggnog - 4 Points
directions: Combine all ingredients except spices in blender.
Blend until mixed.
Pour in glass and add a dash of nutmeg and cinnamon.

name: 8th Birthday
directions: Add all ingredients to an ice-filled cocktail shaker, shake, and pour into a martini glass.

name: Angel's Kiss
directions: Layer ingredients carefully, in order given, into Pousse Cafe glass so each ingredient floats on the preceding one.
Do not mix.

name: Angel's Tip
directions: Shake and strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Milky Way Galaxy
directions: Combine milk, amaretto and vanilla extract in a blender for 60 seconds.
Pour over ice cubes in an old-fashioned glass, and sprinkle with cinnamon.
Stir with a straw, and serve.

name: Nutcracker
directions: Shake vigorously with ice in a cocktail shaker so that the milk builds up a foam.
Strain into a highball glass with lots of ice.

name: Old Fashioned Hot Buttered Rum
directions: Combine sugar, brown sugar and butter in a 2-quart saucepan.
Cook over low heat, stirring occasionally, until butter is melted (6-8 min).
Combine cooked mixture with ice-cream in a large mixing bowl, and beat at medium speed, scraping bowl often until smooth (1-2 min).
Store refrigerated up to 2 weeks or frozen up to one month.
For each serving, fill one-quarter of a mug with mixture, add one ounce rum and three-quarters of a cup of boiling water. Sprinkle with nutmeg.

similar.name: Awesome and Economical Hot Buttered Rum Mix
Hot Buttered Rum W/ Brandy, Batter

name: Rossini
directions: Wash and hull strawberries.
Purée in a blender or food processor until smooth.
Pass through a sieve, if liked.
Chill in refrigerator at least one hour.
Pour the chilled strawberry purée into a flute (1/3) and then add chilled sparkling wine (2/3).

name: Snowball
directions: Shake the advocaat and lime cordial together.
Pour into an ice filled highball.
Top up with lemonade.

name: Vanilla Vodka
directions: Split the vanilla pods lengthwise down the center to expose the seeds, keeping the ends of the beans intact.
Place the beans with the vodka in a large jar with an airtight seal.
Store in a dark, dry place for at least 4 weeks, shaking the jar several times each week.
When ready, transfer the extract and the beans to a bottle.
As you use the extract, top off with more vodka to replenish your supply.  The beans will continue to impart flavor for many months.

name: Butterscotch Dream
directions: Add all ingredients to a cocktail shaker half-filled with ice cubes.
Shake and pour into a pina colada glass.
Garnish with whipped cream and caramel.

name: Black Berry
directions: Stir with ice and strain into a large cocktail glass with half a cup of crushed ice.

name: Buttered Toffee
directions: Pour amaretto, irish cream, and Kahlua over ice cubes.
Add half-and-half, and stir well.

name: Atman
directions: Build in a highball glass packed with ice cubes.
Fill with Sprite and top with a dash of squeezed lime.
Decorate with a lime slice or wedge.

name: Bacardi Highball
directions: Shake with ice in a cocktail shaker.
Strain into a highball glass with a couple of ice cubes and fill up with club soda.
Decorate with an orange slice and a maraschino cherry.

name: Mob Witnesses
directions: Pour ingredients into a tall collins glass filled with ice.
Stir, and serve.

name: Apple Pie
directions: Shake apple liqueur, Licor 43 and milk with lots of ice in a cocktail shaker.
Strain into a highball glass.
Decorate with some grated cinnamon on top.
Serve with a straw!

name: Voyant Chai Cream Latte
directions: Add the Voyant then the steamed milk to a mug.
Garnish with whipped cream and some ground cinnamon.

name: V-56 Float
directions: In a tall soda glass filled with ice, add in Voyant and Jagermeister.
Top off with Coke.
Use a spoon to mix well and then top off with 1-scoop of Vanilla Ice Cream.
Serve with a straw and enjoy.

name: Apple Vanilla Martini
directions: Shake with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Butterball
directions: Add Amaretto first and then layer Butterscotch schnapps on top, don't mix.
Add whipped cream if desired.

name: Boar
directions: Combine strawberries, rum, lime juice, ice and ice cream in a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into a tall chilled glass.
Top with club soda and garnish with an orange wheel, 1/2 strawberry and fresh mint.

name: Bubblegum
directions: Shake all ingredients together in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Strain into Martini glass.
Garnish with slice of peach if desired.

name: Boozy Rouge
directions: Shake the ingredients together in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Brave White Bull
directions: Shake well with ice and serve in rock glass.
Sprinkle with nutmeg.

name: Avalanche
directions: Blend all the ingredients with crushed ice.

name: Baby Doe Colada
directions: Mix in blender until smooth and creamy.
Sugar rim of glass and garnish with lime.

name: Apple Cinnamon Toast
directions: Mix all ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Strain into a chilled martini glass rimmed with cinnamon.
Garnish with a cinnamon stick and apple slice.

name: Bailey's Coffee
directions: Build in a coffee glass.

name: Banoffee Cream Shooter
directions: Layer chilled ingredients carefully into a shot glass in the above order.

name: Apple Strudel
directions: Shake over ice and strain.
Pour over ice into a tall glass and top with champagne.

name: Alien Sky
directions: Shake all ingredients together with ice except the Curacao.
Strain into a highball glass half filled with crushed ice.
Top with Blue Curacao, do not stir.

name: Black Forest Cake
directions: Mix in Poca Grande glass, top with whipped cream.
Garnish with a cherry and chocolate sprinkles.

name: Bleeding Heart
directions: Pour the Advocaat into the glass and then add the dash of Cherry Brandy on top.
Garnish with cherry if desired.

name: Banana Split
directions: Serve in a tall stemmed mug topped with whipped cream and cherry.

name: Apple Mojito
directions: In a cocktail shaker, muddle together sugar syrup and some fresh mint leaves.
Add the lime juice, Vodka and Sour Apple Liqueur, stir well together.
Pour into a highball glass half filled with crushed ice.
Top up with soda water.

name: Red Devil
directions: Shake all the ingredients together with ice.
Strain into a martini glass.
Garnish with 3 blackcurrants on a cocktail stick if desired.

name: Banana Split Shooter
directions: Carefully layer in a shot glass.

name: Air Cleaner
directions: Muddle the blackberries and orange slice in a highball glass while adding the liquids.
Add crushed ice and decorate with a slice of lemon and cherries.

name: Cherry Bomb (Shot)
directions: Pour red bull into a glass.  Drop a shot glass filled with the Cherry Dr. McGillicuddy's into the red bull glass.
SHOOT!

name: Cappuccino Recipe Without an Expensive Machine
directions: 1) After your coffee has brewed, combine the sugar & milk and heat it in your microwave for 2 minutes at the highest setting.
2) Next, whip the heated milk/sugar mix in your blender for about one minute until it's a fluffy foam.
3) Fill your cup two thirds full with the coffee and top it off with your heated froth.

similar.name: Chocolate Cappuccino Coffee Mix (In a Jar)

name: Angel's Wing
directions: In a Pousse Cafe glass, layer ingredients carefully in order listed.

name: Brass Monkey
directions: Build in a highball glass without ice.
Fill up with orange juice.

name: Brain Squash
directions: Shake the juices with vodka and gin.
Top with crushed ice and a few of drops of grenadine.
Strain into a highball glass with ice.

name: Boston Gold
directions: Build over ice in a highball glass.
Fill up with orange juice and decorate with a slice or orange.

name: Brandy Lime and Berries
directions: In a highball glass half filled with cubed ice, build the ingredients in the following order listed.
Finish by topping up with cranberry juice.

name: A Peach Loves Kiwi
directions: Mix all the ingredients with crushed ice in a cocktail blender.
Run for a few seconds only.
Pour into a cocktail glass and decorate with a raspberry and a piece of peach on stick.

name: Bachelor Buzz
directions: In a stemmed mug add espresso to hot chocolate.
Add syrups and stir.
Top with whipped cream.

name: Badminton
directions: Build in a glass.
Garnish with a maraschino cherry.

name: Bairiki
directions: Cut the melon pulp in little pieces and let them steep in a jug with vodka and blue curaçao.
Place the jug in the refrigerator for at least two hours.
Add wine and the cocktail is ready to serve.

name: Balalaika
directions: Shake with ice in a cocktail shaker.
Decorate at will, but we like it with a star fruit.

name: Banana Blue
directions: Combine the alcohols in a cocktail shaker.
Pour into a hurricane glass half filled with ice.
Top up with orange juice.
Garnish with a slice of banana.

name: Ballet Russe
directions: Shake with cubed ice and strain into a martini glass.

name: Balalaika
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into glass.

name: Banana Boat
directions: Blend all ingredients with crushed ice and serve.

name: Banana Creamsicle
directions: Mix gin, crème de banane, and banana with ice in a blender till smooth.
Pour into a chilled champagne glass and top with cold Sprite.

name: Beach Blonde
directions: Blend all ingredients together with crushed ice and serve in a highball glass.

name: Bet the Limit
directions: In a mixing glass filled with ice combine ingredients.
Strain into shot glass.

name: Blizzard
directions: Serve shaken and poured over ice or blend with ice in blender.

name: Black Lace
directions: In a shaker filled with ice, squeeze juice from 1/2 lemon.
Add spirits and shake well.
Strain into chilled cocktail glasses.

name: Blarney Stone Cocktail
directions: Shake well with cracked ice and strain into 3-ounce cocktail glass.
Twist of orange peel and serve with an olive.

name: Between the Sheets
directions: Shake the ingredients well with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass and serve.

name: The Torpedo
directions: Combine equal parts Voyant Chai Cream Liqueur and Jagermeister in cocktail shaker with ice.
Shake well
Strain into a shot glass.

name: The Ultimate Chai Espresso
directions: Combine ingredients over ice in a.

name: Shangri Latte
directions: Pour Voyant into a mug of coffee.
Stir in chocolate syrup and sweeten to taste.
Garnish with Whipped Cream if desired.

name: Anti's
directions: Build in a glass packed with ice cubes.
Fill up with orange soda.
Top with a few drops Grenadine.
Decorate with an orange slice.

name: The Ultimate Chai Slide
directions: In a blender, add the Voyant, Coffee Liqueur, Milk and Chocolate Chips.
Add in crushed ice until the liquid level is at 32-Oz.
Add in the Banana and blend until smooth.
Pour into a hurricane glass and garnish with whipped cream, chocolate syrup and 2-slices of a Banana.

name: A Peach Prayer
directions: Shake with ice in a cocktail shaker.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Bambi
directions: Build over ice in a highball glass.
Fill up with Sprite and top with a splash of Roses Lime.

name: Banana Bread Latte
directions: Combine in a warm mug and stir.
Top with whipped cream.
Dust with cinnamon and sprinkle with chopped walnuts.

name: Big Easy Blue Punch
directions: Combine blue Curacao, rum and lemon juice into a cocktail shaker with ice.
Shake and strain into a rocks glass.
Top with pineapple soda and garnish with lemon wheel.

name: Black Pansy Swizzle
directions: Fill collins glass with ice.
Pour Champagne into glass.
Add black pansy syrup and stir with swizzle stick.
Garnish with edible pansy flower.

name: Dr Kevorkian
directions: Pour both ingredients over ice, stir and enjoy!

name: Lemonade Iced Tea
directions: Bring 2-3 cups of water to a boil.  Pour into gallon size pitcher, add tea bags and steep for 5-10 minutes, to taste.  (I have left it overnight before; leave it as long as you like, the longer it steeps the stronger it gets, but 10 minutes is sufficient.).
Remove tea bags, and add the lemonade mix.  Top with cold water and ice to fill the pitcher.  I usually don't have ice, and just chill it a few hours in my fridge.

name: Pama Sea Breeze
directions: Build in an ice filled highball glass.

name: Thai Iced Tea
directions: In a kettle bring the water to a boil.
Place the tea in a teapot or glass container.
Pour the water over the tea and let steep about 5 minutes.
Strain into a clean container, such as a pitcher.
Add sugar and stir to dissolve.
Let cool to room temperature then cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.
Fill 6 tall glasses with crushed ice and add tea to ¾ full.  Add 1 tbsp cream and 1 tbsp condensed milk to each glass, stir to combine, and serve.

name: Chocolate Martini
directions: Mix 4 oz. of chocolate liqueur and 2 oz. of vanilla vodka.
Add a splash of Half and Half and shake over ice.
Line a martini glass with chocolate syrup.
Add mixture.

name: Texas Margaritas
directions: In a blender, combine all ingredients except salt.
Blend on high until smooth and slushy.
Serve in salt-rimmed glasses, if desired.

name: Mystique Martini
directions: Add ingredients to shaker with ice.
Shake.
Strain and serve in martini glass.

name: The Blue Fin
directions: Shake well with ice.
Strain into an ice-filled old-fashioned glass.
Garnish with a twist of lemon.

name: Tropical Hooter
directions: Mix and pour into shotglass.

name: Strawberry Soak
directions: Sprinkle sugar over diced strawberries, and toss by hand in a bowl.
Pour Alize over strawberries, and let soak for 15 minute to a half an hour.
Strain mixture well, and store in Alize bottle for later use.
This will yield more than a bottle, so have another empty bottle ready in reserve.

name: Spanishtini
directions: Tools:
cocktail glass
shaker
strainer
matches
grater
In a shaker, combine 2 oz. coffee liqueur, 3/4 oz. crème de cacao, 3/4 oz. Cointreau, and 2-1/2 oz. chilled black coffee.
Shake vigorously and let stand.
Pour 1/2 oz. Bacardi 151 into a cocktail glass with a sugared rim. S.
Strike a match, let the sulphur burn off and carefully light the 151 on fire.
Rotate the glass at a 45-degree angle, letting the flames caramelize the sugared rim.
Sprinkle in nutmeg and cinnamon over the flames.
Extinguish the fire and strain the contents of the shaker into the glass.
Top with heavy cream and garnish with cinnamon and grated chocolate.

name: Skinny Iced Coffee
directions: Brew the Coffee ( You can use plain coffee or any other flavored coffee, my favorite is Foldgers select hazelnut).
While coffee is brewing put All other ingredients in a beverage shaker.
Add coffee and shake until mixed well and cool.
Pour in glass and enjoy!
(you dont have to have a shaker it just gives the iced coffee the foam at the top when you pour it into the glass).

similar.name: Skinny Version of Bergy's No Sugar Iced Coffee

name: Lava Flow
directions: Pour the strawberry puree into a 14-ounce hurricane glass.
Fill a blender 1/3 full of ice and add all the other ingredients. Puree until slushy.
Tilt the glass to the side and gently pour the blender ingredients down the inside of the glass, being careful not to disturb the strawberry puree.

name: Suntan Lotion
directions: Mix over ice, shake, strain, and serve.

name: Stardust
directions: Fill shaker cup with ice.
Pour in all ingredients.
Shake and strain into shooter glass of preference.

name: Snowshot
directions: Add all ingredients into blender.
Add sugar to taste.
Blend until the consistancy resembles a daiquiri.

name: Tie Me to the Bedpost
directions: Shake with ice and strain into a martini glass.

name: The Lunchbox
directions: Chill & strain into a glass.

name: Tropical Life Saver
directions: Mix in a tall glass.

name: Brain Candy
directions: Shake alcohol and juices.
Add to glass with ice.
Pour grenadine and ginger ale on top.
Garnish with cherry and orange wheel.

name: What She's Having
directions: Pour in Vodka, then fill with the orange juice.
Add the amaretto which should mostly sink to the bottom.
Splash in some grenadine to cloud the center of the drink.
Serve without mixing or stirring.

name: Tempo Cocktail
directions: Add rum, lime juice, creme de cacao and bitters to a glass of ice, stir, then top up with lemonade.

name: Afternoon Coffee
directions: Build ingredients & float cream on top.

name: Nutty Banana
directions: combine all ingredients in a shot glass.

name: Hurricane
directions: Pour tequilar Rose into shot glass and add the Sambuca to the centre of the shot.

name: Celeste Sunrise Cocktail
directions: Pour the Frangelico hazelnut liqueur, strawberry liqueur, advocaat and cream into a cocktail shaker half-filled with ice cubes. Shake well, and strain into a cocktail glass. Top with lemonade until frothy. Garnish with a strawberry, and serve.

name: Rumarita
directions: Blend all ingredients with crushed ice.
Serve in a cocktail glass.

name: Snowflake Latte
directions: Combine all the ingredients in a warmed coffee mug; stir.

name: Latin Connection
directions: Blend all ingredients with crushed ice.

name: Peugeot
directions: Add all ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Garnish with orange slice.

name: Rum Ball Shot
directions: Add ice to shaker. Add the rest of the ingredients, cover, and shake.
Strain into tall shot glass and SHOOT!

name: Poison Apple
directions: Pour ice in cocktail shaker. Add all ingredients except soda. Cover and shake.
Add ice to a margarita glass (you could also sugar the rim for a sweeter taste) or big glass and strain drink.
Top off with splash of lemon-lime soda. Add lemon wedge for garnish and enjoy!

name: Butter Cream Cocoa
directions: Combine all ingerdients in a much and garnish with whipped cream and caramel sauce.

name: Elephant Shake
directions: Blend till smooth.

name: Cafe Mocha
directions: While the coffee is brewing, heat the half and half in the microwave for one minute.
Put 2 T hot cocoa mix in the bottom of each mug.
Pour half of the coffee or espresso over the hot cocoa powder in each mug.
Divide the warm half and half between the mugs.  Stir well.
Garnish with whipped cream and nutmeg (or cocoa powder or chocolate shavings) and enjoy!

name: Strawberry Shortcake
directions: Blend until frosty.

name: Mexican Mudslide
directions: Blend all ingredients.
To garnish, rim glass with cinnamon sugar and drizzle chocolate sauce inside glass.
Pour mudslide into glass and sprinkle with cinnamon.

name: Class Act Cocktail
directions: Pour all ingredients into a shaker of ice, shake, then strain into a rocks glass full of ice. Drinker will have to constantly mix the drink in his glass as the Advocaat will settle.

name: Buttermilk Substitute
directions: Mix yogurt and milk with a wisk.  Use as needed. May  be doubled as needed.

name: The Roosters Call
directions: Place the tomatoes, carrot and lime juice into a blender or food processor and process until smooth.
Drain the mixture and serve in a pretty juice glass.  Add a dash of  your favourite hot sauce and garnish with the lime slice.
This is best served right after its made, enjoy.

name: Mind Eraser
directions: Fill 3/4 with ice in a very small glass, a rocks glass, or -what I use- those small clear plastic cups. Add equal amounts of Kahlua and vanilla vodka --  almost filling the glass (i just wrote 3 oz cause the recipe wouldnt publish without quantity but just make sure they are equal amounts).Top with a splash of club soda.
Add the straw, count to 3, and sip as hard/fast as u can through the straw! Make a few more and soon your mind will be erased! hahaha ;).

name: Rich and Creamy Hot Chocolate
directions: In a heavy-based saucepan, add in the broken pieces of chocolate and double cream and over medium heat, stir continously till melted.
Add in the cocoa powder, sugar, milk and cinnamon stick (if using) and whisk continously till it comes to boil.
Then, take it off heat and gently fold in the whipped double cream till smooth.
Re-heat again and whisk vigourously to make it frothy.
Pour into mugs and sprinkle cocoa powder on top.
Enjoy!

name: Banana Panther
directions: Blend all ingredients with crushed ice.
Serve in a sour glass.

name: Dancing Orange Mango
directions: Scoop the melon flesh into a blender, add the fresh orange juice and mango juice and blend until smooth.
Rub the lime juice on the glasses and dip in the sugar to rim the glasses.
Pour into a chilled glass and decorate with your orange and lime slices.

similar.name: Frozen Banana and Apple Fruit Tango

name: Truly the Best Key Lime Pie Martini
directions: Add all ingredients into martini shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously for several minutes.
Strain into a chilled martini glass.
Enjoy!

name: Chocolate!  Coffee!  Cream!
directions: Pour the milk, cream and sugar into the blender and mix until blended.
Next add the cocoa, instant coffee granulas, liquer and the ice cubes processing until smooth.
Pour into glasses, top with the whipped cream and sprinkle with  cocoa powder,  now  its ready to serve.

name: Coca Cola Blak Copycat Recipe
directions: Mix all ingredients together in a pitcher; stir briefly.
Store any leftovers in the fridge for up to one day.

similar.name: Coffee Coke (Low Calorie) Copycat - Coca Cola Blak

name: June Bug
directions: Blend all ingredients and pour over ice.

name: Voodoo
directions: Pour ingredients over ice and stir.

name: Butternut Scotch
directions: Pour ingredients into an old-fashioned glass over ice and serve.

similar.name: Stew's Scotchie Cream (Bailey's but Using Scotch)

name: Valentine
directions: Add all ingredients and stir.

name: Frostbite
directions: Add all ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously; strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Beer Margaritas
directions: In a large pitcher, combine the beer, tequila and limeade. Rub a lime wedge around the rim of each of glass and dip it in the salt. Pour the margaritas into the glasses and garnish with a lime wedge.

name: Party Margaritas
directions: pour into a pitcher -- fill the lemonade can with Tequila.
fill the limeade can with triple sec -- don't add water!
fill glasses with crushed ice have lime slices for garnish
pour pour and go!

name: Iced Mocha Coffee
directions: Dissolve hot cocoa mix (regular or sugar free) in 1 cup of hot water.  Pour into  ice cube trays and place in freezer for at least 4 hours or until set.
Place frozen cubes in a large cup or glass and pour in (hot or cold) brewed coffee.  Add sugar and cream to taste.
Note:  Place as many frozen cubes in cup according to one's own taste.  Time for recipe does not include refrigerator time for ice cubes.

name: Golden Kiss
directions: Pour the two liqueurs into a liqueur or sherry glass.
Gently pour the cream on top (it will float).
A votre sante!

similar.name: Buttery Nipple With a Cherry Kiss

name: Mom's Hot Cocoa Mix
directions: Mix all these ingredients in a large bowl or container.  Mix VERY well, and store in an air-tight container.  To drink,  mix 3 T or to taste, to boiling water or hot coffee.

similar.name: Fat Free Sugar Free Hot Chocolate Mix

name: Whiskey Blitz
directions: Pour all ingredients over ice. Garnish with a lemon or orange wedge, add a cherry and serve in a tumbler.

name: Quick Kick
directions: Pour ingredients into a tall glass with ice. Garnish with a lemon wedge.

name: Iced Cocoa Cappuccino
directions: In blender, place water, cocoa and sugar; cover and blend on low speed.
Add coffee; cover and blend on high speed until thoroughly blended.
Add ice cream; cover and blend until smooth.
Serve immediately, over ice if desired.

name: T-52
directions: Layer in a shot glass.

name: 2-Point Play
directions: Pour ingredients into a cocktail shaker with ice. Shake and strain into a chilled martini glass.

name: Hottie Toddy
directions: Stud the lemon slices with the cloves and drop them in the bottom of an Irish coffee glass.
Add in bourbon, lemon juice, and honey.
Slowly stir in boiling water, using the cinnamon stick to serve.

name: Peanut Butter Hot Cocoa
directions: In a large kettle, combine 1 cup milk and peanut butter.
Stirring frequently, cook over low heat until smooth.
Increase heat to medium.
Slowly stir in remaining 8 cups milk and chocolate mix.
Stirring occasionally, cook just until mixture simmers.
Garnish with whipped cream.

name: Leg Spreader
directions: Pour everything on ice, Stir enjoy.

name: Chocolate Margarita
directions: Add liquid ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously; strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Shave chocolate over the top.

name: Schmooze
directions: combine in a glass with ice.

name: Blue Ginger Gimlet
directions: In a cocktail shaker, combine all ingredients with ice. Shake well and strain into a martini glass. Garnish with lime wedge.
For the ginger syrup:.

In a medium saucepan over high heat, combine sugar, ginger and water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until syrupy and reduced by half, about 40 to 45 minutes. Strain ginger pieces out and reserve syrup.
(Trick: toss dried ginger in sugar, bake at 200 degrees until dried thru, about 4 hours and voila-ginger candy).

name: The Peacock -- My Version
directions: Pour all liqueurs in a shaker with ice.  Mix and shake til chilled.
Pour into a rocks glass with ice.
Serve.
I garnished mine with some pomegranate seeds, which looked really nice in the bottom of the glass.

name: Mai Tai
directions: Mix first three ingredients together in a cocktail shaker.
Divide among glasses and float 1 tablespoon of dark rum over each glass.
Garnish with lime wedge.

similar.name: Out of This World - Mai Tai

name: Irish Redhead
directions: Stir Code Red and whiskey in a collins glass filled with ice cubes.
Serve.

name: Simple Syrup Recipe
directions: In a small saucepan, boil both ingredients until the sugar completely dissolves. Remove from heat and cool.

name: Best Ever Ginger-Lime Ale
directions: Fill four glasses with club soda. Pour two tablespoons ginger syrup (see directions for making ginger syrup below) down side of each glass to create a layer of syrup on bottom. Squeeze lime wedge into each drink, garnish with a fresh lime wedge and candied ginger.

To make the ginger syrup:  in a medium saucepan over high heat, combine sugar, ginger and water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until syrupy and reduced by half, about 40 to 45 minutes. Strain ginger pieces out and reserve syrup.  Makes 4 cups.
(Trick --  toss dried ginger in sugar, bake at 200 degrees until dried thru, about 4 hours and voila-ginger candy).

name: Vanilla Milk
directions: Heat milk in microwave for 1 1/4 minutes.
Add vanilla and Splenda, stir well.
serve.

name: Cinnamon Cider Martinis
directions: Make the Cinnamon-Flavored vodka: place 2 cinnamon sticks inside the bottle of vodka—you may need to pour out a small amount of the vodka to make room for the cinnamon sticks; seal tightly and let stand at room temperature for about 2 weeks, depending on the desired level of flavor.
Shake the bottle every few days; remove the cinnamon sticks and use.
Rim the glass: dip the edges of 4 martini glasses in apple cider and rim them with cinnamon sugar.
Make the drink: In a small saucepan, combine the 1 cup cider and 6 oz. vodka; heat over medium to medium-high heat until warm but not hot.
Pour into rimmed martini glasses and serve.

name: Frozen Sex on the Beach
directions: Place all items in a blender and puree until smooth.

similar.name: Tgi Friday's Sex on the Beach

name: Atomic Palm
directions: Mix and serve over ice.

name: The Deep End
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker ¾ full with ice.
Add in gin, cointreau, lime juice, and curacao.
Shake vigorously and strain into a chilled martini glass.
Add a dash of bitters; garnish with lime slice.

name: Strawberry-Rhubarb Lemonade
directions: In a 3-quart saucepan, combine the water, rhubarb, sugar, zest, and salt; bring to a boil, stirring occasionally, until the sugar is dissolved.
Decrease heat to a simmer; cover, and cook until the rhubarb is soft, about 10 minutes.
Add in the quartered strawberries; cook for 4 minutes.
Remove from heat and let cool for 15 minutes.
Strain fruit mixture through a fine-mesh strainer into a 2-quart container, pushing down on the solids to extract as much juice as possible.
Add vanilla and lemon juice; stir to combine.
Let cool completely, then chill until very cold.
When ready to serve, add the sliced strawberries and serve over ice.

name: Lavender Hot Chocolate
directions: Add milk to a medium saucepan; add in the lavender; set over medium heat and bring just to a boil.
Remove from the heat and steep for 5-8 minutes, or longer for a stronger lavender flavor.
Return saucepan to heat; whisk in the chocolate until melted and smooth.
Whisk in the cocoa powder, sugar, and salt; remove from the heat and whisk in the vanilla extract.
Divide among 4 Irish coffee glasses, straining out the lavender if desired.

similar.name: Easy and Delicious Real Hot Chocolate

name: Klah
directions: Combine cocoa powder, coffee and spices in microwave-safe mug.
Add vanilla (if using) and water.  Stir to combine.
Heat in microwave for approximately 2 minutes, or until as hot as you like it.  (Alternately, heat water in saucepan and pour hot water over dry ingredients.).
Stir well.
Sweeten and/or add milk as desired.

name: Liquid Vanilla Coffee Creamer
directions: Combine all ingredients in a pourable plastic container (I use one with measurements right on the container). Mix until everything is dissolved.
Refrigerate to blend flavors.

similar.name: Copycat French Vanilla Liquid Coffee Creamer

name: Almond Kahlua Frosty
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender and process until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Tahitian Mojitos for Two
directions: To make mint ice cubes boil water and pour into ice cube trays along with mint sprigs either chopped or left whole.
In small pitcher add mint ice cubes and tonic water and stir around a bit with a wooden spoon to release some of the mint flavor.
Stir in the limeade and then the rum.
Pour into two glasses and sip as you dream about relaxing on the gorgeous beaches of Tahiti and watching the sunset over the clear ocean waters!
Note: if you use a substitute coconut rum, it might be nice to add just a touch of vanilla.

name: Spiked Strawberry Milkshake
directions: Shake with ice and strain into glass.

name: Martini in Black
directions: In small bowl, whisk cream until just thickened; set aside.
In a cocktail shaker filled with ice, add vodka, Kahlua, and espresso; shake well.
Strain into 2 Martini glasses.
Top with whipped cream and serve.

name: Golden Lining Cocktail
directions: Shake all ingredients in a cocktail shaker & strain into a glass to serve.

name: Tiatip
directions: Layer carefully in shot glass.

name: Three Musketeers
directions: Shake with ice and strain into a shot glass.

name: Guttersnipe Cocktail
directions: Pour the lime vodka into a highball glass filled with ice cubes. Add the Cointreau orange liqueur then guava juice. Squeeze in a lime wedge, and serve.

name: U-Pick Raspberry Martini
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker with ice.
Add in the vodka, raspberries, cranberry juice, simple syrup, vermouth, and a squeeze of the lime.
Shake vigorously; strain into a chilled cocktail glass; garnish with skewered fresh berries.

name: Tootsie Roll
directions: Pour into shot glass.

name: Chocolate to the Fifth Power
directions: Add chocolate milk to a medium saucepan; place over medium heat.
Bring to just under a boil; look for small bubbles on the sides of the pan.
Whisk in the chocolate until smooth; whisk the cocoa powder into the mixture until smooth, then whisk in the arrowroot.
Stir in the creme de cacao and Godiva liqueur.
Pour into 4 mugs and serve immediately with marshmallows on top.

name: Butter Cream Shot
directions: Fill glass with cream and pour the schnapps on top.

name: Saturday’s Limeade
directions: In a small saucepan, combine water and sugar; bring to a boil, stirring to dissolve sugar.
Add in zest; cover, and remove from heat; let steep 10 minutes.
Strain through a fine-mesh strainer and let cool.
Pour the cooled sugar syrup into a 1 quart container.
Add in the lime juice and salt; stir.
Chill, covered, until very cold.
When ready to serve, pour equal amounts of the lime concentrate and lemon-lime soda or sparkling water into a tall glass over lots of ice.

name: Peppermint Patty Shot
directions: keep schnapps in a freezer till chilled
pour into a shot glass
squeeze chocolate syrup ( your desired chocolatey taste ) into mouth
toss shot into mouth
swish around or just swallow
now enjoy that aftertaste of delicious peppermint pattys.

name: Ooh La La
directions: In  cocktail shaker add vodka, pineapple juice, Sprite, and triple sec.
Cut Lemon and squeeze half into shaker, use other half for garnish.
Shake well with ice.
Put splash of grenadine in two martini glasses with sugared rims.
Pour drink and color should turn to a pretty pink.
Garnish with lemon wedges and cherries.

name: Peaches-N-Cream Martini
directions: Note: to make fresh peach puree, blend together the flesh of 2 ripe, peeled peaches with about ¾ oz simple syrup (made with 1 part sugar-1part water).
Combine the vodka, peach schnapps, peach puree, and light cream in a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake moderately; strain into a chilled martini glass.

name: Hawaiian Redneck
directions: Mix first three ingredients in a shaker of ice and pour over a glass of ice.
Add a splash of grenadine,toatse.
Enjoy!

name: Foaming Wizard's Brew
directions: Place 1 scoop ice-cream into base of 10 clear, sturdy cups. Drizzle 1 tablespoon cordial over each ice-cream scoop.
Slowly pour lemonade over ice-cream. Fill each cup as much as you can, then, as froth subsides, go back and top up.
Top each drink with sprinkles. Add straws. Serve immediately.

name: Cable Car (Cocktail)
directions: Chill two Martini glasses in freezer.
Bring 1/4 cup water to boil in heavy small saucepan over high heat. Add 1/4 cup sugar and stir until dissolved. Cool sugar syrup completely.
On small plate, stir remaining 1 tablespoon sugar and cinnamon to blend.
Rub rims of chilled glasses with lemon wedge. Dip rims into cinnamon sugar to coat lightly.
Combine ice, rum, lemon juice, curacao, and 2 tablespoons sugar syrup in cocktail shaker (reserve remaining sugar syrup for another cocktail -- can keep in pantry for a couple of weeks).
Shake mixture until cocktail shaker becomes frosty.
Strain mixture into prepared glasses.
Garnish with orange peel twists and serve.

name: The Serengeti
directions: Cut the lemon into small cubes. Put all but 1 lemon cube, the basil, and brown sugar together in a glass and muddle until the consistency of a paste or jam. Fill a glass with ice. Pour rum and sweet and sour mix into shaker without ice. Put cap on and shake; this blends the spirit with the mixer and creates a "froth". Strain into glass and stir. Garnish with small spring of basil and cube of lemon and serve immediately.

This recipe was provided by professional chefs and has been scaled down from a bulk recipe provided by a restaurant. The Food Network Kitchens chefs have not tested this recipe, in the proportions indicated, and therefore, we cannot make any representation as to the results.

name: Saturn’s Moons
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker halfway with ice.
Add in the vodka, Chardonnay, grape juice, and honey.
Shake vigorously for 5-10 seconds.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Skewer grapes on a cocktail skewer and use as garnish.

name: A Chill Chaser
directions: Divide the Irish cream liqueur, rum, and creme de cacao between 2 Irish coffee glasses.
Pour 1 cup hot chocolate into each glass; stir.
Top with whipped cream and serve immediately.

name: Guava Lime Coolers
directions: In a large pitcher, mix guava juice, rum, lime juice, and grenadine.
Pour over ice in cocktail glasses and garnish with slices of lime or guava.

name: Goldschlager Lemondrop
directions: Shake with ice, serve straight up.

name: Pink Lavender Lemonade
directions: Place 2 cups water, the lavender, sugar, and strawberries in a saucepan; bring to a gentle boil over medium heat, stirring to dissolve sugar.
Decrease heat to medium-low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Cover, remove from heat, and let steep for 10 minutes.
Strain mixture through a fine-mesh strainer into a 2-quart container; stir in the lemon juice and remaining 2 ½ cups water.
Chill until very cold; serve over ice, garnished with sliced strawberries.

name: Casco Bay Lemonade
directions: Pour the citrus vodka, sweet and sour mix and cranberry juice into a cocktail shaker half-filled with ice cubes. Shake well. Strain into a collins glass almost filled with ice cubes. Top with lemon-lime soda. Float a lemon slice on top, and serve.

name: Strawberry Martini
directions: Combine the vodka, strawberry juice, orange juice, simple syrup, Cointreau, and lemon juice in a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously; strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with a strawberry.

name: Baileys Mocha Frappe
directions: Place the ice cubes, the Baileys,the instant coffee and the milk in a blender and blend until almost smooth.
Swirl the chocolate topping around the rim of 2 serving glasses.
Fill with the Baileys mixture to serve.

name: Caramba Cafe
directions: Combine all ingredients except ice cream and cinnamon sticks in a blender and refrigerate to chill.  At serving time add ice cream and blend.  Pour over cracked ice into glass coffee mugs.  Add a cinnamon stir stick.

name: Yummy  Frozen Margaritas
directions: Fill blender with crushed ice.
Add three ingredients and blend till thick.

similar.name: The Margarita Recipe Everyone Asks Me For!

name: Bananas and Cream
directions: stir until ingredients are mixed well.

name: Lovers’ Hot Chocolate
directions: Divide the creme de cacao, amaretto, and coffee between 2 Irish coffee glasses, stirring to blend.
Top each with two tablespoons of the ice cream and half the chopped pecans.
Serve immediately.

name: Campari Royal
directions: Fill a highball glass with ice cubes.
Add in Campari, Grand Marnier, and orange juice; stir.
Garnish with orange wheel.

name: Mint-Tea Lemonade
directions: Bring 2 cups water to a gentle boil in a small saucepan.
Add in tea bags; remove pan from heat, cover, and steep for 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, place the sugar in a 2-quart container.
When the tea is ready, remove the tea bags without squeezing them; pour the tea over the sugar; stir until the sugar is dissolved.
Add in the remaining 2 cups water; let cool 10 minutes.
Pour in the lemonade, then squeeze the lemon wedges into the mixture; put the rinds in, too; stir to blend.
Chill until very cold; serve over ice.

name: John Daly
directions: Fill a collins glass with ice.
Add citrus-flavored vodka and triple sec.
Fill glass with equal parts lemonade/iced tea.
Garnish with a lemon wedge.

name: Scorpion's Tail
directions: Mix over ice, shake and serve.

name: Screwed Banana
directions: Put ice in highball glass, about 1/2 full, then pour in the banana liqueur and the Peach Schnapps. Fill with orange juice. Stir.

name: Amaretto Tea
directions: Pour hot tea into a pousse-cafe glass, using a spoon in glass to prevent cracking.
Add amaretto, but do not stir.
op with chilled whipped cream and serve.

name: Amaretto Sunrise
directions: Mix together the amaretto and orange juice.
Pour into glass and then add the grenadine until you see the sunrise.

name: Amaretto Shake
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend at high speed until smooth.
Serve in chilled glass garnished with bittersweet chocolate shavings.

name: B-51
directions: Layer in shot glass.

name: B-55
directions: Layer the Kahlua, Amaretto, and Irish Cream into a shot glass in that order.

name: Alley Shooter
directions: Pour all ingredients over ice and mix together.
Strain into a glass and shoot it.

name: Alien Nipple
directions: Add Butterscotch first, layer Irish cream on top, and pour in melon liqueur.

similar.name: Buttery Nipple With a Cherry Kiss

name: An Irish Kiss
directions: Pour Baileys and Kahlua into coffee glass, fill glass with hot coffee and top with whipped cream.

similar.name: Buttery Nipple With a Cherry Kiss

name: Aggie Banana
directions: Blend ice cream, milk, and frozen bananas until smooth.
Add Schnapps, blend, and pour.

name: B-54
directions: Shake over Ice.

name: African Lullaby
directions: Mix all ingredients in blender with one cup crushed ice.
Pour into glass and garnish with red Cherry.

name: Sexual Chocolate
directions: Shake well and serve on the rocks.

name: Blue Peach
directions: Mix the two in shaker with ice.
Shake.
Pour in shot glass.

name: Screaming Banana
directions: fill glass with ice and add liqueur and pineapple juice.
Top with orange juice.

name: Satin Sheets
directions: Combine kahlua, Irish cream, and chocolate liqueur over ice.
Add milk to fill the glass.

name: Tipsy Island
directions: Crush ice in a blender.
Add frozen strawberries and banana to blender.
Put on low speed and add Malibu & Banana liqueur.
Pour into tall glass.

name: Black Mistress
directions: Pour liqueurs into shaker with ice, add cola
Shake gently.
Strain into glass with ice.
Garnish with a slice of fresh banana dusted with chocolate powder.

name: Tropical Lullaby
directions: Shake with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Garnish with pineapple slice.

name: Tropical Clarkson
directions: Prepare the hot chocolate and add the Kahlua.
Top with whipped cream or marshmallows.

name: Twin Sisters
directions: Shake with ice and strain into shot glass.

name: Tootsie Pop
directions: Layer grenadine, amaretto, and lemon juice, then stir.
Add 2 drops of chocolate syrup, let sink, and serve.

name: Toolkit
directions: Mix all ingredients and pour into shot glasses.

name: Toasted Almond Cream Soda
directions: Shake liqueurs with ice and cream.
Fill with soda water and top with Whipped cream.
Garnish with slivered toasted.

name: Talos Coffee
directions: Pour Grand Marnier into mug, and top with coffee.

name: Dream
directions: Add all ingredients to a blender and blend well.

name: Ultimate Mudslide
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.
Pour into glass and garnish with grated chocolate.

name: Yin-Yang
directions: Layer white chocolate liqueur over coffee liqueur.

name: White Dove
directions: Pour Amaretto and Cream de Cacao into a blender with the ice cream.
Blend till smooth.
Line the inside of snifter glass with chocolate syrup.
Pour drink into cup and top with whipped cream.
Add cherry to top.

name: White Parrot
directions: Mix all ingredients and shake well.

name: Butterscotch-Chocolate Milkshake (Alcoholic)
directions: Mix all ingredients into martini shaker.  Fill with ice.  Shake.
Serve and enjoy.

name: Bailey's Dream Shake
directions: Blend ingredients until smooth.

name: Banana Boat
directions: In a 12 Oz glass, place banana and ice.
Combine the other ingredients in another glass and pour over the ice.
Garnish with  pineapple slice and enjoy.

name: Banana Dream
directions: Blend till smooth.

name: Bananaball
directions: Shake with ice and strain into a cocktail glass filled with crushed ice.

name: Banana Sunrise
directions: Fill glass with crushed ice and pour grenadine over ice.
Put the ingredients (except for grenadine) in a shaker and shake them with ice.
Pour carefully over grenadine and ice.

name: Banshee Berry
directions: Combine in shot glass.

name: Sazerac
directions: Rinse a chilled glass with Pernod (to rinse a glass with liquor, pour ½ oz of spirit into the glass, swirl the spirit around inside of the glass so that the entire surface of the glass’ bowl has been coated; then discard the rest of the spirit).
Fill a cocktail shaker halfway with ice; add in bourbon, simple syrup and bitters.
Shake vigorously for 5-10 seconds.
Strain the drink into the glass; garnish with a lemon twist.

name: Blind Russian
directions: Fill shaker with ice, add liqueurs and milk.
Shake and strain into glass.

name: Aqualung
directions: Brew espresso, mix in shots of kaluha and syrup.

name: Amaretto and Cream
directions: Shake well with cracked ice, strain contents into a cocktail glass, and serve.

name: Bayou Juice
directions: Pour into a shaker filled with ice.
Chill, shake and strain.

name: Almond Delight
directions: Combinbe in shot glass.

name: Berry Patch
directions: Combine the schnapps and crème de cacao in a Collins glass.
Then fill the glass almost to the top with Sprite, and top with half-and-half.
Swirl with a straw before serving.

name: Big Booty Shake
directions: Blend till smooth.

name: B-52
directions: Layer in shot glass.

name: Algae
directions: Shake all ingredients over ice and pour into highball glass.

name: Big Pine Puss
directions: Shake with ice then strain into shot glass.

name: Afternoon
directions: Combine in a mug.
Float cream on top.

name: Baby Guinness
directions: Layer in shot glass.

name: Baby Eskimo
directions: Blend till smooth.

name: Satin Angel
directions: mix all ingredients in glass.

name: White Mistress
directions: Half fill glass with ice.
Pour liqueurs into shaker with ice and add chilled cocoa.
Shake gently. Strain into glass.
Garnish with a slice of fresh banana dusted with chocolate powder.

name: Whistling Gypsy
directions: Layer Tia Maria, Bailey's Irish Cream, Vodka in that order in a large shot glass.

name: Tropical Tease
directions: Pour directly into a Hurricane glass with ice.
Shake, do not stir.
Garnish with a lime wheel.

name: Tongue Tangler
directions: Pour Bailey's Irish Cream and Brandy into glass.
Add Heavy Cream.
Stir well and serve.

name: Toasted Almond
directions: shake, strain into highball glass.

name: Yellow Birdie
directions: Pour vodka into glass over ice followed by Creme de Banana, then top it up with Sprite & stir.

name: Zoo Station
directions: Shake ingredients over ice.
Strain into shot glass.

name: Screaming Chocolate Monkey
directions: Shake well and pour over ice, top with cherry or chocolate sprinkles.

name: Scrumptious Coffee
directions: Sweeten the coffee with brown sugar to taste.
Mix coffee, liquor, and orange peel in a pan.
Heat gently, but do not boil. Let infuse for a couple of minutes.
Pour into pre-warmed heat-resistent glasses.
Float whipped cream on top.
Garnish with thin strip of peel of orange and nutmeg.

name: Voodoo Tea
directions: Combine with ice, stir and enjoy.

name: Vixen
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker with ice.
Add Grenadine and Frangelico and shake till frothy.
Strain into chilled Martini glass.
Slowly add the Kahlua and garnish with cherry or Hershey's Kiss.

name: Tumbleweed
directions: Combine over ice in a blender.
Mix until smooth and frothy.
Serve immediately.

name: Turlock Bulldog
directions: Mix Kahlua and Irish Cream in glass.

name: White Ape
directions: Add Bailey's and ground cinnamon to hot cocoa.
Float whipped cream on top.

name: Banana Cream Pi
directions: Serve over ice.

name: Banana Rum Cream
directions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine all of the ingredients.
Shake well.
Strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Bartender's Wet Dream
directions: Pour into shot glass and garnish with whipped cream.

name: Beam Me up Scotty
directions: Layer in shot glass.

name: Betsy Clear
directions: Pour ingredients over ice.
Stir.
Garnish with an orange wedge.

name: Black Unicorn
directions: Layer in shot glass.

name: Butterscotch Truffle Martini
directions: Blend with ice in a martini shaker.
Serve in a chilled glass.

name: Razzle-Dazzle Martini
directions: Note: to make raspberry puree, blend a pint of fresh raspberries with ½ to 1 oz simple syrup (1 part water, 1 part sugar).
Add raspberry puree into an empty martini glass; set aside.
Combine the raspberry vodka, white cranberry juice, and lemon juice in a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously; strain over the puree.
Drop in a whole raspberry for garnish.

name: Bazooka Joe
directions: Fill shaker with ice.
Mix all three ingredients with ice.
Shake and strain into glass.

name: Beetlejuice
directions: In a tall mixing glass with ice pour the vodka on the bottom.
Fill the glass 3/4 full with sour mix.
Pour in the rest of the ingredients one at a time.
Garnish with pineapple spear and cherry.

name: Bird of Paradise
directions: Combine all ingredients, stir, and serve.

name: Black Cherry
directions: Fill highball glass with ice.
Add ingredients, shake, and serve.
Top with a cherry.

name: Cramer Martini
directions: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously.
Strain into frosty martini glass.
Garnish with both olives and onions.

name: Irish Cream Liquor
directions: In a double boiler heat the can of condensed sweetened milk and chocolate chips.
Using the back of a large spoon, slowly and gently blend the melted chips into the sweetened condesed milk.
When the mixture is blended remove the double boiler pan from the heat.
Slowly blend in the room temperature evaporated milk until the mixture is smooth.  Add the instant coffee and blend in well.
Slowly add the chilled whipping cream and blend together.
Add the irish whiskey and mix together.
Allow to cool or chill in refrigerator for best taste.

name: Tiropatinam
directions: Sweeten milk with honey, add eggs and mix together until smooth.
Cook on low heat until stiff, sprinkle pepper on it and serve.

name: Basil Lemonade
directions: In a small saucepan, combine 2 cups water, the basil leaves, and sugar; bring to a gentle boil over medium heat, stirring until sugar is dissolved.
Decrease heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and let cool for 30 minutes.
Strain through a fine-mesh strainer into a 1 ½ quart container.
Add in the lemon juice, remaining 1½ cups water, and lime juice; stir until blended.
Chill until very cold; serve over ice; garnish with basil sprig.

name: Hot Chocolate Espresso
directions: Bring the cream and milk to a simmer in a small saucepan over med-high heat.
Remove from heat and quickly add the chocolate, stirring until melted and very smooth.
Return to med-low heat and warm until a bubble or two forms on the surface, about 3 minutes.
Pour the hot chocolate into 4 demitasse cups; serve immediately.

name: Apple Spiced Iced Tea
directions: Bring water to a boil, and then add teabags.

name: Alice Cocktail
directions: Shake well, strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Afterglow
directions: Mix. Serve over ice.

name: Thai Iced Tea
directions: Combine Thai tea, boiling water, and sweetened condensed milk, stir until blended.
Pour into 2 tall glasses filled with ice cubes.
Garnish with mint leaves.

name: Tennessee Fruit Tea
directions: Stir together tea, water, and sugar: bring to boil, then let cool.
In a gallon container mix lemonade and pineapple orange juice.
Add to tea mixture along with enough water to make one gallon.
Refrigerate.
Serve over ice.

name: Aphrodite’s Love Potion
directions: Combine ice cubes, brandy and pineapple juice and stir.
Garnish with cherry and orange slice.
Serve in 2 martini glasses.

name: Almond Tea
directions: Steep tea and lemon zest in boiling water for about 5 minutes.
Stir in remaining ingredients, then strain into cups or mugs and serve hot.

name: Nor'easter
directions: Mix inredients in a shaker
Serve in a champagne glass.
Garnish with fresh whipped cream and chocolate shavings.

name: Piece of Heaven Shot
directions: Shake all ingredients together with ice, pour into a shot glass, and serve.

name: Beakers Blue
directions: Mix all ingredients, add ice cubes, stir, and garnish with cherry.

name: Blue Cosmopolitan
directions: Frost the rim of a chilled cocktail glass with sugar. Stir absolut citron, blue curacao, grapefruit juice, and sugar syrup in a mixing glass with ice to prevent cloudiness. Strain into cocktail glass. Garnish with a maraschino cherry.

name: Blue Nut
directions: Pour into a shaker with ice and shake and strain.

name: Blue Whip
directions: Shake vodka, curacao and o.j. with ice. Top off with Sprite or 7-Up. Garnish with fanned slices of orange floating on top and a straw.

name: Catalina Margarita
directions: Shake with cracked ice and strain into chilled cocktail or margarita glass.

name: Wicked Pink Lady Lemonade
directions: In a cocktail shaker filled with ice, add gin, lemonade, cranberry juice, and cream.
Cover and shake vigorously until chilled and frothy.
Strain into a chilled champagne or martini glass.

name: Vanilla Hot Chocolate Seduction
directions: Add milk, vanilla syrup, and salt to a medium saucepan; set over medium heat and cook, stirring, until the mixture is hot; do not boil.
Split the vanilla bean lengthwise and scrape out the seeds; add seeds to the saucepan.
Add in the white chocolate and stir until the chocolate has melted and the mixture is smooth; don’t rush this step by turning up the heat, or the white chocolate may seize.
Stir in the liqueurs.
Pour the hot chocolate into 4 mugs and serve immediately, topped with marshmallows and a sprinkle of cocoa powder.

similar.name: Easy and Delicious Real Hot Chocolate

name: Club Tropix
directions: Fill Hurricane with ice, add malibu and blue curacao, and a splash triple sec. Fill remaining room with equal parts of pineapple juice and 7-up. Add a dash of grenadine. Garnish with a cherry and an umbrella.
Note: You can also, use sloe gin  instead of grenadine. It will suspend in the drink and looks like an american flag.

name: Cape Codder
directions: Mix in highball or old fashioned glass with ice.
Enjoy who you are with.

name: Atlas
directions: Mix in shaker with ice. Strain and serve!

name: Devil's Advocaat
directions: Place grenadine in martini glass.
Mix milk, advocaat and creme de cocoa in martini shaker filled with ice.
Strain into glass (the mixture should float on top of the grenadine).
Float the blue curacao around the rim, add the nutmeg on top.

name: Deluxe Hot Cocoa Drink
directions: Dissolve the cocoa and sugar in 3 cups water in a medium saucepan.
Whisk in the evaporated milk and peanut butter and then bring to boil.
Heat for 10 minutes, stirring continuously.
Pour into four mugs to serve.

name: Classic Martini
directions: Fill a pint glass with ice.
Add the vodka (or gin) and vermouth.
Stir well with a spoon for 30-60 seconds.
Cover the glass with a cocktail strainer and poor into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish the cocktail with three olives threaded onto a fancy cocktail stirrer, or a toothpick.
Serve.

similar.name: Dirty Vodka Martini W/Blue Cheese Olives

name: Mocha
directions: Combine cocoa, cinnamon, sugar, and coffee in large mug.
Microwave on high for 90 seconds.
Add soy milk and creamer.
Microwave on high for 90 seconds more.
Whisk and serve.

name: Cosmopolitan
directions: Shake all ingredients well with ice and fine strain in to a cocktail glass. Garnish with a flamed orange zest.

name: Nantucket Iced Tea
directions: In a (glass) serving pitcher, steep the tea in the water for 45 to 60 minutes.
Remove tea bags and discard them.
Stir in the cranberry juice and as much lime syrup as desired.
Serve over ice in tall glasses.
Garnish with a a lime slice, if desired.

Lime Syrup: Combine 2 1/2 cups sugar with 1 cup of water in a small saucepan. Add a few strips of lime zest. Bring to a boil them simmer 5 to 8 minutes till slightly thickened. Remove from heat and cool. Remove and discard lime zest. Stir in 6 or 7 Tbs. of fresh, strained lime juice (and 2 or 3 drops of green food coloring, if desired).

name: Milanese
directions: Fill a rocks glass with ice cubes.
Add  the Campari, Galliano, amaretto, and juice from the lemon to a cocktail shaker.
Shake vigorously for 5-10 seconds.
Pour drink into the glass.
Garnish with orange rind spiral.

name: Roman Iced Coffee Shake
directions: Place ice cream in a blender.  Add coffee, milk, Kahlua, Bailey's irish cream and chocolate syrup.  Add ice cubes. Blend for a few seconds.
Pour into tall glasses or cups.
(If desired, add a small scoop of ice cream on top.)  Sprinkle with cocoa powder or cinnamon.
Relax and Enjoy!

name: Mojito Martini
directions: In a mixing glass, mash/muddle together the lime wedges, mint leaves, and simple syrup until the mint leaves are fairly crushed and most of the lime juice has been extracted from the lime.
Add in ice and the Barcardi Limon; cover and shake vigorously.
Strain loosely into a martini glass.
Top off with soda water; garnish with a mint sprig.

name: Kahlua Iced Coffee
directions: Mix coffee, kahlua, half and half cream and sugar in a tall glass or cup.  Add ice cubes.
Top with whipped cream and sprinkle with cinnamon or cocoa powder.
Note:  Make frozen coffee ice cubes for your iced coffees by freezing leftover brewed coffee in ice trays.  Place 2-3 cubes in your coffee cup for extra flavor!  .

name: Yogi Bhajan's Yogi Tea
directions: Bring water to boil in a 3-4 quart pot.
Add cloves and boil for one minute.
Add cardamom pods (to better release flavor, crush or split pods), peppercorns, cinnamon sticks and gingerroot.
Cover and simmer for 1-2 hours (longer = stronger).
Add black tea (can use decaf).
At this point you can cool the tea, strain it and refrigerate. I usually let it cool over night before straining.
Or strain immediately and add the milk, return to boil and immediately remove from heat (or it will boil over).
Add sweetener to taste (we like honey).

name: Frozen Chocolate Mudslide (Après-Ski Slammer)
directions: Blend in blender. Serve in tall glass. Garnish with a cherry.

name: Lemonade Comfort
directions: Add lemonade to a 2 quart container; add in the Southern Comfort, orange juice, and lime juice; stir to blend; chill until very cold.
When ready to serve, add the champagne slowly and stir just to combine.
You don’t want to stir away the bubbles; pour into chilled stemmed glasses; garnish with lemon twists and mint sprigs.

name: Italian Lemonade
directions: In a saucepan combine basil, sugar, and water and simmer until the sugar is dissolved, 5 minutes. Cool, strain the simple syrup, and store in the refrigerator.
Mix lemon juice, Basil Simple Syrup, and water together in a pitcher. Store in the refrigerator until ready to serve. Pour over ice filled glasses and garnish with basil.

name: Tonic Fresh
directions: Shake first 4 ingredients in shaker tin.
Strain into cocktail glass, over ice.
Top off glass with tonic water.
Garnish with orange slice if you like.
Note: If you can't find raspberry syrup in local stores, I noticed there are a few recipes listed on Zaar.

name: Brandy Zoom
directions: Shake all ingredients together in mixing tin and strain into your favorite cocktail glass.

name: Bavarian Tomato
directions: Shake all ingredients together in mixing tin, and pour into high ball glass.

name: Margatini
directions: To rim the martini glass: wet the rim of the martini glass with simple syrup and dip into coarse salt; set aside.
Combine tequila, simple syrup, Cointreau, vodka, lemon juice, and lime juice in a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously; strain into prepared martini glass.
Garnish with a lime wedge.

name: Texas Tea
directions: Fill a highball with ice cubes.
Add  the tequila, rum, triple sec, juice from ½ lemon and simple syrup to a cocktail shaker.
Shake the mixture vigorously for 5-10 seconds.
Pour the mixture into the glass.
Add cola to the glass; garnish with a lemon wedge and stir.

name: Watermelon Martini
directions: Note: to make watermelon puree: chop the watermelon into 1-inch pieces, de-seed, and blend in blender; one medium-sized watermelon makes about 4 cups puree.
Combine watermelon puree, Bacardi Limon, watermelon schnapps,and lemon juice in a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously; strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with a sprig of basil and a watermelon wedge.

name: Killer Kool-Aid
directions: Fill a highball glass with ice cubes.
Add vodka, Midori, amaretto, and cranberry juice to the glass.
Garnish the drink with a lime wheel, then stir.

name: Hot Spiced Cranberry Cider
directions: Combine ingredients in large pot, heat on medium heat until warm -- .

name: Platinum Margarita
directions: Combine the ingredients (except lime wedge) in a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously; strain into chilled cocktail glass.
*To serve frozen, combine the ingredients (except lime wedge) in a blender with ¾ cup crushed ice; blend until smooth and pour into a glass.
Garnish with a lime wedge.

name: Cacao Nib Masa Drink
directions: Using a coffee grinder or spice mill, grind the cacao nibs as finely as possible-this will take about 30 seconds in a standard electric spice mill.
In a bowl, combine the cacao nibs with the masa harina; add in 1 cup milk and whisk to combine; set aside.
In a 2-quart nonstick saucepan, combine the remaining 1 ½ cup milk with the honey, ground cinnamon, and salt; place over med-low heat and bring to just a boil, whisking to dissolve the honey.

Immediately whisk in the masa harina mixture; bring to a boil, then lower the heat and simmer, whisking often, for about 5 minutes, until the porridge is thick enough to hold very soft peaks with the whisk is lifted out of it.
Stir in the vanilla and remove from the heat.
Pour into 2-4 warmed cups and insert a cinnamon stick into each one to use as a spoon for the thick drink; serve immediately.

name: Mango Sparkler
directions: Put 1st four ingredients in blender, & blend away!
Gently stir in chilled spritzer, pour into glasses & enjoy!

name: Red Headed Slut
directions: mix, chill, serve, enjoy!

name: Cherry Cream Tea
directions: combine in glass.

similar.name: Strawberry or Cherry Tea Mix in a Pint Jar

name: Dolphin's Foam
directions: shake well with ice.

name: Bailey's Banana Colada
directions: Put banana and liqueur into blender and blend.
Add Irish cream, pina colada mix and rum.
Blend well then add ice blend until smooth.

name: Spicy Bloody Mary's W/V8
directions: In a 16 oz large glass, add 6-8 ice cubes.
Pour  (1 can 11.5 oz) V-8 into it, add the rest of the spices, and vodka.
Peal celery stalk ribs (strings) with potato pealer, I like to munch celery as I drink, or use the celery heart stalk unpealed.
Put celery stalk in and mix all the spices, clean the sides with it and get all the spices back into the beverage.
Notes.
I like mine spiceyyy!
Have also added a tablespoon of clam juice, or a couple tablespoons clamato juice.
You can also add a pickle, and/or green olive.

name: Pink Lemonade
directions: Add ice, vodka, sour mix, cranberry and lime juice to a shaker. Shake and strain into a highball glass with a garnish of lemon.

name: Rice Wine
directions: Cook then wash rice with cold water.
Combine all ingredients in a large airtight jar.
Set aside in cool dark place for 3 weeks.
Strain and bottle.

similar.name: Mulled White Wine With Peach Juice

name: Tropical Martini
directions: Either place amaretto and malibu in a shaker with ice, or directly into a well-chilled cocktail glass.
Either way, combine well and serve well-chilled.

name: Meyer Lemon Margarita
directions: Add the tequila, Cointreau, juice, and simple syrup to a cocktail shaker filled with ¾ cup ice.
Shake vigorously; pour into a glass and add a strip of lemon rind for garnish.

name: Cool Cow
directions: Blend to combine.

name: Castilian Hot Chocolate
directions: Shift the cocoa and sugar together into a medium-sized saucepan.
Dissolve the cornstarch in the water, and stir into the cocoa and sugar until it is a smooth paste. Begin heating the mixture, stirring it with a whisk, and gradually pour in the milk.
Continue stirring with the whisk as you bring the liquid to a simmer.
Allow the chocolate to simmer for about 10 minutes, stirring often, until it is thick, glossy and completely smooth.
Serve steaming hot in coffee mug.

name: Hot Chocolate
directions: Place the milk and chopped chocolate in a saucepan over medium heat and whisk periodically until the mixture reaches the boiling point and is foamy.
Pour the hot chocolate into two cups and garnish with a dollop of whipped cream and a dusting of cocoa powder or grated chocolate.

name: Hot Butterscotch Cocoa
directions: Mix ingredients in coffee mug, top with whipped cream.

name: Hot Toddy
directions: Add the brown sugar and cognac to an Irish coffee glass or mug; stir to partially dissolve the sugar.
Fill the mug with the hot tea, stirring to combine.
Garnish with the clove-studded lemon slice; serve immediately.

name: Dutch Treat
directions: Blend well.
Pour into glasses.

name: Drinking Chocolate
directions: Heat the cream and milk with the cinnamon and vanilla bean very slowly for 15-20 minutes.
Remove the bean and cinnamon.
Add the chocolate.
Mix until fully melted.
Serve topped with some very dense fresh whipped cream.

name: Wooly Mitten
directions: Add Southern Comfort, Peppermint schnapps and Irish cream to a mug.
Top up with Hot Cocoa.
Garnish with whipped cream.

name: Moroccan Mint Tea
directions: Combine mint, sugar, honey and tea in a teapot.
Pour boiling water over and let steep 5 to 8 minutes.
Strain out mint and tea leaves and pour into glasses.
Garnish with a mint sprig and serve.

name: Shocking Chocolate
directions: Heat the hot chocolate and add the cinnamon schnapps.

name: Anti Freeze
directions: Combine Peppermint schnaaps and Hot cocoa in a mug.
Top with whipped cream and garnish with a cherry and peppermint stick.
