name: Almond Chocolate Coffee
directions: Pour in order into coffee cup.
Top with whipped cream and chocolate shavings.

name: Banana Cream Pie
directions: Mix in a shaker with ice then strain.

name: Blue Fizz
directions: Pour the Blue Curacao into a flute glass and top up with the Champagne.

name: Cafe' Joy
directions: Combine in mug.
Top with whipped cream and toasted coconut.

name: Cafe Mexicano
directions: In four coffee cups, pour 1 teaspoon chocolate syrup in each.
In large mixing bowl, combine heavy cream, 1/4 t. cinnamon, nutmeg and sugar, and whip until soft peaks form.
Stir remaining 1/2 t. cinnamon into hot coffee. Divide the coffee evenly between the 4 mugs and stir each to blend the coffee with chocolate syrup.
Top each cup with spiced whipped cream and serve immediately.

name: Cafe Seattle
directions: Measure Irish cream and Vodka into coffee mug.
Add Hershey's chocolate syrup.
Fill will coffee and top with Whipping cream.

name: Chill out Shock
directions: First pour the chilled schnapps and than carefully layer the hot espresso on top of it.
Insert a straw into the glass and place it on the connection point between the two layers and drink it from there.

name: Coffee Coolata
directions: Blend till smooth.

name: Coffee Nudge
directions: Combine in mug and top with whipped cream.

name: Coffee Dreamer
directions: Shake all ingredients and strain over a large ice cubes in a Red Wine glass.

name: Lemonade
directions: Add water and lemon grass to a medium saucepan.
Bring to a boil. Boil for 1 minute.
Remove from heat and cover.
Let steep for 5 minutes.
Strain the mixture to remove lemongrass.
Stir in the sugar.
Let mixture cool completely.
Add steep lemongrass mixture and lemon juice to a large pitcher.
Stir to combine.
Add ice and lemon slices.
Sweeten with more sugar if desired.

name: Carrot Cake Cappuccino
directions: In a medium-size pot over medium-high heat, reduce the carrot juice by half. This should take about 15 minutes.
Whisk in all remaining ingredients except the milk.
In a separate pot, warm milk and whisk into a foam.
Serve seasoned carrot juice in a cappuccino cup and top with milk foam.
Sprinkle with cinnamon.

name: Chai Latte
directions: Toast whole or crushed spices in a saucepan over medium high heat until fragrant, about 2 minutes, shaking the pan occasionally.
Pour water over the spices.
Reduce heat to medium.
Add milk, sugar, ginger, vanilla and tea leaves. Stir.
Cover and heat until just to the simmer, about 6 to 8 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Reduce heat to lowest setting just to keep warm.
Let steep, covered for 5 to 10 minutes or longer, depending how strong you like your tea.
Strain before serving.

name: Cotton Candy
directions: Combine in a glass.

name: Creamy Sighs
directions: In coffee mug, combine Amaretto and Irish cream.
Fill with coffee.
Top with whipped cream.
Float Grand Marnier over whipped cream.

name: Hot Tub Heaven
directions: Combine in coffee mug.
Top with whipped cream.

name: Constant Comment Soda Twist
directions: Place tea bags into a heat-stable container.
Pour one quart boiling water over tea bags and allow to steep 7-10 minutes.
Squeeze and remove tea bags.
Allow tea to cool, then chill.
To serve, combine equal parts of iced tea sprite in ice-filled glasses.
Stir gently; garnish with lemon or lime, as desired.

similar.name: Better Than Mc Donald's Sweet Tea

name: Lemongrass Iced Tea
directions: Coarsely chop bottom 4 inches of lemongrass.
Trim tops, remove outside leaves, and save for garnish.
In a small saucepan, bring water to a boil.
Add tea bags and lemongrass, remove from heat, and steep for 10 minutes.
Strain.
Sweeten to taste with sugar then refrigerate until ready to serve.
Serve in a tall chilled glass full of ice.
Garnish each glass with a lemongrass top and a lemon wedge.

name: Orange Iced Tea
directions: Stir all ingredients into a large pitcher and allow to cool.
Serve over crushed ice.

name: Candy Cane Cocoa
directions: In a saucepan, heat milk until hot, but not boiling.
Whisk in the chocolate and the crushed peppermint candies until melted and smooth.
Pour hot cocoa into four mugs, and garnish with whipped cream.
Serve each with a candy cane stirring stick.

name: Chamomile Herb Tea
directions: Rinse the flowers with cool water.
Warm your tea pot with boiling water.
Add the apple slices to the pot and mash them with a wooden spoon.
Add the chamomile flowers and pour in boiling water.
Cover and steep for 3-5 minutes.
Strain the tea into two cups.
Add honey to taste.

name: Mango Lassi
directions: Put chopped mango, yogurt, milk, honey, lime juice and ice into a blender and puree on high until smooth.
Pour into tall glasses and garnish with ground nutmeg.

name: Mojita Rita
directions: Mash together the lime quarters, mint leaves, brown sugar, and water in a glass until the mint leaves start to bruise; this releases the oils and aromas in the mint.
Add in the tequila, Cointreau, and ¾ cup crushed ice to the glass.
Stir very well (don’t shake), bringing the mint leaves to the top of the drink and dissolving all the sugar; serve immediately.

name: Caramel Macchiato Coffee Chez Kathy
directions: Put water in drip coffee maker.
Put ground coffee in filter in coffee maker. Push button. Let drip.
Meanwhile, in an 18-to-20-ounce travel mug, pour in 1 packet of Swiss Miss No-Sugar-Added cocoa.
If you have a sweet tooth, squeeze about 1 tablespoon of Smuckers Caramel ice cream topping (count of 5) on top of cocoa.  Otherwise, add about 1/2 tablespoon of the caramel topping (count of 3).
(Optional:) Add a splash of fat-free half-and-half on top of the caramel topping.  It was approximately 1 teaspoon.  This is optional; it makes the coffee taste richer.
Add a tiny amount of hazelnut or vanilla flavored sugar syrup.  I measured this to be about 1/4 teaspoon.  Don't overdo it, it's better as a mysterious accent.
Pour in prepared coffee.  Stir well with knife to make sure all the cocoa mix has dissolved.
(Optional:) Top with whipped cream if you don't put the lid on and you want to impress.

name: Fizzy Blue Peach
directions: Combine liqueurs ove ice in a glass.
Top with sprite.

name: Hot Vanilla
directions: In a heavy saucepan, combine the ingredients and warm over low heat.
When small bubbles appear around the sides of the pan, remove it from the heat and let the mixture sit at room temperature for 15 to 20 minutes.
Place the pan back on the stove and rewarm the mixture, whisking it briefly to redistribute the skin that forms on the milk's surface.
Remove the vanilla bean half, scrape out the seeds with a sharp knife, and return the seeds to the milk.
Pour the vanilla milk into two 8-ounce mugs and top with sprinklings of cinnamon.

name: Peppermint Pattie Steamer
directions: Remove wrappers from peppermint patties and break into pieces.
Place candy and 2 to 3 teaspoons milk in 8-oz. mug.
Microwave at HIGH for 30 seconds; stir.
If necessary, microwave at HIGH an additional 15 seconds at a time, stirring after each heating, until candy is melted and mixture is smooth when stirred.
Slowly stir in remaining milk.
Microwave at HIGH 1 minute; stir.
If necessary, microwave an additional 15 seconds at a time until the desired temperature is reached.

name: White Grape Splash
directions: Select 4 tumblers or wineglasses. Put several ice cubes and 6 frozen grapes in each glass. Pour 3/4 cup of the grape juice over the ice, then top with about 1/4 cup of the sparkling water. Garnish each glass with a mint sprig and serve immediately.

name: Paula Deen's Hot Mocha Float
directions: In a large saucepan with a wire whisk or a wooden spoon, stir together the cocoa and sugar.  Over medium heat, slowly add the milk until well blended.  Add the hot coffee while mixing constantly.  Remove from the heat.
Ladle into 6 - 8oz mugs.  Top each with a spoonful of ice cream, whipped cream and chocolate shavings.

name: Lillet and Soda
directions: Pour the Lillet over a few ice cubes in a chilled wineglass.
Add in the club soda; stir.
Twist the orange peel over the drink and drop it in the drink.

name: Blushing Pina Colada
directions: Combine pina colada mix, rum and ice in a blender and blend till smooth.
Top with desired amount of grenadine.

name: Vanilla Creamsicle
directions: Add all liqueurs to a glass.
Pour in cold milk and stir.

name: Vanilla-Coffee Liqueur
directions: Combine sugars and water.
Boil for 5 minutes.
Gradually stir in coffee. Cool.
Add vodka and vanilla and mix thoroughly.
Cover and let ripen for 1 month.
Remove vanilla bean.
Bottle.

name: Unicorn
directions: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake & strain into martini glass.

name: Tia Maria
directions: Boil water, sugar and coffee for 10 mins and let cool.
Add rum and vanilla.
Put in clean bottle and leave for 1 week before using.

name: Scandinavian Sun
directions: Chill ingredients in a mixing tin over cracked ice.
Stir gently and strain into cocktail or martini glass.
Garnish with orange spiral.

name: Sexual Trance
directions: Shake well with ice and strain over ice.
cherry garnish.

name: 220 Btu
directions: Shake over ice and strain into shot glass.

name: 9 1/2 Weeks
directions: Combine all ingredients in glass mixer.
Chill and strain into Cocktail glass.
Garnish with sliced strawberry.

name: Absolut Anti-Freeze
directions: Pour ingredients over ice and strain into shot glasses.

name: Absolut Summertime
directions: Add all ingredients except lemon to shaker filled with ice.
Cover and shake vigorously.
Strain contents into ice filled Collins glass.
Garnish with lemon.

name: Basil Vodka
directions: Wash and dry the basil leaves and combine with about a third of the vodka in a small bowl.
Use a wooden spoon to stir and bruise the leaves to release their natural oils and flavor.
Add this mixture to the remainder of the vodka and store in an airtight container for about 24-48 hours in a dark, dry place.
Stir or shake several times to circulate the leaves.
Strain through cheesecloth into a bottle and store, ready for use.

name: Alexandra
directions: Mix in a shaker, add some ice and shake very well.

name: Wile E Coyote
directions: In a tall glass, pour all ingredients over ice.

name: Rising Skirt
directions: Pour all ingredients into a shaker and shake well.
Pour in glass with ice and top with an orange slice.

name: 5 Pm
directions: Pour rum and Cointreau into tea cup, fill with hot tea and top with milk.

name: Absinthe Curacao Frappe
directions: Stir ingredients and pour over crushed ice in a deep-saucer champagne glass.
Add orange slice.

name: After Eighteen
directions: Pour Kahlua and Creme de Menthe, and then fill the rest of the glass with chocolate milk.

name: Angel's Nipple
directions: Pour ingredients into glass in order given, carefully so each layer floats on top of the previous one without mixing.
Chill for 1/2 hour before serving.
Top with a Cherry.

name: Amaretto Alexander
directions: Combine liqueurs in shaker along with cream and ice.
Shake and strain into a brandy snifter.
Garnish with a sprinkle of nutmeg.

name: Almond Joy
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

name: Apple Pie Liqueur
directions: In 2-quart pan, put apple juice and warm (do not boil).
Add apple pie spice, and honey, mix well.
Add everclear and divide into bottles, cap and let age 1 month.
Serve cold or hot.

name: B-52
directions: layer in order listed.
To serve, light on fire.
When the shot is on fire you slap it to extinguish the fire and then you drink it. (Be careful! This step is optional).

name: Astroturf
directions: Mix creme de menthe, creme de cacao and milk in glass.
When ready to serve, squirt in chocolate syrup and mix.

similar.name: Chocolate Creme De Menthe Flavored Coffee

name: Banshee
directions: Combine ingredients with crushed ice in a mixing glass, then shake & strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Banana Splat
directions: In blender, mix banana liquer, rum, chocolate liquer, creme de cacao and milk with ice and blend until smooth.
Pour into a wine glass, top with a dollop of whipped cream, sprinkle of nutmeg and a cherry on top.

name: Black Forest Shake
directions: Blend till smooth.

name: Black Maria
directions: Combine and stir all ingredients in a brandy snifter.
Add cracked ice and serve.

name: Blue Elephant
directions: Shake and serve in a highball glass filled with ice.

name: Blue Banana
directions: Pour crème de banana into the glass and layer blue Curacao on top.

name: Blue Haze
directions: Half fill highball glass with cubed ice.
Pour in the Blue Curacao and Vodka.
Top up with lemonade and stir.
Garnish with a slice of lemon or orange if desired.

name: Blue Heaven
directions: Shake and strain into an ice filled highball.

name: Blue Monkey
directions: Pour in hurricane glass with crushed ice.
Stir or mix gently.

name: Blue Wave
directions: Combine all ingredients together over ice in a margarita glass.
Garnish with a lemon wedge.

name: Creamsicle Cocktail
directions: Blend until smooth.

name: Voodoo Juice
directions: Pour over ice in a hurricane glass.
Float dark rum on top and serve.

name: Butterballs
directions: Use a double shot glass.
Pour the Butterscotch Schnapps first, then the coffee liqueur.

name: Butterbee
directions: Layer.

name: Toucan Sam
directions: In a shaker half filled with ice, add first 5 ingredients.
Shake well.
Strain into hurricane glass filled with ice.
Drizzle with grenadine.

name: Applecake
directions: Shake well, then strain into shot glass.

name: Buttery Nipple With a Cherry Kiss
directions: Then you take the cherry liqueur along with a cherry and place the cherry on top of the spoon, while pouring the cherry liqueur into the shot.

name: Apple Jolly Rancher
directions: Chill in tumbler, shake.
Serve up in rocks glass.

name: American Flag
directions: Layer in shot glass.

name: Buzzard's Breath
directions: Pour ingredients into a shaker half filled with ice.
Shake vigorously and strain into a shot glass.

name: Dirty Banana
directions: Blend till smooth.

name: Aladdin Sane
directions: Add all ingredients to a cocktail shaker 3/4 filled with ice.
Shake, allow to chill for 5 minutes, re-shake, and pour into a martini glass.

name: Double Chocolate
directions: Add both ingredients to shot glass.
Sprinkle with cocoa.

name: Almond Shrub
directions: In a half gallon jar add the spirits, thin lemon peel, orange juice, and sugar.
Now take the essence of bitter almonds and add it to the glass of milk. Mix thoroughly and pour into the jar.
Cover, put in a warm place (65-70 degrees Fahrenheit), and keep it there until the milk has curdled. (This takes from one to three hours.).
Then filter through filter paper and bottle.
Rest it for two weeks before drinking it.

name: Almond Joy
directions: Fill mixing glass with ice, add Malibu, amaretto, creme de cacao, and cream.
Shake, and strain into a highball glass filled with ice.

name: Dr. Raspberry
directions: Combine in glass with ice.

name: Dreamsicle
directions: Fill glass with ice.
Add schnapps, then orange juice and at last milk.
Stir well.

name: Apple Pie
directions: In a cup, pour in the Amaretto.
Then add the tablespoon of Cinnamon Schnapps.
Fill cup with Apple Juice and stir.
Served warm.

name: B-57
directions: Layer ingredients into a shot glass in this order.

name: Baked Apple
directions: Pour the liqueur into the glass first, then add the Cider.
Serve cold.

name: Black and Blue
directions: Layer in shot glass.

name: Blue Fix
directions: In a 12 ounce Tom Collins glass, squeeze juice of lemon.
Add sugar and water and stir.
Fill glass with shaved ice.
Add blue Curacao and stir well.
Serve with a slice of lemon and a straw.

name: Blue Bazooki
directions: In a cocktail shaker partially filled with ice, combine vodka, blue Curacao and a good splash of orange juice; set aside.
Dip edge of wide-mouth glass, such a s a martini or daiquiri glass in water or orange juice; then dip in plate covered with sugar.
Add Perrier to glass, shake contents of cocktail shaker well.
Using a cocktail strainer, pour mixture into sugar edged glass.

name: Easter Bunny
directions: Shake crème de cacao and vodka with ice.
Strain over ice in an old-fashioned glass.
Float chocolate syrup and cherry brandy.

name: Echo Hemorrhaging Tumor
directions: Pour irish cream in shot glass followed by the Blue Curacao and finally the strawberry schnapps.

name: Electric Lemonade
directions: Blend with ice until smooth.
Serve in a hurricane glass and garnish with a lemon wheel.

name: Electric Smurf
directions: Put three ice cubes in glass then add Malibu and Blue Curacao.
Fill glass half with sprite half with Pineapple Juice.
Stir and Serve.

name: Emerald Isle
directions: Stir and add some ice.

name: Camel Hump
directions: Layer in shot glass.

name: Candy Bar
directions: Blend Kahlua, creme de cacao, and Frangelico.
Add cream.
Serve with ice cubes in highball glass.

name: Caramilk
directions: Combine in shot glass.

name: Capri
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into an old-fashioned glass over ice cubes, and serve.

name: Blue Hawaii
directions: Shake all ingredients together in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Strain into a highball glass half filled with cubed ice.

name: Candy Corn
directions: Layer in shot glass.

name: Blue Ice
directions: Shake with plenty of ice in a cocktail shaker.
Strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Captain Creamsicle
directions: Add Captain Morgan's to blender.
Add equal parts vanilla ice-cream and orange sherbet to taste.

similar.name: Brodie's Spiced Rum Ice Cream Floats

name: Blue Job
directions: Build over some ice cubes in a highball glass.
Fill up with Sprite.
Garnish with a slice of lemon.

name: Caramel Coke
directions: Combine in a glass with ice.

name: Cherry Popper
directions: Combine in glass with ice.

name: Cherry Bomb
directions: Serve as a shot.

name: Blue Neptune
directions: Fill a shaker with vodka, blue Curacao, lemon juice, and ice.
Shake well.
Strain into sugar-rimmed martini glass.
Garnish with lemon peel.

name: Blueberry Cheesecake
directions: Shake first 4 ingredients together with ice in a cocktail shaker.
Put blueberry jelly in the bottom of a cocktail glass.
Strain the drink over the jelly in glass.
Garnish with a crushed digestive cracker and some grated lemon peel.

name: Chai Colada
directions: Combine ingredients with ice in blender.
Garnish with Pineapple and/or Coconut.

name: Bombay Bellini
directions: Pour mango puree into glass and slowly add champagne.
Stir gently.
Garnish with a mango slice.

name: Booger
directions: Pour into shot glas and drop just a tiny bit of irish cream on top.

name: Milk
directions: Mix all ingredients in tin with crushed ice.
Shake, strain, and serve.

name: Caffeine Attack
directions: Blend till smooth.

name: Candy Apple
directions: Pour Amaretto and Butterscotch in a glass with ice.
Fill with apple juice.

name: That Good!
directions: Layer carefully in cordial or shot glass.
Drop the grenadine through the Irish cream. It will settle to the bottom creating a cool effect.

name: Dead Little Green Frog
directions: Mix Lemon-Lime mix in a large pitcher or punch bowl and add the other ingredients and pour over ice, top each drink off with 1/2 oz of Cherry liqueur.

name: Dirty Grasshopper
directions: Pour Creme de Menthe and Kahlua in a glass over ice.
Add milk to fill.

name: Dutch Flag
directions: Layer in shot glass.

name: Dressed up Pina Colada
directions: Make a zig-zag pattern of chocolate syrup on the inside of the glass while turning the glass.
Blend rum, coconut milk and pineapple, with 2 cups of crushed ice, on high for a few seconds, until all large chunks of ice are gone.
Pour into glass.
Top with whipped cream and a cherry.

name: Dutch Velvet
directions: Shake all ingredients (except chocolate) with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with the shaved chocolate and serve.

name: Jalapeno Lemonade
directions: Stir water, freshly squeezed lemon juice and sugar until sugar is disolved.
Add lemon rounds to mixture.
With sharp knife, poke 5-10 holes in whole jalapeno and add to lemonade.
Put in fridge to chill for 30 minutes.
Serve over ice.

name: Dark Indulgence
directions: Blend all ingredients.

name: El Nino
directions: In a shaker, mix ingredients with ice and shake vigorously.
Strain over ice in a Hurricane glass.
Garnish with pineapple wedge and cherry.

name: Electric Popsicle
directions: Pour both the melon liqueur and blue Curacao in the Collins glass and fill with Sprite.
Place the slice of lime on the top of the glass.

name: Emerald City
directions: Pour into an ice filled hurricane glass.

name: The Bianca Pop
directions: Pour coconut rum first then add amaretto.

name: Candy Cane
directions: In highball glass filled with ice, combine peppermint schnapps, white creme de cacao & grenadine.
Fill glass with half-and-half.
Top with Sprite.
Garnish with a small candy cane or filbert nuts.

name: Caramel Nut
directions: Combine crème de cacao, caramel liqueur, and vanilla ice-cream in an electric blender.
Blend at a low speed for a short length of time.
Pour into a champagne flute, garnish with whipped cream and chopped nuts, and serve.

name: Caramel Apple
directions: Combine in shot glass.

name: Captains Saddle
directions: Shake with Ice.
Strain into a highball glass.

name: Caribbean Orange Liqueur
directions: Pare very thinly the bright-colored rind from the oranges.
Blot the peel on paper towels to remove any excess oil.
Put peel in a 4 cup screw-top jar.
Add 2 cups vodka and sugar. Close jar.
Store in a cool, dark place for 2 days or until the vodka has absorbed the flavor.
Remove peel and add remaining vodka.
Close jar and add remaining cup of vodka.
Close the jar and store in a cool dark place at least 1 month to age.

similar.name: Fresh Navel Orange and Vodka Cocktail : Refreshing!

name: Chaitini
directions: Combine ingredients over ice in a shaker and shake well.
Strain into a chilled martini glass and garnish with a few coffee beans.

name: Etincelle De Nuit
directions: Combine in champagne flute.

name: Tangerine Dream
directions: Shake and strain into a chilled martini glass.
Decorate with coffee beans and hearts cut from the rind of a tangerine.

name: Cosmo Rita
directions: Combine the first 6 ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously; strain into a glass.
If serving frozen, combine the first 6 ingredients in a blender with ¾ cup ice; blend briefly until smooth; pour into a glass.
Garnish with an orange peel twist.

name: Absolut Me
directions: Shake with ice in a cocktail shaker.
Strain into a highball glass.
Decorate with an orange and a maraschino cherry.

name: Coffee Crisp Shot
directions: Pour first three in order, layer irish cream on top.

name: Chocolate Bomb
directions: Combine in glass and top with chocolate milk.

name: Cheshire Cat
directions: Blend till smooth.

name: Chocolate Banana
directions: Fill Glass with ice.
Add Crème de Banana to glass.
Add Crème de Cacao to glass.
Fill glass with milk.

name: Chocolate Chip
directions: Half fill shaker with ice.
Add liqueurs and top with milk.
Shake and pour over ice.

name: Chocolate Almond
directions: Layer in shot glass.

name: Chocolate Charlies
directions: Put a little Hersheys syrup in the bottom of a glass and add warm milk.
Mix well.
Add Voyant on top to fill glass and then froth up.
Sprinkle powdered nutmeg or cinnamon on top and serve warm as an after dinner drink.

name: Chocolate Covered Cherries
directions: Layer into shot glass.

name: Chocolate Covered Cherry
directions: Shake with ice and strain into glass.

name: Chocolate Raspberry Brownie
directions: Fill the glass with ice cubes.
Pour in the liqueurs and then top with cream.
Garnish with chocolate shavings on the top.

name: Chocolatier
directions: Combine all ingredients (except chocolate shavings) in an electric blender and blend.
Pour into a chilled champagne flute, garnish with chocolate shavings, and serve.

name: Chocolate Paradise
directions: Combine in glass over ice.

name: Chocolate Orgasm
directions: Combine over ice in glass.

name: Coconut Cream Pie
directions: Combine all ingredients into a shaker with ice shake and strain into cocktail glass.

name: Chocolate Valentine
directions: Shake with ice and strain into a shot glass.

name: Cloud 9
directions: Blend till smooth.
Pour into glasses and top with whipped cream.

name: Coconut Frappe
directions: Shake until frothy, then pour over ice and garnish with toasted coconut.

name: Coconut Toastie
directions: Blend till smooth.
Pour into a chilled champagne flute, garnish with shredded coconut, and serve.

name: Coffee Crisp
directions: Shake well and pour into old-fashioned glass.
Do not use ice.

name: Chocolate Covered Cherry Shot
directions: Add in the order written and mix then add the grenadine.

name: Chocolate Honeybee
directions: Pour honey liqueur in a shot glass and top with Godiva.

name: Chocolate Orange
directions: Stir with ice, and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with shaved chocolate.

name: Chocolate Toasted Almond
directions: Combine in a collins glass.

name: Chocolate Raspberry Delight
directions: Serve on ice. Can also be blended.

name: Cioccolato E Cocco
directions: Mix all ingredients thoroughly and pour in glass.

name: Coconut Pie
directions: Combine in glass over ice.

name: Chocolate Covered Cherry
directions: In a shaker half filled with ice cubes combine all of the ingredients.
Shake well, strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Cookie Dough
directions: Layer Amaretto above Bailey's Irish Cream.
Add pinches of Cinnamon.
Serve once cinnamon clumps begin to settle into the liquor.

name: Steve's Bailey's Martini
directions: Pour all ingredients into a martini shaker with ice.
Shake
Pour into a glass.
Enjoy!

name: Tiki John's Rum Runner
directions: Freeze in blender and serve in 12 oz glass. Enjoy!

name: Bourbon Sling
directions: Add the bourbon, Southern Comfort, and lemon juice to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Strain into an ice-filled highball glass.
Top with club soda and stir gently.
Squeeze the lemon wedge over the drink and drop it in the drink.

name: Honolulu Cup
directions: In a jar with a tight-fitting lid, combine all ingredients. Add cracked ice, and shake briskly.
Strain into a tall glass that is two thirds full of cracked ice.
If desired, garnish with sprig of fresh mint, pineapple chunk, and maraschino cherry.

name: Coffee-Cocoa Cooler
directions: In a small bowl, mix the chocolate syrup with the milk until the syrup is dissolved.
Add in the cold espresso and vanilla; stir.
Pour over ice into two chilled stemmed tall 8-ounce glasses.
Top with whipped cream.

name: The Bomb
directions: Mix over ice in shaker cup, strain and shoot,.

name: Hard Green Bricaki
directions: Fill glass with ice and add liquors.
Add a dash of lime juice.
Fill to top with pineapple juice.
Shake well and serve.
Garnish with a slice of lime and a cherry.

name: Hot Chocolate to Die For
directions: Melt the chocolate, butter and vanilla in a double boiler. When just smooth stir in the cream.

name: Hot Scott
directions: Combine in a shot glass.

name: Frozen Strawberry Banana Colada
directions: Blend until smooth.
Pour.
Garnish with fresh strawberry.

similar.name: Strawberry (Or Banana or Peach  or Pineapple) Frozen Daiquiris

name: Golden Delicious
directions: Pour sparkling apple cider into a glass.
Add the shot of Goldschlager.
Stir.

name: Golden Star
directions: Blend till smooth.

name: Golden Apple
directions: Mix in a shot glass.

name: Gingerbread Man
directions: Mix the ingredients with ice in a shaker and pour in glass.

name: Fuzzy Irishman
directions: Pour Raspberry first, Butterscotch next and Irish cream last.
Need not be layered.

name: Fruit Loop
directions: Shake ingredients in a mixing tin filled with ice cubes.
Strain into a shot glass.

name: Cool Buddha
directions: Blend till smooth.

name: Chocolate Monkey
directions: Blend liqueurs with ice-cream, milk and syrup.
Pour into parfait glass, top with whipped cream and garnish with banana and cherry.

name: Orange-Spiced Coffee
directions: Place a coffee filter in coffee filter basket of 10-cup drip electric coffeemaker.
Combine ground beans, cinnamon, allspice, and cloves in coffee filter.
Fill carafe with water.
Prepare coffee according to coffeemaker directions.
Stir in orange liqueur and, if desired, light cream and/or brown sugar.
Garnish each serving with orange wedges.
Serve the drinks immediately.

name: Cocoa Café Olé
directions: Combine sugar, cocoa, instant coffee and cinnamon in large saucepan.
Gradually stir in milk; heat stirring occasionally, to serving temperature.
Pour into mug or cup.
Serve immediately.

name: Vanilla-Infused Milk and Foam
directions: Cut vanilla bean in ½ lengthwise and scrape all the seeds out with the back of a knife.
Put both seeds and bean into milk.
Simmer milk and vanilla in saucepan to infuse.

name: Hawaiian Sugar Plantation
directions: Pour into shot glass.

name: Hot White Chocolate
directions: Place the milk in a small saucepan over medium heat until it is nice and hot.
Meanwhile, place the chopped chocolate, instant coffee powder, and vanilla extract in your blender.
Pour the hot milk into the blender and process until nice and foamy.
Pour the hot chocolate into two cups and garnish with a dusting of cocoa powder or grated chocolate.

name: Coppertone Punch
directions: Combine Crème de Banana, Malibu Rum, Pineapple Juice & ice in mixing tin.
Shake.
Strain over ice and float Midori.
Garnish with watermelon wedge.

name: Creamy Kiss
directions: Mix in order and stir.

name: Creamy Grasshopper
directions: Blend until smooth.

name: Creamy Crispy Crunch
directions: Shake with ice.
Pour into a martini glass.
Garnish with a cherry.

name: Fluxuation Cocktail
directions: Pour Mountain dew and banana liqueur into a glass,
Stir.
Slowly add the Blue Curacao.

name: Halfway Special
directions: Combine with ice.
Strain.
Serve in hollowed out pineapple.

name: Harvest Spiced Milk
directions: Fill glass with ice.
Pour Milk into glass.
Add syrup and stir or shake well.

name: Frozen Gingerbread Mudslide
directions: Blend until smooth.
Pour into a chocolate swirled pint glass.
Top with whipped cream, graham cracker crumbs and a drizzle of chocolate syrup.

name: The Fat Albert
directions: In a blender mix the Chocolate Milk, Ice, and Maple Syrup for about 5 seconds.
Then add the Chocolate liquior and Kahlua and blend for another 2 seconds.
Pour and top with whipped cream.

name: Goldfish
directions: Mix peach schnapps with vodka.
Add mandarin oranges.

name: The Event Horizon
directions: Blend using a high speed blender.

name: Godiva Polar Bear
directions: Serve on the rocks.

name: German Chocolate Cake
directions: Combine ingredients in a mixing glass.
Shake and strain over ice.
Garnish with four squirts of canned whipped cream.

name: Fruit Loops
directions: Stir all ingredients and serve over ice.
Garnish with an orange slice and a cherry.

name: Frozen Vanilla Honey Bee
directions: Blend till smooth.

name: Coquito
directions: Boil the cinnamon sticks in the water.
Take the sticks out when the water is yellow and has the smell and taste of cinnamon.
Add the evaporated milk, condensed milk and egg yolks and cook at low temperature.
While it's cooking stir to avoid it sticking to the bottom of the pot.
When it is boiling for a few minutes, add the cream of coconut and rum.
Stir well and take off the burner.
Let it cool and it will be ready.
Keep it in the refrigerator.

name: Cotton Candy
directions: Fill a shaker with ice and add the ingredients.
Shake vigorously and strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Crazy Monkey
directions: Blend and serve in a hurricane glass.
Top with whip cream and garnish with a strawberry and orange slice.

name: Cream Cordial Recipe
directions: In blender container, combine all ingredients, blend until smooth.
Serve over ice if desired.
Store tightly covered in refrigerator for up to one month.
Stir before using.

name: Creamsicle
directions: Pour all ingredients into a Collins glass over ice cubes, stir, and serve.

name: Creamsicle
directions: Combine all ingredients in a shaker with ice, give it a few good shakes and strain into a cocktail glass with a sugar rim.

name: Fluffy Duck
directions: Fill the glass with the crushed ice.
Pour the Creme de Cacao over the ice, followed by the Advocaat.
Slowly add the soda.
Stir.

name: Foxy Lady
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a chilled cocktail glass, and serve.

name: Big Melon
directions: Combine in a glass.

name: Cherry Screwdriver
directions: Stir in a glass with ice. Garnish with a cherry.

name: Cheesecake Martini
directions: Shake with ice. Strain into martini glass.
Garnish with lime wedge.

name: Cherry Cola
directions: Mix in a highball glass. Fill with ice and add cherries to your hearts desire!

similar.name: Cherry or Mixed Berry Syrup for SodaStream

name: Frozen Cherry Margarita
directions: Pour ingredients in a blender with 2 cups crushed ice. Blend at high speed and pour into a sugar rimmed glass.
Garnish with lime.

name: Blue Lagoon
directions: Mix in a glass filled with ice and stir well. Garnish with a pineapple slice.

name: Cherry Bomber
directions: Mix all parts together and serve cold!

name: Irish Russian
directions: Shake with ice and strain into a shot glass.

name: Sugar Free Dark Chocolate Mocha Dream Coffee
directions: using a very large bowl and a sifter (or a blender if you don't mind powder residue in your hair) sift all ingredients together at least twice.
Make sure and mix well with a plastic or wooden spoon.
To prepare, fill mug 1/3 full of this mixture and add freshly brewed coffee. From a press pot if possible.
Prepare your coffee first if you use creamer.  This mixture is very dark and it will be hard to judge how much cream you need by color.
(to use as hot cocoa, substitute hot water for coffee).

name: White Chocolate Martini
directions: Place chocolate syrup in bottom of martini glass.
Use a toothpick to "drag" the chocolate syrup up the side of the glass.
Place liquer, vodka and ice in cocktail shaker.
Shake until well mixed
Strain into prepared glass.
If this is too strong simply add 2 ounces of cream when skaking.

name: Cat Scratch Fever
directions: Shake with ice and strain into a shot glass.

name: Adult Creamsicle
directions: Fill a 16 oz. glass approximately 2/3 full with crushed ice.
Pour in the vodka.
Fill glass to the top with cream soda (you'll have a little left over).
Drink with a straw.

name: Iced Cafe Cola Libre
directions: Stir the cold espresso and rum together.
Fill two chilled glasses with ice cubes.
Divide the coffee-rum mixture between the two glasses and top off with the cola.

name: Turtle Mochaccino
directions: Combine the espresso and all the syrups in a 12-ounce latte mug or tall tempered glass.
Fill the rest of the way with the steamed milk.
Stir and serve immediately; sip slowly.

name: Mexican Coffee
directions: Put espresso into a mug.
Top with Vanilla-Infused Milk and Foam.
Serve with Dark Chocolate-Chili Truffle Cinnamon Spoon to stir.

name: Bloody Mary Ala Ina Garten
directions: In a food processor fitted with a steel blade: puree: celery, horseradish, onion, lemon juice, Worcestershire, celery salt, kosher salt, Tabasco.
Chill for several hours or overnight.
Pour tomato juice and Bloody Mary mixture into a glass pitcher, add vodka and stir to combine.
Rim the glass with sea salt or celery salt for an added twist & garnish.
Serve over ice with celery stalk for garnish.

name: Raspberry Cosmopolitan
directions: Fill cocktail shaker half full with ice.
Add all ingredients into shaker except raspberries.
Shake well, strain into martini glass and garnish with raspberries.

name: Summer's Strawberry Rose
directions: Blend with ice until the consistency is smooth and creamy. The color should be a light pink resembling a strawberry milkshake. If not, add additional Tequila Rose and/or Strawberry Mix.
Serve in a chilled glass with a thick straw. Garnish with fresh strawberries and whipped cream.
**Note** Strawberry Mix can be substituted with Fresh or Frozen Strawberries and Sugar Syrup.

name: Chili's Jamaican Paradise
directions: Combine all ingredients in glass with ice.
Enjoy!

name: Kafir Lime Water
directions: Make 3 or 4 tears in each lime leaf to release the oils.
Stuff the leaves in the water and refrigerate overnight.
Remove leaves and serve.

name: Lychee Lemonade
directions: Combine lychees (with syrup), lemonade concentrate, and water in blender.
Blend until smooth.
Serve over ice.
Garnish with lemon slices and mint sprigs.

name: Hard Apple Cider
directions: Other items you'll need:  Stock pot, stirring spoon, 1 gallon glass jug, rubber stopper with hole for airlock (available from your local home-brew shop), Airlock (also available from your local home-brew shop), enough bottles to hold one gallon of your cider (screw top bottles that have already held carbonated beverages are ideal.).
Pour about half of the cider into the stock pot and heat to 80°.
Stir in honey and continue to stir until honey is completely dissolved.
Remove from heat.
Cool the cider to 75°.
Funnel warm cider into 1 gallon glass jug.
Add enough of remaining cider to fill jug (with 3 or 4 inches of space left at the top.).
Add yeast.
Place stopper and airlock on jug.
Let the jug rest in a cool dark place for approximately a week.
Fill screw top bottles with cider, then let sit for 2 or 3 more days in that same cool dark spot.
Refrigerate and drink!

name: The Miracle
directions: add everything into a shaker.
Shake and strain into glass.
Enjoy!

name: Hot Banana Split
directions: Build in glass or mug. Fill with Hot Chocolate. Top with whipped cream.

name: Vodka Water
directions: Place ice cubes in an empty pitcher.
squeeze juice of the orange, lime and tangerine over the ice, throw in the peel (makes a pretty presentation and adds to the citrus flavor).
Add Mandarin Vodka (1/3 of the bottle is how I do it).
Fill with Water, stir.
Pour into highball glasses.
Share with someone you love!

name: West's Mango Bramble
directions: Pour mango liqueur into the bottom of an Old Fashioned glass.
Carefully fill the glass with crushed ice.
In a cocktail shaker filled with ice, add the vodka and lemon juice, shaking until very cold.
Strain the vodka and lemon  over the crushed ice and top with a splash of soda.
Garnish with a wheel of kiwi.
Cheers!

name: White Hot Chocolate (Fast)
directions: In a saucepan combine chocolate and 1/3 cup of the milk (or half & half or light cream). Cook and stir over low heat until chocolate is melted.
Add remaining milk. Stir until heated through. Add coffee and vanilla. Serve in mugs. If desired top with optional ingredients.
For Brandied White Hot Chocolate: Prepare as above, except add 2-3 tablespoons brandy to the saucepan when adding coffee and vanilla.

name: Adult Chocolate Milk
directions: Stir all together in a pyrex glass measuring cup, or what ever you have. (Use shot glasses to measure, though.).
Fill glass with ice.
Pour mixture over ice.
For extra fun, hang a small scoop of chocolate or coffee ice cream on the rim of the glass!
Enjoy! :).

name: Tropical Fizzes
directions: In a large pitcher, combine the pineapple juice and tequila.
Pour the pineapple mixture into rock glasses filled with ice. Top with a splash of club soda and the pineapple chunks.

name: The V
directions: Mix ingredients in an old fashion glass with ice.

name: Make Perfect Ice Tea
directions: Place tea bags and baking soda in a large heat resistant glass measuring cup.
Add 2 cups of boiling water.  Cover and steep for 15 minutes.
Remove tea bags and pour tea into a 2 quart pitcher.
Add 6 cups of cold water.  If you have hard water, use filtered water or bottled water.
For sweetened tea, put approximately 1 cup of sugar (adjust to taste) in 2 quart pitcher.  Then pour tea concentrate from step 2, and after sugar has dissolved, add 6 cups of cold water.
To avoid cloudiness, cool to room temperature before refrigerating.
Garnish with lemon or mint and serve over ice.
Store in refrigerator for up to 2 days.

name: Exotic Fruit Frappe
directions: Chop lemongrass and heat with sugar and water until sugar has dissolved.
Let cool, then strain out lemongrass and chill syrup.
Pulse half of fruit with half the sugar syrup, 1 cup of ice cubes and 1 1/4 cups cream until blended and frothy.
Pour into a chilled pitcher and repeat with remaining ingredients.
Serve immediately.

name: Kinderpunsch
directions: In a 3 quart saucepan, bring water, sugar, cloves and cinnamon to boil.
Stir in juice and heat through. Do not boil.
Take spices out and pour over lemon slices in serving bowl.
Serve warm.

name: Mango Passion Fruit Lassi
directions: Scoop out the pulp from the passion fruit.
Strain the pulp through a sieve into a small bowl. Discard the seeds.
Squeeze out the juice from the ginger into the passion fruit. Discard the ginger pulp.
Add chopped mango, passion fruit pulp, yogurt, milk, honey, lime juice and ice to a stand blender.
Blend mixture on high until smooth and frothy.
Serve lassi in tall chilled glasses with a pinch of cardamom on top.

name: Orange Julep
directions: Make a simple syrup by combining the sugar and water in a small saucepan. Bring to a boil over high heat and simmer until the sugar dissolves.
Remove from the heat and cool completely.
In a large measuring cup or serving jug, mix together the simple syrup with the orange juice, mint and lime juice.
Let sit for 5 minutes.
Fill 4 tall glasses with ice.
Pour ½ cup of the orange mix into each glass and top with ¼ cup of carbonated water.
Garnish with orange slices and mint leaves.
Serve immediately.

name: Pineapple Cooler
directions: In a large pitcher combine pineapple juice concentrate, limeade, and water.
Chill for at least 30 minutes.
To serve, transfer fruit juice mixture to pitchers; add club soda, ice cubes, and fresh strawberries.
Serve with Fruit Swizzle Sticks, if desired.

name: Sparkling Lemonade Floats
directions: Stir together lemon juice and sugar and add cold water.
Place a scoop of ice cream into 6 glasses and pour lemonade over to fill the glass 3/4 of the way. Top each glass with club soda and garnish with berries, lemon slices and mint.

name: Strawberry Lemonade
directions: In a saucepan, bring the water, sugar and lemon zest to a boil.
Place the strawberries and lemon juice in a pitcher.
Add the hot syrup.
Refrigerate until completely chilled, about 4 hours.
Strain if desired, but do not press.
Serve well chilled.

name: Violet Lassi
directions: In the jug of a blender, combine the yogurt, raspberries, violets and honey.
Blend on low speed for 30 seconds, then increase speed to high and blend another 10 seconds, until smooth.
Pour into 2 glasses and stir in mineral water to taste.

name: Agua De Papaya
directions: In a blender or food processor, combine water, papaya, sugar, and lime juice until smooth.
Pour mixture through a strainer into a pitcher, forcing through most of the pulp.
Chill at least 30 minutes before serving.
Serve with or without ice cubes.
As a decorative touch, add slices or chunks of papaya.

name: Tequila Sunset
directions: Mix Tequila Rose and orange juice.  Shaking will make a thicker drink, stirring will make it thinner.
Serve in a wine glass over ice.

name: Frozen Rose Lemonade
directions: Blend until smooth.
Garnish with a lemon wedge and a rose petal.
Can add citrus vodka for an adult version of this.

name: Spanish Chocolate
directions: Stir the milk with the chocolate and the cinnamon over low heat until the chocolate dissolves.
Add the eggs and beat the mixture until it becomes thick, taking care not to boil.
Serve in coffee mug.

name: Miel a La Rose
directions: Combine in a glass with ice.

name: Roselle
directions: Combine in a shaker with ice.

name: Agua De Melón
directions: In a blender or food processor, combine water, cantaloupe, sugar, and lime juice until smooth.
Pour mixture through a strainer into a pitcher, forcing through most of the pulp.
Chill at least 30 minutes before serving.
Serve with or without ice cubes.
As a decorative touch, add slices or chunks of melon.

name: Sesame Milk
directions: Soak seeds in water over night.
In the morning, add seeds and water to a blender.
Add syrup and vanilla.
Blend till smooth and strain into glasses.

name: Ginger Cordial
directions: Put water in a medium pot and bring to a boil.
Mash ginger root in a medium bowl with a wooden spoon.
Add ginger, zest, lemon juice and sugar to pot.
Stir until sugar dissolves.
Simmer 20 minutes.
Remove from the heat and cool completely.
Refrigerate syrup and use within a week.

name: Lime Ginger Spritzer
directions: Combine ginger root, white sugar and water in a heavy stainless steel pot over medium-high heat.
Bring to a boil, reduce the heat and simmer for 45 minutes.
Strain through a fine mesh strainer and chill.
In an ice filled pitcher combine the ginger syrup, lime juice and sparkling water.
Stir and serve in chilled glasses.

name: Orange Pineapple Cooler
directions: Combine orange juice, pineapple (with juice), and ginger in blender, blend until smooth.
Fill tall glasses with 3 or 4 ice cubes, pour 1/2 cup of club soda in each glass, fill with orange pineapple mixture, and garnish with orange wedge.

name: Pechet Rose
directions: Combine in a glass with ice.

name: Agua Fresca De Pepino
directions: In a blender or food processor, combine water, cucumbers, sugar, and lime juice until smooth.
Pour mixture through a strainer into a pitcher, forcing through most of the pulp.
Chill at least 30 minutes before serving.
Serve with or without ice cubes.
As a decorative touch, add slices of cucumbers.

name: Holiday Tea Blend
directions: Combine all igredients and store in an airtight container.
Use one teaspoon of tea mixture per each 6-ounce cup of tea.

similar.name: Chai Tea Mix Gift in a Jar

name: Orange Scented Hot Chocolate
directions: Combine all ingredients in heavy medium saucepan.
Stir over low heat until chocolate melts.
Increase heat and bring just to a boil, stirring often.
Remove from heat and whisk until frothy.
Return to heat and bring to boil again.
Remove from heat, whisk until frothy.
Repeat heating and whisking once again.
Discard orange peel.
Let stand at room temperature.
Before serving, bring just to boil, remove from heat and whisk until frothy.
Pour hot chocolate into coffee mugs.

name: Maple Milk
directions: Combine in a glass.

name: Cucumber and Mint Ice Tea
directions: Slice cucumbers and add together with mint leaves into a large pitcher of water and ice cubes to infuse.

name: Homemade Peach Snapple
directions: Mix together tea and the remaining ingredients.
Add more sugar and/or lemon juice to suit your taste.
Try other fruit concentrates for new flavors.

similar.name: Peach and Mint Iced Tea ( Adult)

name: Flower Power Tea
directions: Combine in glass and serve with orange wedge, mint sprig or edible.
flowers.

name: Ginger Iced Tea
directions: In a medium pot over medium-high heat, add water and ginger.
Bring water to a boil, reduce to a simmer and simmer for 30 minutes.
Strain off solids, and add honey and lemon.
Let cool, then serve over ice.

name: Mediterranean Iced Tea
directions: Shake the orange liqueur, amaro, lime juice, orange juice, simple syrup and soda with ice in a cocktail shaker.
Strain over ice into a highball glass.

similar.name: Lemon and Red Zinger Iced Tea

name: Mediterranean Lemonade
directions: Combine ouzo, lemon juice, simple syrup, honey and mint leaves with some ice into cocktail shaker.
Strain over ice into glass and garnish with fresh mint.
For simple syrup.
Combine 3/4 cup honey with 3/4 cup cold water in small pan.
Bring to boil and stir to dissolve honey.
Once honey is dissolved, remove from pan and let cool completely.

name: Grapefruit White Wine Spritzer
directions: Adjust parts to number of servings, serve over ice in large wine glasses and enjoy.

name: Diet Sunkist Sungria - Weight Watchers
directions: In a 12-ounce glass, add diced fruit, diet sunkist orange soda, grape juice and seltzer.
If desired, add crushed ice and a slice of orange for garnish.

name: Tequila Sour
directions: Add tequila, lemon juice, and simple syrup to a cocktail shaker filled with ice; shake vigorously.
Strain into a chilled sour glass or large wineglass.
Garnish with the cherry.

name: Berry-Mint Iced Tea
directions: Steep tea bags in boiling water for 3 minute Remove bags.
Refrigerate tea, at least until cold.
Stir in juice and fruit before serving. Pour into a pitcher and add ice.

name: Lemon-Lime Iced Tea
directions: Add tea bags to boiling water. Steep for 3 minute Remove bags, then immediately add frozen lemonade and stir until completely dissolved. Sweeten with sugar or honey, if needed.
Refrigerate at least until cold. Then stir in rum to taste.
To serve, place a few ice cubes in a large pitcher. Thinly slice lemon and lime and add. Pour tea mixture overtop.

name: Chai Latte!!!
directions: In a small sausepan, combine the first six ingredients. bring to a boil. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for five minutes.
Stir in milk. Return to desired heat, then strain. Stir in sugar until dissolved. top with whipped cream and garnish with cinnamon stick if desired.
Enjoy!

name: Honey Lemonade With Frozen Fruit Cubes
directions: Combine lemon juice and honey in large pitcher.
Stir until honey is dissolved.
Stir in Water.
Place 1-2 fruit pieces in each compartment of 2 ice cube trays.
Fill each compartment with honey lemonade and freeze until firm.
Chill remaining lemonade.
To serve, divide frozen fruit cubes between tall glasses and fill with remaining lemonade.

name: Hot Cocoa
directions: In a small saucepan, stir together the cocoa powder and the sugar.
Add the water and stir well.
Cook over medium heat until the mixture comes to a low boil and the sugar dissolves.
Stir in the milk, vanilla, and almond extract.
Reduce the heat to low and stir until warmed through.

name: Hop, Skip and Go Naked
directions: Pour the vodka, triple sec, grenadine, and cranberry juice into a cocktail shaker over ice.
Cover, and shake well.
Strain into a chilled martini glass to serve.

name: South Hampton (Non-Alcoholic)
directions: Fill a tall glass with ice.
Add tonic water, a squeeze of lime juice and 3 dashes of bitters.
Stir and serve with a straw.
Garnish with a lime wheel if desired. Enjoy!

name: Orange Cream Slush
directions: Pour the orange juice into a 2-quart container; cover and freeze for 2 hours or until slushy, stirring twice.
To serve, pour slush into eight glasses.  Add a scoop of ice cream to each glass.  Garnish with orange slices if desired.

name: Delicious Homemade Lemonade
directions: Lemonade:  Take 1 gallon of water with 20oz of sugar and mix thoroughly. Cut one large lemon in half and squeeze juice into 16oz cup. Add Ice to cup and fill cup with the simple syrup (water/sugar mixture)  stir and ENJOY!

name: Pineapple Mojitos
directions: Grab 8 highball glasses. In each glass crush 1/8 of the mint leaves, 2 lime wedges, and 1 tbsp of sugar.
Next, stir in 2 tbsp pineapple juice, 2 tbsp crushed pineapple, and 2 tbsp rum until sugar is dissolved in each glass.
Add 1/2 cup ice cubes and a splash of club soda to each glass.

name: Energy Shot/Shooter
directions: Pour the vodka and the energy drink into a cocktail shaker with ice. Shake well and strain into a shot glasses for serving.

name: Kamakaze Bomber (Shooter)
directions: Pour the Red Bull into an old fashioned glass, splash the grenadine to redden the Bull. Pour a shot of Jagermeister and drop it into the glass. Consume that beverage kamikaze style.

name: Fiery Fairy Shot / Shooter
directions: Mix ingredients in glass, light on fire, blow it out and enjoy.

name: Lemon Drop Shooter
directions: Place sugar on lemon, place in mouth and take shot, then bite down on lemon.

name: Choc Port Flip
directions: Place the cream in a bowl. Use a balloon whisk to whisk until soft peaks form.

Place port, egg, topping, sugar, ice and extra cream in a cocktail shaker. Shake until combined. Strain into a 250ml (1-cup) capacity serving glass. Top with whipped cream and sprinkle with nutmeg. Serve with wafers.

name: Glen of Passion
directions: Combine lavender flowers, sugar and boiling water in a heatproof jug. Set aside for 15 minutes to infuse and cool. Strain into a small jug and discard lavender.
Combine Glenfiddich, pear liqueur, passionfruit pulp, lavender infusion and ice in a cocktail shaker and shake for 2 minutes or until cocktail shaker is extremely cold.
To serve, pour among serving glasses, top with extra ice and garnish with fresh lavender sprigs.

name: South-Of-The-Border Slushie
directions: Place water and sugar in a saucepan over low heat. Cook, stirring, for 2 minutes or until sugar dissolves. Remove from heat and set aside to cool slightly.

Place sugar syrup and honeydew in the bowl of a food processor and process until smooth. Pour into a shallow metal container and cover with foil. Place in the freezer for 6 hours or until almost frozen.
Use a metal spoon to break up the honeydew mixture. Place honeydew mixture, tequila and mint in the bowl of a food processor and process until smooth. Spoon into glasses to serve.

similar.name: Watermelon Slush With Rose Water and Coconut Milk

name: Baileys Mocha Frapp
directions: Place the ice cubes, Baileys, instant coffee and milk in the jug of a blender and blend until almost smooth.
Swirl the chocolate topping around the rim of 2 serving glasses. Top with the Baileys mixture to serve.

name: Molly Hogan's
directions: In a blender, combine eggs, lemonade, orange juice, sugar, vanilla.  Blend well.
Pour into a pitcher.
Gradually and slowly, add the vodka and mix into the other concotion.  Store in the refrigerator.
When ready to serve, in a 6-8oz. glass, put 2oz. drink mix over crushed ice and fill with soda pop.
Enjoy! ;p.

similar.name: Awesome and Economical Hot Buttered Rum Mix

name: Purple Tickler
directions: Put ice in a shaker.
Put all ingredients in shaker. Shake shake shake.
Serve in martini glass.

name: Sour Kirby
directions: fill shaker with ice.
add all ingredients and shake well.
pour in martini glass and serve.

name: Diet Soda Floats
directions: Pour diet soda in glass.
Scoop ice cream into glass.

name: Pineapple Ginger Mojito
directions: To make the pineapple-rum:  Peel, core and slice pineapple and pack into a glass container with a cover.  Add rum to completely cover pineapple.  Seal container and store in a cool place for four to five days.  Taste rum occasionally to check progress.  When rum has reached the desired flavor, strain it through a sieve, bottle, and refrigerate for up to two weeks.  Yields one liter.

To make ginger syrup:  In a medium saucepan over medium-high heat, bring water and ginger to a boil.  Add sugar, stirring until dissolved.  Reduce heat to low and simmer for 1 hour.  Remove from heat and cool to room temperature.  Strain through a sieve, bottle, and refrigerate for up to one month.  Yields approximately 3 cups.

To make mojito:  In a 14-oz glass, muddle spearmint, lime juice, and ginger syrup, to release the spearmint oils without tearing the leaves.  Fill the glass with crushed ice, and add pineapple-infused rum.  Stir the drink to incorporate the flavors and coat the ice.  Add more crushed ice, stir again, top with soda water, and stir once.  Garnish with a sprig of mint and spear of pineapple.

similar.name: Lemongrass, Kaffir Lime and Ginger Mojito

name: Bathtub Gin Fizz
directions: In large punch bowl, combine 7-up, lemonade concentrate, lime juice and powdered sugar; stir to blend.
Gently stir in gin.
Serve over ice in tall glasses.

name: Peach Lassi Cocktail
directions: Add all ingredients in a blender and whir until frothy.
Serve.

name: Cosmo De San Jose
directions: Combine ingredients in a shaker filled with ice.
Strain into a chilled martini glasses.

name: Aunt Lydia's Bailey's Irish Cream
directions: Mix all ingredients in blender until well mixed.
Store in refrigerator.

name: Iced Cappuccino
directions: Heat the 4 cups of milk to boiling; remove from heat.
Add creamer, vanilla, instant coffee and hot chocolate mix; stir well. Pour mixture into a container with a lid; put into freezer and freeze until very firm, but slightly slushy.
Put mixture in a food processor; while processing, add the 1/4 cup milk in small increments to mixture. Process until all is combined and nicely slushy.

name: Raspberry Champagne Spritzer
directions: Slice the whole strawberries vertically, just halfway up to the crown.  Set aside to use as garnish.

Just before serving, place a tablespoon of sorbet in the bottom of a champagne flute.  Place the mint leaves and some chopped strawberries in the glass and pour in the champagne, being careful not to full it so much that it froths over.
Garnish each glass (makes 4-6 with a sliced strawberry and serve immediately.
*I had to enter a size for the bottle of champagne, but I'm not sure how much is in a bottle.  Just use a standard size bottle of champagne.

name: Orange Flamingo
directions: Fill glass 4/5 of the way up with orange soda.
Add grenadine.
Add the whipped cream to the top.

name: Rose Cocktail
directions: Pour syrups into chilled flute glass.
Slowly add sparkling wine and gently stir.
Garnish with a strawberry.

name: Chocolate Bullets
directions: Place the cream, Baileys, ouzo, chocolate topping and ice cubes in the jug of a blender and blend until well combined and the ice is crushed.
Pour the ouzo mixture among serving glasses.
Top with a dollop of whipped cream and sprinkle with chocolate.
Serve immediately.

name: Galliano Espresso
directions: Pour liqueur into a warmed coffee glass.
Use an electric coffee machine, plunger or Italian coffee maker to make 60ml (1/4 cup) of hot strong espresso. Pour over liqueur. Top with marshmallows. Sprinkle with drinking chocolate. Serve.

name: Sambuca Cafe Ole
directions: Combine the coffee, cream, Sambuca, coffee liqueur and ice cubes in a cocktail shaker. Shake until well combined.
Pour the coffee mixture among serving glasses and serve immediately.

name: Vietnamese Milkshake
directions: Place all the ingredients in a blender and blend until a thick and frothy puree.
Pour into a glass, add a straw and enjoy.

name: Vodka Smoothies-Island Style
directions: Place all the ingredients in a blender and blend to a smooth consistency. Serve in tumblers.

similar.name: Take Me Back to the Islands

name: Mango, Chilli & Lime Margarita
directions: Place the mango, chilli, ice, tequila, lime juice and sugar in the jug of a blender and blend until almost smooth.
Pour the mango mixture among chilled serving glasses. Serve immediately.

name: Fruited Ice Tea
directions: Let tea bags steep in boiling water (approx. 5 minutes).
Remove and add sugar.
Add frozen juices and enough water to make 1 gallon.
Pour into glasses over ice.

name: Red Hot Shot
directions: Use a juice extractor to process the tomatoes. Transfer to a jug. (Alternatively, place the tomatoes in the jug of a blender and blend until pureed. Strain through a sieve into a jug. Discard seeds and skin.)

Combine the tomato juice (you will need 300ml), water, lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce and Tabasco in a cocktail shaker. Taste and season with salt and pepper. Add the ice cubes, cover with the lid and shake well until chilled.
Strain the tomato mixture into 2 serving glasses. Garnish with celery sticks and lemon wedges, and serve immediately.

name: Lemon and Lime Tango Cocktail
directions: Combine sugar and water in a small saucepan over a low heat. Cook, stirring, for 3 minutes or until sugar is dissolved and mixture comes to the boil. Reduce heat to low. Simmer for 5 minutes. Remove from heat. Set aside to cool. When cold, place in an airtight container. Refrigerate.
Place 1/3 cup of chilled syrup, lemon juice, gin, mint, lemon rind and ice cubes in a blender. Blend until ice is crushed. Pour into 2 chilled glasses. Serve.

name: Classic Martini (Double Post, Sorry!)
directions: (Double post, SORRY!).
Fill a pint glass with ice.
Add the vodka (or gin) and vermouth.
Stir well with a spoon for 30-60 seconds.
Cover the glass with a cocktail strainer and poor into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish the cocktail with three olives threaded onto a fancy cocktail stirrer, or a toothpick.
Serve.

similar.name: Dirty Vodka Martini W/Blue Cheese Olives

name: White Peppermint Hot Chocolate
directions: Beat chilled cream with crushed mints until stiff peaks form. Refrigerate for about an hour. Meanwhile, heat milk to a simmer, them mix in chocolate. Whisk until chocolate is melted and smooth. Add mint extract and stir through. Pour into mugs and top with minty whipped cream.

name: Pomegranate Blueberry Vodka Sipper
directions: Combine all ingredients; except blueberries in a blender and process or mix by hand in a small bowl (easier for a single serving).
Top with blueberries for garnish if you wish.
Serve in Martini Glass.
Serve immediately.
*Note: If sorbet is too hard straight out of the freezer to mix by hand, microwaving it for 8-10 seconds softens it enough to mix easily. No need to soften if using a blender to mix.

name: Roserie
directions: Combine in wine glass and garnish with rose petals.

name: Mezcal Buck
directions: Add the mezcal, lime juice, and simple syrup to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously; strain into an ice-filled highball glass; top with the ginger beer.

name: Prickly Agave
directions: Rub the rim of a chilled margarita glass with the lime wedge; rim with sugar and salt.
Add the tequila, Tuaca, prickly pear juice, and lime juice to a cocktail shaker filled with ice; shake vigorously.
Strain into the prepared glass; garnish with a lime peel spiral.

name: Sunset Sangria
directions: In a 1-quart glass measuring cup, combine lime peel, lime juice and sugar; add water to equal 4 cups.  Stir to dissolve sugar.  Cover and refrigerate at least 2 hours.

To serve, place ice cubes in six 16-ounce glasses.  Add 2/3 cup of the lime juice mixture to each glass.  Add 1/2 cup of wine to each glass, being sure to pour it gently along the side of the glass to keep the colors of the limeade and the wine separated.  Thread a nectarine slice on regular or party skewers and add one skewer to each glass.  Serve immediately.

name: Dark and Stormy
directions: Pour 1 bottle of ginger beer into each of 2 chilled beer mugs or tall glasses, tilting the glass and gently pouring the ginger beer down the side to minimize foaming.
Gradually add 1 ½ ounce of dark rum to each glass, so that it floats in the ginger beer—pour it over a spoon held at the surface of the ginger beer.
Add a cinnamon stick, stir gently, and serve at once, garnished with a lime wedge.

name: Lizard Lounge Iced Tea
directions: Bring the Cider to a boil.
Fill a Half-Gallon (2-quart) pitcher with ice.
When Cider reaches boiling point, pour into pitcher over ice and 3 Herbal Tea-Bags.
Chill for an hour or two.
Serve and Enjoy.

name: Banana Eggnog
directions: Mix milk, banana, eggs, ice cubes and honey in electric blender for 30 seconds at medium speed.
Pour in Canada Dry Club Soda just before serving.
Stir to blend.
Garnish with banana slices.

name: Chilled Sage & Herb Tea
directions: Place the sage, fennel seeds, mint and lemon rind in a large teapot or plunger. Add the boiling water and cover with a lid. Set aside for 15 minutes to infuse.
Strain into a jug and stir in honey to taste. Cover with plastic wrap and place in the fridge for 1 hour to chill.
Place ice cubes and a few mint leaves in serving glasses and pour over the chilled tea to serve.

name: Cherry Fizz
directions: Combine cherry preserves and water.  Chill.  Pour cherry mixture into 2 tall, chilled glasses.  Add scoops of ice cream.  Fill with soda, pouring slowly down the sides of glasses.

name: Fuzzy Navel Jell-O
directions: Combine jello with boiling water and stir till dissolved.
Add cold water and Peach Schnapps.
Pour into small disposable plastic shot glasses or bathroom sized dixie cups.

name: Caribbean Sunset Jell-O
directions: Make up the base, combining Jello with boiling water and stirring till dissolved.
Add cold water and rum.
Pour into small disposable plastic shot glasses or bathroom sized Dixie cups.
Refrigerate until set.
Make Cherry Jello as per box instructions.
Pour a small layer of cherry Jello on top of set Orange Jello.
Refrigerate again until set.
Serve.

name: Real Pina Colada Gelatine
directions: Start by mixing and heating fruit juices to a simmer.
Pour rum into a large bowl, and sprinkle gelatin over rum avoiding clumps.
Let sit a minute, then add hot fruit juice while stirring with a fork.
Add sugar and stir until dissolved.
Pour into small disposable plastic shot glasses or bathroom sized dixie cups and chill to set.

name: Yellow Pina Colada Jell-O  Shots
directions: Combine jello with boiling water and stir till dissolved.
Add cold water and rum
Pour into small disposable plastic shot glasses or bathroom sized Dixie cups.

name: Pina Colada Jell-O Shots
directions: Combine jello with boiling water and stir till dissolved.
Add cold water, rum and cream of coconut.
Pour into small disposable plastic shot glasses or bathroom sized Dixie cups.

name: Mai Tai Jello Shots
directions: Combine jello with boiling water and stir till dissolved.
Add cold water and rum.
Pour into small disposable plastic shot glasses or bathroom sized dixie cups.

name: Sea Breeze Jell-O Shots
directions: Combine Jello with boiling grapefruit juice and stir till dissolved.
Add water and vodka.
Pour into small disposable plastic shot glasses or bathroom sized Dixie cups.

name: Sex on the Beach Jello Shots
directions: Combine Jello with boiling water and stir till dissolved.
Add cold water and liquors.
Pour into small disposable plastic shot glasses or bathroom sized Dixie cups.

similar.name: Sex on the Beach Jiggle Shots
Tgi Friday's Sex on the Beach

name: Orange Pina Colada Jello Shots
directions: Combine jello with boiling water and stir till dissolved.
Add cold water, rum and cream of coconut.
Pour into small disposable plastic shot glasses or bathroom sized Dixie cups.

name: A Canadian in Manhattan
directions: In a cocktail shaker filled with ice, add the bourbon, maple syrup and icewine.
Stir and strain into a rocks glass with ice.  Garnish with a marachino cherry.

name: Applebee's Pomegranate Margarita
directions: Fill a mixing tin with ice.
Mix all ingredients into the tin.
Strain the drink into a martini glass and garnish with a cherry and a lime wedge.
This drink should fill an average martini glass 3-4 times!

name: Orange Slice Jello Shots
directions: Slice oranges in half.
Using a spoon, scoop out all the flesh and divider pith. Reserve Orange Shells and juice.
In a medium bowl, add Jello and 1 cup boiling water.
When Jello has dissolved, add vodka and ½ cup reserved juice.
Pour liquid Jello into orange halves. Refrigerate for approximately 4 hours, or until firm.
To serve, slice each half into wedges.

name: Fuzzy Yellow-Handled Screwdriver
directions: Make up the base, combining Jello with boiling water and stirring till dissolved.
Add cold water and Vodka.
Pour into small disposable plastic shot glasses or bathroom sized Dixie cups.
Refrigerate until set.
Make up the tope, combining Jello with boiling water and stirring till dissolved.
Add cold water and Peach Schnapps.
Pour a small layer of Lemon Jello on top of set Orange Jello.
Refrigerate again until set.
Serve.

name: Mulled White Wine With Peach Juice
directions: Add the first 6 ingredients in a saucepan over low heat; stir to dissolve the honey.
Bring to just a simmer and cook for 2 minutes; do not let the wine come to a boil.
Discard the lemon slices and fresh ginger; pour the wine into 2 warmed mugs or heatproof glasses; garnish with crystallized ginger and serve.

name: Honolulu Mai Tai Jello Shots
directions: Combine jello with boiling water and stir till dissolved.
Add Pineapple Juice  and rums.
Pour into small disposable plastic shot glasses or bathroom sized dixie cups.

name: Sex on the Beach Jiggle Shots
directions: Combine Jello with boiling water and stir till dissolved.
Add vodka, peach schnapps and cold water.
Pour into small disposable plastic shot glasses or bathroom sized Dixie cups.

similar.name: Sex on the Beach Jello Shots

name: Beer
directions: Dissolve yeast in water and add sugar and malt syrup.
Skim once or more if needed.
Bottle in 72 hours.
Go to your local drinking hole and have them save up dark bottles for you to pour your brew inches  Sterilize bottles and lids in boiling water, screw tops work well for this.
There is nothing about how many bottles this will fill, but I am sure  at least 12 bottles are needed.

name: Green Lagoon Jello Shot
directions: Combine jello with boiling water and stir till dissolved.
Add cold water, vodka and Blue Curacao.
Pour into small disposable plastic shot glasses or bathroom sized dixie cups.

name: Diet Iced Coffee Pitcher
directions: Mix all ingredients in a tea or other type of pitcher and chill for a couple of hours. To avoid watered down iced coffee you can also make coffee cubes in the freezer with leftover coffee.

similar.name: Make Iced Coffee in Five Minutes

name: Maple Mojito
directions: Heat syrup to a simmer in small saucepan.  Remove from heat. Reserve 15 of the mint leaves.  Add the remaining mint leaves to the syrup and let steep until cool, then strain (If you like more of a mint taste refrigerate for up to 1 week).

In a cocktail shaker, muddle the 15 reserved mint leaves with 1 part lime juice and 1 part mint maple syrup.  Add ice and 1 part rum.  Shake well.  Fill a highball glass with ice.  Pour the drink into glass.  Top off with Club soda.  Garnish the drink with mint sprig. Enjoy!

name: Just-Like-Starbucks Doubleshot - Copycat
directions: Add sugar to hot espresso.
Pour all ingredients over ice.

name: Coffee Grog
directions: Make the butter: in a small bowl, combine all the butter ingredients, beating well with a spoon or stiff spatula to incorporate.

Use immediately or place the butter mixture on a sheet of waxed paper and roll it into a log shape about the side of the original stick of butter, twisting the paper together at the ends to smooth out the log; the butter will keep in the refrigerator for up to 2 weeks.
The grog: put 1 tablespoon Spiced Sweetened Butter in a mug or Irish coffee glass; add the rum and coffee; stir to partially melt the butter.
Top with whipped cream and sprinkle with orange zest; serve immediately.

name: Little Ginger
directions: Build ingredients over mint, lime and ice in a highball glass.
Enjoy!

name: Jade Isle Cocktail
directions: Shake all ingredients (except cherry) in a shaker cup. Strain into a hurricane glass 1/2 filled with chipped ice. Garnish with a cherry and a long straw.

name: Key Lime Margarita
directions: To make vanilla sugar: combine 1 teaspoon vanilla extract and 4 tablespoons white sugar; rim cocktail glass with this instead of salt.
Combine the first 4 ingredients in a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously; strain into glass.
If serving frozen, combine the first 4 ingredients in a blender with ¼ cup ice; blend until smooth; pour into glass.

name: The Fat Man's "perfect" Vodka Martini
directions: Chill a large stemmed martini glass until frosty.
Cut two slices from lemon peel, making sure to get only the peel and none of the white pith.
Spear the two olives with a toothpick.
Fill shaker about half full of cracked ice - do not use shaved ice.
Pour vodka and water over ice.  Twist one piece of the lemon peel over the shaker to release the oil and drop into shaker.
Open vermouth bottle, wave cork over shaker, turn toward France and bow.  Replace cork in vermouth bottle.
Close shaker and shake vigorously, or stir with long spoon until outside of shaker is frosty.
Strain liquid into martini glass.  Garnish with olives.
Twist remaining piece of lemon peel over drink fairly close to surface so that spritz of lemon oil goes into the drink.
Rub rim with lemon peel, and drop peel into glass.
Serve immediately and enjoy.

name: The Lawn Mower
directions: Puree the melon in a blender (add 1 or 2 tablespoons water if necessary).
Press the melon mixture through a strainer into a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Add in the vodka, Cointreau, lime juice, and mint; shake vigorously to infuse.
Strain the mixture into the chilled glasses and top with Champagne; stir once.
Garnish with skewers and serve.

name: Low Fat Mock Mocha/Iced Mocha/ Mocha Frappe
directions: Put cocoa mix and creamer powder in mug.
Add hot coffee, stir and enjoy.
Note: for an iced mocha pour over ice.  For a frappe, cool the beverage in the refrigerator for a few minutes; crush the ice in a blender add the cooled beverage and blend.

similar.name: Mr Coffee Slim Fast Mocha Frappe

name: Mandarin Shot
directions: Pour ingredients in a martini shaker, shake it up.
Pour in a tall shot glass.
drink it down!

name: White Romanian
directions: Pour vodka, banana liqueur and coffee liqueur into a glass with ice.  Top off with milk and banana slices.  Stir and enjoy.

name: Bloody Martini
directions: Pour vodka, Bloody Mary mix and lime juice over ice.
Stir to combine and chill.
Strain over martini glass, serving it straight up.
Garnish with limes, olives, celery.

name: Orange Peel Vodka
directions: Wash the oranges.
Using a zester of vegetable peeler, peel the skin to create narrow ribbons.
Scrape away any remaining pith.
Put the peel into a large jar and add the vodka.
Store in a dark, dry place for about 2 weeks, shaking the jar occasionally.
Strain through cheesecloth, discard the peel and store in a bottle ready for use.

similar.name: Fresh Navel Orange and Vodka Cocktail : Refreshing!

name: Jello Strawberry Breeze Mousse Tini
directions: Spread 1 package of gelatin evenly onto large plate. Dip rims of eight 6oz dessert glasses in water, then in dry gelatin powder; set aside until ready to use. Pour unused gelatin on plate into medium bowl. Add remaining package gelatin. Gradually add boiling water, stirring at least 2 minutes with wire whisk until gelatin is completely dissolved. Add whipped topping; stir until whipped topping is completely melted and mixture is well blended. Stir in rum and lime juice.
Pour into prepared glasses.
Refrigerate 2 hours or until firm. Store leftovers in refrigerator.
Non-Alcoholic: Prepare as directed, omitting the rum and increasing the boiling water to 3 cups.

name: Dry Martini
directions: Pour all ingredients into a pitcher.
Add ice and stir until cold; pour through strainer into glass with onion or olive, as preferred.

name: Lemonade Bang!
directions: In a blender mix 1/2 tray ice cubes, crush (if you have crushed ice skip this part).
add in  6 orange slices with rinds removed and saved, 1/4 c strawberries and blend til chunky NOT SMOOTH.
Pur into large punch bowl, add in lemonade and stir gently.
Add in remaining fruits, ice, and VODKA (or not)  stir gently and serve in garnished tall glasses.
Very refreshing and pretty to look at.
*****Adjust the vodka content to your liking.
*****for the non-alcholic just keep out vodka.

name: Ice Cream Surprise
directions: Combine the brandy, creme de cacao, and orange flavor liqueur in blender container; add vanilla ice cream, a scoop at a time, blending just until smooth.
Serve at once in stemmed glasses or place in freezer until served.

name: Quick Party Pitcher
directions: In a large pitcher combine limeade and apple juice.
Shake vigorously.
Add ginger ale.
Put ice in glasses, pour in mixture.
Top with maraschino cherries.

name: White Margarita
directions: Combine the tequila, triple sec, lemon juice, sorbet, and zest in a blender  with ½ cup ice; blend until smooth.
Pour into a chilled glass; garnish with a lemon twist.

name: Key Lime Pie (The Drink)
directions: Dip the rim of a martini glass into the caramel sauce; then press the glass into a saucer of graham cracker crumbs to coat.
In a shaker filled with ice, combine the vodka, rum, lime juice, and cream of coconut.
Shake to blend and chill; strain into the rimmed glasses.

name: Blackberry Martini
directions: Combine over and shake well over ice.
Pour into chilled martini glass.

name: Homemade Root Beer
directions: Put dried bark and roots and vanilla in 2 quarts water in a medium pot and bring to a boil.  Remove from heat, cover, and steep for 2 hours.
Strain liquid through cheesecloth into a clean plastic pitcher.  Add 2 quarts of filtered water, cool to 75 degrees.
Stir molasses and yeast into liquid, allow to sit 15 minutes.  Pour into four clean, dry 1 liter soda bottles to 2" below top.
Screw lids on tightly, set aside at room temperature for 12 hours.  Chill for 2 days, it will taste strongly of molasses, or chill for 3-5 days for a milder taste.  Open slowly and carefully.

name: Christine's Iced Latte
directions: Prepare the espresso with the water in a automatic drip coffee pot.
After the espresso has brewed pour about 8oz of brewed espresso into a coffee cup. Add the sugar and half and half while stirring. (I use a standard coffee cup).
In a 16oz glass pour the caramel or chocolate syrup into the bottom of the glass. Then fill the glass with the cubed ice. Pour the prepared espresso mix into the glass.
If using whipped cream top the cooled coffee with desired amount of whipped cream then drizzle with desired amount of syrup.

similar.name: Matcha Oat Milk Latte (Hot or Iced)

name: Malibu Pineapple Cosmopolitan
directions: Shake and strain into 2 martini glasses.
Garnish with a lime.

name: Malibu Caribbean Cosmo
directions: Shake ingredients with ice; top with tonic water.
Strain into martini glass.
Garnish with lime peel.

name: Moonstruck in Malibu
directions: stir and serve in a champagne flute.
Rim with crushed candy hearts.

name: Malibu Pot of Gold
directions: Shake and serve in a martini glass.
Garnish with a lucky shamrock.

name: Slippery Banana
directions: Shake with ice, pour into martini glass.

name: Mango Kamikaze
directions: Shake and strain into a tall glass over ice.
Garnish with lime.

name: Lee's Limeade
directions: These portions are for one drink.
I make the simple syrup with 1 cup Splenda and 24  ounces water.
Mix together, pour over ice and ENJOY!

name: A Cup of Joy
directions: Combine ingredients in a coffee mug or serve inches.
Irish Coffee Cup.
Top with whipped cream and coconut shavings.

name: Planters Punch
directions: Add captain morgan original spiced rum, orange juice, pineapple juice, lime juice, lemon juice, sugar, and grenadine.
Shake with ice and strain into ice filled glass.
Garnish with cherry flag.

similar.name: Sneak up on You Planter's Punch

name: Godiva Chocolate Berry Diva
directions: Pour godiva milk chocolate liquer and raspberry liqueur over ice, top with club soda.
Serve.

name: Pina Colada
directions: Add captain morgan original spiced rum and pina colada over crushed ice in a blender.
Blend until until smooth pour into speciality glass.
Garnish with pineapple spear and maraschino cherry.

name: Melonade
directions: Combine lemon juice and caster sugar in a small saucepan.  Stir over a low heat until sugar dissolves.  Allow to cool.
Place watermelon, in batche in a food processor or blender and process until smooth.  Strain through a sieve into a large jug.
Stir in lemon syrup and mineral water just beofre serving.

name: Kahlua
directions: Mix coffee grounds with 8 cups cold water and let stand overnight.
Strain coffee grounds w/ cheese cloth (or wring the grounds with a clean dish towel) save the coffee water.
