Mix sugar with 4 cups water and bring to boil for 10 minutes.  Let sugar water cool completely.
Add sugar water to coffee water, pure grain alcohol and vanilla.
Pour into dark bottles (empty wine bottles) and cork.

name: Skinny Cocktails: 'the Un-Rita Margarita'
directions: Mix all ingredients over ice.
Serve in chilled, salt rimmed glasses.

name: Bikini Beach Martini
directions: Combine rum, vodka, pineapple juice, grenadine in a shaker full of ice.
Shake firmly until frothy.
Pour in a martini glass and garnish with pineapple chunk and maraschino cherry.

name: Mudslide Martini
directions: Pour equal parts of vanilla vodka, Bailey's Irish Cream and Kahlua over ice into a one-cup glass.  Fill the glass with milk.
Stir and then strain the drink into a martini glass.  This drink is not served with ice.

name: Skinny Cocktails: 'the Biter'
directions: mix all ingredients together (minus the orange slice), preferably in a cocktail shaker, with several ice cubes to chill the mix.
pour into 2 martini glasses (the average of which is 6 ounces).
garnish with the orange slice.

name: Skinny Cocktails: 'green Tea Tremmer'
directions: Mix ingredients over ice.
serve in chilled martini glasses.

name: Non-Alcoholic Pina Colada
directions: Drain the pineapple slices and set the syrup aside.
Set aside 2 of the pineapple slices and freeze the remaining 8 slices until firm.
Blend together the frozen pineapple slices, pineapple syrup, sugar and coconut cream until smooth.
Add the ice and continue blending till you reach the desired consistency.
Pour into serving glasses and garnish each glass with toasted coconut and pineapple slices.
Serve chilled.

name: Bananas Foster Cocktail
directions: In a rocks glass filled with ice, stir together all ingredients.
Garnish with banana.

name: Tequichi
directions: Blend tequila, coconut cream and pineapple juice with crushed ice.
Serve in a sour glass or fluted wine glass.

name: Mint Tea from Morocco
directions: Pour water into a 2-quart glass bowl. Cover and microwave on high for 8 minutes until just boiling. Little bubbles will appear on the water surface.
Add sugar, tea and mint leaves. Cover with a lid or plate and let steep for 4 to 5 minutes. Stir gently.
Pour tea through a sieve into glasses.

name: Snowbird Mocktails
directions: Combine pineapple juice, sweetened condensed milk, orange juice concentrate and coconut extract in large pitcher, stir well.
Refrigerate, covered, up to 1 week.
To serve, pour 1/2 cup pineapple juice mixture into individual glasses (over crushed ice, if desired).
Top off each glass with about 1/3 cup giner ale.

name: Frozen Custard Fruit Drink
directions: Let the frozen concentrates  set on the counter for 1/2 hour before mixing.
Mix all ingredients in a big bowl.
Chill and serve over crushed ice.
Enjoy.
Makes a  Gallon and 1/2 of drink.

name: Red Lobster's Pineapple Basil Margarita
directions: Fill pitcher with ice and basil.
Add Tequila, Cointreau, and Gran Marnier, stir well.
Add fruit juices, stir well or shake as needed.
Rim glasses with Pineapple Salt, serve drink chilled over ice and garnish with pineapple, orange, and fresh basil.
Pineapple Salt.
Ingredients:
½ Cup Sea Salt (may use kosher salt as well).
½ Cup Granulated Sugar.
½ Cup Dried Pineapple (Small dice).
Preparation:
Combine sugar and salt.
Add ½ of mixture to food processor.
Add dried pineapple, and begin to blend. It may be necessary to start and stop processor so pineapple can mix well.
Add remainder of sugar and salt mixture, and continue to blend until desired consistency.
Store in cool, dry place.

name: Lemonade With Bacardi Limon for Adults
directions: Mix together the water, lemon juice and sugar in a large pitcher until sugar is disolved.  Chill till cold.
At serving time add the rum, lime slices and fresh mint for garnish.

name: Toasted Coco Colada
directions: Blend first 5 ingredients in blender until slushy.
Coat rim of daiquiri glass with lime wedge; dip glass into ground toasted coconut flakes.
Pour into a daiquiri glass.

name: Slippery Nipple
directions: Pour the Irish cream liqueur into a shot glass.
Top with the sambuca.
Bottoms Up!

similar.name: Buttery Nipple With a Cherry Kiss

name: Bourbon and Berry Liqueur
directions: Combine the bourbon, berries and sugar in a large bowl and stir until sugar dissolves. Cover with plastic wrap and set aside for 1 hour to soak.
Strain bourbon mixture through a fine sieve, gently pushing the berries through with the back of a spoon. Discard pulp.
Pour bourbon mixture evenly among serving glasses. Top with soda water and ice. Serve immediately.

name: Carambola Iced Tea
directions: Place carambola slices on a baking tray and drizzle with half the lemon juice. Cover with cold water and place in the freezer for 6 hours or until frozen.
Combine tea leaves, mint and sugar in a large heatproof bowl and pour over the boiling water. Set aside for 15 minutes to brew.
Strain tea through a fine sieve into a large jug and add remaining lemon juice. Set aside for 30 minutes to cool.
Pour tea into tall glasses.
Remove carambola ice from the freezer and break into pieces, with one carambola slice in each piece. Place a few pieces in each glass and serve.

name: Limeade/ Nam Manao
directions: With your hands or a reamer, squeeze the juice from limes to make 1 cup of lime juice. Set juice and lime rings aside.
Pour water into a 2-quart microwavable glass measuring cup. Microwave, uncovered for 6 to 8 minutes on High until almost boiling. Little bubbles will form on the water surface.
Add sugar and salt and stir until dissolved. Add lime rinds and let the mixture stand for 10 minutes until cool.
Squeeze the remaining juice from the rinds into the limeade through a sieve into a pitcher. Add reserved lime juice and stir well. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
To serve, fill a tall glass with ice and add limeade. Garnish with a slice of lime and a sprig of mint.

name: Lemon Berry Cooler
directions: Place all ingredients in blender, cover and blend on high until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Lemon Creamy Frosty
directions: Place all ingredients in blender and cover. Blend on high speed about 30 seconds or until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Nightcappers
directions: Combine ¾ cup hot tea, 1 teaspoon honey (or more to taste), and 2 ounces Chambord in each of 4 mugs.
Stir until the honey is dissolved and serve.

name: Lemon Almond Iced Tea
directions: Bring water to a boil in a saucepan.
Remove from heat add tea bags.
Steep for 10 minutes.
Put lemon slices into a large pitcher, giving them each a squeeze as you go.
Add sugar into pitcher.
Mix in tea.
Add flavorings and pop right before serving.

name: Jamaican Coffee Soda
directions: Into each of two tall 14-ounce glasses, measure 2 tablespoons coffee-flavored liqueur, 1 1/2 teaspoons instant-coffee granules or powder, and 1 teaspoon sugar. Stir mixture until coffee dissolves. Pour about 1/4 cup club soda into each glass and stir with coffee mixture.
Spoon ice cream into glasses. Slowly pour remaining club soda over ice cream. Serve with iced-tea spoons and straws.

name: The Perfect Mai Tai
directions: In a large jar or drink cooler, combine the light rum, dark rum, 151 rum, orange liqueur, almond syrup, simple syrup, and lime juice.
Stir and top off with orange juice. Do not use grenadine if you want the true Mai Tai!
Serve in 8 to 12 ounce glasses with ice.

similar.name: Out of This World - Mai Tai

name: Super's Peanut Butter Chocolate Soda
directions: Scoop icecream into a tall glass.
Add syrups.
Fill to the top with club soda.
Stir.
Enjoy.!

name: Carrot & Red Bell Pepper Booster
directions: Pour the carrot juice and tomato juice into a food processor and process gently until combined.
Add the red bell peppers and lemon juice.
Season with plenty of freshly ground pepper and process until smooth.
Pour into tall glasses.

similar.name: Lemon Beet Celery and Fennel Juice

name: Carolina
directions: Put the cracked ice cubes into a cocktail shaker.
Pour the tequila, grenadine, vanilla extract, and cream over the ice and add the egg white.
Shake vigorously until a frost forms.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Sprinkle with cinnamon.

similar.name: Coffee Liqueur With Vanilla & Cinnamon Cream

name: Lemon Refresher
directions: Pour the yogurt into a food processor.
Add the honeydew melon chunks and process until smooth.
Add the cantaloupe and watermelon chunks along with the crushed ice cubes and process until smooth.
Pour the mixture into glasses and decorate with wedges of melon.

name: Penny's Whiskey Sour
directions: In a shaker combine the 1st 3 ingredients and serve over ice.
Garnish each drink with a cherry and an orange slice.

name: Sittin' on the Porch Cocktail
directions: Fill a glass with ice, add the ingredients & stir to mix, drop the squeezed lime wedge in to serve.

name: Hibiscus-Rose Teani
directions: In a cocktail shaker, mash the mint leaves with the simple syrup.
Add in vodka and hibiscus tea; fill with ice; cover and shake vigorously.
Strain into a chilled martini glass; float rose petals on top.

name: Cosmopolitano
directions: I pour it over ice, but I think you could shake this with shaved ice; shake it with ice cubes; do it however you like.  I like it with an ice cube.

name: Bombay Boyer Cocktail
directions: Muddle ice cubes and mint leaves in cocktail shaker, add remaining ingredients,.
Shake, strain into a martini glass.

name: Slow Roll
directions: Mix all together and serve.

name: Sparkling Ginger Lime Cooler
directions: In a blender, blend together all the ingredients, except ice. Strain and serve over lots of ice. If the kids aren't around you can also add gin or vodka too!

name: Orange Creamsicle Martini  (Low Calorie!)
directions: Place all ingredients in a martini shaker, but DO NOT shake(or the carbonated soda will explode!). Mix thorougly with a spoon until mixture is mostly lump-free. Add about 1 cup ice (crushed, if you have it), and stir until mixture is cold. Then place the strainer on top and pour into a large martini glass. Enjoy!
Note:please don't drink and drive.

name: Watermelon Drink
directions: In blender, puree watermelon with 4 cups of water and agave nectar.
Strain through course strainer to remove any solids.
Adjust seasoning to taste:  agave nectar for sweetness; lime juice for tartness; sea salt to enhance flavor; water to thin.
Garnish each glass with slice of lime, if desired.
Keeps for 2 days if refrigerated.

name: Frozen Swamp Cocktail
directions: In a blender, mix the lime juice concentrate, vodka and half the mint until pureed. Add the water, ice and the remaining mint and pulse in five-second bursts until the liquid is just smooth enough to go through a straw. Do not over-blend, or your ice will melt. Pour into tall chilled glasses and garnish with sprig of mint. (To make it virgin: Skip the vodka.).

name: Berry-Lemon Sparklers
directions: In a medium bowl, mash the 1/12 pints berries with sugar; let stand for 10 minutes.  Stir in 1/2 cup water, then strain into a large pitcher, pressing  with the spoon to extract any juice.  Stir in the lemon juice and 2 1/2 cups more water.
Fill 8 pint glasses halfway with ice.  Pour about 3/4 cup berry-lemon mixture into each glass.  Top with a splash of seltzer and stir to combine.  Garnish with berries and a mint sprig.

name: Caramel Iced Coffee at Home
directions: I use Recipe #312986 for my syrup.
combine the syrup, cream, and milk in a tall glass and mix well. Add ice. Add coffee and stir and enjoy.

name: Orange Dreamsicle Martini
directions: Combine the orange juice, vanilla liqueur, and Barcardi O in a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Cover and shake vigorously; strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with an orange slice.

name: Berry White
directions: Bring the milk to a simmer in a saucepan over medium to medium-low heat.
Add in chocolate and whisk until melted.
Continue heating until steaming but not simmering, whisking continuously.
Remove from heat and stir in Chambord and raspberry syrup; pour into mugs and serve garnished with skewered mixed berries.

name: Frozen Fire-Roasted Mary
directions: Using a blender, mix 1/2 cup ice cubes, the tomatoes, chopped celery, lime juice, Worcestershire sauce and hot sauce on high speed until smooth, about 30 seconds; season with salt and pepper.
Add the remaining 1 cup ice and blend until slushy, about 15 seconds.
Serve with the celery rib.

name: Guilt Free Iced Mocha Eclair
directions: Mix all together in a tall glass.

name: Happy Apple Breakfast
directions: Combine all ingredients except flaxseed oil and honey and simmer for 10 minute Turn off heat, cover and let steam for 5 minute Stir in flaxseed oil and honey.  Top with nonfat yogurt if desired.

name: Brooklyn Bomber Cocktail
directions: Shake all ingredients in a cocktail shaker & serve in a tall glass.

name: Alabama Slammer
directions: Fill highball glass with ice cubes.
Add vodka, Southern Comfort, amaretto, orange juice, and grenadine to a cocktail shaker; shake vigorously for 5-10 seconds.
Pour mixture into the glass; garnish with a maraschino cherry.

name: Banana Colada
directions: Place the light rum, pineapple juice, ½ banana, half-and-half, coconut cream, and ice into a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Pour mixture into a chilled hurricane glass; garnish with a banana slice.

name: Parrot Bay Breeze Recipe
directions: Combine ingredients in a highball glass over crushed ice. Stir well, and serve.

name: Key West Cooler
directions: Add all ingredients to a cocktail tin. Shake. Strain into a collins glass 3/4 filled with ice cubes. Garnish with a slice of orange, and serve.

name: Cable Car
directions: Combine everything in a cocktail shaker with ice. Shake well and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Irish Cream Eggnog
directions: In large bowl, beat eggs at high speed until lemon colored.  Add sugar and beat until thickens.
At low speed, blend in milk and whipping cream.  Stir in Irish Cream.
Pour into glasses and sprinkle with nutmeg.

name: Asian Orange Juice
directions: Blend all ingredients with ice for 1 minute on high.

name: Citrus Mist
directions: Combine all the ingredients and mix well.
Top with a marachino cherry, if desired.

name: Refreshing Iced Green Tea
directions: Pour the water into container.
Add the green tea bags. Move it back and forth slowly several times.
After 15 seconds or so of moving the teabags back and forth, place the container in the refrigerator. Leave the teabags inside.
Chill for one hour. Take the container out of the refrigerator, remove the teabags, and keep chilling until you have it at the temperature you want it.

name: Surfer on Acid
directions: Combine Jager and Malibu and pour in 2 shot glasses.
Add pineapple juice to fill glass and mix well.
Shoot! Yum!

name: Red Headed Slut Shot
directions: Add the jager and schnapps to tall/large shot glass.
Add cranberry juice to fill the rest of the shot glass and mix.
Shoot!

name: Cherry - Sake - Tini    Martini
directions: Pour  Sake, Cherry Wine and Lime Juice over ice in a martini shaker.
Shake Well!
pour into chilled martini glass-drop a cherry inches.

name: Sweet Tart Shots
directions: Add soda and vodka to shot glass.
Slam shot glass down to mix up ingredients and give the shot a fizz effect.
Shoot!

name: Spiked Girl Scout Cookie
directions: Mix well and serve in shot glass.

name: The Fun Girl's Cocktail
directions: Pour all ingredients together in shaker over ice and shake once to mix. Pour into cocktail glass. Garnish with orange slice and strawberry slice.

name: Tailgate Coffee
directions: In a large pot, combine the water, molasses and cinnamon stick, and bring to a boil.
Add the coffee, reduce the heat to a simmer, cover and cook for 6 minutes.
Strain through a coffee filter into a carafe or large pitcher (or you can now transfer it into a large thermos if using the coffee to take to a sports game).
In a small saucepan, warm the condensed milk over low heat.
Stir into the coffee.
Enjoy!

name: Spiced Tea
directions: Mix all ingredients together.  Store in air-tight container.  Use two or three heaping teaspoonful of mix to one cup boiling water.

name: Spice, a Cocktail
directions: In cocktail shaker filled with ice, add rum, pear juice, lime juice, and simple syrup.
Shake vigorously for about 6 seconds, then strain into 6-ounce cocktail glass.
Top with dash bitters and a few gratings nutmeg.

name: Fireside Coffee
directions: Mix all ingredients together.
Store in an air-tight container.
Use two or three Tbsp of mix per cup of boiling water.

name: Bahama Mama
directions: Fill a shaker with ice.
Pour in remaining ingredients.
Cover and shake.
Pour into pint sized glasses with ice.
Garnish with pineapple and cherry.

name: Strawberry Shortcake
directions: Add vodka, amaretto, 4 strawberries, ice cream, and ice into a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Pour mixture into a chilled hurricane glass; garnish with strawberry.

name: Reggae Rum Punch
directions: Fill highball glass with ice cubes.
Add dark rum, Chambord, orange juice, pineapple juice, and juice from ½ lime to a cocktail shaker.
Shake vigorously for 5-10 seconds.
Pour mixture into the glass; garnish with a pineapple flag.

name: Goombay Smash
directions: Fill cocktail shaker with ice; add pineapple juice, orange juice and all rum.
Cover and shake until very cold. Fill 2 short glasses with ice.
Strain cocktail mixture, and divide between the 2 glasses equally.
Garnish with pineapple wedges and orange slices.

name: Pineapple Sangria
directions: In a pitcher, combine the juice, wine, brandy, pineapple, and soda with ice and stir.
Pour into large wineglasses and garnish with the mint and orange.

name: Dreamsicle Daiquiri
directions: Place everything accept the sorbet in a blender, blend until ice is crushed.
Add sorbet and blend.
Serve in a Martini glass.

name: Cafe Brulot
directions: Warm cognac in a heat-resistant glass.
Pour in the hot coffee, and add dashes of triple sec.
Add twists of lemon and orange peel, a clove, and sprinkle with cinnamon.
Sweeten to taste, and serve.

name: Amaretto Almond Cappuccino
directions: In a 12-ounce cup, combine syrups and espresso.
Fill cup with steamed milk and top with whipped cream.
Garnish with chopped almonds if desired.
Serve immediately.

name: Mojito Diablo
directions: Muddle sugar, mint and squeezed lime wedges in mixing tin until mixture smells like spearmint gum.
Fill with ice, add tequila and cassis, shake until the tin is icey to the touch. Pour into a collins glass, top with 7-up and garnish with a sugarcane stick and fresh mint.

name: Hot Cocoa Mocha
directions: Stir together sugar and cocoa in microwave-safe 2 cup measure. Add water; stir until well blended. Microwave at HIGH (100%) 30 to 45 seconds or until mixture boils.
Add whipping cream; stir until well blended. Microwave at HIGH 1 to 1-1/2 minutes or until hot. Combine cocoa mixture and coffee. Serve immediately.

name: Double Berry Margaritas in the Ice Cream Maker
directions: Add blackberries and raspberries with 1/2 cup sour mix to a blender.  Chop until berries are processed.
Add remainder of sour mix, triple sec, tequila and sugar to the blender.  Puree until smooth, about 30-40 seconds.
Start ice cream maker and pour in liquid.
Let the machine do its work until the liquid becomes slushy to your liking.  Ours was good at about 15-20 minutes.
Pour into a margarita glass and garnish with a slice of lime!

name: Electric Cool-Aid
directions: Pour limoncello Blue Curacao and club soda over ice and stir well. Pour Cran-Grape juice on top. Serve unblended (for the fun effect of layering) and stir when ready to drink!

name: Frozen Mint Julep
directions: Place mint leaves, bourbon, simple syrup and lemon juice into a blender and pulse for just a second or two.
Add 3/4 cup of crushed ice and blend until slushy.
Pour into a chilled, large old-fashioned glass or large goblet and garnish with mint sprig.

similar.name: Oak Alley's Sweet Mint Iced Tea

name: Sweet Tea
directions: Bring a small sauce pan of water to a boil.
Turn off heat and add tea bags. Allow to sit for at least 10 minutes.
In a gallon pitcher, mix sugar and tea until sugar is melted.
Fill pitcher with cold water and stir!

name: Cozy Hot Chocolate
directions: In a small saucepan, mix the cocoa and sugar; add water and stir until smooth.
Bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
Boil for 1 minute.
Reduce heat; stir in milk and heat through.
Remove from the heat and stir in vanilla.
Pour into 2 cups; top with whipped cream and cinnamon if desired.

name: Old Fashioned Chocolate Malted Milk
directions: In a blender, combine the ice cream, milk, malted milk powder, and chocolate syrup; cover and process until smooth.
Pour into chilled glassed. Top with dollop of whipped cream; serve immediately.

name: Grapefruit and Basil Martini
directions: Muddle a couple of the basil leaves with the simple syrup in the bottom of a mixing glass or shaker.
add the other ingredients, plus ice.
Shake until very cold and pour into a martini glass.
Place a nice-looking leaf in the drink.

name: Very Peary Breeze
directions: Fill a highball glass to the rim with ice cubes.
Pour the vodka over ice, and top off with apple juice and cranberry juice.
Garnish with a lime wedge.

name: Chocolate Pear Martini
directions: Combine pear vodka, chocolate liqueur and cream in a shaker filled with ice cubes, and shake until very cold.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with a chocolate curl.

name: Absolutely Heaven
directions: Pour Absolut Citron, Hypnotiq, coconut rum, and Pineapple Juice into shaker. Shake.
Add Blue Curacao for color -- just a splash!
Pour into chilled martini glass and garnish with a lemon wedge on the rim of the glass.

name: Simple Cinnamon Syrup
directions: Combine in a pan over medium heat, bring to a boil and boil about ten minutes.
Cool and strain.

name: Grapefruit Margaritas
directions: Combine all ingredients in an electric blender, adding ice to 3 1/2 cup level. Process just until ice is finely crushed.
Pour into a pitcher and serve immediately, or cover and freeze.
Note: For the freshest flavor, squeeze your own grapefruit juice. Try freezing juice in ice cube trays; add frozen cubes to blender.
Make Ahead: If you want slushy margaritas for a crowd, make several batches in advance and freeze until ready to serve. There's no need to thaw them; just stir and serve.

name: Mocha Kahlua Java
directions: Either split ingredients between 2 mugs, or put all in a 20-ounce travel mug.
Stir and enjoy.

similar.name: Cafe Mocha Java from the Plaza Hotel

name: Maize Meal Porridge Spiced With Coconut Milk
directions: Boil water in a pot
Mix maize flour with water to make a thin paste
Add the maize flour paste in the boiling water and stir until it boils
Prepare coconut milk
Pound the cardamom and add to the boiling porridge
Add the thin coconut milk, stir
Add sugar to taste, stir
Add the thick coconut milk,stir
Cook for 5 minutes then remove from fire
Serve warm
Preparation of coconut milk:
Remove the white flesh from the coconut shell
Blend the flesh to small pieces (rice grain size)
Put the blended pieces in a clean towel and fold the towel
Add water in the folding and squeeze the towel to obtain thick coconut milk
Add water again and squeeze thin coconut milk
Ready for use.

name: Moroccan Mint Tea Cocktail
directions: To a cocktail shaker, add ice and mint leaves.
Close shaker and take a few minutes to bruise mint leaves.
Add remaining ingredients and shake to combine
Pour into ice tea glass and garnish with lime wedge or wheel.

name: Red Fox Oatmeal Cookie Shooter
directions: Shot:.
Fill shaker with ice.
Pour all three liquors in and shake and shake and shake until the outside of the shaker is frosty. Strain into shot glass (make sure the glass will fit more than 2 1/2 oz).
On Rocks:.
Fill a rocks glass with ice.
Pour all three liquors into glass.
Sprinkle with cinnamon and sugar, stir with straw and enjoy.

name: Tre's Famous Bloody Mary
directions: Rub lemon or lime around rim of glass and then put the rim in celery salt, if desired.
Add ice to glass.
Mix Vodka, tomato juice, lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, Tabasco, salt, Pepper, celery salt and horseradish (if using) and pour in glass.
Garnish with lemon or lime wedge, celery stalk, green onion, pickled okra, or pickled green bean.

name: My 60 Cal Frappuccino
directions: brew the coffee, allow to cool and mix with the milk.
get 16 12oz bottles and lids.
add 1/2 tsp cocoa and 1/4 tsp vanilla, 3 tsp equal to each bottle.
fill the remainder of the bottles with coffee/milk mixture.
allow to cool to room temperature and put in fridge.

name: Tre's Dirty Three Martini
directions: Mix all the ingredients (except the olive) in a cocktail mixer with 2 ice cubes.
Put it in a frozen martini glass and drop in the three olives on a wooden stick.

similar.name: Dirty Vodka Martini W/Blue Cheese Olives

name: Tre's Green M. & M.
directions: Mix ingredients in a highball glass two-thirds full of ice.
Stir briskly, garnish with lime wedge and serve.

similar.name: Sneak up on You Planter's Punch

name: Iced Green Tea With Jasmine
directions: Steep tea for 7 minutes.
Chill for 4 hours.
Add lemon and fresh mint.

similar.name: Green Jasmine-Mint Iced Tea With Lemon
Lemon Grass and Ginger Iced Tea

name: Rum Y Agua De Coco
directions: Combine all ingredients except soda water and orange slices in cocktail shaker.
Shake well and pour into 4 cocktail glasses.
Top off with soda water and garnish with orange slices.

name: Iced Mocha - Sugar Free
directions: Using a drip coffeemaker, add the water and ground coffee. Brew according to manufacturer’s directions. Pour coffee into a glass measuring cup. Stir in milk and drink mix.
Serve coffee mixture over ice in chilled tall glasses.

name: Spindletop
directions: Combine liqueurs with coffee, top with whipped cream and a sprinkle of cinnamon to serve.

name: White Chocolate Chambord
directions: Place ice in cocktail shaker FIRST.  The white chocolate liquer will seperate if mixed with other liquors at room temperature.
Add the liquors and shake well.
Strain into a lovely stemmed glass or serve over ice.
If this is too strong for your taste simply add a bit of cream or milk.

name: Frozen Coco Loco
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large 2-quart container and stir until thoroughly mixed.
Cover and chill in the freezer until mixture reaches the consistency of soft sorbet, about 24 hours.
Once chilled, turn on the ice-cream maker and pour in the coconut mixture.
Spin in the ice-cream maker until thick and slushy, about 20 minutes. Keep cocktail chilled in the ice-cream maker base while serving.

name: Tides Royale
directions: Combine rum, Midori and pineapple juice in a shaker with ice.
Shake and strain into a chilled martini glass.
Add Chambord.  (It will sink to the bottom).
Garnish, if desired, with edible flower.

name: Marmalade Sours
directions: In a pitcher or 2-pint measuring cup, dissolve orange marmalade in 3/4 cup hot water.
Stir in bourbon and lemon juice.
Fill six 8- to 12-oz. glasses with ice and pour 1/3 to 1/2 cup cocktail mixture into each glass, making sure each serving gets some of the orange peel that settles at the bottom of the mixture.
Serve marmalade sours immediately.

name: Banana Split Bavarian
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender.
Blend on high speed for 1 full minute.
Enjoy this delicious frozen treat.

similar.name: T.g.i. Friday's Chocolate Monkey (Banana Split Drink)
Mr Coffee Banana Split Mocha Frappe

name: Blueberries and Cream Frappuccino
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender except whipped topping. Blend to desired consistency. Top with a dollop of prepared whipped cream and a few blueberries to garnish.

name: Wild Women's Chocolate Covered Cherry Jello Shots
directions: Measure water in a microwave safe measuring cup. Microwave for 3 minutes or until water begins to a boil. If you do not have a microwave you can use a pan and a stove top.
Pour jello powder into a large container, if possible one with a pouring spout like a measuring cup or pitcher, and add hot water. Stir until dissolved.
Measure creme de cacao and coffee and add to the jello mixture. Stir to combine.
Arrange 36 small disposable plastic or paper cups, about 1 to 2 ounces in size, in a container to protect from spills.
Pour an equal amount of jello into each cup and place container in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours.
When ready to serve shake can of whipped cream well and invert over each cup. Spray a small dollop of whipped cream on top. Drizzle with about a teaspoon of chocolate syrup and top with a cherry!
Have fun!

name: Possum's Rum Runners
directions: Mix pineapple juice, orange juice, blackberry brandy, banana liqueur, Myers's Rum, and Bacardi Silver.
Add Grenadine.
Top with Bacardi 151.
Serve over crushed ice if preferred.

name: Mint and Lime Iced Tea
directions: For the tea:.
Place water in a medium pot and bring to a simmer over high heat.
When water simmers, remove from heat, add tea bags and mint, cover and let steep for 10 minutes.
Once tea has steeped, discard tea bags, add sugar, and stir until sugar is completely dissolved.
Let tea cool to room temperature, then place in the refrigerator to cool completely, about 2 hours.
To serve:.
Once tea is cold, remove mint and stir in lime juice.
Taste and adjust with more lime juice or sugar as desired.
Serve over ice with a sprig of mint and a wedge of lime.

name: White Sangria
directions: To a large pitcher add orange and lemon slices together with the sugar and  mash gently with wooden spoon for approximately 1 minute (sugar should be dissolved).
Stir in orange juice, Triple Sec, and wine and refrigerate for a minimum of 2 hours -- a full day is best!
Before serving, add ice cubes and stir briskly to redistribute settled fruit and pulp.

name: Orange Julius
directions: Put all ingredients into blender and mix until ice is crushed.

name: Sunstroke
directions: Blend vodka, juice, and triple sec with crushed ice.
Serve in a cocktail glass.

name: Sweet Tequila Punch
directions: Blend tequila, pineapple juice, orange juice, sour mix, and crushed ice.
Pour into a sour glass or wine glass.
Float grenadine.

name: Pink Lemonade
directions: In a pitcher, stir to dissolve sugar in water.
Add lemon and cranberry juice.
Chill for 1 hour or add ice.

name: Mocha Mint Latte
directions: Pour chocolate syrup into a 12 oz cup.
Stir once around lifting from the bottom to bring the syrups up
add espresso.
Sweeten as and if desired.
Fill with hot steamed/foamed milk.
Sprinkle with cocoa powder and shaved chocolate.

similar.name: Sugar Free Dark Chocolate Mocha Dream Coffee

name: Rosemary’s Baby
directions: To make rosemary simple syrup: combine 2 cups water and 2 cups sugar in a saucepan; place over med-high heat to dissolve; stir well; as soon as the syrup comes to a rolling boil and is completely clear, remove it from the heat; add ¼ cup minced fresh rosemary—push all the way to the bottom of the pan; cover and let steep for 30-40 minutes; pour the syrup through a fine sieve, pressing down firmly on the rosemary to extract all the juice into the syrup; store syrup in a covered container in the refrigerator for up to 1 month.
The drink: fill a cocktail shaker ¾ full with ice.
Add in gin, Cointreau, cranberry juice, lime juice, and rosemary simple syrup; cover and shake vigorously; strain into a tall cocktail glass filled with ice.
Top off with soda water; garnish with rosemary sprig and lime slice.

name: Amarula Granita
directions: Shake one shot of vodka, one espresso shot, two teaspoons of sugar, cream and ice cubes for thirty seconds. Strain into a martini glass and layer one shot of Amarula Cream on top.
Freeze for 1 hour and scrape with a fork.
Repeat after another hour and repeat until the consistency looks like ice crystals.

name: Cinna-Nut Hot Chocolate
directions: WHISK chocolate topping, peanut butter, cinnamon and milk in a 2-quart saucepan over medium heat, until the chocolate milk begins to steam and mixture is well blended.
REMOVE from heat. Ladle the hot chocolate into serving cups. Top with marshmallows or whipped cream. Serve immediately.

name: Tropical Mango-Rita Slushie (Hungry Girl) 2 Ww Points
directions: Place all of the ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth. Enjoy!
MAKES 1 SERVING
HG Alternative! Swap the alcohol for extra Diet V8 Splash. Your non-alcoholic sipper will contain 40 fat-free calories, 10g carbs, and 1g fiber (POINTS® value 1*). Sweet!

name: Italian Wedding Cake Martini
directions: Shake over ice and serve.

name: Sassy 'n Spiked Pink Lemonade Pitcher (Hungry Girl) 2 Ww Points
directions: Place all ingredients except the lemons in a pitcher, and stir well. Cut 1 lemon into 8 slices, and set slices aside. Cut the remaining lemons in half, and squeeze the juice into the pitcher. Serve over ice and garnish with lemon slices!
MAKES 8 SERVINGS
HG Alternative! Use extra Ocean Spray instead of vodka for a virgin version with 14 calories, 0g fat, 3.5g carbs and a POINTS® value of 0*.

name: Orange Cream Float(Hungry Girl) 1 Ww Point
directions: Pour soda into a glass.  Top off glass with a scoop of frozen fat-free Cool Whip.  Insert straw and enjoy!
HG TIP!  About an hour before serving, put a glass mug in the freezer for a frosty float!

name: Agavero Margarita
directions: Pour limeade, beer, Agavero, tequila and water, into a large pitcher.
Stir until well-blended and limeade has melted.
Add plenty of ice.
Pour into margarita glasses rimmed with salt (if salt is desired).
Garnish with lime wedges.

name: Melibug's Shooter
directions: In a cocktail shaker, pour ingredients over ice and shake 6 times.
Strain into 2 ounce or larger shot glass and enjoy!

name: Death by Chocolate Cappuccino
directions: First pour the vanilla syrup into a large coffee mug.
Next add your fresh brewed coffee to the vanilla syrup and mix the two ingredients together.
Then steam your chocolate milk to 160 degrees F.
You can use a beverage or candy thermometer to test the temperature of the milk.
Once milk has been steamed add it to you coffee.
Finally, top your cappuccino with the whipped cream to your desired amount.
Add sprinkles and chocolate for decoration.

name: Chocolate and Spearmint Martini
directions: Pour 1 tablespoon/15 ml of vodka onto a small plate.
Place the grated chocolate on another small plate.
Dip the rims of 2 martini glasses into the vodka on the plate to moisten lightly, then dip the rims into the grated chocolate to coat lightly. Set aside.
Combine the ice cubes, half and half, chocolate liqueur, crème de menthe, remaining 2 tablespoons/30 ml of vodka, and spearmint leaves in a cocktail shaker.  -I also add in grated chocolate.
Shake well until the mixture is icy cold and a bit frothy.
Strain into the prepared martini glasses.
Garnish with a chocolate stick and spearmint sprig, and serve.

name: A Fuzzy Thing
directions: In a cocktail shaker pour alcohol first, then add the juice.
A little sour mix is needed, but not enough to overpower the juice.
Shake before serving, and make sure there isn't too much ice in the drink.

name: Mounds Bar Martini
directions: Fill a martini shaker halfway with ice (preferably crushed). Combine cocoa with 2 oz. hot water, and mix well. Then add 2 oz. cold water, and pour the mixture into the martini shaker. Add the vodka, syrup and Reddi-Wip, and cover the top of the shaker. Shake for about a minute, or until trhe liquid is cold. Then strain into 2 martini glasses. Enjoy!

name: Strawberry Tea Slush
directions: Pour boiling water over tea bags.
Cover and steep 5 minutes.
Remove tea bags.
Cover and chill at least 1 hour.
Process chilled tea, frozen strawberries, and remaining ingredients in blender until smooth and slushy.

similar.name: Strawberry or Cherry Tea Mix in a Pint Jar

name: Watermelon Mojito a La Lee
directions: put water and mint in a small sauce pan and bring to a simmer for 2-3 minutes.
add sugar to dissolve and remove from heat.
add lime juice and allow to cool completely.
in a blender, mix watermelon and ice (or leave ice out at this point and pour the drink over at the end).
add the strained mint syrup and alcohol to taste and pour in cocktail glasses.

name: Iced Eggnog
directions: Place sugar and cinnamon quills in a saucepan with 1/2 cup (125ml) cold water. Stir over low heat until sugar dissolves. Simmer for 1 minute, then remove and cool. Remove quills. Combine 100ml of the syrup in a blender with eggs, cream, milk and alcohol. Pour into cocktail glasses over ice and serve dusted with nutmeg.

name: Cheesecake Shot
directions: Mix bailey's and pineapple juice in a tin shaker. DO NOT shake! Stir lightly. Pour grenadine in bottom of glass and fill rest with mixture. Shoot and Enjoy!

name: Dirty Margaritas
directions: Mix and serve over ice.

name: Soco Amaretto Lime
directions: Fill an "old fashioned" glass halfway with crushed ice.
Add equal parts SoCo and Amaretto.
Add juice from 1 lime.
Top glass off with Sprite. (to taste).

name: Mandarin White Godiva
directions: Combine both liquors in shaker with ice.  Or do like I did, put the orange liquor first, and try to add the white chocolate liquor on top.

name: Gino's Marvelous Mojitos
directions: SIMPLE SYRUP: Bring 1 cup water 1 cup sugar to a boil and let cool.
MOJITO:   Pour 1 shot of rum and 1 shot of simple sugar into a tall glass.
Cut lime and drop 2 slices into glass.
Add mint leaves and grind in glass to combine flavors.
Pour about 8 oz of club soda into the glass and stir.
Garnish with lime on rim and enjoy!
*Easy pitcher drink also.
(Note: can use lime juice or a drop of mint extract instead).

name: Kahlua Mudslide
directions: Pour all ingredients into a Blender.
Blend well at High speed.
Pour drink into a Collins glass.

name: Blueberry Limoncellos
directions: To make simple syrup combine equal parts water and sugar stirred over heat and brought to a boil, then cooled to room temperature.
In a blender, whirl blueberries, simple syrup, and lemon juice with just enough limoncello to make a smooth slush.
(For a firmer slush, pour into a small bowl and freeze for up to 2 hours.
To store up to 2 weeks, put slush in a resealable freezer bag, seal, and freeze. To use, let stand at room temperature a few minutes to soften slightly.).
Divide berry slush among 4 tall glasses (8 to 12oz. size), add equal portions limoncello; fill with club soda.
Garnish with fresh berries on skewers; swizzle as you sip.

name: Flame of Love Martini
directions: Swirl a few drops of sherry in a chilled cocktail glass and pour back out.
Squeeze a strip of orange peel into the glass, flame' it with a match, then discard burnt peel.
Fill the glass with ice cubes; until chilled, and remove ice.
Add vodka, flame' another orange peel around the rim, then discard burnt peel.
Stir gently, and serve.

name: Iced Jamaican Coffee Cocktail
directions: Combine liqueurs, coffee and cream.
Partially fill a wine glass with crushed ice, and pour mixture over ice.
Serve.

similar.name: Jamaican Coconut Water & White Rum Cocktail

name: Grapefruit Rum Cooler
directions: Tools:
highball or Collins glass
muddler
shaker
bar spoon
strainer
In a cocktail shaker, muddle mint, simple syrup, lemon juice and grapefruit juice.
Add 1-1/2 oz. rum and ice.
Shake and strain into a highball or Collins glass over new ice.
Top with club soda and a splash of bitters.
Stir and garnish with grapefruit and mint.

name: Chinese Cocktail
directions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker half-filled with ice cubes.
Shake well, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.
Garnish with a paper umbrella and a maraschino cherry.

name: Aberdeen Angus
directions: Stir all but the Drambuie into a coffee mug.
Warm the Drambuie, ignite it and pour the burning liqueur into the mug.
Stir rapidly and drink.

name: Long Hot Night
directions: Place 4 or 5 ice cubes in a highball glass.
pour in bourbon.
stir.
add pineapple juice and cranberry juice.
stir again.

name: Honky Tonk Badonkadonk
directions: Add all ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled  with ice.
Shake vigorously.
Immediately strain into martini or margarita glass.

name: Hard Cream Soda Slush (Alcoholic)
directions: Place crushed ice in blender. Add other ingredients and blend until ice becomes slushy and drink turns red.

similar.name: Cider Heaven  (Cider and Rum over Ice)

name: Wild Fling
directions: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Add Wilderberry schnapps.
Fill with pineapple juice.
Add a splash of cranberry juice cocktail.
stir.

name: Killer Kool-Aid
directions: Fill high ball glass with ice.
layer ingredients
stir.

name: Pear Breeze Martini
directions: Combine ingredients in a shaker over ice.
Shake, and strain into a martini glass.
Garnish with lime --  or pear slices if you are so inclined!

name: Olive Garden Strawberry Fresco
directions: Shake first four ingredients in shaker with ice.
Add sliced strawberries.
Top with Sprite.

name: Pike Place Market Mocha
directions: Fill a heatproof glass mug with boiling water, then pour the water out.
Add Frangelico, rum, and Tia Maria to warmed mug.
Add in the hot coffee.
In a small bowl, using a whisk, briefly whip the cream with the powdered sugar until the cream thickens slightly.
Spoon the cream over the top of the coffee; use a small hand grater to grate the chocolate over the cream.
Serve immediately.

name: Burnt Ray Bird
directions: In a small bowl combine cinnamon and sugar.
Fill another small bowl with water.
Invert a coffee cup and dip rim into water by 1/4-inch.
Immediately dip wet rim into cinnamon mixture to coat.
Repeat procedure in same manner with another coffee cup.
Stir together in a small pitcher Amaretto, creme de cacao, and Kahlua and divide between coffee cups.
Fill coffee cups 3/4 full with coffee and top with whipped cream.

name: Strawberry Cider
directions: Combine ingredients and simmer for 10 to 15 minutes.  Strain through sieve.

name: Key Lime Martini
directions: Combine ingreadients and shake for 30 seconds.
Strain into chilled glass.

name: Pampered Chef Sparkling Sangria
directions: Pour the wine into a pitcher.  Add the sugar and stir until well mixed.
Slice fruit and add to the wine mixture.
Refrigerate 3-4 hours to allow flavors to blend.
Add carbonated soda.  Stir just before serving.

name: Cuban Manhattan Martini
directions: Combine rum, vermouth, and bitters in a cocktail shaker filled with ice. Shake, swirl or stir gently a few times.
Strain into a martini glass or serve over the rocks and add a maraschino cherry.

name: Champagne Martini
directions: Add 1 tablespoon of raspberry puree into the bottom of each of 2 well chilled martini glasses.
Shake vodka in a cocktail shaker filled 3/4 full of cracked ice and strain vodka into each glass, dividing equally and taking care not to disturb the raspberry puree.
Gently add champagne to each glass and garnish each with a raspberry. Enjoy!

name: Lager and Lemon-Limeade
directions: Stir together all ingredients and serve in a glass (no ice) with a floating lime wedge as a garnish.

name: Cafe Belgique
directions: Beet the egg white untill stiff.
Whip the cream and the vanilla till stiff.
Gently fold together the whipped cream and the egg white.
Fill 4 cups 1/3 of the way up with egg mixture.
Divide coffee between 4 cups.

name: Vanilla Lemonade
directions: In a medium saucepan, combine 2 cups water, sugar, and vanilla bean and bring to a boil over medium-high heat; boil for 2 minutes.
Remove from heat, and cool completely.
Stir in lemon juice and remaining 2 cups water; refrigerate.
Serve chilled over ice.  Garnish with maraschino cherries, fresh mint, and lemon slices, if desired.

name: Aloe Vera Martini
directions: Shake and strain all ingredients into a martini glass. Garnish with a twist of orange.

name: Cafe Vermont
directions: Pour coffee into a cup.
Add maple syrup.
Steam the milk till it is frothy and add to coffee.
Spoon a bit of milk foam onto coffee and sprinkle with cinnamon.

similar.name: Homemade Coffee Mix in a Jar

name: Cafe Au Lait
directions: Pour coffee into a cup.
Steam the milk till it is frothy and add to coffee.
Spoon a bit of milk foam onto coffee and sprinkle with cinnamon.
Sweeten with sugar if desired.

similar.name: New Orleans Style Cafe Au Lait

name: Cafe Mocha Mint
directions: Pour coffee into a cup.
Add chocolate syrup.
Add extract.
Steam the milk till it is frothy and add to coffee.
Spoon a bit of milk foam onto coffee and sprinkle with cocoa powder.
Sweeten with sugar if desired.

name: Cafe Mocha
directions: Pour coffee into a cup.
Add chocolate syrup.
Steam the milk till it is frothy and add to coffee.
Spoon a bit of milk foam onto coffee and sprinkle with cocoa powder.
Sweeten with sugar if desired.

name: Mandarin Mocha
directions: Pour coffee into a cup.
Add chocolate syrup.
Add extract.
Steam the milk till it is frothy and add to coffee.
Spoon a bit of milk foam onto coffee and sprinkle with cocoa powder.
Sweeten with sugar if desired.

name: Viennese Coffee
directions: Divide coffee into two cups.
Top with whipped cream.
Garnish with a sprinkle of cinnamon.

name: Cafe Borgia
directions: Divide coffee into two cups.
Top each with whipped cream.
Sprinkle with grated peel.

name: Spiced Cream Coffee
directions: Whip the cream with the sugar, nutmeg and 1/4 teaspoon of the cinnamon.
Divide coffe into 2 cups.
Add a teaspoon of chocolate syrup and a 1/4 teaspoon of cinnamon to each cup.
Top with spiced whipped cream.

similar.name: Homemade Coffee Mix in a Jar

name: Hangover Frappuccino
directions: Dissolve honey in espresso. Put ice in blender and add all ingredients. Blend until smooth and frothy. Pour in a tall glass. Yum.

name: Bourbon Milk Punch
directions: Shake all the ingredients with ice cubes and strain into an old-fashioned glass. Garnish with nutmeg on top.

name: Limoncello Cosmopolitan
directions: Pour into  shaker with a little ice.
Shake and pour into martini glass and garnish with a lemon wedge.

name: Sunset Martini
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker with ice.
Add all the ingredients and shake well.
Strain the mixture into a martini glass and serve immediately.

name: Razzy Martini
directions: Shake in martini shaker with 1/4 cup of ice. Garnish martini glass with a lime twist.Pour and serve and enjoy!

name: Cinnamon and Lemon Tea
directions: Pour water, cinnamon, and cloves into a pan.
Bring to a boil.
Add a tea bag and let steep at a lower heat until desired strength is reached. I usually wait 2 minutes.

Stir in 1 teaspoons lemon juice and sugar. More or less lemon juice may be needed depending on the concentration. The kind I use is pretty strong, so I only use a teaspoons Use less sugar or substitute depending on your preference.
Remove from pan and heat and pour into cups. Cool and serve with ice for an ice tea.

name: Kimikaze
directions: Half fill a shaker glass with ice.
Add vodka, cointreau, lemon juice and lime cordial.
Shake well and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with a cocktil umbrella.

name: Traffic Lights
directions: Pour banana liqueur in a shot glass,then carefully float the strawberry liqueur on top by pouring it on the back of a teaspoon.
Using a clean teaspoon, float the melon liqueur over the strawberry liqueur to creat three distinct layers.

name: Chocolate Cream Coffee
directions: Reserve one tablespoon of the whipping cream and set aside.
Whip the remaining whipping cream.
In a suacepan, over low heat, combine the reserved cream with the chocolate syrup.
Add coffee to syrup mixture slowly.  Stir
Pour into a mug and top with whipped cream.
Sprinkle with cocoa powder.

name: Spiced Coffee
directions: Place spices into a saucepan.
Pour coffee over spices and simer over low heat for roughly 5 minutes.
Strain into cups and top with whipped cream.
Garnish with a sprinkle of cinammon.
Sweeten with brown sugar if desired.

name: Fallen Angel
directions: Half fill a cocktail shaker with ice.
Add the gin, creme de menthe, lemon juice and bitters, then shake vigorously.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass and garnish with maraschino cherry.

name: Spiced Citrus Coffee
directions: Place spices and peel into a saucepan.
Pour coffee over spices and simmer over low heat for roughly 5 minutes.
Strain into cups and top with whipped cream.
Garnish with a sprinkle of cinammon.
Sweeten with brown sugar if desired.

name: Cafe Vanilla
directions: Pour milk into a sauce pan.
Slice the vanilla bean lengthwise and add to milk.
Add brown sugar to milk.
Bring milk to a boil, stiring to make sure milk does not burn.
Remove from heat and let stand a few minutes.
Remove vanilla bean and add  milk to blender.  Blend on high for roughly 30 seconds or untill frothy.
Add to hot coffee and sprinkle with cinnamon.

name: Cinnamon-Vanilla Coffee
directions: Slice the vanilla bean length wise and place it, along with the cinnamon stick in the coffee maker carafe.
Brew coffee as per coffee maker's instructions.
Whip cream with brown sugar.
Remove cinnamon and vanilla and pour coffee into two cups.
Top with whipped cream.

name: Coffee Grog
directions: In a suacepan over low heat, melt the butter.
Add brown sugar and spices. Allow to cool (mixture can now be stored in the refidgerator till ready to use).
To serve combine 1 teaspoon butter mixture, 2 tablespoons cream, 1 strip of orange and lemon peel, 1/8 tsp rum extract and 6 ounces coffee.
Stir well.

name: Sweet Raspberry Lime Iced Tea
directions: Put tea bags in an 8-cup glass measuring cup.
Boil the water, then pour it over the tea bags; let steep at least 10 minutes.
Remove tea bags and let cool.
In a small saucepan combine the sugar and 1 cup water; bring to a boil.
Cook briefly until sugar is dissolved; remove from heat and add raspberries.
Let come to room temperature.
Combine the tea and raspberry sugar syrup, to taste.
Add ice to 4 (12 oz.) glasses.
To each, squeeze in a wedge of lime, pour sugared tea over, and garnish with a sprig of mint.

name: Cola-Coffee
directions: Mix the coffee and cola together over the ice in a chilled tall 12 ounce glass.
Garnish with lemon slice.

name: Sandy's Crime Cocktail
directions: Place ice in glass.
Pour vodka, limeade and cranberry over ice.
Garnish with twist of lime.
Enjoy!  ;P.

name: White Sangria
directions: Dissolve in a Pitcher: 1/2 cup hot water,1/2  cup sugar

Add; Chill Two Hours: 1  bottle (750 ml) white table wine (any good white wine), 3/4  cup brandy,1 vanilla bean,1 lime, sliced into rounds ,1 orange, sliced into rounds ,1/2  fresh pineapple, cored and sliced into rings
Stir in: 2 cups club soda , ice cubes.
Pour into Glasses; Garnish with: Fresh mint sprigs, Fresh raspberries
This classic Spanish drink is the perfect solution to summer's hottest evenings.
Dissolve sugar in hot water inside a pitcher.
Add white wine, brandy, vanilla bean, lime, orange, and pineapple. Chill in the refrigerator for two hours.
Stir in club soda and cubed ice.
Pour into glasses and garnish with mint sprigs and fresh raspberries.

name: Mocha Frappuccino With Whipped Cream
directions: Brew coffee needed above.
Once coffee is done, mix in the same coffee carafe all of the following ingredients together --  1/4 cups of sugar, milk, cocoa powder, 1 dash of vanilla and salt.
In a separate bowl, mix heavy cream, 1/4 cups of sugar and 2 dashes of vanilla and place in a whipped cream maker for later use.
Now blend the coffee mix and ice in a blender until desired consistency.
Serve coffee mix with whipped cream on top and enjoy.

name: After Dinner Milky Way Cappuccino (Adult)
directions: Steam and froth milk, set aside.
Brew one shot of espresso and pour into 8 ounce cup/glass.
Add caramel sauce, liqueurs and Bailey's, stir well.
Fill glass rest of way with steamed milk almost to rim. Stir.
Fold in 2 Tbl. froth.
Top with whipped cream and sprinkle with cocoa powder.
Enjoy! :).

name: Spiked Strawberry Lemonade
directions: Put 3 cups ice in a blender. Add 1/2 bottle Lemoncello, 1 cup lemonade and 1/4 cup strawberry syrup. Add more lemonade if mixture is too thick for your liking. Put a few sliced strawberries in the bottom of each glass before pouring in spiked lemonade.
If the drink is too bitter, you may have to add a squirt more syrup.
Feel free to blend the fresh strawberries in as well, instead of using them as a garnish.

You can vary this reipe to suit your taste, by adding raspberry syrup and raspberries, or cranberry juice is good too. I also like to use Minute Maid Tropical Punch fruit juice in place of the one cup of lemonade added to the mix.

name: Lady Gogdiva Martini
directions: Pour ingredients into cocktail shaker and add crushed ice (I use the blender).
Let stand for 5 seconds.
Shake and strain into martini glass.
Enjoy.

name: Raspberry Breeze
directions: Combine all ingredients in 1 quart pitcher.
Refrigerate until ready to serve.
Pour over ice to serve.

name: Tiramisu Martini
directions: Mix all ingredients in a shaker full of ice.
Shake well.
Strain into a martini glass.
Enjoy.

name: Frosty the Snowman
directions: Mix all ingredients into a cocktail shaker filled with ice, shake well.
Strain into a martini glass.
enjoy.

name: Coffee Cake Martini
directions: Combine all ingredients into a cocktail shaker filled with crushed ice.
Shake and strain into a martini glass.
Enjoy.

name: Cucumber Mojito (Camelback Inn's Recipe)
directions: Muddle cucumber with lime wedges, mint, rum and sugar.
Fill glass with ice. Splash with Sierra mist.
Serve in a 12oz Hurricane glass. Garnish with Mint and cucumber slice.

name: Bellagio Nog
directions: Shake ingredients and strain into a chilled wine glass. Garnish with freshly grated nutmeg.

name: Ol' Fashionista
directions: Muddle together the cherry, lime, and lemon.
Shake together the first four ingredients (alcohol and OJ) and pour over the muddled fruit and serve with orange as a garnish.

name: Protein Coffee
directions: In a big plastic cup, mix water and coffee and microwave for two minutes.
In a blender, blend Milk & Protein on low until well mixed (no lumps).
Add the chocolate (cocoa) and syrup to the coffee mix and stir well.
Add the protein mix to the coffee while stirring.
Put it in your ‘to go’ mug and hit the road.

Note: It sounds like a ton of trouble, but If you have everything ready to go and it takes only minutes to do the whole thing. Faster than a McDonalds drive thru and LOTS more protein!  Don’t forget to rinse out the blender immediately or the protein powders becomes like cement (recipe from Kristine).

similar.name: Make Iced Coffee in Five Minutes

name: Tiramisu Shooter
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a shot glass.

name: Blue Lemon Shot
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a shot glass.

name: Honey Margarita
directions: Before making the drink, wet the rim of a margarita glass with lime juice, and dip it in coarse salt.  Fill with ice.
Mix all ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Strain into the rimmed margarita glass with fresh ice.

name: Bermuda High
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender.  Cover and pulse on and off until the mixture starts to swirl evenly.
Blend on high for 20 seconds, or until the drink is completely smooth.

name: Limoncello Sangria
directions: In a glass with ice, add red wine (near half the glass), then add orange juice (should be around 2/3 of the glass).  Then top with limoncello.

name: Whole Milk Substitute for Baking or Drinking
directions: Measure 3-1/2 quarts (14 cups) of water into a gallon size pitcher.
Add 5-cups of dry milk powder and a 12-ounce can of undiluted evaporated whole milk.
Mix all together.
Chill and serve.

This makes about a gallon.  It is richer than plain reconstituted milk.  If you must use powdered milk, but prefer a richer product, this is the recipe for you.  Children will sometimes tolerate it better than straight reconstituted milk, especially if they are already used to fresh 1% or 2%. If you're going to use this for drinking, try adding chocolate milk mix or chocolate or strawberry syrup.

name: Butterscotch Mudslide Shake
directions: Add all ingredients to a blender with 2 cups of ice cubes. Blend until thick like a shake, and pour into a collins glass. Add or subtract ice to liking for thickness.

name: Pink Lime
directions: Shake all ingredients over ice.  Add a splash of Sprite or club soda. Garnish with a lime and cherry. Enjoy!
You can multiply this easily-just use 1 part sweetened lime juice, 1 part grenadine, 1/2 part simple syrup, and 3 parts water.

name: Absolute Stress
directions: In a cocktail shaker, combine vodka, rum, peach liqueur, orange juice and cranberry juice.
Shake well.
Pour over ice in a tall glass and garnish with a slice of orange and a cherry.

name: Horny Bull
directions: Pour red bull in shot glass.
Float agwa on top.
Shoot!

name: Coffee Dessert Martini
directions: Add espresso, syrups, and ice cubes to a cocktail shaker; cover.
Shake  vigorously.
Strain into a chilled martini glass.
Top with dollop of sweetened whipped cream; garnish with cocoa powder and a few fresh raspberries.
Serve with a spoon.

name: Loved Up
directions: Shake all ingredients in an ice filled shaker and strain into a martini glass.

name: Crantini
directions: Fill martini shaker (or container) with ice and pour in all ingredients.
Cover shaker and shake to blend.
Pour in individual glasses and garnish with cranberries or lime.

name: Spiced Mocha Latte
directions: In a large saucepan, combine chocolate chips, half & half, water and milk.  Bring to a gentle boil over medium heat, whisking constantly, until chocolate melts.
Whisk in coffee, vanilla, and cinnamon.
Serve immediately, topped with whipped cream.

similar.name: Coffee Liqueur With Vanilla & Cinnamon Cream

name: Le Petit Marseillais
directions: Pour liquid ingredients into a highball glass and add a few ice cubes.
Garnish with a lemon slice and mint leaves.

name: Montreal Saint-Germain
directions: Combine all ingredients in a shaker and shake until very cold.
Pour into martini glasses.
Garnish with grapefruit slice.

name: Hot Cocolat
directions: Bring the milk to a simmer in a medium saucepan over medium to medium-high heat.
Add the chocolate and cocoa powder.
Whisk until the chocolate has melted.
Simmer for an additional minute, whisking continuously.
Remove from the heat and pour into mugs.
Top with dollops of whipped cream or marshmallows, sprinkle with cocoa powder, and serve.

TIP: For a festive touch, sprinkle with tinted sugars instead of cocoa. Try spooky orange for Halloween, merry red and green for Christmas, cool blue for Hanukkah, or romantic red for Valentine's Day.

similar.name: Hot Chocolate for a Restful Afternoon (Adult)

name: Hazelnut Truffles Cocktail
directions: Dip the edges of 4 martini glasses in the liqueurs and rim them with chocolate.
In a small saucepan, combine the 12 ounces of Frangelico and Godiva liqueur.
Heat over medium to high heat until warm but not hot.
Pour into the rimmed martini glasses and serve.
HOT HINT:

This is one of those recipes where a spouted or lipped-rim saucepan comes in handy. If you don't have such a pan, transfer the hot liquid to a glass measuring cup. This will make it much easier to pour the mixture into the rimmed glasses without spilling or disturbing the pretty chocolate rim.

name: Baileys Cookies 'n' Cream Cocktail
directions: Combine the Baileys and amaretto in a small saucepan.
Heat over medium-low heat until warm but not hot.
Stir in the 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon.
Pour into martini glasses, sprinkle with cinnamon, and serve.

similar.name: Hot Bailey's Irish Cream Chocolate Drink

name: Hot Dirty Banana Coffee
directions: Add the scoop of ice cream to your mug.
Next pour all the liqueurs over the ice cream in mug.
Add fresh brewed coffee  --  stir --  top with whipped cream and garnish with chocolate shavings.
Sit back and savour.

similar.name: Mr Coffee Banana Split Mocha Frappe

name: Big Apple Coffee
directions: Pour liquer and coffee into mug, top with whipped cream and garnish with chocolate shavings.

name: Cinnamon Sunset Coffee
directions: Pour hot coffee and sugar into mug.
Add liquer and vodka.
Add large scoop of ice cream and garnish with ground cinnamon.

name: Cold Siberian or Dutch Coffee
directions: Put ice cubes into tall chilled glass.
Add coffee, Kahlua, Vandermint liquer, Vodka and cream.
Stir and top with whipped cream.
Drizzle the remaining Kahlua over the whipped cream and enjoy.

name: Hazelnut Cheer
directions: Pour coffee into tall glass or an oversized mug.
Add the finely chopped chocolate, stir well.
Add the milk and sugar.
Next add the liquer.
Top with whipped cream and garnish with the ground nuts.
Put your feet up and relax.

name: Hotsicles
directions: Combine half-and-half, orange juice, and Grand Marnier in a saucepan.
heat over medium heat until warmed.
Pour into warmed mugs; serve with white chocolate-dipped popsicle sticks to use as stirers.
*For frothier texture, whip the mixture with a milk frother or wire whisk before serving.

name: New Orleans Coffee
directions: Pour the coffee into 2 cups and add divide milk between both.
Top with a bit of milk foam and sprinkle with cinnamon.

similar.name: New Orleans Style Cafe Au Lait
Homemade Coffee Mix in a Jar

name: Spiced Coffee Cider
directions: Combine all ingredients in a saucepan and simmer over low heat for 3 minutes, stiring occassionaly.
Strain into a mug.
Sprinkle with cinnamon if desired.

similar.name: Homemade Coffee Mix in a Jar

name: Espresso Romano
directions: Serve espresso in a small espresso cup with the lemon slice.

name: Americano
directions: Combine in glass.

name: Espresso Anise
directions: Serve espresso in a small espresso cup and add extract.

name: Iced Orange Truffle Coffee
directions: Rim your glass with orange juice and then dip it into the white sugar, to cover the rim.
Add your ice cubes.
Now add the cold coffee and all the liquers, mix well.
Add your milk and garnish with whipped cream, sprinkle on the orange zest and drizzle with the chocolate syrup.
Enjoy, enjoy, enjoy.

similar.name: Iced Green Tea w. Orange Essence
Mr Coffee Raspberry Truffle Cappuccino Frappe

name: Espresso Grog
directions: In a suacepan over low heat, melt the butter.
Add brown sugar and spices. Allow to cool (mixture can now be stored in the refidgerator till ready to use).
To serve, place one teaspoon of the mixture in the bottom of a small espresso cup.
Add 1 tablespoon cream, and 1 strip of both orange and lemon zest.
Add 1 oz espresso and a tiny bit (less than 1/8 tsp) of rum extract.

name: Red Eye
directions: Combine in a glass.

name: Espresso Con Panna
directions: Top cup of espresso with a dallop of whipped cream.

name: Espresso Borgia
directions: Top cup of espresso with a dallop of whipped cream and grated orange zest.

name: Refreshing Picnic Tea
directions: Bring 5 cups Water to a boil in a medium saucepan, remove from heat.
Add Tea Bags and Cinnamon Stick to Water and let stand 5 minutes.
Remove Tea Bags.
Add Sugar and stir to dissolve.
Stir in Orange Juice and Lemonade Concentrates.
Pour Tea Mixture into pitcher.
Add remaining 5 cups Water and stir well.
Chill 4 hours, or until cold.
Discard Cinnamon Stick.
Fill glasses with ice and pour tea.
Garnish each glass with one Lemon Slice.
Serve!

name: Vanilla Sea Cocktail
directions: [Mixologistï¿½s Note: Thai Mandarin Orange (Som Khiew Wahn) is a thin-skinned orange which remains green when ripe, and is identical in flavor to the Mandarin orange known in the West, which may be used as a substitute. The whole fruit of the Som Khiew Wahn is used for desserts and flavoring.].
VANILLA SYRUP:
Make a simple syrup by combining the cane sugar, vanilla pod and water in a small saucepan, and bring to a boil.
Remove from the heat and allow to cool. Chill in the refrigerator.
This syrup will keep for two weeks in a sealed airtight container.
COCKTAIL:
Chill the vodka, vanilla syrup, bitter lemon drink, garnishes and glassware in the refrigerator.

Scrape off the ginger skin with the edge of a spoon and grate 1/3 teaspoon. Squeeze the mandarin orange, pear and lime juices and place into the cocktail shaker with all the liquid ingredients except the bitter lemon drink.
GARNISH:

Cut a small slit at the tip of the raspberry and push it down (further than the cut) along the rim of the glassware (with the raspberry ï¿½bowlï¿½ facing up). Roll the sage leaf into a pointed cone and insert into the raspberry ï¿½bowl.ï¿½.
Top up cocktail shaker (about ¾ full) with ice cubes, preferably with the largest possible ice cubes.
Shake and chill cocktail shaker with firm, concise & vigorous strokes until your hands canï¿½t take the cold.
Strain the ingredients into a champagne flute, and top up with the bitter lemon drink.
Take a small piece of the mandarin orange rind, with the colored side facing down just above the cocktail, break and squeeze so that the zest and essential oils fall into the drink. Discard the rind.
Serve immediately.

name: White Wedding Sangria
directions: Mix all ingredients and serve chilled with your favorite garnish.

name: Lemonade
directions: Dissolve the sugar and water.
Add lemon juice and Mazaher.  Enjoy :).

name: Flirtini
directions: Mix and strain into Martini glass.
Top with Champagne and raspberries.

name: Best Ever Cosmo
directions: Mix the above in a shaker over ice then shake shake shake!
Pour into a chilled large martini glass.
Garnish with a lime slice.

name: Skinny Divinity Latte
directions: In a small saucepan, heat milk and syrups together, whisking until frothy.
Pour into a tall glass (reserving some foam) and add brewed espresso.
Spoon a layer of foamed milk over top.
To make with brewed coffee:  Use 1/2 to 1 cup hot brewed coffee (I use a French Press Pot) and adjust milk amount to taste.

name: Creamy Spiced Coffee
directions: Place all the spices and peels in coffeemaker's basket with ground coffee, when you are ready to brew coffee.
You will need two cups of strong brewed coffee.
Pour the coffee into two mugs and add the sugar and cream to coffee if using and serve hot.

similar.name: Spiced Coffee With Brandied Whipped Cream

name: Caramel Coffee Cider
directions: Place coffee and cinnamon in brew basket of coffee maker.
Add water to coffee maker and brew coffee.
Mix the caramel topping and the apple cider together, then halve the mixture between two coffee mugs.
Pour the steaming coffee into the prepared mugs and top with the whipped cream.
Drizzle on the caramel topping and sprinkle with cinnamon.

name: Cosmopolitan's by the Pitcher
directions: Blend cranberry juice, vodka, Grand Marnier and lime juice. If you desire 'fizz' add one cup of club soda. Taste and if you prefer add the rest of the club soda.
It is best to refrigerate all ingredients before mixing. You may add ice if cesired to the pitcher, stir briskly and serve.

name: Divine Cherry Coffee
directions: Rim the outer rim of your glass with cherry liquer, then dip the glass in the white sugar, reserving any leftover sugar and cherry liquer for later use.
Pour steaming hot coffee into prepared glass or mug, add the liquers and mix.
Mix the whipped cream with any leftover cherry liquer and white sugar.
Top the coffee with whipped cream mixture and add the chocolate shaving, topping with the finely chopped almonds.
Take your coffee,  find a quiet spot, close your eyes and enjoy.

name: Soothing Orange Mocha Coffee
directions: Mix coffee, orange liquer,hot chocolate and vanilla together.
Pour coffee mixture into mugs.
Add the mini marshmallows.
Now top with the whipped cream.
Drizzle the chocolate syrup on top of the whipped cream and finish garnishing with orange peel.
Enjoy.

name: Cinnamon Hazelnut Cream Coffee
directions: Brew the cinnamon hazlenut coffee with cinnamon, nutmeg and cloves.
Pour the spiced coffee into mugs and add the the brown sugar and Frangelica.
Top the coffee with the ice cream and sprinkle on the ground hazelnuts.
Add a cinnamon stick for stirring.

name: Cafe Mandarin
directions: In a mug, stir chocolate syrup, orange liqueur, and coffee.
Top with whipped cream and dust lightly with cinnamon.

name: Amaretto-Cranberry Kiss
directions: Mix cranberry juice, vodka, amaretto, and orange juice in pitcher. Cover and chill until ready to serve. DO AHEAD: Can be prepared 1 day ahead. Keep refrigerated.

To make 2 drinks, fill cocktail shaker with ice cubes. Pour in scant 1 cup vodka mixture. Cover and shake vigorously. Strain into 2 Martini glasses. Garnish each with clementine segment. Repeat 3 times with ice cubes, remaining vodka mixture, and clementine segments.

name: Something Nutty
directions: Pour Kahlua, Frangelico and milk over ice.
Stir.
Sip, now smile.

name: Jello Drink
directions: Mix prepared Jello and milk in a blender for about 5 seconds. Pour in to two glasses and enjoy.

name: Shark Attack (Cocktail)
directions: In a pitcher, add all the ingredients and stir to combine. Garnish with maraschino cherries, if using. Pour into rocks glasses, garnish with maraschino cherries and serve.

name: Cherry Gin-Gria
directions: Fill a tall glass with ice cubes. Pour in the cherry syrup and the gin; stir to mix together. Lighten the drink with a generous splash of soda. Float a layer of red wine on top by pouring it over the back of a wide, flat spoon. (Don't worry if it doesn't float; it tastes great either way.) Drop a few maraschino cherries and raspberries into the glass. Drink.

name: Peach Cobbler Cocktail
directions: Fill a large wine goblet with crushed ice. Gently muddle the rye, peach nectar, dash of bitters, peaches, mint, and a squeeze of lemon juice in a cocktail shaker. Pour over ice and serve cold.
Note: At first, the rye can pack a real punch; as the ice and fruit melt, they mellow it into a wonderful summer drink.

name: Jamaican Ice Coffee
directions: Pour the first 7 ingredients into a blender and mix until all ice is crushed.
Pour the frosty beverage into a tall chilled glass, top with whipped cream, toasted coconut and pineapple chunks.
Grab a straw or two and enjoy.

name: Iced White Chocolate Coffee
directions: Combine all the ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.
Pour into a tall chilled glass and sprinkle  the instant coffee over the coffee mixture and finish it off with the white chocolate flakes and serve immediately.

name: Mexican Inspired Tequila Coffee
directions: Add the coffee, liquers and sugar to your mug.
Top with whipped cream.
Sprinkle the cocoa powder on the cream and garnish with two chocolate covered coffee beans.

similar.name: Tequila Shot for the Tequila Enthusiast

name: A Newfoundlander's Coffee
directions: Measure Screech or rum and liqueurs into a mug.
Add the hot coffee and sugar and stir.
Top with whipped cream and a cherry.
Sit back, relax and enjoy.

name: Sunshine Coffee
directions: Mix the two types of coffee beans together and store in a container with a tight fitting lid.
To ensure a great cup of coffee always use freshly ground beans and cold water.
Prepare coffee to your personal preference and enjoy.

name: Miss Kitty's Quick & Easy Chai Tea Latte
directions: Combine ingredients.
Heat on stove top just to boiling or micorwave for 1-2 minutes.
Enjoy!

name: Pear Ginger Toddies
directions: Combine pear nectar, cloves, ginger, nutmeg, and syrup in a saucepan; bring to a simmer over med-high heat.
Decrease heat to medium and simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove from heat; pour into 4 Irish coffee glasses, and add ¾ ounce of rum to each glass.
Remove the cloves; garnish with candied ginger skewers, and serve.

name: Grown up Tequila Sunrise Splash
directions: Pour all ingredients into a glass, add scoop of orange sherbet.

name: The Cuke Cocktail
directions: Slice 3 limes and place in a pitcher. Juice the rest and add juice to pitcher. Add mint leaves. Slice 2 cucumbers and add, then add sugar.
Muddle ingredients together with a muddle or spoon. Add vodka or gin, then place in refrigerator to steep at least 30 minutes.
Peel remaining cucumber and cut lengthwise into 6 spears. Fill 6 highball glasses with ice.
Strain mixture from pitcher into each. Top each with a splash of sparkling water, garnish with a sprig of mint and a cucumber spear and serve.
To serve 'up' skip the sparkling water, shake with ice and serve in martini glasses.
Not for the light of heart -- but tasty if you like the actual flavor of gin.

name: Breakfast at Tiffany's
directions: Combine Southern Comfort, juice, and grenadine in a mixing glass.
Add ice and shake. Strain into a cocktail glass, top with champagne, and stir gently.

name: Hendrick's Strawberry Jive Cocktail
directions: Muddle the mint, strawberries and basil leaves in the bottom of a mixing glass with the syrup.
Add the remaining ingredients except the mint sprig garnish and shake well with ice.
Strain into an ice filled rocks glass garnish with mint sprig.

name: Caramel Macchiato Venti
directions: Put 1 tablespoon chocolate syrup into 16-20oz coffee mug.
Add vanilla syrup to mug .
Pour in the coffee.
Put hot milk in blender and carefully blend until very frothy.

Make sure cover is on tight! Start the blending on low and move up to high. There will be a good inch of foam on the top if it is hot and done correctly. Be careful though.the steam can cause pressure to build in the blender and the top to pop off.
Carefully pour the steamed milk over the coffee.
Drizzle with half the caramel syrup.
Pile on the whipped cream.
Drizzle with the remaining caramel syrup.
Drizzle with remaining chocolate syrup.
Yummy!

name: Cool Kiss
directions: Combine schnapps, liqueur, and juice in a mixing glass.
Add ice, shake, and pour contents into a Collins or highball glass. Top with club soda and stir gently.

name: Gun Club Punch
directions: Blend cherries, cherry juice in a blender.
Add all ingredients together included blended cherries and cherry juice, (except soda and cinnamon).
Now, add soda slowly, and top with cinnamon.

similar.name: Sneak up on You Planter's Punch

name: Simple Syrup
directions: Bring 1 cup water to boil, add sugar, remove from heat and stir until dissolved.  Cool, then pour into a bottle or jar and refrigerate.

name: Spiced Cider
directions: In a large pot add the  apple juice, cranberry juice,  pumpkin pie spice and honey.
Heat and stir until the honey has melted then slowly bring to a boil, lower heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
Pour into heated mugs and garnish with an orange slice and a cinnamon stick for stirring.

name: Maple Rum Cider
directions: Combine all the ingredients in a large pot, with the exception of the orange slices, they are to be used for garnishing.
Slowly bring to a boil and boil for 5 minutes, reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
Remove pot from oven and discard spices.
Pour cider into mug and float an orange slice in the center of mug. This cider is best when served hot.

similar.name: Spiced Apple Cider With Rum Whipped Cream

name: Margarita Martini
directions: Salt rim of glass with Kosher salt (optional)
Mix all ingredients, shake with ice, pour into martini glass.

name: Tasty Rice Milk
directions: bring cooked rice, 2 cups water, and salt to boil, then reduce to simmer for 25 minutes.
add honey while the rice/water is still hot.
blend above mixture on high until it's smooth.
add vanilla, oil and 2 cups of water/ice and blend again.
pour this mixture through a fine sieve or cheese cloth to remove rice particles.
place mixture into a container with 2 more cups of water/ice.
shake well for each use.

name: Shi Shi Cocktail
directions: Muddle mint in the base of a cocktail shaker with the sugar and lemon juice.
Add remaining ingredients.
Shake and strain into tall glasses with ice.
Garnish with mint and/or passionfruit pulp if desired.
Note~.
Muddling is used to extract flavours and is mostlydone in a wood pestle.

name: Crown Sidecar
directions: Strain into a chilled cocktail glass with sugared rim.
Garnish with lime.
Enjoy!

name: Crown Fizz
directions: Shake and pour into a tall glass.
Garnish with lemon slice.
Enjoy!

name: A Gallon of Margarita's
directions: Mix ingredients together in gallon container. Don’t forget to refrigerate! When ready to serve, pour mixture into a 16-ounce glass filled with ice. Salted rim is optional.

name: Sweet Tea
directions: Boil water, remove from heat after it comes to a boil.
Add the tea bags and let sit for 5 min or more depending on how strong you want your tea.
add sugar to the container that your using to hold your tea.
After your tea is ready pour it into the container that has sugar in it.
stir and enjoy
add ice if you want it colder.

name: Virgin Pomegranate and Cranberry Bellinis
directions: Special equipment:
6 to 8 cup capacity punch bowl.

Place the ice in a punch bowl. Add the simple syrup, pomegranate juice, and cranberry juice. Stir well. Slowly pour in the sparkling water. Garnish with lime slices, mint sprigs and pomegranate seeds, if using, and serve.

Serving Suggestion: As an alternative to serving from a punch bowl, make the bellini mixture in a 6 to 8 cup capacity pitcher. Divide the pomegranate seeds between 12 champagne flutes. Add 1 slice of lime and 1 sprig of mint to each glass. Pour the bellini mixture into the prepared glasses and serve.
Simple syrup:
1 cup water
1 cup sugar

In a saucepan, combine water and sugar over medium heat. Bring to a boil, reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sugar has dissolved. Take the pan off the heat and allow the syrup to cool.

name: Blackberry & Orange Iced Tea
directions: Ice Cubes - For flavored ice cubes - freeze orange juice in ice cube trays.
For the orange slices/blackberries  ice cubes - place half a slice of orange and two blackberries in ice cube tray and fill with water -- freeze and store in plastic bag until ready to use.
Steep teabags in 4 cups of boiling water for 3 - 4 minutes, then discard the teabags.  Place tea on counter to cool.
Don't allow tea to over steep, it will result in a bitter tea.
In large pot, bring blackberries, juice, sugar and 1/2 cup water to boil.
Reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally until the blackberries break down.
Next add the berry mixture to the tea. Allow the hot tea to cool on the counter before putting into the fridge to prevent clouding in your tea.
Once tea has cooled put in fridge to chill for 4 hours.
Strain tea mixture and serve in a ice cube filled glass that you have rimmed with orange juice and dipped in sugar.
Garnish with orange slice and mint. Close your eyes, sit back on the deck and enjoy.
Iced tea taste best when it is freshly made and will last for two or three days.

name: Apple Spiced Honey Iced Tea
directions: Steep tea bags in hot water for 3 - 4 minutes.
Remove tea bags and stir in honey, juice and spices.
Mix gently until the honey is dissolved.
Cool on counter and then chill for at least 4 hours.
Stir and serve in a tall frosted glasses over ice with a cinnamon stick.

name: Basil Gimlet (For Two)
directions: Juice the limes, add to blender with basil leaves, simple syrup, and vodka or gin. Blend well, add some ice, and blend again. You can vary the way you blend the ice to create the texture you like.

name: Mulled Margarita
directions: To make mulled cider: combine the cider, apple slices, cloves, and ground cinnamon in a pot; heat until boiling; let boil for 5 minutes.
Ladle about 4 ounces mulled cider into a coffee mug; add in the Grand Marnier and tequila; garnish with a cinnamon stick.
