*Spiced Apple Margarita: combine 2 ounces cooled mulled cider with 1 ½ ounces tequila and ¾ ounce Grand Marnier in a cocktail shaker filled with ice; shake and strain into a martini glass; garnish with cinnamon stick and apple slice.

name: Champagne Cocktail
directions: Place 1 sugar cube, 1 tablespoon cherry juice and 1 teaspoon lemon juice in each of 6 champagne flutes.  Fill with champagne.

similar.name: La Vie En Rose Champagne Cocktail

name: Spiced Cranberry Cocktail Iced Tea
directions: In a large pot, combine water and cranberries.
Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer for 30 minutes.
Next add the sugar, orange juice, lemon juice, cloves, allspice berries and cinnamon sticks.
Cover and steep for 1 hour.
Strain the mixture, pour into a large pitcher and allow to cool to room temperature on counter.
Once cooled place in refrigerator, until chilled.
When ready, add the pineapple juice, ginger ale, lemon and orange slices to the cranberry mixture in the pitcher and serve in tall glasses with lots of ice.

name: Cherry Mint Iced Tea
directions: Steep the loose tea and mint in the 5 cups of boiling water for 20 minutes.
Strain the tea mixture and allow to cool on the counter till needed.
Add the sugar to the remaining 3 cups of boiling water.
Stir until the sugar is all dissolved.
Pour the sugar water into a pitcher and place on the counter to cool.
Once the sugar mixture has cooled add the fruit juices,  followed by the tea mixture.
Chill in the fridge, stir well and serve in a tall glass over ice.
Garnish with a lemon slice.

similar.name: Oak Alley's Sweet Mint Iced Tea
Green Jasmine-Mint Iced Tea With Lemon

name: Peanut Butter Cocoa
directions: Pour milk and vanilla extract into a pot and simmer 10 minutes, add the chocolate sauce and mix well.
Next add the peanut butter and stir until melted.
Once the cocoa is at desired temperature pour into a warm mug and top with whipped cream, garnish with a drizzling of chocolate sauce.

name: Hot Gingered Cocoa
directions: Grab a large mug and add sugar, cocoa and salt.
Heat the milk and cream in a pot on the stove for 10 minutes on low, until desired temperature is reached.
Add 1/8 cup of the heated milk to the cocoa in your mug and blend into a smooth paste.
Slowly add the rest of the heated milk.
Stirring briskly add the vanilla and ginger to your cocoa.
Top with whipped cream and garnish with a sprinkle of cocoa powder .
Sooo good.

name: Hot Chocolate New England Style
directions: In a large pot, add  sugar, cocoa, and salt.
Stir in the boiling water and butter, mix well and bring mixture to a rapid boil.
Mix the milk, cream, maple syrup and vanilla extract together.
Lower heat to simmering and slowly add the milk mixture to pot.
Now add 8 of the marshmallows and heat through, stirring occasionally until the marshmallows are all melted.
Pour into four warm mugs and top each mug with a marshmallow.

name: Jamaican Hibiscus Iced Tea
directions: Becareful -- Hibiscus has the potential to stain just about anything it comes in contact with. Pick a pot that won't stain.
In an old pot bring 2 cups of water to a boil.
Remove the pot from heat and add the dried flowers and sugar.
Steep with the lid on for 10 minutes, stirring once or twice.
Make sure sugar has dissolved.
Pour the mixture through a strainer into pitcher. Becareful not to spill, it will stain. Add 1 1/2  cups of cold water and lime juice to the pitcher.
Taste and if necessary adjust, sugar or water as needed to sweeten or to weaken the flavor.
Cool completely on counter, chill and serve in large glasses with plenty of ice and garnished with a lime slice.
Cooling and Chilling time is not included.

name: Cucumber Margarita
directions: In a cocktail shaker muddle cucumber, add ice, lime juice, tequila, simple syrup, sweet and sour mix and pepper powder. Shake and serve in a rocks glass with salted rim.
Garnish with a wedge or slice of lime.

name: Magical Low-Calorie Margarita
directions: Stir all ingredients together, except for ice.
For a frozen drink, place mixture in a blender with the ice and blend until smooth.  Or simple pour mixture over ice and enjoy.  Garnish with lime slice.

similar.name: Hungry Girl's  Magical Low Calorie Margarita

name: Mojito Madness
directions: Muddle the mint and lime in a glass.
Add the soda and rum, stir well.
Add ice and enjoy.

name: South Beach Martini
directions: Shake well with ice. Strain into large martini glass. Garnish with twist of orange peel.

name: Tequila Cocktails
directions: Combine tequila, pineapple juice, soda, pineapple and mint in a pitcher. Serve over crushed ice and garnish with fresh mint leaves.

name: Orange Fizz
directions: Fill mixing glass with ice.
Add gin, orange juice, lemon juice, triple sec, sugar and orange bitters.
Shake.
Strain into a highball glass filled with ice.
Top with club soda.
Garnish with a slice of orange.

name: Texas Tea
directions: Fill mixing glass with ice.
Add tequila, vodka, rum triple sec and sour mix.
Shake.
Pour into a Collins glass.
Add more ice, if necessary.
Top with cola.
Garnish with a lemon slice.

name: Shandygaff
directions: Into your favorite tankard put the ice, orange brandy, and lemon juice.
Add the ale and ginger beer.
Drink with a twist of lemon peel.

name: Aloha Lemonade
directions: squeeze fresh Meyer lemons --.
add --  fresh lemon juice, water,sugar,lemonade mix.
add -- extracts.
wet the rim of the glass with water and dip in lemon flavored sugar.
crystalize the the sugar with fire --.
place sugar cane stalk in the glass  and sprinkle with  lime zest.

name: Tennessee Lemonade
directions: In a small sauce pan over high heat, combine sugar and water and bring to a boil. Turn off heat and cool. In a mixing glass, muddle lemon, add bourbon, simple syrup, ice, and triple sec. Shake and pour into a Collins glass, finished with a splash of soda on top. Squeeze a lemon slice on top.

name: Deep Throat (Shooter)
directions: Pour Kahlua and vodka into a shot glass.
Top with whipped cream.

name: Old Fashioned
directions: In old-fashioned tumbler, muddle bitters with sugar until sugar is dissolved.
Add ice cubes and rye or bourbon.
Extract zest by twisting lemon peel over drink, then drop it in and garnish with cherry.

name: Tropics Martini
directions: Shake with ice and strain into a chilled martini glass. Garnish with a pineapple slice.

name: Splenda Hot Cocoa
directions: Mix cocoa, splenda and water into a paste.
Steam milk.
Mix & enjoy!

name: Purple Cow Float  - for Adults
directions: Directions.
Pour all ingredients into a glass, add scoop of vanilla icecream.

similar.name: Orange Cream Float(Hungry Girl) 1 Ww Point

name: Blushing Cranberry Cider
directions: Remove two, 3-inch-long strips of peel from the orange and set aside until needed.
Next juice and strain the orange.
To a medium pot, add the orange, pineapple and cranberry juices, orange peel, cinnamon sticks, ginger, allspice and cloves.
Make sure to sample and add the sugar if desired.
Heat over medium-high heat until it starts to simmer, then reduce the heat to low and continue to simmer 30 - 45 minutes.
Strain the cider, pour into warm mugs, add orange slices and serve immediately.

name: Blueberry Iced Tea
directions: To make the tea concentrate you will place the tea bags in a medium bowl into which you will add the boiling water and steep for 10 minutes, then reemove the tea bags.
To the tea add your honey and mint, making sure to mix well.  Allow to cool to room temperature on the counter. Once cooled remove the mint leaves.
Add the fruit juices and tea concentrate into a large pitcher, mix and place in the fridge until needed.
Fill a large frosted glass with ice cubes, then add 1/2 cup of the tea-juice mixture, fill the remainder of the glass with the club soda. Garnish with a lime slice and sprig of mint.
Sit and enjoy this refreshing drink.

name: Black Forest Coffee
directions: Make fresh, hot, strong coffee and keep warm until ready to mix.
Place a medium size pot on low and add the chocolate syrup and chocolate milk, stir and keep warm, until needed.
With a hand blender mix the heavy cream, cherry liquer and white sugar until it is smooth, thick and creamy.
Add the coffee and cherry liquer to the chocolate milk  and  stir gently.
Pour coffee into a large mug and garnish with the cherry flavored whipped cream, bittersweet chocolate shaving and top with the cherry cluster.

name: Fruity & Spicy Rum Tea
directions: In a medium size pot, combine the apricot nectar, orange & pineapple juices, water, sugar, ground cinnamon, cloves and lemon slices.
Bring to a boil and reduce the heat to low.
Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
Next stir in the rum and simmer for another 5 minutes.
Now add the instant tea, mixing well.
Strain the tea mixture and pour into warm mugs.
Garnish with the cinnamon stick, for stirring.
This is best when served hot.

name: Cinnamon Caramel Coffee
directions: Make the cinnamon flavored coffee.
Pour the hot coffee into a container, add the caramel sauce and stir until all the sauce has dissolved.
Next add the milk to the coffee mixture, stir, cover and place in fridge to chill.
Whip the heavy cream, cinnamon and caramel sauce together, until the cream is smooth, thick and creamy.
Cover and chill until needed.
Once the coffee is thoroughly chilled pour it into a large frosted glass filled with the flavored and plain ices.
Top with the flavored whipped cream , drizzle a little caramel sauce over cream and add a cinnamon stick for stirring.
Enjoy, enjoy, enjoy.

name: Amaretto Slush
directions: Combine first five ingredients in a large plastic container. Freeze at least 8 hours, stirring twice during this time.
To serve, combine equal parts frozen mixture and 7-Up, stirring well.
Store any remaining mixture in freezer.

name: Strawberry (Or Banana or Peach  or Pineapple) Frozen Daiquiris
directions: Process all ingredients except ice in blender container until smooth. Add ice to the 4.5 cup mark on blender container. Blend until smooth.

name: Brian's Green Apple Sweet Tart Cocktail
directions: Pour everything into a shaker with ice.  Shake and pour contents (ice and all) into a glass.  ENJOY.

name: Black Pepper Martini
directions: For Black Peppercorn Syrup:
Combine all ingredients in a small saucepan over medium-high heat, stirring until sugar has dissolved.
Bring to a boil and then reduce heat to bring mixture to a simmer; cook for 20 minutes. Remove from heat and cool to room temperature.
Strain the cooled syrup and refrigerate it in a container with a tightfitting lid.
For Martini:
Combine all ingredients in a shaker filled with ice. Stir with a bar spoon, and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Mocha Chocolate à La Paris
directions: In top part of a double boiler, mix milk, chocolate, cocoa, and sugar. Place over simmering water and cook, stirring occasionally with a whisk, until chocolate has melted and mixture is smooth and hot, about 20 minutes. (Don't have a double boiler? Heat chocolate mixture in a small saucepan over a larger pan of boiling water.) Stir in coffee and heat through.
Pour into mugs, top with whipped cream and the chocolate shavings, if desired, and serve while warm.

similar.name: Chocolate Creme De Menthe Flavored Coffee

name: Sangria
directions: In a large pitcher, combine the wine, brandy, sugar, lemons and oranges and stir until the sugar is dissolved. Add the sparkling water and stir to blend. Fill 4 glasses with ice and pour the sangria into the glasses. Serve immediately. Serves 4.

name: Bubbles N' Blue Cocktail
directions: Pour chilled champagne and Hpnotiq into a champagne flute.

name: Hpno-Rita
directions: Shake well. Pour over ice in a salt rimmed glass. Garnish with lime wheel.

name: Athole Brose
directions: Whisk the milk, half-and-half and honey together in a microwave safe 2 quart bowl.
Microvave uncovered on highn power for 6-8 minutes, until very hot.
Whisk in the scotch and serve hot or chilled, sprinkled with nutmeg if desired.

name: Pinky Lady Lemonade Cocktail
directions: Prepare pink lemonade by diluting with water per the instructions on container.
In a glass 3/4 filled  with ice,pour schnapps & vodka.
Add lemonade and a splash of ginger ale, stir.
Garnish with orange slice if desired.

name: Lucky Limey Float
directions: Add 1 to 2 drops green food coloring into a tall mug or parfait glass.
Add the scoops of sherbet.
Slowly pour about soda over the sherbet until it almost reaches the top.  Leave a little room at the top of the glass for the froth of the sherbet as it begins rise to the top.

name: Ojo Domingo
directions: Muddle celery rib, lime and olive juice in bottom of shaker.
Add remaining ingredients with ice and shake.
Strain into chilled Martini glass and garnish with lemon wheel.

name: Buzz Lightyear Cocktail
directions: Pour ingredients into shaker of ice, strain as a shot or pour over ice.

name: Spicy & Sweet Coarse Salt
directions: Mix together and store at room temperture.

name: Russian Tea
directions: Boil 10 cups of water, 2 cinnamon sticks, and 10 cloves.
Then add 10 tea bags and 1 cup of sugar and steep 10 minutes.
Add the rest and stir.

name: Hendricks  Cucumber Martini
directions: Muddle, shake. Serve straight uo in a chilled martini glass with a slice of cucumber as a garnish.

name: Chili Mojito
directions: Muddle 1/2 lime, chili paste, mint leaves and sugar in a Collins glass.
Fill galss with ice and add rum, the juice of 1/2 lime and chilled soda.

name: Chocolate Snake Bite
directions: Pour ingredients into a stainless steel shaker over ice, and shake until completely cold. Strain into an old-fashioned glass, and serve.

name: Mango Spice Chelada
directions: Salt the rim of large tall glass.
Add the lime juice and mango syrup to the glass.
Fill glass with ice and add beer.
Serve any extar beer on the side.
Garnish with mango and lime.

name: Tom's Coffee Cream Martini
directions: Combine all ingredients in a martini shaker.
Shake (covered) for a minute or until shaker becomes very cold and a little frosty on the outside.
Strain into a martini glass, or any glass of your choice, and enjoy.

name: Mayfair Cocktail
directions: Prepare a martini glass by wetting the outside of the rim with lime, then dab it carefully in the mixture of kosher salt and dried thyme to "frost" the rim of the glass with the flavour. Assemble the first four ingredients and one slice of cucumber in a mixing glass with ice and shake well. Strain into a chilled martini glass and garnish with a thin slice of English Cucumber.

name: Sarah Palin’s Barracuda Cocktail
directions: Pour all three parts into a cocktail glass (or another type of glass) over ice.  Mix and serve.

name: Hot Apple Pie Cocktails
directions: Add cinnamon, allspice, cloves, nutmeg, and ginger in a saucepan.
Stir in the apple cider, Calvados, and rum; warm over low heat for 30 minutes, until the mixture reaches a hot serving temperature.
Strain out the spices; serve warm, garnished with freshly grated nutmeg.

name: Bishop Wine Cocktail
directions: Shake ingredients together and pour into a chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with an orange twist.

name: Kringle's Krunch
directions: Mix crushed ice and milk in blender. Add eggnog, grenadine, vanilla and butternut flavoring; blend for 1 minute.
Pour into brandy snifers, garnish with whipped cream, a splash of grenadine, almonds and a dash each of nutmeg and cinnamon.

name: Vodka Gilligan's Island
directions: Shake ingredients in a shaker.
Add a few ice cubes to a glass, pour cocktail over.
Garnish with a slice of orange if desired.
Enjoy.

name: Blonde Margarita
directions: For sugar rim—wit the rim of a chilled glass in simple syrup and dip into superfine sugar several times to ensure coverage.
Combine the cream, tequila, vanilla schnapps, and simple syrup in a cocktail shaker filled with ice; shake vigorously.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass; garnish with vanilla bean.

name: Southside Lemonade
directions: Muddle simple syrup and mint. Add some cucumber that has been sliced and then cut into quarters. Add gin, lemonade and stir or shake.
.Pour into tall glass and top with some soda water. garnish with cucumber slices and mint.
You can add more gin depending on how strong you want this drink.

name: Bunny Carrot Drink
directions: Throughly blend carrot juice, orange juice, sugar, lemon juice and salt.
Pour this mixture over the crushed ice, garnish with orange slices.

name: Pink Cadillac
directions: Add all ingredients (except ice) to a cocktail shaker, and shake vigorously.
Strain over ice in a tall glass or over-sized martini glass.

name: Wassail Old English Favorite
directions: Mix cider, orange juice, pineapple juice, lemon juice, cloves, cinnamon stick and sugar or honey; simmer for half hour.
Serve directly from the pan, or strain and put in a coffeepot or teapot with insulated handle, or keep hot in a crockpot on low temperature.
Stores well in the refrigerator.

name: Orange Cranberry Toddy
directions: Heat orange juice, cranberry juice, sugar, cloves and cinnamon stick to boiling point.
Taste and add more sugar if needed.
Garnish with orange slices and add cinnamon sticks for swizzles.

name: Whipped Topping Whip-A-Cino
directions: Place frozen whipped topping in glass coffee pot.
Add coffee grounds and water to coffee maker as normal.
Brew coffee.
Add sweetners.

similar.name: Spiced Coffee With Brandied Whipped Cream

name: Fresh Squeezed Lemonade
directions: Put the drink mix in a 1/2 gallon pitcher; add the Splenda, lemon juice and 64 ounces cold water. Shake well. Chill well before serving over ice.
* Use 1 cup granular Splenda if you like tart lemonade and add another 1/4 cup for sweeter lemonade.
With granular Splenda:
Per Serving: 18 Calories; 0g Fat; trace Protein; 4g Carbohydrate; trace Dietary Fiber; 4g Net Carbs
With liquid Splenda:
Per Serving: 3 Calories; 0g Fat; trace Protein; 1g Carbohydrate; trace Dietary Fiber; 1g Net Carbs.

name: Limey Apricot Rum Cooler
directions: Place the lime zest and sugar in the bowl of a food processor and pulse until finely ground. Measure out 1/4 cup mixture and transfer the rest to a shallow dish. Pour 2 Tb lime juice in another dish. Dip the rims of 4 glasses into lime juice and then into zest mixture. In a blender puree the nectar with the rum and remaining lime juice and zest mixture. Pour into prepared glasses and serve.

name: Antartic Slush
directions: In a blender, mix liqueur, sugar, lemon juice and 1 cup ice.Blend until well mixed.
With blender running, add the rest of the ice, 1/2 cup at a time, until it is all well incorporated. Transfer to a freezer container and freeze 4 hours or overnight.

To serve, let stand 20 minutes at room tmemperature. Return to blender and blend until it has a smooth consistency. Serve into small goblets and serve immediately. Garnish with mint sprigs, if desired.

name: St. Thomas Bushwhacker
directions: Fill a blender 3/4 with ice (small cubes best). Pour vodka and Grand Marnier over ice. Add Kahlua and Amaretto.
Fill the blender with Bailey's until liquid is 1/2 inch from top of ice cubes, put on lid and mix until smooth. NOTE: The consistency should be like a milk shake, except without the milk.
Pour in a collins or hurricane glass and sprinkle nutmeg on top.

name: Santorini Cocktail
directions: To a martini shaker filled with ice, add all ingredients except champagne.
Shake well and strain into martini glass.
Top with Champagne and serve.

name: Blackberry Mint Iced Tea
directions: In a large pot, boil 4 cups of water. Remove from heat, tear the mint leaves in half and add to the pitcher along with the tea bags. Stir gently, cover and let steep about 10-15 minutes.

Meanwhile, Puree blackberries in a blender or food processor, strain into a 2 quart pitcher (discarding pulp and seeds). Strain the water into the pitcher, discarding tea bags and mint. Add in honey, tasting and adjusting to your desired sweetness. Top with cold water to fill, stirring to incorporate.
Chill for at least 4-6 hours in the refrigerator. Serve over ice and garnish with a mint leaf and some blackberries.

name: B-52 (Layered Shot)
directions: To a shotglass, begin with the Grand Marnier and fill the glass 1/3 full.
Take the Bailey's, and slowly pour down the inside of the glass. It will flow under the Grand Marnier.
Next, Do the same with the Kaluha as you did for the Bailey's. It will flow under the Baileys.

This will create a beautifully layered shot that you drink straight down. It's easiest to pour down the inside of the glass if you have pour spouts inserted in the bottles. Practice makes perfect, but drink too many of them and your aim will be off. LOL!

name: Cafe De Menthe
directions: Pour syrup into large coffee mug or tall footed continental cup and fill with 3/4 cup strong coffee. Stir.
Top with whipped cream and pour a jigger of Creme de Menthe over all.

similar.name: Chocolate Creme De Menthe Flavored Coffee

name: Watermelon Daiquiri
directions: Place watermelon in a zip-top plastic freezer bag. Seal bag; freeze 8 hours.
Process watermelon, rum, and remaining ingredients in a blender or food processor until smooth, stopping to scrape down sides.
Serve immediately.

name: Cucumber Martini
directions: Mix gin and thick cucumber slices in pitcher.  Cover and chill overnight or up to 3 days.

Strain gin, discarding thick cucumber slices.  Pour half of gin into cocktail shaker.  Add 1 tablespoon vermouth, then fill shaker with ice.  Shake vigorously; strain into three glasses.  Repeat with remaining gin and vermouth.
Garnish with thin cucumber slices.

name: Northwood #2
directions: Combine first 5 ingredients in cocktail shaker.  Fill with ice, cover and shake vigorously until cold.  Strain into 2 coupe glasses.  Cut slit in each apple slice and attach to rim of glass.

name: Grandma's Iced Tea
directions: Empty the sugar and lemonade mix into the bottom of a 1 gallon pitcher.  Tie the tea bags together and place into the pitcher.  Pour the boiling water on top.  Remove the tea bags once the tea is cool, and refrigerate the tea. Enjoy!

name: Long Island Ice Tea Cocktail
directions: In a tall  glass fill with ice. Add one shot of each alcohol.
Fill almost all the way up with the sweet and sour mix and top of with a little cola to give a little dark color.

name: Peach Daiquiris
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender container; process until smooth. Spoon into a freezer container, and freeze.
Let stand at room temperature 15 minutes or until slushy before serving.

name: Rhubarb Syrup
directions: cook all ingredients for 20 minutes.  Strain out the pulp and store the syrup in the refrigerator.

name: Top Hat    Shooters
directions: Fill each shot glass 2/3 full of Kahlua®.
Very slowly pour in enough heavy cream to top off the glass.
Serve immediately.

name: Root Beer Float (Adult Drink)
directions: Fill pint glass with ice.  Add the vodka and Kahlua.
Fill 2 to 3 inches from top with cream and top off with Coke.
Transfer between two glass for foamy effect or use a shaker.

name: The Marv Albert
directions: Fill glass with 3 oz of Bailey's Irish Crème, then add 1 oz of Southern Comfort, followed by mixing in 1 oz of Buterscotch Schnapps.

name: Cocoa Mix
directions: Mix WELL!
Add 1/3 cup of mix to 1 cup of hot water ( or 1/3 of the cup you are using to that “cup” of water!)
To mix I use a Ziplock bag and toss it around a bit. I have also found that for me it is easier to mix everything except the milk really well and then add the dry milk.

similar.name: Raspberry Cocoa Mix in a Jar

name: Invigorating and Spicy Green Tea
directions: Place tea bags in a prewarmed large teapot and set aside.
Place the spices in a 4-cup heatproof measuring cup and add the boiling water; stir to mix, then let the spices infuse for 2 minutes.
Quickly pour the infusion into the teapot, straining carefully to prevent the spices from going into the teapot.
Steep the tea in the spice infusion for an additional 2 minutes.
Strain the brewed tea into teacups and serve immediately.

similar.name: Green Tea With Indian Chai Spices

name: The Mad Hungarian
directions: Pour rum over ice in a frosted beer mug.
Top with root beer.

name: Procession of the Pink Elephants
directions: Mix all ingredients and serve on the rocks.

name: Mad Hatter
directions: Shake with ice and strain.

name: Gilligan's Island
directions: Shake and pour over ice.

name: Jack Daniel's Cactus Kicker
directions: Salt the rim of the glass. Mix all ingredients. Garnish with a slice of lime.

name: Grenadine
directions: Combine all ingredients in the bowl of a food processor and process briefly to break up the seeds. Transfer to a 1-quart Mason jar and set the jar aside for 3 days in a cool, dark place, but don't refrigerate.
Strain the contents through a fine sieve into a 4-cup glass measuring cup. Allow the liquid to drip through; this could take up to 30 minutes.
Transfer the strained liquid to a medium-size nonreactive saucepan. Bring just to a boil over low heat, about 10 minutes.
Remove from the heat and cool to room temperature before using. Store the Grenadine in the refrigerator, where it should keep for up to 6 months.

name: Strawberry Lemonade
directions: Bring sugar and 1 cup water to a boil. Let the mix cool.
Stir in the syrup the strawberries and lemon juice along with 4 cups water and the ice.
Garnish with whole strawberries.

name: Pineapple Gin"kir"
directions: In a pitcher mix pineapple juice, gin and lemon juice. Divide between two highball glasses. Pour 1 tsp creme de cassis into center of each glass, do not stir. Carefully fill glasses with ice and serve immediately.

name: Spiced Chai Latte
directions: *Prep a pitcher or whatever container you are going to use by having a strainer ready and the container available. (I use a strainer and place a coffee filter paper in it.).
In a sauce pot bring 2 cups of water to a boil
While stirring - Add honey, vanilla, tea bags, cinnamon sticks, cloves, ginger, cardomon, nutmeg, sugar.
Let it simmer for about 5 minutes.
Remove the tea bags.
Add 2 cups of milk and bring it to a boil (continue stirring).
Remove from heat.
Pour Chai through the strainer into the container you are using to serve it.

name: Pomegranate Cosmopolitans
directions: Combine vodka, cointreau, cranberry juice, pomegranate juice and lime juice in a large pitcher and mix together well.
Fill cocktail shaker half full with ice.
Pour in cocktail mixture iand shake for 30 seconds or simply add ice.
to the pitcher.
Either way how could you go wrong?  LOL!
Pour into 6 martini glasses and garnish with a slice of fresh lime.
Enjoy!

name: Southern Driver
directions: Combine sugar cube, 1 teaspoon water and bitters in an old-fashioned glass. Add whiskey, flavored whiskey and orange juice. Stir. Top with ice.
Garnish with orange slice and maraschino cherry.

name: Kentucky Lemonade
directions: Pour whiskey and lemonade concentrate into a highball glass. Stir. Add ice cubes and fill glass with soda. Garnish with a maraschino cherry.

name: China White
directions: Pour ingredients into shaker filled with ice, shake, strain into shot glass.

similar.name: Hot Bailey's Irish Cream Chocolate Drink

name: Gin  Buck
directions: Mix gin and lemon juice in a shaker.
Pour over ice cubes in an old fashioned glass.
Top with gingerale.

name: Gin Rickey
directions: Combine gin and frozen limeade in shaker.
Pour over ice in a tall glass.
Top with club soda to your taste, some like more soda.
Garnish with a twist of lime if desired.

name: Jim's Pineapple Upside Down Drink
directions: Mix in a shaker with ice and serve.
May garnish with pineapple spear and cherry.

name: Lemonade Detox
directions: mix all ingredients and enjoy.

name: Spiced Iced Coffee
directions: Fill 6 compartments of an ice cube tray with water; place a cinnamon stick in each filled compartment; freeze until solid.
In a small saucepan, simmer the coffee, star anise and the remaining 2 cinnamon sticks over low heat for 5 minutes. Stir in the condensed milk and refrigerate until cool.
Strain the coffee mixture and discard the spices. Fill 6 glasses halfway with ice cubes, pour in the coffee mixture and serve with the cinnamon ice sticks.

name: Chartreuse G-String
directions: Stir ingredients together.  Serve on the rocks.

name: Jeannie's Dream
directions: Mix Malibu, juices, and 7-Up.
Gently top with sloe gin.

name: Grape Frost Beverage
directions: Toss all ingredients in blender.
Blend until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Catherine of Sheridan Square
directions: Pour all of the ingredients into an Irish coffee glass filled with crushed ice. Stir well.

name: Royal Cider Grog
directions: Mix whiskey and apple cider in a large pot. Heat until warm. Pour into 8 heat proof mugs. Garnish each mug with a cinnamon stick.

name: Bloody Mary (Basic)
directions: Mix all ingredients well; serve over ice.

name: Tequila Jazz
directions: Mix everything in a cocktail shaker and serve in a cold martini glass.

name: Wassail Tea
directions: Boil first five ingredients for 10 minutes.  Allow to steam for 1 hour.  Add remaining ingredients.  Serve.
As the tea is reheated the flavor intensifies, more water may be added.

name: Bourbon Manhattan  -  a Classic Cocktail
directions: In a mixing glass, half-filled with ice cubes, combine all the ingredients, except the cherry. Stir a couple of times.
Strain into a cocktail (martini) glass. Let the cherry drop to the bottom.

name: Kalamazoo Kicker
directions: Add 1/4 can red bull to your beer. Stir and enjoy!

name: Ice Cream Drinks (Alcoholic)
directions: Soften ice cream, in a VERY large bown mix all together with a hand held electric mixer.  Pour back into ice cream bucket and freeze.  Cooking time is freezing time.  Liquors listed above are for a Brandy Alexander.  Can vary:.
Pink Squirrel:.
3/4 to 1 cup creme de almond.
3/4 to 1 cup white creme de cocoa.
Grasshopper:.
3/4 to 1 cup green creme de menthe.
3/4 to 1 cup white creme de cocoa.
White Russian:.
3/4 to 1 cup Kahlua.
3/4 to 1 cup Vodka.
Mudslide:.
1/2 cup vodka.
1/2 cup Kahlua.
1/2 cup Baileye Irish Cream.

similar.name: Black Cocoa Whey Protein Drink Mix

name: Mocha Froth - Sugar Free
directions: Pour water into a blender and add coffee and sugar substitute.
Blend several seconds, then add the milk and ice cubes. Blend until thick, about 1 minute.
Pour into tall glasses and serve with a straw and long spoon.

similar.name: Sugar Free Dark Chocolate Mocha Dream Coffee

name: Spooktacular Seven-Layer Latte
directions: Steam the milk in a saucepan with a flexible, loose wired whisk or hand-mixer, or with a steam wand from an espresso machine.
In a cup, mix 3 ounces of the milk with the orange-flavored syrup, to produce orange foam.
in a separate cup, mix 3 ounces of the milk with  1 ounce of the chocolate syrup and ½ ounce of the hazelnut syrup, to produce tan-colored foam.
Into a clear, tall tapered tempered 16 ounce glass:
Layer 1: pour ½ ounce of the chocolate syrup.
Layer 2: pour ½ ounce of the hazelnut syrup.
Layer 3: very slowly pour or spoon 2 ounces of the untinted milk.
Layer 4: very slowly pour or spoon 3 ounces of the orange-colored milk.
Layer 5: very slowly pour or spoon 3 ounces of the tan-colored milk.
Layer 6: very slowly pour or spoon the remaining 2 ounces untinted milk.

Layer 7: very slowly pour the espresso down the center of the entire layered drink; important—as you pour in the espresso, keep the drink still so the coffee will create bouyant, separated, colorful layers like magic).
Dust with cocoa powder; garnish with orange and black sprinkles.

name: Beevo Special Recipe
directions: Pour the Vodka and Sour Apple pucker into a collins glass half filled with ice cubes. Add a can of Mountain Dew, stir and serve.

name: Homemade Pedialyte
directions: Mix it all together -- drink.

name: Caribbean Thunder
directions: Pour all ingredients into a large shaker half filled with ice, shake and strain into a cocktail glass. Garnish with orange slice or whipped cream and cherry.

name: Aw Nutz!
directions: Measure and pour into a shaker full of ice. Shake about 6 times.
Strain into a cocktail glass neat or over ice. I prefer it over ice.

name: Texas " Tea"
directions: Mix all ingredients and serve over ice in tall glasses.

name: Homemade Black Currant Wine
directions: Add sugar or honey to boiling water to dissolve.
Allow to cool to 105* F.
Add yeast and yeast energizer, stir, then cover with cloth.
While allowing the yeast time to wakeup (1 hour) sterilize the stopper and airlock.
Open the quart bottle of juice or nectar and pour out 1 and 1/4 cup of it (this doesn't need to be saved.).
Add the mixture to the juice/nectar, put the lid on and invert the bottle a couple of times to mix up the two.
Insert your sterilized bottle stop and then insert your airlock into that.
Add water to the airlock, enough to meet the watermark in both chambers.Place it in a warm area and let it sit until the airlock bubbles only every 3 minutes or so. (one to two weeks).

Once the fermentation has slowed down considerably, pour (or 'rack' with a siphoning tube) to a bottle of the same size. This will separate your wine from the 'lees' (the dead yeast that accumulate in the bottom of the bottle).
Remove 1 cup of the wine and taste test or dispose of. It's not needed at this point. If the fermentation went well it won't be sweet at all at this point.
Add another cup of warm sugarwater (1/2 water & 1/2 sugar dissolved) to the bottle and reinsert the stopper and airlock (sterilized again if necessary).
Let ferment until the airlock is bubbling once every five minutes.
'Rack' again and at this point you can either drink the wine or let it age for another two months before enjoying.

similar.name: Mulled White Wine With Peach Juice

name: Copycat the Outback Steakhouse Wallaby Darned
directions: Combine all of the ingredients in a blender.  Blend on high for approximately.
30 seconds or until ice is completely crushed and drink is smooth.
Pour into a 120oz glass and serve with a straw.
(http://www.topsecretrecipes.com).
Makes 1 drink.

name: So Co -- Southern Cross
directions: Measure liquors.
Pour over ice into a cocktail glass.
Serve, enjoy, repeat!

name: Crock Pot Pumpkin Spiced Latte
directions: I used a 4-quart crockpot, but as small as a 1.5 quart will work with these amounts.
Add the coffee/espresso and milk to the crockpot. Whisk in the pumpkin, spices, sugar, and vanilla.
Cover and cook on high for 2 hours if everything is cold. Whisk again.
Ladle into mugs, and garnish with whipped cream and additional cinnamon. I added a cinnamon stick to be fancy.

name: Tini Rita Martini
directions: Chill martini glass with ice and water. Fill cocktail shaker with ice, vodka, Cointreau, Grand Marnier, lime juice, and sour mix.
Shake vigorously until shaker is frosty. Empty martini glass and rim with salt and sugar mix.
Pour contents into glass and garnish with lime wedge. Serve.

name: Lemon Appletini
directions: Add crushed ice to your cocktail shaker.
Add vodka,schnapps, lemon juice and sugar, cover and shake.
Strain contents of the shaker, pour into martini glass.
Garnish with apple or lemon slice.

name: Pumpkin Cheesecake Latte
directions: Steam the syrups and milk until hot, frothy, and doubled in volume.
Pour into tempered 12 ounce glass.
Pour the hot espresso into the milk mixture.
Top with a layer of frothed milk.

name: Cape Cod Cooler
directions: Pour the gins, cranberry juice, lime juice and into a cocktail shaker half-filled with ice cubes. Shake well.
Strain into a collins glass 3/4 filled with ice cubes. Garnish with a slice of lime, and serve.

name: Cappuccino Mix in a Jar
directions: Have ready 2 (12 ounce) canning jars. Put the instant coffee into a food processor, and process to a fine powder. If you don't have a food processor, put it into a large plastic bag, and crush with a rolling pin.
In a large bowl, combine creamer, chocolate mix, instant coffee, SPLENDA® Granulated Sweetener, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Stir together until well mixed. Spoon into 2 - 12 ounce jars.
Attach a note to each jar that reads: Cappuccino: Mix 3 tablespoons of powder with 6 fluid ounces hot water.

name: Easy Iced Cappuccino - Sugar Free
directions: In sealable jar, combine instant coffee, SPLENDA® Granulated Sweetener, and warm water.
Cover the jar and shake until it is foamy.
Pour into a glass full of ice. Fill the glass with milk.
Adjust to taste if necessary.

name: Elegant Eggnog - Sugar Free
directions: Mix together first 3 ingredients in a large heavy saucepan. Set aside.
Whisk egg yolks. Add to SPLENDA® Granulated Sweetener mixture whisking until blended. Gradually whisk in milk.
Cook over low heat, whisking constantly until the temperature reaches 175 degrees approximately (5 to 8 minutes). Remove from heat and whisk in half and half; cool.
Cover and chill 3 hours or up to 3 days. Stir in vanilla extract just before serving.

name: Mel's Apricot Brandy
directions: Cut apricots into 1/4" pieces.
Combine all ingredients into a container with a tight lid.
Let set for 6 weeks. Shake Daily.
Strain out apricots and enjoy!

name: Vixen Cocktail
directions: Pour grenadine and frangelico into an ice-filled cocktail shaker, and shake until frothy.
Strain into a chilled martini glass, and slowly add the kahlua.
Garnish with a cherry or hershey's kiss, and serve.

name: Harvey Wallbanger
directions: Pour vodka and orange juice into a chilled collins glass with several ice cubes and stir well.
Float Galliano on top.
Serve with a straw - the drink is meant to be drank from the bottom up.

name: The Black Jack
directions: Fill a large glass with ice; pour in whiskey.
Add the vanilla coke and gently stir.

name: Elephant Gun Cocktail
directions: shake in a coctail shaker with ice, strain into a cocktail glass.
Drink before, during or after the election, depending on the outcome.

name: Hot Buttered Apple Cider (Crock Pot)
directions: In slow cooker on low heat, cook apple cider with syrup for 20 minutes or until steaming.  In small bowl, combine butter, nutmeg and allspice.  Mix well.  Pour cider into mugs and top with a teaspoon of the spiced butter.  Enjoy!

similar.name: Warm Slow Cooker or Crock Pot Cider

name: Breakfast Cocoa
directions: Mix cocoa, sugar, and salt in a medium sauce pan.  Add water and cook for 3 minutes on med heat.  Stir in milk and heat to just before boiling.  Do not boil.

name: Hot Dark Cocoa, Sugar Free
directions: mix everything together in a sauce pan.  Over medium heat, bring to boil.  Turn down heat, and bring back to boil, stirring continuously.

name: Frozen Lemonade
directions: Bring water and sugar to a boil in a small saucepan, stirring occasionally, until sugar has dissolved.  Let cool.
Mix sugar syrup and lemon juice in nonreactive 9x13 baking dish.  Cover and freeze overnight. (Lemonade can be frozen for up to 3 days).

Using a fork, break frozen lemonade mixture into chunks, and transfer to a large bowl.  Whisk, breaking up chunks, until slushy.  Divide slush among glasses  Squeeze 1 lemon wedge over each glass, drop in glass and serve immediately.

name: Everyday Sangria
directions: In a large pitcher, combine orange juice, sugar, and brandy; stir well to dissolve sugar. Add wine, orange slices, lemon slices, and seltzer; stir. Fill glasses with ice; pour sangria over. Serve Immediately.

name: Caramel Apple Orchard Martini
directions: Combine ingredients in a cocktail shaker filled with ice. Shake thoroughly and strian into a chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with an apple slice and enjoy.

name: Vanilla Syrup
directions: Add ingredients to a saucepan, stir to mix.
Bring to a boil over medium heat; decrease heat and simmer 8-10 minutes, until sugar is dissolved; stir occasionally.
Let cool; use a sieve to strain the syrup into a sterilized and sealed container; store in the refrigerator.

name: Saft Sparklers
directions: SAFT SPARKLER:  Pour 1/3 cup Saft into each of 8 ice-filled glasses.  Top with 1/2 cup club soda.

SAFT:  Bring fruit, ginger and water to a simmer n a large pot.  Cook until fruit is soft, 1-=15 minutes.  Let cool slightly, then strain through a cheesecloth lined sieve into a large saucepan, pressing on fruit.  (Press gently to prevent syrup from becoming cloudy.)  Discard fruit.  Add sufar and taste, adding more as needed to reach desired sweetness.

Bring juice mixture to gentle simmer, stirring often until sugar dissolves.  Add mint, and cook over medium-high heat, stirring often, until liquid reduces to a light syrup, about 15 minutes.  (You should have about 8 cups).  Let cool completely,  Discard mint.  Trandfer syrup to sterilized bottlers or airtight containers.  Cover and refrigerate for up to 3 months.

name: Pomegranate Sparklers
directions: Boil juice in a medium saucepan until reduced by half, 5-7 minutes.  Cool completely.
Pour 1/3 cup juice into each of 8 ice-filled glasses.
Top with 1/2 cup club soda.

name: Caramel Hot Chocolate (Crock Pot)
directions: Add skim milk powder, cocoa and sugar to a slow cooker, stir to combine.  Slowly add water, whisking constantly to avoid lumps.
Cover and cook on low for 4 - 5 hours or until hot.
Break chocolate bar into pieces and add to hot chocolate, stirring until completely melted.
To serve:  ladle into mugs and garnish with whipped cream and grated chocolate.  For adult version:  add a shot of Irish Cream or Brandy to the mug.

name: Key Lime Mockarita
directions: Combine margarita mix, citrus soda and a dash of key lime juice in a drink shaker with ice, and shake well.
Moisten glasses with lime juice and then dip into a plate of  kosher salt.
Add ice to each glass and top off with the Mockarita mixture.
Garnish with a lime slice if desired.

name: Black Cherry Margarita
directions: Put all ingredients into a blender and blend until smooth.

name: Spiced Buttered Rum Latte
directions: Combine the syrups at the bottom of a coffee mug.
Stir in the hot espresso; pour the steamed milk into the coffee mixture.
Top with the whipped cream and sprinkle with cinnamon.
Garnish with a cinnamon stick.

name: Boston Trolley
directions: Shake with ice and strain into a glass.

name: Bermuda Triangle
directions: Pour ingredients into a glass filled with crushed ice. Give it a stir and enjoy!

name: Caribbean Lover
directions: Shake well with ice and pour into a glass. Float grenadine on top. Add a slice of orange and a slice of pineapple on top.

name: Chocolate Rum
directions: Shake with ice and strain into a glass half filled with ice cubes. Drizzle chocolate syrup over the top.

name: Corkscrew
directions: Shake with ice and strain into a glass. Top with a slice of lime.

name: Firefighter's Sour
directions: Shake with ice and strain into a glass. Fill tall collins glass with club soda. Top with lime wedge and a cherry.

similar.name: Sneak up on You Planter's Punch

name: Havana Cocktail
directions: Shake with ice and strain into a a glass. Top with a twist of lemon peel.

similar.name: Cuba Libre (Better Known As Rum & Coke)

name: Hop Frog
directions: Stir with ice and strain into a glass 1/4 full of ice.

name: Hurricane
directions: Shake well with ice and strain into a hurricane glass filled with ice.

name: Hurricane Jane
directions: Pour over ice into hurricane glass and stir well. Garnish with an orange wheel.

name: Jade Elephant
directions: Shake well with ice and strain into a glass. Top with a wedge of lime.

name: Jamaican Crab
directions: Combine all ingredients except grenadine in a mixing glass. Stir well. Pour into a glass, and float grenadine on top. Top with a cherry.

name: Kickboxer's Ko
directions: Shake with ice and strain into a glass. Top with a slice of pineapple and a lemon wedge.

name: Midnight Locomotive
directions: Shake with ice and pour into a glass 2/3 full of ice.

name: Nevada Cocktail
directions: Shake with ice and strain into a glass. Top with a grapefruit wedge.

name: Rain Man
directions: Shake and pour into a hurricane glass filled with crushed ice.

name: Rum Relaxation
directions: Pour all ingredients except lemon-lime soda over ice and shake well. Pour into a hurricane glass and fill with lemon-lime soda. Top with an orange slice and a cherry.

name: Tropicana Cocktail
directions: Mix all ingredients in a glass filled with ice cubes. Top with a ring of pineapple.

name: Zombie
directions: Blend all ingredients and 1/2 cup crushed ice at low speed for 2 minutes. Strain into a frosted glass. Top with a stick of pineapple and a cherry. Carefully float 151-proof rum on top. Add a sprig of fresh mint dipped in powdered sugar and serve with a straw.

name: Pumpkin Cocktail
directions: Add cinnamon sugar to a small plate; rim outside of glass with lime wedge; roll the outside rim of glass in cinnamon sugar mixture; set aside.
Add pumpkin liqueur, orange vodka, half and half, and vanilla syrup to cocktail shaker filled with ice; shake vigorously, then strain into prepared glass.
Garnish with a gooseberry—peel back the outer leaves of the berry, slit the bottom of the berry, rest it on the rim of glass.

name: Bay Blue Cocktail
directions: Pour the vodka, the schnapps and the lemonade in a highball glass. Then add in slowly the cranberry juice. Float the blue curacao on top. If done right you'll have a nice multi-coloured drink.

name: Persephone Martini
directions: Place vodka, Chambord, pomegranate juice and ice in a cocktail shaker.
Shake to mix thoroughly.
Strain into chilled martini glass. (I like to rim mine with sugar!).
Pour champagne over the vodka mixture.
Twist 1 slice of lemon into the martini and add as garnish.

name: Low Calorie Margarita
directions: If desired run some lme juice along the  dish rim of the glass and dip into a dish of salt or sweetener. Mix all ingredients together. Pour over 1 cup crushed ice.

similar.name: Hungry Girl's  Magical Low Calorie Margarita

name: Pumpkin Martini
directions: combine ingredients in a shaker with cracked ice.
shake for 30 seconds and serve in a cinnamon sugar rimmed chilled martini glass.

name: Hot Chile Margarita
directions: Combine the tequila, triple sec, simple syrup, lime juice, lemon juice, and Tabasco sauce in a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously and pour into a glass; garnish with a whole or sliced red chile pepper.

name: Orange Mulled Wine
directions: In a big pan, combine the wine, water, sugar, oranges, Cointreau, honey, cinnamon sticks, cloves, and peppercorns; bring to a simmer over medium heat.
Turn the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Remove from the heat and let sit, covered, for 30 minutes (it is important to not let it sit too long as the pith from the orange can make the wine bitter).
Strain and serve warm in mugs, garnished with orange slices and cinnamon sticks.
Make-ahead: you can make the mulled wine up to 2 days ahead, strain it, and keep it in the refrigerator; reheat just before serving.

name: Chocolate Mint Smooth
directions: Fill half a shaker with ice.
Pour the ingredients into the shaker and shake well.
Serve chilled.

name: Hot Mocha Truffle
directions: Place Nesquick mix in a saucepan, and slowly add water while whisking to form a paste.
Slowly add in half and half, stirring until combined. Add in remaining ingredients.
Simmer, stirring occasionally, over medium-low heat for about 5 minutes or until heated through. Serve immediately.

similar.name: Mr Coffee Raspberry Truffle Cappuccino Frappe
Mr Coffee Chocolate Chip Mocha Frappe

name: Sugar and Spice Hot Chocolate
directions: Pour milk in a pan.
Sprinkle apple spice onto milk.
Break or chop chocolate into pieces and add to milk.
Add enough sugar to sweeten to your taste.
Heat mixture over low heat until milk just boiling stirring all the time.
Place 1 cinnamon stick into each of 2 cups.
Pour hot chocolate into cups.
top with whipped cream.
serve immediately.

name: Hilary Wallbanger
directions: Pour the white wine and orange juice into a collins glass almost filled with ice cubes.
Stir well, float the galliano on top and serve.

name: Daiquiri Slush Drink Recipe
directions: Directions: Dissolve sugar in hot water. Mix the pineapple juice, vodka, gin, rum, water, and lime-ade with the sugar water. Freeze in a large container. What we do is fill each glass 3/4 full with slush and then add cold 7-up and mix a little.

name: Put the Lime in the Coconut
directions: Fill a tall glass with ice.
Add the coconut rum and lime juice.  Fill glass with Sprite.
Stir gently and enjoy!

similar.name: Put the Lime in the Coconut Cocktail

name: Orange Pineapple Slushy
directions: Add all ingredients into blender and process until you get the slushy constistency that you like.  Add more ice cubes if necessary.
Pour into a nice glass , garnish and enjoy.

similar.name: Watermelon Slush With Rose Water and Coconut Milk

name: Hot Chocolate
directions: In a large saucepan, combine sweetened condensed milk, cocoa, vanilla and salt; mix well. Over medium heat, slowly stir in water; heat through, stirring occasionally. DO NOT BOIL. Top with marshmallows, if desired.
Tip: Chocolate can be storedin the refrigerator up to 5 days. Mix well and reheat before serving.

name: Peach Margaritas With Peach Wedges
directions: Prepare an ice-water bath.  Bring a medium pot of water to a boil.  Add 1 pound of peaches, and cook for 1 minute.  Transfer to ice-water bath to cool.  Remover peaches from water.

Peel and halve peaches, and remove pits.  Slice peaches into wedges, and transfer to a medium bowl.  Toss with orange liqueur, sugar and salt.  Cover, and set in a warm spot until peaches give off juice, about 20 minutes.

Purée peach mixture in a blender or a food processor until completely smooth.  Immediately stir in tequila and lemon juice. (Peach purée with tequila can be refrigerated, covered, for up to 4 hours).  Transfer to a pitcher, and stir in peach nectar.

Fill each of 8 tall glasses with ice, and garnish with a sprig of mint.  Cut the remaining 2 peaches into 8 wedges, cut a small slit into curve of each wedge, and place one wedge on rim of each glass.  Divide margarita mixture among glasses.

similar.name: Grapefruit Margaritas With Chipolte Chili Salt and Lime

name: Peach on the Beach
directions: Fill a highball glass with ice, and add vodka, schnapps and pineapple juice. Fill with cranberry juice. Stir and serve.

name: Evening in Paris
directions: Pour pineapple, orange, lemon juices, peach vodka and sugar in a cocktail shaker half filled with ice. Shake well for 30 seconds. Pour unstrained into large glass (hurricane). And add soda. Stir breifly and serive.

name: Hot Cocoa
directions: Mix cocoa, sugar and salt in saucepan.
Stir in water.
Heat to boiling, stirring constantly.
Boil and stir for 2 minutes.
Stir in milk.
Heat just until hot (do not boil).
Serve immediately with whipped cream, marshmallows or peppermint sticks.

name: Strawberry Hibiscus-Tea Lemonade
directions: SIMPLE SYRUP:
Bring sugar and water to a boil in a small saucepan, stirring to dissolve sugar.  Let cool completely, and refrigerate for up to 1 month.
LEMONADE:
Bring water to a simmer in a small saucepan.  Remove from heat, add tea bags, and steep for 30 minutes.  Discard tea bags, and pour into a pitcher.  Let cool completely.

Combine strawberries and sugar in a heatproof bowl set over a pot of simmering water.  Heat until strawberries release their juices, about 25 minutes.  Strain through a sieve into a pitcher.  (Stir gently, but do not press strawberries, or juice will become cloudy).
Add lemon juice and simple syrup to pitcher and stir to combine.  Divide juice among ice-filled glasses, or refrigerate for up to 3 days.

name: Red, White and Blue Shooter
directions: Pour the grenadine into a shot glass.
Very slowly pour the peach schnapps over the back of a small spoon into the shot glass.
Very slowly pour the blue curaçao over the back of a small spoon into the shot glass.

name: Maple Mocktail
directions: Mix the 5 first ingredients.  Dim rim of each tall glasses in the maple sugar.
Pour the drinks in the glasses.  Garnish with cinnamon sticks.

name: Chris's Excellent Pina Coladas
directions: In blendr on med speed blend ice cream and milk. Add p. juice. Than add pineapple and concintrate. Blend well. Add Vodka. blend well. Pour into serving glasses. Top with a lg spoonful of cool whip. These are delicous without vodka as well. Makes depending on glass size about 4 - 6 glasses tall glasses.

name: Three-O Watermelon Cosmo
directions: Shake with ice and strain into a chilled martini glass. Garnish with lime.

name: Pumpkin Caipirinha
directions: Cut lime and place in a shaker with agave nectar and muddle.
Add crushed ice, Leblon Cachaca, pumpkin puree and Canton in the shaker.
Shake well and pour into an old fashioned glass.
Garnish with nutmeg, pumpkin flesh twist and lime wheel.

name: Vodka Creme Brulee Martini
directions: Mix all ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice. Strain into a chilled martini glass and garnish with vanilla stick.

name: My Version of Caramel, Salted Cocoa
directions: Heat milk in pot on low heat -- till nice and hot -- do not boil.
Mix in the bittersweet cocoa and blend well.
Add the carmel, cream and buttershot to the warmed milk and stir well.
Top with the whipped cream and sprinkle on chocolate shavings.
Next drizzle the carmel over the whipped cream and chocolate, lastly sprinkle on the salt.
Now sit back and enjoy this decadent treat.  You won't believe the flavor.

name: Electric Iced Tea
directions: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Add vodka, gin, rum, Triple Sec or Cointreau and the sweet and sour mix, in that order.
Add enough cola to almost reach the top of the glass.
Garnish with a slice of lime or lemon.

name: Strawberry Daiquiri - Sugar Free
directions: BLEND.
ENJOY.

name: Alice in Wonderland
directions: Combine all three ingredients in an old-fashioned glass.
Serve neat or on the rocks.
Note: Want it less stong? Serve on the rocks with a splash of lime juice! You could even dilute it further with a little club soda but I would not!

name: Holiday Tini
directions: In a medium pitcher blend together vodka, cranberry juice, grenadine,orange juice and lemon or lime juice.
Add about 1 cup of ice and stir to chill. Strain into two 8-ounce martini glasses. Garinish wth lemon or lime peel. This recipe can be doubled or tripled.

name: Cramosa - Variation on a Theme
directions: Pour and serve chilled.

name: Kickin' Carolina Tea
directions: Put ice cubes in glass and add the ingredients in the order listed.

Just scoop the lemonade concentrate out of the can; cover the remaining concentrate or transfer to a freezer safe container and return to the freezer to use for your next one! I'm guessing how much I used--2 to 3 teaspoons.
Adjust to your own tastes.

name: Purple People Eater
directions: Use the lime wedge to wet the rim of 2 martini glasses by rubbing it along the edges. Spread the orange crystal sugar evenly in a small plate. Overturn the glasses, then one at a time dip them in the sugar, twisting them gently until the sugar coats the rims. Turn the glasses right side up, place 1 gummy worm in each and set aside. In a cocktail shaker, combine the tequila, triple sec and Chambord. Add ice and shake well. Strain the mixture into the prepared glasses. If desired, add fresh ice to the glasses. Note: For a younger crowd, substitute fruit juices for liquor.

name: Almond Caudle
directions: Bring almonds, ale and water to boil in a large pot. Reduce heat and simmer 30 minutes. Add remaining ingredients and simmer 10 minutes longer, stirring occasionally.

name: Show Me Tha Money
directions: Share everything with ice in a shaker.
Strain in a cold martini glass.

name: Pumpkin Potion No. 9
directions: Make ginger whipped cream: in a bowl, beat the whipping cream, sugar, and ginger until peaks form; chill, covered in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
Make the potion: in a saucepan, combine the milk, sugar, pie filling, and pie spice over medium to med-high heat, stirring to dissolve the pie filling.
Continue heating until steaming but not simmering.
Remove from heat and pour into mugs.
Serve topped with dollops of ginger whipped cream.

name: Horny Toad 2
directions: blend.

name: Lime Dream Cocktail (Or Lemon)
directions: Mix everything in a blender and divide between two cocktail glasses. Garnish with orange wedges. For an added touch, you can dip the rims first in orange juice and then in sugar.

name: Holiday Coffee
directions: Pour water into coffee maker.
In the basket place coffee vanilla bean, cinnamon and cloves.
Brew.

name: Bedtime Butterscotch
directions: Add ingredients to a small cocktail glass with ice cubes, stir and enjoy.

name: Hot Spiced Tea
directions: Boil 1 quart of water and remove from heat.   Add tea bags and steep for 10 minutes.
Add tea to wine and juice.   Put mulling spices and cinnamon sticks in a cheesecloth and allow to simmer in the liquids for one hour minimum.

name: Hot Chocolate for a Crowd
directions: Bring water just to a boil and remove from heat.
Add rest of ingredients and mix thoroughly  with a wisk.

name: Spiced or " Chai " Coffee for 2
directions: NOTE: the amount of ground coffee indicated is estimated. Adjust amount according to the type of coffee maker you use. In fact, all ingredient amounts are estimated.
Place the ground coffee in the coffee maker/basket. Fill the coffee maker with water. Please try to use filtered water if possible.
Add the spices.
Brew coffee.
Sit back and enjoy!
Serving suggestion: we like our coffee with heavy cream (aka whipping cream), a little bit of unrefined cane sugar (Sucanat) or agave nectar to sweeten.

name: Charmed
directions: pour licor 43 into an espresso mug (or something small).
layer the Schnapps on top.
Then a layer of Milk.
Heat in Microwave for 30 seconds.
Sip and enjoy the warmth.

name: Minty Hot Mocha - Sugar Free
directions: Combine sugar substitute and cocoa in a medium saucepan; stir well. Add water; bring to a boil, stirring constantly. Stir in coffee granules. Gradually add milk, stirring well. Cook over medium heat 5 minutes or until mixture is thoroughly heated, stirring often.
Remove from heat, and stir in peppermint extract. Beat with a wire whisk until foamy. Serve warm. Garnish with a sugar-free peppermint stick, if desired.

name: Cafe Alpine
directions: Split the instant coffee granules and vanilla between two coffee mugs (1/2 in each mug).
In a saucepan, bring the 1 1/2 cups water to a boil.
In the meantime, in a separate saucepan, dissolve the sugar in the teaspoon of water, heating it until it reaches a low boil.
Add the boiling water to the brown sugar mixture, and stir well.
Pour equal halves of the hot sugar mixture into the 2 coffee mugs, and stir gently with a spoon.
Serve hot.

name: Rhubarb Schnapps
directions: Chop the rhubarb and divide it between two 1-liter jars. Add 3/4 cup sugar to each jar, put the lids on and shake well. Unclip the lids and pour 2 1/4 cups of vodka into each to fill.
Close the lids, put the jars somewhere cool and dark for at least 6 weeks and up to 6 months. If you remember, shake the jars every day or every other day for the first month or so.
Strain into a pitcher, then pour into a bottle.

name: Trio of Schnapps
directions: RED-CURRANT SCHNAPPS:.
Combine vodka, currants and mint in a large wide-mouth jar.  Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 week, or up to 1 month.  Serve cold.
LEMON-CORIANDER SCHNAPPS:.
Combine vodka, coriander, and lemon zest in a large wide-mouth jar.  Cover and let stand at room temperature for at least 3 days, or refrigerate up to 1 month.  Serve cold.
CHERRY-CINNAMON SCHNAPPS:.
Combine vodka, cherries and cinnamon in a large wide mouth jar.  Cover and refrigerate for at least 4 days or up to 1 month.  Serve cold.

name: Barbo's Chocochino Low Carb
directions: Mix the hot cocoa mix ,splenda, vanilla with the cream to form a thin paste.
Slowly stir in the hot ,strong coffee.
Top with a dollop of whipped cream & serve.

name: Pomegranate Champagne Cocktail
directions: Need 6 champagne flutes; pour 1 tablespoon pomegranate juice into each flute.
Add a few pomegranate seeds (they will drop to the bottom).
Pour about 4 ounces of Champagne into each flute; serve immediately.

name: Banana Split Martini
directions: Add ingredients and ice to shaker, shake until ice sounds muffled strain and pour into martini glass and garnish with cherry.

name: Coconut Chiller
directions: Add all ingredients into a shaker filled with ice.
Shake sharply.
Serve on the rocks.
Garnish with an orange wheel and coconut flakes.

name: Gingerman Cocoa
directions: Preheat a coffee mug.
Pour ingredients as listed.
Garnish with a cinnamon stick and/or whipped cream.

name: Butterscotch Candy (Mixed Drink)
directions: mix milk and shots then pour over ice.  Please note: I don't measure when mixing this drink, so it is approximated.  You may want to taste before pouring over ice.

name: Chocolate Monkey
directions: blend liqeuors with ice-cream, milk and syrup. pour into parfait glass, top with whipped cream and garnish with banana and cherry.

name: Hot Chocolate Dry Mix
directions: Stove Top: Mix cocoa and sugar and set aside (I usually make a large batch of this to keep on hand). Pour milk into a small pan. Add cocoa mixture and stir. Heat, while stirring, until steaming.
Microwave: Mix cocoa and sugar and set aside. Pour milk into a mug or cup and heat on high for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes. Remove from microwave and stir in cocoa mixture.
I've substituted Xylitol which is good but a little less intense than sugar (it doesn't raise your blood sugar).
I've also substituted soy milk for milk which was obviously fine.
I think almond milk would also be great.

name: Bama Breeze
directions: Fill a tall glass with crushed ice.
Add vodka and rum.
Squeeze lime juice into glass.
Fill with cranberry juice.
Add simple syrup to desired sweetness.
Stir.
7.  Garnish with fresh lime wedge.  Enjoy!

name: Perfect Iced Tea
directions: In a 2-quart sized saucepan, put the hot water and bring to a boil. Add the tea bags. Remove the pan from the heat and allow it to steep for 10 minutes. No more, no less. Set the timer. If the tea sits for too long, it will extract bitter elements from the tea leaves, making the finished product taste horrible. When the time is up, remove and discard the tea bags. Pour the cold water into a 2-quart sized pitcher. Pour the hot tea into the pitcher, over top of the cold water. You put the cold water in first, so as to buffer the pitcher from being melted by the boiling water. Add the sugar or honey if you like, stirring to dissolve it completely. Put the pitcher into the fridge to cool.

name: Raspberry Colada
directions: Blend briefly with a glassful of crushed ice in a pina colada glass.
Garnish with a slice of pineapple and a cherry, add straws, and serve.

name: Pomosa
directions: Place both bottles in the refrigerator for several hours or in the freezer for about 30 minutes or pour pomegranate liqueur over ice in a shaker and shake to chill. Pour into a martini glass or champagne flute.
Top with chilled champagne.
Slainte!

name: Rich and Indulgent Cocoa
directions: Mix sugar, cocoa and salt in large mug. Heat milk in microwave at HIGH (100%) 1-1/2 minutes or until hot.
Gradually add hot milk to cocoa mixture in mug, stirring until well blended. Stir in vanilla. I serving.

name: Cocoa Café Olé
directions: Combine sugar, cocoa, instant coffee and cinnamon in large saucepan. Gradually stir in milk; heat stirring occasionally, to serving temperature. Pour into mug or cup. Serve immediately.

name: Hershey's Iced Cappuccino
directions: Place syrup and coffee in blender container; cover and blend on high speed. Add ice cream; cover and blend until smooth.
Serve immediately over ice; top with whipped topping and ground cinnamon, if desired. Six 6-oz. servings.
LOWER FAT ICED CAPPUCCINO: Follow above directions using reduced fat vanilla ice cream and fat free whipped topping.

name: Caramel Chocolate Coffee
directions: Stir together.
Serve hot.

name: White Chocolate Coffee
directions: Heat the milk and chocolate together in a saucepan until melted and smooth. Stir in coffee and serve with whipped cream on top.

name: Banana Split Cappuccino
directions: In a 12-ounce cup, combine syrups and espresso.
Fill cup with steamed milk and top with whipped cream.
Garnish with cherry and sprinkle with nuts.
Serve immediately.

similar.name: Mr Coffee Banana Split Mocha Frappe

name: Chambord Royale
directions: Mix all ingredients over ice.
Shake.
Pour into a glass and garnish with a lemon, if desisred.

name: Coffee With Bailey's and Frangelico
directions: Using electric mixer, beat cream and sugar in small bowl to soft peaks. (Can be made 4 hours ahead. Cover and chill.).
Pour 2 tablespoons Frangelico and 2 tablespoons Baileys liqueur into each of 4 mugs.
Pour coffee over, dividing evenly.
Top each with dollop of whipped cream and serve immediately.

name: Deep Red Apple Cider (Crock-Pot)
directions: Combine all ingredients in slow cooker.
Cover.
Cook on low 3-4 hours.
Remove cloves, allspice, and cinnamon before serving.
Variation:	You can use 8 cups apple cider and no red wine.

similar.name: Warm Slow Cooker or Crock Pot Cider

name: Bourbon Daisy
directions: Fill mixing glass with ice.
Add bourbon, southern comfort, lemon juice and grenadine.
Shake.
Strain into a collins glass.
Add ice.
Top with club soda.
Garnish with a pineapple spear or a cherry and an orange slice.

name: Fireworks
directions: Fill mixing glass with ice.
Add vodka, light rum, tequila, pineapple juice, cream of coconut, milk and grenadine.
Shake well.
Strain into a collins glass half filled with ice.
garnish with a cherry.

name: Chocolate Whipped Cream
directions: In a chilled bowl, whip cream until it begins to thicken.
Add sugar and cocoa.
Continue whipping until soft peaks form.
Store covered in the refrigerator if not using immediately.

name: Madra
directions: Mix together and enjoy!

name: Blue-Tail Fly
directions: Put all into a blender and blend until smooth.
Serve in a wine glass.

name: Mexican Milkshake
directions: Put all in a blender and blend until smooth.
Serve in a wine glass.

name: Jasmine-Tea Tangerineade
directions: Bring water to simmer in a small saucepan.  Remove from heat, add jasmine pearls, and infuse for 2 1/2 minutes.  Strain through a small sieve into a pitcher.  Discard pearls.  Let cool.
Add syrup and tangerine juice to pitcher.  Divide tangerineade among ice-filled glasses (or cover and refrigerate for up to 3 days).
SIMPLE SYRUP:.
Bring sugar and water to a boil in a small saucepan, stirring to dissolve sugar.  Let cool completely, and refrigerate for up to 1 month.

similar.name: Green Jasmine-Mint Iced Tea With Lemon

name: Soothing and Relaxing Green Tea
directions: Put the tea bags in a pre-warmed teapot and set aside.
Place the lemon zest and giner in a 4 cup heatproof measuring cup and add boiling water. Let infuse for 2 minutes.
Quickly pour the infusion into the teapot. Steep the tea in the spice infusion for 2 more minutes.
Add honey or sugar to taste.

name: Pumpkin Pie Latte
directions: In a small saucepan, whisk together all ingredients and simmer over medium heat, stirring occasionally for 10 minutes.
Serve immediately.

name: Rum Royal Eggnog
directions: In a small punch bowl, combine eggnog, ice cream, coffee and rum flavoring.
Top with whipped cream and a dash of nutmeg.

If you want to use regular rum instead of extract, here's the conversion.  1 tsp rum extract = 3 tbsp rum/to taste    The ratio of light rum will be closer to 4 tbsp while dark rum requires less, closer to 2 tablespoons.

name: Nick and Nora Martini
directions: Pour gin and vermouth into a mixing glass filled with ice, and stir well. Strain into a chilled martini glass, garnish with an olive, and serve.

name: Citrus Rum Collins
directions: Place the lime wedges in the bottom of a highball glass. Add the sugar and muddle the limes with the sugar (crush the limes and sugar together).
Pour in the citrus rum and stir well. Fill glass with ice.
Top up with club soda.
Stir gently.
Garnish with additional lime slices if desired.

name: Cinnamon Toast Crunch
directions: In a moderately sized glass (about 8 to 12 oz or so) pour in finely crushed ice, followed by the cinnamon schnapps and vanilla vodka.

name: Three-Citrus Iced Green Tea (Art Smith)
directions: Bring 2 quarts water to a boil in a large pot; remove from heat and add the tea bags; steep 20 minutes.
Slice 1 orange, 1 lemon, and 1 lime into thin rounds.
Squeeze and strain the juice from the remaining orange, lemon, and lime.
Stir the citrus juices into the brewed tea.
Pour the tea into a pitcher and stir in the sugar/artificial sweetener to taste, until dissolved.
Stir in the citrus slices; refrigerate the tea until chilled, at least 2 hours.
Serve tea over ice, garnished with a mint sprig.

similar.name: Iced Green Tea w. Orange Essence
Peach and Mint Iced Tea ( Adult)

name: Chocolate-Orange Martini
directions: Prepare a chilled cocktail glass by dipping the rim in chocolate syrup on a plate.
Combine the remainig ingredients in a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake thoroughly.
Strain into your cocktail glass and serve.

name: Blue Cowboy
directions: In a mixing glass half-filled with crushed ice, combine both of the ingredients. Stir well. Strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Eggnog Hot Chocolate
directions: Use a double boiler to melt chopped Unsweetened Baking Chocolate over a medium/low heat.
Once the Unsweetened Baking Chocolate is completely melted, add Egg Nog and Milk.  Bring to a simmer (do not boil).
Whisk in Cocoa Powder, Ground Nutmeg and Vanilla.
Continue to stir mixture until smooth and heated through.
Pour the thick mixture in to a mug, garnish, as desired, and serve.

name: Lemonade Syrup Recipe
directions: Bring to a boil in a saucepan until the sugar completely dissolved.

Put about 4 tablespoons in to a glass, add ice and then water. (You may have to play just a bit with the final proportion of syrup or water, but it's really, really good.)  Or you can use this for your lemonade based coctails.
The syrup will keep for a week or two in the fridge or it can be frozen in ice cube trays and then removed to zip locks (they don't freeze really hard) and used.

name: Caramel Apple Shot
directions: Measure into an ice filled cocktail shaker.
Shake and strain into a shot glass.
Serve.

name: Mojitos
directions: muddle first three ingredients.
add rum.
Fill glass with ice cubes.
Fill half the glass with lime juice mixture.
Fill half the glass with club soda.

name: Southern Kiss
directions: Measure and pour into a short glass.
Stir if desired.

name: Gin Gimlet
directions: mix, shake with ice, strain and drink.

name: Shawn's Royal Flush
directions: in a 32oz pitcher fill half way with ice.
pour in all liquors then fill pitcher with cranberry juice
stirr and serve in 8 oz glasses.

name: Chamomile Honey Green Tea
directions: Put the tea bags in a pre warmed tea pot and add hot water. Allow to infuse for 2-4 minutes.
Add the honey to the pot and stir.

name: Butter Beer (Alcoholic)
directions: Toss some ice in a glass.
Pour in a shot (1.5 oz) of butterscotch schnapps.
Pour in a can (12 oz) of cream soda.
Top with 1 or 2 tbsp of cream.
Swirl together and enjoy!

name: Candy Cane Hot Cocoa Mix
directions: Crush Candy Canes (add a little powdered sugar if you are crushing them in a food processor).
Combine crushed candy canes, sugar, creamer and cocoa and mix well.
Place in jars.
Add 1/4 cup mix to a mug of hot water.
Enjoy!

name: Citrus Power Drink
directions: In glass pitcher or jug, combine sugar and salt. Pour in boiling water and stir to dissolve.
Add orange juice, lemon juice, and cold water. Stir to mix. Cover and refrigerate. Stir before serving. Can be kept in the refrigerator up to 1 week.

name: White Cranberry Vodka Cocktail
directions: Combine all ingredients except garnish in a tall glass with ice. Garnish with lemon twist.

name: Homemade Mocha Mix
directions: Put all ingredients in a bowl and mix thoroughly.
Store in an airtight container.
For an individual cup, put 1/4 cup of the mix in a 10-12 oz mug with hot water.
Stir and enjoy!

similar.name: Sugar Free Orange Mocha (Mock Starbucks Mocha Valencia) Mix

name: Happy Apple Cocktail
directions: Place the first four ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice and shake together well.
Strain into a sling glass half filled with cubed ice. Top up with ginger ale.

similar.name: Brian's Green Apple Sweet Tart Cocktail

name: Irrational Exuberance
directions: Combine gin, Cointreau, lemon and orange juices and grenadine in a cocktail shaker filled with ice. Shake as though the good times will never end, strain into a chilled cocktail glass, and top with chilled champagne to taste.

name: Downhill Racer
directions: Shake with cubed ice and strain over crushed ice.

name: Tequila Paralizer
directions: In a large chilled glass, add your ice cubes, tequila and kahlua add milk, stir and top with coke.
Sit back, close your eyes and enjoy, remember this isn't a milkshake and it has a great kick.

name: Freezy-Cool Lemon Slushie
directions: Dissolve creamer in 1/4 cup warm water, and mix well. Add 1 1/4 cups cold water and Crystal Light. Mix well. Place mixture in a blender with the ice. Blend at high speed until thoroughly blended. (If using ice cubes, start with half of the ice. Stop blending occasionally to add a cube or two, and then continue blending -- repeat until desired consistency is reached.)

Pour into a tall glass, and then spoon and/or sip your way to lemon satisfaction! (Pssst --  for an even slushier and less liquidy consistency, place in the freezer for about 20 minutes before enjoying!).

name: Isle of Pines
directions: Bring pomegranate juice and sguar to a boil in a heavy saucepan, stirring until sugar dissolves.  Boil until reduced to 1/4 cup, about 5 minutes.  Cool syrup.
Pour 2 Tablespoons syrup, 1/2 cup rum, and 1/4 cup grapefruit juice into cocktail shaker.  Fill with ice, shake vigorously.  Strain into 2 martini glasses.
Repeat to make 2 more drinks.

name: Schuylkill River Punch
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker with ice.
Add all of the remaining ingredients except the orange wedge and cherry and shake well.
Strain into an ice-filled highball glass.
Garnish with the orange and cherry.

name: Mocha Cream Liqueur
directions: Put all ingredients in blender anc cover tightly. Blend on high speed until the mixture is well blended and smooth.
Serve in small glasses over crushed ice. Also excellent in coffee or chai tea.
Store in a tightly covered container in the refrigerator for up to two weeks. Make sure to stir or shake thoroughly before serving.
Makes an excellent gift!

name: Pomegranate Sour
directions: Combine whiskey,pomegranate juice, lemon juice and sugar in an ice-filled cocktail shaker and shake until well chilled. Pour into an Old Fashioned glass filled with ice and garnish with lemon slice.

name: Celtic Homemade Irish Cream
directions: Blend all ingredients together and keep refrigerated.
Discard unused mixture after 1 week.

name: Instant  Sugar-Free Spiced Chai Mix
directions: In a food processor, combine all ingredients; cover and process til powdery.  Store in an airtight container in a cool dry place for up to 6 months.
To prepare 1 serving, dissolve 3 Tablespoons of mix in 3/4 cup boiling water.  Dollop with whipped cream if desired.
Alternately to use less, brew a Chai Tea bag and add 1+Tablespoons of mix.
Comments:  I no longer use powdered coffee cream, so I substituted powdered coconut milk and some vanilla powder.

similar.name: Chai Tea Mix in a Jar
Chai Tea Mix Gift in a Jar

name: Cinnamon Coffee Cocoa
directions: In bowl mix all ingredients.
Place in sealed container for up to six months.
To Use: Add 2-3 tbs to a large mug of hot water.

name: Spiced up Yuletide Coffee
directions: In a small pan, add the water, cloves, cinnamon (broken up),cardamom, and sugar.
Heat up to the boiling point for 3-4 minutes.
Mix the coffee and the spice mixture, pour into cups and top with whipped cream.
Sprinkle with the chocolate and cinnamon.
Add more sugar if desired.

similar.name: Spiced Coffee With Brandied Whipped Cream

name: Citrus Spiced Coffee
directions: Place lemon peels, orange peels, and cloves in bottom of a coffee filter.
Place the coffee grounds on top and then brew the coffee.
Sweeten with the brown sugar or adjust to taste.

name: Buttered Rhumba Coffee
directions: Place ground coffee, nutmeg, and extracts in a plastic resealable bag.
Seal and shake well to blend.
To prepare, place the coffee mixture in a paper filter and pour 4 cups hot water through the filter.
Sweeten as you wish. .

name: White Chocolate Martini II
directions: Dip the rim of a martini glass in the melted white chocolate until completely covered; let cool and set aside.
If serving with strawberries, dip them into the melted white chocolate.
Combine the creme de cacao, vanilla vodka, light cream, white chocolate liqueur, and Licor 43 in a cocktail shaker filled with ice; shake moderately.
Strain into prepared martini glass; garnish with dipped strawberry.

name: Yellowbird (Cocktail)
directions: To a drink shaker, Mix the first 5 ingredients and shake well.
Strain (or pour) into a cocktail glass and if desired, top with a splash of soda. Garnish with lemon slice and serve.

name: True Love (Cocktail)
directions: Shake the liquids together in a shaker filled with ice.
Serve in a Collins glass. Garnish with 2 cherries.

name: Raspberry and Lime Margaritas
directions: Cut limes in half.
Cut 1 wedge from 1 lime and juice remaining halves. (you will need 2 Tbs of lime juice).
Place salt on plate.  Rub rims of glasses with lime wedge.  Lightly dip each glass in the salt.
Blend lime juice, raspberries and sugar until smooth. Strain into jug.
Clean blender.
Return mixture to blender.  Add tequlia, triple sec and ice.
Blend until slushy.
Pour into prepared glasses.

name: Wally's Spiced Chai Tea
directions: Brew in a 30 cup percolator or large pot.   Combine water, tea bags, orange, lemon, cinnamon, allspice, and cloves.
When finished brewing, add vanilla, sugar,  and coffee creamer.

similar.name: Chai Tea Mix Gift in a Jar

name: Satsuma-Cello
directions: Use a Microplane or other zester to remove the rind only from the satsumas. Do not get any of the white pith, which is bitter. Reserve satsuma juice for another use. (suggests mimosas.)

Place zest in an airtight container and cover with the grain alcohol. Steep in a dark place for about a week, swirling occasionally. When zest turns white, the oil is fully infused. Strain into a large pitcher through a coffee filter placed in a strainer, which should catch any small zest pieces and tiny impurities.

Make a simple syrup by combining the water and sugar in a small saucepan and heating until the sugar is completely dissolved. Let cool. Add to the infused alcohol and stir. Bottle in airtight containers. Store in the freezer.

name: Cafe Mocha
directions: Add all ingredietns into a shaker filled with crushed ice and shake sharply. Strain into a frosted martini glass.
Garnish with a sugared rim and three coffee beans.

name: Mistletoe Martini
directions: Pour the ingredients into a cocktail shaker with ice.
Shake well.
Strain into two chilled cocktail glasses.

name: Vodka Caramel-Apple Cider
directions: In a saucepan, bring the apple juice, cinnamon, and caramel syrup to a boil.
Reduce heat, and add vodka.
Let simmer for 5-7 minutes
Serve in a mug.
Top off with whipped cream, another dash of cinnamon, and/or caramel sauce, if you prefer.
Enjoy your hot, relaxing beverage!
