** If beverage is too sweet, omit the caramel syrup and have a vodka-apple-cider-sans-caramel instead!

name: Beefeater French 75
directions: Shake the gin, lime juice, and sugar with ice cubes.
Strain and pour into a Champagne flute.
Pour Champagne on top.
Garnish with a lemon twist.

name: Frozen Mango Colada
directions: In shallow metal cake pan, stir together mango and pineapple juices, coconut rum, granulated sugar and lime juice; freeze until firm, about 4 hours. (Make-ahead: Cover and freeze for up to 3 days.).
Scrape into blender; pulse until smooth. Garnish each serving with pineapple.

name: Mango Mama
directions: In blender, blend together ice cubes, mango citrus concentrate, vodka, mango liqueur and 1/4 cup (50 mL) water until smooth and thickened.

name: Mocha Java
directions: Pour coffee into 3-quart saucepan; stir in cocoa mix and sugar until dissolved. Add half and half. Cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until heated through (3 to 4 minutes).
Dollop each serving with whipped cream; sprinkle with chocolate shavings, if desired.

name: Mata Hari Liquid Strudel
directions: Combine ingredients in a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake thoroughly.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with a small wedge of lime.

name: Black Currant Mango Iced Tea
directions: Place tea bags, mint and lime in large measuring cup or teapot; cover with boiling water and steep for 10 minutes.
Strain into large pitcher. Stir in SPLENDA® Granulated until dissolved.
Stir in mango juice; serve over ice.

similar.name: Peach and Mint Iced Tea ( Adult)

name: Frappe Coffee
directions: In a blender or cocktail shaker, dissolve the coffee in the
hot water.
Add the remaining ingredients and blend or
shake until very frothy.
Pour into a cold glass and serve
immediately.

name: Grape Breeze
directions: Shake all ingredients together and strain inot a glass with ice.

name: Grape Martini
directions: Pour ingredients into a cocktail shaker and shake. Strain into a martini cocktail glass.
Garnish with a cherry at the bottom, and serve.

name: Cran-Grape Cocktail
directions: If serving over ice, pour vodka in glass first then the juice then the soda.
If serving as a martini, cut ingredients in half and shake together with ice and strain into martini glass.

name: Caramel Eggnog
directions: In a medium saucepan, combine sugar, 2 tablespoons water, and lemon juice.  Place remaining 4 tablespoons water near stove.  Bring sugar mixture to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly; cook for 5 minutes or until mixture is dark amber in color; remove from heat.

Gradually and carefully add water to sugar mixture or it may spatter.  Stir until sugar mixture is dissolved.  In a large bowl, whisk together eggs and milk.  Stir in caramel mixture.  Cook over medium-low heat for about 12 minutes or until mixture coats back of spoon.  Immediately strain through a cheesecloth into a 6-cup bowl.  Stir in vanilla, nutmeg and salt.

Cover and refrigerate until chilled.  Just before serving , beat together whipping cream, liqueur, if desired, and icing sugar until soft peaks form.  pour chilled eggnog int 2 quart serving bowl.  Fold in whipped cream with whisk.
Sprinkle nutmeg on top if desired.
TIP:  For a hit of holiday spirit, add dark rum to taste.  Eggnog can be prepared ahead of time.  It can be kept covered, 3-4 days in the refrigerator.
Whisk eggnog before serving.

name: Wine Reduction - Frozen Cubes
directions: Heat wine to a boil in a large non-aluminum pot.
Reduce heat to medium; cook uncovered over medium heat until the wine is reduced to about 4 cups, about 90 minutes. Remove from heat.
Cool for 30 minutes; refrigerate at least one hour.
Pour reduced wine into plastic cube trays; freeze.
Transfer frozen cubes into freezer bags.
Can be frozen up to 12 months.

2/7/09: *Please note, to further clarify, once the wine has been reduced, 1 cube measures  approximately 2-3T =  the equivalent of 1C - 1/2 C wine prior to wine reduction.  Wine  reduction results in  the full flavor of the wine without having to go through the process each time your recipe requires wine.

name: Vulcan Mind Probe/Mind Meld
directions: Mix ingredients and serve straight up in a shot glass.

name: Wild Honey Cosmo
directions: Mix ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice. Shake well and strain into martini glass. Add splash of lemon. Garnish with lemon twist.

name: Spiced Chai Mix
directions: In a food processor, combine all dry ingredients; cover and process until powdery. Store in an airtight container in a cool dry place for up to 6 months.
To prepare 1 serving: Dissolve 3 Tbs of mix in 3/4 cup boiling water; stir well.
Dollop with whipped cream if desired.

similar.name: Chai Tea Mix in a Jar
Chai Tea Mix Gift in a Jar

name: Swedish Fish Shot (Adult Beverage)
directions: Shake everything with ice and strain into shot glasses.

name: Apple Jolly Rancher Cocktail
directions: In a shaker with ice combine first three ingredients, and shake vigorously.
In two tom collins glasses, strain liquor over ice.
Top with soda (about 3 shots per glass, or as desired).
Stir lightly and enjoy!

name: Jamaican Paradise
directions: Pour over ice and stir.

name: Pomegranate and Lime Cocktails
directions: Combine sugar and 1/4 cup water in a small saucepan; bring to a boil. Reduce heat, and simmer 2 minutes or just until sugar dissolves. Remove from heat; cool.

Combine sugar syrup, club soda, pomegranate juice, vodka, and lime juice. Place crushed ice in a martini shaker; add about 3/4 cup pomegranate mixture. Cover and shake. Strain into a glass. Garnish with lime slice, if desired. Repeat procedure with remaining pomegranate mixture.

name: Pineapple-Rum Slush
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large plastic pitcher; cover and freeze at least 4 hours or until slushy.
Note: Substitute orange juice for rum, if desired.

name: Gingerbread Men (The Drink)
directions: Make the syrup: in a small bowl, mix the molasses, brown sugar, baking soda, and spices together; cover and refrigerate for at least 10 minutes.
Pour ½ cup coffee and 1 tablespoon gingerbread syrup into each of 4 mugs, stirring until the syrup dissolves.
Add 1 tablespoon half-and-half and an additional ½ cup coffee to each mug.
Serve with a dollop of whipped cream and a dusting of ground cloves (or whatever spice you like).

name: Chai Tea Mix Gift in a Jar
directions: Mix milk powder, non-dairy creamers, sugar, instant tea,ginger,cinnmon,cloves,cardamon,nutmeg and allspice.
Blend 1 cup at a time in a food processor until mixture is the consistency of fine powder.
Store in an airtight container.
To serve: Stir 3 tablespoons Chai Tea Mixture into a cup of hot water.
For an extra caffine punch; add an additional 1 teaspoons instant tea or add Chai Tea Mix to your cup of brewed tea.
Oh --  yea, relaxation time my friends.

similar.name: Chai Tea Mix in a Jar

name: Mammy's Float
directions: Heat milk in the top of a double boiler until warm.
Add sugar and eggs.
Stir an mix well.

Cook until custard thickens and coats a spoon. (It will curdle it over cooked.However if this should happen you can make it smooth again by using a rotary beater of and on again while custard cools.).
Do not add any flavoring until custard is almost cool.

name: Ultimate Chocolate Martini
directions: Wet the rim of a martini glass with Godiva chocolate liqueur; dip the rim in sweetened cocoa powder several times to ensure complete coverage; set aside.
Combine the chocolate liqueur, vanilla vodka, light cream, and melted chocolate in a cocktail shaker filled with ice; shake vigorously; strain into prepared martini glass.

name: Chestnut Eggnog
directions: With a blender, immersion blender or hand mixer, beat eggs until frothy.
Combine remaining ingredients together in a heavy bottom saucpan over medium-low heat.  Stir occasionally until steaming hot.
Whisk one cup of the hot milk mixture into the beaten eggs.

Beat milk/egg mixture into remaining hto milk.  Cook, whisking continously for 5 minutes, ensuring the milk is steaming hot (at least160F) but do not allow to boil, or eggs may begin to set.  If this happens, simply use a hand mixer or blender to puree until smooth.  Remove from heat.  Serve or transfer to a shallow container and refrigerate immediately.  Use within three days.
Serve cold or hot.  For a foamy top, whisk vigorously before serving.  Garnish as desired.

name: Peach Liqueur
directions: Rinse peaches, dry, slice and peel.
Put into big jar, sprinkle with sugar. Wait few days (fruit must give juice). Then add alcohol and vodka.
Close jar tightly.  Wait 2-3 weeks. Strain liquid to remove any pulp
Pour into a blender anad puree.
Then pour into clean bottle and close tightly.

name: Island Twist
directions: Rim a wide mouth glass with lime and shredded coconut.
Fill glass with ice.
Add, vodka,cranberry juice and rum.
Stir to mix.
Garnish with pineapple spear or lime wedge.

name: Praline Prancers
directions: Rim the martini glasses (optional): combine equal parts Frangelico and amaretto; dip edges of 4 martini glasses in the combined liqueurs; rim them with brown sugar.
The drink: combine 6 ounces Frangelico and 6 ounces amaretto, 2 tablespoons brown sugar and 2 tablespoons butter in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Stir until the butter has melted and the sugar has dissolved.
Continue heating until the mixture is warm but not hot.
Remove from heat, pour into rimmed martini glasses, and serve.

name: Peach Mojitos
directions: Squeeze juice from the lime into blender.
Add peach slices, sugar, juice and rum; blend until smooth. Add crushed ice and pulse until combined. Pulse in mint leaves.
Pour into 2 chilled glasses. Add a splash of soda to each drink and garnish with peach slices and mint leaves.

name: Ginger Saketini
directions: Add ginger to the bottled sake and refrigerate overnight.
Fill a martini shaker halfway with ice. Add 1 cup ginger-infused sake and shake until well chilled.
Strain sake into 4 martini glasses; stir in 3 tablespoons ginger ale per glass. Repeat to make 8 drinks.
Garnish each glass with a lemon twist and a strip of crystallized ginger on each rim.

name: Hazelnut Hot Chocolate Liqueur
directions: COMBINE water, Coffee-mate and cocoa in pitcher; stir until dissolved. Stir in coffee liqueur and hazelnut liqueur. Divide between 2 mugs; top with whipped cream.

similar.name: Hot Chocolate With Assorted Syrup Stir-Ins

name: Mary's Quick With a Kick Margaritas
directions: Whip up all ingredients in a blender till smooth. Enjoy!

name: Jackie's Marvelous and Easy Pineapple Punch
directions: In a gallon-sized Ziploc bag, mix pineapple juice, sugar, and extract. (Seal bag and shake to mix.).
Freeze until hardened in bag. To serve, thaw for 30 minutes and mix into ginger ale.

name: Chocolate Banana Espresso Cooler
directions: Dissolve splenda in hot espresso and add extracts. Chill until it reaches room temperature.
Add milk.
Place ice, coffee, and cocoa in blender and mix until drink is smooth.

name: Ultimate Hot Chocolate
directions: Combine all ingredients in a medium saucepan and place over low heat. Stir regularly to prevent burning the chocolate. A whisk will provide the best results. Hot chocolate is ready when the chocolate chips have melted completely and the mixture has reached your desired temperature.

name: Gingerbread Simple Syrup
directions: Combine sugar and water in pot.  Cook over medium-high heat until sugar dissolves.
Add ginger and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to medium-low and add cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves.  Simmer for 15-20 minutes.
Transfer to a bowl and cool to room temperature (about two hours).
Strain out ginger, pour into a bottle, and refrigerate.

similar.name: Ginger Ale Ginger Soda Ginger Pop

name: Gingerbread Martini
directions: Shake vodka, cream, and simple syrup over ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with cinnamon stick and a dash of nutmeg.
Enjoy!

name: Peppermint Patty
directions: Combine in shker with ice.  Shake and strain.  Serve in a cocktail glass rimmed with crushed peppermint candies.

name: Cafe Boheme Mochachino Martini
directions: Combine Cafe Boheme, vanilla vodka, and ice in cocktail shaker.
Line chilled martini glass with chocolate syrup and shaker contents.
Top with whipped cream and a drizzle of chocolate syrup.

name: Berry Blast Cocktail
directions: Shake ingredients in a cocktail shaker.
Pour into glass filled with ice.

name: King James Martini
directions: Shake ingredients over ice in a cocktail shaker.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with a slice of lime.

name: Pumpkin Frappuccino
directions: Dissolve sugar and syrup in hot espresso.
Add milk and refridgerate until cold.
Put ice in blender and crush until mostly broken up.
Add cooled coffee, pumpkin, and pie spice if using.
Blend on high for 1 minute or until smooth.

name: Eggnog
directions: Beat eggs.  Add cream, sugar and nutmeg.  Blend in blender until frothy.  Serve with a fruit garnish.

name: Coco Candy Cane Drink Recipe
directions: Put ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Shake well.
Rim a martini glass with crushed candy canes.
Strain in to glass either straight up or over crushed ice.
Garnish by hanging a small candy cane over the edge of the glass.

name: Almond's Joy
directions: Shake ingredients over ice in a cocktail shaker.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with shredded coconut.

name: Fat Free Frozen Hot Chocolate
directions: Dissolve hot cocoa, chocolate syrup and Splenda in hot water.
Add light soy milk, and Torani syrup.
Pour into blender.
Add a cup of ice cubes (5-7).
Blend on the highest speed for about 45 seconds.
Pour into a tall mug.
Top with a squirt of Fat Free Reddi Whip!

name: The Greenie Mar-Tea-Ni
directions: Place Green Tea tea bags into a measuring cup and add 1¼ cups boiling water.
Let brew for 3 minutes.
Remove tea bags.
Add sugar and stir until it dissolves.
Chill.
To make a martini, take two ounces of the cooled sweet tea and mix it with one ounce of the vodka. Shake with ice and strain into a martini glass. Garnish with a twist of lemon.

similar.name: Green Tea With Indian Chai Spices

name: Happiness in a Cup Hot Chocolate
directions: In a crock pot, add chocolate and cream. Turn crock pot on high and stir every few minutes, until all the chocolate is melted.
Add sugar and allow to fully dissolve. This can be made fairly low carb by replacing the sugar with a substitute.
Add milk and star anise and let heat. Once the chocolate is smooth, add the Schnapps. Stir and lower heat to low. Let flavors merge for at least five minutes.
Remove anise. Serve.
1/2 cup Schnappes is 2 T per serving --  adjust accordingly :).

name: Barbara's Margarita on the Rocks
directions: Just combine, stir add ice cubes and enjoy!
Do not drink and drive or walk!

name: Sour Patch Kid
directions: Pour sour mix, coconut rum, sweetened lime juice, cherry juice and grenadine over ice, and stir gently.
Top up with 7-Up and serve garnished with a cherry.

name: Ttj's Virgin Pear Daiquiri
directions: Peel, quarter, and core pear before placing it into your blender. Slice off a wedge from your lime- trust me, you're going to need this later- and juice the rest of the lime. Pour the juice into the blender with the pear slices and add the sugar. Blend until the entire mix is in liquid form.
Shake with cracked ice, strain into a glass of your choice, and garnish with a lime wedge.
It does wonders for the taste of the drink if you slide the garnish around the rim of the glass between drinks.

name: Black Cat Bitters
directions: Place artichoke leaves in a glass bottle and fill with vodka.
Allow to steep for 5 days.
Add grapefriut peel, juniper berries, nutmeg, clove, cardamom.
Allow to steep until mature, about 3 weeks.
Cooking time includes maturation.

name: Eggnog
directions: In a saucepan over low heat, blend the milk, cinnamon, cloves and half a teaspoon of the vanilla essence.
Keep stirring while mixture heats, and remove from heat just before boiling point. Once the mixture hits about 205 degrees -- pay close attention --- you are just about there.
In a bowl, mix together the sugar and egg yolks.
Make sure you whisk them well so that they're light and fluffy.
Gently and a little at a time, pour in the milk mixture while continuing to whisk.
Transfer mixture back into your saucepan over a medium heat while continuing to stir.
Keep stirring until your eggnog mixture until you hit 165 degrees and then take the thing off the heat and out of the saucepan ASAP!
Pour and strain the mixture into a jug, making sure to remove the cloves.
Stand jug in the fridge for an hour or two.
Gently stir in the cream, light rum, remaining vanilla and ground nutmeg.
Put back into the fridge overnight.
Serve in cups with a little extra ground nutmeg, cinnamon or baking cocoa sprinkled lightly on top.

name: Long Island Iced Tea
directions: Pour first six ingredients in shaker with ice.
Shake and pour into glass.
Add coke. Stir.

name: Chocolate Eggnog
directions: With a blender, immersion blender or hand mixer, beat eggs until frothy.
In large saucepan over medium-low heat, whisk cocoa powder with 1 cup milk until dissolved.  Whisk in remaining milk and sweetened condensed milk.  Stir occasionally until steaming hot.  Do not boil.
Whisk one cup of the hot milk mixture into the baten eggs.

Beat milk/egg mixture into remaining hot milk.  Cook, whisking continuously for 5 minutes, ensuring the milk is steaming hot (at least 160F) but do not allow to boil, or eggs may begin to set.  If this happens, simply use a hand mixer or blender to puree until smooth.  Remove from heat.  Serve or transfer to a shallow container and refrigerate immediately.  Use within 3 days.
Serve cold or hot.  For a foamy top, whisk vigorously before serving.  Garnish as desired.

name: Orange Milk
directions: Add all liquids in pitcher.
Slowly add sugar while stirring.
Pour into 4-6 drinks.
Add whipped cream on top of drinks!

name: Eggnog Lattes
directions: Heat eggnog in medium saucepan on medium for about 5 minutes,stirring occasionally,until hot but not boiling.
Remove from heat.
Add coffee.
Stir.
Divide liquer among 4 large mugs.
Ladle eggnog mixture into each.
Sprinkle with cinnamon and nutmeg.

similar.name: Hot Bailey's Irish Cream Chocolate Drink

name: Red Roosters
directions: Stir together first 3 ingredients in a large pitcher.  Serve over ice.  Garnish, if desired.

name: Simple Bacardi Cocktail
directions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine all of the ingredients. Shake well. Strain into a cocktail glass.

name: A Secret Ingredient to Southern Style "sweet Tea"
directions: On your stove top bring water to boil, with the tea bags.
Once it reaches a boil, remove from heat & let stand to brew for a few minutes.
Remove bags.
Add sugar, (add gradually, taste until you have it the way you like it).
Return to heat until sugar is completely dissolved (just a minute or so).
Add ice, put into container, pour, (or put into container, then add ice, then poor lol).
Enjoy!

similar.name: Perfect Sweet Tea (Secret of the South)

name: Candy Bar (Adult Beverage)
directions: Blend liqueurs and add cream.
Serve over ice cubes in highball glass.

name: Chocolate Heart (Adult Beverage)
directions: Add a few ice cubes to a highball glass. Pour in liqueurs and drop in a couple maraschino cherries (I add a little of the cherry juice, too). Pour the cream down the sides of the glass and stir lightly before serving.
You can also hold the cherries out, top with whipped cream and cherries.

name: Cherry Brandy Cocktail
directions: Pour vodka, cherry brandy, dry vermouth, Campari and creme de bananes into a mixing glass half-filled with ice cubes. Stir well, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

name: Delicious Beer Cocktail
directions: Pour Corona into a glass over ice.
Add vodka and lime juice.
Stir and enjoy!  (Salting the rim is recommended!).

name: Sunkist Cremesicle
directions: Pour the cream into a pint glass.
If you want, put some ice cubes in next to make it cooler.
Pour the sunkist in and stir it up until it is well blended.
Drink and enjoy.

name: Kahlua Latte
directions: Pour Kahlua, Vodka, milk and coffee into a glass.  Stir or shake.
Pour over ice and serve.
Kick yourself for not making a double batch.

name: Cucumber Tomato Smash Cocktail
directions: Cut 4 thin slice from cucumber; reserve for garnish.  Slice remaining cucumber and transfer to a large pitcher; add parsley, vodka, Worcestershire sauce, lemon juice and pepper.  Crush contents using a heavy wooden spoon or mojito muddler.
Stir in Heinz Tomato Juice; chill for 1 hour to infuse flavours.  Strain juice into ice-filled glasses.  Garnish with reserved cucumber slices.  Makes 4 servings.
TWISTS:.
TWIST 1:  For a refreshing, sodium-free, cocktail that's suitable for kids, seiniors and everyone in between, use Heinz Tomato Juice, 50% less salt, and omit the vodka.
TWIST 2:  For a lower-sodium cocktail, use Heinz Tomato Juice 50% less salt.
TWIST 3:  For an herbal variation, try crushing fresh basil, dill or mint instead of parsley.
TWIST 4:  For an alcohol variation, use gin instead of vodka.

similar.name: Victory's Kicked up Tomato Juice Cocktail

name: Pomegranate Champagne Martini
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker with ice. Add pomegranate juice, vodka and orange-flavored liquor; shake 10 seconds.
Strain into large martini glass; top with champagne. Garnish with orange peel.

name: Dooley's Cadillac
directions: Add the first three ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake and strain into a martini glass.
Garnish with chocolate shavings and/or mint if desired.

name: Sweet Hot Buttered Rum
directions: Mix first 7 ingredients into crockpot.
Cover cook on low 5 hours.
Stir in Rum
To serve pour into cup top with whipped cream and nutmeg.

name: Long Island Iced Tea
directions: Place ice in a glass, add vodka, tequila, Bacardi, gin, and Cointreau, one after the other.
Add juice and syrup, top with cola, stir.
Serve in a 300ml highball glass, and garnish with a twist of lemon rind, mint leaves, swizzle stick, and a straw.

name: Slimers
directions: Depending on your glass size and taste of course you can add more or less rum. I like my drink a little stronger so I usually use 3 shots (about 6 ounces).
Fill glass with ice (leaving room to stir).
Add rum and pineapple juice.
Stir Well.
Drizzle Midouri over the top and serve.
You can use more Midouri for a heavier slime effect.
You can also sugar the rim for a coctail look too.

name: Gingered Gin and Tonic
directions: Combine first 3 ingredients in heavy small saucepan over medium heat. Stir until sugar dissolves. Increase heat and boil until reduced to 1 1/3 cups, about 3 minutes. Cool syrup; then strain. (Can be made 1 week ahead. Cover; chill.)

Mix tonic water, gin, lime juice and 1/2 cup ginger syrup in glass measuring cup. Taste, adding more syrup, if desired (reserve remaining syrup for another use). Divide ice among 4 tall glasses. Pour gin-and-tonic mixture over. Garnish with fresh ginger slices and lime wedges, if desired.

name: Melon Granita
directions: Puree melon in food processor.  Add sugar and lime juice, pulse until sugar is dissolved.
Pour into shallow metal baking pan.  Freeze about 2 hours, stirring every hour, mixing ice crystals into middle.
Let granita stand for   5 minutes at room temperature.  Scrape into chilled glasses and serve at once.

name: World's Easiest Pina Colada Rum Martini
directions: Shake  over ice.
Pour into chilled glass.
Garnish with a slice of pineapple if desired.

similar.name: World's Easiest Pina Colada Rum Drink - in a Martini Glass

name: Depths of Sin Hot Chocolate
directions: in a blender, combine milk, cream, banana, cinnamon and salt.  Puree until very smooth and thick,  Pour milk mixture into a small saucepan and set over medium heat.
Warm mixture, whisking constantly, until it just barely comes to a simmer.  Add both chocolates and marshmallow spread.  Whisk  until completely melted and smooth.
Ladle hot chcolate into espresso cups.  If desired, top with a dollop of whipped cream.

name: Scooby Snack
directions: Pour rum, creme de banane, melon liqueur and pineapple juice into a stainless steel shaker over ice. Add whipped cream, and shake; until well mixed and sufficiently chilled. Strain into an old-fashioned glass and shoot.

name: Oatmeal Cookie Drink
directions: Pour ingredients into a stainless steel shaker over ice, and shake until completely cold. Strain into an old-fashioned glass, and serve.

name: Little Green Men Frozen Cocktail
directions: Mix the limeaide and gin in blender with ice, blend until smooth. Pour into a pretty glass and enjoy!

name: Beer Margaritas
directions: Grab a pitcher to mix all ingredients.
Add all ingredients and stir.
Rub the edges of your margarita glasses with a cut lime or Rose's Sweetened Lime juice and dip in margarita salt or kosher salt.
Add ice to your glasses and pour the mix inches.
Notes:.
Your limeade can still be frozen, the alcohol and Sprite will melt it.
Also, your average bud light, modelo, or corona will do. No need for special microbrews. We use Modelo and it is perfect!

name: Meyer Lemon Drop Martini
directions: To make the simple syrup, combine 1 oz. water, 1 oz. sugar (measure in a cocktail jigger) and the lemon zest in a small saucepan over low heat. Stir until sugar dissolves.

In a cocktail shaker, combine a handful of ice, the lemon juice, vodka and simple syrup. Shake vigorously and strain into 2 chilled martini glasses rimmed with sugar. Drop two thinly sliced lemon disks into each glass.

name: Black Cherry Cider
directions: Tie the cinnamon, allspice, and cloves in a cheesecloth bag and place in a medium saucepan.
Pour in the juice and cider, then add the sugar and dried cherries.
Bring to a boil over medium heat, then lower the heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
Discard the spice bag and pour the cider into 4 mugs, spooning a few plumped cherries into each.
Serve with spoons for the fruit.

name: Hot Buttered Bourbon (With Nutmeg Butter)
directions: In a small saucepan, combine the cider, cinnamon, allspice, cloves, and ginger and place over low heat.
Cook at a simmer for 5 minutes.
Stir in the bourbon and bring back to a simmer; immediately remove from the heat.
Pour into 2 warmed mugs and top each with a slice of Nutmeg Butter.
NUTMEG BUTTER (makes about 16 servings):
Put all ingredients in a small bowl and stir with a rubber spatula to combine.
Place the butter mixture on a sheet of wax paper or plastic wrap and shape into a log about the size of the original stick of butter.
Chill in the freezer for about 30 minutes, until firm but not frozen hard.
Slice into 1/4-inch rounds (about 1/2 teaspoon) to use in buttered drinks.
The butter will keep, frozen and tightly wrapped for at least a month; let stand at room temperature for 30 minutes before slicing it. It will keep in the refrigerator for about 2 weeks.

similar.name: Spiced Apple Cider With Rum Whipped Cream

name: World's Easiest Pina Colada Rum Drink - in a Martini Glass
directions: Mix 1/3 cup of juice syrup, from canned pineapple, with the rum.
Shake  over ice.
Pour into chilled glass.
Garnish with a ring of pineapple .

similar.name: World's Easiest Pina Colada Rum Martini

name: Old Fashion Southern Boiled Custard
directions: Rinse top of double boiler with hot water to keep milk from scorching. Scald whole milk (approx. 180°). Blend eggs and sugar in blender. Slowly add to scalded milk in top of double boiler stirring constantly. Cook until mixture thickens and coats spoon well (appox. 180º). Remove from heat. Add pure vanilla. Let cool a little then strain into containers. The straining is important to make sure there are no lumps in the custard.

similar.name: Aunt Emma's Old Fashioned Egg Nog

name: Alli's Espresso Martini
directions: Fill martini glass with ice and water to chill.
Put 1st 2 ingredients in cocktail shaker, and shake 'til icy!
Discard ice/water and strain liquor into chilled glass. Drop in 3 coffee beans.

name: Tim's Sweet Tea
directions: 1. Heat 2 quarts water to just below a simmer in a kettle.
2. Remove from heat and add baking soda and tea-bags.
3. Brew 10 minutes.
4.Pour one cup sugar into a one-gallon pitcher.
5. Pour hot tea over the sugar and stir until dissolved.
6. Add cold water to fill the pitcher.
7. Refrigerate for at least 6 hours before drinking.

similar.name: Perfect Sweet Tea (Secret of the South)

name: Raspberry Mojito
directions: Tear up mint leaves and put them in the glass along with a handful or raspberries and a splash of simple syrup
Muddle the ingredients together
Add the juice of the lime and add ice
Pour in the rum and a splash of club soda or sparkling water
Stir well
Enjoy!

name: Cherry Cola
directions: half fill a 14 oz tumbler  with ice and pour over vodka, add cola and stir gently.
garnish with a cocktail stick with 3 cherrys on it balanced across diameter of glass.

name: Lime Mule Cocktail
directions: half fill at 14oz tumbler with ice and pour over vodka and vanilla syrup squeeze in and add  limes.
if using tumbler put the larger half of the cocktail shaker on the top of the glass tumbler hold tight and shake until their is condensation on outside of the cocktail shaker.
tap cockatil shaker gentle on a suface to release glass and our from cocktail shaker back into tumbler.
add ginger beer and serve.

name: Polish Bullet Cocktail
directions: half fill a 14 oz tumbler with ice and pour in all ingredients.
if using tumbler put the larger half of the cocktail shaker on the top of the glass tumbler hold tight and shake until their is condensation on outside of the cocktail shaker.
tap cocktail shaker gentle on a surface to release glass and pour from cocktail shaker back into tumbler.
serve immediatley.

name: Woo Woo Cocktail
directions: half fill a 14 oz tumbler with ice and add all liquids.
if using tumbler put the larger half of the cocktail shaker on the top of the glass tumbler hold tight and shake until their is condensation on outside of the cocktail shaker.
tap cocktail shaker gentle on a surface to release glass and pour from cocktail shaker back into tumbler.
serve with lime wedges.

name: Del Boy Cocktail
directions: half fill a  14 oz tumbler with ice and pour over the vodka, curacao, coconut syrup and pineapple juice.
if using tumbler put the larger half of the cocktail shaker on the top of the glass tumbler hold tight and shake until their is condensation on outside of the cocktail shaker.
tip the liquid and ice back into the tumbler garnish with 3 cherries ona  cockatil stick and a little umbrella if youve got one.  Drink in only fools and horses style!

name: Vanilla Cola Cocktail
directions: half fill a 14 oz glass with ice and our over vodka and syrup.
if using tumbler put the larger half of the cocktail shaker on the top of the glass tumbler hold tight and shake until their is condensation on outside of the cocktail shaker.
tap cocktail shaker gentle on a surface to release glass and pour from cocktail shaker back into tumbler.
pur over over cola.
serve this is an easy one isnt it!

name: Absolutly New
directions: Add all ingredients in shaker with ice.
Shake well and serve in shot glass.

name: Revolution Breeze Cocktail
directions: hall fill a 14oz tumbler with ice and pur over all liquids.
if using tumbler put the larger half of the cocktail shaker on the top of the glass tumbler hold tight and shake until their is condensation on outside of the cocktail shaker.
tap cocktail shaker gentle on a surface to release glass and pour from cocktail shaker back into tumbler.
serve with a sprig of mint.

name: Sex On The Beach Cocktail
directions: mix all together pour into a ice filled glass or a highball glass.
I dont usually measure exact  just kinda start with alcohol and  dump in juice and grenadine.    Mix up and enjoy.

similar.name: Tgi Friday's Sex on the Beach

name: Russian Bride Cocktail
directions: half fill a 14 oz tumbler with ice and pur over all liquids
if using tumbler put the larger half of the cocktail shaker on the top of the glass tumbler hold tight and shake until their is condensation on outside of the cocktail shaker.
tap cocktail shaker gentle on a surface to release glass and pour from cocktail shaker back into tumbler.
pur back into tumbler and top with a light dusting of cholctae sprinkles.

name: Wallbanger Cocktail Revolution Style
directions: half fill a 14 oz tumbler with ice and add all liquids.
if using tumbler put the larger half of the cocktail shaker on the top of the glass tumbler hold tight and shake until their is condensation on outside of the cocktail shaker.
tap cocktail shaker gentle on a surface to release glass and pour from cocktail shaker back into tumbler.
garnish with orange wedge and serve.

name: Scarlett Miss Charlotte
directions: half fill a 14 oz glass with ice and our over vodka, schapps and squeezed in lime juice and raspberry puree.
if using tumbler put the larger half of the cocktail shaker on the top of the glass tumbler hold tight and shake until their is condensation on outside of the cocktail shaker.
tap cocktail shaker gentle on a surface to release glass and pour from cocktail shaker back into tumbler.
top up with soda water and garnish with whole lime.

name: Kool-Aid® Lemonade-Iced Tea
directions: Put tea bags in boiling water and let stand for about 10 minutes.
Remove and discard tea bags.
Put Splenda and kool-aid in a pitcher.
Add tea mixture to pitcher.
Stir until drink mix is dissolved.
Stir in cold water.
Serve over ice cubes and lemon slices if desired.

name: Pama Cosmo
directions: Shake all ingredients hard in a shaker; pour into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with a lime wheel.
Enjoy!

name: X-Rated in the Shower
directions: Shake with ice and strain into Champagne Flute.

name: 100 Calorie Cocktail - Hg's Yap Yap Yap Cocktail
directions: Mix seltzer (or club soda), vodka, syrup, and lime juice, and serve over ice.
Enjoy!

name: Jellyfish Shot
directions: Pour the creme de cacao and amaretto into a shot glass. Float enough bailey's on top to cover the shot, and then drop a few drops of grenadine into it. It looks just like a jellyfish!

name: A Fuzzy Thing
directions: Pour alcohol first, then add the juice. A little sour mix is needed, but not enough to overpower the juice. Shake before serving, and make sure there isn't too much ice in the drink.

name: Limoncello Margarita
directions: *To make lemon zest sugar—combine zest of 1 lemon and 4 tablespoons sugar; use this to rim the margarita glass.
Combine the first 5 ingredients in a blender with ¾ cup ice; blend until smooth.
Pour into rimmed margarita glass.

name: Roasted Chestnut White Mocha
directions: Add Espresso, Monin White Chocolate Sauce and Monin Roasted Chestnut to cup and stir.
Continue stirring, while filling with steamed milk.
Top with your choice of Monin flavored whipped cream.

name: Amaretto Hawaiian Fizz
directions: Fill a highball glass with ice. Add all ingredient's and stir.

name: Boston Creme Pie Cocktail
directions: Drizzle glasses with chocolate syrup.
Add cocktail ingredients to blender and mix well.
Add 3/4 cups of mixture to each glass.
Top with whip cream.

name: Spiced Peach Cocktail
directions: Blend all ingredients in blend till smooth.

name: Ol' Fashion Egg Coffee
directions: Fill the coffee pot with fresh, cold water, to just a bit obove the bottom of the spout.
Bring to a rolling boil.
Meantime, mix the coffee & the egg, INCLUDING the SHELL, in a small bowl.
When water comes to a boil, reduce heat until water is just boiling.
Add coffee/egg mixture to the water, stirring CONSTANTLY & adjust the heat so as NOT to boil over!
Now here's the tricky part -- stirring constantly, brew for about 3-5 minutes, until the "froth" disappears -- you can almost "feel" the water change.
Remove from the heat & pour in about 1 to 1 ½ cups COLD water & let set for 5-10 minutes -- this will make the grounds settle to the bottom.
There will be some grounds in the spout -- just pour them off.
ENJOY!

name: Coffee Punch
directions: Leave ice cream out of the freezer until well softened.
Combine milk, coffee, vanilla and sugar.  Blend well.
Whip cream until thick.
Place softened ice cream in a punch bowl.  Pour in coffee mixture.
Top with whipped cream and dust with nutmeg.

name: Cider Cooler
directions: In a medium-sized bowl, combine the apple cider, sugar, and salt.
Blend in the ice cream and stir until half-melted.
Pour into a tall glass to serve.

name: Ice Bomb
directions: Pour all liquors into a highball glass filled with ice cubes. Fill with Sprite soda, and serve.

name: Mountain Breeze
directions: Build ingredients over ice in a hurricane glass, shake and garnish with a lime wedge.

name: Mint Tea
directions: Steep the teabags in the boiling water until very strong.  Add sugar and the juice of the lemons while still hot.  Stir until sugar is dissolved.
Just before serving, add chilled ginger ale to tea mixture.
Serve over ice with a mint sprig.

name: Tatanka Cocktail
directions: half fill a 14 oz glass with ice and out over all liquids
if using tumbler put the larger half of the cocktail shaker on the top of the glass tumbler hold tight and shake until their is condensation on outside of the cocktail shaker.
tap cocktail shaker gentle on a surface to release glass and pour from cocktail shaker back into tumbler.
garnish with mint.

name: Sea Breeze Cocktail Revolution Style
directions: half fill a 14 oz glass witrh ice and pour out grapefurit juice.
in a seperate glass or shaker add some ice and the cranberry juice.
if using tumbler put the larger half of the cocktail shaker on the top of the glass tumbler hold tight and shake until their is light condensation on outside of the cocktail shaker.

tap cocktail shaker gentle on a surface to release glass and SLOWLY pour the  cranberry and vodka mix from cocktail shaker back into tumbler containing grapefruit juice aiming for a floating ice cube.
voila it should float serve with a lime wedge.

name: Obama Mama "revised"
directions: Politically shake ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Pour into tall Tom Collins glass filled with ice.
Finally a Smooth "intelligent" drink with a "Change" you will really love!
For added tropical flavor, use Coconut Rum instead of clear Rum! It's Yummy no matter which one you do!
Any mix you compile will also make great shooters!
Just use ice in cocktail strainer, strain into shooter glasses -- drink up America!

name: Igloo Cocktail
directions: half fill a 14 oz tumbler with ice, pour over vodka gin and limes.
if using tumbler put the larger half of the cocktail shaker on the top of the glass tumbler hold tight and shake until their is condensation on outside of the cocktail shaker.
pour back into tumbler with ice and pour over  baby tonic, serve with two straws so you look sophistcated as you become as drunk as a skunk.

name: Southern Squeeze
directions: Pour the Southern Comfort over ice and fill the glass with orange juice.
Add an orange slice for a garnish if you like.

name: The Napoleon
directions: In a cocktail shaker mix in amaretto, peach liqueur and a splash of orange juice. Pour into an old fashioned glass and top with sparkling water. Garnish with an orange slice if you like and serve.

name: Prell Another Chick Cocktail
directions: Mix together and serve straight up.

name: Brigitte Bardot - a Great Cocktail
directions: Mix together and serve straight up!

similar.name: Lychee Lady Cocktail – a Tropical Martini from the Island

name: Big Chill Cocktail
directions: Blend ingredients with 1 scoop of ice cream. Serve in 12 oz pilsner glass with a pineapple garnish.

name: M & M's  Hot Chocolate
directions: Place M & M's in blender.
Add hot milk.  Blend until smooth.  Pour into 2 mugs.
Top with whipped cream and orange rind slices.

name: Blue Velvet Cocktail
directions: Blend with ice till smooth. Pour into parfait glasses. Top with whipped cream and drizzle with Blue Curacao. Garnish with a cherry.

name: The Blue Bayou
directions: Start with a martini glass full of ice, dump in all liquid ingredients, shake vigorously.
Coat the rim of a martini glass with sugar and strain in drink. Garnish with orange slice and serve.

name: Shampoo - a Great Chick Cocktail
directions: Shake this in a mixer and serve straight up in your favorite glass.

name: Peppermint Penguin Cocktail
directions: Blend till ice is crushed. Pour into hurricane or parfait glass. Top with whipped cream and garnish with a cookie.

name: Tipsy Cafe Au Lait With Chocolate Whipped Cream
directions: Bring strong brewed coffee, milk, and 2 Tbs sugar just to a simmer in a 3 quart saucepan, then stir in Kahlua to taste.
While coffee is heating, beat chilled cream with cocoa and remaining 2 Tbs. of sugar in a bowl with an electric mixer until it just holds soft peaks.
Divide coffee among 4 mugs and top with chocolate whipped cream and chocolate shavings! Yum!
Make sure your cream is chilled for proper whipping! Also, fresh brewed coffee is recommended!

name: Hpnotiq Lemonade
directions: Pour chilled hpnotiq, lemoncello and champagne into a champagne flute. Add splash of lime juice.

name: Horse's Neck
directions: Build Brandy & Bitters over ice & top with ginger ale.

name: Kings Cider
directions: Heat all ingredients in a pot and pour into warm mugs.
Sprinkle cinnamon on top and garnish with cinnamon stick.

name: Bella Notte - Coffee With Raspberry Di Amore and Whipped Cream!
directions: Add a dash of Raspberry di Amore to a cup of coffee. Top with whipped cream.

name: Beefeater Berry
directions: Muddle the lime wedge and Beefeater Gin in the bottom of a Collins glass.
Fill glass with ice and add Light Cranberry Juice.
Tumble.
Serve with a lime wedge garnish.

name: Skinny Caipi Cola
directions: Stir ingredients to combine in a highball glass filled with ice.
Garnish with a lime wedge.

name: Girlish Figure
directions: Combine Malibu Coconut Rum and Light Cranberry Juice in a highball glass filled with ice.
Add Diet Lemon-Lime soda to top.
Garnish with a slice of lime.

name: Mocha Cocoa
directions: In a large microwave-safe mug, combine sugar & cocoa powder. Add milk and instant coffee crystals. Stir to combine well.
Microwave on 100% power (high) for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes or until heated through, stirring once.
Stir in vanilla. If desired, top with marshmallows. Serve immediately.

name: Pear Martini
directions: Fill cocktail shaker with ice.
Add 3 Shots Absolut Pear Vodka.
Add 3 Shots Triple Sec.
Add 3 Shots Freshly Squeezed Lime Juice.
Shake.
Pour into two martini glass garnished with a thin pear slice cut with an upward cut so it sits beautifully on the martini glass edge.

name: Diet (Low Carb) Vanilla Coke (Alcoholic)
directions: Add ice to a tall cocktail glass.
Pour in vanilla vodka.
Fill Glass with Diet Vanilla Coke.

name: Oval Strawberry Sweetie
directions: Muddle sliced strawberries, OVAL Vodka and Splenda in the bottom of a Collins glass.
Fill glass with ice and add Light Lemonade.
Tumble.
Serve with a lemon slice garnish.

name: Peach Wine Coolers
directions: In a food processor or blender, puree peaches.
In a 3 quart container, combine peaches and remaining ingredients.
Cover and chill for 5 hours to allow the flavors to blend.

name: Rocky Road Mocha
directions: In a 10- to 12-ounce mug, combine Frangelico, crème de cacao, espresso and hot chocolate.
Top with miniature marshmallows and serve immediately.

similar.name: White Chocolate Mocha With Peppermint Syrup

name: Orange Cinnamon Hot Tea
directions: In a large mug or coffee cup prepare hot tea.  (I microwave 10 ounces of water for 1 minute and steep 2 tea packets.)
Stir in sugar and cinnamon.
Cut 2 slices from orange and cut slices in half.  Squeeze juice from remaining orange into cup.
Enjoy!

name: Sinus Tea
directions: Add everything to the hot water, using a tea ball or strainer to contain the ginger.
Cover and steep for about three minutes.
Stir and drink as often as possible throughout the day while you are sick.

name: Butterscotch & Hazelnut Cream
directions: Place the cream, Baileys, Frangelico, butterscotch schnapps and ice cubes in the jug of a blender and blend until smooth.
Pour among serving glasses. Dust with cocoa powder.

name: Chocolate Almond Coffee Mix
directions: In a food processor, finely grind all ingredients until well blended.
Store in airtight container.
To serve - stir about 2 heaping teaspoons coffee mix into  6 ounces hot water.

name: Peach Eggnog
directions: In a 3 quart container, combine all ingredients, stir until well blended.
Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator.

name: Ww Cosmopolitan (2 Pts)
directions: Mix ingredient in shaker with ice.  Strain into your martini glass and ENJOY!

name: Hard Cream Soda (Diet)
directions: Add ice to a tall cocktail glass.
Pour in vanilla vodka.
Fill Glass with Diet Cream Soda.

name: Yellow Rose of Texas
directions: Shake with ice in a cocktail shaker, strain into a chilled glass over rocks.

name: Flu Brew Drink
directions: Mix together ingredients, and add enough water to make 1 cup.  Drink warm or hot.  You may replace the cayenne pepper with ginger for the kids who are sick.

similar.name: Dr. Joey's Hot Toddy's Cold Remedy

name: Marfa Light
directions: Combine ingredients over ice.

name: Adult's Cherry Vanilla Limeade
directions: Half fill a high ball glass with ice, add first 3 ingredients and stir to mix, top up with a generous splash lemonade & place the vanill bean in the drink to serve.

name: Last Dance
directions: Combine first 4 ingredients in a shaker with ice, strain into a glass & sprinkle with cinnamon to serve.

name: Carnation Caramel Latte
directions: Place ingredients in blender.  Process until smooth and butterscotch chips are melted.

name: El Postre
directions: Combine first 3 ingredients over ice, top up with milk or cream to serve.

name: Alaska Mocha
directions: Pour 1 1/4 cups coffee into an ice cube tray or trays and freeze until solid, at least 3 hours.

To a blender (through opening in lid) or food processor with motor running, add frozen coffee cubes, chocolate syrup, nonfat dried milk, and 1/4 cup cold coffee. Whirl until mixture is a thick slush; if thicker than you like, add a little more cold coffee. Pour into tall glasses.

name: Ambrosia Cocktail
directions: Toss together oranges, grapefruit, and pineapple; set aside.
Pour orange liqueur into a shallow saucer. Dip rims of 8 glasses in liqueur; dip rims in sugar, and let stand 30 minutes to dry completely.
Spoon fruit mixture evenly into glasses. Add rosé wine, filling three-fourths full; top with grated coconut and cherries. Serve immediately.

name: Apple Margarita
directions: Combine the first 4 ingredients in a cocktail shaker filled with ice; shake vigorously; strain into a glass.
*If serving frozen, combine the first 5 ingredients in a blender with ½ cup ice; blend until smooth; pour into a glass.
Garnish with apple wedge.

name: Spicy Bloody Mary Mix
directions: Blend the tomatoes, lemon and lime juice, Worcestershire, garlic, hot sauce, horseradish, salt, Old Bay, celery seed and pepper until smooth. Cover and chill until needed. This recipe makes 6 to 7 cups, depending on the size of the tomatoes; the mix will keep for 1 week.
To assemble 6 servings:.
In a pitcher, combine the mix and vodka.
If desired, dampen the rims of 6 old-fashioned glasses and dip them in coarse salt. Fill each glass halfway with ice, then divide the Bloody Marys among them.
Garnish each with a pickled bean or celery stalk, and serve.

name: Buccaneer
directions: Add the three ingredients, shake on ice.
Serve in a glass.

name: Light and Fruity Wine Cooler
directions: mix juices together with sugar until sugar is dissolved.
chill well.
fill you glass with ice.
fill glass half way with wine.
add soda to fill glass 3/4 way.
add juice to complete glass volume.
garnish with slices of fresh fruit.

name: Passion Fruit Martinis
directions: Combine all ingredients except orange peel twist in a shaker filled with ice.  Strain into martini glass.

name: Dreamsicle Jello Shots
directions: Mix together water and oj, bring to a boil.
Pour liquid over jello, stirring until dissolved.
Add vodkas and key lime cream liquor, mixing well.
Pour mixture into shot glasses or paper cups. Refrigerate for at least 4 hours.

name: Starbucks Vanilla Rooibos Tea Latte (Copycat)
directions: Add milk & tea bag to mug, microwave for 1 minute on high.
Add water, microwave for another minute.
Add syrup, sweetener and cinnamon; Stir, Enjoy!

name: Campari Cocktail
directions: Combine all in an ice-filled shaker.
Shake well and strain into a cocktail glass.
Garnish with an orange twist.

name: Calming Cedar Tea
directions: In a small pot bring 4 cups of water to a boil.
Add 2 cups fresh cedar to boiling water.
Boil for 10 minutes or until water becomes golden in color.
Strain tea into a small tea pot or bowl.
After straining make to dispose of the cedar.
Enjoy.

name: Gingerbread Man-Tini
directions: Combine ingredients in a shaker with ice.
Shake vigorously.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Garnish with a cinnamon sugar rim and a lemon corkscrew.

similar.name: Rocky Mountain Ginger Crisp by Cheri Loughlin

name: Bloody Carioca
directions: Shake all the ingredients on ice.
Pour into a highball glass rimmed with paprika.
Stir well.
Garnish with a slice of cucumber.

name: Acadia's Coffee Amaretto Delight
directions: In a 16 ounce glass add coffee, creamer and liquor and mix well.
Add ice cream to top and enjoy!

name: Bonecrusher
directions: Mix ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Serve on the rocks in a Collins glass.

name: Butter Float
directions: Serve over ice in a tall glass.

name: Russian Root Beer
directions: Serve over ice in a rocks glass.

name: Pear Sidecar
directions: Combine the brandy, triple sec and lime juice in a cocktail shaker and fill with ice.
Shake well and strain into two chilled martini glasses.
Twist the lime zest into spirals and drop one in each glass.

name: Red Dragon
directions: Fill a shaker with ice.
Add the first three ingredients.
Shake well.
Strain into shot glass.

name: Peach Martini
directions: Put all ingredients in blender.
Blend until ice is crushed.
Serve in martini glasses.
Chin chin!

name: Amaretto Cream
directions: In a snuffer glass pour amaretto over ice (rocks) add creamer, then top with milk to taste. STIR and ENJOY!

name: Hot Milk & Honey Cocoa
directions: Heat milk on stove top or in microwave.
Add remaining ingredients and stir well.

name: African Haze Tea Latte
directions: Steep Rooibos herbal blend double strength.
When tea has reached your preference, blend with steamed milk.
Add vanilla syrup (sugar-free if you prefer).
Enjoy.

name: Pomidori
directions: Fill cocktail glass with ice.
Add Midori and apple juice and stir to blend.

name: Fruit Punched
directions: In a cocktail shaker, muddle the strawberries.
Add ice, Midori, Malibu, pineapple juice and sour mix.
Strain into a cocktail glass over ice.  Garnish with a strawberry and a lemon twist, if desired.

name: Watermelon-Basil Margaritas
directions: Place 24 watermelon cubes on a baking sheet lined with parchment.  Cover and freeze at least 1 hour, or up to 2 days.
Puree remaining watermelon and the sugar in a blender until smooth.  Pass through a sieve lined with cheesecloth into a bowl.  You should have 3 cups.
Place tequila and basil in a glass pitcher and crush with a wooden spoon.  Stir in watermelon juice and triple sec.
Place watermelon "ice" cubes in glasses.  Using cocktail shaker, mix 3/4 cup margarita with 1 cup ice.  Strain into a glass.  Repeat.  Serve garnished with basil.

name: Iced Chocolate Chai
directions: In medium saucepan, combine all ingredients; bring to a boil over medium heat. Reduce heat to low; simmer 5 minutes, whisking occasionally.
Remove from heat; let stand 10 minutes. Strain mixture. Refrigerate until chilled.

name: Rich French Hot Chocolate
directions: In large saucepan, bring milk to a simmer over medium-high heat. Remove from heat; add bittersweet and semisweet chocolate. Let stand 5 minutes or until chocolate is melted.
Meanwhile, in small bowl, stir together cocoa and sugar; whisk into chocolate mixture along with vanilla. Whisk 30 seconds or until chocolate is slightly frothy.

name: Warm Ginger Cola
directions: Place cola, ginger and brown sugar in small saucepan. Bring to a boil over medium heat; boil gently 10 minutes. Pour into cup; add lemon slices. Serve immediately.

similar.name: Ginger Ale Ginger Soda Ginger Pop

name: Chili's Chambord 1800 Margarita
directions: Add all ingredients to a cocktail shaker half-filled with ice cubes. Shake well, and pour over ice in a salt-rimmed margarita glass. Serve with orange wedge, just like they do at Chili's.

name: Purple Margarita
directions: Combine all in shaker with ice.  Serve on the rocks in a margarita glass.  Garnish with a lime slice.

name: Pompagne
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker with ice. Add pomegranate juice, vodka and orange-flavored liqueur; shake 10 seconds. Strain into large martini glass; top with champagne. Garnish with orange peel.

name: Applebee's Perfect Margarita
directions: Put all ingredients except the lime wedge and olive in a shaker. Add ice, shake until very cold and pour into a salt-rimmed margarita glass. Garnish with lime wedge and olive.

name: The Tidal Wave -  Adult Cocktail
directions: Fill a tall glass with ice. Add the blue curacao, melon liquor and vodka. Fill the glass almost to the top with pineapple juice and then add the splash of 7 up.
Garnish with a maraschino cherry and an orange slice.
This drink can either be served layer or stirred.

name: Cosmo'lite'
directions: Measure ingredients and pour over ice.
ENJOY!

name: Abby Runner - Adult Beverage
directions: Pour the liquor in your desired glass. Add equal parts orange juice and pineapple juice to fill the glass. Garnish with an orange slice and a cherry.
Note: Use a large glass if you don't want a strong drink.

name: Shlopp
directions: Mix all ingredients together.  Pour into plastic container with lid.  Allow to freeze completely (approximately 24 hours).  Scrape enough Shlopp to fill a cup (any size) about a quarter of the way from the top.  Fill the remainder of the cup with Gingerale or 7-up.  Enjoy!

name: The Sapphire Silk
directions: Shake ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled martini glass.

name: White Spiced Coffee
directions: Place the milk and crushed coffee beans in a saucepan. Heat the mixture to a simmer over medium-high heat, about 7 minutes. Immediately remove from the heat and let the beans steep in the milk for 15 minutes.

Strain the coffee mixture and transfer to the jar of a blender. Discard the crushed coffee beans. Add the cinnamon sticks, cardamom, and honey to the steeped milk and blend on high speed until the spices are coarsely ground, about 30 seconds.

Strain the liquid back into the saucepan and discard the ground spices. Rewarm the spiced coffee over medium-high heat until the liquid is hot and steaming. Add rum, if desired. Pour into warmed coffee mugs, and serve hot.

name: 2 Minute Peanut Butter Protein Shake
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender.
Blend and enjoy!

name: Ruby Diamond
directions: Muddle mint and pomegranate in a shaker.
Shake with remaining ingredients.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with pomegranate seeds.

name: Passion Tea
directions: Brew the black tea.
Pour all ingredients into a handled glass.
Stir thoroughly.

name: Broken Heart Martini
directions: Rim a cocktail glass with cocoa powder.
Stir together ingredients with ice in a mixing glass.
Strain into the prepared glass.
Garnish with an orange slice.

name: The Courtesan
directions: Combine ingredients in a shaker filled with ice.
Shake thoroughly.
Strain into a chilled shot glass.

name: Raspberry Dream
directions: Pour Leblon and Raspicello into a mug with chocolate.
Stir ingredients thoroughly.
Garnish with a raspberry.

name: Diamond Martini
directions: Combine OVAL Vodka and vermouth in a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake thoroughly and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Twist the lemon wedge over the glass and run it around the rim.

name: Cherry Life Saver Martini
directions: Combine ingredietns in a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake thoroughly.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with a cherry.

name: Deep Chocolate
directions: Mix all ingredients in a tall handled glass.
Pour and thoroughly stir in the hot chocolate mixture.
Top with whipped cream and white chocolate shavings.

name: Chocolate Temptress
directions: Rim a cocktail glass with crushed chocolate cookie crumbs.
Combine ingredietns in an ice-filled shaker.
Shake thoroughly.
Strain into the prepared cocktail glass.
Float the star anise on top.

name: Honey Bunny
directions: Pour all ingredients into a highball glass 3/4 filled with ice cubes.
Stir well and serve.

name: Lavender Lush
directions: To make lavender simple syrup: Combine 2 cups water and 2 cups sugar in a saucepan; stir to mix; place over med-high heat to dissolve; as soon as the syrup comes to a rolling boil and is completely clear, remove from heat; add ½ cup dried lavender; push lavender all the way to the bottom of the pan; cover mixture and let steep for 30-40 minutes; pour syrup through a fine sieve, pressing down firmly on the lavender to extract all the juice into the syrup; may store syrup in a covered container in the refrigerator for up to 1 month.
To make the drink: in a tall glass, mix the gin, blueberry juice, lavender simple syrup, and frozen lemonade concentrate; blend well.
Fill the glass to the top with ice; add soda water and stir to blend.
Garnish with lime wedge and lavender sprig or mint sprig; best sipped through a straw.

name: Refreshing Water
directions: First, slice your lemon and orange in thin slices (about 8 for each).
Fill your pitcher half way up with ice.
Add your lemon and orange slices. (in a decorative manner).
Fill with your water (I use bottled).
Pour in a glass filled with ice and about 5 mint leaves.

name: Marie's Margarita
directions: For the lime salt, combine the salt, lime zest and sugar in a mini food processor, such as a Handi-Chopper, until well blended.
Place on a saucer for dipping your glass.
Rim the outside edge of the margarita glass with lime and dip glass in salt.
In a shaker with ice, combine the remaining ingredients and shake.
Pour into salt-rimmed glass with ice.  Enjoy!

name: Scarlet O'hara
directions: This is made in the pitcher of the blender and poured directly from it.
Fill about 1/3 with crushed ice, then to 2/3 line with Cran-raspberry juice.
Add liquor, about 1/3 cup of Southern Comfort and about 2/3 cup Brandy, plus the juice of about 1/2 a lemon. There should be enough booze in it so you can barely taste it.
Blend at high speed until it's foamy. Then place some ice cubes in fancy glasses, rub the rim with a lemon, and serve. This could be garnished with a sprig of mint.

name: Wine Cooler
directions: Mix together Wine, Soda, and Grenadine. Then Serve over ice.

name: Dancin' in the Kitchen Cappuccino
directions: Brew one shot of espresso into 8 oz. cup.
Steam and froth milk, set aside.
Add liqueurs and caramel to cup, stir well.
Add milk, stir.
Fold in 1-2 Tbl. milk froth.
Top with more froth.
Top with whipped cream if desired and sprinkle with a little cocoa powder.

name: Hearts Afire Coffee
directions: Pour coffee into 1-quart saucepan. Stir in chocolate syrup, vanilla, cinnamon and red pepper; add half & half. Cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until heated through (3 to 4 minutes).
To serve, pour into individual coffee mugs. Garnish each serving with whipped cream and sprinkle with chocolate shavings, if desired.

name: Chevy's 100% Blue Agave Margarita
directions: Put a handful of ice into a shaker.
Add all ingredients and shake. Pour the drink into a 12-ounce margarita glass (salt the rim forst, if you want).
Garnish with a lime wedge on a toothpick, add a straw, and serve.

name: Olive Garden Italian Margarita
directions: Moisten the rim of a margarita glass and dip it in green sugar crystals. Or skip this step if you prefer.
Fill the glass with ice. Add tequila, triple sec, and sweet and sour mix.
Serve with a shot of amaretto on the side, and garnish with a lime wedge and orange wedge on the rim.
( I don't know if you are supposed to add the amaretto to the drink once it is served, but whenever I go to Olive Garden I mix the shot of amaretto with the margarita and I think it tastes great).

name: Mr & Mrs T Sweet and Sour Mix
directions: Combine all ingredients in a 2-quart pitcher and mix until sugar is dissolved. Store covered in refrigerator.

name: Restaurant-Style Sweet and Sour Mix
directions: Combine the hot water with the sugar and stir until sugar dissolves.
Add lime juice, lemon juice and food coloring. Chill.

name: Crimson Drink
directions: To prepare:
Combine all ingredients except lemon juice and wine in a sauce pan.
Bring to a boil, stirring occasionally until sugar is dissolved.
Reduce heat and cook uncovered for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove from heat and add lemon juice.
Transfer to a glass container and refrigerate for at least 4 hours and up to one week.
When ready to serve:
Strain out lemon peel and sage leaves.
In a glass with ice, combine equal parts drink and wine (or club soda).
Serve with a fresh sage leaf, if desired.

name: Coca-Cola
directions: Combine sugar, corn syrup, powdered NoDoz, and citric acid in a large pitcher or bowl. Add the boiling water, and stir until the sugar has dissolved and the solution is clear. Strain the syrup through a paper towel-lined strainer to remove the NoDoz sediment.
Add the lime juice, vanilla, lemon oil, orange oil, and cassia oil to the syrup and stir.
Add the colors to the syrup then cover it and chill it for several hours until cold.
To make the soda, add 1/4 cup of cold syrup to 1 cup of cold soda water. Stir gently, drop in some ice, and serve.

similar.name: Concentrate for Refreshing Tea, Iced or Hot

name: Ultimate Crush
directions: Place the pineapple chunks and lime juice into a cocktail shaker and muddle well.
Add the rum, cherry brandy and grenadine and shake well.
Fill a highball glass with crushed ice. Pour the rum and cherry brandy mixture over the ice.
Top up the cocktail with the pink grapefruit juice, then the pineapple juice. Hook the slice of pink grapefruit over the side of the glass.

name: Green Tea Vodka
directions: 1. Pour vodka into wide mouthed bottle. Add tea bags. Close and shake well. Let sit no more than 24 hours.
2. Remove tea bags. Add honey and shake well.
3. Ready to serve now, or add orange peel or other fruit and let steep 2 weeks to a month. Filter and serve.

name: Mom's Apple Pie Martini
directions: mix the vodka, Schnapps, apple juice and ice together in a martini shaker.
shake vigorously for 20 seconds.
strain into martini glass.
sprinkle cinnimon on top.

name: Turmeric Broth for Sipping
directions: Put all in a pan and heat over med low heat until blended.

name: Orange Sour
directions: Combine ingredients in container or blender and process 15 seconds.
Pour into glasses over ice cubes. Garnish with orange slices and cherries.

name: Hot Chocolate Mix
directions: Combine all ingredients in large bowl. Mix well. Put in large, airtight container. Label. Store in cool, dry place. Use within 6 months. To use: Add 3 Tblsp. mix to 1 cup hot water.

name: Mock Orange Julius
directions: Blend until smooth.

name: The Perfect Lemon Drop Cocktail
directions: Combine simple syrup, fresh lemon juice and vodka either in a shaker with ice or make in a pitcher.
Rim the glass with ultrafine baker's sugar and a slice of lemon. Voila!
**To make simple syrup, combine equal parts sugar to equal parts water in sauce pan. Heat until sugar is dissolved. Cool. You can also make this ahead of time and keep in the fridge.
**I buy bulk lemons from Costco. Less costly and you definitely get more for your money. I juice the lemons with an electric juicer and have even frozen some juice for later use.

similar.name: Lemon Drop Cocktails from Ina Garten/ Barefoot Contessa

name: Love Martini (Melting Pot)
directions: Mix.
Serve chilled with 1 strawberry cut into halves as a garnish.

name: Chocolate Raspberry Kiss
directions: In a small saucepan, combine the coffee and chocolate over med-low heat; whisk until the chocolate has melted.
Remove from the heat and pour into 2 mugs.
Add 2 ounces Chambord and 1 ounce Godiva liqueur to each mug; stir to combine.
Top with a dollop of whipped cream; sprinkle with cocoa powder and red sugar; serve.

name: Apple Brandy Hot Toddy
directions: Heat water to boiling.
Pour brandy and honey liqueur or honey into a heatproof glass.
Add water and nutmeg and stir with a cinnamon stick or bar spoon.
Float lemon wedge on top and serve.

name: Purple Nag Drink
directions: mix all in shaker and shake until cold.

name: Blue Motorcycle
directions: In a highball or rocks glass fill with ice.
pour in blue curacao and bacardi 151.
give a shot or two of 7-up and fill with sweet n sour mix.
stir and enjoy!

name: Mom's Naughty Oj Slush
directions: Dissolve sugar in water.
Add concentrates and vodka.
Freeze.
Scoop out of frozen container (ice cream tubs work awesome) into a cup and add 7-UP, stir, enjoy!

name: Armageddon (Sour Raspberry Drink!)
directions: Pour amaretto, peach schnapps and raspberry sour puss into a highball glass filled with ice cubes. Add equal amounts of orange and cranberry juice, top with soda, stir and serve.

name: Sweet Tart
directions: Pour both ingredients into a cocktail shaker with ice. Shake and strain into a shot glass, and serve.

name: Strawberry Shirley
directions: In a blender, mix the lemon, sugar, grenadine, and strawberries until relatively smooth.
Pour into a glass with ice; top with 7-up and stir.
Garnish with a fresh strawberry or maraschino cherry.

name: Apple Thyme Martini
directions: Chill the martini glasses.

To Make syrup:  In small saucepan, combine water, sugar & thyme.  Bring to boil over medium heat then reduce to a simmer.  Cook for about 5 minutes.  Remove from heat & let cool. (Leftover syrup should be stored in the refrigerator in an airtight container.).

To Assemble:  Fill a martini shaker with the vodka, apple juice & 1/4 cup of the thyme syrup.  Shake 10 seconds & pour into 4 chilled glasses.  (I use a single-serve shaker so I combine everything but ice in a pitcher & then pour into shaker from there.).
Use a melon baller to scoop small balls of apple.  Place 3 apple balls & a sprig of fresh thyme in each glass.
Serve immediately.

name: Greta's Margarita
directions: 1. Squeeze the entire lime into a glass.  Add an equal amount agave nectar.
2. Add the tequila and triple sec.  Stir till everything is well-mixed.
3. Salt a 10-ounce glass, and fill 3/4 with ice.
4. Pour the mixture over the ice, and top with fizz.  Give a quick stir, and serve.

name: Greta's Fargarita
directions: 1. Squeeze three lime halves into a glass, add the Splenda, tequila, and triple sec.  Mix thoroughly until the Splenda completely dissolves.
2. Salt the rim of a 10-ounce glass, and fill 3/4 with ice.
3. Pour the mixture over the ice, and top off with fizz.  Stir gently.  Serve!

name: Carrabba's Italian Wedding Cake Martini
directions: Combine the ingredients in a martini shaker full of ice.  Shake and serve.

name: Leblon Caipirinha
directions: Cut the lime into four wedges.
Muddle the lime and simple syrup in a cocktail shaker.
Fill the shaker with ice and add Leblon Cachaca.
Shake vigorously.
Serve in a rocks glass filled with ice.
Garnish with a slice of lime.

name: Blackberry Caipirinha
directions: Place blackberries with sliced lime in a shaker and muddle well.
Fill with ice and add Leblon Cachaca and sugar.
Shake vigorously and pour into a rocks glass.
Garnish with a blackberry.

name: The Red Carpet
directions: Combine ingredietns in a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with a lemon.

name: Starlet Cocktail
directions: Combine vodka, Absinthe, and black raspberry liqueur in a cocktail shaker.
Shake thoroughly over ice.
Strain into a chilled cocktial glass.
Top with champagne.
Garnish with a raspberry.

name: Ww 2 Pt. Toasted Almond Cocktail
directions: Chill two 4 ounce rock glasses (hiball glasses).
In blender, combine all ingredients and process until smooth and frothy. Divide into chilled glasses and serve.

name: Tequila Lime Sherbet Frost
directions: If you don't like strong drinks, I suggest you start out with wayy less tequila and add that last to suit your own tastes.
In 24oz glass add tequila of your choice and lime sherbert and mix well.
Pour "7-Up" to fill and mix a little and start drinking!

name: Lemon Slush Drink
directions: Blend on high, the first five ingredients.
Add a few ice cubes at a time, blending until slushy. Add the food coloring if you want to.
Serve immediately.

name: Pumpkin Latte
directions: 1 cup of strong coffee.
2/3 cup evaporated milk, fat free, 2%, or whole.
¼ cup Libby’s pure pumpkin.
3 teaspoons granulated sugar.
1/8 teaspoon of pumpkin spice or ground cinnamon.

Combine coffee, milk, pumpkin, sugar, and spice in a 2 cup microwave safe glass measuring cup.  (Or you can use a saucepan too)  Heat until very hot, about 2-3 minutes.  Carefully pour into mugs.  Note: To make the foamy top to your latte, just like they do in the coffee shop, Pour the hot liquid into a blender and cover with the lid, and blend for about 30 seconds to a minute.  Pour into mugs. You can also top it of with a dollop of whipped cream and a dash of cinnamon, if desired.

name: Key Lime Pie Cocktail
directions: Mix all ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice.  Serve in martini glass.

name: Raspberry Malibu Zinger (Cocktail)
directions: Boil water and steep raspberry tea with the ginger for 5 minutes. Strain out ginger.
Stir in sugar until dissolved, let cool to room temperature then chill for 1/2 an hour.
In a tall glass mix tea with mailbou rum; add about 3 ice cubes and a small straw for stirring.
*Note: Apparently this likes to layer itself somewhat (rum settled at the bottom) Also, prep. time includes chill time.

name: Cinnamon Latte
directions: Blend coffee, half-and-half, sugar, and vanilla in a slow cooker.  Add cinnamon sticks.  Cover; cook on high for 3 hours.
Remove cinnamon sticks.  Serve latte in tall coffee mugs with dollop of whipped cream and cinammon sticks if desired.
NOTE:  Double the amount of coffee grounds normally used to brew coffee, or substitute 8 teaspoons instant coffee dissolved in 6 cups boiling water.

name: Rooibos Milk
directions: Combine in a shaker.  Mix until frothy.  Pour into ice filled glasses.

name: Rooibos Juice
directions: Combine and pour into ice filled glasses.

name: Starburst Mimosa
directions: Mix chilled ingredients in a champagne glass.
Enjoy!

name: Sunrise Margarita
directions: Add tequila, orange juice, triple sec, and lemon juice to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously; strain into a glass.
Add the grenadine, which will settle at the bottom of the glass.
Garnish with cherry.

name: Raspberry Lemonade
directions: Pour 2 cups cups cold water into a blender and add half of raspberries.
Blend until smooth, then pour puree through a fine mesh strainer into a large pitcher (discard seeds).
Add 4 more cups cold water, remaining raspberries and lemonade concentrate to raspberry puree.
Mix well and pour over ice.
Garnish with lemon slices, if desired.

name: Pairing Tea With Foods
directions: Food=Continental-style breakfast: (breads, cheese, jams, etc.). Tea=Yunnan, Ceylon, Indonesian, Assam, Dooars, Terai, Travancore, Nilgiri, Kenya, Darjeeling.
Food=English-style breakfast:  (fried foods, eggs, smoked fish,ham,bacon,etc.). Tea=Ceylon, Kenya, African blends, Assam, Tarry Souchong, Lapsang Souchong.
Food=Light savory meals. Tea=Yunnan, Lapsang Souchong, Ceylon, Darjeeling, Assam, Green teas, Oolongs.
Food=Spicy foods. Tea=Keemun, Ceylon, Oolongs, Darjeeling, Green teas, Jasmine, Lapsang Souchong.
Food=Strong cheeses. Tea=Lapsang Souchong, Earl Grey, Green Teas.
Food=Fish. Tea=Oolongs, Smoked teas, Earl Grey, Darjeeling, Green teas.
Food=Meat and game. Tea=Earl Grey, Lapsang Souchong, Kenya, Jasmine.
Food=Poultry. Tea=Lapsang Souchong, Darjeeling, Oolongs, Jasmine.
Food=Tea time. All teas.
Food=After a meal. Tea=White and green teas, Keemun, Oolongs, Darjeeling.

name: Green Tea With Indian Chai Spices
directions: Place tea bags into a prewarmed large tea pot; set aside.
Crack open the cardamom pods using a mortar and pestle.
Discard the empty pods, but keep the tiny black seeds; add the remaining spices to the mortar and crush all into medium-size pieces.
Put the spices into a 4 cup heatproof measuring cup and add the boiling water; stir to mix, then let the spices infuse for 2 minutes.
Quickly pour the infusion into the teapot, straining carefully to prevent the spices from going into the teapot.
Steep the tea in the spice infusion for 2 minutes.
Add sugar to the teapot and stir to dissolve; strain the brewed tea into teacups and serve immediately.

name: Emeril's Frozen Milk Punch
directions: In a plastic gallon container, with a lid, combine the brandy, bourbon, rum and half and half, and vanilla. Sweeten the cream mixture to taste with the simple syrup. Cover and freeze until slightly frozen. To serve, using an ice pick, (carefully) slush the mixture. Spoon into balloon wine glasses and garnish with nutmeg.

name: Bourbon Slushy
directions: Combine ingredients.
24 hours to set up.  Stir every 4 hours.
Can serve with 7up or Sprite.

name: Fresh Donuts
directions: Make a sponge of heated milk, sugar, shortening and salt.
Dissolve yeast in a seperate bowl with 2 tablespoons of warm water, let set for a while.
Add to sponge.
Add 2 cups of flour and then beaten egg.
Add rest of flour one cup at a time. It may not take all ten cups, until it gets almost like bread dough// not too stiff.
Cover bowl with Saran wrap and let rise over night.
Roll out to about 1/4 inch thick. Dont try to roll all out at once.
Cut into pieces about 2 to 3 inches. Cut a slit in the middle, spread out to rise again.
Fry them, make sure you have enough grease in pan for them to float. Turn when they get brown on bottom and turn.

name: Sake Martini
directions: In a martini glass combine the sake and the vodka and garnish with the cucumber ball.
Alternately, In a cocktail shaker, combine all ingredients (sans cucumber) , with ice cubes, shake 100 times! Pour into martini glass, garnish with cucumber ball or slice.
Serve.

name: Hot Spiced Milk
directions: Place molasses, milk, allspice and cinnamon in a saucepan and heat thoroughly.  Pour into a cup and sprinkle with nutmeg.

name: Fruity Green Tea Toddy
directions: Add tea bags to prewarmed teapot; set aside.
Add orange juice, pear juice, and pineapple juice to a saucepan; add in the fruit slices.
Carefully bring to a simmer over low heat.
Add water to the teapot and steep for 2 minutes.
Strain the brewed tea into the juice mixture and bring the heat back to a simmer.
Add in the caramel syrup; mix well; discard the fruit slices.
Ladle the hot tea into teacups or mugs; garnish with 2 pieces of lemon; serve.

name: Super Simple Sangria
directions: Combine the first five ingredients and chill well. Add the fruit just before serving.

name: Bridesmaid
directions: Add the first four ingredients to a tall glass filled with cracked ice, stir well and add the ginger ale.  Garnish with a twist of lemon.

name: Tequila Marinade for Chile Margaritas
directions: In a 1/2 gallon mason jar combine: jalapeno and pineapple slices.
Pour tequila in to cover completely.
Let marinate for 24 hours or more (up to one month).  No refrigeration required.
Use in any Margarita recipe in place of the tequila.  Only use the liquid from the marinade, not the peppers and pineapple!  Garnish drink with fresh jalapeno slices.

name: Pink Pussycat
directions: Shake all the ingredients well with ice and strain into a tall glass.  Garnish with a segment of grapefruit.

name: Piranha
directions: Pour the alcohol into a rocks glass containing plenty of cracked ice and stir vigorously, before adding the cola.

name: S.o.s. (Beverage)
directions: Shake all the ingredients well with ice, strain into a large cocktail glass.  Garnish with a slice of lemon and a mandarin segment on a cocktail stick, and add a short straw.

name: Jamaica Shake II
directions: Shake all the ingredients well with ice to amalgamate the cream, and strain into a cocktail glass.  Sift grated chocolate over the top.

name: Angel Face
directions: Shake all the ingredients well with ice, and strain into a cocktail glass.  Garnish with a half-slice of lemon.

name: Blue Lady
directions: Shake all ingredients thoroughly with ice, and strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Crock-Pot Chai Tea
directions: Combine water, tea, sugar, cloves, cinnamon & ginger in Crock Pot.
Cover; cook on High 2 to 2-1/2 hours.
Strain mixture; discard solids. Stir in milk just before serving. Serve warm or chilled.

similar.name: Green Tea With Indian Chai Spices

name: Italian Delight Espresso
directions: Pour the amaretto into a tempered glass mug.
Add in the espresso and sambuca; give a little stir.
Top with a dollop of whipped cream.
Salute.

name: Frozen Mudslides
directions: Pulse all of the ingredients in a blender until the ice begins to break down, about 5 pulses, then blend on high until completely smooth.

name: Margaritas
directions: Combine the lime juice, lemon juice, lime zest, lemon zest, sugar and salt in a large liquid measuring cup.  Cover tightly with plastic wrap  and refrigerate until the flavors meld, about 2 hours.
Strain the juice mixture into a pitcher and stir in the tequila, Triple Sec and 1 cup of the crushed ice.  Pour over additional crushed ice before serving.

To make ahead: The recipe can be prepared through step 1 and refrigerated, covered tightly with plastic wrap, for up to 2 days.  The longer the mixture sits, the more it mellows, eventually losing any harsh acidity and tasting of pure citrus only.

name: Lemon or Lime Barley Water
directions: Place 4 1/2 cups water in a heavy pot with the barley and bring to a boil. Reduce the mixture by 50% over high heat. Strain the liquid into a clean glass container. Mix in the lemon or lime juice and honey, stirring well.
Serve well chilled.

name: Super Mai Tai
directions: Mix all ingredients except grenadine in a shaker; mix well. Pour into tall flared glass, add grenadine, garnish with pineapple and cherries, and serve!

name: Another Green Tea Martini
directions: Fill cocktail shaker half way with ice.
Add the tea and vodka and shake for about 30 seconds.
Strain into martini glasses and squeeze a lime wedge into each glass.

name: Old-Fashioned Coffee Soda
directions: combine coffee and sugar, blend in 1/2 AND 1/2. fILL 4 TALL glasses halfway with coffee mixture.
Add scoop ice cream to each glass.Fill to top with soda.
Add dollop of whipped cream and enjoy!
you can also garnish with a cherry, cinnamon, chocolate scrapes, sprinkles or whatever your heart desires.

name: Cranberry Pama  Pomegranate Cocktail
directions: Mix PAMA and juice together.
Pour over ice.
Garnish with  lime.

name: Isle Cocktail
directions: Stack the mint leaves in a shaker using a pestle or the back of a spoon.
Add the Pineau des Charentes, the juice and the ice cubes.  Shake vigorously.
Pour contents of shaker into a Collins glass and garnish with two straws, an orange segment and a mint top.

name: Ginger Beer
