directions: Place the water and sugar in a small saucepan over low heat and stir until the sugar has dissolved.
Increase the heat and simmer until the liquid is clear.
Remove from the heat, set aside to cool, then bottle.
Date your bottle and refrigerate until use.

name: Jamaica Concentrate
directions: n a saucepan, pour 8 cups of water and place over high heat.
Once it comes to a boil, add the jamaica flowers, simmer at medium heat for 10 minutes and turn off the heat.
Let it cool down and strain into a heat proof glass or plastic water jar.
Add the sugar and lime juice, mix well, cover and refrigerate.

name: Mexican Martini
directions: Wet half the lip of a marini glass with water and dip it salt.
Pour the liquid ingredients into a cocktail shaker, then fill with ice; shake vigorously for about 10 seconds.
Strain into the glass; garnish with olives on small wooden skewer.

name: Vanilla-Toffee Latte (Diabetic Version)
directions: Steam  milk.
Add syrups to tall cup.   Pour steamed milk into the cup and add brewed espresso and stir.
Add some foamed milk to the top.

name: Smoke Signals Cocktail
directions: Line heavy large pot with heavy-duty foil. Sprinkle wood chips over bottom of pot; cover. Turn exhaust fan on high. Heat pot over high heat until smoke begins to form inside pot. Fill 9 x 4 1/2 x 3-inch metal loaf pan with ice. Place in pot; cover tightly. Smoke ice until just melted, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat. Cool slightly. Cover loaf pan tightly with plastic wrap; freeze until firm, at least 6 hours. Using ice pick, cut ice block crosswise into *large* smoked ice chunks allowing 1 per glass. Wrap tightly in plastic and keep frozen.

Bring 1 cup water and sugar to boil in medium saucepan over high heat, stirring until sugar dissolves. Add pecans; reduce heat to medium and simmer until syrup tastes like pecans, about 12 minutes. Strain; discard pecans. Cover and chill pecan syrup until cold, about 2 hours.

Place 5 tablespoons whiskey, 3 tablespoons Sherry, 1 tablespoon lemon juice, and 3 tablespoons pecan syrup in cocktail shaker. Fill with plain ice cubes; cover and shake until cold. Divide mixture between 2 old-fashioned glasses. Repeat with remaining 5 tablespoons whiskey, 3 tablespoons Sherry, 1 tablespoon lemon juice, 3 tablespoons pecan syrup, and ice. Place 1 smoked ice chunk in each glass and serve.
NOTE:
One reviewer suggested the smoking be done with the BBQ outdoors. Sounds like a good idea to me too.

name: Refreshing Orange Lemonade
directions: In a pitcher, combine lemonade mix, lemon juice, orange juice, and orange flower water.
Mix thoroughly.
Add water; mix again, and chill.
Enjoy!

name: Ginger Sangria
directions: Mix together first 6 ingredients, refrigerate for at least 4 hours.
When ready to serve, add in the blood orange soda & ginger brew, then pour over ice.
Note: you can replace the blood orange soda & ginger brew with 750ml ginger ale - makes the concoction a little sweeter with a little less of a ginger kick.

name: Caramel Frappuccino
directions: Make sure the coffee is double-strength. you can double to amount of coffee to make it double-strength or use a french press.
Combine all the ingredients in the blender until smooth.
Top with Whip cream & additional caramel syrup if desired & for that authentic starbucks look.
If you want a mocha frappuccino, Instead of 3 tbsp of caramel, use 3 tbsp of Hershey's chocolate syrup.

name: Sunset Margarita
directions: Put about 1 cup ice cubes in a pitcher. Pour in tequila, triple sec, orange juice, and lime juice. Stir well and divide between two cocktail glasses. Using the back of a large spoon, carefully pour 2 tablespoons pomegranate juice down the inner side of each glass. Garnish each with fresh lime peel, crushed slightly just before adding.

name: Ct's Copycat Gatorade Sports Drink- Pantry Friendly & Easy
directions: Fill 1 gal shakable jug 3/4 way with cold water.
Add sugar, salt & the lime for the flavoring.
Shake & mix vigorously.
Now add the remaining cold water to make 1 gallon total.
Shake & mix again.
Put in fridge & serve cold which usually takes about an hour.  I put this chill time in under "cooking time".
Flavoring variations, omit the lime juice & add one of the following:  3/4 cup lemon juice concentrate or 3/4 cup frozen orange juice concentrate or 2 packets unsweetened Kool-Aid (.13 oz each).

name: Island Breeze
directions: Shake and serve over ice. Garnish with a fresh peach slice.

name: Cherry Fruit Punch
directions: Combine all and shake with ice
serve either strained or with ice , i prefer ice :).

name: Apple/Carrot/Ginger Juice
directions: Send everything through juicer. Make sure lime is peeled before juicing.

name: Sarsaparilla Rose Tea
directions: Assemble all the ingredients and place in a tea ball. Note: If you don't own a tea ball, then you can put the ingredients directly in the water and then strain out later.
Place tea ball in hot water and steep for 10 minutes.

name: Lemon Black Tea
directions: Assemble all the ingredients and place in a tea ball.  Note: If you don't own a tea ball, then you can put the ingredients directly in the water and then strain out later.
Place tea ball in hot water and steep for 10 minutes.

name: Hibiscus "anti-Kool Aid" Tea
directions: Assemble all the ingredients and place in a tea ball.  Note: If you don't own a tea ball, then you can put the ingredients directly in the water and then strain out later.
Place tea ball in hot water and steep for 10 minutes.
Add sweetener as needed.
Note: this quantity of tea is actually enough to make about 2 quarts of tea.

name: Hibiscus Ginger Tea
directions: Place hibiscus flowers and ginger in a tea ball.
Note: If you don't own a tea ball, then you can put the ingredients directly in the water and then strain out later.
Place tea ball in hot water and steep for 10 minutes.

name: Blueberry Lemonade
directions: fill tall glass or goblet glass with ice.
Add blueberry vodka, blue curaco and lemonade to fill glass.
Stir well.
Garnish with blueberries if you want.

name: White Vanilla Tea
directions: Assemble all the ingredients and place in a tea ball.  Note: If you don't own a tea ball, then you can put the ingredients directly in the water and then strain out later.
Place tea ball in hot water and steep for 10 minutes.

name: Rosemary Lemon Drop Martini
directions: Muddle 1 sprig of rosemary with a slice of lemon.
Add vodka, lemon juice, sugar, rosemary/lemon muddle and ice cubes into cocktail shaker. Shake vigorously so sugar dissolves.
Pour into chilled martini glass rimmed with sugar. Garnish with lemon & rosemary sprig if desired.

name: Pineapple Upside Down Cake Martini
directions: Fill martini shaker (or other container with a lid) with ice.
Pour pineapple juice and vodka into the shaker. Add grenadine.
Gently shake, and pour into martini glasses.
Garnish with cherry. It looks pretty at the bottom of the glass.

name: Froth Cocktail White on Yellow
directions: In a large measuring cup, mix juice, nectar and alcohol.  Pour in 6 martini glasses.  Set aside.

Citrus Mousse: In a shaker, shake vigorously all ingredients until frothy.  With a spoon, distribute the mousse on top of each cocktail.  If needed, shake again the shaker to obtain more mousse.  Serve immediately.

name: English Toffee Tea Latte
directions: Pour boiling water over tea bag in a mug or glass.  Let steep 3-5 minutes.  Remove tea bag.
Steam together milk and syrups.
Pour  steamed milk mixture into the tea and stir.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Matcha Oat Milk Latte (Hot or Iced)

name: Sapphire Sea Martini
directions: Mix in a shaker with ice, strain into martini glass.

name: Champagne Cobbler Cocktail
directions: Fill a large goblet half full of cracked ice. Add lemon juice, curaçao and orange slice. Stir and top off glass with champagne or sparkling wine. Stir again gently.

name: Chanel No. 6
directions: Pour  vodka, Chambord and chilled pineapple juice into a champagne glass.
Top with well-chilled champagne.  Add a fresh raspberry.

name: Monkey La,la, Las
directions: Pour first 4 ingredients into blender
Add ice to nearly full,  blend on high speed till smooth, adding more ice to fill blender.
Pour into 4 tall glasses and serve with thick straws.

name: Creamy Chocolate Martini (Michael Smith)
directions: Gently heat the cream until it is simmering. Pour it over the chocolate and stir until the chocolate melts. Cool then stir in the liqueur. Chill.
Pour into martini glasses and top with optional garnish.

name: Crazy Cocktail
directions: Combine all ingredients together in a collins glass filled with ice cubes. Stir well, and serve.

name: Southern Love
directions: Fill an oversized cocktail or old-fashioned glass with ice cubes.
Let it sit for 2-3 minutes to chill the glass.
Holding the ice so it doesn't fall out, discard any melted water. (I would just chill the cocktail glass in the freezer/refrigerator, than add ice and proceed).
Pour in the bourbon and amaretto, and top with the cola.
Stir and serve immediately.

name: The Bourbon Orange Thing
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker halfway full with ice cubes.
Pour the bourbon, orange liqueur, vanilla vodka, and creme de menthe into the shaker.
Shake vigorously until well chilled.
Strain into an oversized cocktail glass, and garnish with the orange twist.
Serve immediately.

name: Iced Tangerine Mint Green Tea
directions: Combine all ingredients in a pitcher and enjoy.

name: Carob Chai Tea
directions: Put water and spices (except for the black tea) into a small pot.
Add water and cook on medium for 6 minutes, then add black tea.
Place lid on pot and cook for 6 minutes.
Add in milk and stir, then turn off the stove burner.
Add sugar and stir until completely dissolved.
Strain spices out and enjoy!

name: Low Carb Pumpkin Spice Latte
directions: Combine heavy cream and pumpkin in a saucepan over medium heat and stir constantly. Stir in Splenda and spices.  Heat just until boiling.
Pour mixture into blender and process on high for 20 seconds (be careful!).
Pour into a large cup, add coffee, and enjoy!

name: Top-Shelf Tea
directions: Combine the tequila, rum, vodka, Cointreau, gin, lemon juice, and simple syrup into a cocktail shaker filled 3/4 with ice.
Shake well and strain into a tall glass two-thirds filled with ice.
Top with cola and a lemon twist; serve immediately.
*To avoid the overly sweet taste of high-fructose corn syrup, use Boylan Cola or Mexican Coca-Cola, which still uses cane syrup as its sweetener.

name: Homemade Ale
directions: In a large, non-reactive stock pot, add malt syrup and water. Add hops. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat to a simmer and boil for 1 hour, stirring often.

Cool then strain the hop mixture through a funnel, into a sterilized 7 gallon fermenting tank NOTE: I don't know what a fermenting tank is, but I would guess a ceramic or glass jug (like a milk jug) with a cork or rubber seal.
Add the water and yeast. Seal the top with a stopper. Ferment for 1 1/2 weeks.
Strain the beer. Bottle and age for another 2 to 3 weeks.

name: Eve's Demise
directions: Mix all together and serve over ice.

name: Mint Simple Syrup
directions: Boil the sugar and water until dissovled.
Add honey.
Stir in mint and bring to a boil.
Let steep until it turns green, about 1/2 hour.
Pour through a sieve.
Keep in refrigerator.

name: Star Fruit (Carambola) Cocktail
directions: Blend all ingredients except for garnish.
Garnish with a slice of star fruit.

name: Original Sandy Margarita
directions: Add tequila, margarita mix, and orange juice to glass mug.
Stir.
Add enough ice so the ice goes to the bottom of the mug.
Stir until drink is thoroughly cold.
Sprinkle salt on exposed ice cubes.
Let sit for 3 minutes while salt starts to melt the ice.

name: Star Fruit (Carambola) and Ginger Drink
directions: Trim the ends and edges of the star fruit.
Blend star fruit and ginger with water and lime juice then strain (or not, I don't). Add sugar and serve chilled.

name: Mint Stevia Drink
directions: Put 1/2 c Stevia leaves and 1 c mint leaves in saucepan in 2 liters of water. Bring to a boil and then turn down and simmer for 1 hour.  Strain and cool, set aside.
Juice 4-6 limes and add the juice to a pitcher, add 1/2 to 3/4 c of stevia concentrate then fill with water.  Add a few slices of lime.
Serve over ice and enjoy.

name: Magic Bullet Easy Frozen Daiquiri
directions: Fill a PARTY MUG with ice.
Pour in the daiquiri mix and rum.
Twist on the CROSS BLADE and place the mug onto the power base.
Blend on LOCK or pulse until smooth.
Twist off the blade and twist on a comfort lip ring.  Enjoy!
Variations:
Strawberry Daiquiri - add a handful of fresh or frozen strawberries before blending.
Diva Daiquiri - add 1oz. coconut rum before blending.
Purple Haze - add 1/2 oz. Blue Curacao before blending.
Derby Daiquiri - add 2 Tbls. fresh orange juice before blending.

name: Mexican Iceberg (Cocktail)
directions: To a blender, add ice and all ingredients except Sherbert. Blend until ice is fully crushed and liquid is frothy.
To a cocktail glass, add the sherbert. Top with the blender mixture. The sherbert will float underneath like an iceberg.

name: Pumpkin Spiced Latte
directions: In a jar with a sealed lid, shake milk 30 seconds (or until it is frothy) and doubled in size.
Remove lid and place in microwave for 30 seconds.
Pour milk (using a spoon to hold back the foam) into a mug of your choice.
Pour coffee or espresso into mug.
Pour rest of milk and foam into mug.
Top with a sprinkle of spice of your choice.

name: Kahlua-Chocolate Whipped Cream
directions: In a chilled bowl, whip cream until it begins to thicken.
Add sugar, cocoa and Kahlua.
Continue whipping until soft peaks form.
Store covered in the refrigerator if not using immediately.

similar.name: Tipsy Cafe Au Lait With Chocolate Whipped Cream

name: Macadamia Fudge Cappuccino
directions: In a 12-ounce cup, combine syrups and espresso.
Fill cup with steamed milk, top with whipped cream and sprinkle with cocoa powder.
Serve immediately.

name: Hangover Bloody Marys
directions: To make the Jalapeno Pepper Vodka:
Place the two jalapeno peppers in a bottle of vodka for 2 to 4 days, depending on how hot you like your vodka.
Remove the peppers and the vodka is ready to drink. (If you leave the peppers in the vodka indefinitely, the vodka will get hotter and hotter.).
Combine the tomato juice, horseradish, Worcestershire sauce, lime juice, Tabasco sauce, and the spices; mix well and adjust seasoning.
Pour the mix into glasses filled with ice cubes, leaving enough room for the vodka.
Generally, 1 to 1½ ounces of liquor per 6 ounces of mix is used.
Garnish each glass with a sprinkling of pepper and one stalk of celery or a lime slice.
Serve immediately if not sooner.

name: Bacardi Pink Squeeze
directions: Pour Rum into tall glass filled with ice.
Fill with Pink Lemonade.

name: Pink Hound (Cocktail)
directions: Shake over ice and strain into glass.

name: Pink Cello (Cocktail)
directions: Serve as a shot or over ice.

name: Pink Floyd (Cocktail)
directions: Mix and pour over ice.

name: Pink Panther (Cocktail)
directions: Shake with ice and strain into chilled 10 oz. martini glass.
Sink a splash of grenadine syrup and garnish with an orange wheel.

name: Pink Prozac (Cocktail)
directions: Shake with ice and strain.
Serve in chilled cocktail glass with lemon twist garnish.

name: Pink Pussycat (Cocktail)
directions: Shake over ice and pour into glass.

name: Pink Ranger (Cocktail)
directions: Shake. Serve in tall glass over ice.`.

name: Pink Rose (Shooter)
directions: Shake and pour into chilled shot glasses.

name: Pink Sin Martini
directions: Shake with ice and strain into martini glass.

name: Pink Gin Fizz (Cocktail)
directions: In a glass, pour orange juice over ice. Combine gin, simple syrup, and pink grapefruit juice; slowly pour over orange juice. Top with soda water.

name: Pink Grapefruit " Margaritas " (Non-Alcoholic)
directions: Place sanding sugar in a shallow dish or plate. Slice six thin rounds from the middle of lime; set aside. Rub lime wedge around rims of six glasses; dip each rim in sugar to coat. Pour 1 teaspoon pomegranate syrup into bottom of each glass.

Place grapefruit juice and 2 cups ice cubes in a blender. Process on high speed until ice is crushed. Pour frozen mixture into glasses, and stir to combine with syrup. Garnish with reserved lime rounds, and serve immediately.

name: Magic Bullet Peppermint Mocha
directions: Start by grinding your own dark roasted coffee beans using the flat blade. The finer the grind, the stronger the coffee, so blend into a coarse sand texture for lighter brews or a fine powder for a strong coffee -- then brew a pot of coffee.
Fill 1/4 of the tall-cup with milk and the peppermint candy.  Blend with the cross blade for about 7 seconds.
Microwave the milk on high for 35-45 seconds.  DO NOT LET THE MILK FOAM UP OUT OF THE CUP -- stop it before it hits the top of the cup.
Open the cup and add the chocolate syrup, then fill the tall-cup to just about to the top with coffee and pulse 3-4 times.
Pour into cups and serve.

similar.name: White Chocolate Mocha With Peppermint Syrup

name: Whiskey, Passionfruit and Lemon Iced Tea
directions: Place to boiling water and tea-bags into a bowl and set aside to infuse the flavours for 5 minutes. Reomve the tea-bags from the water and add the sugar, lemon juice and passionfruit pulp and stir until the sugar has completely dissolved set aside or refrigerate and allow the mix to cool completely.
Put the whiskey, soda and tea mixture into a 2 litre (aprox 8 cups) jug and stir to combine. Fill the glasses with ice and pour over the iced tea.
Serve.

name: Iced Mochaccino
directions: combine in a glass over ice.

name: Iced Cafe Latte
directions: fill glass with ice.
Pour espresso over ice and top up with milk and a bit of foam.
Sweeten if desired.

name: Iced Cappuccino
directions: combine in glass and sprinkle with cinnamon or nutmeg.  Sweeten to taste.

name: Iced Cappuccino Royale
directions: Combine espresso, milk and extract in a cup, over ice.
Top with whipped cream.
Garnish with a thin wafer if desired.

name: Iced Macchiato
directions: Pour espresso over ice and top with foam.

name: Iced Espresso Con Panna
directions: Pour espresso into cup ver ice, top with a dallop of whipped cream.

name: Iced Americano
directions: Combine in a glass with ice.

name: Iced Espresso
directions: Pour espresso over ice and enjoy.

name: Honey Iced Coffee
directions: Stir honey into coffee to taste,.
Pour coffee over ice in a large glass, and top with whipped cream.

name: Iced Cardamom Coffee
directions: Boil cardamom in the water for 5 minutes. Strain and use water to brew coffee.
Pour coffee over ice and sweeten with sugar to taste.

name: Spiced Iced Coffee
directions: Place all coffee base ingredients in a container and let sit for 30 minutes.
Strain coffee mixture into a pitcher, removing spices, and store in refridgerator.
To serve, pour over ice and add milk and sugar to taste.

similar.name: Homemade Coffee Mix in a Jar

name: Iced Almond Coffee
directions: Combine first 5 ingredients in a pitcher and chill.
Place ice in 4 glasses and pour chilled coffee over.
Top with whipped cream and garnish with sliced almonds if desired.

similar.name: Make Iced Coffee in Five Minutes

name: Iced Cafe Au Lait
directions: Fill glass with ice; add chilled coffee.
Steam milk and pour over ice, leaving a bit of foam on top.

name: Spiced Iced Coffee
directions: Combine all ingredients except whipped cream, in a saucepan and warm over low heat.
Remove from heat once sugar is dissolved and let cool to room temperature.
Remove cloves and cinnamon stick.
Pour over ice and top with whipped cream.

similar.name: Homemade Coffee Mix in a Jar

name: Iced Mint Coffee
directions: combine coffee, extract, and milk.
Pour over ice.
Garnish with a mint sprig.

name: Spiced Chocolate Espresso
directions: Combine everything except the syrup and whipped cream in a metal pitcher.
Steam until hot anf frothy.
Pour into 2 mugs and add 1 tsp syrup to each.
Top with whipped cream.

name: Mochaccino
directions: combine in a mug,.

name: Butterscotch Cappuccinno
directions: Combine espresso and syrup in a mug.
Add steamed milk.

similar.name: Chocolate Cappuccino Coffee Mix (In a Jar)

name: Cappuccinno Royale
directions: Combine espresso, milk and extract in a cup.
Top with whipped cream,.
Garnish with a thin wafer if desired.

name: Maiden's Prayer Cocktail
directions: Pour all ingredients over ice in a mixing glass.  Stir. Strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Corpse Reviver #2
directions: Pour all over ice in a mixing glass.  Stir. Strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Cherry Limeade Cooler
directions: Combine seltzer water, thawed limeade concentrate and cherry juice.
Add ice.
If desired, garnish with lime slices and cherries.
Serve immediately.

name: Grape Escape
directions: Mix all ingredients and pour over ice, or go straight up.
Garnish with a skewer of grapes.

name: Prince of Wales Cocktail
directions: In a mixing glass dissolve sugar in bitters and a splash of water.
Add rye whiskey, maraschino cherry juice or liqueur, pineapple chunks, and lemon zest.
Fill with a generous amount of ice.
Cover and shake vigorously to crush pineapple.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Add champagne and garnish with lemon twist.

name: Southern Sweet Tea
directions: Bring 4 cups water to a boil over high heat in 2-quart saucepan.
Remove from heat; add tea bags and brew 15 minutes, dunking tea bags several times.
Remove tea bags and squeeze.
Stir in sugar and baking soda until completely dissolved.
Stir in remaining 12 cups water.

similar.name: Perfect Sweet Tea (Secret of the South)

name: Ginger Tea
directions: Put ginger and water in a small saucepan and bring to a boil.  reduce heat to medium-low and simmer 20 to 25 minutes.
Strain slices and discard.  Stir in honey.  I generally use 1 to 1 1/2 tsp of honey for a cup.  I don't worry too much about peeling the ginger, as long as it has been cleaned.

name: Sparkling Cosmopolitan
directions: Stir together the first 4 ingredients in a large pitcher; chill until ready to serve.
Pour about 1/3 cup cranberry mixture into each of 16 champagne glasses.
Fill each glass with sparkling wine; garnish if desired.

*Sugared cranberries-roll fresh cranberries in light corn syrup; remove from syrup with a fork, shaking off excess; dredge in sugar, and let dry on a wire rack; thread several sugared cranberries on a wooden pick, and place in each glass.

name: Iced-Coffee Frappe
directions: Coffee: 4 tablespoons per 6-ounces of water or 1 1/2 cups cold-brewed coffee concentrate.

Coffee Concentrate: Put 1/2 cup ground coffee and 1/2 cup cold water in glass container and let sit 12 hours. Strain the coffee grounds with a filter. If the coffee looks cloudy, strain again. You can store up to 2 weeks in the refrigerator. To serve, add cold water, ice, milk, and sugar as desired.

To make Frappe: In a blender, puree coffee, milk, sugar, and ice. For thicker consistency, add more ice and blend. Pour into 2 glasses, and top with whipped cream and chocolate sauce if desired. Serve immediately.

name: Smashing Pumpkin Cocktail
directions: In saucepan combine brown sugar and water, bring to a boil to dissolve sugar.  Remove from heat and let cool.  In cocktail glass muddle tangarine slices.  In a shaker filled with ice combine 1/2 oz simple syrup, pumpkin puree, bourbon and Grand Marnier.  Shake well and strain into cocktail glass.  Garnish with nutmeg if desired.

name: Spiced Apple Cider With Rum Whipped Cream
directions: cream.
Stir all ingredients in medium bowl. Chill until ready to use, up to 1 day.
cider.

Bring first 6 ingredients to boil in heavy large pot, stirring occasionally. Reduce heat to medium and simmer until mixture is reduced to 6 cups, 35 to 40 minutes. Strain cider into medium saucepan. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cool, cover, and chill.
Return cider to simmer. Remove from heat. Mix in 1/2 cup Tuaca and 1/4 cup dark rum. Divide cider among 8 mugs.
Beat cream until peaks form. Spoon whipped cream atop cider and serve.

name: Violet Sunset
directions: Muddle 6 berries and mint in a mixing tin with a splash of club soda. Add fresh squeezed lemon juice and simple syrup. Add ice and vodka. Shake to mix and splash soda. Pour into a tall glass. Garnish with 3 speared blueberries.

name: Amarula Sunset Safari
directions: Pour all the ingredients into a deep martini glass pre-filled with ice cubes and stir gently with a spoon to combine the flavours.
Garnish with a cinnamon stick and orange rind or an orange wedge.

name: Dad's Kaluah
directions: Heat six cups sugar and six cups water in large pan. Simmer until thick and syrupy. Thirty minuets or so maybe more maybe less. Meanwhile combine four cups boiling water with coffee and vanilla, stir to dissolve. The syrup is the tricky part if cooked too long it will be just fine as long as it is not burnt. Remove syrup from heat and add coffee mixture. If there are any chunks of hardened sugar the syrup has been cooked too long. To remedy this cook and stir over low heat until dissolved. Cool the end result until at least lukewarm before adding vodka. I place the pan in a sink full of ice water to cool faster. Once vodka is added this makes about 1 gallon. To make less halve ingredients and use one fifth (750 ml) of vodka.

name: Blue Caribbean Sunset
directions: Fill a highball glass with ice and add vodka and coconut rum. Fill with lemonade. Splash Blue Curacao. Garnish with pineapple leaf and lemon wheel, if desired.

name: Mocha Frosting Martini
directions: Add all ingredients in a shaker with ice and shake.
Pour in a martini glass.

name: Isis Wicked Ginger Rum Cocktail
directions: Fill glass with ice, pour in rum, then the ginger beer. top with the soda water and grated ginger, stir, garnish with a slice of candied ginger, then, sit back and enjoy, it will take you away to somewhere warm and breezy.
If you love strong ginger flavor like me, taste it before you add the soda water, it will mellow the flavor out.
Delicious tall drink for one or two small ones to share.

name: Scorpion Bowl
directions: Place the crushed ice in a large pitcher and pour in the gin, dark rum, 151 proof rum, light rum, vodka, grenadine, orange juice, pineapple juice, and lemon juice. Stir well to mix, then pour into a large, decorative cocktail glass and garnish with pineapple, cherries, and straws.

name: Spiced Apricot Cider
directions: Combine ingredients in a 3 quart slow cooker.
Cover and cook on low for 2 hours.
Remove cloves and cinnamon sticks before serving.

name: I Am Sick As a Dog Tea
directions: Bring ginger and water to boil.
Add honey, lemon juice and tea bags.

name: Easy Vanilla Soda
directions: Put sugar in the glass.
Add the vanilla to the glass.
Mix the vanilla and sugar.
Add the Club soda ( add a little at a time to see how much you want, to much will ruin the flavor! ).
Stir until sugar dissolves and Enjoy!
4 glasses of this soda has less sugar than a can of pop!

name: Caramel Vanilla Martinis
directions: Fill a mixing glass or tumbler three-fourths full with ice. Add the Amaretto, Irish cream liqueur and vodka; stir until condensation forms on outside of glass.
Drizzle chocolate syrup on the inside of two chilled cocktail glasses if desired. Strain Amaretto mixture into glasses. Serve immediately.

name: Cranberry Rita
directions: Put everything in your blender (mine is a blender on steroids) and blend.
Pour.
Enjoy.
You can replace kumquat, calamondin and orange with lime or lemon for a different flavor.  Have fun with it.

name: Geechee Cocktail
directions: mix ingredients in blender with crushed ice. pour into tall punch glass.
decorate with whipped cream, curls of bitter chocolate and a cherry.

name: Green Lantern
directions: Fill glass with pineapple juice and a bit of sprite --
Then --  Enjoy! :).

name: Marshmallow Vodka Cocoa
directions: Warm milk and combine with instant hot cocoa and marshmallow vodka. Stir and top with marshmallows if desired.

name: Irish White Russian
directions: In a low ball glass, add ice until full, then add vanilla vodka, Kahlua, Cask and Cream, then top off with milk, Stir, and enjoy!

name: Coco Snowball Cocktail
directions: Rim a martini glass with honey and fresh shredded coconut.  Shake well and pour into a martini glass.

name: Stone Fence
directions: Pour 1/4 cup of applejack into each of two tall glasses, and add a dash of bitters to each, if you wish.
Add several ice cubes or cracked ice, fill each glass with cider, and serve.

similar.name: Cider Heaven  (Cider and Rum over Ice)

name: Hot Chocolate With Assorted Syrup Stir-Ins
directions: Pour water into slow cooker.  Heat on high for 1-2 hours, OR you could heat water in a tea kettle, and pour into the slow cooker. Turn cooker on low and heat for an hour.
Stir in hot chocolate mix until well blended.
Arrange the syrup stir in a small bowl.
Place 1 tablespoon of desired syrup in each mug before ladling hot chocolate in,.
Add hot chocolate in mug, and stir well.
Top with whipped topping if desired.

name: Sex on the Beach
directions: Add vodka and peach schnapps to a highball glass over ice.
Fill with equal measures of cranberry juice and orange juice, and stir.

similar.name: Tgi Friday's Sex on the Beach

name: Peach Sangria
directions: Fill mixing glass with ice. Add white zinfandel, riesling, limeade and Monin Peach. Cover and shake. Pour into wine glass and top off with fruit and ice.

name: Scotch Fizz
directions: Shake Scotch and Cointreau with ice cubes until shaker is frosted.
Divide into 4 chilled champagne flutes.
Top with the Champagne or sparkling wine.
Garnish with the lemon peel and serve.

name: Avai Berry Cosmo Martini
directions: Put all into shaker filled with ice.  Shake well.  Put into chilled martini glass and enjoy!

name: Pudding Shots
directions: Mix above well. Pour into little shot glasse- little plastic throwaway ones work great. can top with a little shaved chocolate. Do ahead and Keep in freezer and ready to serve!

similar.name: Black Cocoa Whey Protein Drink Mix

name: Blizzard Martini
directions: Pour ingredients into a shaker filled with ice and shake well.  Pour into a martini glass.  Garnish with shredded coconut.

name: French Kiss Martini
directions: Pour ingredients into shaker filled with ice.  Shake well.  Pour into martini glass.  Garnish with a speared cherry or raspberry.

name: Southern Hot Buttered Rum
directions: Boil first 6 ingredients about 5 minutes.
Remove from heat, add butter, stir till melted, strain into 8 warm mugs, and divide rum among them.

name: Crema De Vie
directions: Make a syrup by mixing the sugar and water in a saucepan and simmer for 3 minutes. Let it cool to room temperture.
In a large bowl, beat the yolks until light yellow. Add the milks (condensed and evaporated), the vanilla, and the rum. Stir in the sugar syrup.

name: Black Jack Martini
directions: Shake whiskey and raspberry liquer with ice.  Strain into a martini glass.  Add a splash of lemon-lime soda.  Garnish with lemon.

name: Irish Martini
directions: Put irish whiskey in chilled cocktail glass and swirl to coat it; drain excess.  Pour the vodka and vermouth in a shaker filled with ice, shake well, and strain into martini glass. Garnish with lemon twist and serve.

name: Peach Martini
directions: Shake over ice, pout and serve.

name: Pomegrante Martini
directions: Wet rim of martini glass and garnish with sugar.
Pour vodka, liquer and juice into shaker filled with ice and and shake well; pout into martini glass.
Squeeze a couple of drops of lemon juice from the lemon garnish into drink and then garnish the side of the glass with the slice of lemon.

name: Flirtini
directions: Pour ingredients into shaker filled with ice.  Shake well and pour into martini glass.

name: Candy Corn Martini
directions: Ring martini glass with orange juice and then powdered sugar.  Pour liquers in listed order into the glass.  Finish with a splash of grenadine.

name: Pumpkin Pie Martini
directions: Put milk and pumpkin puree in shaker and shake to combine.  Pour in vodka, creme de cacao and crushed ice; Shake well and strain into martini glass.  Garnish with pinch of pumpkin pie spice.

name: Peppermint Martini
directions: Pour ingredients into shaker filled with ice.  Shake and strain into chilled martini glass.  Garnish with mini candy cane.

name: Pomegranate Champagne
directions: To a chilled champagne flute add 1 ounce pomegranate juice.
Tilt flute and very gently pour champagne down side of flute so as to not break the bubbles.
Enjoy while still chilled and bubbly.

name: Perfect Storm Cocktail
directions: Drop 3 or 4 drops of angostura bitters into a glass.
Stir in the GM and ginger beer.
Pour over ice or add ice.
Squeeze in a few wedges of fresh lime, stir.

name: Steaming Hot Mocha
directions: Combine the first 3 ingredients in a Dutch oven.
Whisk in the milk and coffee until smooth.
Cook mixture over medium heat, stirring often, 20 minutes or just until bubbles appear (do not boil); remove from heat.
Stir in vanilla.
Ladle into mugs; top each serving with marshmallow creme, if desired.

name: Chocolate Cream Martini
directions: Dip rims of 2 martini glasses in melted chocolate on a plate to form a thin layer.
Place glasses in refrigerator until chocolate is firm.
Combine vodka and next 4 ingredients in a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Cover with lid; shake until thoroughly chilled.
Remove lid; strain into prepared martini glasses; serve immediately.
Recipe was tested with Absolut Vanilla Vodka, Tia Maria coffee liqueur, and Godiva chocolate liqueur.

name: Cava Sangria
directions: Press mint leaves against sides of a large pitcher with back of a wooden spoon to release flavors.
Stir in sparkling wine and next 3 ingredients.
Serve immediately over ice; garnish if desired.
*Other sparkling wine or Champagne may be substituted.
*Recipe tested with Cointreau and Grand Marnier orange liqueurs.

name: Ginger Citrus Tea
directions: Place the ingredients in a tea ball.
Steep in hot cup of water for 10 minutes.
Remove tea ball, sweeten if desired, and enjoy!

name: Watermelon Cooler
directions: In a blender, puree watermelon, agave syrup, lime zest and juice and ginger until smooth and liquidy.
Transfer to a pitcher, cover and refrigerate until chilled, about 3 hours. Serve cold, garnished with mint.

name: Hawaiian Shiitake Shooter
directions: In a saucepan, melt butter over medium heat. Add mushrooms and cook, stirring, until caramelized, 4-5 minutes.
Add broth, milk, hoisin sauce, soy sauce and brown sugar and bring to a boil.
Transfer to a blender or use an immersion blender and puree until smooth.

name: Crushed Gold
directions: Keep orange in freezer for few hours before preparation.
The pulp should be slightly crystalined.
Now, peel the skin, deseed the oranges and directly transfer the orange to wide mouth galss (mid size).
It should nearly occupy three fourth of the glass
Now crush the orange inside the glass carefully till the contents in the glass appear one thick crushed mass.
The volume now is about half of the glass.
Add vodka and fill the glass with carbonated water.
Crushed gold is ready - serve with a fork to pick crushed orange pieces while drinking.
Cheers!

name: Merry Mimosas for a Crowd
directions: Combine the orange juice and cranberry juice in a large pitcher.
Add Champagne just before serving.
Garnish, if desired, with frozen cranberries.
Can be made one at a time by stirring together the orange juice and cranberry juice, then pour equal parts orange juice mixture and Champagne into champagne flutes.

name: Ginger Cider
directions: Stir together the first 3 ingredients in a large Dutch oven.
Scrape the vanilla bean seeds into the cider mixture; add vanilla bean pod, cinnamon stick pieces, and peppercorns.
Bring to a simmer over med-high heat; decrease heat to low.
Keep warm until ready to serve.
Before serving, pour cider through a wire-mesh strainer  into a serving bowl, discarding solids.

name: Poinsettia Sangria
directions: Combine the first 6 ingredients in a large pitcher.
Cover and chill 1-8 hours.
Serve garnished with skewered sliced strawberries, sliced apple, and fresh raspberries.

similar.name: St. Germain Sangria Flora  - Adult  Cocktail

name: Liquid Marijuana
directions: Add all ingredients to a cocktail shaker half-filled with ice cubes. Shake vigorously and serve.

name: Peached Whale
directions: Pour ingredients over ice and shake vigorously; serve.

name: Delicious Eggnog
directions: First add the milk and sugar to a medium saucepan then whisk together over medium heat for 1 to 2 minutes until sugar is dissolved.
Next whisk the egg yolks in a large glass bowl and then while you’re whisking, pour in the hot milk mixture slowly (in a steady stream).
Pour everything into the saucepan and cook over medium-low heat and stir frequently so it doesn’t start simmering.
Cook for 20 to 25 minutes until it’s thick enough to coat the back of the spoon then strain into a bowl.
At this point you mix in the bourbon (if using) and the heavy cream.
Cool completely then cover and refrigerate until chilled.
Garnish with nutmeg when serving.

name: Adan's Sangria
directions: One hour before serving slice the citrus and then dice the apple. Put apples in a small bowl. Squeeze a couple of the lemon slices over the apple to coat with juice . Toss the apples with the lemon juice. Pour liquids into a large pitcher and stir. Put all of the chopped apple, 2 lemon slices, and 3 orange slices, and appoximately 5 marschino cherries in the pitcher. Don't squeeze the citrus you want it in a pretty ring. Stir and taste. You need to add sugar about 2 TBS at a time, stir and taste, to get to your sweetness preference. I dump in a 1/4 cup sugar and then go from there but I like sweet sweet. The remainder of your citrus and cherries will be for the glass garnish. Refrigerate for an hour to make sure the sugar dissolves completely. Serve over ice with fruit garnish. I love the fizz from the soda but I have also drank leftovers the next evening and they are still tasty.

name: Espresso Macchiato
directions: Serve espresso in a demitasse cup and top with a dollop of the frothed milk.

name: Espresso Breve
directions: Combine espresso and cream to taste in a espresso cup.

name: Flaming Lemon Drop
directions: Pour absolut citron into a shot glass and top off with a splash of galliano. Place one half lemon slice flat on the rim of the shot glass, put some sugar on the slice and soak the sugar with 151 proof rum.

Just before drinking, ignite the sugar. Blow the flame out when it seems to caramelize the sugar. Lick the sugar off the lemon slice, down the vodka mixture, then either suck the juices or bite the pulp of the lemon.

name: Pineapple Tea
directions: Combine the tea, pineapple juice, and the cinnamon sticks in saucepan and simmer over low heat for 1 to 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.  Remove the cinnamon sticks and pour the mixture into 2 cups.  Garnish with fresh slices of pineapple.

name: Raspberry Tea
directions: Place the raspberries at the bottom of the cup and pour the tea over the raspberries.  Stir in the jam and garnish with the fresh mint sprig.  Add the sugar and top with the whipped cream, if desired.
VARIATIONS:
For a Straberry Tea, substitute 1 tablespoon sliced fresh strawberries, 3/4 cup freshly brewed strawberry-flavored black tea, and 1 teaspoon strawberry jam.  Proceed as directed above.
For a Peach Tea, substitute 1 tablespoon peeled and sliced fresh peaches, 3/4 cup fresh brewed Peach-flavored black tea, and 1 teaspoon peach jam.  Proceed as directed above.

name: Cranapple Tea
directions: Combine the tea, juices, cinnamon sticks, and cloves in a saucepan and simmer over low heat for 3 to 4 minutes, stirring occasionally.  Remove the spices and pour over the mixture into 4 cups.  Add sugar to each individual cup, if desired, and garnish with a slice of apple.

name: Maple Tea
directions: Pour the tea into a cup.  Stir the maple syrup into the tea, top with whipped cream, and sprinkle with cinnamon.

name: Apricot Tea
directions: Combine the apricot nectar, cinnamon sticks, orange peel, and lemon peel in a saucepan and simmer over low heat for 1 to 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.  Add the tea and stir to mix all the ingredients together.  Remove the cinnamon sticks and the orange and lemon peel and pour 6 ounces of the mixture into each of 4 cups.  Add the brown sugar, if desired.

name: Cardamom Tea
directions: Place the tea in a teapot.  Combine the cardamom seeds and the water in a saucepan and simmer over low heat for 3 to 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.  Pour this water into the teapot and let the tea steep for 3 to 5 minutes, depending on your taste.  Strain into 2 cups and add milk or sugar, if desired.

name: Cinnamon Tea
directions: Place the tea and the cinnamon stick in a teapot, bring the water to a boil, and pour the water into the teapot.  Let the tea steep for 3 to 5 minutes, depending on your taste, nd then strain (or pour) the tea into a cup.  Stir in the milk and sugar and top with the whipped cream.  Sprinkle with the cinnamon.

name: Ginger Tea
directions: Place the ginger at the bottom of the teapot along with the tea.  Bring the water to a boil and pour the water into the teapot.  Let the tea steep for 3 to 5 minutes , depending on your taste.  Pour 6 ounces of the tea into each of 2 cups.  Add 1 teaspoon of sugar to each cup and garnish with small strips of lemon peel or fresh mint sprigs.

name: Spiced Cider Tea
directions: Combine the cider, cinnamon stick, cloves, and allspice in a saucepan and simmer over low heat for 1 to 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.  Pour the tea into the cider mixture and stir all of the ingredients together.  Strain into a mug.

name: Orange-And-Spice Tea
directions: Combine the milk, cinnamon stick, cloves, allspice, and nutmeg in a saucepan and simmer over low heat for 1 to 2 minutes, stirring occsionally.  Pour the tea into the saucepan and stir all of the ingredients until they are mixed together.  Strain this mixture into a cup.  If desired, add sugar and top with ground nutmeg.

name: Ice Cream Tea
directions: Pour the tea into a cup.  Add the ice cream.

name: Gunpowder-Mint Tea
directions: Place the tea, mint extract or mint leaves, and sugar, if desired, in a teapot.  heat the water to a boil and pour the water into the teapot.   Let the tea brew for 3 to 5 minutes, depending on your taste.  Strain or pour the tea into a cup.  Garnish with a fresh mint sprig.
NOTE:  You can also mix fresh or dried mint leaves with the Gunpowder tea before brewing--1/2 teaspoon of each works best.  Then omit the mint extract from the recipe.

name: Spiced Jasmine Tea
directions: Combine the milk, cinnamon stick, and cloves in a saucepan and simmer over the low heat for 1 to 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.  Pour the tea into the saucepan and stir to mix all the ingredients together.  Remove the cinnamon stick and cloves to pour the tea into 2 cups.  Add sugar, if desired.

name: Rose Black Tea
directions: Place the tea and the rose petals at the bottom of the teapot.  Boil the water and pour the water into the teapot.  Let the tea brew for 3 to 5 minutes, depending on your taste.  Strain into a cup, and add sugar, if desired.

name: Mocha Tea
directions: Stir the chocolate syrup into the milk in a saucepan over low heat for 1 to 2 minutes, or until hot (do not boil).  Add the tea and stir so that all of the ingredients are mixed  together.  Pour this mixture into a cup, top with whipped crem, and sprinkle with chocolate powder.

name: Tea Grog
directions: Melt the butter in saucepan over low heat.  Stir in the brown sugar, allspice, cinnmon, nutmeg, and cloves and allow the mixture to cool.  Store in a sealed container in the refrigerator.

To serve, combine in each cup 1 teaspoon of the grog mixture, 1 strip of orange peel, and 1 strip of lemon peel.  Add 6 ounces of tea and stir.  You can also add milk or cream or 1/8 teaspoon rum extract to each cup of grog, if desired.
VARIATION:  Omit the allspice and cinnamon and double the amount of ground nutmeg and cloves.  Proceed as directed above.

name: Chai I
directions: Combine the water, tea, masala, cardamom, and 1 teaspoon of the sugar in a large saucepan and simmer over low heat for 5 minutes.  Add the milk and the rest of the sugar.  Add the ginger 1 to 2 minutes after that, or when the mixture is back to a simmer.  Wait for 15 to 30 seconds and then strain the pot into 2 cups.

NOTE:  The tea masala is a premade spice mixture of ground black pepper, ground cardamom, ground cloves, and ground cinnamon.  It is available at most Indian food markets; you can also create your own, depending on your taste.

VARIATION:  To make Chai I without milk and sugar, combine the water, tea, masala, and cardamom in a large saucepan and simmer over low heat for 5 minutes.  Add the ginger, wait 15 to 30 seconds, and then strain the tea into 2 cups.

name: Chai IIi
directions: Combine the water, tea, cardamom, and fennel seeds in a large saucepan and simmer over low het for 2 to 3 minutes.  Add the milk and 1 to 2 minutes later, or when the mixtureis back to a simmer, strain the tea into 2 cups.  Add sugar, if desired.
VARIATION:  To make Chai III without milk, combine the water, tea, cardamom, and fennel seeds in a large saucepan and simmer over low heat for 2 to 3 minutes.  Strain the tea into 2 cups.

name: Mint Jelly Tea
directions: Place 1 teaspoon of jelly (or more, depending on your taste) at the bottom of each cup.  pour 6 ounces of tea into each cup and stir to the desired consistency.  (You may wish to save the jelly at the bottom of the cup as a treat.).
VARIATIONS:  Substitute orange marmalade or strawberry, cherry, raspberry, or apricot jam  for the mint jelly .  Proceed as directed above.

name: Brown Sugar Tea
directions: Combine the milk, brown sugar, and cinnamon stick in a saucepan and simmer over low heat for 1 to 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.  Add the tea and stir to so that all of the ingredcients are mixed together.  Pour this mixture into 2 cups, top with whipped  cream, and sprinkle with cinnmon.

name: Chai II
directions: Combine the water, tea, cardamom, cinnamon stick, cloves and 1 teaspoon of the sugar, and the peppercorns, if desired, in a large saucepan and simmer over low heat for 5 minutes.  Add the milk and the rest of the sugar.  Add the ginger 1 to 2 minutes after that, or when the mixture is back to a simmer.  Wait for 15 to 30 seconds  and then strain the tea into 2 cups.

VARIATION:  To make Chai II without milk and sugar, combine the water, tea, cardamom, cinnamon stick, cloves and peppercorns, if desired, in a large saucepan and simmer over low heat for 5 minutes.  Add the ginger, wait 15 to 30 seconds and then strain the tea into 2 cups.

name: Mango Margarita
directions: Add tequila, triple sec, simple syrup, orange juice, mango puree, and lime juice into a blender.
Add in the crushed ice and blend on high for 1 minute; pour into chilled cocktail glasses.

name: Varadero
directions: Blend the lemon juice and the syrup in an old-fashioned glass.
Add the ice and the rum.
Fill the glass to the top with 7-Up or soda water.
Garnish with a pineapple wedge.

name: Iced Coffee - Ree Drummond
directions: In large vessel, combine coffee & cold water, stirring well to make sure all coffee is in contact with water.
Set aside, to let steep overnight or at least 8 hours.
With another large vessel & mesh strainer, line strainer with 2 layers of cheese cloth.
Strain coffee into second vessel.
Store in refrigerator for up to 2 weeks.
To Serve:
Combine 1/2 coffee, 1/2 milk of your choosing over ice.  Sweeten as desired.
OR.
Sweeten AND cream with sweetened condensed milk, as desired.

name: Easier Crock Pot Apple Butter
directions: Peel, core, and cut apples into small pieces. Place in crock pot and cover with 1/4c. of sugar.
Pour approximately 1 Celsius apple cider over apples.
Sprinkle cinnamon, cloves, and allspice to taste (approximate. 1/2 tsp per 1 lb of apples).

Turn crock pot on low, and allow to cook for 10-12 hours. The apple butter should be a rich, dark brown and the apples should be completely smooth. To thicken apple butter, cook for last hour uncovered.
Refrigerate for up to two weeks, or freeze.

name: Pear and Granola Muffin (P90x)
directions: Preheat oven to 350.
Whisk together the first 5 ingredients in a large bowl to blend.
Stir both flours and sugar in medium bowl until no sugar lumps remain.
Mix in granola, baking powder, nutmeg and salt.
Add pear; toss to coat.
Stir flour mixture into egg mixture until blended
Divide among 10 muffin cups.
Bake until golden brown and tester inserted into center comes out clean (about 20 minutes).

name: Sandeman Cosmopolitan Cocktail
directions: Combine all ingredients in a mixing glass with ice. Shake vigorously. Strain and serve up in a chilled martini glass.

name: S'mores Martini
directions: Dip rim of chilled martini glass into the Toasted Marshmallow Syrup and then into graham cracker crumbs, set aside.
Fill mixing tin with ice, Vodka, Toasted Marshmallow Syrup, chocolate syrup and Half & Half; cap and shake.
Drizzle chocolate syrup in a spiral from bottom of glass up to the rim.
Strain cocktail into the martini glass and garnish.

Sprinkle chocolate shavings on top and place over three Oreo coated marshmallow halves speared with a bamboo skewer.  Note:  As an optional garnishment, toast 3 mini marshmallows, spear and place on top.

name: Grapefuit-Basil Gin Fizz
directions: Muddle basil in bottom of tall glass; add ice, grapefruit juice, gin and tonic. Stir, then top with a few drops bitters. Garnish with basil sprig.

name: Caribbean Coffee
directions: Use a 2-quart slow cooker.
Stir the coffee, rum, sugar, and extract together in the cooker.
Cover and cook on LOW for 4 hours, or on HIGH for about 2 hours.
Ladle into mugs and top with whipped cream, if desired.

name: Low Carb Mocha Frappuccino
directions: Brew the coffee and add Truvia while still hot, stir until dissolved.
Mix cold whipping cream with coffee ( This will cool the coffee down so you dont have to wait on it to cool. But if you have time you can just let it cool in the fridge or freezer).
Place all ingredients in blender (Vita-mix works great to get it so smooth, but any will do).
Blend until combined and smooth.
*Options- You dont have to use the Ovaltine, which will make the carbs Very very low as most of the carbs come from the ovaltine. You can use nesquik if you dont have ovaltine.
Can add some home made whipped cream on top (beat heavy cream and truvia or stevia until whipped).

name: King Zulu (Lucky Player King Cake Vodka)
directions: Rim a Collins-type glass with gold colored sugar.
Combine remaining ingredients in a cocktail shaker; shake.  Pour into an ice-filled cocktail glass rimmed with gold-colored sugar. Top with soda water or sparkling wine.

name: Cara Cara or Blood Orange Martini
directions: Put all ingredients into a shaker. Shake.  Makes 2 good size martinis.
or 4 small.
Cooking time is shaking time.

name: Beach Juice
directions: Mix equal parts of ingredients together.
For a single serving the measure is 1/3 cup each **for girls night we doubled the tequila**.
Serve over ice.
Garnish with a strawberry or mint.

name: Lemon-Mint Tea
directions: Pour the tea into 2 cups. Stir 1 teaspoon of sugar into each cup and garnish with lemon slices.

name: Chamomile-Mint Tea
directions: Pour the tea into a cup. Stir in the mint extract and the sugar. Top with whipped cream and garnish with a sprig of fresh mint.

NOTE:  You can also mix fresh or dried chamomile flowers and mint leaves together before brewing--1/2 teaspoon of each works best in 3/4 cup water. Or you can simply add equal amounts of brewed chamomile and mint tea together in the same cup. Then omit the mint extract from the recipe.

name: Apricot Iced Tea
directions: Mix the tea, nectar, and juice together and pour over ice. Add sugar and garnish with a slice of orange.

name: Raspberry-Mint Iced Tea
directions: Pour the tea over ice in a large glass. Stir in the mint extract and the sugar. Top with whipped cream and garnish with a fresh mint sprig.

name: Grape-Mint Iced Tea
directions: Mix the tea and juice together and pour this mixture over ice in 2 glasses. Garnish with fresh mint sprigs.

name: Cherry Iced Tea
directions: Pour the tea over ice in a tall glass. Add the cherry soda and ice cream. Garnish with a fresh cherry.

name: Peach Tea Punch
directions: Mix the tea, juices, and ginger ale together in a pitcher and pour this mixture over ice in 4 tall glasses. Garnish with slices of fresh peach.

name: Lemon Tea Punch
directions: Pour the tea over ice in 2 tall glasses. Stir the juice and soda into the tea and garnish with slices of lemon.

name: Passion Fruit Tea Punch
directions: Pour the tea over ice in a large glass. Add the carbonated water and sugar, if desired, and garnish with the slices of fruit.
VARIATION:  For a Mango Tea Punch, substitute mango-flavored black tea for the passion fruit-flavored black tea. Proceed as directed above.

name: Tea Crush
directions: Mix the tea, juices, crushed ice, and sugar in a blender for 15 to 20 seconds, or until smooth. Pour over ice in a tall glass and garnish with a slice of lemon and a slice of orange.

name: Banana Tea Blend
directions: Mix all the ingredients except the whipped cream in a blender for 15 to 20 seconds, or until smooth. Top with whipped cream, if desired.
VARIATION:  For a Banana-Chocolate Tea Blend, add 1 tablespoon chocolate syrup to the recipe. Proceed as directed above.

name: Strawberry Tea Shake
directions: Mix the tea and the ice cream in a blender for 15 to 20 seconds, or until smooth. Pour into 2 tall glasses and garnish with sliced fresh strawberries. Top with whipped cream and pour over ice, if desired.

VARIATION:  For a Peach Tea Shake, substitute peach-flavored black tea, peach ice cream, and slices of peeled fresh peach for for the strawberry-flavored black tea, strawberry ice cream, and fresh strawberries.

name: Vanilla Tea Shake
directions: Mix all the ingredients, except the whipped cream, in a blender for 15 to 20 seconds, or until smooth. Pour the mixture into a glass and top with whipped cream.

name: Vanilla-Orange Tea Shake
directions: Mix the tea, ice cream, and orange juice  in a blender for 15 to 20 seconds, or until smooth. Pour into a tall glass, top with whipped cream, and garnish with a slice of orange.

name: Hot Green Tea Float
directions: Place the ice cream in a tall glass and add the tea. Top with whipped cream, if desired.

name: Thai Iced Tea
directions: Bring the tea and the water to a boil in a saucepan and simmer over low heat for 3 to 5 minutes, depending on your taste. Strain the tea through a Thai tea strainer into another container and stir the sugar into the tea. Pour the tea over ice in a tall glass immediately, or after the tea has cooled to room temperature. Top with the half-and-half.
VARIATIONS:  For a really rich drink, substitute heavy cream for the half-and-half and proceed as directed above. You may also omit the cream altogether.

name: Lemon-Apple Iced Tea
directions: Mix the tea and juice together and pour over ice in 2 tall glasses. Add carbonated water and garnish with slices of apple and lemon.

name: Lemon Iced Tea
directions: Pour the tea over ice in a tall glass. Stir the lemon juice and sugar into the tea and garnish with a slice of lemon.

name: Lemon-Lime Iced Tea
directions: Mix the tea, juices, and ginger ale together in a large pitcher. Pour over ice in 4 tall glasses. Add sugar, if desired, and garnish with lemon and lime peel.

name: Almond Iced Tea
directions: Mix the tea, milk and sugar together and pour over ice in 2 tall glasses. Top with whipped cream and garnish with sliced almonds.

name: Raspberry Tea Punch
directions: Mix the tea and juices together and pour over ice in a tall glass. Add the carbonated water and sugar and garnish with fresh raspberries.

name: Raspberry-Apple Iced Tea
directions: Mix the tea and juice together and pour over ice in 2 tall glasses. Add the carbonated water and sugar, if desired. Garnish with fresh raspberries and apple slices.

name: Rose Iced Tea
directions: Place the petals  at the bottom of the teapot. Boil the water and pour the water into the teapot. Let the tea brew for 3 to 5 minutes, depending on your taste. Strain into a cup and cool to room temperature. Pour over ice in a tall glass and add the carbonated water. Stir the sugar into the tea, if desired, and garnish with sliced fresh strawberries.

name: Chamomile Iced Tea
directions: Mix the tea and juices together. Pour over ice in a large glass and garnish with grapes and slices of apple.

name: Orange-Grenadine Iced Tea
directions: Stir the grenadine into the tea and pour this mixture over ice in 2 tall glasses. Add the carbonated water, if desired, and garnish with slices of lime.

name: Little Pink Pearl (Non-Alcoholic)
directions: Place a cocktail glass in the freezer to chill.

Place the grapefruit juice, lime juice and orgeat in a cocktail shaker and fill it halfway with ice. Shake vigorously until the outside of the shaker is frosted. Strain into the chilled glass and garnish with the grapefruit slice.

name: Limeade
directions: Mix. The End.

name: Hibiscus-Grape Iced Tea
directions: Stir the juice into the tea and pour over ice in 2 large glasses. Add carbonated water and garnish with slices of orange.

name: Hot Mint Tea Float
directions: Place the ice cream into a tall glass and add the tea. Top with whipped cream and sprinkle with chocolate powder.

name: Mint Tea Float
directions: Pour the tea into a tall glass. Stir the chocolate syrup into the tea, add the ice cream, and top with the whipped cream and chocolate powder.
VARIATION:  Substitute 2 scoops of chocolate ice cream for the vanilla ice cream and chocolate syrup. Proceed as directed above.

name: Orange Tea Crush
directions: Mix all the ingredients together in blender for 15 to 20 seconds, or until smooth. Pour into a tall gass.
VARIATION:  For a Lemon Tea Crush , substitute a Lemon-flavored herb tea and lemon sherbet for the orange-flavored herb tea and orange sherbet. Proceed as directed above.

name: Peach-Yogurt Tea Shake
directions: Mix the tea, yogurt, and honey together in a blender for 15 to 20 seconds, or until smooth. Garnish with fresh slices of peach. (You can also pour this drink over ice, if desired).

VARIATIONS:  For a Strawberry-Yogurt Tea Shake, substitute strawberry-flavored herb tea and strawberry yogurt for the peach-flavored herb tea and peach yogurt. Proceed as directed above and garnish with sliced fresh strawberries.

For a Raspberry-Yogurt Tea Shake, substitute raspberry-flavored herb tea and raspberry yogurt for the peach-flavored herb tea and peach yogurt. Proceed as directed above and garnish with fresh strawberries.

name: Almond-Vanilla Tea Shake
directions: Mix the tea and the ice cream together in a blender for 15 to 20 seconds, or until smooth. Pour the mixture into a tall glass. Top with whipped cream and garnish with sliced almonds, if desired.

name: Basic Chai Tea
directions: Combine all ingredients except black tea in a small saucepan. Bring to a boil and remove from heat. Add tea and steep for 3 to 5 minutes. Strain and serve immediately.

name: Quick Chai Tea
directions: Combine all ingredients except black tea and heat over the stove. Bring to a boil and remove from heat. Add tea and steep for 3 to 5 minutes. Serve immediately.

similar.name: Hot Chai Tea With Almonds on the Side

name: Lime Tea
directions: Pour boling water over tea and steep for 5 minutes. Strain. Add sugar and lime skins and let stand for 1 hour. Remove skins from tea and add remaining ingredients. Serve chilled over ice.

name: Maui Iced Tea
directions: Combine all ingreients and serve over ice.

name: Special Iced Tea
directions: Combine 2 cups water and sugar in a large suacepan and boil for 5 minutes. Remove from heat and add 1 quart hot water and te bags. Steep tea bags for 3 to 5 minutes, according to taste. Add cold water, orange and lemon juice. Refrigerate or serve immediately over ice. Garnish each glass with a slice of orange and a sprig of mint for garnish.

name: Ginger Tea
directions: Bruise ginger slices with the flat side of a large knife blade. Place ginger in a large tepot and add sugar and water. Steep 5 minutes.

name: Party Punch
directions: Steep tea with cloves and cool. Combine juices with tea mixture and add ginger ale and lemon lime soda. Serve in ice-filled glasses and garnish with mint and fruit slices.

name: Apple Pie Cocktail
directions: Combine apple juice and cider and bring to a near boil.
Remove from heat and add sugar, cloves, and cinnamon sticks then stir.
Let mixture cool to at least room temperature and strain/remove cloves and cinnamon sticks.
Add half gallon of everclear.
Bottle it up. (make sure you have plenty of bottles cuz this makes almost three gallons of alcohol).
Enjoy warm or on the rocks. (make sure you shake bottle before pouring into your glass).

name: Pom Margarita Martini
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker half full of ice.
Add margarita mix, pomegranate juice, and tequila.
Wet the rim of a chilled martini glass with water an dip rim in salt (optional).
Cover cocktail shaker and shake tequila mixture vigorously.
Carefully strain into martini glass.
Garnish with lime slice.

name: Passionpolitan
directions: In a pitcher of ice, combine all ingredients.
Stir and serve over ice.

name: Cuervo Caribbean Mist
directions: Fill a glass halfway with ice.
Add pineapple juice, orange juice, tequila, and blue curacao; stir to combine.
Garnish with orange slice.

name: Mixed Berry Daiquiri
directions: In a blender, combine ice, frozen berries, sweet and sour mix, and rum.
Cover and blend until smooth.
Pour into a chilled glass.
Garnish with fresh berries; serve with a straw.

name: Blue Seafoam
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker with ice.
Add vodkas and curacao; shake vigorously.
Pour into a chilled glass; garnish with blueberries.

name: White Chocolate Creme Brulee' Martini
directions: Combine martini ingredients in a cocktail shaker filled halfway with ice. Shake for 30-40 seconds, and serve into a martini glass.

name: Jalapeno-Cucumber Margaritas
directions: Combine all ingredients in a pitcher.
Chill for at least an hour (the longer the margarita sits, the more cucumber and jalapeno flavors infuse into the drink).
Serve over ice in salt-rimmed glasses.

name: Monte Cristo Coffee Drink
directions: Rim a glass coffee mug with sugar. Add liqueurs and fill with hot coffee. Stir. Top with whipped cream, chocolate shavings, and orange zest.

name: The Red Zed
directions: In a coupe, add Absolut Vanilia and fill with chilled ZED Mocato Rose.
Drop in 2-3 cherry ice cubes**, sip and smile.
**To make cherry ice cubes, simply place cherry juice into ice cube trays and freeze…that’s it!

name: Southern Iced Tea Cocktail
directions: Fill a quart Mason jar with ice.  Add the rum, vodka and gin, lemon juice or lemonade, iced tea and simple syrup.  Stir thoroughly, taste and adjust sweetness if needed; garnish with a slice of lemon and sprig of mint. As always, drink responsibly.

name: Blue Valium
directions: In a tall or Hurricane-type glass mix liquor then add the add juices and garnish with a cherry.

name: Hot Mocha (With Kahlua or Amaretto)
directions: Gently melt the chocolate in a pan being careful not to burn it.
Gradually add the coffee and liqueur.
Pour into 2 warmed balloon glasses (or martini glass).
Spoon cream onto the top and decorate with chocolate beans/chips.

name: Chocolaccino
directions: Froth milk (can be done in blender for about 1 minute.
Mix with hot coffee.
Pour into a tall cup or glass and spoon whipped cream on top.  Top with grated chocolate.

name: Southern Belle With Apricot Garnish
directions: Put everything except the apricot in your blender and mix.
Pour into chilled glasses.
Garnish with slices of apricot.

name: Iced Cinnamon Coffee
directions: Pour coffee over cinnamon and cloves.  Cover and leave to infuse for at least one hour.
Remove cinnamon and cloves.
Sweeten to taste.
Pour into blender.  Add cream and six ice cubes.
Blend to a creamy froth.
Serve right away.
Does not include infusing time.

name: Rosy Glow
directions: Place 1 small  sprig mint in each section of ice cube tray.
Fill with apple juice; freeze.
Mix apple juice, Hawaiian fruit punch, and lemon juice.
Pour 3/4 over ice cubes.
Fill the rest of way with Sprite or 7-Up.

name: Malted Almond Hot Chocolate
directions: In a large saucepan, heat milk over medium heat until it begins to form bubbles around the edge of the pan.
While milk is heating, beat cream in a chilled bowl until it begins to thicken. Add sugar and 1/2 teaspoons of almond extract and beat until soft peaks form.
Whisk chocolate chips and malted milk powder into the milk and continue to stir until chocolate is melted.
Remove from heat and whisk in the vanilla and remaining teaspoons almond extracts.
Pour into mugs, spoon whipped cream over each, and sprinkle with a little malt powder.

name: Apple Pie Moonshine
directions: Pour apple juice and apple cider into a large pot and heat on medium-high.  Stir in both sugars and simmer the mixture for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.  In the last 5 minutes add the cinnamon sticks.  After 20 minutes, remove from heat and allow to cool.

When liquid is completely cooled add Everclear and the whipped cream vodka.  Remove cinnamon sticks before refrigerating the drink.  Place mixture in large pitcher or beverage container in the refrigerator.

name: Sugar Free Homemade Lemonade
directions: Stir together sugar and 1/2 cup boiling water until sugar dissolves.
Stir in lemon rind, lemon juice, and 5 cups cold water.
Pour into a 2 quart pitcher.
Chill 8 hours.
Serve over ice.

name: Chocolate S'mores Martini Recipe
directions: Drizzle chocolate syrup in chilled martini glass.  Rub marshmallow cremem around the rim of the martini glass and coate with crushed graham crackers.
Shake vodka and liqueur over ice and pour into glass.
Place large marshmallow on skewer and dip end in chocolate syrup then in crackers.  Put on top of drink, serve happy guests!

name: Softest Scramble Eggs - Quite Elegant
directions: Combine eggs and 1 1/2 tablespoons butter in a small room-temperature saucepan and season lightly with cayenne and salt.

Place over medium-low heat and cook, whisking gently and constantly while scraping bottom and sides of pan, until eggs are just thickened, creamy, and small curds begin to form, 3–4 minutes total. (If mixture begins to stick to pan while cooking, remove from heat; whisk gently for 30 seconds, then continue cooking over heat.)
Remove from heat.  Add 1/2 tablespoons butter; whisk until melted.
Season with salt; divide among small bowls.  This is so elegant, make the presentation tall if you have the bowl or glass for it.
Serve in egg shells and top with whipped cream and caviar, if desired.

name: Watermelon-Cucumber Cooler
directions: Set a large fine-mesh sieve over a large bowl or pitcher. In a food processor or blender, puree watermelon. Pour watermelon puree through sieve, pressing on solids with a rubber spatula (you should have about 2 cups juice). Puree English cucumber and pour through sieve into watermelon juice.

In a small bowl or measuring cup, stir together lime juice and honey. Add to watermelon and cucumber juices, along with vodka. Adjust sweetness with more honey if desired. To serve, fill four glasses with ice and top each with cocktail. Garnish with cucumber slices.

name: Honeydew Mint Mist
directions: Puree all the ingredients together in a blender.
Pour through a fine mesh sieve into a large pitcher.
Chill well.

name: Alton Brown's Martini
directions: Place some crushed ice into the martini glass you will be serving in, and set aside.

Place the 1 cup of crushed ice into a cocktail shaker. Pour in the vermouth and swirl it around, making as much contact as possible with the ice. Using a strainer, pour the vermouth out. Add the gin and stir well to combine.
Remove the ice from your serving glass and add the twist or olive. Using the strainer, pour the gin into the serving glass.
I admit that, since I have gotten older, I sometimes add a little of the crushed ice to my glass.  Makes it easier to have the second one.

name: Homemade Condensed Milk!
directions: In a storage container, combine both ingredients and set in the fridge for 24 hours.
Use the way you would use regular condensed milk!

name: Healthful Homemade Coffee Creamer With Flavor Options!
directions: In a medium saucepan over medium heat whisk together the condensed milk, milk of your choice and sweetener (if using).
Add in optional thickener at this time if needed.
When the mixture begins to steam, remove from heat and add in any of the optional flavor ingredients.
Stir well and transfer to a sealed glass bottle and store in the fridge until ready to use.
*****Flavor Options*****.
Pumpkin Pie Spice – 1/4 tsp pumpkin pie spice and 3 tbsp pumpkin puree (not pumpkin pie puree).
French Vanilla – 1 tbsp vanilla extract.
Chocolate – 1 tbsp vanilla and 3 tbsp cocoa powder.
Amaretto – 1/2 tsp cinnamon and 1 tsp almond extract.
Cappuccino – 1 tsp almond extract and 1/2 tsp orange extract.
Cinnamon Strudel – 1/2 tsp vanilla, 1 1/2 tsp cinnamon and 1 tsp almond extract.
Peppermint – 1/2 tsp peppermint or mint extract.
Hazelnut – 1/2 tsp hazelnut extract.

similar.name: Copycat French Vanilla Liquid Coffee Creamer

name: World's Greatest Margarita Recipe
directions: Add all ingredients to blender and blend well.
Pour either straight or over ice which dilutes it a bit.
Feel free to adjust above ingredients like the lemon or lime juices and sugar.

name: Summer Kick-Off Cocktail
directions: In a mixing glass, add Southern Comfort, Grand Marnier and fresh lemon juice; shake with ice until well blended. Strain into an ice-filled Mason jar or goblet. Top with iced sweet tea. Garnish with a wedge of lemon and sprig of mint.

name: Black Cherry Sangria
directions: Combine all the ingredients in a large ceramic or glass container; stir well.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight.
Serve over ice.

name: Fandango Sangria
directions: Combine all the ingredients except the 7-Up soda in a large ceramic or glass container and stir well.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight.
Just before serving, add the 7-Up.
Serve over ice; garnish with additional fruit.

similar.name: Peach, Apricot, Berry White Sangria for a Crowd

name: Pacific Blue Sangria
directions: Combine all the ingredients except the 7-Up in a large ceramic or glass container and stir well.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 4 hours.
Serve over ice and top with 7-Up.
Garnish with an orange wheel or pineapple wedge.

name: Watermelon Sangria
directions: Combine all the ingredients in a large ceramic or glass container; stir well.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 4 hours.
Serve over ice.

name: Daquiri
directions: Put strawberries, sugar, and ice in a blender.
Blend that up real nice.
Add the remaining ingredients.
Blend those up real nice too.
Chug.

name: Homemade Coffee Creamer
directions: Using an electric mixer, blend together boiling water, butter, sugar, and vanilla. Add the powdered milk. Mix thoroughly. Add  remaining water. Store in refrigerator.

name: The Perfect Mojito
directions: Muddle the leaves into the cane syrup to release the mint’s flavor.
Add the lime juice, rum, mineral water, and lime hull. Stir.
Shovel in the crushed ice until it towers over the brim.

name: Strawberry Slush
directions: Using a large bowl or empty plastic ice cream container/pail, mix all ingredients well. Cover and freeze, Scoop  slush into individual glasses and add 7up or Sprite.

name: Honey Lemon Balm Spritzers
directions: In a large pitcher, mix honey and warm water until honey combined.
Add lime/lemon juice and 1 cup cold water. Mix well.
Crush lemon balm and add to mixture. Using a muddle or wooden spoon handle, smash lemon balm in bottom of pitcher. Add lime/lemon slices and refrigerate mixture until chilled (about an hour).
Once chilled, add 2 cups of cold sparkling water. Stir.
Pour through a strainer into individual glasses over crushed ice.
Garnish beverages with lemon balm leaves and citrus slices
For alcoholic version, stir in 1 oz. of light liquor to each glass.

name: Mint Sweet Iced Tea
directions: Combine the sugar and water in a small saucepan and bring to a boil, stirring until sugar is dissolved.
Turn off heat and add tea bags, steeping to desired strength (for me, 3-5 minutes).
Remove tea bags and add ice until cool.
Serve in a tall glass over ice!

name: Mean Green Tropical Smoothie
directions: Peel oranges -- obviously.
Use frozen bananas and pineapple chunks (fresh) and cut into smallish pieces.
Add all veggies and fruit to blender like Vitamix or Blendtec.
Pour in almond milk.
Blend it's little heart out! Use the tamper to smoosh everything down!
Enjoy!

name: Basil Julep
directions: In a cocktail shaker, muddle together the basil leaves and simple syrup. Pour in the Irish whiskey, and stir briskly one or two times. Fill four glasses with crushed ice; pour equal portions of the drink over the ice, straining out the basil. Garnish with basil sprigs.

name: Strawberry Basil Margaritas
directions: Empty the limeade concentrate into a pitcher.
Add 2 1/2 cans of water and 1 1/2 (18 ounces, or 2 1/4 cups) cans of tequila (or a bit less, if you don't want your drinks to be quite as strong).
Hull the strawberries, slice lengthwise, and add to the pitcher.
Crumple the basil a little in your hands (this will help the basil flavor release into the drink) and add it to the pitcher, too.
Place the pitcher, covered, in the fridge overnight, or for at least four hours.

similar.name: Justin and Erica's STRAWBERRY BASIL WATERMELON AGUa FRESCa (REFI

name: Frozen Chee Chee
directions: Combine coconut cream, pineapple juice, and vodka in blender.  Blend until smooth.
Freeze, about 8 hours or overnight.
To serve, scoop into margarita glasses (an ice cream scoop works well), and pour lemon-lime soda over to fill.

name: Sparkling Bourbon Cocktails
directions: In large glass measuring cup, combine the bourbon, cinnamon stick, allspice and nutmeg; let stand overnight or up to 24 hours.
Strain out the spices and discard. Stir in the cider and lemon juice. Divide among 6 glasses. Garnish with lemon peel.

name: Pomegranate Potion
directions: Chill pomegranate juice.
Brew black tea with ¾ cup water and 1 teaspoon black tea. Let steep for 3 minutes, then discard the tea leaves.
In a little pot, bring brewed tea, minced ginger, allspice berries and ½ cinnamon stick to a slow boil, let simmer for 20 minutes.
Before removing from the stove, stir in 2 teaspoons corn syrup.
Place 1 ice cube in a mug.
Remove from stove, strain liquid through a sieve into the mug, over the ice cube.
Let cool to room temperature.
Do not chill! Chilling will kill the flavours, and you don't want that.
When cooled down to room temperature, add ½ cup chilled pomegranate juice.
Enjoy!

NOTE: the story continues --  Something reddish – ochre, hardly visible anymore. I spent many nights to restore the ancient, nearly destroyed writing, and then finally, I got it! It was the recipe of a potion made from pomegranate juice and other very obscure ingredients. You better not know what this was meant for, but after removing the more dubious and dangerous ingredients, a wonderful recipe for a recreating, healthy, yet aromatic and spicy potion remained!

name: Spiced Tea and Pomegranate Frappe
directions: Put juice in a small saucepan and add ginger, allspice, cinnamon, cloves and sugar. Stir.
Bring to a boil and boil 1 minute. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, 10 minutes. Add tea bags and simmer 2 minutes. Remove from heat and let steep 5 minutes.
Remove tea bags and let mixture cool to room temperature.
Strain liquid into a blender and discard spices. Add ice and cream and blend on high until ice is crushed and mixture is thickened.
Pour into a glass and enjoy!

name: Island Taxi Curacao Cocktail
directions: Chill a cocktail glass. Moisten the rim with a piece of lime, then sugar the rim.
Add your cocktail ingredients to a shaker, add ice and shake vigorously for 15 seconds. Strain into cocktail glass and garnish with lime wheel.

name: Pink Grapefruit Cocktail
directions: Shake the juices, orange liqueur, vodka and 1 T crushed ice in a shaker. Add a touch more juice or vodka if needed to to adjust the taste.
Strain into chilled martini glass and garnish with fruit wedge.

name: Breve-Style Hungarian Hazelnut Latte
directions: In an 8-ounce cup, combine syrups and espresso.
Fill cup with steamed half-and-half, top with whipped cream and garnish with shaved chocolate.
Serve immediately.

name: Breve-Style Rum Praline Latte
directions: In an 8-ounce cup, combine syrups and espresso.
Fill cup with steamed half-and-half and top with whipped cream.
Serve immediately.

name: Light Instant Chai Tea Mix
directions: Mix 3 teaspoons vanilla extract into the sugar, mix well with a fork.
Next, fold the splenda into the vanilla/sugar mix, combining well. Let the mix dry, then break the sugar mix back into small lumps.
In a large bowl, combine milk powder, non-dairy creamer, vanilla sugar mix, and instant tea.
Stir in ginger, cinnamon, cloves and cardamom.
In a blender or food processor, blend 1°C at a time, until mixture is the consistency of fine powder.

To serve: Stir 2 heaping Tbs. Chai tea mixture into a mug of hot water. For iced chai, mix the 2 Tbsp Chai mix with a bit of hot water until the mix dissolves, then add cold water or milk plus ice & shake or stir well.

similar.name: Chai Tea Mix in a Jar

name: Herbal Lemonade
directions: Place the herbs and lemonade mix into the container.  Add water.  Stir vigrously, muddling the herbs to release the flavor.  Let stand for several hours before serving. Garnish with edible flowers.

name: Blushing Almond
directions: In cocktail shaker, combine pink lemonade, vodka, and amaretto.  Add ice; shake and strain into martini glass.  Top off drink with tonic water.

name: Slow-Cooker Blackberry Cordial
directions: In a large bowl, crush berries and sugar with potato masher.
Add to slow cooker and stir in 1 qt water, peppercorns, bay leaves, and lemon zest.
Cover and cook over low heat for 2-1/2 hours.  Stir, increase heat to high, and cook 1-1/2 hours
Strain through fine mesh sieve without pressing on berries.  Stir maple syrup into blackberry juice and let cool.
Stir in brandy, if using.  Refrigerate up to 1 month.
With brandy use as a cocktail with seltzer over ice, or as a sauce for pork or chicken.
Without brandy, whisk with olive oil for a vinaigrette, or simmer until thick and pour over pancakes, waffles, or ice cream.

name: Kinky Breeze
directions: Pour ingredients over ice in a rocks or hurricane glass and stir.

name: Kinky Lemon-Lime
directions: Pour ingredients over ice and stir.

name: Kinky-Tini
directions: Chill Martini glass.
Squeeze lime into a mixing glass; add ice, Kinky, Opulent and juice.
Cap mixing glass and shake for a few seconds.
Strain into Martini glass and garnish with a lime twist.

name: Kinky Margarita
directions: Chill Margarita glass.
Pour ingredients into an ice filled mixing tin; cap and shake for a few seconds.
Strain into a salt rimmed Margarita glass, add a few ice cubes and garnish with a lime slice.

name: Pink Opulence
