name: New Orleans Cafe Brulot
directions: In a blazer pan of a chafing dish combine cinnamon, cloves, sugar cubes, orange and lemon peels.
In a small pan heat brandy till nearly boiling.  Remove from heat and ignite.  Pour over the mixture in blazer pan.
Place the blazer pan over chafing dish burner and spoon the brandy over sugar until the cubes melt.  Stir in coffee .
Pour into mugs and enjoy.

name: Moroccan Mint Tea
directions: In a large pot over high heat bring the water to a boil. Turn off the water and add the teabag, cover and steep for 5 minutes.
Rinse the mint.  Add the mint and the verbena leaves to the pot, cover and steep 5 more minutes.
Add the sugar and stir to combine, strain and serve.
Place a sprig of mint in each glass or cup and pour in the strained tea.
*To serve chilled*.
Allow the tea to reach room temperature, then transfer the tea to a pitcher, cover and refrigerate until cold.  This will prevent your tea from getting cloudy.
Serve in a tall glass with ice and a mint sprig for garnish.

name: Charle's Caribbean
directions: In a shaker add ingredients for drink and shake well.  Strain drink mixture into a tall collins glass with ice.  Garnish with a pineapple chunks and a cherry with stem on.

name: Caribbean Mist - Cocktail
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker half full of ice cubes, add coconut rum, melon liqueur, blue curacao liqueur, pineapple juice, and sweet and sour mix. Shake well and strain in a highball glass.  Garnish with a maraschino cherry and pineapple wedge flag.

name: Digestive Tea
directions: Boil water and pour over fennel, ginger and peppermint. Cover and steep for 10 minutes. Strain and enjoy warm.

name: Peach, Apricot, Berry White Sangria for a Crowd
directions: Place peaches in bottom of pitcher. Add wine, brandy, liqueur and simple syrup. Stir gently. Cover. Best if chilled four hours or overnight. Serve over ice.

name: Watermelon Delight
directions: Muddle the mint leaves and lime juice in a glass, add brown sugar, then ice. Add the watermelon cubes, then pour rum and soda over watermelon and serve with a garnish of mint or lime.

name: Creole Lady
directions: Put cracked ice in a mixing glass and add the bourbon, madeira, and grenadine.  Stir well, then strain into a cocktail glass.  Garnish a red or green maraschino cherry (or both!), and serve.

similar.name: Sassy Wine Spritzer for the Holidays

name: Crusta
directions: Moisten the rim of a chilled cocktail glass with a lemon wedge, then dip the rim into superfine granulated sugar.
Shake all the ingredients with cracked ice, then strain into the glass.
Drape a very long spiral of either orange or lemon peel into and hanging out of the glass by about 2 inches, then serve.

name: Greek Hammer
directions: Pour into a shot glass and enjoy.

name: Greek and Plenty
directions: Combine ingredients in a brandy snifter.

name: Greek Stinger
directions: Combine in an old fashioned glass, add ice.

name: The Roffignac Cocktail
directions: Fill a highball glass with ice. Add the first two ingredients, then top off with soda or seltzer. Swizzle and serve.

name: The Saint Charles
directions: Place the lime peel in a highball glass and add the gin. Muddle the lime peel gently, to help press out some of the lime oil. If you're patient, let it sit in there for a few minutes. Then fill the glass almost to the top with cracked ice cubes. Add the lime juice. Fill with the tonic water, then add the bitters (don't be shy). Rub the lime wedge around the rim of the glass, then add it as a garnish. Swizzle, then serve the drink with the swizzle stick. Accept the compliments graciously.

name: Herbsaint Cocktail
directions: Fill an Old Fashioned glass with cracked ice and build with the above ingredients. Top with water and stir. (You may substitute Pernod for the Herbsaint if it's unavailable.).

name: Skylab
directions: Combine in a cocktail shaker and strain into an 8-ounce crested glass filled with ice.
If you have more than one be sure to have alternate transportation available!

name: Crusta Cocktail
directions: Moisten the rim of a chilled cocktail glass with a lemon wedge, then dip the rim into superfine granulated sugar. Shake all ingredients with cracked ice, then strain into the glass. Drape a very long spiral of either orange or lemon peel into and hanging out of the glass by about two inches, then serve.

name: Cocktail a La Louisiane
directions: Mix in bar glass with lumps of ice. Strain into a cocktail glass.
in which has been placed a maraschino cherry. Savor.

similar.name: La Vie En Rose Champagne Cocktail

name: Cucumber-Chile Margarita
directions: On a saucer, stir together the ground chile and salt.
Slice limes in half and rub one of the halves around the rim of four cocktail glasses. Dunk the wet rims of the glasses into the chile/salt mixture to coat.
Squeeze the lime halves into a small pitcher.

Halve cucumber and cut 4 thin rounds from the center to garnish the glasses. Peel remaining cucumber halves and chop coarsely. Place cucumber, jalapeno, and simple syrup in blender jar and puree. Pour into a pitcher and add the tequila.
Fill salt-rimmed glasses halfway with ice. Add margarita mixture and garnish before serving.

similar.name: Grapefruit Margaritas With Chipolte Chili Salt and Lime

name: Aquavit Cranberry Breeze
directions: Fill a rocks glass with ice. In a cocktail shaker, using a wooden spoon, muddle the cranberries with the sugar, water and 1 of the lime wedges. Add the aquavit and a handful of ice and shake well. Strain into the glass, garnish with the remaining lime wedge and serve.

name: Crème Brûlée Soda
directions: Combine the granulated sugar, brown sugar, and water in a small heavy saucepan. Cook over medium-high heat until the mixture turns dark amber, washing away any sugar crystals clinging to the inside of the pan with a damp pastry brush.

While the sugar is caramelizing, heat the milk to a simmer in another saucepan or in the microwave. When the sugar is fully caramelized, stir the warm milk into it. The sugar will immediately crystallize, and the milk will vigorously bubble and steam. Stand back so you don’t get burned. Then, as the bubbling subsides, stir the caramel until it becomes smooth and fluid again. Remove from the heat, stir in the vanilla, and let cool for 5 minutes.
This syrup will keep in the refrigerator for up to 2 days, but must be warmed until liquid before using to make a soda.
Divide the liquid caramel among four tall glasses. Stir 1 cup seltzer into each. Fill the glasses with ice and serve. To mix with seltzer 1	batch caramel syrup 4	cups seltzer.

name: Blue Mountain Cocktail
directions: Combine all the ingredients and shake well.
Servie in a old fashioned glass and serve.

similar.name: Jamaican Coconut Water & White Rum Cocktail

name: The Money Maker
directions: Combine vodka, Midori and lemon juice in cocktail shaker with ice.
Shake then strain into short chilled glass. Garnish with lime twist and lemon wedge.

name: IRS Blues Martini
directions: Combine vodka, blue curacao, and lemonade in ice filled cocktail shaker.
Shake then strain into chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with lemon wedge.

name: Ginger Mangotinis
directions: In small saucepan, bring 1/2 c water, the ginger, and granulated sugar to a boil, stirring, to dissolve the sugar. Remove from heat. Refrigerated for 20 minutes. Strain into a pitcher.

Fill small dish with coarse sugar. Lightly wet the rims of 6 martini glasses, then, one by one, turn them over and rotate the rims in the coarse sugar to coat. Add the mango nectar, vodka, and lime juice to the pitcher; stir well. Refrigerate until chilled. Serve in prepared glasses.

name: Domincan Goddess
directions: Mix/Shake and serve.

name: Pink Tea Refresher
directions: Brew tea 4 minutes and remove tea bag.
Pour into pitcher and stir in cranberry juice, Splenda and lemon juice.
Serve over ice.

name: The Alamo
directions: in 12 oz glas pack ice
pour in booze.
then juice.
stir.

name: Purple Orchid
directions: shake with ice.
it says strain  into cocktail  glass.
i would serve with ice.

name: Blackberry Gin Fizz
directions: Purée blackberries and sugar in a blender until as liquefied as possible. Strain purée through a fine-mesh sieve, and put 2 TBLS into each of two tall or collins-style glasses; discard seeds in sieve.
Divide gin and lime juice between glasses and stir to combine. Add ice to glasses then top each with soda and a sprig of basil or wedge of lime. (Might need another quick stir to combine.).

name: Paloma Cocktail
directions: Place crushed ice in a 10-oz glass. Add tequila, Cointreau, and grapefruit juice. Add Fresca to fill the glass. Stir.  Enjoy!
The recipe is easily adapted for mixing several in a pitcher.

name: Fruity Sweet Iced Tea
directions: Iced tea maker: Make tea according to manufacturer's specifications. Add baking soda, pineapple juice, lemon juice and sugar after tea has been made. Stir well and serve over ice.

Stovetop: Bring 1 liter of water to a boil. Remove from heat and add tea bags. Steep for 5-8 minutes. Remove tea bags and add sugar and baking soda. Stir until dissolved. Add this tea, 1 liter of water, pineapple juice and lemon juice to a 2-liter pitcher. Stir well and serve over ice.

name: Summer Girl Soda
directions: Press raspberries through a sieve over a bowl, discard seeds.  Combine raspberry pulp and sugar, stir well.  Divide the raspberry mixture evenly among 4 parfait glasses.  Spoon 1 tbsp ice cream into each glass, stir well.  Stir 2 tbsp club soda into each glass.  Spoon 1/4 c ice cream, 1/4 c raspberry sherbert, and 1/4 c orange sherbert into each glass.  Pour 1/4 c club soda over the sherbert.  Serve immediately.

name: Fruity White Sangria
directions: Mix wine and peach schnapps and refrigerate for 4 to 6 hours. Add the fruit, then top off with remaining ingredients and add to each glass with ice.

name: Lebanese Tea
directions: Bring 2 quarts of water to a boil.  Place tea bags in a gallon sized pitcher, and pour the boiling water over.  Steep for 5-7 minutes.
Remove tea bags, and stir in the sugar, lemon juice, and rose water.  Stir until sugar is thoroughly dissolved.
Top with water until you have 1 gallon of tea.  Chill, and serve over ice, with a few pine nuts sprinkled in each glass if desired.  I usually leave off the nuts since they don't add to the flavor.

name: Pretty-In-Pink Sparkler
directions: In a large measuring cup, stir the vodka, triple sec, pomegranate juice, and lemon juice. Divide among 12 champagne flutes. Top off with the rose wine and garnish with orange twists.

name: Emeril Lagasse's Moroccan Mint Tea
directions: Bring a kettle of water to a boil. Add boiling water to a teapot that holds about 4 cups water, and swirl to warm. Discard the water and add the tea, 24 mint leaves, and sugar to the teapot. Pour the quart of boiling water into the teapot and swirl once or twice to dissolve the sugar. Allow the tea to steep for 5 minutes.
Pour the tea through a strainer into small decorative Moroccan glasses or teacups. Garnish each with several fresh mint leaves.

name: Thai-Style Coconut Eggnog (No Eggs)
directions: Blend together all ingredients, taste and increase any spice if needed.

name: Pineapple Daiquiri
directions: Mix all the ingredients together in a blender. Pour into large wine glasses and serve. Paper umbrellas optional!

name: Penacarada
directions: Half fill a cocktail shaker with finely crushed ice. Add all the ingredients and shake well. Pour into a cocktail glass and garnish with a pineapple slice, orange slice and a cherry.

name: Narai Special
directions: Half fill the shaker with ice and pour in all ingredients. Shake well and strain into a champagne glass. Garnish with a cherry and lemon slice.

name: Tom Yam Siam Cocktail
directions: Mix the first five ingredients. Serve in rock glass and garnish with lemongrass, kaffir lime leaf and chili slices.

name: Miami-Fusion Virgin Mojito
directions: Smash mint leaves and Splenda with a spoon in the bottom of a large glass.
Add lime juice and stir. Pour in soda and stir well.*.
Garnish with mint and lime slice. Serve chilled.
*A cocktail shaker can be used to create a frothier beverage. Add ice and mojito to a shaker and shake well.

name: Copycat Starbucks Shaken Iced Peach Green Tea Lemonade
directions: Steep 4 bags green tea in 4 Cups of boiled water for 3 minutes.
When cool, add 4 C Simply Lemonaid.
Fill cup with Ice Cubes, add 4 T Starbuck's Peach Syrup (7 squirts).
Enjoy!

similar.name: Copycat Starbucks Passion Tea Lemonade Drink

name: Lisa's Summertime Vodka Slushy
directions: Bring sugar and water to a boil, to create a simple syrup. Remove from heat and add orange juice and lemonade concentrates. Cool. Add vodka and stir well. Pour into 9 x 13 glass casserole dish, cover with plastic and freeze overnight. To serve, scrape off layers of slushy and scoop into a glass. Fill with soda (sprite, ginger ale, sparkling water---my preference). Stir and enjoy!
If you want to speed up the process, reduce the amount of water used to make the simple syrup to 1 cup and use cold water for the balance.
*You can try any combination of concentrated juices, such as mixed berry, limeade, etc. You can also use flavored vodka.

name: Coffee Creamer
directions: Mix the ingredients together well.
Add them to a mason jar and shake it like crazy or you could also opt to use an old (washed) creamer container.

similar.name: Healthful Homemade Coffee Creamer With Flavor Options!

name: The Frenchy Cocktail
directions: In a chilled rocks glass filled with ice, add your vodka and pineapple juice. Top with a splash of cranberry juice.

similar.name: La Vie En Rose Champagne Cocktail

name: White Jamaican
directions: Stirred, not shaken, over ice.
paper umbrella optional.

name: Indescribably Delicious Candy Bar Drink(S)
directions: blend and serve neat or on the rocks.
this is for the candy bar without the nut on top, add about 10 to 20 ml of Amaretto for the one that ends in "Joy".

name: Candy Bar Apertif
directions: blend and serve.

name: Oatmeal Fruit Smoothie
directions: Pulse oats in blender until powdery.
Add 1 cup of water and incorporate the other ingredients.
Blend until smooth.

name: Raspberry-Tequila Coffee
directions: Pour tequila and raspberry liqueur in the bottom of a large mug or heavy glass.
Pour in coffee and stir.
Top with whipped cream and serve.
Note:
You can fold a small amount of raspberry syrup or raspberry all-fruit preserves into the whipped cream for a sweeter taste and an elegant pink color.

name: Coles Le Grand Rouge
directions: Place the ice cubes in bottom of blender and add all ingredients as listed above.
Puree until all ingredients are well mixed.  You should have a lovely frosty, pink creation.
If your drink is not slushy enough, add another ice cube or two.
Enjoy!

name: Simple Sweet Tea
directions: In a large pitcher add the sugar, and tea bags.
Add the boiling water and let the tea steep for 10 minutes.
Remove the tea bags, and stir the sugar and tea mixture together.
(cold water): Add the 4 cups of cold water and stir, refrigerate until cold. (about 4 Hours).
(ice): Add the ice and stir well.  Serve over ice.

name: Blended Iced Coffee Shooter
directions: In blender, combine sugar, ice, cream, coffee, liqueur and chocolate syrup and blend until smooth.
Serve immediately.

similar.name: Make Iced Coffee in Five Minutes
Burger King Style Iced Mocha Coffee Drink

name: Salted Chocolate Milk
directions: Make the chocolate syrup: Combine the sugar and 1/3 cup water in a small saucepan. Bring to a simmer over medium heat, then whisk in the  cocoa powder until smooth. remove from the heat and stir in the vanilla. Let cool completely.
Spoon about 2 1/2 tablespoons of the chocolate syrup into each glass. Add 1 and 1/2 cups milk and a generous pinch of salt. Stir until the syrup and salt dissolve.

name: Lemon Drop Cocktail
directions: In a martini shake add all ingredients, shake and then strain and pour into a sugar rimmed martini glass. Garnish with a lemon wedge and serve.

similar.name: Lemon Drop Cocktails from Ina Garten/ Barefoot Contessa

name: Tropical Citrus Granita
directions: Stir together the orange juice, mango punch and water. Pour into large shallow glass baking dish.
In small saucepan (or a small microwave bowl) heat water with sugar until dissolved. Whisk together with coconut water and coconut cream. Pour into shallow glass baking dish.

Place both dishes in the freezer for 2 hours. Remove from freezer, scrape edges and mix with a fork. Return to freezer, scraping every hour until no liquid remains, 6-7 hours total. Layer fruit granita on bottom of glass, followed by coconut mixture, and another layer of fruit granita on top. Garnish with tropical fruit.

name: Chai Honey Tea
directions: To make Chai Tea base, in a medium saucepan, combine honey, water, tea, vanilla, ginger, cinnamon and allspice. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes. Remove from heat, cover and allow to steep for 30 minutes. Remove tea bags. Cover and refrigerate Chai Tea base.
To serve hot: Combine equal parts of Chai Tea base and milk. Heat on stovetop or in microwave.
To serve cold: Combine equal parts of Chai Tea base and milk over ice cubes.
Tips: This recipe can be Doubled or trippled easily. Chai Tea base may be stored in refrigerator for up to 1 week.
For more information and recipes, please visit www.beemaid.com.

similar.name: Hot Chai Tea With Almonds on the Side

name: Hot Mulled Cider
directions: Mix all ingredients in large saucepan. Simmer 30 minutes. Remove spices before serving.

name: Hot Mulled Wine
directions: Mix all ingredients in large saucepan. Simmer 30 minutes. Remove spices before serving.

name: Banana Buttermilk Smoothie
directions: In blender combine all ingredients. Puree until smooth.

name: Chocolate Raspberry Cocoa
directions: In medium saucepan, combine milk, raspberries and cocoa. Cook, stirring, 1-2 minutes until hot.
Stir in vanilla extract and stevia. Serve in mugs with spoons to eat raspberries.

name: Coconut Berry Cooler
directions: In large bowl, combine all ingredients. Serve over ice.

name: Maple Mulled Cider
directions: In a large saucepan, stir together all of the ingredients. Bring to a boil, then adjust the heat to simmer for 10 minutes. Serve hot.

name: Gingersnap Spritzer
directions: In a small pitcher, stir together the ginger beer and vodka. Divide among 8 ice-filled glasses. Top off with the seltzer water, adding more to taste, and garnish each with 2 strips candied ginger.

name: Triple Mint Dark Chocolate Cocoa
directions: Place the chocolates and 1/2 cup boiling water in a medium saucepan. Whisk until smooth. Add the cocoa mix and continue whisking while adding the remaining boiling water in a steady stream. Whisk in the milk, then heat over medium heat until steaming hot but not boiling. Keep hot over low heat.
Whisk the cream just until soft peaks form. Whisk the crème de menthe into the cocoa, then divide among 8 mugs. Top with the cream and crushed mint candies and serve immediately.

name: Hot Mulled Cider
directions: Mix all ingredients in large saucepan. Simmer 30 minutes. Remove spices before serving.

name: Hot Mulled Wine
directions: Mix all ingredients in large saucepan. Simmer 30 minutes. Remove spices before serving.

name: White Sangria
directions: Combine first 3 ingredients in a large pitcher; stir to dissolve sugar. Stir in wine and next 4 ingredients (through peach). Chill at least 2 hours or until cold.
Stir in sparkling water.

name: Citrus Pineapple Carrot Juice
directions: Cut grapefruit and orange in half and juice by hand.
In juicer, process pineapple and carrots. Combine with grapefruit and orange juice and whisk well.

name: Rise and Shine Juice
directions: Cut grapefruits and tangerines in half and juice by hand.
In juicer process apples and ginger. Combine with citrus juices and whisk well.

name: Watermelon Grapefruit and Mint Juice
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender, reserving 1 tablespoon mint for garnish.

name: Apple Pear Lemonade
directions: In juicer process apples and pears.
Transfer to a container and whisk in lemon juice, water and cinnamon.

name: Grapey Pear Juice
directions: In juicer, process ¼ cup grapes and 1 pear quarter. Repeat until all fruit have been juiced.
Variation: substitute and equal quantity white grapes for the red grapes and apples for the pears.

similar.name: Fresh Fruit Juice - Pear De Licious

name: Carrot Pineapple Lemon Ginger Juice
directions: In juicer, process carrots, pineapple, lemon and ginger.  Whisk well and serve.

similar.name: Lemon Beet Celery and Fennel Juice

name: Apple Ginger Orange Juice
directions: In juicer, process apples and ginger. Whisk in orange juice.

name: Lime Me Mon Juice
directions: In juicer, process apples, pear and ginger.
Cut limes and half and juice by hand.  Combine with apple pear juice and whisk well.

name: Sweet Lime Coconut Ginger Drink
directions: In blender, combine all ingredients.

name: Limey Cucumber Juice
directions: In juicer, combine pear, cucumber and celery. Combine with lime juice.

name: Gingery Tomato Juice
directions: In blender, combine ginger, tomatoes, water, lemon juice and salt. Blend until smooth.
Transfer to a fine mesh sieve and press mixture through.

name: Watermelon Mint Refresher
directions: In food processor, combine all ingredients.
Variation: Substitute strawberries for the watermelon.

name: Hot Cinnamon Wine
directions: In saucepan, combine wine, cinnamon, ginger and turmeric. Cover and heat gently.
Remove from heat and allow to stand, covered, for 20 minutes.
Strain and pour into 4 heated mugs.

name: Warm up Your Winter With a Peppermint Mocha Coffee
directions: Prepare Chocolate Syrup T Disc in mug or heatproof glass.
Use same mug to prepare Espresso T Disc.
Top with remaining ingredients.

How to Make Peppermint-Coated Mug Rims: Moisten rim of mug with wet paper towel, then dip rim in finely crushed candy canes on a sheet of waxed paper. Let stand, inverted, on waxed paper until ready to fill with beverage and serve.
Special Extra: For a festive twist, add a candy cane to filled mug; use as a stir stick.
More beverage recipe ideas can be found at www.tassimo.ca.

name: Enjoy a Cup of Festive Comfort With This Specialty Coffee
directions: 1. Combine water, cinnamon sticks, vanilla beans and honey in 3-quart (3 L) saucepan. Heat on medium heat to boiling, stirring frequently.
2. Stir in coffee and Pure Via sweetener. Remove from heat. Let steep 5 minutes.
3. Strain coffee into six small mugs. Discard cinnamon and vanilla. Top evenly with steamed milk and serve.

name: Tomato Spinach Basil Smoothie
directions: In blender, combine all ingredients until smooth.

name: Lemon Beet Celery and Fennel Juice
directions: In juicer, process 1 stalk celery, 1 slice fennel, 1 slice beet and lemon. Repeat until all of the vegetables are juiced.

name: Sparkling Apple Cider Sangria
directions: Add the apples to a large pitcher reserving about 1/2 cup for garnishing. Add the cognac, apple cider, and chilled cava. Stir.
Fill the pitcher with ice. Pour the sangria into glasses filled with ice and top with sliced apple and pomegranate seeds.

name: Tamarind Whiskey Sour
directions: Bring sugar to boil, stirring till dissolved.  Cool.
Combine 1.5 oz bourbon, 1 oz lime juice, 1 oz palm sugar syrup and .5 oz tamarind concentrate in a cocktail shaker.
Fill shaker with ice.  Shake until the outside is frosty - about 30 seconds.
Strain into a rocks glass filled with ice and serve with an orange wedge and cherry.
Enjoy.
Repeat.

name: Hot Peppermint Mocha
directions: HEAT Coffee-mate, morsels and water in medium saucepan over medium-low heat, stirring frequently, until hot and chocolate is melted. Stir in vanilla extract. Pour into mugs; top with whipped cream. Sprinkle with ground cinnamon or baking cocoa and garnish with candy cane, if desired.

name: Hand-Warmer Hot Buttered Rum
directions: In a small bowl, thoroughly combine the butter and sugar.
Refrigerate until almost firm, about 10 minutes.
Bring 4 cups water to a boil in a saucepan.
Place a cinnamon stick in each of 4 mugs.
Add ¼ cup rum to each mug and fill to just below the rim with boiling water.
Top evenly with butter mixture.
Stir with the cinnamon sticks and serve immediately.

name: Hot Chocolate
directions: Combine all ingredients in slow cooker. Cover and cook on high until hot, about 2 hours. Do not boil.  Turn heat to low to keep warm for serving.

name: Maple Cardamom Spiced Milk
directions: Bring the milk to a simmer and remove from heat. I just heated in the microwave.
Add the tea bag and steep for 6 minutes.
Stir in ground spices and maple syrup. Remove tea bag.
For the ground spices: Warm whole spices, separately, in a non-stick saute pan for a few minutes until fragrant. Use a mortar and pestle or spice grinder to crush until smooth.
Helpful Tip:
1. Substitute the milk for almond or soy milk, if you like.

similar.name: Chai Tea Mix in a Jar

name: Cold Brewed Coffee
directions: Stack the two layers of cheesecloth on top of each other and pour the ground beans into the center.  Pull up the sides of the cloth and leave at least 4 inches of space for the grounds to expand.  Tie the top tightly with butcher's twine or kitchen string.

Fill a large food safe container with the cold water.  Any glass or stainless steel container with a lid will work.  Do not use a plastic container that was previously used to hold an aromatic food such as pickles or the like.  Add the cloth sack to the water and use your hand to submerse it for a minute or two.  Cover the container with a lid or plastic wrap and let rest in your refrigerator, or any cool spot, for 14 hours.
After 14 hours discard the sack of grounds and refrigerate the brewed coffee until ready to serve.

similar.name: Coffee No Pot or Maker Needed

name: Coffee Milk
directions: Combine the coffee and milk and stir.  Add in syrup to taste.

name: Berry Cream Soda
directions: Make a simple syrup by combining the sugar and water in a small pot over medium high heat.  whisk occasionally to help dissolve the sugar.  Bring to a boil and take it off the heat to cool, just for 10 or 15 minutes.  You want the simple syrup to be just a bit warm when the fruit is added to it.  You will only need about 1 3/4c syrup for the recipe, keep the rest stored in your fridge for another use.
Add the berries to the pot with the warm syrup and stir.  With a slotted spoon transfer the fruit to a blender or food processor.  Add 3 tablespoon of the syrup and blend until smooth.

Pour the puree into a medium strainer or sieve set over a bowl and press the juice through with the back of a spoon.  You will have about 3/4 c of puree.  Refrigerate until you are ready to make the drinks.

For each drink combine 3 tablespoons of the puree with 1/4 cup of milk in a tall glass, either shaker in a cocktail shaker or stirring with a spoon.  Add the ice cubes, pour in 3/4 cup seltzer, and shake or stir until frothy.  Serve cold.

name: Peanut Butter Honey Latte
directions: Mix peanut butter and 1 tbls. milk in small bowl and mix to make smooth paste.
Place the peanut butter/milk mix and the rest of ingredients in a small saucepan and stir. Heat and stir to incorporate the peanut butter and honey.
When hot, pour in cup and enjoy!

name: Quinoa Flake Granola
directions: Preheat oven to 325.
In large bowl, combine quinoa flakes, pecans, flax seeds and cinnamon.
In another bowl, combine maple syrup, oil and vanilla.
Add the liquid ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until well coated.
Spread mixture in single layer on baking sheet.
Bake 22-27 minutes, or until quinoa flakes are golden brown. Let cool.

name: White Grape and Orange Cooler
directions: Bring sugar and 1 cup water to a boil over med-high heat, and cook, stirring often, 3 minutes or until sugar dissolves.
Remove from heat, and cool.
Stir in juices, and chill 2 hours.
Stir in ginger ale just before serving.
Serve over ice.

name: Black-Eyed Susan Cocktail
directions: Stir together the first 5 ingredients.
Fill 2 (12 oz.) glasses with crushed ice.
Pour orange juice mixture over ice.
Garnish, if desired.
Serve immediately.

name: Green Quinoa Smoothie
directions: In blender, puree all ingredients. Pour into two glasses.

name: Home Made Almond Milk
directions: Soak raw almonds in a bowl with enough water to cover.  Leave in the fridge for 12 - 24 hours.
Strain and rinse almonds, dispose of the soaking water.
Put soaked almonds in a food processor with 3 c water. And process for 4 - 5 minutes  Add stevia and vanilla ATMs pulse to mix.
Strain out almond "pulp" using a cheese cloth or nut bag.
Put in a glass jar and use within 4 dsys.

name: Barbie's Homemade Kahlua
directions: Mix water, sugar and coffee crystals into a large pot.  Heat and stir until dissolved.  Cool to room temperature.  Add the vodka and and vanilla extract and stir to combine.

name: Cocoa Java
directions: Pour the cocoa mix into a large heatproof pitcher.
Add the coffee and stir until dissolved.
Pour into large cups or mugs.
Single-serving—pour 1 package of hot cocoa mix into a large cup or mug.
Add the hot freshly brewed coffee and stir until dissolved.

similar.name: Cafe Mocha Java from the Plaza Hotel

name: Spiced Orange Coffee
directions: Place the coffee, orange peel, and cinnamon in the filter in the brew basket of a coffee maker.
Place the brown sugar in the empty pot of the coffee maker.
Prepare the coffee with the cold water.
When the brewing is complete, stir until well mixed.
Pour into large cups or mugs.
Serve with cinnamon sticks and halved orange slices, if desired.

name: Amanda's Delicious Berry Sangria
directions: Mix all ingredients together in a large punch bowl and enjoy!

name: Balsamic Bloody Mary
directions: Select 4 tall glasses and fill with ice.
In a large pitcher, combine the vodka, tomato juice, vinegar, horseradish, Worcestershire sauce, Tabasco sauce, celery salt, and lime juice.
Stir well to combine and season to taste with pepper.
Pour into the glasses and garnish each glass with a cherry tomato and chili speared on a cocktail pick.
Serve at once.

name: Knoxville Lemonade
directions: Pour peach schnapps and vodka into a mason jar three-quarters filled with ice cubes. Add lemonade and ginger ale. Garnish with a slice of orange, add a straw and serve.

name: Mulled Ginger Cider With Honey
directions: In a nonaluminum saucepan over low heat, combine the cider, honey, and ginger.
Cover and warm, stirring occasionally, for 30 minutes.
Transfer to a preheated large thermos.
Include the ginger for a more pronounced ginger flavor.
Pour into mugs to serve.

name: Cinnamon Hot Chocolate
directions: Put the milk, chocolate, and cinnamon sticks in a saucepan.
Warm over med-low heat, stirring frequently, until the milk is hot and the chocolate has melted completely.
Transfer to a preheated large thermos.
Include the cinnamon sticks for a more pronounced cinnamon flavor, or rinse off and dry the sticks and pack separately.
To serve, pour the hot chocolate into mugs, placing a cinnamon stick in each mug.

name: Spicy Bloody Marys
directions: In a large pitcher, stir together the tomato and orange juices, Worcestershire sauce, horseradish, lemon juice, hot pepper sauce, and celery salt.
Cover and refrigerate until well chilled.
Transfer to a chilled large thermos.
To serve, fill large glasses with ice.
Pour 1 shot vodka over ice in each glass.
Add ¾-1 cup of the tomato juice mixture.
Use a celery stalk to stir each beverage, leaving it in the glass as a garnish.

name: L'Orange on Horseback Cocktail
directions: Fill a tall glass with ice then add the liqueur's. Fill with soda water and garnish with orange slice.

name: Ryan's Irish Coffee
directions: Add the whiskey and liqueur to coffee and reheat if necessary. Top the coffee with whipped cream and drizzle of creme di menthe. Garnish with a cinnamon stick and serve.

name: Pop! Cider - a Chilled Fall Party Cocktail
directions: Combine Benedictine and cider in a Champagne flute or coupe.
Top with Prosecco.  Garnish with rosemary or thyme, if desired.

name: Chocolate Raspberry Truffle Dessert Cocktail
directions: Fill the shaker with ice. Add the liquids and shake vigorously until the outside of the shaker begins to frost over. Strain and pour into a chilled martini glass and serve.

name: Wolf Pack Margarita
directions: Add this to blender mix and serve.

name: Old Hickory Cocktail
directions: Add the 1st 4 ingredients to a mixing glass.
Fill 2/3 full with ice and stir until well chilled, about 20 seconds.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.  Garnish with lemon twist and serve.

name: Stovetop Caramel Hot Chocolate
directions: Combine milk, chocolate and caramel  in a medium saucepan. Cook over medium-low heat until chocolate is melted and milk is hot, but not boiling.
Whisk well and pour into 4 mugs. Top with whipped cream or mini marshmallows, if desired.

name: Spiced Cocoa Mix
directions: Sift the cocoa in a bowl and add the other ingredients.  Mix together with a wire whisk.

When you would like to enjoy a cup of cocoa warm up a mug of milk.  1-2 minutes in the microwave depending on the size of the mug or heat the milk on the stove top.  Add 1-2 tablespoons of cocoa to the milk once it's heated.  Stir until dissolved.   Makes 24 servings.

name: Pineapple Upside-Down Cake Cocktail for a Crowd!
directions: Rim glasses with brown sugar.
Pour vodka, club soda, cherry soda & pineapple juice concentrate in a pitcher. Stir well to combine.
Serve over ice.

name: Pink Grapefruit Lemonade
directions: Prepare an ice bath. Combine the sugar and 2 cups water in a medium saucepan. Stir well, and set over medium-high heat. Bring to a boil, and cook, stirring occasionally, until all of the sugar has dissolved, about 10 minutes.
Pour the sugar syrup into a medium bowl, and set bowl in the ice bath to cool; the syrup should yield 2 1/2 cups.
When ready to serve beverage, combine the lemon juice, grapefruit juice, and the sugar syrup in a medium pitcher. Add the lemon rounds, and fill with ice cubes.

name: Fizzy Kiwi Lemonade
directions: Peel kiwi. Puree peeled fruit in blender container. Strain mixture through a fine-mesh wire strainer placed over a bowl. Discard seeds (some may remain).
In a large pitcher combine strained kiwi, sugar and lemon juice. Stir until sugar is dissolved. Cover and chill 2 to 24 hours. Slowly add the chilled carbonated water just before serving. Stir.
Fill 6 tall glasses with Kiwi Ice Cubes, if desired, or with plain ice cubes. Pour the kiwi lemonade over the ice. Makes 6 servings.

name: Ginger Ale Syrup for SodaStream
directions: Put all ingredients into a sauce pan.
Bring to a boil.
Boil gently for about 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and cool.
Strain into bottle for storage.
Mix 1/2 Cup of syrup into 1 Liter carbonated water.

similar.name: Ginger Ale Ginger Soda Ginger Pop

name: Cherry Lime-Aide
directions: Mix all ingredients and serve over ice.

name: Grapefruit Syrup for SodaStream
directions: Slice Grapefruit into 1/4 inch rounds. (Discard ends and any slices that have too much pith.).
Place all ingredients in a saute pan and bring to a boil.

Boil gently for 5 minutes, stirring intermittently. (I used a fork to make sure the fruit slices were stirred around evenly and changed them up from top to bottom a bit to ensure all were cooked into the mix thoroughly.).
Remove from heat and remove grapefruit slices, squeezing gently to get out most of the juice.
Mix 1/2 Cup of the syrup with 1 Liter of carbonated water.
Store remaining syrup in bottle or airtight container.

similar.name: Cherry or Mixed Berry Syrup for SodaStream

name: Lip Smackin Sangria
directions: 1. Place all ingredients in a pitcher preferably one with a lid.
2. Stir thoroughly and refrigerate until chilled and sugar has dissolved. The longer the better.
3. Fill your favorite tall glass 2/3-3/4 full of ice and top off with sangria.
4. Garnish with fresh fruit, and enjoy!

name: Cherry or Mixed Berry Syrup for SodaStream
directions: Place all ingredients in a sauce pan.
Bring to a boil and then boil gently for 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and cool.
Strain syrup into container for storage.
Mix 1/2 Cup of syrup with 1 Liter of carbonated water.

name: Lemon Lime Syrup for SodaStream
directions: Slice limes and lemons into thin slices, discarding pith ends.
Mix sliced fruit, sugar, and water in sauce pan.
Bring to a boil and then boil gently for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove from heat and let cool.
Strain into container for storage.
Mix 1/2 Cup syrup with 1 Liter of carbonated water.

name: John Lee Hooker Cocktail
directions: Fill a glass with ice and pour over it the rum, triple sec, schnapps and a splash of cranberry juice - fill to the top with 7up.

name: Mr. Lemmon Martini
directions: In a mixing glass pour liquor over ice. Stir and then strain into a martini glass.

name: Blue Lemon Drop Martini
directions: Pre-chill martini glass in freezer.  Rim glass with sugar, if desired.  Pour into a martini shaker, the vodka, blue curacao and lemonade.  Fill with 1 cup ice and shake until well chilled.
Pour into chilled martini glass and garnish with lemon slice.

name: Accelerated Growth Cocktail
directions: Mix everything until the yeast is finely dissolved. Use COLD milk!

name: Cherry Bounce Liqueur
directions: Thoroughly clean a 2 quart container with a secure lid. I use an apple cider jug that has been cleaned very well.
Clean and stem cherries, if using fresh cherries. Thaw if using frozen.
Crush cherries a bit to release flavor, keeping all juice and adding to container.
Place remaining ingredients in container.
Shake until sugar is dissolved.
Keep in a cool, dark place shaking once a week for 3 weeks to 6 months. The longer it sits, the better it gets.
Strain and bottle into clean containers of your choice. I use empty beer bottles with a hinged cap.
Serve as an aperitif, a digestif or in lieu of a dessert wine.
Also makes a great gift if you can stand to give it up.

name: Peach Yogurt Martini
directions: Combine ALL but the 7-up in a cocktail shaker. Add ice. Shake until combined, pour into martini glass and top with 7-Up. I don't know if I used a full ounce.  Would like great with a little peach or fruit garnish!

name: Chai Tea Latte Mix
directions: Mix all ingredients together and store in airtight container.  Use 3 Tblsp. mix in hot water.

name: Raspberry Long Island Ice Tea
directions: Pour all ingredients over ice in a shaker, and shake three to four times. Pour into a Collins glass and garnish with a lemon wedge.

name: Hot Butterscotch Apple Cider
directions: Place the cider and butterscotch sauce in a small or medium slow cooker.
Cover and cook on LOW for 3 hours.
Serve warm with cinnamon sticks.

name: Angry Pirate
directions: Pour the peach schnapps, coconut rum, Maui Blue Hawaiian schnapps, Melloni and pineapple juice into a mixing glass half-filled with ice cubes. Stir well and strain into a cocktail glass. Top with chilled soda, garnish with lime slice, cherry or pineapple slice and serve.

name: Rich Raspberry Mocha
directions: Coat the bottom of a 12-ounce cup with ice cream topping to taste.
Add syrups and espresso.
Fill cup with steamed half-and-half and top with foamed half-and-half.
Garnish with chocolate curls and/or raspberries.
Serve immediately.

name: Blueberry Lemonade Cocktail
directions: Mix all in tall glass.

name: Cucumber-Mint Iced Tea
directions: Bring 2 cups of water to a boil in a medium saucepan. Remove the pan from the heat and add the tea bags, mint leaves and half the cucumber slices. Cover and let steep until cool, about 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, combine the honey and 1/4 cup hot water in a measuring cup and stir until the honey is dissolved.

Fill a large glass pitcher with ice, 4 sprigs of mint and a few cucumber slices. Strain the cooled tea into the pitcher and discard the mint and cucumbers. Add the honey mixture and 4 cups of and stir to combine.
To serve, pour the tea into tall glasses full of ice. Garnish each glass with a few sprigs of mint and a couple slices of cucumber.

similar.name: Oak Alley's Sweet Mint Iced Tea

name: Spiced Hot Chocolate
directions: Sift all ingredients together into a large bowl. Whisk the mixture together to be sure the spices are evenly distributed.
To serve, stir 3 tablespoons of the mix into 1 1/2 cups (12 ounces) of hot milk. Serve in large mugs. Store the remaining mix in a tightly-sealed jar.

name: Lemon & Thyme Flavored Water
directions: (** Note . our glass containers are a little bigger than a gallon in size).
To the container add the lemon, thyme, and 1/4 gallon water.
Cover with a thick layer of ice and put in the refrigerator overnight to steep.
In the morning . fill the rest of the way with water & ice.
Enjoy!
~ Adapted from Why I Should Drink More Water by Kimberly Wechsler.

name: Mean Green
directions: Place in juicer.
Pour over ice and enjoy!

name: Accudiet Strawberry Cooler
directions: fill a highball glass with ice.
• add Crystal Light Liquid strawberry lemonade to glass.
• add ReaLime juice.
• top with sparkling wate.

name: Blood Orange Margarita
directions: Mix the Blood Orange Juice, Lime Juice, Cointreau and Tequila together in a large pitcher.
Refrigerate for 30 minutes, or until chilled.
Moisten the rim of the margarita glasses with a wedge of orange (oranges are fine if you are unable to locate blood oranges) and dip in the salt.
Add ice to the pitcher, shake the mixture and strain into the salted margarita glasses. Garnish each with a slice of blood orange.
Leftovers? Freeze and blend at a later celebration!

name: Black Cherry High Mocktail
directions: Build first 4 ingredients in a shaker, add ice.
Shake well, Strain into a Collins Glass with ice.
Top with Izze Pomegranate Soda.
Garnish with a full (unbroken) Star Anise and a large straw.

name: Blueberry Chamomile Boost Mocktail
directions: Shake well with ice and Double Strain into a coupe.
Garnish with 3 blueberries on a cocktail pick.

name: Luzianne Raspberry Sweet Iced Tea
directions: Fill your pot comfortably with enough water, turn to medium heat, add tea bags, and bring to boil.
Once it has come to a boil, remove from heat and let steep for a couple of minutes.
Remove bags from water, pour tea in pitcher, add sugar, and stir until dissolved.
Fill gallon pitcher the remaining way with cold water and stir.
Enjoy!

name: Sparkling White Sangria
directions: In a large pitcher, combine all ingredients.  Allow to chill thoroughly and serve over ice.
I used Italia Roscato Bianco Dolce for the sweet white wine but any Moscato will work.  If it is too sweet, a nice dry chardonnay will also work.

name: Fresh Squeezed Breeze
directions: In a pitcher combine juices and sugar.
Stir until sugar dissolves.
Add club soda and stir gently.
Serve in glasses filled with ice.

name: Three-Citrus Sunrise Margarita
directions: Mix all ingredient into a cocktail shaker (except for the Chambord). Shake cold and serve over the rocks in a bucket glass. Salt is optional, garnish with a lime wedge. Lastly drizzle a splash of Chambord of top of the cocktail for effect.
Enjoy!

name: Orange Delight
directions: Place 1/2 c orange juice in small ice cube trays. Freeze.
Pour Grand Marnier and remaining orange juice in glass over ice cubes made with orange juice.
Top with a splash of club soda, if desired.

name: Unsweetened Raspberry Iced Tea
directions: In a tea kettle or small saucepan, boil water.
Place tea bags into a glass 2-cup measuring cup.  Carefully pour boiling water over the tea bags until the water reaches the 2-cup line.  Steep for 15-30 minutes.
Carefully remove tea bags, allowing excess tea liquid to drip off.  If you like, gently squeeze the bunch of tea bags, but be careful because they will still be hot.
If using a measuring cup or heat-resistant container, pour tea concentrate into a 1-gallon pitcher (4 quarts).
Pour in 12 cups cold water and stir gently.
Chill until ready to serve.
Pour into glasses filled 1/4-full of ice and enjoy!

name: London Fog
directions: In a mug, place tea bag and boiling water; steep 4 minutes.
Add steamed milk (can be heated in microwave and whisked to create foam) and vanilla syrup to taste.

name: Nutella Instant Iced Coffee
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth and frothy.
Pour into glasses and dust lightly with ground coffee, if you desired.

For an extra cold drink, pour iced coffee into glasses filled with more ice—ideally, coffee ice cubes for stronger coffee flavor. To make coffee ice cubes, brew 1 1/2 teaspoon coffee in 1 cup hot water, add sugar to taste. Freeze in ice-cube tray.

name: Serrano Chili and Watermelon Margaritas
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large pitcher and stir well.
Add ice just before serving.

name: Hibiscus Coolers
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large pitcher.
Serve over shaved ice.
Garnish with fresh mint, if desired.

name: Smith and Kearns
directions: Fill highball glass with ice.
Add Kahlua and cream. Stir well.
Fill glass with club soda.
Stir lightly.

name: Gorilla Punch
directions: Fill mixing cup 1/4 full of ice.
Add all ingredients to mixing cup.
Shake and strain.
Pour into collins glass filled with ice.
Garnish with a cherry.

name: Watermelon Sangria With Sriracha
directions: Puree 6 cups of watermelon in blender and strain into pitcher.
Add wine, rum, sugar, Sriracha, and lime slices.
Refrigerate at least 2 hours.
Stir in ginger ale.
Put ice cubes in glass, pour in sangria. Make sure to get some watermelon and lime in each glass.
Garnish with mint sprig.

name: Lime Margarita
directions: Combine all ingredients except ice in blender.
Blend until sugar is dissolved.
Add ice and process until smooth.
Makes 2 large drinks.

name: Original Lime Mojito Recipe
directions: Simple syrup:
Start with the simple syrup.  Mix sugar and water in a sauce pan and bring to a boil. Stir until sugar gets dissolved. Remove from heat and store in the fridge until ready to use.
Mojito:
Pour lime juice and simple syrup into a tall glass.
Add mint leaves and muddle it together.
Add rum and muddle a little more.
Add ice and a splash of soda.
Serve garnished with fresh mint leaves and a slice of lime.

name: Frappe Coffee Recipe
directions: In a blender combine hot water, instant coffee and sugar and blend until very frothy.
Fill a tall glass with ice and pour coffee mixture. Add milk.
Serve with a straw.

name: Copycat Starbucks Passion Tea Lemonade Drink
directions: Boil water.
Remove from heat and add tea bags, sugar and vanilla.
Allow to sit for 15 minutes.
Remove tea bags and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
Add ice to a tall closable container.  Add 8 ounces tea and 2 ounces of lemonade per serving.  Shake well to mix.

name: Strawberry Apple Homemade Sweet Tea
directions: Steep the 4 tea bags in the 3 cups of boiling water for 4 minute.  Squeeze tea bags and discard.
Add the sliced strawberries to the bottom of the pitcher and smash with a spoon.
Add both the tea and the apple juice to the pitcher.  Chill until ready to serve.
Serve over ice.

similar.name: Strawberry or Cherry Tea Mix in a Pint Jar

name: Homemade Strawberry Beerita Recipe
directions: Combine everything in a blender and pulse until slushy.
Enjoy!

name: Laura's Barley Tea (With Cardamom)
directions: Boil Water in Large Saucepan.
Wash Barely in Cold Water and Drain it.
Put it into the Boiling WATER, and Simmer Actively about Half an Hour, until Water is a Lovely Deep Pink, and Cloudy.
Either Strain it, or Let it Stand, and Then Pour Off the Clear Liquid.
IF DESIRED: you can add Another Quart of Water to the Barley, and boil again, Combining the Liquid from Both.
You Should End up with about 8 cups of Barely Tea - but you can make it Stronger or more Dilute, as you Wish.
With Mortar & Pestle, Grind Seeds from Cardamom Pods quite fine, and add to the Hot Tea.
Serve Hot with Honey or sugar if wanted.
Store the Extra in the Refrigerator to heat Whenever you need it over the Nest Couple of Days.

name: Hot Cocoa
directions: Whisk all ingredients together on stovetop and heat until desired temperature.
If you have a high speed blender like a Vitamix, just combine all ingredients on high until hot enough.

name: Tanqueray Ten Citrus Gin Cocktail
directions: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker with scoop of ice. Shake, and strain over ice-fill glass.
Garnish with lemon or grapefruit slices.

name: Lemon Berry Breeze Cocktail
directions: Combine all ingredients in cocktail shaker with scoop of ice and shake well.
Add lemon-lime soda to shaker and strain over ice-filled glass.

name: Summer Solstice Punch Cocktail
directions: Berry-infused gin: Slice 24 fresh strawberries.
Combine strawberries with one bottle of Tanqueray No. Ten Citrus Gin in closed container and allow to sit for 24 hours.
For cocktail: Combine first four ingredients in cocktail shaker with scoop of ice and shake well.
Add club soda to shaker and strain into ice-filled cocktail glass.

name: Mademoiselle Cocktail
directions: Combine first 5 ingredients in cocktail shaker with scoop of ice and shake well.
Add club soda to shaker and strain into ice-filled cocktail glass.
Garnish with sliced grapefruit or lemon.

name: Mojito
directions: To make simple syrup, bring water and sugar to a boil in a pot. Add mint, cook for 1 minute, then let cool for 30 minutes.
To make the mojito, pour mint infused syrup, rum, lime juice and club soda in a glass filled with ice. Stir well.
Add mint leaves and lime wedge (squeeze extra juice into glass as well). Stir well to combine.

name: Butterbeer
directions: In a small saucepan, combine brown sugar with 2 tablespoons water. Bring to a boil over medium heat and cook until the mixture reaches 240 degrees F (115 degrees C) on a candy thermometer, stirring occasionally. If you don't have a candy thermometer, bring to a gentle boil and turn off the heat after about a minute of cooking.
Turn off the heat and add the butter, salt, vinegar, and 1/4 cup heavy cream. Stir until smooth. Cool mixture to room temperature before using.
In a medium bowl, beat together the remaining cream (1/2 cup) with 2 tablespoons of the brown sugar syrup.
In each glass, mix together 1/4 cup brown sugar syrup with 1/4 cup cream soda. Pour in the rest of the cream soda until it is nearly to the brim of the glass. Top with whipped cream.
Serve immediately!

name: Pina Colada
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender.
Process until smooth.

name: Texas Pete® Hotter Hot Sangria
directions: Using a vegetable peeler, peel the outermost layers of the lemons, limes and oranges.  You may get a small amount of the white pith from the peels but there is no need to discard or remove it.  You should end up with about 1 cup of peeled citrus zest.

Squeeze the juice from the lemons, limes and oranges and place the juice along with the peeled citrus zest in a medium-sized saucepot. Add the granulated sugar.  Bring the mixture to a boil and immediately remove from heat.  Allow the citrus simple syrup steep for 30 minutes. After steeping, strain it through a fine mesh strainer and place the simple syrup in the refrigerator to chill.
While the simple syrup is chilling prepare the red wine base.  Pour the bottle of red wine into a large serving pitcher followed by the triple sec, brandy and the chilled simple syrup.  Mix well.

Add 1 teaspoon of Texas Pete® Hotter Hot Sauce to the sangria base and mix well.  This is the time to taste it and see if it is spicy enough for your liking.  Add up to 1 more teaspoon if you like it spicier.  Keep the sangria base and the club soda separate and ice cold until you are ready to serve.
Serve the sangria chilled in a 2 oz. shot glass.  Mix 2 parts sangria base to 1 part club soda and serve immediately.

name: Rhubarb Spritzer
directions: In a medium saucepan, stir rhubarb, sugar and lemon juice over medium heat until sugar dissolves.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to medium-low.
Simmer, stirring occasionally, until rhubarb breaks down completely, about 6 minutes.
Strain through a fine-mesh sieve, pressing solids to extract as much liquid as possible.
Discard solids.
Cover and refrigerate until cold, at least 2 hours and up to 1 day.
Divide syrup amount 8 glasses.
Top with seltzer or Cava wine.
Garnish with lemon and grapefruit slices.
Serve immediately.

name: Blackberry Summer Smash
directions: In a rocks glass, muddle basil and 8 blackberries with lemon juice.
Fill glass with large, square ice cubes and top with ginger beer and bourbon, if desired.
Garnish with basil sprig and remaining 3 blackberries.
Serve immediately.

name: Strawberry Rum Float
directions: In a blender, puree hulled strawberries, simple syrup, lemon juice and rum until smooth.
Strain through a fine-mesh sieve, pressing seeds to extract as much liquid as possible.
Discard seeds.
Add simple syrup to taste. (optional and this is in addition to the simple syrup you pureed).
Divide strawberry syrup among 4 tall glasses.
Pour 4 oz club soda into each glass and stir gently to combine.
Divide strawberry wedges among glassed and top with a small scoop of ice cream each.
Serve immediately with long straws and spoons.

name: Ginger Lemonade
directions: Bring 1 cup water, sugar, & ginger to boil in small saucepan.
Stir constantly till sugar dissolves-1 minute
Remove from heat and let cool to room temperature, about 15 minute.
Pour in sparkling water, lemon juice, 1 cup ginger syrup (and vodka) over ice in large pitcher, stir gently. Garnish and serve.

name: Sweet & Spicy Apple Cider Cocktail
directions: Tie the loose spices into a piece of cheesecloth. Add to the cider and sugar in a small pan.
Heat over medium low heat, stirring well, till sugar is dissolved.
Continue to simmer for about 15 minute
Remove spice bag. Add rum and schnapps.
Stir well and serve warm.

name: Skinny Vanilla Mocha Frappe
directions: In a cup mix coffee and water and stir till combined.
Place in a shallow container, cover and freeze for 4 hrs or overnight.
Once coffee is frozen, place in a blender with the 1/2 c milk, vanilla, Stevia, and cocoa.
Blend till combined.
Note: you can substitute the instant coffee & water with 1 1/2 cups strong brewed coffee-just freeze it.

similar.name: Mr Coffee Chocolate Chip Mocha Frappe
Mr Coffee Slim Fast Vanilla Chip Frappe
Mr Coffee Slim Fast Mocha Frappe

name: White Grape & Orange Cooler
directions: Bring sugar and 1c water to boil over medium high heat, and cook-stirring often-for 3 minute or till sugar dissolves.
Remove from heat and cool.
Stir in juices and chill 2 hours.
Stir in ginger-ale just before serving.
Serve over ice. Garnish.

name: Hot Apple Cider Streudel Cocktail
directions: Fill a shaker with ice. Add vodka and cider. Add a dash of cinnamon.
Strain into a micro-safe bowl and micro cook till hot, but not boiling-@ 30 sec.
Rim a coffee mug or other hot beverage glass with powdered sugar.
Transfer warm beverage to rimed glasses.
Garnish with a dash of cinnamon and apple slice coated in caramel dipping sauce.

name: Mulled Wine
directions: Combine water and sugar in a 2 quart saucepan over medium heat. Stir till sugar dissolves.
Add wine and spice bag.
Heat very slowly over low heat only till small bubbles form around the edge and wine is very hot. DO NOT BOIL.
Discard bag; serve.

name: Mulled Apple Cider
directions: Place apple cider in a 3 quart saucepan and add spice bag.
Bring to a boil, reduce heat. Cover and simmer for 30 minute.
Discard spice and serve hot.

name: Homemade Martinelli's
directions: Pour ginger ale in punch bowl or pitcher.
Pour apple juice concentrate into ginger ale, swirling as you pour, so you don't need to stir the mixture and dilute the carbonation.  You may lightly stir the drink, if desired.
Serve immediately.  If you don't like it this sweet you may want to dilute the apple juice with water (that's what I did) first and then add the ginger ale.

name: Mango-Milk Shake
directions: Cut a mango into cubes. Blend it after adding some milk and the sugar.
Add rest portion of the milk gradually and blend it.
After blending, serve the drink in glasses and use another mango for garnish.

name: Strawberry Daiquiri
directions: Place all ingredients in blender in order listed.
Blend until desired consistency.

similar.name: Strawberry (Or Banana or Peach  or Pineapple) Frozen Daiquiris

name: Mango Siberian Sunrise
directions: Blend ingredients with crushed ice and pour into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with mango slice.

name: Tolstoy Tang
directions: Shake with ice and strain into a glass.
Garnish with a slice of lemon on the edge of the glass.

name: Jalapeno-Spiked Bourbon Julep
directions: In a julep cup, pour Jalapeno Simple Syrup and add mint; gently bruise leaves with a muddler or wooden spoon. Add enough crushed ice to fill two-thirds of the cup. Add bourbon and stir gently; then add a bit more crushed ice. Top with a splash of club soda. Garnish with mint sprig and jalapeno.
Jalapeno Syrup:  In a small saucepan over high heat, combine 1 cup water, sugar, and jalapenos. Bring to a boil, stirring to dissolve sugar. Remove from heat and let steep 20 minutes.
Strain syrup, discard jalapenos, and cool syrup. (Simple syrup can be refrigerated, in an airtight container, for up to 6 months.).

name: Chucktown Sunrise
directions: Combine 2 Tbsp. bourbon and 1 1/2 teaspoons fresh lime juice in a cocktail shaker; fill with ice. Cover with lid, and shake vigorously until thoroughly chilled (about 30 seconds). Strain into a 10-oz. glass filled with ice. Top with 6 Tbsp. of your favorite ginger ale or ginger beer.
Drizzle with 1/4 teaspoons grenadine. with fresh lime slices or wedges. Garnish with fresh lime slices or wedges.
Note: If you can find them use good quality ginger ale and grenadine. I love Fever Tree and Jack Rudy's small batch grenadine.

name: Fig-And-Bourbon Fizz
directions: Muddle fig, mint leaves, and brown sugar cubes against sides of a cocktail shaker. (Fig needs to be fairly broken down.) Add bourbon and enough ice cubes to fill shaker (about 1 cup). Cover with lid, and shake vigorously until thoroughly chilled (about 30 seconds).
Strain into a 10-oz. glass filled with ice cubes. Top with chilled ginger ale. Stir gently, and garnish, if desired. Serve immediately.

name: Bourbon-Peach Cocktail
directions: Combine first 4 ingredients in a cocktail shaker; fill with ice. Cover with lid, and shake vigorously until thoroughly chilled (about 30 seconds).
Strain bourbon mixture into a 10-oz. glass filled with ice; top with club soda and, if desired, bitters.

name: Apple Juice (Vitamix)
directions: Place water and apples into the Vitamix container in the order listed and secure lid.
Select Variable 1.
Turn machine on and slowly increase speed to Variable 10, then to High.
Blend for 45 seconds, using the tamper to push apples into the blades until puréed.
If desired, transfer purée to a bowl lined with cheesecloth set atop a bowl and twist until juice is extracted.
Allow to strain about 10 minutes.

name: Russian Hot Chocolate
directions: Heat milk and cream on the stove or in the microwave until scalding.
Boil water on the stove.
Add sugar and salt to water and stir in until sugar melts.
Add chocolate to the water and stir until melted.
Once everything is well blended, boil for 5 minutes.
Add scalded milk, coffee and vanilla.
Beat with egg beater to make it frothy and enjoy.

name: Continuous Brew Kombucha Tea
directions: Bring one quart of water to boil, turn heat off, then add the tea (in a bag or use tea bags, 6-8).  Cover and let steep for 10 minutes, more if you like stronger tea.
Add 1 cup sugar and stir until dissolved; let water cool for a few minutes.
In a large glass beverage container, with a plastic spigot, put the 1 quart of tea, along with 3 more quarts of cool water and stir.
Add 1-2 cups of starter tea.  This is tea that has been fermented from a previous batch.  You should have gotten this with the scoby (from a friend).  Put scoby on top of tea.

Cover with a small tea towel and rubber band (to keep secure and keep out bugs - they love this stuff).  Let sit on the counter for 7-10 days, tasting after 7 days to see if you like it.  You can then pour some out to drink, or you can bottle some of it and flavor it to second ferment.  You can flavor it with just about any fruit or veggie etc.  Put a bit of the fruit or pureed fruit (about 1/4 C) in a soda bottle and add kombucha.  Do not fill to the top or it may fizz out of the bottle.  Cap and let sit on counter for another day or so, burping as necessary to avoid explosions.  Place in fridge after the 2nd ferment.  It will continue to ferment in the fridge, but much more slowly.

When your supply is down to 2 quarts, make another batch but be sure to remove scoby from the glass container when adding the new, cooled tea.  You won't need more starter tea, as that is what is in your container already!  Add scoby back in and cover.

Notes: If you see some dark strings in the tea, that is the yeast.  It is perfectly fine.  For lots of help and questions, Facebook has several groups dedicated to fermenting and also to kombucha.  Most of the groups are very helpful and friendly.  You may also contact me and I will try to help, if I can.  Each time the scoby is moved, jostled, etc, it will grow a 'baby'.  You may leave it attached to the 'mother' or eventually pull them apart if the tea gets too vinegary too quickly.  Save the baby (or mother) in a separate glass jar with kombucha tea to cover.  It doesn't matter if your scoby is small for your jar.  The baby scoby will grow to fit the container.

name: Bubbly Cranberry Mixer
directions: In a large pitcher, combine cranberry juice and limeade.
Refrigerate until serving.
For each serving pour 1/4 cup cranberry mixture into a champagne glass and add 1/4 cup champagne.

name: Carrot Peach Banana Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in blender.
Process until smooth, adding more water if needed.

name: Watermelon Slushie
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender.
Process until smooth.

name: Zucchini, Apple and Banana Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender.
Process until smooth.

name: Red Sangria
directions: Cut 2 thick slices from the center of the orange, then from center of lemon. Remove seeds from slices and set aside.
Squeeze juice from remaining parts of orange and lemon. Strain into 2-quart container. Add spices, sugar, brandy, wine, and orange and lemon slices; mix well. Cover; let stand 1 hour.
Pour wine mixture and soda into a large decanter or serving pitcher. Pour over ice in tall, chilled glasses; garnish each glass with an orange slice.
White Bordeau can be used instead of the red.

name: Bicicletta Cocktail
directions: Pour the spirits into a tall glass with ice cubes and top with club soda.
Garnish with a slice of lemon.

name: Rossini Cocktail
directions: Pour strawberry purée into a chilled champagne glass, and top with prosecco.
Garnish glass with fresh strawberry.

name: Angelo Azzurro (Blue Angel) Cocktail
directions: Add ice cubes to shaker, pour spirits over the ice then shake 8-10 seconds.
Pour into chilled martini or high ball glass.
Garnish with wedge of lemon, lime or orange.

name: Lavender Chai
directions: Put water, tea and spices in a large pan and bring to a boil. You can start with the tea and water and add the rest as those are heating up.
When tea boils, add milk and bring to a simmer.
Strain and serve with sugar or honey to taste.

name: Cold Pressed Coffee
directions: Pour the coffee grounds into the bottom of the french press.
Pour the water into the French Press.
Stir until well blended.
Place the top of the French Press, but do not press the filter.
Leave at room temperature for 12 hours or put in the refridgerator for up to 24 hours.
Press the filter to the bottom of the French Press.
Pour over ice and enjoy!

similar.name: Coffee No Pot or Maker Needed

name: Apple Pie Martini
directions: Put all ingredients except cinnamon in a cocktail shaker with some ice and shake well.
Pour into a glass and put a dash of cinnamon on top.
Enjoy!

name: The 5AM Latte
directions: Microwave or heat milk and cinnamon in sauce pan until steamy hot.
Brew espresso and pour immediately into mug of milk.

name: Very Orange Beverage
directions: Mix all the ingredients.
enjoy your very orange drink!

name: Hudson Valley Distillers' Adirondack Applejack
directions: Combine all ingredients in a saucepan and simmer, add caramel sauce after pouring.
Serve in an Irish coffee glass and garnish with cinnamon sticks.

name: Hot Buttered Rum Batter
directions: In a mixing bowl, cream butter and brown sugar.
Add eggs and spices.
Beat on low to medium speed until the consistency of thick whipped cream - could take up to 1 hour. (A stand mixer makes this much easier.).
To serve, mix 1-2 heaping tablespoons of the batter in a mug with about 2 jiggers of rum (or more to taste). Fill with boiling water, and stir.
(If batter is frozen when you use it, microwave it in the mug for about 20-30 seconds to thaw it quickly before stirring in rum and hot water.).

name: Turmeric Juice
directions: Place all ingredients into a large glass container, mix well and refrigerate overnight.
Strain and serve. NOTE: the turmeric may stain your strainer! It did mine. I used a VERY mild solution of soapy bleach water to remove it.

name: Food Babe's Turmeric Cooler Juice
directions: Wash all vegetables thoroughly and place into a large bowl.
Juice each vegetable in this order – turmeric, romaine, carrots, lemon, and cucumber.
Stir mixture before serving.
Clean juicer immediately.

name: Hot Chocolate
directions: Combine sugar, cocoa powder (I use Toll House brand), and cinnamon in a small pan and mix together with a small whisk or spoon.
Add 3/4 cup of milk to dry ingredients and mix.  The cocoa powder will be rejecting the milk at this time.  This is completely normal.
Boil mixture on medium-high heat until the sugar is dissolved.  You will notice that the cocoa has now become one with the milk.
Add remaining milk (1 cup) to the pan and lower the heat to low.  Depending on how sweet you want your hot chocolate to be, you may want to add more milk.
Pour into a cup, add some marshmallows (if you'd like), and Enjoy!

name: The Best Whiskey Sour
directions: Rub lemon wedge around rim of a 12 oz. rocks glass. Place turbinado sugar in a shallow dish. Dip the rim of the glass in the sugar to coat; set aside.
In a large cocktail shaker, combine bourbon, orange juice, lemon juice, granulated sugar and ice. Cover, and shake vigorously until all ingredients are well combined and cold.
Pour into prepared glass and garnish with orange slice.

name: Suzmopolitan
directions: Add first three ingredients to cocktail shaker filled with ice. Shake until combined. Strain into martini glass.
Garnish with twisted grapefruit rind or slice.
Enjoy!

name: Italian Mocha Espresso Mix
directions: Sift all ingredients together. Combine until well mixed.
Add 3 tablespoons mix to 1 cup boiling water.
Note: You may use non-fat dry milk, but it will not be as rich. Also, you may use decaf instant coffee.

similar.name: Chocolate Cappuccino Coffee Mix (In a Jar)

name: Homemade Wassail Mix
directions: Mix all ingredients well.
Add 1 tablespoon mix to 1 cup hot water, apple cider, tea, etc.

name: Papaw's Egg Nog
directions: Separate eggs and beat both whites and yolks.
Add 1/2 C Sugar to yolks while beating.
Thoroughly clean beater after beating yolks.
Add 1/ C Sugar to whites once they form stiff peaks.
Thoroughly clean beater after beating whites.
Beat 1 pint Whipping Cream to soft peaks.
Fold blended yolks, milk, bourbon and rum into the whipped cream.  Once combined, fold in egg whites. Sprinkle nutmeg over the top.

name: Beezlenut Splash
directions: Prepare both boxes of jello according to package directions, but use 1 cup of boiling water and do not add any cold water. The jello should be extra firm. Refrigerate for 4 hours.
Cut into cubes.
Fill glasses with lemon lime beverage.
Add the gelatin cubes.
Serve.

name: Iced Turmeric Tea
directions: Stir ground turmeric and ground ginger into a cup of boiling water.
Cool and pour over ice. Turmeric may settle, just stir to mix.
Add lemon juice to taste.

name: Anti-Inflammatory Ginger Root Tea
directions: Bring the water to a boil in a saucepan or teapot.
Place ginger, lemon juice and mint leaves in teacup.
Add hot water and enjoy!

name: Detox Tea for Fewer Wrinkles
directions: Steep the ginger in a small pot with about 1 1/2 cups of water for a few moments.
Pour into a mug.
Allow to cool for a few moments, then add the lemon, cayenne pepper, and stevia, making as sweet as desired.

similar.name: Lemon Grass and Ginger Iced Tea

name: Banana Tea
directions: Boil water. Cut off both ends of banana and place in water. Boil for about 10 minutes.
Pour water through colander and into mug. Drink one hour before bed.
If you're feeling adventurous, you can also eat the banana and its peel an hour before bed. For an extra flavor kick, sprinkle with cinnamon!

name: Mulled Apple Cider
directions: Place all ingredients in a medium saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer for 20-30 minutes.
Top with whip cream, if desired.

name: Iced Tea Syrup
directions: Steep tea in boiled water for 15 minutes.
Strain out loose tea, add liquid and sugar into a pot, boil for 10 minutes. Take off heat and cool.
Add 1 Tbsp to a glass and fill with chilled water and ice; add garnish if desired.

name: Apple Spice Water
directions: Slice apples and add to pot with other ingredients.
Boil on low heat for roughly 2 hours.
add more water if needed.
once flavor is consistent remove from heat and allow to cool.
Pour liquid into pitcher straining off all remaining ingredients.
Can be refrigerated or drank warm.  Some may prefer to water it down even further.

name: Easy Chicken
directions: place oil in pan.
place chicken breast in pan.
season only the side facing up with Beer Can Chicken Spice.
add 3/4 Cup Orange Juice.
add 1/4 Cup Water.
add 2 tablespoons Italian Dressing
add 1 Teaspoon Worcestershire sauce.

Bring Chicken to a slow boil (Don't flip it yet) when the top outside corners turn white flip the chicken over continue to slow boil the chicken. When almost all of the liquid is gone it's done. I served mine with Rice you can take the drippings and spread over the rice.

name: Homemade Coffee Creamer
directions: Place all ingredients in blender and mix well.
Store in refrigerator.

name: Strawberry Shortcake Milkshake
directions: Place all ingredients into a blender.
Blend on medium speed until smooth. Pour into glass and top with extra strawberry slices and/or light whip cream!

name: Kahlua Hot Chocolate
directions: Whisk 2 Tbsp each sugar, Dutch processed cocoa, ground cinnamon & ground nutmeg in a small saucepan.
Slowly whisk in milk; cook and stir until heated through. Remove from heat; stir in Kahlua. Ladle into 2 mugs.

name: Copycat Starbucks Cinnamon Dolce Frappuccino
directions: Take 1 cup of ice and blend that into snow.
Add the milk, syrups, and coffee and just blend until incorporated. Enjoy!

cinnamon dolce syrup: 1 cup sugar, 1/2 cup brown sugar, 1 1/2 cup water, 1.5 teaspoons cinnamon.  Combine all in a saucepan and bring to a boil. Simmer for 15 minutes and put in a jar. Fills up a mason jar. You only need 2 tbsp for a 16 ounce frappuccino.

name: The Sidecar Cocktail
directions: Preparation and Serving.
If you want to garnish the glass rim with sugar, wet the outside of the rim with lemon juice.  Dip the outside of the rim in sugar, and swirl glass to coat.
For the drink, combine lemon juice, Cointreau, and cognac in a cocktail shaker that is half filled with ice.  Shake well for 20 - 30 seconds.
Strain mixture into the cocktail glass.  If you don’t sugar the rim, you could garnish with a lemon twist or orange slice.
http://www.kitchenriffs.com/2012/01/sidecar-cocktail.html.

name: The Dark and Stormy Cocktail
directions: Fill a highball or rocks glass with ice (you want to use a glass that holds about 9 ounces or so).
Add the rum, ginger beer, and lime juice to the glass (see Notes for variations).  Add a pair of straws, optional lime slice garnish, and serve.
http://www.kitchenriffs.com/2013/06/the-dark-and-stormy-cocktail.html.

name: South Side
directions: Muddle 4 mint leaves with simple syrup in a cocktail shaker.
Add gin and lemon juice; fill shaker with ice and shake until frosty.
Strain into an ice-filled glass; top with club soda and mint sprig.

name: Mark's Honey Sweetened Tea
directions: Bring 1 quart of filtered water to rolling boil.
remove water from heat and add in tea bags. Steep for 15 minutes.
In a 2 cup measuring cup measure out 1/3 cup of raw honey then fill with filtered water to 1 2/3 cup level and slowly stir until honey is dissolved.

In a 1 gallon jug ( I used plastic one for mixing only as repeated hot liquids in my glass container will crack it eventually) add 1 quart tea concentrate with bags removed with bags pressed of liquid. Fill jug half way with filtered water then mix in honey water fill to 1 gallon mark stir.
transfer to glass container and refrigerate. ENJOY!

name: Wassail
directions: Combine sugar and water in a saucepan and boil 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and add cloves, cinnamon sticks, ginger, and allspice berries.
Cover and let stand 60 minutes.
Strain liquid (I usually just pour it through a colander).
Just before serving, add juices and quickly bring to a boil.
Remove from heat and serve.

name: Birthday Cake Frappuccino
directions: Place all ingredients in blender in the order listed.
Blend until smooth.
Top with plain or raspberry-infused whipped cream if desired and serve.

name: Brazilian Lemonade
directions: Wash limes thoroughly.  Cut off the ends and slice into eight wedges.
Place limes in a blender with the sugar, sweetened condensed milk, water, and ice.
Blend in an electric blender, pulsing five times.  Strain through a fine mesh strainer to remove rinds.  Serve over ice.

name: Coastal Skies (Cocktail)
directions: Combine first 6 ingredients in an ice-filled pitcher.
Garnish, if desired.

name: White Chocolate Strawberry Smoothie
directions: Add strawberries and banana into blender.
Put the white chocolate chips into a microwavable container until chocolate is melted. Then add to blender.
Place remaining ingredients in blender.
Blend for at least 30 seconds.
Note: The white chocolate may not perfectly blend with the rest of the smoothie, but the drink will still be smooth and taste great!
Pour and enjoy!

name: Potent Lemon Drops
directions: Place all ingredients in shaker with ice.
Shake well and pour into martini glasses.

name: Homemade Gatorade
directions: Stir all ingredients in a 2 quart pitcher til combined.
Place in the refrigerator till chilled or serve over ice.

name: Yummy Choco-Hazelnut Latte
directions: Prepare the Vanilla Latte according to instructions on the packaging.
Add the chocolate hazelnut spread to the beverage and stir well.
Top with whipped cream to taste.

similar.name: Choco Fa- La- La- Latte  Yum!

name: Orange Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender.
Blend until smooth.

name: Mulled Citrus Cider
directions: In a large saucepan, bring tangerine juice, apple juice, cinnamon sticks, lemon slices, cloves and allspice to a simmer over medium-low heat;  cook for 20 minutes.  Strain through a sieve into a pitcher.
Garnish each serving cup with tangerine slices and cinnamon sticks, if desired.

name: Raspberry "Mojito"
directions: Muddle or crush raspberries, mint, and lime in serving glass.
Add rum, ice, and ginger ale.
Stir and enjoy.

name: Strawberry Milk
directions: Place all ingredients into blender.
Blend until smooth, adding more ice if needed.

name: Limonada De Coco (Coconut Limeade)
directions: Place all the ingredients in a blender until smooth.
Serve immediately and enjoy.

name: Strawberry Limeade
directions: Wash and de-stem strawberries and cut into fourths.
Process all except Sierra Mist in food processor or blender.
Enjoy!

name: Peach Melba Sangria
directions: Slice the peaches and place them in a one gallon pitcher.
Add the rose wine.
Add the peach brandy.
Add the Chambord.
Add the raspberries.
Stir and place in the refrigerator for a minimum of 8 hours to let the flavors meld, and the alcohol mellow.
Just before serving add the lemon-lime soda.
Pour and serve over ice.

similar.name: Peach, Apricot, Berry White Sangria for a Crowd

name: Hotter Hot Sangria
directions: Using a vegetable peeler, peel the outermost layers of the lemons, limes and oranges.  You may get a small amount of the white pith from the peels but there is no need to discard or remove it.  You should end up with about 1 cup of peeled citrus zest.

Squeeze the juice from the lemons, limes and oranges and place the juice along with the peeled citrus zest in a medium-sized saucepot. Add the granulated sugar.  Bring the mixture to a boil and immediately remove from heat.  Allow the citrus simple syrup steep for 30 minutes. After steeping, strain it through a fine mesh strainer and place the simple syrup in the refrigerator to chill.
While the simple syrup is chilling prepare the red wine base.  Pour the bottle of red wine into a large serving pitcher followed by the triple sec, brandy and the chilled simple syrup.  Mix well.

Add 1 teaspoon of Texas Pete® Hotter Hot Sauce to the sangria base and mix well.  This is the time to taste it and see if it is spicy enough for your liking.  Add up to 1 more teaspoon if you like it spicier.  Keep the sangria base and the club soda separate and ice cold until you are ready to serve.
Serve the sangria chilled.  Mix 2 parts sangria base to 1 part club soda and serve immediately.

name: Vanilla Soda
directions: Get a pot.
Put the sugar and water in the pot.
Crank up the heat to high.
Stir the sugar/water until it becomes clear.
Add vanilla extrace.
Stir.
Pour into a glass.
Add seltzer.
Chill it.
Enjoy.

name: Alpine Cocktail
directions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker over ice,
Shake well and strain into cocktail glass. garnish with black cherry.

name: Lemon Soda
directions: mix all the ingredients together.
microwave for 10 seconds.
stir.
freeze/cool.
enjoy!

name: Simply Perfect Smoothie
directions: Place all ingrediants in blender and mix until smooth!
Pour in glass and enjoy!

name: Japanese Yuzu and Ginger Cocktail
directions: Combine gin, yuzu juice and simple syrup in a cocktail shaker. Shake shake shake…shake shake shake…shake (Pour into a glass filled with ice, garnish with thinly sliced ginger root and mint leaves.

Combine all ingredients in a small, heavy saucepan over medium heat. Stir constantly for 3 minutes to dissolve honey in the water. Continue cooking over medium heat for another 5 minutes or until a syrup-like texture is achieved. Pour the syrup into a small glass bowl and allow to cool slightly before use.
when using a cocktail shaker it is helpful to use the syrup while it is still slightly warm, stirring it with the cocktail ingredients to ensure it is well combined before adding ice.).

name: Setting Sun Cocktail
directions: Fill a pilsner glass with pebble ice. Add sake, Aperol, and yuzu juice, and use a swizzle wand to lightly mix.
.Top with more sparkling sake if needed.
Garnish with orange wedge and mint.

name: Cherry Sake Cocktails
directions: Divide cherries among two tall glasses. Gently muddle cherries with the back of a wooden spoon in the bottom of each glass. Top with plenty of ice.
Add 2 shots of sake to each glass. Fill to the top with ginger ale.
Sip and enjoy.
